name: Fragrance Fitting - Custom Sample Pack
description: Let us help you find your next signature scent! The Luckyscent Fragrance Fitting脗庐is a selection of six samples, carefully handpicked for you by one of our knowledgeable Scent Bar team members. Your samples will be chosen based on information you give to us.In the box below, please provide us with some details about what you are looking for. For example, are you seeking a fragrance for evening, for work, everyday? Are there any fragrances you love or loathe? Which fragrance notes are you drawn to the most? You can also share any personal information that you feel might be relevant (e.g., age, style, personality traits, etc). The more details you can provide, the better!Et voila! Once we receive your information, we will carefully read through what you've written and make some personal selections we think you'll enjoy.Please note: if you are purchasing a fragrance fitting as a gift, we are unable to reach out to the recipient on your behalf. Please send us any relevant info for the receiver's fitting in the space provided when purchasingYour order will take 3-6 business days to process as we customize your sample pack.

name: Kun Amo
notes: Mandarin, Bergamot, Almond, Crunchy Pear, Jasmine, Sea Spray, Raspberry, Cedarwood, Sugar, White Musks, Ambery Woods, Cashmeran
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Woody - Amber
description: An homage to Jeroboam founder Fran脙搂ois H脙漏nin's childhood memories of picking crisp pears from his family orchard, Kun Amo is a luminous and sensual perfume extract in which pear reigns supreme, transformed into a veritable olfactory muse. Sun-drenched, luscious and seductive, the fruit mingles with a generous dose of sweetness and captivating aromas, underpinned by modern, ambery woods and the house芒聙聶s emblematic musks, boasting an intense trail and remarkable hold to leave a lasting impression. Radiating with confidence and joy, Kun Amo is a bold perfume that asserts its presence with elegance and character.

name: Mango Sticky Rice
notes: Ripe Mango, Sticky Rice, Coconut Milk
style: Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Milky, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy
description: Mango Sticky Rice pays homage to Thailand芒聙聶s most beloved dessert, enjoyed for generations at temple fairs and family gatherings. This scent celebrates the harmony of juicy mangoes, tender sticky rice, and creamy coconut milk. An exquisite dish that embodies the sweetness of Thai hospitality.

name: Vanilified
notes: Vanilla, Vanilla Beans, Vanilla Bourbon, Vanilla Powder, Cocoa Absolute, Musk
style: Boozy, Creamy, Gourmand, Milky, Sweet
description: You enter an ice cream shop. You order a triple scoop vanilla cone with chocolate toppings. You wish you could smell like the decadent, creamy, mouthwateringly sweet ice cream you're enjoying. And now you can. Infused with multiple layers of succulent vanilla, Vanilified is an ice cream fanatic's ultimate gourmand fragrance delight.

name: With Angels and Archangels
notes: Sandalwood, Cedar, Incense, Charcoal, Rose, Musk
style: Floral - Spicy, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: It's you and the Divine together sharing a holy space. A plume of incense clouds the room filled with old wooden furniture and flowers.Wings flutter above, but are unseen and unheard. Yet, you are not alone.Deus Vobiscum Est.

name: Inner Child
notes: Linen, Bergamot, Freesia, Vanilla, Lily Of The Valley, White Wood, Birch Wood, Skin Musk
style: Floral - Light, Fresh - Clean, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Light
description: The quiet luxury of being completely alone and starting fresh without announcing it. Soft, intimate, and unguarded. The version of you that exists before expectations, before performance, before being perceived. The comfort of returning to yourself.

name: Bianco Latte
notes: Caramel, Coumarin, Honey, Vanilla, White Musk
description: The sheer bliss of a warm embrace. The abiding memory of a bite of sweetness shared between loved ones. The deep satisfaction of complete comfort. This is Bianco Latte, an unforgettable cloud of gourmand perfection- mouthwatering ribbons of caramel swirled with syrupy honey and indulgently creamy vanilla, but given buoyant sensuality with a pillowy cloud of divine white musk. Playful yet seductive, Bianco Latte is a gourmand for those who indulge all sides of their sweet tooth.

name: White Rice
notes: Rice, Pandan, Orris, Jasmine, White Musk, Cedarwood, Tonka Bean
style: Creamy, Floral - Light, Gourmand, Milky, Powdery / Soft, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: A tribute to Vietnam's cultural symbol of livelihood - the white jasmine rice. Found at nearly every Vietnamese meal, the humble bowl of rice has nurtured generations. This scent presents a subtly sweet aroma, harmonizing gentle softness with the rice grain's nuttiness. As you savor it, you embrace the heart of Vietnamese culture, where humble beginnings flourish into enduring strength.

name: Celestial Object
notes: Quince, Pink Pepper, Incense, Almond, Rice Paper, Labdanum, Tonka Bean
style: Avant-Garde, Fruity, Resinous / Balsamic, Skin Scent / Minimal, Warm
description: We are made of stars-- mystery, light, and infinite possibility. Celestial Object is a fragrance born of that cosmic connection between body and sky, its name drawn from the language of the heavens. A radiant opening of quince and pink pepper shimmers like constellations through a luminous haze, while almond and rice paper anchor the scent in soft, tactile warmth. A barely-there incense rises like a whispered prayer to the cosmos, and a deep accord of tonka and labdanum unfurls with the richness of midnight skies. The result is intimate, radiant, and as mesmerizing as stardust on your skin.

name: Hay, Zhasmina!
notes: Mandarin, Fennel, Pear, Neroli, Bergamot, Passionfruit, Lemon, Ginger Flower, Jasmine, Ylang-ylang, White Lotus, Vanilla, Bulgarian Rose, Musk, Ambergris, Cashmere, White Woods, Sandalwood, Caramel.
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: Wouldn't it be nice to feel sweet and snuggly all the time? Hay, Zhasmina! is an amber and woody scent with notes of jasmine, fennel, ylang-ylang, and Bulgarian Rose. She has a natural warmth and kindness that complements her tender aura. In the heart of the Bulgarian Rose Valley, the damascene roses that bloom are distilled into the Bulgarian Rose oil that forms the base of this richly romantic perfume. Atop this rosy perfection, distilled leaves, roots and flowers are layered to create an eau de parfum. The result is a luxurious long-lasting scent ready to blossom on your skin, your clothes, and in your space.

name: Great Root, Green Ruth
notes: Saffron, Nutmeg, Bergamot, Mandarin, Orange, Lemon, Lavender, Black Pepper, Ginger, Haitian Vetiver, Bulgarian Geranium, Iris, Oud, Amberwood, Sandalwood, Cinnamon, Jasmine, Ylang-ylang, Sage, Chamomile, Almond, Patchouli, Cedar, Benzoin, White Musk, Ambergris, Ebony Wood, Tonka Bean, Vanilla
style: Earthy, Floral, Floral - Spicy, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Explore the natural world with Great Root, Green Ruth. She芒聙聶s an outdoorsy girl with top notes of vetiver, saffron, nutmeg, and Bulgarian geranium who芒聙聶s unafraid to explore the wilderness with her trusty snail pet. In the heart of the Bulgarian Rose Valley, the damascene roses that bloom are distilled into the Bulgarian Rose oil that forms the base of this rich and romantic perfume. Atop this rosy perfection, distilled leaves, roots and flowers are layered to create an eau de parfum. The result is a luxurious long-lasting scent ready to blossom on your skin, your clothes, and in your space.

name: Queen Rosa, Rosa is Queen
notes: White Orchid, Bergamot, Ginger, Pink Pepper, Mandarin Orange, Plum, Bulgarian Rose, Patchouli, Honey, Tobacco, Sesame, Cinnamon, Sandalwood, White Musk, Caramel, Tonka Bean, Ambergris, Cashmere Wood, Benzoin, Oud, Vanilla
style: Floral, Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Citrus, Floral - Spicy, Sweet, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Queen Rosa, Rosa is Queen is a floral, woodsy, musky scent. With notes of bergamot, pink pepper, and Bulgarian Rose, her bright bouquet mirrors her outgoing and flirty personality. With fishnets and fairy wings she's born to be a star.In the heart of the Bulgarian Rose Valley, the damascene roses that bloom are distilled into the Bulgarian Rose oil that forms the base of our perfume. Atop this rosy base, distilled leaves, roots and flowers are layered to create an eau de parfum. The result is a luxurious long-lasting scent ready to blossom on your skin, your clothes, and in your space.

name: Discovery Set
description: Queen Rosa, Rosa is Queen is a sexy, mischievous fairy. Hay, Zhasmina! is a sweetheart. Great Root, Green Ruth is the woodsy nymph.Each scent draws inspiration from characters and collections in the Chopova Lowena universe. From the spunky skater girl to the crystal-carrying poet to the rebellious prep school dropout, all your favourite girls are reimagined as a perfume. Wear each on its own or layer them for a complex and vibrant feeling.Please Note: This Tester Set contains 2ml samples of the Extrait de Parfum versions of these fragrances. The 50ml bottles for sale at Luckyscent are the EDP versions.

name: Dreams and Nightmares
notes: Pink Pepper, Cardamom, Eucalyptus, Bergamot, Patchouli, Petrichor, Wet Earth, Moss, Amber Woods
style: Earthy, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Amber
description: The same place can save you or swallow you whole. Beautiful and unsettling. Calm until it isn芒聙聶t. The moment you realize that desire and fear often arrive together, and you don芒聙聶t want to send either of them away. Because the things that haunt you are usually the same ones you芒聙聶re chasing.

name: ZAR
notes: Red Wine Accord, Aragon Flowers, Peach, Red Pepper, Cardamom, Basil, Opoponax Resin, Aragon Orange, Papuan Wild Oud
style: Boozy, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: A glowing olfactory tribute to ZAR(agoza), the city where Mallo perfumes originates from. Combining aromatic notes, fruits and liqueurs with a warm base of woods, the scent is a gourmand composition in the inimitable style of the brand.ZAR was specially commissioned for a special tourism fair in Madrid showcasing the Aragon province. Akin to drinking a glass of fine exotic Sangria, this is your chance to take an armchair olfactory ride to this incredible historically steeped Spanish city of many sensual delights.

name: Qasar
notes: Blackcurrant, Raspberry, Black Tea CO2, Hedione, Vanilla CO2, Golden Brown Sugar, Sandalwood, Musks, Amber Woods
style: Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: Qasar is an invitation to explore the mysterious and luminous intensity of the universe. Inspired by the power of quasars, those rare celestial bodies that project their brilliance across galaxies and through time, this unisex fragrance is a subtle marriage of depth and lightness. Conceived as an encounter between amber, musky, and fruity accords, Qasar envelops the skin in a captivating and timeless aura. Each note reveals a gentle yet persistent energy, reminiscent of light traversing time and space.

name: Lust In Paradise Extrait
notes: Pink Pepper, White Peony, Lychee, White Cedar, Musk, Amber
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Woody - Fresh
description: A voyage to the French Riveria, by way of a blissful dream. That's the enchanting promise of Lust In Paradise, the newest entry in Ex Nihilo's exquisite Les Interdites collection- an undeniably dreamlike floral that weds lush white peony to a vibrant blend of spice, fruit and musk to create a hypnotically romantic journey to a fairytale destination.Our vacation begins with a zesty sparkle of pink pepper, setting the stage for the brightness of white peonies, awash in a mouthwatering waterfall of fresh, gently tart lychee, creating a swoon-worthy rush of smooth sensuality. As it dries, an addictive signature of cedarwood and musk furthers our Riveria dreams with the unmistakable feeling of skin warmed by the Mediterranean sun. Carefree and cheerful, gorgeous and unforgettable, Lust In Paradise is a journey you won't want to miss.

name: Matcha Break
notes: Matcha, Bamboo, Jasmine, Milk, Cream, White Chocolate
style: Creamy, Earthy, Green / Herbaceous
description: In the middle of a busy day, there is a a moment. A pause and you find rest in a simple ritual; a bowl, a bamboo whisk, and a vivid green matcha swirling into life.Matcha Break is your reminder to slow down and enjoy life, if just for a moment.

name: YETI
notes: Juniper Berry, Timur Pepper, Cardamom, Elemi, Black Pepper, Oakmoss, Silver Fir Nepal, Fir Needles, Black Tea, Sugandha Kokila, Sandalwood, Thai Oud (Prachin), Valerian Root, Nord, Guaiac Wood
style: Fresh, Green / Herbaceous, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: High above the tree line, where the air thins and silence becomes absolute, YETI awakens.A piercing gust of juniper berry and Timur pepper surges forward like glacial wind across Himalayan ridges. Cardamom and elemi shimmer with resinous brightness, while black pepper crackles against the cold, sharp, luminous, untamed.As the ascent deepens, vast forests emerge beneath drifting mist. Oakmoss spreads like ancient earth beneath towering silver fir of Nepal and rugged Douglas fir needles. A dark infusion of black tea rises through the composition, dry, smoky, contemplative, echoing the stillness of a remote mountain monastery.In the depths, YETI reveals its primal force. Sugandha Kokila exudes its mysterious balsamic spice, entwined with creamy sandalwood and the profound richness of Thai oud from Prachin. Valerian root adds an earthy, almost animalic pulse, while smoldering guaiacwood leaves a shadowed, resinous trail, powerful, enduring, elemental.YETI is not merely a fragrance.It is altitude, solitude, and myth, captured in scent.

name: Oro e Miele
notes: Almond Blossom, Rose, Heliotrope Accord, Wildflower Honey, Vanilla Berries, Coconut, Iris, Tonka Bean, Benzoin, White Musk, Sandalwood, Cedarwood
style: Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: Oro e Miele speaks of a beauty that does not show itself, but is felt.It is an intimate fragrance, created for those moments when you need to listen to yourself and feel good in your own company.The opening is soft and radiant: almond blossom and rose immediately create a welcoming sensation, while heliotrope brings a calm and continuous glow. At the heart, wildflower honey takes centre stage, warm and enveloping, accompanied by vanilla and coconut that enhance its sweetness without making it excessive. In the base, a powdery iris which, together with the honey, lends a discreet and sophisticated sensuality, made even more harmonious by white musk, sandalwood, tonka bean and cedarwood.An elegant presence, one that accompanies you and lingers on the skin.

name: Ricordami
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Sweet Orange, Fig Leaf, Galbanum, Magnolia, Lily Of The Valley, Aquatic Accord, White Melon, Coconut, Cassis, Ambergris, Ambrette Seeds, Benzoin, Oakmoss, Vetiver, Cedarwood
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Fresh - Aquatic, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Tropical / Beachy, Woody - Fresh
description: Ricordami is a fragrance that speaks of affection, evoking simple moments that remain impressed in the memory. It is not a nostalgic fragrance in a melancholy sense, but a luminous, living nostalgia, made of images and colours.The green opening of citrus, galbanum and fig leaf is vivid, dewy and natural, like a memory that suddenly resurfaces. At the heart, magnolia, lily of the valley and fruity accents bring a reassuring and familiar feeling, made of intimacy and presence. The woody and amber base, with ambergris, vetiver, oakmoss and cedarwood, gives structure and persistence.Ricordami is a subtle yet deep trail, one that accompanies and lingers over time.

name: Verde Respiro
notes: Bergamot, Blackberry, Lavender, Clary Sage, Cashmere Accord, Ambergris, Vanilla Berries, Patchouli, Iris, Oakmoss
style: Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Verde Respiro is born from the feeling you experience when returning to the open air after a period of being indoors.The opening of bergamot immediately brings air and light, while blackberry adds a deeper, more natural nuance. At the heart, clary sage and lavender become the very breath of the fragrance: a vibrant, aromatic green that conveys space, balance and freedom, softened by a cashmere accord. In the base, patchouli and oakmoss bring it back to the earth, with a quiet and steady presence.A fragrance close to the skin, inviting you to slow down and truly breathe.

name: Vetyver Messenger
notes: Bergamot, Grapefruit, Pink Berries, Cardamom, Lavender, Coriander, Apple, Geranium, Hedione, Carrot Essential Oil, Vetiver, Oakmoss, Ambroxan, Benzoin, Tonka Bean, Vanilla, Musks, Ambrette
style: Creamy, Earthy, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: Inspired by the African philosophy 'I am because we are,' this fragrance connects people. It is a powerful woody scent with a bright soul. Perfumer Nathalie Feisthauer creates a journey of joy and emotion. This is not a typical vetiver. It mixes fresh notes with a surprising gourmand warmth. It feels luminous, modern, and deeply inviting.The opening of Vetyver Messenger is crisp and lively with bergamot, grapefruit, and juicy apple. Spicy touches of cardamom and pink berries add energy. The heart reveals earthy carrot and fresh geranium. Finally, the scent settles into a smooth base of robustly woodsy vetiver with a clean, gently gourmand vanilla musk complement. Designed to draw people in and uplift communal spirit, Vetyver Messenger is a call to global unity.

name: April Theme: APRIL SHOWERS
description: Perfume Room Smell Club is a monthly virtual gathering where members meet to discover new, curated scents together. Think: a book club, but for perfume! Enjoy a new pack (and theme) each month (never to be repeated!), hosted and curated by Perfume Room podcast host, Emma Vernon.April theme: APRIL SHOWERSJourney into spring through this thematic smell club. In April Showers, we're exploring rain accords in perfumery as conceived and created by five different perfumers. From monsoons, to drizzles, to thunderstorms, to that distinct petrichor-laced post-rain air, each scent in this pack evokes a distinct type of rain. What we're smelling:芒聙聯 Monsoon Teaby d'Annam芒聙聯Petrichorby Marissa Zappos芒聙聯Thundraby Profumum芒聙聯Last Seasonby Meo Fusciuni芒聙聯Steamed Rainbowby DS & DurgaSample pack includes:5 sample vials and blotter strips.SIGN UP:Want to participate in Smell Club? Follow @perfumeroompod on Instagram and subscribe to perfumeroom.substack.com for more details. (Please note: Registration for this event is separate. Purchase of this sample pack is not registration for the club (nor does it guarantee a spot).

name: Wild Vetiver
notes: Timur Pepper, Bergamot, Pink Pepper, Rose Centifolia, Geranium, Blackcurrant Bud, Vetiver, Cedarwood, Amberwood
style: Floral - Spicy, Spicy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Experience untamed elegance with a vetiver expression inspired by an English garden party wandering into the wild. Wild Vetiver is a fragrance off the beaten path, walking the line between precise refinement and nature. Born from noble roots yet spirited in its freedom, this sculpted composition reveals a vibrant tension between sophistication and wilderness. Opening with the spiced vibrancy of hand-harvested timur berry, the heart unfolds as rose centifolia rambles freely. At the base, vetiver casts a woody trail, grounding the composition with modern elegance. This is an enchanting journey through an aristocratic garden, where halcyon moments and the joy of missing out drift through the air.

name: Molecule 01 + Champaca
notes: Iso-e Super, Champaca
style: Floral - Light, Fresh - Clean, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Light
description: Countless fragrance lovers have fallen for the almost irresistible pull of Molecule 01, which featured the subtly warm and velvety molecule Iso E Super to cocoon the wearer in a near-invisible aura of chic and seductive scent. M+ is the continuation of perfumer Geza Schoen's gift for impactful minimalism, an imagining of a unforgettable dance between Iso E Super and just one other beautiful, carefully chosen ingredient.Champaca is an absolute extracted from the red champaca flower, found only in India. One of the most expensive ingredients in perfumery, champaca absolute is one of the richest, most faceted floral materials in perfumery, with shades of jasmine and orange blossom, touches of tea, and a soft creaminess that unfolds in waves. Together, Iso E Super and champaca form an unexpected harmony: the weightless transparency of Iso E Super against the intricate opulence of champaca. A radiant opening with hints of orange blossom brightness gives way to a heart that is lush, floral, woody, and quietly intoxicating, before settling into the smooth, woody embrace of Molecule 01.

name: Dia x Meg Webster
notes: Madagascar Bay Oil, Geranium, Olibanum, Carrot Seed Oil, Mushroom Accord (myrrh Absolute, Labdanum Absolute, Tree Moss Absolute), Madagascar Patchouli, Mineral Wood, Sandalwood
style: Earthy, Green / Herbaceous, Natural/Organic, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: A bold and unique collectors edition scent produced in collaboration with the New York based Dia arts foundation and influential sculptor and artist Meg Webster, this limited new release from CDG is inspired by Webster芒聙聶s material vocabulary and geometric forms. The scent is presented in a polished silver tetrahedral box, a shape central to Meg Webster芒聙聶s work and reflective of the ephemeral nature of perfume.

name: Shiver
notes: Eucalyptus, Bergamot, Ivy, White Pepper, Wet Concrete, Vetiver, Cold Metal, Orris, Pear, Pure Amber, Cedar, Oakmoss, Musk, Patchouli
style: Avant-Garde, Earthy, Fresh, Green / Herbaceous, Metallic, Woody - Fresh
description: Snow melts slowly over your small town parking lot as the crisp air hits your nose. The earth is defrosting alongside you as the first signs of spring start to emerge. Shiver is an olfactory portrait of real, everyday winter- the bracing freshness of the snowy air, but also the evocatively familiar landscape of urban life.

name: Teen
notes: Blood Orange, Bergamot, Ripe Passionfruit, Rose, Fresh Cut Grass, Violet Leaf, Vanilla Bean, Tonka, Cashmere Musk
style: Floral - Fruity, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Sweet
description: Another weekend spent escaping the heat of summer by patrolling your local mall. With a $20 bill in your pocket the possibilities are endless. A new fruity body spray that芒聙聶ll trail you as you strut through the halls on your way to math class is calling your name.

name: Calico
notes: Toasted Rice, Bergamot, Kitten Fur, Jasmine Sambac, Honeysuckle, Warm Milk, Heliotrope, Orange Blossom, Pillowy Musk, Clean Vanilla
style: Creamy, Floral - Light, Floral - White, Milky, Powdery / Soft
description: A gentle ray of warmth slips through sun bleached curtains, spreading out onto freshly washed sheets. Your new kitten cozies up onto your pillow as you savor the stillness of morning while sipping a hot cup of tea. The morning silence interrupted only by your pet's purrs.

name: Tawakkul
notes: Amaretto, Cardamom, Leather, Oud, Tonka Bean
style: Fruity, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet
description: Imagine a fragrance that unfolds like a story on your skin. It begins with the luxurious sweetness of amaretto, a note that feels both rich and comforting, like a velvet embrace. This initial sweetness is quickly met by the warm, subtly spicy shimmer of cardamom, adding a layer of intrigue and inviting curiosity. As Tawakkul evolves, it reveals a heart of deep leather and oud. This combination is dark, resinous, and sensual, evoking the feel of polished leather and earthiness with a sophisticated edge Finally, the dry-down is a soft, creamy caress of tonka bean. It leaves a gentle, luminous trail that lingers like a whisper of moonlight on skin, comforting and memorable. Altogether, Tawakkul is a sophisticated balance of elegance and seduction, designed to be as unforgettable as it is unique.

name: Palm Oases
notes: Coconut Mousse, Vanilla Cream, Tropical Flowers, Chantilly Cream, Macadamia Nut, White Musk
style: Creamy, Floral, Gourmand, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy
description: Palm Oases is inspired by the exclusive French Antilles heaven of Saint Martin and instantly transports you to a peaceful sanctuary, far from daily hustle and bustle.A beachy elixir of decadent coconut mousse, Chantilly whipped cream and lush vanilla conveys deep relaxation while silky orange blossoms and delicious macadamia transport you to a daydream in a secluded bay, lounging in the shade of swaying palms. It's a one way ticket to a new state of mind.

name: Petit Gateau
notes: Honey Marzipan, Chantilly Cream, Brown Butter, Toasted Tonka Bean, Bruleed Vanilla
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Sweet
description: "Paris is my favorite place in the world, Petit G脙垄teau was inspired by the delicate sweetness of Montmartre, the enchanting hilltop neighborhood in Paris where I first fell in love with my husband. Each morning I visited the same neighborhood p脙垄tisserie, where the heady scent of caramelized sugar and delicate, hand-made cakes filled the air. This everyday gourmand celebrates the indulgent coziness of sharing something just as sweet and warm."This 芒聙聹little cake芒聙聺 is a delicate crackle of warm sugar, toasted almond pastry, and a vanilla-flecked mound of gently sweetened chantilly cream. Petit G脙垄teau captures the warm, wide-eyed delight of entering a French p脙垄tisserie with enticing, pillowy comfort.

name: Coup de Pied
notes: Mimosa Blossom, Ile Flottante, Blonde Musk, Olibanum, Tolu Balsam, Vanilla, Sandalwood, Amber Resin, Honey Incense
style: Floral, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Inspired by a dream, Coup de Pied takes shape with the effortless spontaneity of a fated coup de foudre. Named after a principal step in ballet, this incandescent vanilla incense glows with rich resin, blonde woods, and warm honey. As luminous and inviting as a sunlit ballet studio, Coup de Pied opens with golden mimosa that blooms with deep amber and elegant musk.

name: Grand Battement
notes: Spiced Frangipane, Golden Amber, Praline, Caramelized Fig, Tonka Bean, Ambergris, Labdanum, Tobacco Musk, Patchouli
style: Earthy, Fruity, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Sweet
description: Inspired by the groundbreaking, daring and eclectic performances of the Ballet Russes in the early 20th century  in Paris, this fragrance features bold natural materials that refer to the dynamic heat of bodies in motion. Dramatic and powerful, Grand Battement is a bold departure from the repertoire. Heady, hypnotic, and carefully balanced, spiced almond praline and caramelized fruit give way to sensuous labdanum and warming patchouli for a fragrance as singular as it is striking.

name: Madeleine
notes: Noix De Coco, Chantilly Cream, Coconut Milk, Almond Cake, Tonka Bean, Vanilla Marzipan
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Like waking up in a sun-soaked Parisian appartement, this perfume evokes the warm comfort of greeting the day with fresh Madeleines in bed. Luscious coconut, a grating of fresh tonka, and the comforting creaminess of warm vanilla cream: Madeleine is inspired by the promise of a lightly caramelized, almond-scented tea cake fetched from a classic Parisian boulangerie.

name: Pas de Chat
notes: Madeleine Cake, Pink Pepper, Kitten Fur, Cashmeran, Iso-e Super, Amber, Vanilla Bean, Ambrette Musk, Tonka Bean
style: Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: "I had been searching for a signature fragrance for myself for more years than I could count, and nothing ever felt just right. This formula is based around the idea of a satin, skin-like vanilla with no flowers, fruit, leather, tobacco or smoke and nothing herbaceous or too sugary sweet. Pas de Chat marked the end of my search for an everyday signature. Vanilla-scented skin as soft as a warm madeleine, kissed with clean, sweet musk芒聙聯 simple, everyday luxury."A dance step that resembles a cat芒聙聶s graceful leap, Pas de Chat is as lustrous and delicate as satin ballet slippers. A shimmer of pink pepper and tender madeleine cake yields to a base of comforting milky vanilla, creamy tonka, and woody amber.

name: Amants Maudits
notes: Blood Orange, Peach Leaf, Blackthorn, Rose, Blackberry, Cypress, Musk, Oud, Frankincense, Sandalwood
style: Floral - Citrus, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: Inspired by the Romeo & Juliet ballet, this richly romantic rose fragrance weaves a tale of passion and doomed love with a compelling balance of fruity, floral, woods, and resinous elements.

name: Lapinou
notes: Pastilles Citron, Black Tea, Dried Iris, Noix De Coco Sables, Velvet Ribbon, Musk, Ambered Vetiver, Sandalwood, Knit Cashmere
style: Floral, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Smoky, Sweet
description: "Sunlight streams into Lorraine's kitchen. Bundles of knitting strewn about. She calls for me to help her open the window because the latch is stuck. 'Lapinou! Lapinou!' I was twisting irises through my fingers. I will always remember the velvet ribbon trim on her dresses and downy socks... A tribute to my grand-m脙篓re who called me Lapinou (bunny) and spending time baking in her kitchen in France together. Cups of steaming hot black tea, coconut sabl脙漏 cookies cooling on the marble countertop, bowl of lemon candies, and heaps of knitting yarn and velvet ribbon trimmed dresses."

name: Pain au Chocolat
notes: Salt, Butter, Dark Cocoa, Chocolate Ganache, Charred Wood, Vanilla, Milk, Puff Pastry Accord
style: Creamy, Earthy, Gourmand, Sweet
description: A morning still holding its breath. The hush of dawn spilling through lace curtains. Fingers dusted in flour and sugar. name: Mezcal Chocolat

name: Nuit Elastique
notes: Lemon, Cypress, Black Olive, Black Tea Extract, Neo Curry, Magnolia, Jasmine Sambac, Latex Accord, Grandiflorum Jasmine, Spicy Carnation, Turkish Rose, Red Champaca, Hay Absolute, Cedarwood, Indian Sandalwood, Peru Balsam

Its cold precision is anchored by metallic hues and mineral facets, sculpting a floral form both sterile and luminous. The rose, untouched by romance. name: Simli Mirage
notes: Faux Leather, Torrefied Maquis, Sea Spray, Warm Sand
style: Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Salty / Oceanic, Smoky, Spicy
description: A mirage you feel before you see. Simili Mirage inhabits contradiction, a falsehood that feels truer than truth. It evokes the thrill of ambiguity, where identity is a shifting texture. Not meant to soothe but to disturb softly, like a dream half-remembered, it leaves a trace where you thought there was none.Simili Mirage plays with illusion. Mineral notes shimmer over a dry blend of thyme, pine, and resin, while a sensual accord transforms with your body heat. Artificial becomes intimate; desert meets body.

name: Gravitas Capitale

style: Avant-Garde, Citrus, Floral - Fruity, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous
description: A structure in steel and glare. Gravitas Capitale opens with a metallic citrus flash of Buddha芒聙聶s Hand, cut into a green tuberose stripped of all softness. No bloom. No curve. It's the scent of power in its quietest form, refined to a stance.

name: Discovery Set

A hedonist芒聙聶s manifesto, both seductive and unapologetically assertive.Insuline Safrine reveals a decadent liquid saffron opening with leathery undertones, layered over Saint-Honor脙漏 pastry, Madagascar vanilla, and a praline Australian sandalwood. Notes of orange blossom and spiced essences melt into a velvety overdose of indulgence: refined and radical at once.

At the base, a dense musky aura, refined Australian sandalwood, and amber, deep, precise, resonant. Doppel D脙陇ncer moves at the exact point where everything could tip. Between control and surrender. Between what holds back芒聙娄 and what spills over.

name: Rose Magnitude

The perfume芒聙聶s representation of the 芒聙聵Bad Mother芒聙聶 was created through the animalic darkness of suede.芒聙聺芒聙聯 Antoine Lie, PerfumerMother's Milk features one of the most expensive precious ingredients in a perfumer芒聙聶s palette: natural Orris, the hand-picked, dried, and distilled roots from the Iris flower, in this case, cultivated in Bavaria. The creation of Orris can take up to five years from start to finish, but the result is worth it: Orris imparts a velvety, creamy-woody, violet-like aura to compositions, adding an ineffable elegance and sensuality to fragrances that is both celestial and earthy.

Gardenia, moonflower, night-blooming jasmine, and orange flower at the height of their seductive power. name: Finale

description: The curtain falls, and the applause begins. The final act marks the climax of an unforgettable experience芒聙聰a moment charged with emotion. Inspired by Berlin芒聙聶s iconic stages, where avant-garde collides with classical elegance and passion meets boundless creativity, Finale by J.F. A grand finale, euphoric and enduring.The opening: red pepper, davana, and nectarine liqueur, like a spotlight illuminating the lead role. As the story unfolds, tobacco, benzoin, and black datura emerge like a velvet curtain rising on a hypnotic scene. The closing act is balsamic, woody, and profound, with vetiver, amber, and guaiac wood casting the final, resonant note. Finale is more performance than perfume: rich in nuance, charged with feeling, and unforgettable.First introduced in 1914 as a 芒聙聹fantasy scent of exquisite freedom,芒聙聺 the original Finale embodied power, imagination, and visionary spirit. Today, it returns to the stage in a dazzling revival, multi-sensory and self-assured. A reimagined logo nods to its historic typography with a contemporary twist, while the scent itself strikes a perfect harmony between heritage and modernity. A tribute to the final act of a great moment- then and now.

name: This Is Not A Blue Bottle 1.8

description: For 25 years, Histoires de Parfums has been writing stories to be read on your skin. Scents are fragments of memory, emotion, intuition, and perfume as a way to connect, not to explain. With Sold Out!, a new chapter begins. This 8th edition of the This Is Not A Blue Bottle collection, Sold Out! explores perfume as abstraction: invisible, subjective, impossible to pin down. Sold Out! isn't about notes, pyramids, or categories. It's about feeling confident, free, and strong. About the moment where instinct takes over and interpretation becomes personal. It's not a scent that describes you- it reveals your true self.

In that stillness, anticipation lingers, and the fragrance of what is to come drifts slowly toward us.Muted Waves delivers the rhythms of a tranquil wave gradually swelling on the horizon, opening with a cool breath of black pepper that awakens the senses. Beneath the calm, though, we sense something stirring, borne in on notes of marine breeze that drift in softly before giving way to smooth, rich, refreshing unisex florals. A sharp twist of spice cuts through the chilly air, then slowly dissolves into warmth as velvety vanilla and rich woods unfurl, cloaking everything in a tender and lingering embrace of sheer marine atmosphere.

Thus begins Alice芒聙聶s journey into wonder, an endless cascade of surprises and enchantment, with no telling when it will end or what awaits.Rabbit Hole opens with a luminous burst of citrus radiance- bright, tangy, and full of light. Soft white petals glow beneath a veil of lush florals, while a green haze shimmers with dewdrops on velvety moss. Orange blossom, lily of the valley, and lavender bloom in delicate layers, opening into a luminous heart. The fragrance lingers in a graceful trail, fruits and florals entwining with a whisper of moss, an invitation to a story filled with endless, joyful imagination.

An intoxicating, mysterious fragrance drifts on the wind, as if heralding a new blessing to come. Every moment here is a miracle born from the slimmest of chances.Oasis Slip is a lush slice of primordial paradise, serendipitously born from the heart of the desert. It opens with a fiery and complex blend of spicy notes, dry ginger and basil, brightened with creamy coconut and the allure of rose. It then settles into the lingering warmth of rich amber and dry woods, completing a rare and unforgettable journey into an unexpected bounty.

name: Torino25
