This perfume is the olfactory embodiment of grace and pure elation, and the crowning achievement of a glorious legacy. It opens with playful top notes of saffron and rhubarb, accompanied by exhilarating nuances of grapefruit and fresh ginger. Dynamic and thrilling, the scent leads to sophisticated notes of leather and juniper, nestled within the blend alongside smooth suede, creating a luxurious texture that balances energy and elegance.Torino25芒聙聶s flacon and packaging draw inspiration from the joyful chaos of a final match, echoing the pen marks players leave when signing the camera lens after a win. Every detail pays homage to the energy and passion that define the Nitto ATP Finals.

name: Persephone
notes: Hyrax, Civet, Narcissus, Decaying Flowers, Deer Musk Accord, Leather, Thai Oud, Amber, Stone, Pine Absolute, Immortelle, Clary Sage, Cumin, Patchouli, Beeswax Absolute, Jasmine Absolute, Pomegranate, Orange Flower Absolute, Labdanum
style: Animalic, Floral - Ambery Spice, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Before the world turns fully toward spring or winter, a lone goddess stands between realms. Persephone, queen of the underworld and maiden of spring, exists in a fragile balance. One gaze meets the dawn while the other descends into darkness. Every breath carries the scent of life and death.The fragrance opens with a raw, magnetic pull, a shadowed whisper of the underworld. Earthy woods and ancient resins evoke cold stone, memory, and the echoes of forgotten souls. Yet within this darkness, fragile spring flowers emerge, delicate and green, like small lights blooming from decay.At its heart glows the jeweled sweetness of pomegranate, a symbol of fate and entanglement that binds the wearer to the myth. As the scent warms, damp forest notes and soft resin unfold, illuminated by a golden glow. Musk adds primal warmth while fading florals remind us that beauty is fleeting.Like the goddess herself, Persephone moves in cycles, a story of bloom and decay, descent and return, love and loss

name: L'ombre d'hier
notes: Leather, Aldehyde, Musk, Civet, Frankincense, Basil, Orris Concrete, Coriander, Clove, Geranium, Lavender, Bergamot, Jasmine Absolute, Vetiver, Carnation, Cumin Seed, Champaca, Patchouli
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Inspired by the film L芒聙聶ann脙漏e Derni脙篓re 脙聽 Marienbad, L芒聙聶ombre d芒聙聶hier is the olfactory echo of the dreamlike uncertainty that pervades Alain Resnais' surreal classic. In the endless halls of Marienbad, time curls in on itself. Corridors stretch with perfect symmetry, chandeliers glint on marble, and shadows hint at encounters long past. A man approaches a woman and insists they met here last year. She smiles as if both remembering and forgetting. Truth and memory blur, and certainty dissolves into a maze of longing. Leather and civet anchor the fragrance in the sensual presence of the body, while shimmering aldehydes flicker like light across marble floors. Musk and frankincense deepen the atmosphere, joined by basil芒聙聶s green spark. Orris, geranium, lavender, and jasmine drift through the composition like fragile recollections, brightened briefly by bergamot.Soft spices, coriander, clove, cumin, and carnation, create an intimate tension before settling into the earthy trail of vetiver, patchouli, and champaca. The result is a mysterious, melancholic fragrance that unfolds like memory itself: elegant, elusive, and suspended between what was real and what may only have been imagined.

name: Emerald Curry
notes: Kaffir Lime Leaves, Holy Basil, Coconut, Green Chili, Lemongrass, Cumin Seed, Coriander Seed, Galangal, Clove, Cardamom, Black Pepper, Incense, Sandalwood Australia, Dill, Vetiver, Tonka Bean, Ambrette Seed
style: Fresh - Citrus, Gourmand, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Tropical / Beachy, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Emerald Curry unfolds like a Thai kitchen at dawn, where sunlight touches bowls of herbs and spices and the air hums with anticipation. Inspired by Thai green curry, the fragrance celebrates a dish that is also a cultural ritual, a balance of craft, memory, and tradition.The opening bursts with fresh green chilies, kaffir lime leaf, holy basil, and lemongrass. Bright, aromatic, and lively, they evoke the first moments of preparation. As the composition deepens, coriander, galangal, cumin, cardamom, clove, dill, and black pepper emerge, forming a warm, intricate harmony softened by the creamy sweetness of coconut.Incense and sandalwood add a meditative calm, while vetiver echoes the fertile earth where these herbs grow. In the drydown, tonka bean and ambrette seed leave a soft musky warmth that lingers like the memory of a shared meal. Emerald Curry is a sensory journey through Thai cuisine and culture, transforming the beloved green curry into an elegant, aromatic experience.

name: Keerati
notes: Bergamot, Verbena, Myrrh, Orris Butter, Leather, Amber, Oakmoss, Rosewood, Neroli, Rose Absolute, Lavender Absolute, Patchouli, Labdanum, Jasmine Absolute, Vanilla, Tonka Bean, Cumin
description: Keerati (?????), meaning honour and glory earned through virtuous deeds, is a modern homage to the classical Chypre tradition. Built on the timeless interplay of citrus brightness, mossy woods, and resinous warmth, it reflects the dignity and elegance that define this historic fragrance family.The scent opens with radiant bergamot and the green clarity of verbena, bright and confident, joined by the golden glow of neroli. As the light softens, the heart unfolds with rose and jasmine absolutes, supported by the composed freshness of lavender. Myrrh and labdanum add a sacred, resinous depth, while orris butter drapes the florals in a soft, velvety elegance.In the base, oakmoss and patchouli form the classic Chypre foundation, earthy and refined, strengthened by the noble presence of leather. Amber, vanilla, and tonka bean soften the composition with warmth, while a subtle touch of cumin adds a human, intimate edge. Keerati becomes a tribute to honour, legacy, and the enduring artistry of classical perfumery.

name: Sgail
notes: Wool Absolute, Lanolin, Musk, Immortelle Absolute, Galbanum, Milk, Narcissus, Mushroom, Fir Balsa, Bluebell, Moss, Grass, Violet Leaf, Peat
style: Animalic, Earthy, Fresh - Aquatic, Green / Herbaceous, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Sg脙聽il was born from a journey through the mist laden Highlands ofScotland, a land where time moves slowly, and every hill, glen,and loch seems to breathe with memory. The fragrance draws itssoul from the whispers of the wind, the ancient tales of shepherds,and the spirits that linger in the fog above the moors. It is a perfumeof shadow and remembrance, of earth and story, where nature andmyth intertwine.During a walk across rain drenched fields and moss coveredslopes, the inspiration for Sg脙聽il became clear. Local tales spoke ofshepherds guiding their flocks through nights thick with mist, wherethe haunting howl of C脙鹿-s脙卢th, the spectral Highland hound, echoedacross the glens. Three times it sounded; a warning, a guide, areminder that the unseen world walks alongside the living. At dawn,flocks returned unharmed, and the shepherd understood that theshadow of the spirit had watched over them.The memory of that night. The scent of wool, wet grass, peat, andthe breath of the mountains became the heart of Sg脙聽il.The soul of the Highlands, captured in breath, in earth, and inshadow.

name: Debaser in Bloom
notes: White Currant, Rosemary Flower, Tapes, Fig, Gardenia, Cream, Musk, Coconut Husk, Raspberry Leaf
style: Earthy, Floral - Fruity, Fresh, Fruity, Woody - Fresh
description: Debaser in Bloom is a choice mixtape of D.S. & Durga's classic fig fume cut with gardenia, cream, cassettes, and white currant.Fruity. Creamy. Nostalgic. Bright.This reinterpretation of the cult-favorite Debaser amplifies its signature fig with juicy white currant and rosemary flower, folding in lush gardenia and soft cream for a radiant floral heart. Coconut husk, musk, and raspberry leaf create a textured base that hums like warm tape rolling through a cassette deck. It feels like tearing open fresh cellophane, skating home with a new tape in hand, and pressing play on something that changes you. Easy, luminous, and full of spring-to-summer energy, Debaser in Bloom turns the nostalgic scent of tapes into something fruit-forward, floral, and alive.

name: Good Guy - Child's Play 2
notes: Peach, Lavender, Basil, Black Pepper, Saffron, Cardamom, Tobacco, Woods, Musk, Melting Polypropylene
style: Floral, Fruity, Spicy, Unusual / Unexpected, Woody - Spicy
description: Sorry Jack芒聙娄 Chucky芒聙聶s back- as a fragrance!Xyrena, in association with Universal, presents Good Guy, the latest addition to the Cinematic Scent Archive芒聞垄, and the first official scent inspired by everyone芒聙聶s favorite killer doll.On the surface, Good Guy by Xyrena is a playfully sweet, fruity, toyetic fragrance, the olfactory equivalent of a Good Guy doll芒聙聶s innocent facade. But beneath that sugary exterior lies a darkness drawn straight from the Lakeshore Stranger himself, Charles Lee Ray.The fragrance opens with an overdose of plasticky peach and lavender, transforms into a spicy heart of basil, black pepper, saffron, and cardamom, then settles into a base of rich tobacco, Damballa woods, doll-textile musk, and melting polypropylene, an homage to the factory finale of Child芒聙聶s Play 2.As a Chucky superfan, Creative Director Killian Wells approached Good Guy with deep reverence for the franchise. Building on Wells芒聙聶 legacy of hyper-realistic synthetic scents, the fragrance was created in collaboration with perfumer Harry Schreiner, pushing that DNA into a more unhinged, horror-driven direction tailored specifically to Chucky芒聙聶s world. The result is pure nightmare fuel, a fusion of plastic-toy authenticity and masculine energy that芒聙聶s as nostalgic as it is sexy, perfect for a date night with Tiffany, or any occasion where soul-transferring rituals might arise.

name: Bad Gal - Bride of Chucky
notes: Black Cherry Lipstick, Leather, Vinyl, Cigarette Smoke, Damballa Woods, Musk, Amber
style: Animalic, Floral - Fruity, Smoky, Unusual / Unexpected, Woody - Spicy
description: Xyrena, in association with Universal, presents Bad Gal- the official fragrance of the cult classicBride of Chucky.Creative Director Killian Wells and Perfumer Maxwell Williams collaborated to conjure the ultimate Tiffany scent, one that lets anyone (Good Guys and Bad Gals alike) fulfill their polypropylene fantasy. Bad Gal by Xyrena opens with a dangerously sweet, waxy candied black cherry lipstick note, dripping with flirtation and dark romance. Beneath it, a heart of slick leather and vinyl wraps the scent in the unmistakable feel of a femme fatale who plays dirty. As it settles, the fragrance turns deeper and more addictive: cigarette smoke, Damballa woods, animalic musk, and warm amber leave a trail that芒聙聶s intimate, wicked, and impossible to forget. It's the perfect fragrance for a romantic crime spree- but for liability reasons, you didn't hear that from us.

name: Eau de Parfum Discovery Set
description: The journey to your signature scent begins here.Discover the full range of Maison Louis Marie's Eaux de Parfum with this curated set of 1.5ml spray vials, ideal for travel, gifting, or scent exploration. Spray as desired onto pulse points- wrists, neck, or the creases of your elbows and knees- where your body芒聙聶s warmth allows each scent to bloom.Wear alone or layer to build depth and mood throughout the day.This set includes:芒聙垄 No.02 Le Long Fond芒聙垄 No.04 Bois de Balincourt芒聙垄 No.09 Vall脙漏e de Farney芒聙垄 No.13 Nouvelle Vague芒聙垄 No.14 Icila芒聙垄 No.15 Vanille Infinie芒聙垄 Antidris Cassis 芒聙聯 Eau de Parfum Mini

name: Orpheon - Eau de Toilette
notes: Green Mandarin, Juniper Berries, Cedar
style: Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: The spirit of the first moments of an evening at a historic Parisian bar.In 1960s Saint-Germain, the three founders of Diptyque would meet at the Orph脙漏on jazz club to dance, laugh, and discuss the state of the world in an atmosphere as vibrant as it is elegant. A beloved bar brimming with the effervescence of artistic possibility in a Parisian quarter that has always been cosmopolitan, spontaneous, and lively.Orph脙漏on Eau de Toilette is a tribute to the opening moments of an evening out at this legendary venue. The stunning composition, with its citrus fruit, spicy notes and vibrant woodiness, immerses you in that unmistakable thrill felt while the night is still young. A fleeting rendezvous, unfolding into endless possibilities.A tribute to creative friendships and a radiant interpretation of an olfactory time capsule, Orph脙漏on Eau de Toilette immortalises an ephemeral facet of a bygone era.

name: No.15 Vanille Infinie
notes: Citron, Evening Jasmine Bloom, Heliotrope Petals, Tonka Bean, Sugared Amber, Cashmere Oud, Vanilla Flower, Cloud Musk
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Vanille Infinie, a luxurious and sweet gourmand, is a celebration of hope and renewal. A warm, uplifting ritual that brings light to the everyday. Rooted in our botanical heritage, Vanille Infinie offers a quiet sense of calm and strength, wrapping you in warmth, confidence and ease. It opens with a golden glow of citron and soft jasmine, unfolding into comforting, warm notes of heliotrope, sugared amber, and creamy tonka. At its heart lies golden vanilla, delicate and radiant, anchored by cashmere oud and a whisper of cloud musk.

name: 5-Piece Fragrance Discovery Kit
description: The perfect treat to give or receive (or give to yourself!), this handy Discovery Kit collects generous 2ml atomizer samples of five of Mancera's most iconic, unforgettable, and long-lasting EDP fragrances: Roses Vanille, Cedrat Boise, French Riviera, Amore Caffe, and Instant Crush. Find your new favorite scent today!

name: African Rooibos Intens
notes: Bergamot, Cardamom, Black Pepper, Rooibos Tea Accord, Orris Butter, Vanilla Bourbon Absolute, Cedarwood, Tonka Bean, Immortelle, Ambroxan Overdose
style: Earthy, Fresh, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: The gentle breezes of African Rooibos are intensified with the additions of vanilla bourbon absolute and ambroxan. A bold, limited edition, an evolution of the original, this extrait is a deeper, richer interpretation of the radiant center of earthy tea and warm woods. Black pepper and cardamom infuse soft spices, while radiant bergamot brings vibrance. The glow of ambroxan adds supple sensuality, enabling notes to meld with skin for a scent of true intimacy.Intens, an Afrikaans word, is a nod to the rich heritage of the fragrance芒聙聶s inspiration- South Africa's majestic mountains. African Rooibos Intens is a scent for those who seek sophistication, quiet confidence, and unapologetic elegance.

name: Forbidden Apple
notes: Red Apple, Pink Pepper, Brown Sugar, Strawberry Blossom, Cinnamon, Fenugreek, Pomegranate Pulp, White Rum, Fir Balsam, Vanilla Bourbon Absolu, Haitian Vetiver
style: Fruity, Spicy, Sweet
description: Explore the tension between temptation and indulgence with Forbidden Apple Croque Moi, an edible blend of juicy red apple, fresh strawberry, and rich bourbon vanilla. Despite its name, this scent is crafted for all to enjoy, teasing the senses like a secret guilty pleasure. A tantalizingly fruity opening transforms into a complex, woody blend of fir balsam and Haitian vetiver, tinged with the fire of cinnamon. Anchored by vanilla bourbon, it芒聙聶s a deep gourmand that entices those around you to lean a little closer.Forbidden Apple Croque Moi is a mysterious blend of decadence and seduction that playfully spins the forbidden fruit on its head, replacing sin with transformation, fear with awakening. One spray is all it takes to surrender to desire and become enveloped in its irresistible pull. Do you dare to take a bite?

name: Acadian
notes: Sweet Yuzu, Bergamot, Juniper Berry, Ivy, Eucalyptus, Waterlily, Goldenrod Heliotrope, Seaweed, Cedar, Oakmoss
style: Floral - Light, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Salty / Oceanic, Woody - Fresh
description: An olfactory journey through the enchanting landscapes and rich natural wonders of Acadia capturing salty breezes, freshwater plants, trees, and rocky coast. A citrus woody aquatic scent inspired by a trip to Acadia in 2022.

name: Boreal
notes: Pine Needles, Mint, Cedar, Resins, Moss
style: Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: Frigid forest of the northern wilderness. Chilly mint gives way to a soft bed of creamy cedar, pine, and moss.Fall 2022 revision: improved peppermint accord now consists of essential oils, supercritical CO2 extracts, and absolutes.Parfum extrait compounded at 31%.

name: Brokilan
notes: Black Hemlock Needles, Larch Cones, Sandarac Resin, Momi, Sandalwood, Vietnamese Oud
style: Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Dark
description: Sap-saturated cones and freshly broken needles litter the floor of Brokil脙陇n, the wooded home of elves and elder races. The prickliest conifer to date. Extrait compounded at 32%.As of July 2023, the formula was changed to include a higher oud percentage and less sandarac.

name: Coastal Veil
notes: Juniper Berries, Juniper Needles, Sea Water, Bladderwrack, Coastal Cypress, Oyster Mushroom, Water Pepper, Blue Gum Eucalyptus, Pacific Ambergris, Irish Sea Moss, Sandalwood
style: Earthy, Fresh - Aquatic, Green / Herbaceous, Salty / Oceanic, Woody - Fresh
description: Misty shroud of grey and white,A coastal veil that falls tonightA veil of mist and seawater shrouding an overcast beach in a tapestry of atmospheric ambiance. Salty seaweed rubble and algae underfoot, twisted coastal cypresses growing on rocky cliffs overhead.

name: Fanghorn II
notes: Silver Fir, Moss, Lichen, Pine Needles, Wet Soil, Damp Vegetation
style: Earthy, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Fresh
description: A dark and sticky fir perfume with fresh dew and earthen root qualities, reminiscent of new and old forest growth in harmony. A reimagining and renewal of the original Fanghorn, featuring a broader spectrum of coniferous extracts.Voted Best Artisanal Perfume of 2021 (Basenotes, North America category)

name: Funerie
notes: Morel Mushroom, Decayed Rose, Leather, Tobacco, Smoke, Pineboard, Incense, Sweet Myrrh, Blood Cedar, Dried Needles, Rotting Wood (oud)
style: Animalic, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Unusual / Unexpected, Woody - Dark
description: Rites of the dead, a shroud of bleakness. Feasting fungi and wilted roses nestle atop charred pineboards and a base of heavy resins and incense. One of Pineward's most complex and challenging fragrances- and for lovers of deep, dark, intensely smoky perfumes, one of the most rewarding.

name: Hayloft
notes: Hay, Lavender, Honey, Crocus, Sweet Vernalgrass, Bison Grass, Toasted Almond, Hazelnut, Oats, Dusty Wheat
style: Earthy, Floral - Light, Gourmand, Green / Herbaceous, Sweet, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Dusty loft where bundled bales of hay and straw are stored against winter. Seasons' preserve of sweet lavender honey and sacks of oats and red winter wheat. Created using a custom extracted base of hay, bison grass and sweetgrass. This extract resulted in a rough and gorgeous hay/sweetgrass/bison grass concrete, which was then filtered and evaporated to create a rich co-absolute.Contains wheat-derived extracts and may be sensitive to those with wheat allergies.

name: Juniperus
notes: Juniper Berry, Lemon Peel Absolute, Rosemary, Juniper Scale, Lavender, Juniper Wood, Sandalwood, Patchouli
style: Floral - Light, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: Juniper re-imagined using four types of juniper extract, a fresh perfume perfect for balmy spring weather. Tart lemon peel and bright juniper berry & scale dry down into a soothing herbal base of sage, sandalwood and lavender.

name: Lime Cola
notes: Cold-pressed Lime, Black Cherry, Ginger Root, Rum, Cola, Neroli Blossom, Bitter Orange, Sugar, Vanilla, Nutmeg, Coriander, Cinnamon
style: Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet
description: The crack of a can of crisp cola. Crashing waves drown out the distant call of diving gulls. Condensation drips down the depressions in the glass, colliding into the grit of grainy sand. Zesty carbonation fizzes as the vestiges of sun slip away into cloud cover.

name: Murkwood
notes: Fir Balsam, Black Hemlock, Lapsang Souchong, Moss, Incense, Bitter Myrrh
style: Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Dark, Woody - Fresh
description: Liturgical incense and tangles of gnarled fir boughs, a dark and foreboding forest. Revised in summer 2023, the current version features a darker patchouli absolute and an overdose of spruce for a richer, deeper experience.

name: Ponderosa
notes: Ponderosa Resin, Ponderosa Needles, Cedar, Vanilla, Strawberry, Cinnamon, Butterscotch, Beeswax, Raisin Cookies
style: Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Sweet
description: The distinctive aroma of the bark of the majestic ponderosa pine tree. Built upon a base of wildcrafted ponderosa pine needle and resin absolutes with all of their natural vanillic, butterscotch and strawberry facets bolstered.*non-vegan

name: Shire
notes: Hay, Oatmeal, Hazelnut, Bergamot, Lavender, Herbal Tea, Westfarthing Leaf (tobacco), Seed Cake, Jasmine, Orris, Honey
style: Earthy, Floral - Light, Gourmand
description: The scent of field and glen covered in the golden grasses of harvest season. Shire started as a lighter re-imagining of Hayloft that ended up being fairly different and focuses more on the sweeter/coumaric facets of hay. The formula uses many of the same materials but in drastically different ratios and at a lighter concentration.*Non-vegan

name: Tome
notes: Parchment, Leather, Sandalwood, Cedar, Jade 403, Vintage Book Accord, Orris Root, Black Tea, Coffee, Rice Paper, Ambrette, Oakmoss, Tobacco.
description: In the midst of a darkened library lies the Tome of the Unknown, dusty pages burdened with the weight of hidden knowledge and terrible secrets. It rests for now, waiting patiently for new victims to ensnare and spirit away to forgotten realms.Woody elements of sandalwood and cedar mix with book smells of leather, paper and glue and are supported with the ambient scents of black tea, coffee, and tobacco. Tome features a vintage book accord that is based on headspace chemical analysis of old books and libraries.Parfum extrait+ compounded at 25%.

name: White Fir
notes: Orange, White Fir, Ginger, Clove, Anise, Pine, Iris, Juniper Berry, Heliotrope, Musk, Vetiver, Incense, Cedar, Oakmoss
description: White fir incarnate. A delicious pomander ball of a perfume, festive in nature but with potential to be worn all year.Parfum extrait+ compounded at 31%.

name: Holy Cross
notes: Watercress, Common Juniper, Blue Yarrow, Mountain Bluebell Accord, Lodgepole Pine, Bearded Lichen, Ambrette Seed, Wet Stone, Botanic Musk.
description: Lichen-crusted stones, mineralic glacial pools, low-hanging clouds and high alpine scrubland coming alive in the spring. Inspired by the Holy Cross Wilderness region nestled within Colorado's Rocky Mountains, including Mystic Island Lake and the Mount of the Holy Cross.

name: Ombre Tonka
notes: Turkish Pistachio, Bergamot, Thai Oud, Tonka Bean, Amberwood, Rose De Mai, Vanilla Pods, Patchouli, Benzoin
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet, Woody - Amber
description: Ombre Tonka was born from a playful suggestion from Pierre Montale's daughter: why not a pistachio fragrance? Intrigued, he transformed this inspiration into a perfume built on contrasts: crunchy, fragrant pistachio against soft Venezuelan tonka bean, bright, fresh bergamot against deep, ambery woods, and smooth, rich vanilla with resinous benzoin. The results are an elegant gourmand that feels both joyful yet sophisticated, magnetic yet discreet- the kind of fragrance that imbues the wearer with quiet yet luxurious confidence.

name: Intense French Riviera
notes: Tangerine, Orange, Ginger, Black Pepper, Sicilian Lemon, Intense Sea Spray, Iodine, Cambodian Oud, Mimosa, Tiare, Cedar, Vetiver, Sea Salt, Ambergris, White Musk
style: Citrus, Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus, Salty / Oceanic, Spicy, Tropical / Beachy
description: Wilder, saltier, and even more addictive, this Intense new version of French Riviera truly sings. A sea breeze sculpted with brighter citrus, more vetiver, a delicate whisper of oud, and the scent of pine. A tribute to light, legacy, and a coastline that holds many stories. Sensual. Elegant. Irresistibly Riviera.

name: Varanasi
notes: Incense, Saffron, Nutmeg, Cardamom, Ambergris, Cypriol, Rose, Ambrette Seed, Jasmine, Animalic Notes, Agarwood, Leather, Gurjun Balsam, Himalayan Nard, Vetiver
style: Exotic, Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Spicy, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Varanasi is a fragrance full of personality. It is rich, sumptuous, opulent, exotic, warm, irreverent, polarizing. Varanasi is a perfume you will either love forever or never be able to wear. Some adore it like an idol, others detest it, others are convinced it is the door to nirvana. Varanasi is an insatiable personality. Varanasi is an invitation to the most intimate journey into the soul of India.

name: Bois Obscur
notes: Eucalyptus, Papyrus, Saffron, Jasmine Absolute, Oud, Tuberose Absolute, Labdanum, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Mineral Amber
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Amber, Woody - Spicy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Mirroring the raw, intimate power that appears only after nightfall, Bois Obscur is a slow-burning revelation, inviting you to unfold your identity layer by layer throughout the night. Opening with the spicy intensity of saffron and the cool essence of eucalyptus, it draws you inward where smoky papyrus stirs beneath the surface. At its heart, the narcotic bloom of tuberose and jasmine meets the dark allure of an oud accord. Anchored in a mineral amber accord, patchouli and labdanum lend depth and warmth, while sandalwood lingers with a quiet, sacred strength.

name: Casablanca Lily
notes: Plum, Gardenia, Carnation, Indian Tuberose, Rosewood, Honey Accord
description: Unveil a world of imagination with captivating intensity. The renewed and reimagined Night Veils, a collection of extraits de parfum, offers an enigmatic reinterpretation of the night. Each fragrance invites us to explore our hidden self, the part of us which remains untouched by daylight芒聙聶s expectations: untamed, primal, and unbound.An homage to the rare flower that flourishes in the night, Casablanca Lily is a celebration of mystery, sensuality, and nocturnal beauty. Encouraging you to embrace even the deepest facets of your innermost self, its notes gradually unveil themselves like petals unfolding in the stillness of the night. The fragrance opens on notes of elegant gardenia and plum, before the heart of carnation and Indian tuberose slowly unfurl on the skin. Subtly complex Brazilian rosewood and sweet honey accords compose the base, to surprise and delight as it intensifies through the night.

name: Cuir Sellier
notes: Cashmeran, Leather Accord, Tobacco Leaves, Birch Tree, Oakmoss
style: Earthy, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Fresh
description: Ten years after its first unveiling, the Night Veils collection is reborn into a new chapter, offering a captivating reinterpretation of the night. Crafted with high concentrations of fragrances, these pure essences assume new dimensions of luxury, as an invitation to explore a more intimate form of self.Distinguished and heady with a touch of freshness, Cuir Sellier evokes the quiet intensity of leather steeped in time, a deeply authentic understanding of who you are at your very core. Top notes of velvety cashmeran and earthy black tea open the fragrance with subtle warmth. At its heart, a blend of tobacco leaf and a dense leather accord unfolds with character. The base fuses crisp birchwood and deep oakmoss, leaving a lingering trail reminiscent of smoky shadows and well-aged materials.

name: Rouge Chaotique
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Saffron, Cassis, Plum, Praline, Upcycled Oakwood, Papyrus, Upcycled Patchouli
style: Earthy, Fruity, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: Unveil a world of imagination with captivating intensity. The renewed and reimagined Night Veils, a collection of extraits de parfum, offers an enigmatic reinterpretation of the night. Each fragrance invites us to explore our hidden self, the part of us which remains untouched by daylight芒聙聶s expectations: untamed, primal, and unbound.Rouge Chaotique is a celebration of contradiction, embracing the sensual chaos that arises when we surrender control and give in to our deepest, most primal desires.Opening on a striking blend of brightness and spice with bergamot, citrus, saffron, and blackcurrant, these notes offer a vibrant intensity which perfectly balances the indulgent heart of juicy plum, sweet praline, and the raw texture of upcycled oak. A sensual base of smoky papyrus and warm patchouli grounds the fragrance in something instinctive and mysterious.

name: Meteorite
notes: Cardamom, Black Pepper, Saffron, Meteorite Accord, Silver Fir, Black Frankincense
style: Avant-Garde, Earthy, Metallic, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Dark
description: An iron goddess from the heavensStrikes the Earth like a flint.A streak of fire that illuminatesthat which only gods can see.A wild, untamable ecstasy.Meteorite is SYD's collaboration with Golden Dome, a community dedicated to mysticism and the arts. Avant-garde, otherworldly, and mystical, it's s a a metallic and earthy perfume that poetically captures the scent of a meteorite crashing into the earth.

name: Butterfly Tamer
notes: Bergamot, Apple, Gin, Violet, Tarragon, Lavender Absolute, Vetiver, Leather, Tonka, Castoreum
style: Animalic, Floral - Fruity, Fougere, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic
description: Creature of the forestExtend your woolly hand towardthe dappled green sunlight.With sweetness, the forest reciprocates.Charming butterfly ambassadorsland on your palm, and bow their wings.Agrestic and animalic, Butterfly Tamer is a musky, modern foug脙漏re with an ethereal sensuality.

name: Wavey Tulip
notes: Salty Air, Grapefruit, Tulip, Jasmine, Honeysuckle, Coconut Pulp, Teak, Ambrette
style: Floral - Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Salty / Oceanic, Tropical / Beachy
description: Ocean waves unfurl around the earthlike salty blossoms, form and release.Sun touched skin on skin, warm sand.The hollow bones of sea birds as they slowlytwirl in the shape of a conch shell.It is well known the sun is blinding.Nevertheless, dreamers find their way.Spend the day in the sun with Wavey Tulip, an upliftingly fresh and beachy floral perfume with notes of salt-kissed air, fresh flowers, and coconut-infused musk.

name: Honey Body
notes: Apricot, Sichaun Pepper, Tuberose, Honey, Petrichor, Toasted Grains, Beeswax, Musk
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Spicy, Sweet
description: Born from rock, but not a relic.This heart is a chain of flowersvisible to eyes that can see.They make the honey that flowsthrough everything, connectingyou to me and other heavenly bodies.A sensually spicy gourmand, Honey Body is an unforgettable experience. Euphorically embodied with mouthwatering, honey-drizzled fruit, fiery Sichaun pepper, and warm, toasty floral musk.

name: Sample Set
description: Our five senses define the very edges of human consciousness and experience. Of all our senses, smell has the most direct pathway to the brain and can tap into deep emotion and memory. Like poetry, fragrance can transport you to another time and place in an instant.Explore the full world of SYD Botanica with this special collection of all 11 fragrances from the line, presented in 1.5ml atomizer samples.Contains: Romantix, Honey Body, Wavey Tulip, Butterfly Tamer, Protean Desire, Suspended Water Lily, Ghost Flowers, Ribbon Dance, Angelface, Meteorite.

name: Bijou Zafran
notes: Saffron, Pear, Cypriol, Iris, Benzoin, Patchouli, Musk, Mineral Amber, Vanilla Bean, Leather
style: Skin Scent / Minimal, Spicy, Woody - Amber, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Saffron- red gold on skin, trailing fire spun in silk, flaring like a comet in slow motion streaking across the night sky. Bijou Safran is more presence than perfume, a spell in a bottle, blending dangerous sensuality with an almost celestial serenity. It's a smoldering, amber-kissed experience, somewhere between cravable gourmand and beguiling skin scent, drawing the world close into its bewitching and secretive world. Wear it to spark a flame of your own.

name: Oud Liaisons
notes: Rose, Lemon, Liquorice, Pink Pepper, Oud, Suede, Guaiac Wood, Patchouli, Musk, Cypriol, Vanilla
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Amber, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Oud Liaisons is a study in contrasts- smoke and silk, power and grace, mystery and clarity. It's a fragrance that clings to the skin with elegant persistence, capturing the very essence of connection. Deep, resinous, and richly evocative, it unfolds like a backstage whisper, complex and intriguing.

name: Patchouli d'Atlas
notes: Pink Pepper, Cardamom, Lemon, Saffron, Cedarwood, Amber, Cashmeran, Akigalawood, Patchouli, Ambroxan, Musk, Sandalwood
style: Earthy, Fresh - Citrus, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Amber, Woody - Light
description: A scent carved from shadow and stone. A patchouli not bound by tradition but reimagined. Earthbound velvet, aged in the roots of forgotten forests. Patchouli rises bold, sacred and unyielding, wrapped in the ancient hush of cedar groves balanced with the breath of the mountain- raw and refined. A serenity with iron resolve, the curiosity of opposing conversation creating a realm that Titans dream of and mankind now dares. Patchouli d芒聙聶Atlas- a perfume for the beautiful unshaken. Wear it and turn the world on its scented head.

name: Romantix
notes: Black Cherry Cola, Cassis, Amber, Vetiver, Suede, Tobacco, Skin Musks, Vanilla Absolute
style: Fruity, Gourmand, Smoky, Sweet
description: "What if I told you芒聙娄You were my ultimate crush?Whisper your name芒聙娄as I feel the rush.What if we could be so free?Live out our deepest fantasies."Romantix is SYD's collaboration with dream pop musician Winter, celebrating the release of their album Adult Romantix. Playful, sensual, and moody, Romantix is a nostalgic ode to youthful longing.

name: Ribbon Dance
notes: Cinnamon, Allspice, Cassis, Plumeria, Acacia, Broom, Jonquil, Olibanum, Opopanax, Caramel, Oud, Sandalwood
style: Floral - Spicy, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Sweet, Warm, Woody - Dark
description: Adoringly, he pierced his ownflesh. A discreet arrow withbeautiful ribbons. Eros for Psyche.Love, falling in love with love.An inversion with a double edge.Cutting deep rosy droplets.Whose thorns long for a prick?A meditation on healing a broken heart through kinship and belonging. The ribbons represent our interconnected relationships. A golden nourishing light captured in fragrance. Warm, velvety, and intimate.

name: Suspended Water Lily
notes: Salt, Ozone, Melon, Ginger, Gardenia, Water Lily, Algae, Moss, Roasted Seashells
style: Floral - White, Fresh - Aquatic, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Salty / Oceanic
description: Salt pulls water byintermolecular forces of attraction(to its own demise, more often than not)in a delicate balanceboth life giving and destructive.The universe is as full of griefas the ocean is full of salt.Green and ethereal, Suspended Water Lily is a soft floral and aqueous perfume made for mermaids.

name: Ghost Flowers
notes: Caradamom, Milky Fog, White Flowers, Indole, Fir Balsam, Ambrette, Sandalwood, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Floral - White, Gourmand, Spicy, Woody - Light
description: While our past selves live only in memories,we indefinitely die and regenerate over and over.Change is the divine all around us.Cycles of time are the divine all around us.Chop your body into a million pieces and watcha million ghost flowers spring from you flesh.Their fragrance is haunting and familiar.A phantasmal floral gourmand, Ghost Flowers is a deliciously supernatural experience.

name: Angelface
notes: Maraschino Cherry, Pink Pepper, Dewy White Roses, Heliotrope, Brown Sugar, Light Musk
style: Creamy, Floral, Floral - Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: "Sitting with you at 2:22Sipping our gin under the moonSpilling our guts, licking our woundsNumb in the head, nothing to loseAngelface, make me your foolLost my mind & it feels good."Alluringly rosy, SYD's collaboration with musical artist Maraschino is a delicate, creamy, fruity floral with charm to spare.

name: Sogni
notes: Tatami, Pine Needles, Rice Absolute, Penoy, Bamboo, Kodo Ritual, Cedar, Sandalwood, Oakwood, Roasted Green Tea, Tobacco, Guaiac, Incense, Vetiver, Musk, Amber
style: Earthy, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Light
description: Sogni is an elegant, enveloping, gentle and harmonious perfume. Sogni is a friend beside us, a pleasant memory, a smile that comforts us. The opening notes of Sogni are tatami wood and Japanese pine needles- we are in an ancient ryokan in Kyoto, and the rain has stopped falling. A warm bowl of rice sits beside us, reminding us of the simplicity of life, its purity. Our attention is drawn to the green, light, transparent note of a bamboo forest; the floral note of Peony is an emotional haiku. A moment that anticipates the awakening of the soul from the dream. Finally, the light of dawn wraps the woody notes of Sandalwood, Cedar and the typical accord of the Kodo ritual, Incense. A journey into the beauty of Japanese harmony.

name: Last Season
notes: Immortelle, Chamomile, Artemisia, Bay Leaf, Canadian Pine, Galbanum, Fucus Algae, Hay, Cistus, Vetiver, Labdanum, Sandalwood, Patchouli, Tobacco, Cedar, Guaiac, Musk, Birch, Myrrh, Olibanum, Leather, Oud
style: Earthy, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Dark, Woody - Fresh
description: Last Season is an intense fragrance, characterized by a strong and indecipherable personality, which transports you to a pristine, natural world. Last Season will take you on your autumn walks in the woods, to summer forests bathed in sudden thunderstorms, it will take you to places where we have left beautiful memories of contact with nature. A fragrance that has become iconic for its woody, aromatic, and fresh character. Walk through the woods and you will feel nature; we were born to search for our soul in the most pristine place. Last Season emphasizes your incisive, uncommon, unique character.

name: Buio
notes: Cade, Carrot Seed, Incense, Osmanthus, Peony, Labdanum, Amber, Vetiver, Patchouli, Cedar, Musk, Leather, Sandalwood
style: Animalic, Earthy, Powdery / Soft, Smoky, Woody - Amber, Woody - Dark
description: Buio is a unique, unmistakable perfume. It is a mysterious scent that leads each of us to reflection, a meditative, intimate yet disturbing scent. Smoky and powdery notes open the fragrance, an incense that holds centuries of stories, deep, mysterious, and intimate, enriched with carrot seed powder and the dark essence of cade. Within, a heart of darkness welcomes osmanthus and peony, wrapped in notes of geranium and magnolia, protected by labdanum absolute and amber nuances. The base on which this narrative rests is composed of vetiver, patchouli, cedarwood and sandalwood, musk, and leather.

name: Isola
notes: Yuzu, Lemon, Bergamot, Blood Orange, Mandarin, Neroli, Lavender, Cassis, Magnolia, Jasmine, White Tea, Tonka Bean, Patchouli, Vetiver, Musk
style: Citrus, Floral - White, Fresh, Fresh - Citrus, Spicy
description: Isola unites two worlds, Sicily and Japan, through the lively energy of lemon and the sparkling exoticism of yuzu, like a lemonade enjoyed in the shade on the hottest days. Isola is the memory of running through sunlit streets, of the wind blowing gently across the beaches, of voices of friends and sunsets reflecting on the sea. It is a fragrance that narrates the bright joy of an unrepeatable summer 芒聙聰 the desire to hold forever that feeling of peace, warmth and absolute happiness.

name: Discovery Set- Luminoso
description: Explore the brighter side of Meo Fusciuni with this selection of his most delightfully fresh, vibrant, and luminous creations, presented in premium 2ml atomizer samples. The Light set contains the following fragrances:Luce, 1# Nota di Viaggio, 2# Nota di Viaggio, Isola,andSogni.

name: Discovery Set- Oscuro
description: Discover the darker side of Meo Fusciuni with this selection of his most enchantingly deep, rich, and complex creations, presented in premium 2ml atomizer samples. The Dark set contains the following fragrances:Last Season, Buio, Little Song, 1# Nota di Viaggio,andOdor 93.

name: 1# Nota di Viaggio
notes: Pink Pepper, Sichaun Pepper, Cinnamon, Bergamot, Grapefruit, Birch, Cade, Ginger, Saffron, Jasmine, Rose, Geranium, Tobacco, Vetiver, Patchouli, Oud, Vanilla, Elemi, Incense, Cedar
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Green / Herbaceous, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: 1# Nota di Viaggio (Rites de passage) is a fragrance with an emblematic personality- aromatic, spicy and mysterious. This perfume evokes a fanciful, dreamlike personality, someone who sets no limits and no boundaries. It narrates the dialogue between man and his nomadic origins, as an explorer of life. In this perfume, man is his own destiny; the perfume becomes his means to travel through time. It was conceived, created and arranged while listening, during each phase, to the albums Canti e Musica Sufi.

name: 2# Nota di Viaggio (Shukran...)
notes: Moroccan Nana Mint, Lemon, Litsea Cubeba Pepper, Thai Lemongrass, Moroccan Chamomile, Verbena, English Tobacco, Sandalwood
style: Fresh, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: 2# Nota di Viaggio (Shukran芒聙娄) is a comfortable and harmonious fragrance. Bright and sparkling, it tells the freedom of life, its freshness, and releases great energy- it is vital, light and as comfortably natural as meeting an old friend. It is a fresh, light, refined and elegant perfume. A fragrance regarded by many as a true icon of the Meo Fusciuni collection- the Mint perfume par excellence in artistic perfumery.A journey to Morocco 芒聙聰 a hymn to joy, to the happiness of travelling, and to the beauty of encounter. Shukran in Arabic means thank you. 2 Nota di Viaggio Shukran Eau de Parfum is the perfumer芒聙聶s personal desire to narrate his travels in Morocco through a fragrance 芒聙聰 the sacred ritual of the Berber people that has become the daily gesture of encounter for every traveller in that place: mint tea. From the beginning, this perfume releases its beauty and energy in the green, aromatic, sweet and sparkling notes of Moroccan spearmint; a triumph of liveliness that also embraces notes of lemon and litsea cubeba. The heart continues its journey among the aromatic notes of Moroccan chamomile and lemongrass, which brings the more Mediterranean nuances of Verbena. The red of the sunset in the heart of Marrakech is as warm as the sweet, earthy tobacco that envelops the senses, as warm as the sandalwood base supporting the perfume. We are transported into a relaxing evening, immersed in Moroccan culture, seated with a hookah and a mint tea after a day through the souk芒聙聶s streets.

name: Luce
notes: Birch, Leather, Cedar, Patchouli, Tobacco, Sandalwood, Vanilla, Amber, Benzoin
style: Earthy, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: Meo Fusciuni Luce is a woody unisex perfume born from an introspective path that begins with the start of a new day, when nature has not yet fully awakened, the air is still humid, everything is stillness and silence. Luce Parfum is the natural counterpart of Notturno- the calm after the storm of a sleepless night of a desperate poet. To describe this perfume, Meo Fusciuni says: 芒聙聹Luce draws inspiration from the perfect harmony of Louis Kahn芒聙聶s architectures- works in balance, a meeting point between silence and light. I wanted to use my creative sensitivity to give voice to nature and its elements, as if they were architectural bodies against the backdrop of nature. Luce was born from my desire for quietness, from the desire to create a balance between nature and man, between light and silence. An olfactory architecture of the soul.芒聙聺 The sensorial translation of this perfume opens with the harmony of Birch and Fir,  like a chant of plants at dawn, a slow awakening, a silent presence of man. The absolute balance between Light and silence manifests fully in its heart. The intensity and harmony of Sandalwood, Patchouli and Tobacco warm the soul. Silence finds its fulfillment in the deep base of this creation, a precious bed of Amber and Musks enveloping the warm notes of Cedarwood. Vanilla, Benzoin and a superb Leather celebrate this journey in an imaginary inner garden. A fragrance that envelops, protects, spreading its Light afar.芒聙聺

name: Odor 93
notes: Cumin, Guaiac, Narcissus, Patchouli, Tuberose
style: Floral, Floral - Spicy, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Spicy
description: Odor 93 Parfum is a journey into a fairytale world. The scented tale opens its curtain among smoky and spicy notes. The ritual of storytelling is celebrated; the mist hides what has happened from sight and exalts our imagination-  this oneiric journey. Our steps grow slower and the perfume opens the heart of the tale. The olfactory current of Odor 93 floats on the obsessive notes of the Tuberose and Narcissus accord. An aromatic novena where extras and protagonists take part- dramatic figures in an enchanted forest of Northern Europe. If you close your eyes and listen to your path, you will sense grotesque characters from your fantasy and, as if by magic, the journey becomes wonder, becomes fairytale. The faint lights of dawn ask for space; among the dense branches of the forest, the perfume spreads its roots- a woody, smoky, animalic base that awakens us from the journey.

name: L'Oblio
notes: Incense, Iris, Mate, Helichrysum, Oakwood, Sandalwood, Palo Santo, Powdery Notes, Musk
style: Floral, Powdery / Soft, Smoky, Woody - Fresh
description: L芒聙聶Oblio is an elegant, sensual, romantic and retro fragrance. This perfume is an invitation to the quietness of the soul, to serenity- it is a true Iris perfume. Timeless elegance, a personality indifferent to passing trends, focused and rooted in its own spirit, in its own personal journey toward serenity. It takes inspiration from Meo Fusciuni's time spent in Cambodia, a long journey up the Mekong, searching for forgetting as salvation. The banks of the great river, the dry season of spring- delicate and luminous notes of Helichrysum, Incense and Orange open this flow. Memory flows slowly among the vegetal and smoky notes of Mate Tobacco, while the welcoming presence of Iris speaks to the soul. When the long journey is about to end, the gentle woody notes of Sandalwood and Palo Santo lead us back into the depths of balance.  L芒聙聶Oblio Parfum does not just tell a journey, it celebrates a deep bond between memory and forgetting.

name: Little Song
notes: Ginger, Pink Pepper, Bergamot, Coffee, Turkish Rose Oil, Liatris, Tobacco, Vetiver, Civet, Musk, Sage, Labdanum
style: Animalic, Earthy, Floral - Spicy, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy
description: 芒聙聹Little Song tells the metamorphosis of time, which relentlessly passes through our lives. A perfume that tells of my solitude and my intimate sensation of time flowing and changing things. Little Song speaks to the past. How can one tell the passing of time? How can one find the scent of metamorphosis? In the initial vibration of its citrus and spicy notes, I hear hope. Little Song is a little song repeated endlessly, it is a cup of coffee left alone on the table of my studio, its bottom fragrance- intense, aromatic- from there, I began to remember.Little Song is a bouquet of roses held in the hand. I searched for depth in the Rose, I searched in it for the poetry of its petals, slowly drying, a deep and dusty feeling. Little Song is a daily ritual: the cigarette now consumed between the fingers, the piercing Tobacco carries the gaze far away, the pages of Kafka repeated by heart. A scent of earth and smoke, of roots and resins. Even time has its own perfume. I continue to write this little song endlessly, like a lullaby. Little Song is a narrow space, a deep bond with life, with the past. A perfume that shakes the heart, that reaches the depths of the human soul.芒聙聺

name: Spirito
notes: Angelica, Chamomile, Herbal Notes, Carrot, Cypress, Myrtle, Paper, Hyssop, Vetiver, Elemi, Guaiac, Cedar, Tonka Bean, Musk
style: Earthy, Floral - Light, Fougere, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Spirito is a timeless, elegant perfume. It releases a comforting harmony with everything around us. Grounded, sober; a perfume that gives us calm and confidence. Within the collection, over time, it has become a great classic. Spirito is the pleasure of a refined fragrance which, thanks to its beautiful sillage, makes it an authentic aromatic foug脙篓re. An olfactory harmony that captures us from the very first notes- Angelica, Chamomile, Carrot Seeds- a luminous and intense perfume. The heart is gentle, a loving botanical poem: Cypress, Myrtle, Hyssop and Lavender. In the base, a walk through the woods produces the immortal notes of Cedarwood, Vetiver, Guaiac Wood, Elemi and Tonka Bean.Spirito represents the spiritual bond between man and nature, between spirit and poetry.

name: Viole Nere
notes: Cassis, Cognac, Violet, Iris, Lily Of The Valley, Jasmine, Rose, Ylang-ylang, Vetiver, Incense, Sandalwood, Patchouli, Oakmoss, Vanilla, Musk
style: Earthy, Floral, Floral - Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Light
description: Viole Nere is an intense perfume with a strong personality, a mysterious scent that hides secrets and deep feelings. Viole Nere is a scent that belongs to each of us, unmistakable, unique, and moving. Viole Nere won the Accademia del Profumo Award for Best Niche Perfume in 2024. Viole Nere is Meo Fusciuni's personal interpretation of the Parma Violet. Here, he wanted to modernize tradition, seeking a balance between powdery, fruity, and woody notes. The sparkling note of Cassis evokes the freshness of a perfect morning, while the accord of Vetiver, Patchouli, and Incense brings us back to the earth, to our roots. The accords of Violet, Iris, and Flowers convey emotion, light, and elegance. A contemporary classic, a Violetta from the 1920s but of the new century.

name: Pink Clouds
notes: Lychee Sorbet, Cherry Blossom, Red Currant, Orris, Aldehyde, Musk, Heliotrope, Vanilla, Cloud Accord, Lily Of The Valley, Strawberry Jam, Candy, Talc Accord
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: Pink Clouds is a journey of emotions and memories, merging hope, light-heartedness, and the sweet serenity of the soul. The opening notes burst with sparkling freshness and playful sweetness from Lychee Sorbet, Cherry Blossom, and Red Currant, reminiscent of sun-kissed fruits and blossoming flowers at the first light of dawn. These bright, fruity-floral notes illuminate the senses, evoking cheerfulness and the effortless joy of life芒聙聶s simplest pleasures. At its heart, Orris, Heliotrope, Lily of the valley, and Cloud Accord conjure the soft, floating texture of pink clouds drifting gently across a vast sky. The airy, delicate composition wraps around you like a tender embrace, while Aldehydes and Musk add brilliance, sophistication, and an ethereal shimmer, as if sunlight is refracted through the translucent clouds above. The base notes of Vanilla, Strawberry Jam, Candy, and Talc bring warmth, sweetness, and a comforting softness. The aroma resembles tiny sprinkles of sugar falling from the sky, blending with the fruity and confectionary notes to evoke smiles and daydreams. Talc highlights the powdery fluffiness of the clouds, enhancing the sensation of floating in a rosy, radiant sky.

name: Tokiwa
notes: Sencha, Roasted Seaweed, Grass, Spinach, Vetiver, Grapefruit, Corn, Pistachio, Wild Flowers, Ambrette Seed, Moss
style: Earthy, Fresh, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Tokiwa (??) captures the verdant essence and flavour of early summer, translating the sensory experience of freshly brewed Sencha into an olfactory journey that is both vivid and enduring. At the heart of Tokiwa (??) lies Sencha, the quintessential Japanese green tea. Imagine the first sip: the bright, tender leaves of early summer release a crisp, vegetal freshness, like sunlight falling on dew-kissed tea fields. There is an immediate grassy, vibrant note, reminiscent of young spinach leaves and freshly mown grass. Beneath this lies a subtle umami depth, echoing the gentle savouriness of roasted seaweed and steamed greens, giving the fragrance body and presence. A delicate natural sweetness and creaminess evocative of young corn and pistachio softens the intensity, harmonising the composition, while a hint of refreshing astringency leaves a sensation of clarity and vitality, as if a cool morning breeze has passed over the fields. From this starting point, Tokiwa (??) unfolds like a walk through early summer: the roasted edge of seaweed introduces depth and a soft maritime echo, grounding the scent in nature芒聙聶s complexity. Leafy greens, pistachio, and corn intertwine with wildflowers, producing a harmony that is simultaneously lush and airy, playful yet composed. Musky, earthy ambrette seed whispers warmth and gentle sweetness, like sunlight filtering through verdant leaves, tying the composition together with subtle elegance. The base notes of vetiver and moss anchor the fragrance, giving it a sense of permanence and structure. Here, Tokiwa (??) fully embodies its name芒聙聰steadfast and eternal, like stone standing resilient amidst the lush greenness of summer. Every inhalation is a meditation on nature芒聙聶s constancy, the perpetual growth of tea leaves, the quiet depth of moss, and the unchanging rhythm of early summer.

name: Sweet Tani
notes: Banana, Coconut Milk, Coconut Nectar, Coconut Pulp, Jaggery, Dried Banana Leaves, Pandan Leaves, Honey, Vanilla, Cinnamon, Hay, Roasted Nuts, Tonka Beans, Tuberose
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Milky, Spicy, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy
description: Deep within the lush forests of Thailand, the Tani banana tree rises with quiet majesty. Unlike ordinary banana trees, the Tani banana has long been considered sacred, a living emblem of abundance, protection, and reverence. Sweet Tani captures the sacred essence of the banana while celebrating the culinary heritage of southern Thailand. It evokes the aroma of beloved Thai desserts made from the fruit and leaves, where the sweet scent of ripe banana blends with the creamy richness of coconut milk, coconut pulp, and coconut nectar, and the fresh, green notes of pandan leaves and dried banana leaves. Honey and vanilla add warmth and subtle sweetness, while hints of cinnamon, hay, roasted nuts, tonka beans, and tuberose create layers of gourmand depth, reminiscent of traditional dessert preparation. Sweet Tani conjures the sensory experience of desserts such as khanom kluay (steamed banana cake), soft and fragrant; kluay cheuam (banana in syrup), golden and sticky with a natural sweetness; sticky rice with banana, wrapped in fragrant banana leaves; kluay ping (grilled banana), with a gentle smokiness from open-fire cooking; kluay buat chi (banana in coconut milk), indulgent and warm; and baked banana with honey, combining caramelised sweetness and toasted coconut. Each scent tells a story of creativity, community, and the careful use of nature芒聙聶s gifts, rooted in southern Thai culture.

name: Men In The Club
notes: Apple, Grapefruit, Rose, Leather, Sandalwood, Musk, Patchouli
style: Fruity, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: A provocative woody chypre that radiates sex appeal, Men In The Club isn't the typical Organ Tale scent, but has such a powerfully romantic attraction that founder Ilhwa Shim could hardly resist sharing it with the world. Magnetically bright fruit notes ignite the senses, leading into an elegantly smooth floral leather heart and a long-lasting woody-musky drydown guaranteed to draw compliments. Sometimes, we all just want to smell really, really, really good.

name: Printemps
notes: Apple, Peach, Lemon, Muguet, Jasmine, Honey, Musk, Sandalwood, Transparent Wood
style: Floral - Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: Printemps is a perfume created through four years of hard work and passion- a lovely and wholly unique creation that dates back to superstar perfumer Quentin Bisch's earliest beginnings in perfumery as a student at the prestigious Givaudan Perfumery School. Woody, fruity, and blindingly fresh, Printemps radiates unmistakable romantic charm.

name: Fleur de Bonbon
notes: Waterfruits, Orange, Lemon, Jasmine, Lychee, Geranium, Rice, Iris, Saffron Jam
style: Floral - Fruity, Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet
description: From legendary perfumer Bertrand Duchaufour, Fleur de Bonbon is a very original perfume inspired by a pink fruit that goes well with peonies. Boasting a rich and sensual sillage and delightfully fresh natural ingredients, including brilliantly bright citrus, mouthwatering and exotic lychee, and the unique character of smooth, creamy rice, it is the rare gourmand as luxurious as it is delectable.

name: Devenir
notes: Rosemary, Bergamot, Lime, Lemon, Jasmine Tea, Petitgrain, Nutmeg, Cardamom, Musk, Amberwood, Violet, Cedarwood
style: Classic Masculine, Cologne, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: Devenir is a futuristic neo-cologne with a unique touch of green citrus fruits combined with aromatic spice and indescribably sensual musk. Become a charmer with Devenir, which has a sensual musk scent that lingers for a long time with a cool and refreshing lingering scent.

name: Herenica Fragrante
notes: Blackcurrant, Rose, Oud Accord, Jasmine, Patchouli, Amber, Vanilla
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - White, Woody - Dark, Woody Ambery Floral
description: The composition of Herencia Fragrante is a homage to the raw materials introduced by the Muslims to Spain over centuries of exchange across the Straits of Gibraltar. From the introduction of orange blossom and various spices to the popularization of rose water and new techniques for creating essential oils and perfumer's alcohol, these new scents astounded and hypnotized their customers. Herencia Fragante blends a careful selection of essential oils and natural extracts of the finest quality to provide a new ecstatic olfactory experience, in homage to the olfactory awakening that the Muslims brought with them hundreds of years ago.

name: Serenite en Bourgogne
notes: Saffron Accord, Pink Pepper Co2 Extract, Boya Vietnam, Myrrh, Patchouli Madagascar, Vanilla Bourbon, Madagascar Extract
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Spicy
description: For Albert Fouquet, September in Burgundy was a time of harmony and inspiration. He returned to his family芒聙聶s ch脙垄teau to personally oversee the grape harvest, a season that began with peaceful mornings overlooking the vineyards and ended with the bustling energy of the harvest. Every day was filled with rituals, from berry tasting to long walks in the serene countryside, all while crafting his next olfactory masterpiece."S脙漏r脙漏nit脙漏 en Bourgogne" captures the tranquility of these moments. A vibrant opening of Saffron and Pink Pepper blends into the warmth of Myrrh, while a rich base of Madagascar Vanilla adds a sensual gourmand touch.This fragrance is an invitation to experience the sophistication and serenity of Burgundy芒聙聶s vineyards.

name: Le Pari d'Honfleur
notes: Guatemalan Cardamom, Fig, Violet, Brazilian Tonka Bean, Papyrus, Coconut, Sandalwood, Virgina Cedarwood, Musk

A base of Vanilla, Caramel, and Patchouli completes this woodsy, gourmand fragrance, evoking the warmth and charm of a romantic connection."Belvedere" is a timeless tribute to a love story and the unforgettable moments shared in the heart of Vienna.

name: Samar Kand
notes: Bergamot, Sweet Orange, Osmanthus, Geranium, Ylang-ylang, Cassis, Amber, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Musk, Tonka Bean, Caramel, Oud

A fragrance that speaks a universal language, reaching beyond borders and differences. Samar Kand represents the belief that art has no limits and that its beauty is meant to be shared in a spirit of mutual enrichment.芒聙聺-Rania JouanehSamar Kand opens with radiant notes of bergamot and sweet orange, leading into a nuanced blend of osmanthus, geranium, ylang-ylang, and blackcurrant that introduces floral, fruity, and subtly green tones.Its amber-tinged roundness lends a gentle sweetness, while a softly leathery undertone in the base, enriched with patchouli, sandalwood, amber, musk, and the smooth warmth of tonka bean and caramel,adds depth and quiet elegance.

name: Athenais

description: Ath脙漏na脙炉s embodies a feminine energy both romantic and liberated. By contrasting main notes of tonka bean and neroli, it weaves a tie between history and a distinct facet of femininity today. Ath脙漏na脙炉s opens with sparkling notes of neroli and yuzu, followed by a luminous heart of orange blossom, settling on a warm and addictive tonka bean powdery base. Flamboyant, charming and vivacious.

name: Purple Rain
notes: Cr脙篓me De Violette Liqueur, Raspberry, Bulgarian Lavender, Raisin, Violet Leaf, Rose Oil, Lipstick, Blond Tobacco, Cocoa Absolute, Suede, Hollywood Powder Accord
style: Creamy, Earthy, Floral, Fruity, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Sweet
description: Purple Rain draws its inspiration from the audacious, gender-fluid, flamboyant Glam Rock aesthetic of the 1970s while paying homage to Prince's massive impact on the world of music.This creation is also Sylhouette芒聙聶s own reflection on the legendary song "Purple Rain," one of the most iconic love ballads of the 20th century, a tale of a beautiful yet bittersweet romance where parting becomes the most tender choice for two souls yearning for their own happiness. It's built around an exquisite central ingredient: dark aged patchouli oil, a material infused with an unmistakable sense of freedom and a wild, unrestrained spirit, echoing the cultural and musical movements of the 1970s. It intertwines with the androgynous softness of cr脙篓me de violette, rose, violet and a delicate powdery lipstick accord, while deeper shadows unfold through cocoa absolute and supple suede, adding an extreme, romantic darkness to the composition. Accents of smoke and liqueur drift through the fragrance like quiet symbols of sorrow, distance, and the faint, tender burn of a love slowly learning how to let go.Passionately romantic and richly moving, Purple Rain is an unforgettable homage to a one-of-a-kind song, musician, and legacy.

name: 10-piece Discovery Set
description: The Room 1015 Discovery Set EDP is a curated collection of ten distinct fragrances, each encapsulating a unique essence that embodies the spirit of free expression. This set offers an opportunity to explore the bold and unconventional world of Room 1015 through 10 x 2.5ml Eau De Parfum samples, alongside one extrait de parfum. This discovery set is perfect for those who want to experience a range of high-quality fragrances, each with its own story and character.The sample set features 10 x 2.5ml scents:Wavechild (Eau De Parfum)Sonic Flower (Eau De Parfum)Purple Mantra (Eau De Parfum)Sweet Leaf (Eau De ParfumCherry Punk (Eau De Parfum)Cherry Punk (Extrait De Parfum)Hollyrose (Eau De Parfum)Electric Wood (Eau De Parfum)Yesterday (Eau De Parfum)Ten Fifteen (Eau De Parfum)

notes: Pear, Orange Blossom, Heliotrope, Jasmine, Vanilla, Rose, Vietnamese Oud Essence, Tonka Bean, Musk
style: Creamy, Floral - Fruity, Floral - White, Woody Ambery Floral

A play of contrasts, between the freshness of peach and orange blossom, and the dark notes of precious agarwood. Between the radiance of white flowers and the intensity of woods, Passion Riviera captures the magical fusion of day and night. This suspended moment when the night stars softly tread across the azure horizon.It is in this chiaroscuro that the beginnings of a story take shape. Rose, jasmine, and orange blossom infuse the fragrance with the magic of first moments. These beginnings unfold in the heart of the colorful alleyways of the South, whose gentle atmosphere lingers until evening, overlooking the sea.

name: Santal de Paris
notes: Lily, Amyris, Powdery Notes, Ambrette, Sandalwood, Vanilla, Amber, Ambroxan, Benzoin
style: Creamy, Powdery / Soft, Woody Ambery Floral
description: The smooth, creamy sweetness of sandalwood is dressed in Parisian elegance. Santal De Paris is a sophisticated composition that embraces the refined sweetness of ambrette, the carnal glow of amber, the sensuality of vanilla, edged with benzoin.An enveloping perfume extract whose majestic aura invites you to dream, like the sumptuous palaces of the City of Lights.Santal De Paris is a tribute to the timeless charm of Parisian glamour. Its thousand shades, powdery, woody and amber, shimmer like the undulating reflections of the Seine.

name: Poppy Riot
notes: Bitter Orange, Prune, Green Mandarin, Poppy Accord, Saffron Milk, Davana, Tobacco, Havanawood, Tonka, Sublimolide
style: Floral, Floral - Spicy, Powdery / Soft, Woody Ambery Floral

A luminous burst of bright green mandarin orange and sweet prune opens the fragrance, unfolding into a heart of vivid poppy, softened by saffron and davana. Sweet yet sharp, soft yet defiant, it's an art-meets-attitude fragrance that blurs boundaries and re-announces Room 1015 as a loud, free, and unapologetic celebration of individuality and self-expression.

name: Lovebird
notes: Kiwi, Bergamot, Orange, Blackcurrant, Mint, Clary Sage, Clove, Wormwood, Lavender, Passionfruit, Ylang-ylang, Geranium, Lily Of The Valley, Heliotrope, Amyris, Amber, Virginia Cedar, Oak Moss, Vanilla, Tonka, Ambrette, Musk
style: Chypre, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Fresh
description: In the branches of a sprawling thorn tree, a boisterous flock of lovebirds gathers, undeterred by the African savanna芒聙聶s scorching heat. Cheerful chatter fills the air as they flit and weave, playfully hopping from one partner to another. Amid the lively commotion, one pair slips away to a quiet perch. Snuggling head to head, they preen one another, their affectionate chirps muffled against velvety soft feathers. The setting sun captures the intimate encounter, washing the glorious hues of the lovebirds芒聙聶 intertwined plumage with a golden glow.Zoologist Lovebird bottles the thrill of budding romance in a single spritz. It opens with a playful burst of kiwi, orange, and passionfruit, as sweet and fleeting as a first kiss. A captivating blend of ylang-ylang, lavender, lily of the valley, and heliotrope weaves an intimate connection, drawing you deeper. Finally, ambrette, musk and amber ignite a sensual embrace, leaving a warm, lingering glow of enduring love.The Special Edition has a surprise inside!Discover the label color only when you open the box. (Contains the same perfume in every box. Only the label colour/design varies. Label Colour rarity: Green 60%, Blue 30%, Purple 10%)

name: Remain
notes: Hojari Frankincense, Mandarin, Pimento Berry, Bergamot, Madonna Lily, Ylang-ylang, Juniper, Jasmine, Ambergris, Guaiac, Patchouli, Vanilla, Tonka Bean

At the heart of this creation, vanilla emerges as a paradox, both raw and refined, primal yet velvety. Wrapped in the floral warmth of ylang-ylang and jasmine, it takes on a luminous, almost celestial quality. The base is a foundation of sacred frankincense, deep sandalwood, and castoreum, anchoring the fragrance in the very roots of perfumery芒聙聶s history.

name: Line 618
notes: Hojari Frankincense, Black Pepper, Pineapple, Peach, Plum, Pine, Heliotrope, Coconut Milk, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Guaiac, Leather

The base is a deep structure of sandalwood and leather accord carrying the scent forward into infinity.

name: Sequence
notes: Lychee, Raspberry, Saffron, Rose, Osmanthus, Tonka Bean, Oud, Leather, Ambery Woods
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet, Woody - Dark, Woody - Fresh
description: Time moves in cycles, and Sequence embodies the circle- the sublime return of all things.Lush lychee and raspberry capture the sweetness of life, while saffron adds a red touch. In the heart, osmanthus and rose bloom anew, their richness deepened by tonka bean. The base is a profound embrace of leather, oud, and ambery woods, evoking the endless passage of time, where endings are merely beginnings.

name: Violette 30
notes: Violet, White Tea, Cedar, Guaiac
style: Floral, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Within the lexicon of floriography- the secret language of flowers meticulously preserved in Victorian-era texts- the violet evades easy explanation. Across history, violets have symbolized a delightfully paradoxical bouquet of meaning, standing for both burning passion and wide-eyed innocence, steadfast strength and poetic delicacy, measured wisdom and persistent optimism.Violette 30 is an ode to the undefinable contrasts in a single specimen. Centered around the rarer, shadow-seeking white violet, at once crystalline and untethered, it pairs verdant green floral notes with white tea notes, cedarwood, and a touch of guaiacwood. Familiar yet unknown, it is a study in saying yes to contradiction; a call to reclaim and embrace our many multitudes.Personalize your fragrance:Enter your custom message or name at checkout and we'll have Le Labo print it on your label.Please note:Complimentary samples availablewith any product purchase. Please request at checkout in the comments box.

name: Holy Berry
notes: Strawberry Milk Accord, Cardamom, Iris Concrete, Jasmine, White Oud Accord, Vanilla, Sandalwood, AmberExtreme

It opens like a well-kept secret under a veil of gently spiced, mouthwatering milk. Iris lends it its mystery, while white oud leaves a sacred trail on the skin. Sandalwood wraps the moment in a warm breath. Vanilla envelops it all in a dark and disrupting caress. A sweet-woody elixir, vibrant likeemotion at skin level. Instinctive, almost magical, Holy Berry is a ritual born of temptation- each drop is a burning invocation of unforgettably delectable sensuality.

style: Earthy, Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - White, Smoky, Spicy, Sweet
description: The newest entry in Clive Christian's Addictive Arts collection, Strange Heavens takes its name from Oscar Wilde芒聙聶s 芒聙聹The Picture of Dorian Grey," in particular, a scene that takes place in a Victorian-era narcotics den, the 芒聙聹strange heavens芒聙聺 of being under the influence of a mind-altering substance.A fragrance born of paradox, Strange Heavens Out Of The Blue opens with an awakening of coffee and aniseed before hypnotic notes of jasmine, orange flower and Clive Christian's exclusive Addictive Fusion accord lure you in. At its base, entrancing notes of cocoa absolute, vanilla caramel and smoke linger, leaving a lasting and unforgettable trail. Both the bottle and outer packaging for the fragrance feature art by the artist Domingo Zapata- his signature panda bear- and bear his actual signature as well, making Strange Heavens a true collector芒聙聶s item.

name: Lift Me Up

Sweet, tropical ylang-ylang and lush magnolia burst with intensity, while an overdose of smooth, sensual musk fuses with the skin, releasing waves of warmth and vitality. As time passes, gentle white musk and dry woody notes remain, creating the cool and free mood of a freshly poured beer.Made from the fermentation of fresh fruit and barley hops, this green grape beer fragrance captures the energetic, young, and trendy spirit of Seoul.

In the next room, the nuns, equal parts gentle and defiant, sung the praises of a god that would never forsake them, knowing even god wouldn芒聙聶t dare.

name: Isola Snow

Not a care in the world to be had- here on Isola Snow, time is the only thing that melts away.

A work of true luxury, the perfume recalls the champagne blend through its sparkling composition of notes and its flacon pink tint, encapsulating its opulence and timeless allure.

name: Tokyo Nights

Tokyo Nights harnesses this electricity in a magnetic blend of late night adventure, passion, and romance that also manages to find the subtly comforting sense of safety and tradition that quietly holds up a nightlife otherwise dedicated to joyous excess. Boozy, smoky, lush, refreshing and gently sweet all at once, with distinctive notes of complexumeshuplum wine, smooth, watery osmanthus, and an amber-kissed tobacco smoke that evokes countless ultralight cigarettes and cans of Chu-Hi scattered across karaoke booths and izakaya rooms all over the sprawling megalopolis. Elegant and wild, soothing and intoxicating, Tokyo Nights is a call to adventure- anytime, anywhere.

The fiery, biting sea spray reveals an immense landscape, a submerged prayer.From a journey at the crossroad of a sacred quest and a pagan call, the sanctuary incense mingled with the strand seaweed, and the iodic mist salted the faithful heart.An olfactory pilgrimage, austere and atmospheric, where each inspiration becomes contemplation.

name: Almond Milk

name: Salum Sampler Set
description: Journey through our latest collection of Salum Extrait de Parfum fragrances.Includes 2ml atomizers of:Blue Mai TaiCaviar RoseCocoysterExotic ChocolateStrawberry PoolVanilla Monsoon

name: Ambergris

style: Earthy, Green / Herbaceous, Salty / Oceanic, Spicy

Once reserved for kings and emperors, its enigmatic scent has graced royal chambers and adorned sacred ceremonies. A fragrance of mystery and seduction, its presence lingers like a whispered incantation on the wind.

name: Bourbon Vanilla

This once-exclusive botanical flourished beyond its origins through the hands of Edmond Albius, an enslaved boy whose discovery reshaped the industry forever.

name: Bulgarian Rose

Since the 17th century, Bulgarian rose oil has been the lifeblood of perfumery, its velvety petals whispering tales of romance, luxury, and timeless beauty.

name: Jasmine Sambac

description: A flower of divinity, Jasmin Sambac has adorned offerings and sacred rituals across India and Southeast Asia for centuries. Its intoxicating bloom, both delicate and untamed, has since become the soul of white floral perfumes- a fragrance of devotion, seduction, and eternal beauty.

name: Myrrh

description: Since 3000 BC, myrrh has been burned in temples and used in sacred healing rites. In the Middle Ages, it found new purpose amidst the Black Death, infused into the beak-like masks of plague doctors, believed to shield them from the 芒聙聵poisoned air.芒聙聶 Its resinous depth still carries echoes of those who sought protection in its scent.

name: Coronet

description: Taking inspiration from chess, Coronet embodies the quiet dominance of the most powerful piece on the board. The coronet 芒聙聯 a crown of earned power, understated yet commanding 芒聙聯 symbolizes grace, precision, and strategic mastery, distilled into a scent that commands attention with subtle elegance.Coronet unveils a bold fusion of frankincense and amber, blended into a unique harmony that elevates amber to new heights of refinement.Every note is intentional. Every presence, enduring. Elegant, poised, and profoundly modern, Coronet is the scent of knowing the game is already yours.

name: E-lectron

style: Creamy, Floral - Ambery Spice, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet
description: From millennia-old amber fossils and the soft, resinous incense-like aroma released when these ancient stones are gently warmed, to its present as a contemporary and innovative raw material, the creation of an amber fragrance is always a mesmerizing journey of reinvention.Rooted in memory and material heritage, amber has long been associated with warmth, serenity, and quiet sophistication. Its presence evokes a sense of comfort and timeless elegance, making it a cornerstone of olfactory composition.E-lectron (??e?t???)- the Ancient Greek word for amber fossil- is a fragrance composed entirely around this noble material. The composition is enriched with a nuanced interplay of warm and cool spices, gourmand accents of cacao and white chocolate, and a strikingly dry, photorealistic sweetness drawn from sweet clover, tonka bean, and bran absolutes. The result is a complex, contemporary interpretation of amber that feels both intimate and enduring.

name: Va Va Vanilla
notes: Espresso Martini, Cinnamon, Black Cherry, Saffron, Coffee, Crushed Nuts, Rum, Manhattan Cocktail, Forbidden Vanilla, Guaiac Wood, Leather, Hot Skin, Sandalwood, Silky Woods

description: Sensational and hedonistic, Va Va Vanilla is a sultry and seductive stroll through an exclusive speakeasy at dusk, where darkness and light intertwine. Espresso martinis and Manhattans mingle with a voluptuous, silky, decidedly adults-only vanilla. Cherry and cinnamon catch the light, while saffron hums low and warm, softened by a whisper of leather underneath the surface.Va Va Vanilla leaves a trail of molten sweetness that slips down easy, warm as whispered promises on an evening charged with longing. Cold liquor meets hot skin as the jolt of caffeine quickens the pulse, dark cherry gleaming, cinnamon swirling- a place where inhibitions melt, breath shortens, and the night leans in closer.

name: Red Flag

A scent of tension, constructed like an invisible flower pulsing beneath the surface. The atmosphere becomes darker. An obscure iris mingles with underground roots, while velvety beetroot adds its deep red color and tactile presence.The scent intensifies: cardamom, mysterious palo santo and spices that vibrate between seduction and warning. The wood becomes creamier, smokier: palo santo, patchouli, sandalwood, and vetiver create a sensual, almost hypnotic warmth.

name: Shadid
notes: Spices, Animalic Leather, Coriander, Castoreum, Nagarmotha, Palisander, Animalic Musks, Sandalwood, Ambergris, Vanilla, Dry Cedarwood
style: Animalic, Exotic, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Introducing Shadid, a new extrait de parfum by Tauer Perfumes. Named after the Arabic word for strong, intense, powerful, Shadid is a bold oriental fragrance with depth, elegance, and an uncompromising character. Rich and expressive yet refined, Shadid explores contrasts such as darkness and light, power and restraint, sensuality and air. It is an oriental fragrance with a strong presence and a soul.Shadid was inspired by a drive through the desert from Los Angeles to Las Vegas. Wide blue skies, endless horizons, heat, silence, and solitude form a nearly mystical experience where memories surface, colors intensify, and time seems suspended. Rich, warm, and deeply evocative, Shadid captures a feeling of vastness and intensity, tempered by calm and clarity.At the heart of Shadid lies Nagarmotha, revealed in all its facets: woody, smoky, ambery, musky. It evokes the depth and richness often associated with oud. The composition opens with animalic leather and spice, then deepens into a rich and textured middle before settling into a dark yet radiant base.
