Creamy sandalwood, glowing ambergris, dry cedarwood, and a restrained touch of vanilla create lift and luminosity, balancing the darker elements and giving the fragrance an airy inner light.Shadid is powerful but never loud. Elegant, composed, and persistent.

name: Garden Song
notes: Pink Pepper, Blackcurrant Buds, Basil Grand Vert, Geranium, Musks
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Spicy
description: Garden Song is inspired by a still blurry morning of May. Dew, green leaves and cut herbs. Tart glossy berries. Vibrant and nuanced without being fragile, Garden Song is a translucent infusion of berries, petals and herbs. The rosy fluidity of geranium melts into the skin to leave a veil of soothing musk.

name: Santal Ceremony
notes: Black Pepper, Caraway Seeds, Nutmeg, Sandalwood, Ambrette Seed, Frankincense Resin
style: Powdery / Soft, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: Santal Ceremony celebrates the power of sacred woods. The creamy sandalwood essence dialogues with the spices - black pepper, caraway seeds, nutmeg - and ambrette seed, a unique natural musk. A deep, spicy bois de peau, aromatic at the top and subtly smoky at the base. Santal Ceremony tells the story of a mystical ceremony from oneself to oneself and accompanies the thoughts that unfold, from earth to heaven.

name: Quelque Part
notes: Fir Balsam, Vetiver, Jasmine, Ambrette Seed, Amber Musks, Hot Steam
style: Fresh, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Fresh
description: This perfume was composed as an olfactory refuge: a creamy experience with balsamic, musky and resinous, even caramelized, notes. It envelops us with mineral scents of hot stone, crushed pine thorns and the softness of skin against skin. A comforting composition, mixing balsam pine absolute, musks, ambrette and cashmeran with soothing vetiver. Quelque Part reveals the precious imprint of gentle confidence.

name: La Terre, La Nuit
notes: Tuberose, Rose, Oakmoss, Sandalwood, Cedar, Patchouli, Undergrowth Accord
style: Earthy, Floral, Floral - White, Woody Ambery Floral
description: A mysterious skin bloom. The rich notes of tuberose, rose and jasmine blossom in the heart of an earthy and shady undergrowth. Patchouli, sandalwood, cedar and oak moss harmoniously anchor the composition. A delicate balance between shadow and light. La Terre, La Nuit writes a captivating and sophisticated naturalness.

name: Verdeur
notes: Angelica Root, Neroli, Orange Blossom, Iris, Violet Leaves, Vetiver
style: Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Verdeur is an ode to greenness, a celebration of the feeling of quietude linked to green nature. Juicy root, tender wood, wet leaves. The herbaceous and peppery notes of angelica root blend harmoniously with the orange fluidity of neroli and orange bossom. The fragrance blossoms into deliciously green and iridescent heart notes, soon supported by tender woods with slightly earthy accents. A haven of tranquility envelops the skin and the mind.

name: La Decouverte Olfactive Dicovery Set
description: Explore the sensory world of Racyne. Discover our range of 5 unique, nuanced and introspective scented rituals.The box includes 5 samples in 2ml format so you can take the time to smell at home and test on skin:Verdeur芒聙聯 A fresh and soothing botanical decoction.Garden Song - A spring infusion.Santal Ceremony - A deep, velvety woody cloud.Quelque Part- An enveloping refuge, an addictive comfort.La Terre, La Nuit - A mysterious skin flower.

name: Bergamot Loka
notes: Bergamot, Juice Blend, Orange Peel, Neroli, Orange Blossom, Rose Water, Musk, Salty Skin, Tonka, Sandalwood, Benzoin
style: Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Fresh
description: Transporting you to the juicy world of Bergamot Loka, where your mouth waters with citrus pleasure, and the summer sun kisses your skin.

name: Musk Loka
notes: Multi-musk Accord, Kissed Skin, Heliotrope, Sandalwood, Vanilla, Tonka, Oakmoss
style: Creamy, Floral - Light, Powdery / Soft, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: Transporting you to the sensual world of Musk Loka, where your skin comes alive with the pheromones of intoxicating musk.

name: Best of 2025 sample pack
description: A look back at our bestsellers and most thrilling releases of 2025!Our 12-piece Sample pack includes samples in a larger size vial芒聙聯 1.5ml spray vials:Nearly Noonby DefineMePumpkin Spice Latteby Theodoros KalotinisCelestial Objectby LiisLondon Fogby BrandtLove-o-Maticby Room 1015Impadiaby BDK ParfumsDirty Milkby BORNTOSTANDOUTPrintemps Blancby Maison MatahaPacific Rock Flowerby Goldfield & BanksMatcha Soft Serveby d'AnnamPLUS with compliments:Molecule 01 by Escentric MoleculesNota Lucky by Ulyka ParfumsSpecial price, limited quantities. Larger 1.5ml sprays... Enjoy!

name: L'Anonyme
notes: Bergamot, Geranium, Blonde Woods, White Amber, Suede Leather
style: Floral - Light, Fresh, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Light
description: A smooth, clean fragrance tempered by a brush of the earthy and spiritual,L'Anonymeis wearable by anyone- usually a difficult feat but one this perfume has it down pat. The opening is crisp and transparent, a modern and minimalist citrus-meets-clean that isn't complicated or overdone 芒聙聹soapy.芒聙聺 Geranium offers up its uplifting nature throughout, a little velvety, a little rose-like, an always-shifting fragrance note that can lean masculine or feminine depending on its neighboring scents (this one is right down the middle). Suede leather and blonde woods carry with them a little touch of warmth, but not enough to overpower this perfume's simple, clear heart. Unpretentious, uncomplicated and unfussy, L'Anonyme has no baggage... it's drama-free and oh-so-attractive because of it.

name: Masquerade Ball
notes: Bergamot, Cardamom, Pineapple, Geranium, Muguet
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Powdery / Soft, Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: You are invited to the masquerade. Standing on the red carpet, you are ready to face a new world. The grand doors open slowly, and a bright glow welcomes you. Music drifts through the air, its notes turning into scent. Behind the mask, your true persona yields and lets the fragrance carry you..

name: Whispering Kiss
notes: Immortelle, Pepper, Cardamom, Ginger, Cognac, Red Bean, Rum, Sage, Amber, Vanilla, Patchouli, Vetiver, Woody Accord
style: Boozy, Creamy, Gourmand, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Spicy
description: As the music of the hall fades, your partner guides you to a hidden library. Warm cognac slips down your throat; the fireplace burns red, lighting two hearts. The sweet haze stirs the truth beyond the mask, and two lips, touched by fragrance, meet芒聙聰slowly and softly..

name: LP01 Mystic Rose
notes: White Peony, Centifolia Rose, Black Pepper, Jasmine, Golden Amber, Black Tea, Vanilla, Cedarwood, Incense, Musk, Patchouli
style: Floral, Floral - Ambery Spice, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Amber, Woody Ambery Floral
description: The moment you put on this mask imbued with the magic of the mystical rose, the most lovable side of you is revealed to the world. Your smallest gestures, enchanted with the magical rose, melt the toughest of hearts to look upon you with adoring eyes.

name: LP02 Peacock Feather
notes: Lime, Bergamot, Lemon, Lavender, White Flowers, Jasmine, Coconut, Patchouli, Amber
style: Floral - White, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Tropical / Beachy
description: As you put on the mask adorned with full peacock feathers, you are instantly taken to the festival at the beach, enjoying the time with your loved ones. The endless sparkling ocean and the sound of their laughter refresh your mind.

name: LP03 Wooden Face
notes: Green Tea, Cardamom, Orange, Fig, Sweet Pea, Jasmine, Musk, Sandalwood, Cashmere Wood
style: Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: This meticulously crafted wooden mask made by the master craftsman unleashes the hidden potential within you. The world recognizes your worth and guides you on the path to success when your self-confidence, born from your limitless potential and the magic of the mask, rules you.

name: LP04 Golden Gem
notes: Bergamot, Cardamom Oil, Rose, Cedarwood, Vanilla, Fire, Guaiac Wood, Vetiver, Patchouli
style: Creamy, Earthy, Green / Herbaceous, Warm, Woody - Spicy
description: A golden mask shining brilliantly alone in the dark. The dignity of nobility wraps around you as you walk with this mask among the crowds. When countless gazes mixed with jealousy and envy lingers on you, you become the center of the world.

name: Exotic Chocolate
notes: White Chocalate, Star Anise, Cinnamon, Salted Butter, Chocolate Cookie, Warm Milk, Pastry Cream, Cocoa Powder, Madagascar Vanilla, Sensual Musks
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Spicy, Sweet
description: An explosion of delectable sweetness envelops the senses: created by Sofia Bardelli, this fragrance opens with star anise and cinnamon, leading to a heart where a freshly baked cookie is immersed in melted white chocolate. In the drydown, a velvety embrace of warm milk, Madagascar vanilla, and sensual musks wraps everything in an irresistible cloud.

name: Caviar Rose
notes: Peach, Dragon Fruit, Champagne, Pink Pepper, Elemi, Caviar, Osmanthus, Sambac Jasmine, Patchouli, Caramel, Musk, Tonka Bean
style: Exotic, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Salty / Oceanic, Sweet
description: Caviar Ros脙漏 is a sumptuous perfume that combines the juicy boldness of peach and exotic dragon fruit with the sparkling elegance of champagne and the salty notes of caviar. A bold and sophisticated mix, perfect for those looking for a fragrance that surprises with its intensity and sophistication.

name: Vanilla Monsoon
notes: Orange, Cardamom, Monsoon Accord, Aquatic Fruits, Vanilla Flowers, Jasmine, Patchouli, Vanilla, Benzoin
style: Creamy, Floral - Light, Fresh - Aquatic, Fruity, Resinous / Balsamic
description: A monsoon sweeps across the island: a completely new and disruptive accord, the Monsoon Accord, wrapped in the refined sweetness of vanilla flower. Juicy peach notes, bright orange blossom, and drops of velvety cocoa intertwine to create the perfect storm, an unexpected encounter of fragrances that will captivate and envelop you in a whirlwind of emotions.

name: Blue Mai Tai
notes: Light Rum, Dark Rum, Ice, Orange Cura脙搂ao, Lime, Davana Absolute, Orgeat Syrup, Styrax, Patchouli
style: Boozy, Fruity, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy
description: A refreshing cocktail on a Polynesian beach. Light and dark rum blend in a heart of orange cura脙搂ao and davana absolute. Patchouli and orgeat syrup embrace the vacation in paradise.

name: Cocoyster
notes: Oyster, Sea Salt, Coconut, Coconut Milk, Ylang Ylang, Amber Elemi, Incense, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Milky, Resinous / Balsamic, Salty / Oceanic, Unusual / Unexpected
description: The taste of a salty oyster with exquisite sea nuances captivates the senses. The caress of a provocative coconut adds an exotic note. The ambiance is warmed by incense, amber, and vanilla, creating a enveloping atmosphere. What else?

name: Strawberry Pool
notes: Strawberry, Wild Strawberry, Ginger, Pink Pepper, Pool Accord, Chlorine Accord, Grey Amber, Ambrette Seed, Sunscreen
style: Creamy, Fresh - Aquatic, Fruity, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy
description: A pool amidst the infinite shades of turquoise offers a breathtaking view of the Polynesian landscape. A cup of red strawberries delights the palate. Ambrette seeds and solar notes frame a moment of absolute relaxation.

name: Agrani
notes: Cacao, Tobacco, Saffron, Castoreum, Oud, Musk
style: Animalic, Earthy, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Dark
description: The wordAgraniholds many meanings: a leader, a pioneer, a founder and in Sanskrit, it signifies success. And indeed, Agrani is a fragrance designed to evoke all the qualities of a truly historic leader. Its unique aroma- spicy, leathery, animalic, yet sweet- reflects the piercing and bold essence of that leader, eloquently announcing its presence. Like the flow of the ocean, its powerful sillage comes in undulating waves, allowing for both impressive resonance and subtle moments of grace.As befitting a fragrance meant to celebrate an inspirational leader, Agrani opens with a captivating burst of cherry, almond, and saffron, symbols of mesmerizing oratory skills to rally the masses. The heart reveals the strength of pipe tobacco and leather, expressing the bravery and fearlessness that mark a revolutionary spirit. A comforting presence of musk and Burmese oud blankets the fragrance like a warm embrace, a reminder of hope in challenging times. Finally, a potent base of cacao and castoreum evoke the lasting impact a true leader has on the world, with the warmth of amber echoing the rays of hope such a leader ignites in future generations.

name: Iris Sura
notes: Cacao Pod, Butter, Orris Root, Vanilla, Orris Butter, Oak, Indonesian Oud, Peach, Sandalwood
style: Creamy, Earthy, Powdery / Soft, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Dark, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Iris Sura is inspired by the story of a 19th-century whiskey maker and his wife, Elena. She shaped every barrel with her exceptional nose, yet was forbidden from enjoying whiskey inside the saloons they supplied. To honor her, he secretly infused their finest whiskey with precious iris, adding touches of vanilla, oakwood, peach, honey, and walnut- creating something meant only for her.A unique interpretation of orris, Iris Sura is crafted without relying on synthetic ionones. Instead, it uses rich, high-grade natural orris butter and other genuine iris ingredients sourced from trusted producers. The result is a luxuriously smooth, velvety blend with white-chocolate sweetness, honeyed warmth, and a true waxy orris core. Its opening carries a boozy, oak-aged whiskey nuance, smoky and softly resinous. Exquisite and indulgent, Iris Sura is an iris for true lovers.

name: Aghora
notes: Ghost Pepper, Hashish Accord, Marigold, Sage, Fig, Smoke, Frankincense, Galbanum, Oakmoss, Tobacco, Fir Balsam, Opoponax, Tree Moss, Hindi Oud, Sandalwood, Choya Ral, Guaiac Wood, Chocolate, Labdanum, Myrrh, Castoreum, Deer Musk Accord, Leather
style: Animalic, Earthy, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Sweet, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Drawing inspiration from the mystique of the Aghora- an ascetic tribe that embraces life beyond all restraint- to craft a bold olfactory journey. This enigmatic brotherhood lives at the fringes of civilization, pursuing enlightenment through complete detachment from comfort and taboo. In that same spirit, Aghora captures a daring, boundary-defying artistry, while still delivering a scent that remains deeply wearable, captivating, and unmistakably unique.The scent opens with spicy, aromatic sparks that awaken the senses, leading into a heart of deep forest woods and earth-soaked resins. It settles on a raw musky base-wild, grounding, and intimately human.Unusual yet magnetic, Aghora is an invitation to venture into the untamed-the point where darkness meets divinity, and liberation begins.

name: Tabac Sura
notes: Cigar Tincture (2023), Vanilla Tincture (2022), Custom Amber Base, Ambergris, Deer Musk, Aged Castoreum Tincture, Oakwood, Cocoa Absolute, Tonka Bean Absolute, Special 2011 Batch Trat Oud Oil
style: Creamy, Earthy, Smoky, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Amber
description: Tabac Sura started as a personal project for Byermia creator Ashek Zubayer- an attempt to capture the perfect aroma of unsweetened cigar tobacco. It began as an unembellished blend of cigar and vanilla tinctures, expertly balanced and ultimately supplemented with a very carefully chosen amount of a precious few extra ingredients- a touch of musk, a dusting of cocoa powder, and a ribbon of rare, aged Trat oud. After sharing samples of this almost mystically potent concoction with friends, the requests kept coming in, and after painstakingly sourcing new materials and letting a fresh batch of cigar tincture age for nearly a year, Tabac Sura became an official Byermia release. Tobacco lovers, don't wait for it to sell out again- discover this richly sensual, deeply evocative extrait today.

name: Tiger Rouge
notes: Black Pepper, Paprika, Pimento Oil, Blood Orange, Lemon Myrtle, Mandarin, Cinnamon Bark, Bay Leaf, Cloves, Frankincense, Hainan Oud, Indian Vetiver, Cypriol Oil, Turkish Rose, Red Cherry, Almond, Pomegranate, Mineral Accords
style: Earthy, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Spicy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: The Rouge Tiger tells the mythical tale of an ancient Red Tiger, a creature of legend whispered through generations- a divine guardian born of flame and forest, said to embody the wild soul of the Indian wilderness. With every stride, it stirred the land beneath it, and the air around it shimmered with its primal force.Its presence was unmistakable, marked by the fierce intensity of black pepper, paprika, and pimento oil, conjuring the raw power coursing through its veins. The jungle pulsed with its breath, brought to life by the bright energy of blood orange, lemon myrtle, and mandarin- the vibrant, untamed heartbeat of the forest itself.Feared and revered in equal measure, the tiger芒聙聶s rage was like wildfire芒聙聰unpredictable and holy. Cinnamon bark, bay Leaf, and cloves captured the fire of its fury, the spirit of a creature unbound by any rule but nature芒聙聶s.But then, it vanished.Some say Persian spice traders captured the tiger, seeking to break the spirit of the forest it once protected. Without its guardian, the wild groves fell to fenced fields and forced cultivation. The scent turns somber芒聙聰frankincense, Hainan oud, Indian vetiver, and cypriol oil evoking a land abandoned, its sacred bond to the tiger severed.Over time, whispers emerged. Elders in southern ports began to speak of the Noble Lineage of Hormuz Island芒聙聰guardians of rare truths and lost souls芒聙聰who had intervened. They say the tiger was released by them in secret, carried across the sea to their distant homeland, where compassion outweighed conquest.What followed was nothing short of a miracle.The island sands turned crimson, and the air became heavy with the scent of rare minerals and a magic not seen in centuries. The fragrance芒聙聶s dry-down tells this sacred transformation. Turkish rose and red cherry bloom in the air芒聙聰notes of rebirth, of a land and a creature resurrected. The Rouge Tiger, no longer of the jungle or the chains, but of myth and renewal, its spirit forever embedded in the earth of Hormuz, and in the hearts of those who still believe.

name: Pushpak
notes: Osmanthus, Champaca, Vanilla, Amber, Khao Yai Oud, Peach, Apricot, Tonka Bean
style: Creamy, Floral - White, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Inspired by the essence of first love,Pushpakameans "the season of flowers." It seeks to capture love芒聙聶s first touch, with a gorgeous bouquet of lush white champaca and osmanthus absolute blended perfectly with richly fruity notes of peach and apricot. The heart is dominated by warm, creamy vanilla and sensuous amber, evoking the enveloping comfort of a first embrace. In the base, tonka bean absolute and the finest Khao Yai Thai Oud take their place, adding a tender and lingering whisper of romantic devotion, laid on a soft pillow of powdery musk. As enduring as cherished memories of first love, Pushpak is a floral of rare beauty.This perfume made Byermia Fragrance a Finalist in the 2025 AFP Niche Perfume Brand Awards.

name: Vanilla Mystique
notes: Rum, Lavender, Saffron, Vanilla, Heliotrope, Jasmine, Musk, Oakwood CO2, Cedarwood
style: Boozy, Creamy, Floral - Light, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Fresh
description: Vanilla Mystique is a dreamlike woodsy vanilla fragrance- a gentle cloud of soft, smooth vanilla blended with an intoxicating rum accord and elegant oakwood CO2 for an ethereally boozy, subtly rich gourmand experience. Heliotrope and jasmine bring a romantic hint of floral powder, while a gentle hum of cedarwood enhances the woody energy of the base. Tada aimed to make this vanilla less sweet than usual, maintaining the luxuriousness that any perfect vanilla needs, while also presenting something unlike most other dessert-oriented examples of the style. In other words, it's a one of a kind vanilla the way only Tada could have done it- you'll have to try it for yourself to find out.

name: YSAYO
notes: Saffron, Galbanum, Blue Chamomile, White Artemisia, Celery Oil, Geranium, Jasmine, Thyme, Cistus Absolute, Patchouli Oil, Leather, Javan And Haitian Vetiver
style: Earthy, Floral, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy
description: Antoine Lie grew up in Alsace in north-eastern France, surrounded by greenery. For this perfume, he travelled back to the depths and emotions of his younger years and unleashed his olfactory passion without any inhibitions or intellectual reasoning.Welcome to the mysterious world of the Green Samurai: an exciting, natural world full of color and vitality. Earthy Greens and Royal Purple. Raw power layered with Asian and French finesse.25% perfume oil.

name: Discovery Set
description: The What We Do Is Secret discovery set is a curated invitation into a universe of fragrances by the world芒聙聶s best perfumers designed to create memorable scents that inspire emotion.  Worn intuitively, layered freely, and revisited often, each fragrance reveals a different mood and moment, inviting you to explore the collection's effortless and unforgettable scents.What We Do Is Secret embodies self-expression without rules. If you芒聙聶re building a fragrance wardrobe, not just choosing a favorite, this is where it begins. Wear one, wear several, or let instinct guide you. The set contains the entirety of the rebranded and streamlined line:Covert Musk, And The World Is Yours, Freckled And Beautiful, L'Anonyme, Monoscent G, Messy Sexy Just Rolled Out Of Bed, & What We Do In Paris Is Secret.

name: Messy Sexy Just Rolled Out of Bed
notes: Bergamot, Peach Blossom, Rose, Heliotrope, Musk, Toffee, Amber, White Woods, Vanilla, Tonka Bean
style: Creamy, Floral - Citrus, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: Everyone loves the smell of vanilla, and yet somehow the perfect, universally wearable vanilla seems elusively rare- mouthwatering bakery gourmands scare away lovers of wispier, more floral concoctions, and both varieties are often seen as too feminine for men to wear. This is why we're so enthused with Dominique Ropion's brilliant creation for WWDIS- a just-right vanilla musk that we think smells divine on just about anyone. This enchanting elixir is sweet without seeming gooey, compelling without shouting in your face, and romantic with enough restraint to wear well on men and women alike. A soft rose lends its velvety tones throughout, darting in and out among the star players of clean musk, rich tonka bean absolute, vanilla, and amber. The ever-so-slightly powdery almond notes of heliotrope are the perfect complement, softening and rounding out the sweet toffee and barely-there blonde woods. Messy Sexy Just Rolled Out of Bed is a season-spanning wonder, displaying a warming sweet coziness on cool fall days, while bergamot and peach blossom bring a fresh, light addition to summer sunshine. With versatility like that, it's no wonder that Messy Sexy Just Rolled Out of Bed is one of the best crowd-pleasing vanillas we've ever put our noses on.

name: What We Do In Paris Is Secret
notes: Bergamot, Honey, Lychee, Turkish Rose Essence, Tonka Bean, Vanilla, Heliotrope, Tolu, Sandalwood, Ambergris, Musks
style: Creamy, Exotic, Floral, Powdery / Soft
description: You know how the notes in some perfumes read like something from your wildest, fragrant dreams but end up smelling like a Franken-fume, something you should love but don't, something that's less than the sum of its parts?What We Do In Paris Is Secretactually exceeds the gorgeous sounding symphony of its notes (and that's a hard thing to do!). It's impossible not to be lured in by the rich, sweet notes of vanilla, honey, tonka bean and tolu, the warm sensuality of sandalwood, musks, ambergris, and the playful Turkish rose, lychee and bergamot. Addictive doesn't quite explain it-- we couldn't keep this away from our skin when we first sampled (honestly) and oh, by the way? It makes heads turn. Not in that 芒聙聹You're leaving a vapor trail!芒聙聺 way, but in that, 芒聙聹Please tell me what you're wearing now!芒聙聺 way. Creamy, decadent, honeyed and sensual. If those are the kind of words that make your heart race when you think of a perfume, then look no further.

name: And The World Is Yours
notes: Neroli, Cumin, Orange Blossom Absolute, Rose, Heliotrope, Sandalwood, Vanilla Pod CO2, Tonka Absolute, Tolu Balsam
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Citrus, Floral - White, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: Few photographs capture the sumptuousness of celebrity more than the iconic photograph of Faye Dunaway by famed English photographer Terry O芒聙聶Neill. The starlet sits poolside at the Beverly Hills Hotel at 6 a.m., hungover from winning an Oscar, sanguine in a pale silk robe, newspapers in a moat around her feet declaring her victor. And who better to pay homage to this most Hollywood morning-after, but Dominique Ropion, master of the doe-eyed and disheveled WWDIS classics What We Do In Paris Is Secret and Messy Sexy Just Rolled Out Of Bed?And the World Is Yourskicks off with a blast of neroli that floods the senses, rich and fresh with the thrilling energy of a papparazzo's flashbulb. With a dramatic sigh, the neroli gives way to a warm, creamy orange blossom, enhanced with a flattering kick of spice. Ropion芒聙聶s signature vanilla musk plays its part with a powdery puff of heliotrope芒聙聰apropos for the Hollywood sensuality. And just like the shimmering sunsets of Los Angeles, it melts into a honeyed, musky, golden finish. Like Dunaway in the photograph,And the World Is Yoursis stylish, sexy- and still basking in the afterglow of last night's adventures.

name: Freckled and Beautiful
notes: Orange Flower, Neroli, Honeysuckle, Warm Milk, Pastry, Salicylates, Sandalwood, Vanilla Bean, Heliotrope
style: Creamy, Floral, Gourmand, Salty / Oceanic, Tropical / Beachy, Woody - Fresh
description: There's no beauty quite like being young in the City of Angels- the wind in your hair, the sand between your toes, the endless possibilities for freedom and adventure in a sun-dappled, ocean-kissed paradise where the days never end and anything is possible. Freckled and Beautiful is a perfect tribute to the beauty of youth in L.A., a warm and hazy beachside floral with an unforgettable gourmand touch. It's a fragrance that highlights everything that makes WWDIS great- creamy, romantic orange blossom, the unmistakable tang of salty ocean air, and a mouthwatering and unique gourmand component- in this case, a warm milk and Petit-Beurre pastry accord that comforts and nourishes like the perfect after-school snack. Delicious and delightful, Freckled and Beautiful captures the unique jubilation of youth, and is a must-try for all lovers of What We Do Is Secret's gift for floral gourmands.

name: Discovery Set
style: Gourmand
description: From lusciously rich ribbons of creamy vanilla to mouthwateringly juicy fruits and smooth, elegant florals, the sophisticated and surprising gourmands of Maison Mataha are a worldwide niche sensation for a reason. Now, you can explore the full line of delicious and delightful fragrances with this specially priced Discovery Set, which contains generous 2ml atomizer samples of all six fragrances in the line:Caf脙漏 des D脙漏lices, Escapade Gourmande, Printemps Blanc, P脙陋che Velours, Brownie Pop,and脙聣vasion Bonbon.

name: Olm
notes: Water Cave Accord, Limestone, Iodine, Algae, Soft Amber, Sandalwood, Oily Musks, Cashmeran, Iso E Super
style: Fresh - Aquatic, Green / Herbaceous, Salty / Oceanic, Unusual / Unexpected, Woody - Fresh
description: Over millions of years, persistent rainwater gnaws at porous limestone, carving out karsts deep within the earth. Carried in droplets, sediment grows upon itself, forming misshapen statues. The stalagmites and stalactites reach for one another, patient in the knowledge that one day they will meet. No sunlight breaches these cavern walls, but something has. Somewhere in time, a family of olms, aquatic salamanders, wandered into the limestone cave and never re-emerged. Generations in darkness have stripped the olms of colour and sight. Pale and blind they wait, sometimes for years, for the subterranean river to deliver a meal of larvae or shrimp to their murky abode.Close your eyes and follow Zoologist Olm into a cavern of sensory delight. Aromachemicals float in mineral water, flowing into a dewy limestone passage that shimmers with algae and amber, stirring up earthy sandalwood and musks. Olm is not seen. Olm is felt. Let this unique fragrance awaken something deep within you.

name: Fiery Passion - 75ml
notes: Musk, Pink Peony, Strawberry, Vanilla, Woods
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: Born from the flames of love and desire, Melanie Martinez's fire-inspired entry in her Portals collection is a tantalizing blend of innocence and sensuality. Sparkling and seductive, Fiery Passion is a floral gourmand that recalls the delicious confections of youth with a mouthwatering strawberry candy opening, while a romantic pink peony infused with the warmth of avant-garde musks and woods create a complex and compelling bouquet for creative souls of all ages. The perfect companion for a summer fling or a lifelong love, Fiery Passion has everything needed to keep hearts aflutter.Bonus: this new 75ml size comes packaged with a mini 3ml travel spray- perfect for on-the-go fun!

name: Earthy Abundance - 75ml
notes: Green Tea, Jasmine, Turmeric, Lavender, Vanilla
style: Earthy, Floral, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy
description: Inspired by all things green and growing, Earthy Abundance is a beautifully lush aromatic green floral that may well be the jewel of the Melanie Martinez Portals Collection. Infused with the leafy freshness of green tea and responsibly sourced aromatic herbs and flowers, Earthy Abundance is a captivating song in tune with nature, enhanced with the harmonizing richness of vanilla bean for a joyfully romantic and long lasting signature both playful and sophisticated.Bonus: this new 75ml size comes packaged with a mini 3ml travel spray- perfect for on-the-go fun!

name: Air of Clarity - 75ml
notes: Caramel, Coconut, Ambroxan, Musk, Tonka Bean, Sandalwood
style: Fresh, Fresh - Aquatic, Gourmand, Salty / Oceanic, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy, Woody - Fresh
description: Inspired by the Element of Air, Air Of Clarity is a bright, smooth solar gourmand with an irresistible aura of sheer tropical delight. Sun-kissed coconut drenched in delectable caramel emanates the golden glow of a radiant sun on a distant white sand beach, evoking relaxation, calm, and purity. Mouthwatering, romantic, playful, and deeply soothing, Air Of Clarity is more than just a "vacation in a bottle"- it's a journey to a higher plane of existence.Bonus: this new 75ml size comes packaged with a mini 3ml travel spray- perfect for on-the-go fun!

name: Water of Intuition - 75ml
notes: Sandalwood, Amber, Cedar, Musk, Vanilla, Cocoa
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Woody - Amber, Woody - Fresh
description: An elemental voyage into the realms of mist and rain, Water of Intuition is a soothing blend of gourmand and woody notes that creates an atmosphere of pure, ethereal bliss. Composed around a comforting cloud of creamy and sustainably-sourced sandalwood, this dreamlike fragrance floats in a soft haven of amber and musk, which merge with lush swirls of vanilla and cocoa to create the perfect sensual elixir.Bonus: this new 75ml size comes packaged with a mini 3ml travel spray- perfect for on-the-go fun!

name: Vanille des Rois
notes: Italian Bigarade Orange, Peruvian Balsam, Tunisian Neroli, Orange Blossom Water, Pink Pepper, Sri Lankan Cinnamon, CO2 Vanilla Extract From The Comoros, Tahitian Vanilla Absolute, Labdanum, Pink & Brown Praline, Brazilian Tonka Bean, Patchouli, Atlas Cedar, Amber Woods, Natural Vanillin
style: Creamy, Floral - White, Fresh - Citrus, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Salty / Oceanic, Sweet
description: A sensory journey where light, warmth, and mouthwateringgourmandisemeet, Vanille des Rois is a regal and celebratory voyage from the sun-drenched neroli fields of Tunisia, through the vanilla plantations of the Comoros and Tahiti, and finally to the indulgent sweetness of French pink and brown praline. It opens radiantly, with orange blossoms, hand-picked under the sun of Nabeul, unveiling a golden freshness, pure and luminous. Their scent, both tender and vibrant, dances on the skin like a Mediterranean breeze. Next, we journey from the islands of the Comoros to those of Tahiti, where vanilla becomes flesh and voluptuousness. Slowly maturing under the sun, caressed by salty air and tropical mist and enhanced by natural vanillin, they release an aroma that evokes sun-warmed skin and reveal a sensual, creamy richness. The final stop of this olfactory road trip leads to Provence, birthplace of the delicate French Pink & Brown Praline, a sweet jewel with tender hues. Together, they reinvent theGalette des Roisinto a royal tribute, a harmony of light, indulgence, and grace. A majestic finale where France embraces the islands in a golden breath of vanilla and sweetness.

name: Un-Boxing Day Sample Pack
description: Celebrate the Un-boxing of our newest, must-smell releases!Sample pack includes:Ylem: Eastern VeilYlem: Eye of GodYlem: Soap BubbleJovoy Paris: Ha Long BayMaison Tahite: Tonka RougeJousset Parfums: Pecan PiePlus, with compliments:Theodoros Kalotinis: Pumpkin Spice LatteJousset Parfums: Praline MaligneSpecial price, limited quantities!

name: Molecule 01 - 200ml Anniversary Edition
notes: Iso E Super
style: Avant-Garde, Skin Scent / Minimal, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Light
description: To mark 20 years of Escentric Molecules, Molecule 01 is now available in a 200ml edition-  the cult favorite skin scent, maxed out in scale.Molecule 01 200ml debuts with a new design detail: a weighty cap, precision-engineered in anodized aluminum with CNC-engraved circle detailing. The internal fitment is crafted from silicone, friction-fitted to the screw-thread pump for a seamless, secure closure.A nod to Escentric Molecules' design-led aesthetic, the cap adds a tactile, architectural finish, elevating the flacon into an object of desire. Still minimalist, but more luxurious.The cult-classic that remains as radical, disruptive and avant-garde as the day it was first bottled, 20 years ago. Molecule 01 is 100% Iso E Super, pure and singular.Molecule 01 has been said to cause animal magnetism. Mysterious, cocooning, radiant and addictive, Iso E Super combines, almost caramelizes, with your own smell to create a personal scent signature."Molecule 01 is for the individuals who might be a bit bored with fragrance and would prefer to radiate an aura. It's difficult to call a single aroma-chemical a fragrance- it's so much more personal," says master perfumer Geza Schoen.Unbounded by gender norms and expectations, the velvety wood-tinged hedonism of Iso E Super makes for an irresistible skin scent.A modern classic, made permanent, as enduring as the molecule itself. A 200ml tribute to the scent that rewrote the rules of perfumery and never looked back.

name: Escentric 01 - 200ml Anniversary Edition
notes: Lime, Pink Pepper, Aldehydes, Orris, Hedione, Iso E Super, Incense, Mastic, Muscone
style: Fresh - Citrus, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Light
description: To mark 20 years of Escentric Molecules, Escentric 01 is now available in a 200ml edition-  it芒聙聶s the scent you love, maxed out in scale.Escentric 01 200ml debuts with a new design detail: a weighty cap, precision-engineered in anodised aluminium with CNC-engraved circle detailing. The internal fitment is crafted from silicone, friction-fitted to the screw-thread pump for a seamless, secure closure.A nod to Escentric Molecules芒聙聶 design-led aesthetic, the cap adds a tactile, architectural finish, elevating the flacon into an object of desire. Still minimalist, but more luxurious.Escentric 01 is a love letter to Iso E Super, a molecule that didn芒聙聶t exist until it was created in a lab at IFF in 1973. Cocooning, woody and inexplicably addictive, Iso E Super hovers close to the skin to create an aura rather than a trail, radiating from the wearer in a way that芒聙聶s hard to pin down.In Escentric 01, master perfumer Geza Schoen used this super molecule at 65% of the formula, an extreme concentration surrounded by a tight edit of 18 ingredients designed to draw out its fresh, radiant and sensual facets.The opening spark of lime peel and pink pepper leads into a heart of green jasmine bud and orris, anchored by balsamic notes and clean musk in the base that lingers. Quietly magnetic, never shouty.芒聙聹With Escentric 01, I made the scent that I would want to wear myself,芒聙聺 says Geza. 芒聙聹I wanted to create something unconventional, not too perfumistic- something for my friends who said they didn芒聙聶t like fragrance.芒聙聺Escentric 01 was never about fitting in, and the 200ml edition stays true to that ethos. It芒聙聶s not just bigger, it芒聙聶s built to stay. A bottle to return to, again and again. For those who芒聙聶ve been with us from the beginning, and for those just discovering the magic of Iso E Super.

name: Golden Saffron
notes: Bergamot, Orange, Lemon, Saffron, Lavender, Jasmine, Mint, Geranium, Lily Of The Valley, Nutmeg, Vanilla, Patchouli, Tobacco, Sugar, Amber
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: A unique collaboration between Dmitry Bortnikoff and master perfumer Christian Carbonnel, Golden Saffron is a luminous composition that celebrates the radiance and warmth of the world芒聙聶s most precious spice. Capturing the moment when sunlight touches gold, the fragrance embodies both energy and refinement, offering a modern expression of luxury.The fragrance opens with a vibrant fusion of bergamot, orange, lemon, and saffron. Sparkling citrus notes bring freshness and vitality, while saffron introduces a golden depth that feels warm, exotic, and irresistibly elegant. At the heart, lavender, jasmine, and lily of the valley blend seamlessly with mint, geranium, and nutmeg. This balanced accord unites aromatic brightness with gentle floral sophistication, creating a refined sense of movement and contrast. The base unfolds into a smooth, enveloping trail of vanilla, patchouli, tobacco, sugar, and amber. Sweet yet grounded, it glows with lasting amber warmth- a fragrance defined by light, depth, and timeless elegance.

name: Millennium Santal
notes: Bergamot, Mandarin, Lemon, Jasmine, Lily Of The Valley, Geranium, Sandalwood, Cedarwood, Oakmoss, Vanilla, Tobacco, Amber
style: Creamy, Floral - Citrus, Woody - Amber, Woody Ambery Floral
description: A collaboration between Dmitry Bortnikoff and master perfumer Christian Carbonnel, Millenium Santal expresses enduring elegance through a composition shaped by the noble warmth of sandalwood. Rooted in the balance between contemporary clarity and classical heritage, it evokes the quiet confidence and natural calm of this treasured wood.The opening reveals a fresh interplay of bergamot, mandarin, and lemon, gently accented with jasmine. This luminous introduction brings a sense of openness and clarity, setting an uplifting and graceful mood. At the core, sandalwood unfolds in full presence, soft, creamy, and introspective. Lily of the valley, geranium, and cedarwood surround it, adding structure and depth while preserving a smooth, harmonious flow. The fragrance settles into a warm foundation of oakmoss, vanilla, tobacco, and amber, leaving a refined and lingering impression.Millenium Santal is a thoughtful and composed fragrance, defined by balance, warmth, and a lasting sense of serenity.

name: Tiger Blue
notes: Grapefruit, Lemon, Ginger, Violet, Magnolia, Amber, Labdanum, Ambergris, Musk, Vanilla, Benzoin
style: Floral - Spicy, Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus, Resinous / Balsamic, Salty / Oceanic, Spicy
description: A collaboration between Dmitry Bortnikoff and master perfumer Christian Carbonnel, Tiger Blue embodies contrast and conviction, blending freshness with intensity in a composition that feels both luminous and commanding. Inspired by the moment dawn rises over open water, it reflects the meeting of sea air, mineral salt, and early light in a burst of clarity.The opening strikes with grapefruit, lemon, and ginger, delivering a crisp surge of energy. Bright citrus meets vibrant spice, creating an immediate sense of movement and alertness. As the fragrance evolves, violet and magnolia introduce a soft floral glow, easing the initial sharpness. Amber and labdanum follow with a resinous warmth, adding depth and smoothness that anchor the composition. The dry down reveals ambergris, musk, vanilla, and benzoin, forming a lasting signature that feels refined and sensual without excess.Tiger Blue stands at the intersection of strength and elegance, offering a modern expression of confidence with enduring appeal.

name: Spanish Honey
style: Creamy, Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Citrus, Sweet, Woody Ambery Floral
description: A collaboration between Dmitry Bortnikoff and master perfumer, Christian Carbonnel, Spanish Honey evokes warmth and luminosity, celebrating the sunlit sweetness found in nature at its most radiant. Inspired by Mediterranean afternoons, it recalls air filled with amber light, blooming flowers, and a soft trace of honeyed warmth.The opening pairs bergamot with honey, creating a bright yet velvety introduction where freshness meets natural sweetness. This gentle contrast draws the fragrance smoothly into its heart. Jasmine, orris, and ylang ylang bloom at the center, offering floral richness and graceful depth. Benzoin and oud weave through the florals, adding resinous warmth and a subtle sense of sensuality that enhances the composition芒聙聶s character. As the fragrance settles, vanilla and amber bring a glowing softness, while musk and sandalwood contribute a creamy, enveloping finish.Spanish Honey leaves an impression of quiet opulence and natural sensuality, lingering like golden light remembered, smooth, warm, and timeless.

name: Enter The Void
notes: Skunk Note, Herbal Green, Cassis, Immortelle, Grapefruit, Lime Limelight, Hot Skin Note, White Aldehydes, Costus, Salicylates, Amber, Musk, Sandalwood
style: Animalic, Avant-Garde, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Amber
description: "A transcendental and darkly erotic fragrance with a surprising herbal green aromatic top note. The fragrance sparks like the neon lights illuminating the alley ways of the Tokyo underworld. Think sexy, sensual, psychedelic and addictive." -Mark Buxton

name: I Am Love
notes: Italian Sweet Orange, Cedrat, Ginger, Blackcurrant, Turkish Damascena Rose, Blackcurrant Blossom, Incense, Musk, Labdanum, Patchouli, Ambroxan
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy
description: "A brief introduction to a stranger, an encounter that appears innocent enough, leads to an unforgettable moment of joy and profound connection. Yet it is a single bite, infused with refreshing Mediterranean citrus notes of sweet orange, vibrant ginger, and cedrat, that shatters the perfectly controlled, glassy, translucent glaze. Marble and glass are growing old. A rejuvenated joie de vivre blooms in a Milanese spring, reaching its peak in a forbidden love on a burning day, high in the hills, amid cutaway shots of nodding grass and greedy bees clambering over flowers." -Mark Buxton

name: Tonka Rouge
notes: Cherry Liqueur, Tonka Bean, Raspberry, Licorice, Vanilla, Brandy, Sandalwood
style: Boozy, Fruity, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet
description: Tonka Rouge is a fragrance that embodies mystery and sensuality, perfect for those who wish to express their personality through a perfume that tells stories of elegance and passion. A vibrant opening features an intoxicatingly liquor-infused cherry, mouthwatering and buzzy, which immediately captures the attention. In the heart, tonka bean brings its gently gourmand sensuality combined with the bright, fruity freshness of raspberry, to which is added the spicy character of licorice. A bold and mysterious contrast evolves in the base with enveloping notes of vanilla and sandalwood, enriched by the precious and refined touch of aged brandy, ensuring that the indulgently boozy, fruit-forward character of the scent lasts from beginning to end. Rich and refined, yet playfully sexy, Tonka Rouge hums with purejoie de vivre.

name: Soap Bubble
notes: Peach Blossom, Magnolia, Orris, Passionfruit, White Flowers, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Vanilla, Peony, White Musk
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Fresh, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Fresh
description: Ephemeral yet unforgettable, Soap Bubble is a cosmically fresh floral with a sophisticated yet truly refreshing presence. Inspired by the Soap Bubble Nebula, known for its spherical, iridescent appearance, the fragrance embodies an airy, almost transparent yet undeniably present scent that blends purity with playful elegance. Sparkling aldehydes meet creamy, fruity, and musky notes, creating a modern interpretation of freshness. A fragrance for those who love minimalism with character.

name: Eye of God
notes: Birch Tar, Oud, Styrax, Nutmeg, Cotton Candy, Buddha Wood, Amber, Vanilla, Labdanum
style: Avant-Garde, Creamy, Metallic, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Amber, Woody - Dark
description: Inspired by the majestic Helix Nebula, also known as the 芒聙聹Eye of God,芒聙聺 this fragrance captures the mystical balance between awe, warmth, and infinity. Radiant spice notes open the scent, followed by a complex heart of woods, oud, and sweet nuances. A metallic coolness adds an almost otherworldly aura to the composition. A fragrance for those who love presence with depth.

name: Eastern Veil
notes: Rose, Popcorn, Pink Pepper, Oakmoss, Iris, Sugar, Maple Syrup, Musk, Cedarwood, Amber
style: Avant-Garde, Earthy, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Woody - Fresh, Woody Ambery Floral
description: A warm veil. Inspired by the mysterious glow of the Eastern Veil Nebula, this fragrance captures the interplay of light, darkness, sweetness, and depth. Warm, salty-gourmand accents meet subtle spices, while soft woody and iris notes give the scent a weightless structure. Like the nebula itself, Eastern Veil is both fleeting and enduring, a play of shimmering facets that continuously reveal new dimensions. A fragrance for those who love elegance with character.

name: In Dreams and Fairy Tales (Blueberry)
notes: Chamomile, Baked Meringue, Sugar, Vanilla Bean Absolute, Blueberry
style: Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Based on the scent of French meringue served at a Parisian salon de th脙漏, In Dreams and Fairy Tales (Blueberry edition) is an airy, slightly toasted cloud of baked meringue, vanilla bean absolute, and powdered sugar with a sprinkle of chamomile. This is a perfect, fluffy, all-seasons vanilla that feels like stepping into a fairy tale. And because half of the fun of eating meringues is trying all of the flavors, this version is paired with the sweet, gently tart, mouthwatering juiciness of fresh blueberries. What's not to love?

name: Ha Long Bay
notes: Vietnamese Mango, Cardamom, Black Pepper, Leather, Cypriol, Cedarwood, Amber Woods, Patchouli, Orcanox
style: Exotic, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Spicy, Tropical / Beachy, Woody - Amber
description: An homage to Vietnam, a country close to the heart of Jovoy artistic director Fran脙搂ois H脙漏nin, Ha Long Bay represents a new height of refinement for Jovoy, with a stunning new bottle design to match. No mere olfactory postcard, this is a sensory evocation, a distillation of H脙漏nin's memories and rare raw materials, delivering a powerful and captivating fragrance that leaves a luminous trail. At the heart of the composition lies a unique note of sand mango(Xo脙聽i C脙隆t)- an emblematic fruit from the Hoa Loc province extracted using Jungle Essence technology by perfumer V脙漏ronique Nyberg of MANE. With facets of peach, banana, and apricot, this mango brings a generous fruitiness and sunlit tenderness. It is enhanced by vibrant spices, cardamom, and black pepper. Soft leather accents evoke the sails of junks in the bay. A deep patchouli provides the olfactory signature of  Jovoy, while a structured cedarwood grounds the composition in woody elegance.Ha Long Bay is a living and unexpected perfume. It evolves on the skin, revealing different facets depending on who wears it. It captivates without ever imposing, defines personalities, and leaves lasting impressions.

name: Saringkarn Saringkarn
notes: Cocoa Absolute, Damask Rose, Champaca, Trat Oud, Saffron, Tobacco Absolute, Jasmine Absolute, Leather, Amber, Plum, Rose De Mai
style: Animalic, Boozy, Floral, Floral - Fruity, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Dark
description: Saringkarn Saringkarn- a tribute to the traditional and ancient Thai form of literary composition returns in a new, more powerful incarnation. This updated version features a doubled concentration, enriched with extra doses of cocoa absolute and natural oud oil from Thailand, amplifying its depth and sensuality. Still poised between gourmand and floral, the scent unfolds with dark, intoxicating tones of oud, amber, leather, and tobacco, now rendered richer and more enveloping. Beeswax and dark chocolate lend an even more alluring sweetness to a bouquet of exquisite roses, while boozy prune deepens into a cognac-like opulence. A darker smoke note lingers beneath it all, preserving just the right measure of provocative danger. Like any true work of literary genius, its meaning, and its power, is yours to interpret.

name: Ummagumma Extra
notes: Saffron, Black Pepper, Honey, Dark Chocolate, Incense, Tobacco, Cedar, Sandalwood, Tonka Bean, Leather, Vanilla
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy, Sweet, Warm, Woody - Spicy
description: Building on what made the original a cult favorite, Ummagumma Extra keeps the same soul but amplifies everything around it: projection, intensity, and the slow, unfurling smoky-gourmand character.On one of those endlessly rainy San Francisco nights, perfumer Bruno Fazzolari ducked into a small bar where a fire was burning quietly. The room was warm, wood-smoked, and faintly sweet. The kind of atmosphere that makes you realize that what you芒聙聶re craving isn芒聙聶t sunlight at all, but comfort, heat, and a touch of decadent escape. That moment became the inspiration for Ummagumma.Rather than leaning into dessert-like sweetness, Fazzolari set out to create a gourmand with gravity. The tension between dark chocolate, incense, and smoke shapes the fragrance芒聙聶s core: an interplay of warmth and shadow designed for adults who want depth, not syrup.Ummagumma Extra opens with a glow of saffron, black pepper, and a thin ribbon of honey, creating an immediate sense of warmth. The signature heart of dark chocolate and incense expands with richer texture than the original, moving between plush sweetness and dry, resinous smoke. As it settles, tobacco, sandalwood, cedar, leather, and tonka deepen the composition into something darker, longer-lasting, and quietly seductive, with a lingering, almost tactile trail.

name: Pumpkin Spice Latte
notes: Milk, Espresso, Pumpkin, Secret Spice Topping, Sugar, Whipped Cream, Cinnamon
style: Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Milky, Spicy, Sweet
description: Indulge in the most irresistible gourmand creation of the festive season. Crafted in exclusive collaboration with Luckyscent and the renowned King of Gourmands, Theodoros Kalotinis, Pumpkin Spice Latte is a warm, creamy, decadent celebration of comfort, pleasure, and pure olfactory delight.From the very first breath, a velvety swirl of milk and freshly pulled espresso rises like the steam of a handcrafted holiday latte. A luscious heart of a secret blend of pumpkin spice toppings, carefully perfected to achieve the ultimate balance of warmth and sweetness. As the fragrance settles, soft trails of sugar and airy whipped cream cocoon the skin, while a sensual dusting of rich cinnamon wraps everything in irresistible, festive opulence.Addictive and unapologetically delicious, Pumpkin Spice Latte transforms the iconic winter treat into a luxurious, long-lasting perfume with gourmet depth and savory sophistication.

name: Pecan Pie
notes: Crushed Pecans, Caramelized Sugar, Pecan Sponge Cake, Custard, Vanilla, Maple, Tonka Bean
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet
description: Pecan Pie is a delectable fragrance inspired by the comforting richness of a classic dessert. Layer after layer, it unfolds notes of roasted pecan, golden caramel, creamy custard, and sweet maple; creating a mouthwatering scent that feels both cozy and utterly irresistible.

name: Madagscar Le Baume Vanille
notes: Madagascar Vanilla, Rum, Cinnamon, Peppercorn, Clove, Cocoa Beans, Wood, Hay, Leather, Tobacco
style: Animalic, Boozy, Creamy, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: A balm for the heart, distilling the vegetal treasures of Madagascar, where Marc-Antoine Corticchiato spent countless stays between the bush and crops.A balm to drink, the olfactory imprint of the scent of blonde vanilla forever engraved in the perfumer芒聙聶s memory. That of a fabulous beverage composed by a young Madagascan woman, reinvented here as a generous sillage.A vanilla balm, the opulent flesh of a plump, fatty pod, split to release its fragrant black seeds, expressed in Madagascar through three natural extracts. Tincture, CO2 extract and vanilla absolute run through the composition. From top to base notes, these rich materials unfold balmy, animalic aromas that evoke the richness of the pod, enhanced by tones of wood, leather, hay and tobacco. To remain faithful to the original recipe of vanilla pods infused in aged rum, Marc-Antoine Corticchiato has drawn on the sumptuous palette of the island of Madagascar. Peppercorns, cloves, and cinnamon sticks combine with the almost animal depth of cocoa beans. Freshly grated coconut flesh, a flash of milky whiteness in this amber elixir, enhances its creamy texture. Particularly rich in balms, oils, and resins, the formula of Madagascar requires a level of craftsmanship that has all but disappeared today. Profoundly rich and deeply sophisticated, Madagascar Le Baume Vanille is a must-try for vanilla lovers everywhere.

name: Auriga
notes: Bergamot, Labdanum, Saffron, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Vanilla, Amber
style: Creamy, Earthy, Spicy, Woody - Amber
description: Radiant and refreshing, Auriga captures the raw poetry of the natural elements芒聙聰earth, rain, sun, and wind芒聙聰in a luxurious yet deeply soothing composition. Bright bergamot shimmers like the first break of daylight, giving way to a heart of resinous labdanum and saffron that evokes sun-warmed stone and the soft, mineral scent of rain. As it settles, earthy patchouli and silky sandalwood anchor the fragrance with quiet strength, while a final drift of vanilla lends a warm, ambery glow. Sophisticated and elemental, Auriga is an olfactory journey shaped by nature and refined by Italian artistry.

name: Pan's Labyrinth
notes: Bergamot, Rose Otto, Powder Accord, Bitter Almond, White Ambergris, Lavender, Coumarin, Rose Abs, Ylang Ylang, Patchouli, Sri Lankan Sandalwood, Siberian Musk, Malaysian Oud, French Oakmoss, Pine Tree Moss, Fir, Labdanum, Bakhoor Tincture
style: Floral, Fougere, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Amber
description: At its core, Pan芒聙聶s Labyrinth is a modern foug脙篓re, reinterpreted with warmth and depth. It holds the structure of the classic foug脙篓re, that interplay of lavender, moss, and coumarin, but reimagined through a sexier, powdery lens. The fragrance moves differently than traditional structures; instead of crisp freshness, it opens with an enveloping sweetness.The top of Pan芒聙聶s Labyrinth opens with bergamot, rose otto, bitter almond, and a touch of white ambergris. The bergamot gives an effervescent brightness, while the rose otto blends into the almond芒聙聶s faint sweetness, creating a powdery lift right from the start. The powder accord sits beside them as a main player, ensuring that even the brightness of the opening has softness built into it. The ambergris adds diffusion, letting the top spread evenly before it settles.As it moves into the heart, the foug脙篓re character comes alive. Lavender essential oil provides that traditional backbone. Coumarin gives it the recognizable foug脙篓re rhythm, that hint of warmth and balance between sweet and dry, while rose absolute, ylang ylang, and patchouli form the core texture. The florals are used carefully; they don芒聙聶t dominate or make the scent lean floral. Instead, they sit beneath the lavender like layers of fabric, giving body and density to the middle phase. The patchouli gives just enough weight to hold the powder accord in place, so it doesn芒聙聶t fade too quickly.The base is where Pan芒聙聶s Labyrinth takes its full form. The blend of Sri Lankan sandalwood, Siberian musk, and Malaysian oud gives the scent its warmth and dimension. Each material was chosen for tone, sandalwood for creaminess, musk for texture, and oud for depth. French oakmoss and pine tree moss connect the structure to its classical roots, while fir, labdanum, and bakhoor tincture add a resinous, slightly incensey base. The bakhoor tincture, in particular, gives a faint incense-like warmth that on its own has many fougere notes intertwined to it, connecting the sweetness of the powder accord to the depth of the wood and moss.

name: Prince v2
notes: Lavender Maillette, Chlorodendron, Chinese Geranium, Japanese Yuzu, White Ambergris, Lavender Absolute, Turkish Rose, Jasmine Sambac, Osmanthus, Neroli, Jade Wood, Papuan Tigerwood Oud, Merauke Oud, Mongolian Musk, Patchouli, Red Meat Sandalwood, Vanilla, Fir Needle, Cedarmoss
style: Earthy, Floral, Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Spicy, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Dark
description: Introducing Prince, a fragrance crafted as a tribute to an icon. Just as the artist Prince transcended genres and eras with his music, this fragrance transcends simple aromatic profiles to deliver a deeply resonant and luxuriously rich experience. With a focus on the opulent scents of Lavender and Oud, Prince is a bold statement in the world of perfumery, offering a blend that is both innovative and timeless.Prince opens with a harmonious blend of Lavender Maillette, a variety of lavender celebrated for its sweet, floral, and slightly herbaceous aroma. This particular lavender sets the stage with its calming and distinctively clean profile. Complementing this is the vibrant zest of Japanese Yuzu, which adds a burst of citrus brightness, cutting through the tranquility with its sharp, tangy edge. Chlorodendron introduces a subtle, fruity berry freshness to the mix, while Chinese Geranium offers a crisp, rosy touch that enhances the floral spectrum. White Ambergris rounds out the top notes with its warm, marine sophistication, lending a refined complexity that heightens the initial olfactory encounter.As the composition unfolds, Lavender Absolute, a more intense and concentrated form of lavender, anchors the heart, deepening the initial lavender theme with its rich, velvety essence. This heart is further adorned with Turkish Rose and Jasmine Sambac, each adding their own lush, intoxicating floral notes. Osmanthus introduces a soft, apricot-like sweetness, adding a layer of fruity, creamy texture to the bouquet. Neroli offers a slight bitter-citrus counterpoint that invigorates the senses, while Jade Wood injects a subtle, smooth woody note that bridges the transition to the base.The base of Prince is where the majesty of Oud takes center stage, with both Cambodi Oud and, new for version v2, Papuan Tigerwood Oud, which has a sharper and more resinous quality as compared to the Malaysian Oud in v1. These Oud varieties are known for their warm, woody, and resinous qualities, and the Papuan Tigerwood adds a darker, deeper element. Patchouli deepens this complexity with its rich, musky-earthy aroma, complementing the woody notes perfectly. Red Meat Sandalwood provides a creamy, rich backdrop that enhances the overall smoothness of the base. Vanilla adds a touch of sweetness, cutting through the denseness with its inviting warmth, while Fir Needle and Cedarmoss introduce a resinous, forest-like freshness that completes the scent with a bright, clean finish.Every bottle of Prince contains an exceptionally large quantity of Oud, making each spray a lavish indulgence. This abundance ensures that the Oud芒聙聶s profound presence permeates throughout the fragrance, maintaining its luxurious, powerful essence from the first spritz to the final lingering note.

name: 10 Piece Discovery Kit
description: Explore the lusciously rich, boldly exotic world of Lorenzo Pazzaglia with this fabulous 10-piece discovery set, collecting 10 of this chef-turned-perfumer's most beloved and striking gourmand-inspired fragrances in generous 2ml atomizer samples and housed in a presentation-worthy gift box.This set contains the following fragrances:Coffeee Passion, Speachless, Extreme Passion, Pink Milk, Black Sea, Van Py Rhum, Dark Florum, Evil Angel, Sun-gria,andSummer Hammer.

name: Pink Milk
notes: Pink Grapefruit, Lemon, Sweet Orange, Bergamot, Pink Pepper, Cinnamon, Rose Of Pakistan, Damask Rose, Bulgarian Rose, Peony, Heliotrope, Cookie Accord, Sweet Almond, Lychee, Raspberry, Coconut, Fior Di Latte, Vanilla Berries, Cane Sugar, White Musk, Tonka Bean, Vetiver, Sandalwood
style: Creamy, Floral - Ambery Spice, Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: What is the scent of the stars? An enchanted evening, the sky is a deep blue color and the stars sparkle like diamonds. The air is pervaded by an aroma that combines the freshness of citrus with the velvety scent of rose petals, soaked in milk and made even more enveloping by the sweetness of a cookie accord and the creaminess of coconut. Pink Milk is a galaxy of bright olfactory notes, a new star, which leaves its wake and is impossible to resist, an invitation to dream, and to always look up.

name: Rose Blaze
notes: Bergamot, Peach, Pink Pepper, Rose Absolute, Damask Rose Essential Oil, Iris Butter, Sandalwood, Tonka Bean, Benzoin
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Queen of flowers and iconic olfactory symbol, the rose embodies both delicacy and strength. It has always inspired perfumers, who explore its infinite nuances, sometimes fresh and luminous, sometimes sensual and mysterious. Rose Blaze is an Extrait meant to be experienced like an incantation- a message that passion is never far, when fire burns beneath the flower. A burst of bergamot and peach fans the flames of temptation, while an opulent, insolent paid of exquisite roses (rose absolute and damask rose essential oil), edged with iris, unveils its voluptuously fatal petals beneath the swirls of burning sandalwood.On the skin, benzoin and vanilla settle in, velvety and intoxicating.Amber warms, whispering to instinctual desires, stoking a heart already racing with spice. Intensely carnal, with a deep, sophisticated longevity, Rose Blaze is designed to stir your heart... and to touch someone else's.

name: Jade Amour
notes: Yellow Mandarin Oil, Liane De Jade Accord, Bergamot Oil, Ylang-Ylang Comores Oil, Jasmine Egypt Absolute, Vanilla Madagascar Absolute, Vetiver Haiti Oil, Muscone Molecule, Sandalwood Album Australia Oil
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Jade Amour is a scent imagined for a flower that never had a fragrance. Inspired by the Liane de Jade, surreal in color, silent in scent, this perfume brings presence to absence. It reinvents the idea of florals through luminous citrus, smooth fruity curves, and a vivid green accord that glows like the vine itself.Creamy sandalwood and soft musks give it a skin-like intimacy, turning the impossible into something tender, sensual, and real.The scent opens with the sparkling light of Yellow Mandarin and Bergamot, bright and vivid like the first glimpse of the Jade Vine in bloom. At the heart, an abstract Liane de Jade accord wraps around solar Ylang-Ylang and radiant Jasmine Absolute, creating a floral note both familiar and fantastical. As it unfolds, a base of creamy Vanilla, Haitian Vetiver, and Australian Sandalwood grounds the composition, while a whisper of Muscone lingers like a second skin 芒聙聯 intimate, fluid, and entirely new.

name: Un Air d'Apogee Extrait
notes: Anise, Sage, Honey, Mimosa, Iris, Rose, Cedar, Raspberry, Balkan Tobacco, Leather, Cistus, Ambrox
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Smoky, Sweet
description: A rich, dark, sultry evolution of the incandescently gorgeous original, Un Air d芒聙聶Apog脙漏e Extrait adds stunning power and rich leather depth to the elegant raspberry, mimosa and tobacco composition. Concentrated at a luxurious 30%, this deeper and more textured interpretation cuts through the dusk, illuminating the night with vibrant, romantic sensuality. Embrace the evening with Un Air d芒聙聶Apog脙漏e- the scent of pure, romantic freedom.

name: Deixis
notes: Labdanum, Vanilla, Sandalwood, Styrax, Frankincense
style: Creamy, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet, Warm, Woody - Amber
description: Comforting and grounded, Deixis is a wistful amber built for presence, for moments when the world is quiet, and feeling comes first- a cocoon of sweet-dark aura featuring a radiant labdanum, one of perfumery's oldest materials, supported with transparent vanilla and a whisper of gourmand sweetness. As it settles, sandalwood and frankincense bring a calm warmth that's smooth and enveloping.

name: Oh My Chai
notes: Cinnamon, Cardamom, Chai Tea, Milk, Fir, Vanilla, Amber, Musk
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Milky, Smoky, Sweet, Woody - Amber
description: Spicy. Cha脙炉. Milky. Cinnamon. Smoky.Fir tree. Creamy. Warm. Cardamom.Perfumer Margaux Le-Paih-Guerin reinvents the spirit of Christmas in this festive but chic spiced milky chai latte, cheerfully brightened with mandarin and a sparkle of cardamom. This creamy veil finds a perfect contrast with the resinous smoke of fir, which blends with the milky softness to create a fragrance that pulses between embers and velvet- a bold yet tender woody gourmand to savor throughout the holidays and beyond.

name: Vanille Havane Cuir des Abysses
notes: Russian Leather, Jasmine, Vanilla, Cocoa, Woods, Smoky Leather
style: Animalic, Boozy, Creamy, Earthy, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy, Sweet, Warm, Woody - Spicy
description: Russian Leather: a legendary tanning process born from centuries of secret craftsmanship, producing leather of unparalleled strength and luxury. After the Russian Revolution, the knowledge of this ancient art was thought lost forever- until the discovery of a shipwrecked cache of perfectly preserved hides from the 18th century helped dedicated artisans reconstruct the old techniques and begin producing this treasured leather yet again. And now, for the first time, those artisans agreed to collaborate with Les Indemodables, who have used groundbreaking ultrasonic technology to extract the true fragrance essence of Russian Leather: woody tones of cork shavings, animalic notes of rawhide, smoky whispers of birch tar. Spicy warmth wrapping around the senses. Multi-faceted, unpredictable, alive, it stands apart from every synthetic leather ever used. To frame such an ingredient required a stage of equal power. That stage was Vanille Havane, a perfume of rich dualities: the gourmand roundness of vanilla, the warmth of Havana tobacco, the spice of rum-soaked fruits.But to embrace Russian Leather, the fragrance had to be rebalanced. Master perfumer Antoine Lie took on this challenge. He softened the sweetness, gave space to smoke, woods, and animalic facets. The result: a new identity where velvet and rawhide coexist. Not simply a perfume, but a tension: a duality where velvet and rawhide coexist in a singular, powerful harmony.

name: Cayman Bleu
notes: Cardamom, Nutmeg, Mandarin, Frankincense, Cistus, Myrrh Essence, Amber, Opoponax Resinoid, Myrrh Resinoid, Styrax, Benzoin
style: Fresh, Fresh - Citrus, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy
description: Inspired by the serene beauty and rich heritage of the Cayman Islands, Cayman Bleu is the most exclusive limited edition yet from Fragrance du Bois- a true collector's piece crafted from the very finest materials and available one time only from a select group of independent retailers. This exquisite marine scent opens with a refreshing burst of mandarin, cardamom, and nutmeg, evoking the islands' vibrant landscapes. As it unfolds, the heart reveals luxurious notes of frankincense, myrrh, cistus, and amber, capturing the essence of the Caymans' hidden depths. Finally, opoponax, myrrh resinoid, styrax, and benzoin provide a warm, velvety glow- the perfect Caribbean sunset.

name: Nota Lucky
notes: Coconut Milk, Passion Fruit, Bergamot, Incense, Tuberose, Ylang-Ylang, Ambrette Seed, Oud, Musk, Saffron
style: Fresh - Clean, Fruity, Unusual / Unexpected
description: This fragrance was born from a deep desire to explore an exotic flower芒聙聰both radiant and mesmerizing. To infuse it with even greater exoticism and a vibrant energy, the perfume opens around passion fruit and coconut milk. At its heart, a luminous accord芒聙聯 sensual tuberose intertwines with ambrette seed, carnal yet delicate.Finally, to awaken the entire composition and give depth to these flowers and fruits, a touch of saffron, a precious spice that enhances and elevates the creation.

name: Naked Forest
notes: Salt Accord, Orris Concrete, Green Accord, Australian Sandalwood, Mysore Sandalwood, Vetiver, Frankincense, Nagarmotha, Indian Gooseberry, Ceylon Tea, Ambergris, Oud, Galbanum, Magnolia, Mango, Mountain Air
style: Exotic, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Salty / Oceanic, Woody - Spicy
description: Naked Forest is a unique magical concoction that transports you deep into an untouched wilderness, capturing the essence of nature芒聙聶s raw beauty. Its intricate blend of notes weaves a story of haunting allure, vegetal richness, and salty mystery, embodying the soul of a pristine forest.The initial encounter with Naked Forest is like stepping into a vibrant green landscape at dawn. The Green Accord brings to mind fresh, dewy leaves and crisp forest air. The Salt Accord introduces a bracing, mineral quality, evoking a cool, mist-laden breeze. Enhanced by Mountain Air, this creates an invigorating and uplifting introduction.As the fragrance settles, the heart notes unfold with complex and enchanting blends. Orris Concrete and Magnolia add a soft, floral elegance. Indian Gooseberry and Mango introduce a unique, exotic twist, reminiscent of hidden forest fruits. Ceylon Tea offers a delicate, aromatic spiciness. Frankincense and Nagarmotha add a hazy earthy dimension, deepening the fragrance芒聙聶s mysterious allure.The base reveals the true depth of Naked Forest. Sandalwood and Vetiver create a smooth, woody foundation. Oud adds a dark, resinous quality, enhancing the scent芒聙聶s complexity. Ambergris imparts a subtle marine touch, echoing the top notes芒聙聶 saltiness with sensual warmth. Galbanum adds a green, resinous sharpness, balancing the composition. The dry down is haunting yet comforting, leaving a lasting impression of the forest's timeless essence.

name: Nocturnal Immortal
notes: Bitter Orange Oil, Rosemary, Mandarin Oil, Juniper Berry Oil, Immortelle Absolute, Fir Balsam Absolute, Lavandin Grosso, Rose, Cistus Labdanum, Haitian Vetiver Oil, Hay Absolute
style: Earthy, Floral - Citrus, Floral - Spicy, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy
description: Nocturnal Immortal is not just a fragrance; it is an exquisite ode to contrasts, a harmonious interplay of light and shadow, brightness and depth. It opens with a luminous prelude芒聙聰an invigorating blend of orange bitter oil and mandarin oil, their zest enhanced by the herbal sophistication of rosemary. This sparkling introduction is an invitation, a fleeting moment of vibrancy that draws you into a deeper, more profound experience.At its heart lies the true essence of Nocturnal Immortal. Juniper berry oil weaves a green, resinous intrigue, while the golden richness of immortelle absolute commands attention with its honeyed warmth and everlasting allure. Fir balsam absolute adds a touch of smoky, balsamic depth, while lavandin grosso lends its aromatic clarity, ensuring a perfectly balanced midsection. This heart beats with timeless sophistication, a melody that resonates with those who appreciate complexity and nuance in a fragrance.As the fragrance reaches its crescendo, the base unveils itself with mesmerizing intensity. The opulent oud forms the cornerstone of this creation, exuding its signature resinous depth. Haitian vetiver oil contributes an earthy smokiness, grounding the composition with a natural elegance. Cistus labdanum amplifies the balsamic richness, while hay absolute lends an unexpected, slightly sweet herbaceousness. Together, these elements create a velvety, textured dry-down that wraps the wearer in an aura of mystique and timeless beauty.Nocturnal Immortal is a fragrance of dualities, light and dark, vibrancy and warmth, energy and calm. It evolves gracefully on the skin, revealing layer after layer of its intricate design. It is a nocturnal serenade, a reflection of timeless artistry that resonates long after the first encounter. This creation stands as a testament to the craftsmanship of Azman House of Perfume, a fragrance that lingers not only on the skin but in the memory.

name: Crown of Fire
notes: Bay Leaf, Chili Pepper, Pink Pepper, Peat, Osmanthus, Marigold, Carnation, Violet, Orris Root, Tobacco, Cambodian Koh Kong Oud, Incense, Mysore Sandalwood, Civet, Castoreum
style: Animalic, Floral - Ambery Spice, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Dark, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Crown of Fire opens with the feeling of a soul standing at the edge of something forbidden. There is a quiet tension in the air, the sense of a choice about to be made. This is a fragrance for those who step forward when others hesitate, for the ones who are unafraid to bargain with the unknown and claim what waits beyond the threshold.Only then does the scent reveal its first spark. Bay leaf stirs with a dry, herbal lift. Pink and chili pepper warm the pulse with a subtle blaze. Peat rises like smoke from a place half remembered and half imagined. The beginning feels alive, deliberate, almost ceremonial. The heart follows with a slow, entrancing glow. Osmanthus offers a dark apricot warmth. Marigold burns softly beneath it. Carnation and violet add a vintage floral flame, while orris brings a muted shadow that softens every angle. Tobacco drifts through the composition like a secret carried in velvet smoke. This is the moment where the fragrance binds itself to the wearer. A quiet pact sealed without words. The base settles with the gravity of something ancient. Oud from Koh Kong anchors the structure with deep authority. Incense rises in meditative swirls. Mysore sandalwood adds a warm, spiritual calm. Civet and castoreum breathe an animalic heartbeat that suggests instinct sharpened by intention.The result is a scent that feels both regal and untamed. It does not accompany the cautious. It crowns the daring. It chooses those who understand that transcendence is never granted. It is taken. Crown of Fire burns for the ones who cross their own boundaries.

name: Vaquera Classique Perdu
notes: Lavandin, Tomato Leaf, Permanent Marker Accord, Blackcurrant Berries, Clary Sage, Iris, Solar Rose, Styrax Resin, Sandalwood, Evernyl Notes, Suede Accord
style: Floral, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy
description: Produced in collaboration with NYC fashion sensation Vaquera, Classique Perdu is a new scent that feels like a perfume you once knew, then forgot, and have just stumbled upon in the back of a clearance shelf. Inspired by the scent of perfume ads in 90s fashion magazines, the scent of freshly dried hair after a shower, the scent of your childhood car芒聙聶s air conditioning, and the metallic sparkle of a summer fountain芒聙聰woven with mystery, nostalgia芒聙聰Classique Perdu invites you to rediscover a fragrance that feels both familiar and forgotten, an iconic scent lost and found again.

name: Collection Modepaleis Discovery Set
description: This Discovery Set brings together in one refined coffret the whole Dries Van Noten Eaux de Parfum. Named after the historical Antwerp boutique and an iconic symbol of Dries Van Noten, Collection Modepaleis invites you to embark on the Dries Van Noten impossible combination journey. Ideal for gifting or travel, each coffret includes an assortment of beautiful 2ml fragrance vials that echo the design of the full-size脗聽fragrances.Collection Modepaleis includes:Jardin de l'Orangerie - Orange Blossom & SantalNeon Garden - Mint & IrisRosa Carnivora - Rose & VetiverRaving Rose - Pepper & RoseCannabis Patchouli - Cannabis & PatchouliSantal Greenery - Fig & SantalVoodoo Chile - Rosemary & PatchouliRock the Myrrh - Myrrh & Smoked WoodFleur du Mal - Osmanthus & SuedeSoie Malaquais - Chestnut & Silk

name: Crazy Basil
notes: Basil Absolute, Bergamot, Mandarin, Geranium, Lavandin, Rosemary, Cedarwood, Musks, Hinoki Wood Accord
style: Floral - Citrus, Fresh, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: An intensely green fragrance where basil is given centre stage. Crazy Basil is an overdose of freshness, as the use of absolu results in an aromatic generosity that wraps around a hot core of cedarwood. Like a vibrant expression of a herb garden amplified by amber richness and resinous accents, it brings new dynamism to this sun-drenched plant.With chromatic intensity and affirming the master of colour that is true to Dries Van Noten, the bottle boasts a minimalist duet of green; clear and cool, warm and saturated. 90% naturally-derived ingredients

name: Raving Rose
notes: Pink Pepper, Black Pepper, Rose Water, Rose Absolute, Cashmeran, Musk
style: Floral, Floral - Spicy, Powdery / Soft, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: In Dries Van Noten芒聙聶s garden, not all roses are what they seem. This one is bold, modern, explosive. Raving Rose defies expectations, transforming the classic bloom into something thrillingly modern. A lush, opulent rose is electrified by the intensity of pepper that exudes a fresh yet fiery sensation - sensual yet unexpected.The bottle is a study in contrast with a vivid bubble gum pink cap set against a striking metallic red base that offers a modernist composition both sleek and captivating. 90% naturally-derived ingredients.

name: Neon Garden
notes: Mint Essence Duo (spearmint & Peppermint), Carrot Heart, Iris Accord, Musk, Ambroxan
style: Floral, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft
description: 芒聙聹I wanted to express unconventional classicism through using orris, from iris root, which is so elegant and haute couture. But I wanted to shake it, to heckle it, with the energy of mint.芒聙聺 - Fanny Bal.Elegant and joyful. A color block bottle featuring a neon green base with sky blue glass. 89% naturally-derived ingredients
