name: Jardin de l'Orangerie
notes: Neroli Buds, Jasmine, Ylang Ylang, Orange Blossom Milk, Sandalwood
style: Floral, Floral - White, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: 芒聙聹A beautiful duality of nature-inspired orange blossom with the contrast of sweet, opulent, milky, mature orange blossom; this flower can express so many different faces.芒聙聺 - Daniela Andrier.Solar and sensual. The bottle brings together a bright yellow glass with a fragile rose base. 90% naturally derived ingredients.

name: Camomille Satin
notes: Chamomile, Petit Grain Bigarade, Lavender Absolute, Orange Flower Absolute, Turkish Rose Absolute, Vanilla Bean, Musk, Galbanum
style: Creamy, Floral, Floral - Citrus, Floral - White, Powdery / Soft
description: Camomille Satin reimagines the wildflower芒聙聶s soft innocence by dousing it with the gourmand and leathery facets of vanilla. The bucolic day flower shifts to night mode. Like the fluid drape of precious satin, a tactile charm surfaces as an aromatic, amber juice that is at once softly decadent and sophisticated. An enveloping evocation of savoir-faire.The bottle brings together powder pink glass and brushed metal covered in a gold brocade-inspired pattern. 87% naturally-derived ingredients.

name: Bitter Splash
notes: Grapefruit, Cypress, Orris Accord, Carrot Seed Accord, Geranium, Leather Accord, Vetiver, Cedarwood
style: Floral, Fresh - Citrus, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Spicy
description: An invitation to escape, Bitter Splash charts a journey of exotic exploration. Cool, juicy pomelo and warm vegetal leather emerge as a sophisticated duality of freshness and sensuality. A sumptuous voyage into Dries Van Noten芒聙聶s love for traditional arts, where additional notes of powdery iris and vetiver enhance this chic evocation of texture and light.The bottle marries the simplicity of glossy pop yellow glass with a decorative pattern inspired by the detailed art of Asian lacquer woodwork, suggesting a contrast between tradition and modernity. 90% naturally-derived ingredients

name: Fleur du Mal
notes: Peach Juice, Osmanthus, Jasmine, Suede, Amber
style: Floral - Fruity, Floral - White, Fruity, Resinous / Balsamic
description: 芒聙聹I wanted to create a perfume of contrast using osmanthus which has a duality and unexpected quality. It appears innocent but it can be very sensual, almost animalic; this flower, that seems to be an angel, can turn devilish.芒聙聺 芒聙聰 Quentin Bisch, PerfumerModern and carnal. The bottle marries a tortoiseshell-inspired base holding a violet glass bottle.

name: Voodoo Chile
notes: Cannabis Accord, Rosemary, Lentisque, Patchouli, Cedarwood, Sandalwood Essence
style: Earthy, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Spicy
description: 芒聙聹I was inspired by the iconic Jimi Hendrix track. Rosemary and patchouli are the opposite forces in action here but the rosemary 芒聙聯 like Hendrix芒聙聶s guitar - is distorted to make it hot and dense.芒聙聺 - Nicolas Beaulieu.Bold and ambiguous. A midnight blue glass bottle with a metal base engraved with leaves. 87% naturally-derived ingredients

name: Santal Greenery
notes: Bergamot, Grapefruit, Violet Leaves, Creamy Fig Accord, Sandalwood, White Musk
style: Creamy, Floral, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: 芒聙聹The union of two opposites, yet perfectly and poetically balanced: resilient sandalwood with the lively, green leaf of fig- the everlasting and the ephemeral together.芒聙聺 - Nisrine Grilli脙漏.Addictive and elegant. A delicate white opaque glass bottle with a green base, decorated with shadows of nature. 90% naturally-derived ingredients.

name: Cannabis Patchouli
notes: Bergamot, Cedar Leaves, Sage Incense, Patchouli, Vetiver, Musk
style: Earthy, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: 芒聙聹In Dries world, antagonistic elements are combined to create surprise. This fragrance is like a light and dark olfactive pattern of fresh green leaves of clary sage aromatics rubbing against the woody leaves of patchouli.芒聙聺 - Nicolas Bonneville.Wild and sensitive. A unique crafted bottle made from certified PEFC脗庐 wood and forest green glass. 91% naturally-derived ingredients.

name: Havana Gold
notes: Mandarin, Liquorice Accord, Star Anise, Cinnamon, Tobacco Leaves, Benzoin, Roasted Tonka, Leather Accord, Cypriol
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy, Sweet
description: Havana Gold. A tribute to artisanal craftsmanship. The magic of metal: raw, imperfect, and compelling. In this intriguing fragrance, two olfactive worlds collide: the sweet, comforting notes of liquorice meet with the deep, smoky tendrils of tobacco curling in the air. The warm scent contrasts the cold, sculptural bottle, the first in the collection to use brass. An unexpected alchemy.Amber-tinted glass merges with an aged metal base, finely crafted with a patina that adds a nuanced and unique beauty. 90% naturally-derived ingredients

name: Vanille Camouflage
notes: Galbanum, Cypress, Fig Accord, Lentisque Absolute, Ylang Ylang, Sandalwood, Vanilla Bourbon Absolute, Tahitian Vanilla, Benzoin, Ambery Woods
style: Creamy, Floral, Green / Herbaceous, Sweet, Woody - Amber
description: The artful illusion of a green vanilla, Vanille Camouflage creates the sensation of softness on the skin. The green, resinous facets of galbanum transform a duo vanilla 芒聙聯 the liquor notes of bourbon vanilla and the creamy, almond aspect of the Tahitensis 芒聙聯 sublimating its complexity and richness. A unique and subtle layering that turns more and more intense.A dual expression of fashion and art, the bottle fuses deep green glass and precious porcelain patterned with poetic, watercolour-style flowers as though lifted from a painting. 90% naturally-derived ingredients.

name: Soie Malaquais
notes: Bergamot, Blackcurrant, Rose, Silk, Chestnut, Cocoa
style: Classic Feminine, Floral, Floral - Ambery Spice, Powdery / Soft
description: 芒聙聹I fell in love with Dries芒聙聶 silk dresses in his Quai Malaquais boutique. The texture was so fluid it merged with the skin, which gave me the idea for a silky, enveloping perfume, a mix of chestnut with sensual vanilla.芒聙聺 - Marie Salamagne.Elaborate and seductive. A seductive and unique porcelain piece inspired by Delft blue combined with a dark burgundy glass. 88% naturally-derived ingredients.

name: Rosa Carnivora
notes: Pink Pepper, Rose, Vetiver, Floral Bouquet, Patchouli, Cistus
style: Earthy, Floral, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy
description: In Dries Van Noten芒聙聶s garden, the last petals of Autumn芒聙聶s Centifolia Rose unfold, revealing a beauty that is both raw and refined. Rosa Carnivora is a velvet rose crafted in chiaroscuro. A rose in its wild, beautifully imperfect nature, rooted in the noble earthy depth of vetiver.The bottle pairs powdery pink glass with an animal-print pattern on porcelain, creating a delicate contrast. 90% naturally-derived ingredients.

name: Rock The Myrrh
notes: Cypress, Pink Pepper, Myrrh, Patchouli, Suede, Benzoin
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy
description: 芒聙聹Inspired by the Parisian boutique, with its elegant and precious textures, and its eclectic and mystical atmosphere, an overdose of myrrh is joined by resins of benzoin and cistus dressed up with cypress and pink pepper.芒聙聺 - Am脙漏lie Jacquin.Mysterious and sophisticated. A crafted masterpiece made of French hand-painted porcelain combined with amber glass. 90% naturally-derived ingredients.

name: Discovery Set
description: Bold, stylish, evocative, and versatile, Tada Parfumeur makes fragrances that are comfortable for every occasion, yet stand out from the crowd. Discover the 10 unforgettable EDPs available at Luckyscent with this dynamic Discovery Set, featuring the following fragrances in 1.5ml atomizers:Black CavendishRadiant MemoriesGyokuroEmishiki Sensation BlueAkatsukiMoonlit LullabyLost in a Fluffy NestUnder the RainNocturnal NoirVelvet Sanctuary

name: Velvet Sanctuary
notes: Bergamot, Red Wine Accord, Grapefruit, Rhubarb, Bulgarian Rose, Geranium, Vetiver, Black Pepper, Benzoin
style: Floral, Floral - Citrus, Floral - Spicy, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy
description: Velvet Sanctuary reflects a woman who is mature, poised, and effortlessly classy.Every step she takes exudes grace, with an allure that is both captivating and mysterious. The fragrance combines the elegance of rose and the freshness of grapefruit, with the tartness of rhubarb adding a touch of sophistication and coolness to the scent.

name: Nocturnal Noir
notes: Patchouli, Saffron, Davana, Whiskey Accord, Smoke, Ambrette Seed, Nutmeg, Vanilla, Leather, Amber
style: Boozy, Earthy, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy
description: You find yourself lost in mysterious tales on late, quiet nights.The silence envelops you, transporting you into a world of suspense. As you breathe in, you catch the scent of Patchouli, softened by Amber and Vanilla. This fragrance wraps around you like a comforting blanket, mirroring your calm composure as you revel in the solitude. In this moment, you are the night owl, finding peace in the stillness of the dark.

name: Under The Rain
notes: Ginger, Ozone, Violet Leaf, Artemisia, Honeysuckle, Amber, Cedar, Nutmeg, Oakmoss
style: Floral - Light, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: The essence of finding calm after longing, of rain transforming to light as love returns. Ginger sparks across cool air, a rush of electricity in the quiet after a downpour. Damp leaves and violet unfurl beneath your feet, conjuring the first breath outdoors when the clouds have just passed. As you move, green shadows drift, artemisia and oakmoss threading through the air, crisp and alive, while a shimmer of honeysuckle gently rises, sweetness blooming where sunlight touches the wet ground. The earth deepens around you, nutmeg and cedarwood mingling with amber, grounding each moment in warmth and longing. Under The Rain evokes the hush that falls when distance and time drift away, where every note recalls holding a hand for the first time, the world paused and every detail burned bright with hope and memory.

name: Lost in a Fluffy Nest
notes: Grape, Bergamot, Cotton Candy, Geranium, Jasmine, Rose, Aldehyde, Lily Of The Valley, Musk, Ambrette Seed
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: When the world outside gets too loud, Fenni retreats into her fluffy little nest, a small, quiet space where nothing can hurt her. It is a world she芒聙聶s built from dreams and tenderness, softly sweet with the scent of cotton candy and rose, wrapped gently in the warm embrace of musk and ambrette seed. Like a quiet kind of care that asks for nothing, only stays beside you when you芒聙聶re not okay. Though a bandage hides her wounds, Fenni still believes that fragility isn芒聙聶t a weakness, but simply another shape that beauty can take. And if you happen to wander into her nest, this scent is Fenni芒聙聶s little gift to you, a gentle reminder that it芒聙聶s perfectly okay to feel vulnerable sometimes.

name: Moonlit Lullaby
notes: Chamomile, Yuzu, Apple, Lime, Green Notes, Sugar, Lavender, Grapefruit Peel, Heliotrope, Vodka Accord, Honey
style: Floral - Citrus, Floral - Light, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Sweet
description: You find yourself in the hush between thoughts, where the world softens and the edges of day dissolve. Chamomile and yuzu greet you-gentle, green, quietly citrus-while apple and lime linger, not with a flourish, but with a whisper that draws you inward. Lavender and a trace of sugar cradle your senses, soothing as a lullaby spun in the half-light. As time slips by, heliotrope, honey, and a subtle vodka accord settle around you, delicate as moonbeams on bare skin. Here, you linger, unhurried, wrapped in the rare calm that arrives just before dreams take hold.

name: Akatsuki
notes: Bamboo, Aquatic Notes, Grapefruit, Melon, Tomato Leaf, Galbanum, Iris, Jasmine, Lotus, Green Tea, Hydrangea
style: Floral - Light, Fresh, Fresh - Aquatic, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: You step into the bamboo forest at dawn. The crisp morning air fills your lungs as you breathe deeply. All around you, slender green stalks sway gently, their leaves rustling softly. The scent is unmistakable - fresh, green, and invigorating. It芒聙聶s as if the very essence of the bamboo has been captured, surrounding you with its natural vitality. Akatsuki transports you to that serene moment, awakening your senses with the pure, revitalizing spirit of the bamboo grove.

name: Emishiki Sensation Blue
notes: Sake Accord, Sweet Notes, Lychee, Geranium, Jasmine, Rose, Musk, Sandalwood, Caramel
style: Boozy, Floral - Light, Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: A chilled summer evening, paired with an icy sake. A burst of lychee sweetness fills the air, reminiscent of ice-cold sake sipped under starlight. As the fragrance settles, the unmistakable essence of pure sake emerges, creating a harmonious balance on the skin. This blue edition, inspired by Emishiki芒聙聶s sweet sake, evokes a sense of refreshing indulgence. Each breath brings to mind the crisp, cool sensation of premium sake, its sweetness lingering pleasantly in the senses, inviting another delightful inhale.

name: Gyokuro
notes: Matcha Accord, Green Notes, Saffron, Ambrette Seed, Mate Absolute, White Florals, Sandalwood, Cedar, Musk, Guaiac
style: Floral - Light, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Fresh
description: In the misty landscapes of Japan, a journey through its regions revealed the beauty of green tea in all its forms. From the rolling hills of Uji to the serene gardens of Kyoto, each cup told a story of tradition and craftsmanship. The delicate balance of green, slightly astringent notes, the warmth of roasted undertones, and the invigorating freshness all blended together to create an unforgettable experience. Gyokuro is a testament to that journey, capturing the essence of green tea in a scent that is both refreshing and timeless.

name: Vesuviuur
notes: Broom, Frangipani, Sweet Orange, Lemon, Ginger, Saffron, Cinnamon, Clove, Distilled Rhum, Almond, Pastry Cream, Shortbread, Butter, Chocolate, Date, Coconut, Vanilla, Caramel, Cane Sugar, Benzoin, Barrique, Patchouli, Oud
style: Boozy, Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Spicy
description: Vesuviuur is a declaration of love in Naples, a song celebrating its beauty, passion and indomitable spirit.The first accords light us up like golden rays on the Gulf, with the aroma and color of Vesuvius broom, fresh citrus dancing in the air, awakening our senses.Embracing nuances of Rhum, notes of shortbread and pastry cream combine in a sensory dance, telling of ancient recipes that have been handed down from generation to generation, with deep and decisive final nuances.A journey through time where every note is an emotion.An invitation to taste life with sweetness and intensity.

name: Coffee Passion
notes: Cinnamon, Coconut, Apricot, Hazelnuts, Dates, Coffee, Chocolate, Caramel, Coconut Milk, Tonka Bean, Heliotrope, Toasted Coffee, Cedarwood, Benzoin, Sugar, Vanilla, White Musk
style: Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet
description: Coffee: a symbol of tradition, sharing, the perfect excuse for a meeting, a talk, a comeback. It is a living part of our days, imprinted in our memories as a familiar gesture, a ritual that smells like home.And if the sense of smell is the key to memory, the aroma of coffee is undoubtedly one of its most powerful guardians.Coffeee Passion captures this essence and transforms it into an irresistible scent: intense notes of coffee blend with the sweetness of hazelnut, the softness of cream, the sensuality of caramel and the exotic touch of coconut milk.The result? A gourmand, enveloping, unmistakable fragrance. Designed for those who love to be distinctive, for those who live with intensity and leave behind a trail of pure passion.

name: Green Island
notes: Mandarin, Yuzu, Pink Grapefruit, Bergamot, Cedar Zest, Ginger, Juniper, Cinnamon, Cardamom, Wormwood, Pink Pepper, Prickly Pear, Lotus Blossom, Rose, Pittosporum, Caper Flower, Red Tea, Gin, Aquatic Accord, Myrtle, Peppermint, White Flowers, Maritime Pine, Patchouli, Vetiver, Cedarwood, Oakmoss, Tonka Bean, Ambergris
style: Floral - Light, Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Green Island is much more than a perfume.It is a memory stored in the soul, the sweet echo of a distant summer, the kind that remains forever imprinted on a child芒聙聶s heart.For Lorenzo Pazzaglia, Ischia was not just a destination: it was the place where time stood still, where every moment spent with his father became eternity. The laughs in the sunny alleys, the barefoot runs on the shore, the sea singing secrets just for them芒聙娄 they were simple moments, yet so full of love that they became sacred.Years later, it 芒聙聵s Marco, with his sincere love for that enchanted island, who rekindles that spark.Together, they decide to make that bond, that fragment of happiness, eternal, by enclosing it in a perfume: an olfactory symphony called Green Island.Just close your eyes 芒聙娄 and you are carried away through the sun-drenched streets of Ischia, with the wind that smells of salt and freedom, the sound of waves breaking gently on the rocks, ripe citrus fruits shining through the leaves, aromatic herbs that transport us to the majesty and beauty of its mountains.And then, at sunset, the scent of flowers blends with the warm air, like an embrace that tastes of nostalgia.But Green Island is, above all, a perfume that is not simply worn. It 芒聙聵s lived.It 芒聙聵s for those who have loved, for those who love, for those who preserve a memory like a secret jewel.For those who believe that true love does not fade, but remains floating in the air, like a promise whispered by the wind.

name: Etude in Black
notes: Strawberries, Hinoki, Rose Liqueur, Candlewax Musk, Rosewood
style: Boozy, Floral, Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Amber
description: The roses arrived at noon. I don芒聙聶t recall the impact, only the machinery of its reception. Chrome shears dulled by tap water, the too-tall vase, a note of brutalist prose. This is how it always starts. With a feeling, yes, but more so the things I decorate the feeling with in order to engage in the ceremony.This is not just a story I tell myself. It芒聙聶s simply an excavated surface I have to tend to. Pruning a bush with the focus of a surgeon, making the essential cuts that angle at growth. Hours arranging a room like a calculation of chance. This is not just a ritual!So I left the roses in the vase. I didn芒聙聶t trim the stems. I didn芒聙聶t change the water. I watched them mainline their own filth to a familiar, clouded end. How perverse, witnessing a thing so alive delight in its own consummation. Is letting them just be the most violent instruction? The now black petals, dutifully dropping onto the polished wood, are the only appropriate response.

name: Big Night
notes: Maraschino, Vetiver, Artemisia, Pineapple, Neroli, Bay Leaf, Musk
style: Exotic, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: May 30th 2024Dearest A,I am writing this from the kitchen table, the very table we芒聙聶ve spent many nights, dissecting everything over a bottle of wine. I see the alleyway outside, the same old mess of concrete and chaos you芒聙聶re used to. I芒聙聶ll cut to the chase.His name is M. Isn芒聙聶t that a strong name? It crosses my lips easily, and I like saying it. He speaks in facts but also in metaphors, and his hands are calm, elegant, strong. He should be a poet. His limbs mirror mine, and we laugh a lot.We met at the party. It was a flirtatious and long night. It was a genuine one. His flawless charm warned me, but quickly won me. He listened and asked. I found myself wanting to learn about anything he spoke of. I wanted him to think I was intelligent before he thought I was captivating. There's a difference!His theatre is one of assuredness. There is a soundtrack that comes with him. He comes to me exactly as I like, without having to be told. He speaks of the future in the conditional tense, a series of generous, realistic plans. A trip to Sicily. Moving to Montreal. Dinner on Thursday. It is the sheer plausibility of him that gets me. There is no fable to him, no twist I have to contort myself to fit. He is simply here. Like this table. Like the alleyway. His presence feels like a return to a room I had but didn芒聙聶t know. One that holds all things precious to me, canopied. It芒聙聶s less like coincidence and more like logic.Even the unknown feels different this time. It feels academic. One look at his calm, gentle face, his warm tones, the way he looks at me as if I could contain the entire understanding of time. I think I needed that reflection. I think perhaps this is a love affair of necessary drama, but also quiet natural formation. Erosion can be beautiful. Stillness has motion. Layer upon layer of ordinary, until it becomes something solid enough to build a life on.You might say I am doing it again, building a cathedral and sanctifying warmth because I am hungry. Listen, I am thinking it, too. But for now, the fact remains: there is M. And for the first time, that fact does not feel like the beginning of a familiar story. It feels like the end of one.I芒聙聶ll call you soon.All of my love,C

name: Phoenician Leather
notes: Incense, Labdanum, Dates, Honey, Vetiver, Sandalwood, Leather, Amber
style: Fruity, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Amber
description: As it often does, James Heeley芒聙聶s creative process began with one single ingredient - the rich, complex notes of labdanum concr脙篓te: smokey wood, amber, honey and dates take us back to Phoenicia (1200 BC). The Phoenicians were one of the first European civilizations to harvest dates, grapes and produce wine. They were also supreme navigators of the Levantine (eastern and southern Mediterranean). Highly skilled craftsmen and traders of precious metals, textiles, leather and exotic woods, they invented Tyrian purple 芒聙聯 a rare pigment made from crushed seashells, subsequently used to dye the cloaks of Emperors.

name: Delusions of Grandeur
notes: Apricot, Tobacco, Rum, Jasmine Sambac, Leather, Saffron, Amber, Sandalwood, Musk
style: Floral - Fruity, Floral - White, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet
description: The feeling of standing at the edge of something vast and dangerous, convinced the world is yours for the taking. Warm, heady, and a little delusional 芒聙聰 like falling in love with your own reflection at golden hour.  Delusions of Grandeur by L'Epoque Parfums is the perfect night out scent with main-character energy.

name: Dopamine Rose
notes: Raspberry Marshmallow, Strawberry, Rhubarb, Rose, Cyclamen Flowers, Ozonic Notes, Cashmere, Musk
style: Floral - Fruity, Fresh - Clean, Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: The first time someone sees you the way you see yourself- the opposite of imposter syndrome. An addictive rose blooming in fast-forward, spun out on sweetness and longing, trying to outrun the crash.  Dopamine Rose by L'Epoque Parfums is the ultimate rose scent that will always make you feel like the prettiest person in the room.

name: Choco Loco
notes: Cocoa Powder, Cocoa Butter, Cocoa Liqueur, Cacao Absolute, Condensed Milk, Caramel Fudge, Burnt Sugar, Ginger Liqueur, Whipped Cream, Cookie Dough, Vanilla Absolute, Brown Sugar, Marshmallow, Musk, Ambrette
style: Boozy, Creamy, Gourmand, Sweet
description: It芒聙聶s a hot chocolate gone rogue. Triple-dosed, over-whipped, under-disciplined. Call it comfort. Call it madness. Call it sweet, dirty joy in a bottle.A cocoa bomb detonates. Bitter dust of raw cacao, thick melt of cocoa butter, the boozy rush of cocoa liquor. Decadence hits fast. Then it swirls darker. Fudge dripping with caramel, sugar scorched to smoke, ginger liquor igniting the cream. Sticky, heavy, almost obscene. The sweetness is not polite. It melts, oozes, and stains. Cookie dough and marshmallow collapse into vanilla heat, leaving a trail of brown sugar sweat and ambrette musk.

name: Novae Vanilla
notes: Mineral Accord, Mimosa Absolute, Blue Vanilla NaturePrint, Bourbon Vanilla, Madagascar Vanilla, Amber Woods, Musk
style: Creamy, Floral - Ambery Spice, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Novae Vanilla is a brilliant, luminous vanilla fragrance that celebrates the harmony between darkness and light, vanilla and mimosa, matter and immatter. It is an ode to the divine, a hymn to life- a unique and enchanting vanilla with a mineral and stellar freshness, enveloped by a voluptuous vanilla pod. The golden glow of mimosa, known as golden flower, gives it a sunny and luminous sweetness. And a trio of rare vanillas: the elegant and airy NaturePrint脗庐 blue vanilla, the carnal intensity of Bourbon vanilla, and the woody and velvety facets of Madagascar vanilla. Indulgent yet chic, luxurious yet oh so wearable, Novae Vanilla is a study in contrasts where every note finds its place in the harmony of the golden ratio.

name: Discovery Set
description: Discover the dynamic new series of releases from South Korean sensation CONCRETED with this convenient trio of atomizer samples, perfect for exploring these uniquely creative and compellingly wearable unisex fragrances.The trio contains 2ml atomizers of the following scents:04. A Thousand Miles05. Dyed06. Sesame Shower

name: Scintilla
notes: Apple, Pineapple, Blackcurrant, Iso-e Super, Pear, Iris, Violet, Jasmine, Oakmoss, Amber, Pink Pepper, Patchouli
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Scintilla is energy that ignites. A youthful, sparkling, luminous fragrance. Bright, persistent, and fruity, it releases playful vitality, captivating without overwhelming. The opening bursts with apple, pineapple, blackcurrant, Iso E Super, pear, and Dihydromyrcenol, blending freshness, sweetness, and radiance. At its heart, iris, violet, and jasmine add elegance and roundness. The base of Iso E Super, amber, pink pepper, patchouli, and oakmoss builds a vibrant, enveloping trail, memorable yet never intrusive. Scintilla is the perfect fragrance for those who want to be felt, with freshness and effortless style.

name: Rosso Radice
notes: Bergamot, Pink Pepper, Clary Sage, Cashmeran, Vetiver, Ambroxan, Ambrettolide
style: Fougere, Fresh, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy
description: Rosso Radice smells of deep breaths and silent green. A novel combination of a revitalizing fougere and a balmy amber, it's like walking through a forest after the rain, breathing in the scent of moss, bark, and damp roots. A fragrance that restores balance, grounding, strengthening, regenerating. A unisex, long-lasting, balsamic perfume built with modern molecules. Its opening is green and aromatic, with bergamot, pink pepper, and clary sage, bringing vitality and energy. In its heart, cashmeran builds the warm, woody, and gently spicy foundation of the scent. The base unites vetiver, ambroxan, and ambrettolide, leaving an elegant, musky, and enduring trail that lingers on the skin. Fresh and wild, warm and comforting, it's a fragrance that compellingly and elegantly reflects the timeless rhythms of the natural world.

name: Sesame Shower
style: Creamy, Earthy, Floral, Gourmand, Sweet, Woody - Light, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Black sesame is known for adding a rich nuttiness to a variety of Korean desserts- black sesame lattes, ice cream, and rice cakes being among the favorites. Though small and unassuming seeds in appearance, their subtle flavor and earthy aroma blend beautifully with sweet dishes, creating a soft and comforting harmony. In Korean, there芒聙聶s a charming expression used to describe affectionate lovers: 芒聙聹sesame seeds pouring.芒聙聺 It is a metaphor for warmth, sweetness, and love, like the cozy feeling of having a sweet dessert generously topped with black sesame: toasty, sweet, and endearing.Sesame Shower is a fragrance that captures those everyday moments of love. Gentle and sweet, it pairs a richly nutty, subtly earthy black sesame accord with crumbly fresh-baked cookies, leading to a smooth and soft floral heart and a warm, glowing base of amber, sandalwood, and vanilla. A fragrance that radiates safety, comfort, and the innocent side of indulgence, Sesame Shower is a unique and evocative gourmand delight.

name: Dyed
notes: Inkstick, Lemon, Lime, Cypriol, Walnut, Eucalyptus, Pine, Jasmine, Rose, Cedarwood, Patchouli, Musk
style: Earthy, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Smoky, Unusual / Unexpected, Woody - Fresh
description: Ink seeps through the brush, slowly spreading across the hanji with an uncertain flow and direction. The paper, holding the ink, sways gently in the wind. What once soaked the surface now lifts with the breeze, subtly tinting the air with its scent. A deep aroma, like the lingering trace of charred wood, feels light and fresh when carried by the wind. Monotone. Black and white in stark contrast. Yet still, something blurred, something slowly bleeding at the edges. It moves with weight, while leaving behind the lightest, most unpredictable traces.Dyed is a tribute to the East Asian tradition of making inksticks for art and calligraphy from a blend of burned pine soot and natural binders, a process which infuses the finished product with a weighty, smoky aroma. The fragrance draws on this deep, charred woodsiness, contrasting it with the brightness of fresh citrus, a hint of savory walnut, and refreshing notes of fresh pine and clean, herbal eucalyptus. The result is a uniquely compelling and sparsely beautiful fragrance that balances darkness and light; the scent of ink on parchment, drying in the afternoon breeze.

name: A Thousand Miles
notes: Lemongrass, Bergamot, Orange, Lime, Winter Daphne, Metal Notes, Green Notes, Lavender, Peppermint, Jasmine, Rose, Vetiver, Musk, Amber
style: Avant-Garde, Floral - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Metallic, Spicy, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Inspired by a Winter Daphne encountered by the CONCRETED team inside a greenhouse during the heart of Seoul芒聙聶s winter, a flower that carried a cold, crisp fragrance that echoed the season itself. Far from the familiar floral softness, it felt more at home in a winter city than a blooming garden. There was a quiet sharpness to the scent, as if each note danced like silver on the wind. Clean, crisp, and quietly bold. Not soft, not sweet, but layered with vivid tones and a distinct, confident character. This is a fragrance that travels far, lingering not just on the skin, but in memory.Winter Daphne is a flower that blooms in the final days of winter. In Korean, it's called"cheon-li-hyang,"a fragrance so powerful it can travel one thousand miles, with a distinctive citrus and spice kick and a cool, crisp edge. A Thousand Miles reinterprets this rare and precious floral with a dynamic infusion of metallic notes, evoking a flower sculpted from steel. It opens with bright, spicy lemongrass and a layered bed of lavender, rose, and jasmine, all encased in the sharp and chillingly vivid metallic accord. Modern, crisp, and icily sexy, A Thousand Miles is bound to leave a powerful and lasting impression.

name: La Nuit Des 300
notes: Ambrette Musk, Artemisia, Bergamot, Ambrox Musk, Tonka Bean, Lavender, Muscenone, Patchouli, Sandalwood
style: Earthy, Floral, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Fresh
description: 芒聙聹Sensual night. Pleasure. Desire. I look at him, I feel him, he is mine.His body against mine, my skin against his.Under my hand I feel his warmth.Tomorrow, the combat. Tonight, his embrace.Together, death has no place.芒聙聺A subtle and incandescent fragrance, like quiet promise shared skin to skin. Built around a heart of vibrant and sensuous musks, it blends the creamy comfort of sandalwood and tonka bean with the aromatic depth of lavender and artemisia, as if warmed like ritual herbs in the hush of night. Its magnetic, carnal trail evokes the vow of a sacred night, when two bodies promise to become one.

name: Radiant Memories
notes: Apricot, Orange, Iris, Jasmine, Vanilla, Musk
style: Creamy, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: The scent of a cool evening breeze carrying a glimmer of light from a corner of Mount Fuji, captured in a kaleidoscopic sunset of fruits, florals, and gourmand amber notes. A fresh and juicy apricot note combines with a bright and fruity orange, representing the joy of a simple and well put-together life, smoothed with creamy jasmine and sweetened with praline and warm, musky vanilla. Together, they paint a portrait of a sunset, all dark orange and light blue, capturing the unforgettable ambiance of a perfect day where nature and the city blend together.

name: Black Cavendish
notes: Rum, Incense, Nutmeg, Caramel, Jasmine, Patchouli, Vanilla, Tobacco, Sandalwood, Cinnamon, Amber, Oakwood CO2
style: Boozy, Creamy, Earthy, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Amber, Woody - Spicy
description: Black Cavendish is the name of a tobacco leaf variety that's steam cure and then steeped in rum barrels, resulting in a scent that perfectly captures the essence of both the tobacco and the rum barrel. Notes of caramel, cinnamon, and vanilla rise gently, softened by jasmine and amber, while sandalwood and oak add quiet depth. Nutmeg and frankincense flicker through in smoky whispers. Wrapped in tonka and patchouli, it stays close to the skin芒聙聰rich, smooth, and enduring, like a story told in low light.

name: L'Extrait de Spoturno 1921
notes: Lemon, Damascus Rose, Bergamot, Mandarin, Orange Blossom, Lavender Flowers, Ambergris Accord, Ylang-ylang, Jasmine Grandiflorum, Sandalwood, Vetiver, Civet Accord, Musks, Tonka Bean, Myrrh, Vanilla
style: Classic Feminine, Floral, Floral - Ambery Spice, Resinous / Balsamic, Salty / Oceanic
description: A jewel-like fragrance that's as admired as it is felt, inspired by the formula books and olfactory creations of Fran脙搂ois Spoturno. The extract showcases floral and powdery notes.The fragrance opens with a myriad of notes: rose blossoms and lemon zest, bergamot, orange blossom and mandarin. Ambergris is joined by lavender flowers, ylang-ylang and jasmine. Rose blossoms, jasmine, orange blossom, lingering ambergris and sandalwood enter. Vetiver announces the immensely rich base notes : tonka bean, myrrh and vanilla. A journey through time and the opportunity to step into the mind of a perfume genius.

name: L'Eau de Spoturno 1921
notes: Lemon, Damascus Rose, Bergamot, Mandarin, Orange Blossom, Lavender Flowers, Ambergris, Ylang-ylang, Jasmine Grandiflorum, Sandalwood, Vetiver, Civet Accord, Musks, Tonka Bean, Myrrh, Vanilla
style: Classic Feminine, Floral, Floral - White, Woody - Amber
description: To commemorate the proud and venerable history of the Spoturno family and their legacy of perfumery, V脙漏ronique Spoturno and perfumer Christophe Sheldrake envisioned a retro-modern feminine, blending yesterday and today in a sumptuous floral bouquet. Rich, beautiful jasmine, lush rose, and creamy orange blossom are presented simply, set among some of the most precious raw materials in perfumery- bergamot, sandalwood, vetiver, tonka bean, and vanilla, each meant to coax every exquisite nuance from the florals for a fragrance that bridges past, present, and future.

name: L'Ame du Phenix
notes: Grapefruit, Lavender, Pink Berries, Ginger, Nutmeg, Cinnamon, Cedarwood, Patchouli, Amber, Labdanum, Leather Accord, Vanilla, Tobacco
style: Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Amber
description: A scent of immortality, symbolizing Spoturno's rebirth. The mythical "Firebird," featured on the Spoturno family coat of arms, sacrifices itself and rises from its ashes. A fragrance born from the idea of contemporary richness rising from the ashes of a legend. A flame that becomes an emotion to be shared, sensual and warm. A deliberately masculine aromatic woody note, on an ashy base. A truly virile note, intense and deep, where rich, dry woods create a certain elegance, combined with leathery and smoky notes, on a warm amber-spicy base of patchouli, cistus labdanum, ginger and cinnamon.

name: Barbicaja
notes: Florist Shop Accord, Freesia, Lily Of The Valley, Hyacinth, Orange Blossom, Tuberose, Jasmine Grandiflorum, Apricot, Cedarwood, Vetiver, Patchouli, Vanilla
style: Earthy, Floral, Floral - Light, Fruity, Woody - Fresh
description: The light and carefree atmosphere of the Belle 脙聣poque. The setting: the beautifully flowered garden of the Spoturno family home, pioneers of orange tree cultivation on their estate, overlooking Ajaccio Bay, lulled by the sea breeze. Barbicaja tells of the arrival of the fresh evening air. Marine, scented with orange blossom and crisp foliage, it evokes a kind of floral breeze, as fresh in my mind as the promise of an evening of happiness, friendship, relaxation, and seductio

name: Alphee
notes: Bergamot, Bitter Orange, Mandarin, Myrtle Leaves, Juniper Berries, Jasmine Grandiflorum, Neroli, Pink Berries, Coriander, Nutmeg, Vetiver, Ambrofix, Musks
style: Floral - White, Fresh - Clean, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Salty / Oceanic, Spicy
description: A tribute to Alph脙漏e Dubois, Grand Prix de Rome winner, spiritual father of Spoturno and grandfather of his wife Yvonne, this fragrance evokes the happy years expressed in the memory of a cruise along the rocky coasts of Corsica towards the archipelago of the Sanguinaires Islands. Alph脙漏e is a refreshing, mineral fragrance where citrus fruits are accompanied by myrtle leaves and juniper berries, energized by touches of pink pepper, coriander, and nutmeg. Orange blossom and jasmine add a sunny sensuality.

name: Discovery Set
description: Born in Italy, brought to life in NYC- Inverso Profumi pays tribute to the rich artistic achievements of photography and other modern visual art with their vibrant and dynamic collection of Extraits de Parfum featuring premium grade raw materials sourced from natural origins. Discover their unforgettable work with this specially curated sample set, containing deluxe 2ml atomizer samples of the favorite offerings from the line:Fig, Mink, F8, Private, Whanui,&Incantesimo.

name: Superfluo
notes: Apple, Candied Fruit, Rose, Jasmine, Caramel, Peony, Orange Blossom, Cedarwood, Chocolate, Vanilla, Amber
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet
description: SUP脙聣RFLUO is where the story of INVERSO PROFUMI began. In movie terms, it芒聙聶s our 芒聙聹meet-cute.芒聙聺 The post-pandemic world is just beginning to open when an American artist travels to Sicily for work, only to become completely enchanted by a perfume and fall in love. Superfluo captures the essence of Sicily芒聙聰bright, abundant, and effortlessly elegant. It bursts with candied Sicilian fruits, heavenly cassata, bold peony, and, of course, orange blossoms. Pink pepper sparkles through the top notes as if to remind you that you are, after all, in Sicily, where every moment holds the promise of new magic.Perhaps that is why Oscar Wilde once said, 芒聙聹Sometimes, the unnecessary is necessary芒聙聺芒聙聰a reminder that beauty often lies in what we call superfluous.

name: Incantesimo
notes: White Lavender, Rosemary, Bergamot, Purple Lavender, English Lavender, Lavandula Nana, Sage, Coriander, Geranium, Cypress, Amber, Vanilla, Tonka Bean
style: Creamy, Floral, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft
description: Forget everything you know and expect from a lavender fragrance and allow Incantesimo to write its own story.Its profile is both soft and intricate, with warm, creamy notes that make it suitable for a morning stroll, a mindful meditation, or a night at the opera. As with all our fragrances, the lavender is masterfully arranged, allowing its presence to be felt without overpowering.

name: Whanui
notes: Mint, Geranium, Cardamom, Balsamic Notes, Woods, White Musk, Madagascar Vanilla, Leather
style: Fresh, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: In Maori, an Eastern Polynesian language and the language of the Maori people, the indigenous population of mainland New Zealand, 芒聙聹Whanui 芒聙聺 means something all-encompassing and balanced, perfectly reflecting the nature of this fragrance. It芒聙聶s also the word for vanilla.This particular vanilla fragrance, however, is meant for those who typically shy away from vanilla. Whanui opens with cool, fluid minty notes, offering a dry, creamy vanilla that avoids sticky-sugary sweetness. Instead, it emphasizes balsamic undertones, creating a subtle composition that stays close to the skin. The woody and musky elements linger subtly in the background, providing depth and a harmonious foundation to the fragrance.This is a fragrance that can be worn year-round. In the hot summer months it wears fresh and elegant. In the cooler months the cooler notes offer an alternative to more dense, heavier compositions.If Whanui were a color, it would be Tiffany Blue芒聙聰fresh, refined, and distinctive.

name: Private
notes: Bergamot, Saffron, Pink Pepper, Black Oud, Rose, Patchouli, Cedarwood, Sandalwood, Amber, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Floral - Spicy, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Amber, Woody - Dark
description: Inspired by the captivating 芒聙聹Private芒聙聺 series of black and white Corporal Landscape photographs by Kristina Nazarevskaia, exploring the harmonious interplay of natural landscapes and the exquisite contours of the female form, we introduce a fragrance that echoes this essence- Private. This olfactory masterpiece radiates sophistication and timeless allure, unveiling a symphonic harmony of notes that evoke an air of refinement and grace.At the forefront of Private, the vibrant zest of bergamot and the crisp notes of lemon come together in perfect accord, elegantly complemented by the warm embrace of saffron and a subtle infusion of pink pepper, creating a uniquely private sensory journey. As the heart notes gently unfurl, the enigmatic essence of Black Oud wood takes center stage, revealing its deep and captivating character, elegantly softened by velvety rose and enriched with the grounding presence of patchouli, reserved for a truly private olfactory experience.A harmonious blend of creamy sandalwood, sweet amber, comforting vanilla, and subtle musk creates a lasting trail of sensual warmth, exclusively tailored for those who seek the the unexpected in extraordinary fragrance encounters. Private epitomizes unparalleled charm and elegance, offering a unique olfactory experience for those with a discerning appreciation of the extraordinary, as private as the landscapes captured in Nazarevskaia芒聙聶s photographs.

name: F8
notes: Pear, White Peach, Caramel, Blackcurrant, Jasmine, Ambergris, Violet, Madagascar Vanilla, Sandalwood
style: Creamy, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Woody - Light
description: F8, an olfactory symphony inspired by the optimal focal length used in photography for well-distributed sharpness, unfolds with a dynamic interplay of pear, caramel, white peach, lemon, black currant, juicy green apple, and orange. Oh, did we forget a truly delectable note of burnt sugar?The intentional balance of F8, much like in a skilled photographer芒聙聶s eye, keeps its olfactory pyramid in perfect focus, allowing you to follow each note at your own pace. The sweet and savory overture of pear and caramel engages in a dance of delightful contrasts, setting the stage for the refreshing cadence of white peach, lemon, and orange. These citrus notes provide a crisp layer, evoking the warmth of sun-kissed days, while black currant adds subtle complexity.

name: Mink
notes: Cognac, Pear, Coriander, Bergamot, Clove, Carrot Seed, Honey, Mint, Damascus Rose, Camellia, Amber, Vanilla, Benzoin, Musk, Sandalwood, Incense
style: Creamy, Floral - Spicy, Fruity, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet
description: Mink, a fragrance that resonates with understated sophistication, begins its narrative with a symphony of top notes. Cognac, Pear, Coriander, and Bergamot intertwine in a harmonious blend, setting the stage for a rich and elegant olfactory journey.As the fragrance evolves, the heart notes emerge with Clove, Carrot Seed, Honey, Mint, Damascus Rose, and Camellia weaving a tapestry of complexity. In the final act, Mink's base notes come to fruition, revealing a rich and enduring foundation. Amber, Vanilla, Benzoin, Musk, and Sandalwood create a captivating and lingering aura, showcasing the timeless elegance that defines Mink.

name: Ladri di Fichi
notes: Bergmaot, Fig, Clementine, Milk, Honey, Green Leaves, Amber, Oakwood, Musk
style: Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Milky, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Amber
description: Ladri di Fichi.in Italian, means fig thieves. The name was inspired by sizzling-hot Sicilian afternoons spent driving along ocher-colored countryside, picking buckets full of figs from ancient, abandoned trees.What makes Ladri di Fichi unique is its initial focus on the resinous, milky notes and the scent of crushed green fig leaves, with the fruit (an inverted flower) taking center stage in a perfectly balanced second act.

notes: Orange Flower, Cedarwood, Tonka Bean, Warm Musk

style: Chypre, Floral - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Fresh
description: Coltrait: a cologne-extrait hybrid that wears with the fresh, everyday ease of a cologne, yet boasts the superior longevity of an extrait, playing with the duality of lightness and depth.1272 is inspired by The Wexler House in Palm Springs, the weekend home of Perfumehead founder Daniel Patrick Giles. A crisp citrus opening of petitgrain derived from the leaves and twigs of the Peru lime tree marry with transparent orange blossom and verbena. Textural cut hedges and sun-softened wood are evoked with Haitian vetiver, sandalwood, cistus absolute and moss. To wear it is to inhabit a version of yourself that is faceted and enduring.

name: Cosmic Cowboy Perfume Oil
notes: Galbanum, Cinnamon Bark, Orris, Lavender, Whisky A Go Go, Angelica Root, Tobacco Leaf, Tonka Bean, Decadent Amber, Cacao Blanc, Suede, Black Musk
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy
description: Cosmic Cowboy is the scent of Sunset Strip in the 70s- glitter and grit in equal measure. It's a state of decadent duality that is complex yet clear, rough yet smooth. Here, textural notes of suede and amber are met by the soft spice of cinnamon bark and lavender flower. The raw sensuality of black musk is met with orris and angelica for luxe earthiness, while creamy cacao blanc and tonka bean balance boozy whisky and sticky galbanum. States of ecstasy have been reported.

name: Room No. Perfume Oil
notes: Bergamot, Nutmeg, Orris, Jamaican Pimento, Guaiac Wood, Black Tea, Palo Santo, Cashmere Wood, Leather, Vanilla Absolute, Milky Musk, Peru Balsam
style: Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Spicy

style: Creamy, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Spicy

Saffron and incense appear in sheer wafts, like shafts of light coming through curtains. A tactile landing of black tea, tonka and sandalwood is more sophisticated than sweet. Inhalations of cognac keep a touch of the decadence from the night before.

style: Creamy, Gourmand, Sweet
description: A delicious and enveloping fragrance reminiscent of a bite of baked chocolate joy, Panettone Cioccolato is an irresistible olfactory journey that celebrates Italian sweetness. The opening is warm and welcoming, with toasted notes and hazelnut milk evoking the aroma of freshly baked dough. At its heart, a sweet and creamy explosion unfolds as chocolate, cocoa, and sugar blend into a dense, velvety trail, like a soft and enveloping filling. Finally, the fragrance settles on a rich base of butter, vanilla, and musk, leaving the skin with a soft, milky, and irresistibly Christmassy sensation.

name: Ligea La Sirena
notes: Powdery Notes, Rose, Tangerine
style: Floral, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: Bearing the name of one of the three mermaids who tried in vain to bewitch Ulysses, Ligea is a feminine sensual nectar, surprising and passionate, combining the warm powdery notes of opoponax with the fresh soft aroma of sweet mandarin.

name: Everveil
notes: Juniper, Forest Aromaspace, Mountain Air Accord, Orris, Night Blooming Jasmine, Fir Balsam, Angelica, Cypress, Incense, White Musk
style: Floral, Fresh, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: As dawn breaks, light filters through a gentle haze suspended above the evergreens. The fragrance opens with the crisp sylvan scent of juniper and forest accords. At its heart, a mountain air accord intertwines with orris and the delicate touch of night-blooming jasmine, evoking the stillness of high alpine air. As it lingers, fir balsam, angelica, cypress, incense, and white musk form a cold, clean, luminous finish capturing the quiet stillness of a morning untouched.

name: It's a Match-a
notes: Matcha, Milk, Blueberry, Vanilla, Sugar, Pancake, Pistachio
description: Matcha. Milky. Green. Blueberry. Warm. Vanilla. Pancake. Pistachio.A delectable stop by your favorite caf脙漏 for a rich matcha latte and a buttery, flaky, fruity pastry treat- a moment of sweet perfection to salvage even the most mundane of days.

name: Vanille Caviar
notes: Blackcurrant Bud, Cardamom, Calamus, Peach, Salted Butter, Ylang Ylang, Madagascar Vanilla, Peru Balsam, Cistus Labdanum
style: Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Sweet
description: In monochrome fashion, the new fragrance from BDK Parfums explores the mysterious power of the color black, no longer perceived as a shadow, but revealed as a source of light. Vanille Caviar, the sixth creation in the Collection Mati脙篓res, is a perfume in which the very substance itself, vanilla, becomes radiant and elevated to the rank of a noble material. Here, the creamy and delectable vanilla turns dark, dense, and textured, yet remains infused with luminosity.Vanilla, derived from an orchid, is a majestic flower of almost surreal beauty. Its sensuality and addictive softness find deep resonance in this composition. The jet-black seeds glisten with a subtle shimmer. The fragrance is built around a single olfactory raw material 芒聙聰 vanilla, revealed in all its nuances through CO2 extraction and absolue. Cocoa and resinous notes, including Peru balsam and labdanum cistus, unfold their full richness and depth.At its heart lies a distinctive vanilla caviar accord, with salty and mineral facets- precious and unmistakable. It is surrounded by subtle contrasts: the freshness of cardamom, the fruity brightness of blackcurrant, and the warmth of cocoa beans.Here, light no longer emanates from golden shimmer or sunny accords, but radiates from the heart of the vanilla itself and the notes that surround it. This is an 芒聙聹Outrenoir芒聙聺 vanilla, dark in appearance, yet alive and vibrant, like a work of art that shifts throughout the day with light, shadow, and perspective. A sensual and captivating composition, Vanille Caviar is unique, modern, and timeless, all at once.

name: Sea My Love
notes: Mandarin, Salt, Leather, Jasmine, Sea Notes, Amber, Musk, Patchouli, Benzoin
style: Floral - White, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Salty / Oceanic
description: Sea My Love draws its inspiration from the mysterious depths and unfathomable secrets of the ocean, revealing the legend of the Sea Serpent, a fascinating creature and guardian of the great abyss.In the deep seabed where the sunlight is lost, its scales shimmer with an ethereal glow, reflecting the millennial secrets that even the waves dare not whisper.As the sun sets, plunging the horizon into a spectacle of navy blue and golden reflections, the sea seems to hold its breath.Suddenly, it vibrates with such intensity that it is obvious such a bestial force dominates it. The great Sea Serpent then emerges, slicing through the water and foam with hypnotic grace. It moves majestically, its movements awaken the most powerful currents, evoking underwater storms and whirlwinds of forgotten emotions.Blink & he is gone. His grand presence lasts only moment. He plunges back into the mystery of the depths, taking with him the oceans' best-kept secrets to better protect his kingdom from prying eyes.Sea My Love is a fragrance where brute strength, light and sophistication play with currents and headwinds. Skin leather, animal sugar, jasmine oxygen, salty mandarin, musky amber: these combinations of new and intense notes speak to us of Love, Grand Large, emancipation and Power.

name: White on White

style: Milky, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Warm
description: A perfume whose aura echoes the poise and passion that was attained from your input when selecting the scent. White on White commences with fresh hints of bergamot and earthy undertones of fig leaf, which settle down to reveal a soft cloud of fig milk, with cedarwood, patchouli and Tolu balsam at the woody heart. Soothing and sophisticated, White on White radiates a comforting blend of amber, musk and Bourbon vanilla that lull the senses to a dreamlike state at the base.

name: Vanille Bourbon
notes: Cedar Flowers, Orchids (bourbon And Yellow), Heliotrope, Tiare, Rose Wood
style: Sweet
description: Vanilla lovers, it's time to rejoice!  Two types of orchid are used to bring to mind an intense, sweet, rich vanilla fragrance, anchored with the delicious scents of heliotrope, exotic tiare and warm amber.  This is an instant smile and an easy laugh芒聙娄it's soft vanilla joy in a bottle.  Easygoing yet totally addictive (we mean it芒聙聰we crawled over two tables one day to find exactly what gorgeous vanilla was enticing us so!), this is the finest bourbon vanilla we've ever laid our noses on.  The Absolu version is strong芒聙聰an amazing plus for any vanilla scent (and wonderful staying power, too!)  Did we say addictive?  Vanille Bourbon has left us with a loss for words, so we'll just say, 芒聙聹WOW!芒聙聺

name: Gingerbread Dough
notes: Butter, Brown Sugar, Flour, Vanilla, Molasses, Baking Soda, Ginger, Cinnamon, Nutmeg, Cloves
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet
description: The most festive scent of all time. The smell of freshly made gingerbread dough before baking fills the air, golden butter melting into brown sugar, warm spices swirling gently in the cozy winter atmosphere. A spoon of ginger, a swirl of cinnamon, a whisper of nutmeg and clove, all wrapped in the comforting sweetness of vanilla and molasses.Under the artistic touch of perfumer Theodoros Kalotinis, this heartwarming fragrance evolves into something far beyond the kitchen, a sensual, captivating creation that turns heads as you pass by. The warmth of its spices lingers on the skin like a gentle caress, blending nostalgia with pure allure.Gingerbread Dough is not just a scent; it is a story of comfort meeting desire; a golden embrace that feels both familiar and irresistibly seductive.

name: Hazelnut Praline
notes: Hazelnut, Chocolate Spread, Spices, Sugar
style: Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet
description: A fragrance as irresistible as the first spoon of creamy praline. Inspired by the authentic recipe, it begins with golden sugar slowly caramelizing over roasted hazelnuts, melting into a smooth, velvety paste that glows with warmth. A swirl of chocolate spread richness blends with a whisper of secret spices, creating a scent that feels both delicious and dangerously addictive. Hazelnut Praline is sweet temptation captured in a bottle- indulgent, comforting, and impossible to forget.

name: Apple Pie

style: Creamy, Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet
description: The ultimate realistic scent of freshly baked apple pie, crafted to capture that comforting, mouthwatering aroma and bottle it to perfection. Apple Pie is the most intoxicating comfort fragrance of all time, as only Theodoros Kalotinis could create it: warm, sweet, and irresistibly cozy.This delicious creation opens with notes of cinnamon, juicy baked apples, soft vanilla, and golden pie crust- every distinctive element of the perfect autumn dessert, in vividly evocative detail that will have you feeling like you're sitting around the Thanksgiving table. Familiar yet addictive, Apple Pie lingers on the skin like a sweet memory: unforgettable and utterly delightful.

name: Monkeyflower
notes: Tussilago, Sunscreen, Fig, Buttercup, Chamomile, Goldberry, Musk, Hay
style: Avant-Garde, Earthy, Floral - Light, Powdery / Soft
description: The Musk Monkeyflower (so renowned for its vibrant scent that it was simply referred to as "The Common Musk") was imported to Europe from the American west coast, where the sun-yellow flowers, perched on fuzzy, sticky stalks, can be found in meadows or along old dirt roads.The Monkeyflower was a smash hit in Victorian England, thanks to its rich musk smell. Over nearly a century, it spread from the botanical aristocracy to London street hawkers and countryside cottage windows. But at the turn of the twentieth century, the flower suddenly lost its scent- not just in domesticated plants, but in wild specimens as well. Botanists in North America reported that the uncultivated flowers had also lost their fragrance.This puzzling mystery was the hottest topic among biology conspiracy theorists for decades, but no explanation was ever found. Eventually, the subject faded into obscurity, along with the flower芒聙聶s popularity as a houseplant. By then, the flowers had spread into the wild and can sometimes still be found living a quiet life in parts of Europe and New Zealand, perhaps just biding their time before returning to the olfactory stage.

name: The Musc Extrait
style: Animalic, Powdery / Soft, Spicy, Warm
description: The Musc Extrait reinterprets the captivating signature of the Eau de Parfum in a nocturnal and carnal register. More spicy, more ambery and more daring, the fragrance unveils a new sensuality and a rare intensity, thanks to a concentration twice that of the Eau de Parfum. Profoundly carnal, ignited by the explosive collision of overdosed Ambrofix musk and blazing spices and caressed with shadowed swirls of sandalwood and vetiver, it's an intoxicating ode to pure desire. With a lascivious, almost animal sensuality, its imprint invites a passionate embrace.

name: Nice Bergamote Extrait
notes: Italian Bergamot (Orpur Essence And Integral), Bitter Orange, Pink Pepper & Black Pepper Duo, Jasmine Absolute, Jasmine Sambac Absolute, Ylang Ylang, Rose Water, Texas Cedarwood, Amber-musk Accord, Brown Sugar, Patchouli Heart
style: Floral - Citrus, Floral - White, Fresh - Citrus, Sweet, Woody - Fresh, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Exterior, night. After a warm summer day, nature exhales delightfully lush scents in the cool evening air. Nice Bergamote Extrait transports us to the nocturnal side of the fragrance. More gourmand, more narcotic, more intoxicating, the scent reveals itself under a shadowed facet, unveiling a rare intensity thanks to a concentration twice that of the Eau de Parfum.The eponymous star of the Eau de Parfum, bergamot, reveals a new facet in the Extrait. While it releases its joyful and radiant, instantly recognizable top notes, it also unveils sweet, almost candied nuances, enhanced by the softness of bitter orange. Soon, the floral heart unfolds on the skin, more radiant than ever. To accompany the ylang-ylang, Antoine Maisondieu selected a jasmine sambac absolute, a variety with narcotic and fruity facets, to capture the nocturnal scent of white flowers, heady and captivating. The addictive trail lingers on a subtly chypre woody base, where cedar blends with patchouli, and the vanilla hints of tonka bean merge with a delicious ambered sugar accord.

name: Sirene Privee
notes: Blood Orange, Pink Pepper, Nutmeg, Cherry Delight, Cinnamon Bark, Geranium, Vetiver, Oakwood, Cypriol
style: Fruity, Smoky, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Spicy
description: The bold just got bolder. A fearless evolution of the Sir脙篓ne legacy, Sir脙篓ne Priv脙漏e is a fragrance of striking contrasts, spicy yet smooth, seductive yet elevated. If Sir脙篓ne was the bold original, Priv脙漏e is her darker, more dangerous side.It opens with a vivid rush of blood orange, pink pepper, and nutmeg, a sharp, attention-grabbing blend that cuts through the ordinary. At its heart, the signature cherry delight intensifies, spiced with cinnamon bark and lifted by geranium, delivering a floral-fruity hit with unexpected heat. As it settles, vetiver, oakwood, and cypriol create a smoky, musky trail- warm, textured, and utterly addictive. The result is a fragrance for a woman who is no longer merely captivating, but completely in control. A bold scent with a sculptural soul, Sir脙篓ne Priv脙漏e captures the tension and elegance of modern femininity in all its power.

name: A Little Secret
notes: Rainier Cherry, Saffron, Marzipan, Demerara Sugar, Pastry Crust, Rum-soaked Tonka, Patchouli
style: Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet
description: A Little Secret captures the essence of a rainy afternoon at a roadside diner, evoking the comforting aroma of cherry pie and coffee with notes of Rainier Cherry, Marzipan, and Pastry Crust. Originally released as a limited edition inspired by Agent Cooper's usual order at the Double R Diner in the legendary show Twin Peaks, but don't worry, as there's no dark side lurking underneath this indulgently delectable and richly nostalgic gourmand- just pure cherry goodness.

name: Il Colore del Vento
notes: Lemon, Coriander, Cardamom, Black Pepper, Ginger, Bergamot, Champagne, Caramelized Sugar, Sweet Notes, Coffee, Vanilla, Amber, White Musk, Caramel Butter
style: Creamy, Fresh - Citrus, Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet
description: Il Colore del Vento is a bold and spicy amber gourmand dedicated to those who, like eagles, challenge the wind and color the sky with unwavering determination. It is also an invitation- to let yourself be carried, to value those who lift us, and to allow ourselves to soar. Above all, paint your life.Il Colore del Vento is meant to awaken the fearless child within, the one who dares to dream and defy the wind. It opens with spicy top notes that evoke the push of the wind, followed by a heart of champagne and coffee. The base melts into rich vanilla, caramel, and butter, merging boldness with warmth and sweetness.

name: Blues
notes: Apricot, Magnolia, Coffee, Opoponax, Almond Blossom, Brandy, Ebony Wood, Molasses, Oud
style: Earthy, Floral - Ambery Spice, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Amber, Woody - Dark
description: Inspired by the soul and grit of the music that shaped generations in Chicago, this release embodies the heart, the struggle, and the beauty of the Blues. Dark, sweet, woody, soulful, this is sweater season in a bottle.

name: Chapter 3 Discovery Set: Majestic China
description: Vast and luminous, China stands as one of the great cradles of civilization, with landscapes that stir the soul and a legacy that shaped the world. This collection offers not a full portrait, but a series of quiet glimpses into its spirit. Discover all 6 fragrances in the Majestic China series in this special collection:MooncakePomelo OolongPrincess of ChinaSpring FestivalThe Silk RoadChinese Calligraphy
