notes: Ink, Black Lacquer, Paper, Coffee, Orchid
style: Earthy, Smoky, Unusual / Unexpected, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Vast and luminous, China stands as one of the great cradles of civilization, with landscapes that stir the soul and a legacy that shaped the world. This collection offers not a full portrait, but a series of quiet glimpses into its spirit. Each fragrance is a passage: to a scholar芒聙聶s desk, a tea house at dawn, a lantern-lit reunion, a road that once connected empires, a precious childhood memory...let each scent take you on a journey.Calligraphy is China芒聙聶s living art芒聙聰each stroke a meditation in ink and paper. This scent evokes the stillness of a scholar芒聙聶s studio, where technique meets introspection. A quiet homage to the brushstrokes that shaped a civilization.

name: The Silk Road
notes: Spices, Tobacco Leaf, Ginseng, Leather, Vetiver
style: Earthy, Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: Vast and luminous, China stands as one of the great cradles of civilization, with landscapes that stir the soul and a legacy that shaped the world. This collection offers not a full portrait, but a series of quiet glimpses into its spirit. Each fragrance is a passage: to a scholar芒聙聶s desk, a tea house at dawn, a lantern-lit reunion, a road that once connected empires, a precious childhood memory...let each scent take you on a journey.The Silk Road carried goods, stories, and dreams across empires. This scent pays homage to the ancient trade routes with notes of spices, tobacco leaf, and leather. A tribute to adventure, history, and cultural exchange.

name: Spring Festival
notes: Plum Blossom, Red Lanterns, Mandarin, Tanghulu (candied Hawthorn), Jujube (red Dates)
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Sweet
description: Vast and luminous, China stands as one of the great cradles of civilization, with landscapes that stir the soul and a legacy that shaped the world. This collection offers not a full portrait, but a series of quiet glimpses into its spirit. Each fragrance is a passage: to a scholar芒聙聶s desk, a tea house at dawn, a lantern-lit reunion, a road that once connected empires, a precious childhood memory...let each scent take you on a journey.Every year, millions across China journey home to reunite with family for Lunar New Year. Spring Festival captures this joyous season with notes of mandarin, plum blossom, and candied hawthorn. A scent of celebration and belonging.

name: Princess of China
notes: Peony, White Lotus, Silk, Lychee, Pear
style: Floral - Fruity, Floral - Light, Fruity, Powdery / Soft
description: Vast and luminous, China stands as one of the great cradles of civilization, with landscapes that stir the soul and a legacy that shaped the world. This collection offers not a full portrait, but a series of quiet glimpses into its spirit. Each fragrance is a passage: to a scholar芒聙聶s desk, a tea house at dawn, a lantern-lit reunion, a road that once connected empires, a precious childhood memory... let each scent take you on a journey.Inspired by the noblewomen of dynasties past, Princess of China is soft yet radiant, like flowers in full bloom. It celebrates China芒聙聶s rich history and imperial femininity through luminous petals and delicate fruits. Graceful and timeless.

name: Discovery Set
description: Established in Sweden, Nos Republic is curious perfume brand that represents inspiring stories.Sample pack includes:Empire TTansu SilkRose GambitMoon ChildCor Serpentis

name: Men's 3-Piece Gift Set
description: An invitation to unwrap excellence, the Men芒聙聶s 3-Piece Gift Set offers a meaningful way for you to leave your mark and for them to leave theirs. Crafted for the season of giving, this limited-edition gift set for him brings together three signature scents from The House of Creed, each celebrated for its distinctive character and enduring appeal. Aventus, Green Irish Tweed and Silver Mountain Water are presented in refined 10ml editions, designed for discovery, travel or thoughtful gifting. Finished in decadent emerald-green packaging inspired by the bold elegance of Art Deco design, this set reflects Creed芒聙聶s unwavering dedication to detail and timeless craftsmanship.?

name: Women's 3-Piece Gift Set
description: Unwrap a refined expression of excellence with the Women芒聙聶s 3-Piece Gift Set, a curated collection of the most celebrated perfumes for her from The House of Creed. This limited-edition set brings together three distinctive celebrations of modern femininity in Aventus For Her, Carmina and Queen of Silk, and presents each in a refined 10ml edition, ideal for discovery, travel or thoughtful gifting. Encased in emerald-green packaging inspired by the timeless lines of Art Deco design, this set has been meticulously crafted with masterful intent as a testament to Creed芒聙聶s enduring commitment to style and craftsmanship, offering a meaningful way for you to leave your mark, and for them to leave theirs.?

name: Once Upon a Time
notes: Mandarin, Pink Pepper, Candied Almond, Cotton Candy, Vanilla, Castoreum, Musk
style: Fruity, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: What emotions do you want to save? What memories from your life do you want to select? What brings you true comfort芒聙聰emotions that have been lived and not imagined? This new Emotion Generator Machine is surgically built around both personal and collective memories. These are memories linked to recollections of childhood joy, which become comforting emotions in our adult lives. Your grandmother芒聙聶s hand takes yours and accompanies you in the meadows, where you run carefree. The tangerine peel, peeled and thrown into the fireplace, crackles with the aroma of its essential oil. We play with flour in the kitchen as little ones, with a patient grandmother who helps us. The amusement park with the scent of cotton candy and caramelized hazelnuts. The almond 芒聙聹confetti芒聙聺 (sugared almonds), thrown at newlyweds in Italian weddings, are eaten by children. What emerges is a gourmand perfume designed for adults, not for children.

name: Ylem - Discovery Set
description: A Journey Through Origin. Experience the essence of Ylem Parfums with this origin kit of the first three otherworldly Extraits from this cosmos-inspired Hamburg-based fragrance house-Eye of God, Eastern Veil, and Soap Bubble. Each fragrance captures a different facet of cosmic beauty: mystical, radiant, or ephemeral, yet all emerge from the same elemental origin. Presented in a convenient set of 2ml atomizer samples.

name: Stuck on You
notes: Crisp Apple, Caramel
style: Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet
description: A collaboration with online fragrance influencer PerfumeDisco, Stuck on You is our very favorite type of gourmand, one that picks a very specific source of inspiration and completely nails it- in this case, a perfectly dipped caramel apple.  An opening of a crisp apple with a thin caramel shell slowly fades into a softly sweet aura of caramel-tinged musk. Brightly tart and delectably sweet, with none of the sticky mess- what's not to love?

name: Witchery
notes: Blackberries, Wild Violets, Galbanum, Green Stems And Thorns, Oak Moss, Benzoin, Tree Moss, Wet Stone, Mountain Mist
style: Floral - Light, Fresh, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous
description: A tangled thicket of juicy wild blackberries, a bed of benzoin and moss, and a cool, rising mist, Witchery is a fragrance rich with ancient wisdom and earthy power- a celebration of nature's deepest secrets.

name: Fuckery
notes: Caramelized Sugar, Luxardo Cherry, Cinnamon, Tobacco, Smoke, Vanilla, Amber, White Musk
style: Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: Caramelized sugar, vanilla, cinnamon, sandalwood and Luxardo cherry are darkened by tobacco absolute and smoke, and softened by the scent of night air and clean sheets. This one was inspired by the music of Amy Winehouse.

name: English Major
notes: Library Books, Orris Absolute, Marshmallow, Decalepis Hamiltonii (swallow Root) Absolute, Carrot Seed, Sandalwood, Fallen Leaves
style: Earthy, Floral, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Designed to evoke the smell of being surrounded by library books, fallen leaves in autumn, and the romantic spirit of someone who can think of nothing better to do with a cold afternoon than to immerse themselves in a good book, this is an earthy gourmand centered on marshmallow, orris, and the unmistakeable scent of library books. It's cozy and warm, and paper-y and soft.

name: 2AM in Lafayette
notes: Vanilla Co2, Oakmoss, Cafe Au Lait, Ribbons Of Caramel, Beignets Dusted With Powdered Sugar
style: Gourmand, Green / Herbaceous, Milky, Sweet
description: Rich vanilla, milky coffee, caramel, and beignets dusted with powdered sugar sound like the perfect comforts after experiencing a haunting. Oakmoss keeps it a little spooky.

name: In Dreams and Fairy Tales (Vanilla)
notes: Baked Meringue, Vanilla Bean Absolute, Sugar, A Sprinkle Of Chamomile
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Based on the scent of French meringue served at a Parisian salon de th脙漏, In Dreams and Fairy Tales (Vanilla edition) is an airy, slightly toasted cloud of vanilla and powdered sugar with a sprinkle of chamomile. This is a perfect, fluffy, all-seasons vanilla that feels like stepping into a fairy tale. It is beautiful on its own, and layers perfectly as a vanilla base for any scent.

name: Snow Moon Magic
notes: Lavender Sugar, Vanilla Steamed Milk, Chai Spices, Tonka Bean, Cashmeran, Ambroxan, Crystals Accord, Marshmallow, Cookie Butter, Tahitian Vanilla
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Spicy, Sweet
description: Sorce bestseller Moon Magic- a delectable chai spiced cocktail with lavender sugar, steamed milk, and smooth, clean musk gets an extra cozy winter edition that takes the gourmand comfort to the next level with the addition of fluffy marshmallow, a house tincture of Tahitian vanilla beans, and gooey, mouthwatering cookie butter.

name: Match Made In Heaven
notes: Matcha, Vanilla Soft Serve, Cherry Blossom, Almond, Waffle Cone, Powdered Sugar, Creamy Sandalwood
style: Creamy, Floral - Light, Gourmand, Green / Herbaceous, Sweet
description: The scents of earthy green matcha tea and softly sweet cherry blossom petals find themselves to be an irresistible pairing, while vanilla soft serve, a hint of fresh-baked waffle cone, and a dusting of powdered sugar linger in the air.

name: Vampire Wife
notes: Blood Orange, Star Anise, Wedding Cake, Peru Balsam, Tonka Bean Absolute, Heliotrope, Oakmoss, Powdered Skin
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Fresh - Citrus, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet
description: Hauntingly beautiful and enticingly sweet, Vampire Wife is the devoted partner to Vampire Husband. Frighteningly powerful and alluring, Vampire Wife opens with juicy blood orange, oakmoss and softly spiced wedding cake, and dries down to luminous powdered skin.

name: Vampire Husband
notes: Dark Patchouli, Black Amber, Graveyard Dirt, Petrichor, Clove Cigarette, Tobacco, Oud, Blood, Vetiver, Oakmoss
style: Avant-Garde, Earthy, Smoky, Woody - Amber
description: Dangerously sexy, yet slightly unsettling, Vampire Husband is the darker mate in our vampiric pairing. Vampire Husband opens with a photorealistic portrait of a graveyard at night, atmospheric and mossy, and the faint wisp of a long extinguished clove cigarette. A dark underpainting of black amber and patchouli lurk underneath.

name: Ephemera
notes: Fresh Carved Pumpkin, Brown Sugar, Notebook Paper, Black Soil, Acorns, Vanilla Absolute, Cashmere, Milky Musk
description: Inspired by autumns past, Ephemera is a meditation on the delights and fleeting nature of the season. At once sweetly nostalgic and softly wistful, Ephemera opens with freshly carved pumpkin and quickly nestles into a cozy and gourmand combination of brown sugar, nutty acorns, notebook paper and black soil.

name: CHI
notes: Skin Accord, Angelica Root, Philippine Elemi Oil, Olibanum Sacra, Maroke Wild Oud, Ginger, Peru Balsam Absolute, Natural Pigment From Turmeric And Beetroot
style: Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: After the immediate sell out of the first Gakkin collaboration INK, Mallo now presents a unique limited edition aromatic that once again showcases ancient Japanese tattooing techniques. Combining spiritual kodo incense and ambery notes with a uniquely created musky skin accord and a natural vegetal red coloring this is the representation of an an ancient Samurai warrior getting inked with body tattoos. Masculine, slightly foreboding and utterly unique CHI is another tribute to Japanese tattooing art reflected in the astounding works of Gakkin.

name: The Wonderland II
notes: September Plums, Nature芒聙聶s Aldehydes, Bitter Almonds, Aged Agarwoods, Ivy Resin, Verdant Narcissus, Spices Of A Thousand Colors, Old Growth Moss Beds, An Ocean Of Orris, And A Gallon Of Mitti
style: Animalic, Chypre, Floral, Floral - Ambery Spice, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Spicy
description: The Wonderland II features a handmade extraction of fresh September plums. Originally crafted as an orris-centered, moss-laden chypre, The Wonderland was an ode to the beauty of Mount Rainier. Here, the orris has been drawn out into a full spectrum iris accord, utilizing higher quality orris butters, orris absolutes, orris resinoids and pure irones. The moss and cedar accords have been made more photorealistic as well芒聙聰 with an addition of an excellent batch of mitti. You芒聙聶ll find wearing this perfume truly emulates an old growth forest.Additionally, the spices have been drawn to the forefront, as a nod to the changing seasons. In conjunction with this autumnal spice, there's now added a slight purr of castoreum. Finally, in solidarity with Ukraine, Russian deer musk has been eliminated from the formula, and upgraded to a duet of antique Kashmiri musk from the late Sultan of Oman, and aged white ambergris.

name: Concrete Lightning
notes: Electricity, Panic Grass, Summer Rain, Ozone, Concrete, Steam
style: Avant-Garde, Fresh, Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Clean, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Based on the cult classic Concrete After Lightning scented candle, Concrete lightning is an EDP based on a unique an universally recognizable note called geosmin- the scent molecule released from bacteria in dirt after it rains. In the city, geosmin blends with the urban environment to produce the scent of hot asphalt and concrete quickly cooled by rain. It is as if the whole city is boiling, overlapping in scent, and when rain and thunder come, all is released into the air in an instant. It smells fresh, unique and only of summer in the city. Concrete Lightning is simple- you have the air, rain, steam, and some of the weeds that grow in the cracks of New York City.

name: Comfy Ture
notes: Orange Marmalade, Kiwi Jam, Cranberry, Plum, Salted Butter, Baguette
style: Citrus, Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Comfy Ture is a cozy gourmand fragrance inspired by the comforting charm of a breakfast table. Zesty orange and kiwi marmalades melt into juicy plum, tart cranberry, and the warm, irresistible aroma of French baguette with salted butter, creating a scent that芒聙聶s as nostalgic as it is deliciously unexpected.Comfy Ture opens with a radiant burst of golden orange marmalade, bright, juicy, and sun-kissed,shimmering with citrus zest and sweet pulp. A swirl of kiwi marmalade adds a tart, slightly green twist, bringing a playful freshness that lifts the entire opening. At its heart, the fragrance reveals a rich blend of ripe red plum and tart cranberry. The plum is velvety and full-bodied, evoking the comfort of homemade jam, while the cranberry adds sparkle and tang, creating a perfectly balanced fruity core- sweet, juicy, and just a little tart. As it dries down, Comfy Ture unveils its most indulgent side: the cozy aroma of freshly baked French baguette, warm and golden, wrapped in a soft layer of salted, melting butter. This savory-sweet base brings warmth and comfort, grounding the brightness above in a truly edible, nostalgic finish.

name: Praline Maligne
notes: Cacao Butter, White Chocolate, Praline, Condensed Milk, Hazelnut, Vanilla, Caramel, Sugar
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Praline Maligne is an irresistible gourmand symphony of creamy white chocolate, praline, roasted hazelnuts, and silky caramel. Every note melts together into a decadent fragrance that feels like a confectionery masterpiece; sweet, rich, and utterly addictive.Praline Maligne opens with an opulent veil of creamy white chocolate, immediately enveloping the senses in its silky sweetness. The buttery richness of cocoa butter adds a smooth, almost velvety texture, creating a luscious introduction that feels indulgent from the very first breath.At its heart, the fragrance dives into pure gourmand pleasure. The praline accord, with its caramelized nuttiness, intertwines seamlessly with roasted hazelnuts, evoking the comforting aroma of freshly made confections. Condensed milk adds a dense, creamy layer of sweetness, amplifying the decadence and conjuring the sensation of biting into a rich, melt-in-your-mouth praline.As the fragrance dries down, a sumptuous base of molten caramel, soft vanilla, and crystalline sugar emerges. This foundation extends the gourmand experience, leaving a lingering, addictive trail that is both warm and enveloping like the final, lingering sweetness of a perfect dessert.

name: Velvet Vendetta
notes: Gunsmoke, Pink Pepper, Nutmeg, Dried Fruits, Forbidden Vanilla, Bourbon, Black Olive, Tobacco, Deadwood, Molasses, Resins, Black Vanilla
style: Boozy, Creamy, Fruity, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy, Sweet, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Step right through the saloon doors and meet Sarah Baker's newest troublemaker. Seductive and uncompromising, Velvet Vendetta is a richly layered vanilla with a dark and sensual twist, a vanilla with no manners and no mercy. Laced with boozy bourbon, gunsmoke and pink pepper sparks, it's raw, untamed, and undeniably sexy. Apple cider spiced with nutmeg adds a juiciness, while black olive gives it a salty edge. A whip-cracking heart of fir balsam and green vanilla rides through the haze, before the whole scene drops into a dusty sunset of tobacco, benzoin, and black vanilla. Created for those who thrive on intrigue and command attention, Velvet Vendetta ain't just perfume- it's a high noon showdown in a bottle.

name: Dark Stars Discovery Set
description: Explore the beauty of Andrea Maack's darkest fragrances with this special Discovery Set, featuring generous 2ml atomizer samples of this beloved Icelandic brand's most mysterious and sensual offerings:Jest, Magma, Pavilion, Coven, Flux,&Supernova.

name: Cosmic Lights Discovery Set

name: Complete Sample Discovery Collection

name: Cologne d'Agar
notes: Bergamot, Sichaun Pepper, Rose, Saffron, Frankincense, Agarwood, Sandalwood, Vanilla, Labdanum, Benzoin
style: Floral - Spicy, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: Maksim's first ever Signature Collection scent, Cologne d'Agar is designed to combine the small-batch precision and rare oud that represent the prestige and soul of the Maksim line, with lighter, more modern notes invited in to establish an elegant, high-quality fragrance tailored for everyday life.Cologne d'Agar is a luminous oud cologne where bright bergamot and a touch of Sichuan pepper open into rose, saffron and glowing frankincense. A double facet of Myanmar and Thai agarwood anchors the base with Indian sandalwood, vanilla, labdanum and Siam benzoin. Airy yet complex, it balances citrus, florals and resins over a refined oud structure- a sophisticated, modern interpretation of the cologne style. Spray once, walk out the door, and let the story carry you.

name: Travel Kit
description: The Bogue Travel Kit is the ideal way to discover Bogue Profumo fragrances, with 4 pocket-size vials that let you carry your favorite perfume with you on any occasion.The beautifully packaged set includes: 1脙聴7.5 ml MAAI vial, 1脙聴7.5 ml O/E vial, 1脙聴7.5 ml MEM vial, and 1脙聴7.5 ml COME vial.Key notes:MAAI: Tuberose, rose, jasmine, ylang ylang, civet, castoreum, hyraceum, dried fruits, sandalwood, oakmoss, benzoin, rosewood, patchouli, geranium, Tolu balsam, myrrh.O/E: Bergamot, grapefruit, lemon, neroli, clove, black pepper, rosemary, thyme, camphor, Lebanon cedar, juniper, pine, cypress, rose, jasmine, vetiver, benzoin, tobacco.MEM: Petitgrain, mandarin, lavender (4 different species), lily of the valley, champaca, jasmine, geranium, vanilla, laurel, benzoin, cedarwood, labdanum, musk, castoreum.COME:  fig, bergamot, olibanum, cade, benzoin, black tea, labdanum, oud, helichrysum, tonka bean, jasmine, vanilla, civet, patchouli, honey, benzoin, musk, ylang ylang.

name: Sacred Santo
notes: Palo Santo Wood, Resins, Amber
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Amber, Woody - Spicy
description: Inspired by the ritual glow of palo santo- a sacred and richly scented wild wood meant to combat negative energy and provide spiritual purification- this soulful fragrance envelopes you in a meditative haze of smoky woods, grounding resins, and a touch of warm amber. Contemplative yet sensual, Sacred Santo lingers close to the skin like a fireside embrace, comforting, spiritual, and deeply alluring.

name: Dandelion Musk
notes: Violet Leaf, Neroli, Geranium, Chammomile, Cut Grass, Rose, Sandalwood, Patchouli, Many Musks
style: Floral - Light, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft
description: Imagine lying in a meadow, staring at blue skies and watching the clouds. Dandelion Musk is the fragrance. Born from 4160 Tuesdays' "What We Missed in Lockdown" series (a collaboration with fragrance writer Tessa Williams), this sunny, green, evocatively cheerful scent represents an idealized outdoor music festival- think freshly cut grass and wildflowers, not muddy mosh pits.Although dandelions don芒聙聶t give off an aroma, Dandelion Musk imagines a field where their bright yellow flowers are growing. Five soft musks - from ambrettolide at the top to galaxolide at the base- float around you like dandelion fluff, smoothing out the geranium and supergreen violet lead. Anchored by amyris patchouli blend at the heart of this wildflower bouquet is our homage to festival folk rockers in flares- an olfactory tribute to Peace, Love, and Good Vibes.

name: Discovery Set II
description: Arquiste Parfumeur is a globetrotting, era-spanning olfactory journey- an exploration of the world's most distinct cultures and times in fragrance form. Discover 5 of their newest and most distinctive entries with this curated sample set, featuring the following fragrances:The Architect's Club, Misfit, Sydney Rock Pool, Nocturnality, & Indigo Smoke.

name: Discovery Set I
description: Arquiste Parfumeur is a globetrotting, era-spanning olfactory journey- an exploration of the world's most distinct cultures and times in fragrance form. Discover 5 of their bestselling entries with this curated sample set, featuring the following fragrances:Venice Rococo, Almond Suede, Peau, The Grove by the Sea, & Tropical.

name: Nocturnality
notes: Latex, Neoprene, Indian Papyrus, Malabar Black Pepper, Hyraceum, Black Shoe Shine Accord, Bulgarian Rose, Night-blooming Animalic Florals, Black Leather, Hydrocarboresin, Indonesian Patchouli, Atlas Cedarwood, Civet, Castoreum, Styrax
style: Animalic, Avant-Garde, Floral - Spicy, Resinous / Balsamic, Unusual / Unexpected
description: October 1996, New York City.In the neon-soaked nights of downtown New York, a young perfumer roams the city after dark, chasing inspiration. The humid air carries hints of spilled booze, cigarette smoke, and the sweat of bodies moving in underground clubs. He meets a man who drifts through the scene like a ghost, his scent a mix of neoprene, leather boots, and something undefinable. Drawn into the city芒聙聶s after-hours underbelly, where lust and abandon blend into an intoxicating mix, he absorbs the essence of the night. But as he does, he realizes he芒聙聶s not just capturing that prevalent, sexual scent- he芒聙聶s losing himself in it. A latex and leather 'oud-style' scent., Nocturnality is a perfumer芒聙聶s take on neon-soaked nightlife, the leather scene, and raw, nocturnal behavior with notes of latex, neoprene leather, black shoe shine, hydrocarboresin and styrax.

name: Tropical
notes: Mexican Guava, Yucat脙隆n Lima, Fresh Ginger, White Plumeria, Champaca Absolute, Guava Blossom, Jasmine Sambac, Guava Paste, Mexican Vanilla Bean, Radiant Woody Amber Accord, Mahogany
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Tropical / Beachy, Woody - Fresh, Woody Ambery Floral
description: New Year芒聙聶s Eve 2022, M脙漏rida, Yucat脙隆n.Fireworks light up the night sky of old M脙漏rida, their glow reflecting on the rippling surface of a pool. Hidden behind an unassuming colonial facade lies this modernist oasis, where glass and travertine surfaces frame a garden brimming with life: palm trees, bird of paradise flowers, leafy ginger plants bordering the pool. A guava tree, heavy with ripe fruit, fills the air with sweetness, mingling with the heady scent of champaca blossoms and the deep aroma of tropical woods. Beneath the tree, a weathered Mayan idol lies half-buried, silently whispering the ancient stories woven into the everyday of this vibrant city. A juicy, decadent take on tropical fruits, flowers and woods inspired by a modernist garden in the balmy Yucat脙隆n, Tropical is a spritz of paradise  with notes of champaca blossoms, ripe guava, fresh ginger, Mexican vanilla and mahogany.

name: Indigo Smoke
style: Fresh, Fruity, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Fresh
description: May 1646, Wuyi Mountains, Fujian.For centuries, diligent monks in the Wuyi Mountains have grown tea and indigo plants in neatly terraced plantations. In 1646, their monasteries were attacked by Qing soldiers from the north. As the monks were forced to flee, they smoked batches of tea leaves over pinewood fire to preserve their crops. This would become the smoky lapsang souchong tea. Mixing with the fresh mountain air and the incense from nearby shrines, the intoxicating plumes of indigo smoke captured the colors of the Wuyi Mountains and their dramatic river narrows.Evoking the traditional smoking of tea leaves in ancient China, Indigo Smoke is an aromatic landscape of narrow serpentine rivers, blue mountains and incense-filled temples condensed into a complex formula of black tea, woody notes and incense. Rich, realistic and long-lasting. With notes of lapsang souchong tea, mandarin orange, apricot, guaiac wood, incense and pine tar.

name: Sydney Rock Pool
notes: Mineral Accord, Coconut Skin Accord, Australian Sandalwood, Driftwood, Narcissus Absolute, Frangipani, Jasmine Sambac, Seaweed, Ambermax, Sea Salt
style: Creamy, Floral - Light, Salty / Oceanic, Woody - Amber, Woody - Fresh
description: Golden Hour, January 2016, Sydney.The surf crashes against the sandstone rocks. Your skin glows in the warm sun underneath a blazing Australian sky. As you climb out of the water, a gentle breeze blows through the nearby jasmine and frangipani trees, mixing with the subtle scent of sea, salt and rock. Take the moment to soak it all up, and dive down under with this evocative fragrance. The smell of skin after a day at the beach, Sydney Rock Pool is a mineral, ambery, and subtly tropical scent evoking a perfect day on Sydney's stunning coastline, featuring notes of Australian sandalwood, coconut skin accord, driftwood, fragipani, seaweed, and salty ocean breeze.

name: Misfit
notes: Calabrian Bergamot, Carrot Seed, Angelica Root, French Lavender, Bulgarian Rose, Ambrette Seed, Akigalawood, Styrax, Patchouli (proprietary Combination Of Two Fractioned Essences), Spanish Cistus Concrete, Venezuelan Tonka Bean, Tolu Balsam
style: Earthy, Floral - Ambery Spice, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic
description: September 1877, Port of Marseille, France.In a bedroom in the City of Flesh, a Kashmiri shawl drapes decadently over the bed. Once extremely coveted, the shawls are now out of fashion with the bourgeois, their distinctive patchouli scent a victim of their downfall. Adopted by bohemians and courtesans, the fragrance mixes with French lavender, musky ambers and exotic balsams. With a new edge, and in the hands of misfits with style, the 芒聙聵undesirable芒聙聶 becomes desired again.Inspired by the 19th century courtesans and bohemians that embraced the scent of patchouli, Misfit won the Fragrance Foundation 2021 Award for Best Independent Perfume. A scent balanced between regal and rebel, where cashmere-like ambery notes smooth out the carnal earthiness associated with patchouli and counter-culture. In Misfit, what was once decadent is now made addictively desirable.

name: Venice Rococo
notes: Roman Chamomile, Turkish Rose Water, Hawthorne, Aldehydes, Powdery Accord, Moroccan Orange Flower, Black Violet, Cumin Essence, Animalic Amber, Iris Germanica, Civet Accord, French Jasmine
style: Animalic, Classic Feminine, Floral - Ambery Spice, Powdery / Soft
description: September 1757, Casino Venier, Venice.In a hidden alley in the heart of Venice lies a small ridotto, a secret apartment for intimate affairs. A rosewood door opens to a pastel-colored room of powder pink, pale green and pearl white. Suspended in a perfumed cloud of violet, rose and iris, stucco carvings of frothy clouds, delicate garlands and mischievous cherubs appear to dance in the gentle flicker of candlelight. Amidst this sensory haven, the strains of a mandolin emanate mysteriously from behind a wall, the musician concealed from prying eyes. The subtle background melody intertwines with the hushed conversations and shared laughter of two lovers, enveloping them in the enchantment of their clandestine encounter.Based on authentic 18th century cosmetic formulas, Venice Rococo is a coquettish, powdery floral capturing the decadence of the Venetian milieu, its pastel-colored interiors and libertine affairs. Black violet, blush rose, and chamomile nestled on an impossibly soft base of dusty iris and subtle, animalic amber.

name: Peau
notes: Ambergris, Musk, Clary Sage, White Pepper, Coriander, Sargassum, Leather-like Labdanum, Okoume Wood From Gabon, Ambermax
style: Powdery / Soft, Salty / Oceanic, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: AD 134, Villa Adriana, Tivoli, Italy.Such was the love emperor Hadrian had for his favorite Antino脙露s, that he commissioned thousands of sculptures to memorialize him after his demise. Like the contours of a statue, the physical and spiritual presence of the body is likewise defined by a fragrant silhouette. Here is the emperor recalling his lover: the touch and smell of him, the warm redolence of skin, the soft musk at the nape of the neck. Paying tribute to the beloved, like Hadrian did Antino脙露s, this fragrance features salty, peppery and musky notes that blend in to evoke intimacy, life and the idealized memory of skin.

name: Almond Suede
notes: Pink Peppercorn, Italian Bergamot, Honeycomb, Bitter Almond, Cistus Concrete, North African Neroli, Saffron, Orange Flower, Candied Sugar, Vanilla, Pine Tar, Suede
style: Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy, Sweet
description: December 810, C脙鲁rdoba, Al-Andalus / Sefarad, Spain.In the golden age of Al-Andalus, confectioners crafted almond marzipan of unparalleled delicacy. The secret lay in the whispered exchange between Moorish and Spanish kitchens, transforming recipes of almond flour, sugar, saffron and orange blossom into an art. Nearby, within the vibrant streets of C脙鲁rdoba, skilled artisans shaped leather into exquisite wonders. Thus, the velvety scent of marzipan commingled with the oaky C脙鲁rdoba leather, their crafts a symbolic bridge between cultures and traditions, proving that even in the crucible of diverse rule, the sweetest symphonies could emerge from shared traditions.Almond Suede is an addictive and sophisticated gourmand balancing almond marzipan and suede leather inspired by Medieval Andalusia, the city of C脙鲁rdoba and almond sweets. A must try for gourmand lovers and skeptics alike.

name: The Architect's Club
notes: Juniper Berry, Angelica Root, Bitter Orange, Lemon Sfumatrice, Italian Bergamot, French Clary, Lavender, Pink Peppercorn, Pepper Wood, Cardamom Seed Oil, Coriander Seed Oil, Blackcurrant Buds, Iris, Paraguayan Wood, Oak Wood Extract, Cedar Wood, Cypriol Oil, Haitian Vetiver, Vanilla Absolute, Ambermax, Ambrettolide
style: Creamy, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy, Warm
description: Cocktail time, March 1930, London.A group of architects gather for cocktails at Mayfair芒聙聶s smartest Art Deco smoking room. As they settle in the warm interior of dark woods, leather and velvet, London芒聙聶s bright young things burst in, frosted martinis in hand, surrounded by a cloud of laughter, white smoke and fine vanilla. A comforting, smoky amber and woods fragrance where blond tobacco and smoky vanilla mix with the crisp herbal notes of a gin martini.

name: A Grove by the Sea
notes: Adriatic Fig Leaves, Black Olive, Fleur De Sel, Croatian Clementine, Extra Virgin Olive Oil, Ripe Fig Fruit, Thyme, Rosemary, Mediterranean Pine Needle, Fir Balsam, Mediterranean Cypress, Red Clay
style: Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Salty / Oceanic, Woody - Fresh
description: August 1508, Lopud Island (Croatia), Adriatic Sea.Lopud is an evergreen island with lush fig and olive groves by the sea. From the port, dotted with Renaissance stone villas, the scent of fig and crushed olives is so strong that the salty sea breeze carries it beyond, towards forests of Mediterranean pine and cypress. Above, ancient chapels overlooking the harbor like sentinels are overgrown with wild thyme, fennel and rosemary. The whole landscape is an aromatic paradise of green fig, dried pine needles, wild herbs and the subtle, nutty scent of olive oil.Winner: BEST OVERALL NICHE FRAGRANCE - Marie Claire Fragrance Awards 2024

name: Molecule 01 + Cistus
notes: Iso-e Super, Cistus
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Dark, Woody - Fresh
description: Countless fragrance lovers have fallen for the almost irresistible pull of Molecule 01, which featured the subtly warm and velvety molecule Iso E Super to cocoon the wearer in a near-invisible aura of chic and seductive scent. M+ is the continuation of perfumer Geza Schoen's gift for impactful minimalism, an imagining of a unforgettable dance between Iso E Super and just one other beautiful, carefully chosen ingredient.In Molecule 01 + Cistus, Iso E Super meets the raw sensuality of Cistus. The result? Radiant depth. A haze of warmth, sheer and lasting. Cistus is a note that lingers like heat on the skin. Cistus is resin tapped from a wild Mediterranean shrub. Sticky, golden, intense. It smells of labdanum but brighter- amber with a sunlit edge. Smoky, mineral, with leathery undertones that ground the sweetness.

name: VAR
notes: South Indian Vetiver, Vetiver Hydro Distilled, Vetiver Haiti, Vetiver Absolute, Aragon Pine, Grass Accord, Cypriol, Mysore Sandalwood, Himalayan Sil Timur, Himalayan Silver Fir, Oud Laos
style: Green / Herbaceous, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: An olfactory journey into the forests at the foothills of the Himalayas, VAR is a woody aromatic like nothing ever attempted before in modern perfumery. Combining different absolutes of Indian vetiver with sustainably harvested rare Himalayan tree oils, VAR invites its wearer on a mountain expedition of the Far East. Tranquil, soothing and almost meditative, it is also a transport to lull your senses into a peaceful calm. VAR is a masterfully composed showcase of nature's finest materials as only Mallo can provide.

name: Meant To Be Seen
notes: Bergamot, Violet, Orris Butter, Moxalone, Civettone, Sandalwood, Ambrettolide, Akigalawood
style: Creamy, Floral, Floral - Light, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Fresh
description: There are moments when the world looks through you, when your presence softens, your voice quiets, and your radiance is dimmed by self-doubt or silence. Gorgeous and confident, yet tastefully subtle, Meant to Be Seen is born from those moments- a scent that anchors the light when you feel unseen.Meant To Be Seen opens with the delicate brightness of bergamot and the tender grace of violet, offering a breath of pure clarity. At its heart, the rich creaminess of iris butter intertwines with moxalone and a soft, animalic whisper of civet, creating a harmony where vulnerability refines itself into strength, delicate yet unwavering.The base grounds this luminosity with unexpected warmth. Sesame and sandalwood add a nutty, textured depth, while ambrettolide and akigalawood wrap the composition in a radiant, skin-like finish- soft, sensual, and lingering.Meant to Be Seen is more than a perfume- it is a declaration. For the quiet ones. For the dreamers. For those whose glow has been dimmed but never lost. This is the scent that finds you in stillness and reminds you: You were never meant to hide. You were always meant to be seen.

name: Discovery Set
description: Your chance to experience all five signature fragrances in the Toouch collection has arrived in the form of this elegant, uniquely presented Discovery Set, which reflects Toouch芒聙聶s distinctive fashion-forward aesthetic. Featuring generous 5ml atomizers perfect for gifting or travel, this set captures the unique balance of ancient culture, natural beauty, and modern energy that define Vietnam.This set collects the following 5 fragrances from the debut Toouch signature collection:Dreamy Nautica, Smoky Graze, Heritage Nuzzle, Deep Lullaby, & Creamy Tide.

name: Creamy Tide
notes: Lychee, Peach, Rice Milk, Apple Flower, Iris, Benzoin, White Musk, Vanilla
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Milky, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic
description: Creamy Tide feels like a slow, unhurried day in the Mekong Delta, where the sky and the water drift together in quiet harmony and everyone seems content to simply float along, unbothered by time. The fragrance opens with lychee and peach, fresh and juicy like biting into sun-warmed fruit. Their soft sweetness soon gives way to a smooth, milky rice accord that feels both creamy and serene. There is something deeply rustic in its heart: the scent of freshly cooked rice, a gentle sweetness lingering in the air, and the calm sensation of sitting on a small wooden boat as the breeze brushes your neck and the water laps softly against the hull.The drydown glides in with vanilla, iris, and white musk, tender and velvety like a light blanket resting on bare skin on a lazy morning- half-awake, unhurried, quietly blissful. Creamy Tide is a scent without occasion; it is something to wear whenever you wish to soften the rhythm of your heart, to wrap yourself in a pure, tranquil memory untouched by time or weather.

name: Smoky Graze
notes: Cinnamon, Coffee, Almond, Cocoa, Turkish Rose, Honey, Suede, Amber, Vanilla, Praline
style: Floral, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy, Sweet
description: Smoky Graze is the very essence of a just-waking Saigon at dawn. With the first mist in the air, it feels as though you芒聙聶re seated in an old caf脙漏, surrounded by the rich aroma of coffee intertwined with a quiet touch of warm cinnamon. It芒聙聶s that fleeting moment when you feel you could hold the entire morning in your hands, bustling yet unhurried, where every sound is wrapped in a creamy sweetness of almond, chocolate, and freshly bloomed Turkish rose.As the day settles, what lingers on the skin is a comforting, familiar warmth: soft leather, gentle amber, a hint of vanilla, and the indulgent trace of praline, coming together like a small love song meant to be heard alone. Is it a modern gourmand, an everyday unisex, a subtly elegant special occasion fragrance? Ultimately, none of that matters-  Smoky Graze is Saigon, bold yet tender, where every occasion becomes special, and every moment deserves to be beautifully scented.

name: Heritage Nuzzle
notes: Pear, Osmanthus, Green Tea, Camellia, Muguet, Jasmine, Vetiver, Cashmere Musk, Rosewood
style: Floral - Light, Fresh - Clean, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Light
description: There are Hanoi mornings when the sky still drifts in clouds, yet the Old Quarter already carries a soft, translucent nostalgia, as if every narrow corner holds the lingering warmth of green tea, gently entwined with the whisper of white blossoms brushing past your shoulder. In that delicate haze, time seems to slow: a cup of tea infused with jasmine, camellia, and lily of the valley, pure, serene, and tender, like someone芒聙聶s smile on the cusp of winter. It is this ethereal olfactive memory that Heritage Nuzzle so perfectly captures- a gentle, peaceful, and richly spiritual stillness that connects city, earth, and soul in sublime harmony.With a single breath, the noise of the outside world fades into a base of warm woods and vetiver, leaving on the skin a tranquil trace- subtle, effortless, and deeply calm. Heritage Nuzzle never seeks attention, nor tries to please; it simply exists, gently embracing you like a quiet whisper of tea and flowers, lingering just long enough to remind you what it feels like to be tenderly cherished in the heart of an old city.

name: Deep Lullaby
notes: Pine, Lavender, Mojito, Mulberry, Wild Rose, Mimosa, Tobacco Leaf, Charred Wood, Sandalwood
style: Floral - Light, Green / Herbaceous, Smoky, Woody - Fresh
description: If any scent could capture the essence of a highland afternoon just turning cool, it would be Deep Lullaby. Even before you take a full breath, it feels as if you芒聙聶re quietly walking up a mist-covered hill, hearing the soft whisper of pine trees and feeling the chill slip through your sleeves.It opens with a haze of lavender and a touch of light mojito, like the moment you open a window and a rush of fresh air awakens both your mind and your cheeks. Then, the fragrance deepens: ripe wild strawberries, wild roses, and golden mimosa mingle in the air, warm enough to soothe every burden, yet tender and wistful enough to make you want to sit still for a long time, without any reason at all.As the mountain town eases into night, notes of dried tobacco leaves, burning wood, and a trace of sandalwood all linger softly on the skin like the last breath of a long day.Deep Lullaby asks for nothing grand or ornate; it is simply gentle, like a lullaby from the highlands, making you want to fold away your weariness, sit quietly as the air grows colder, and let time drift by slowly.

name: Dreamy Nautica
notes: Apple Juice, Grapefruit, Neroli, Sea Salt, Aquatic Note, Metallic Musk
style: Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus, Metallic, Salty / Oceanic
description: Carefree, bright, and invigorating, Dreamy Nautica is the kind of aquatic scent that turns any day into a joyful adventure. It opens with a refreshing splash of crisp apple juice chilled over ice, brightened by slices of fresh grapefruit that lend a sweet芒聙聯tart sparkle to the senses. The first breath tingles at the back of the throat, like sipping a sunlit cocktail by the shore.A breeze drifts in from the open sea, carrying whispers of salt that gently settle over blooming neroli- pure white petals unfolding slowly, filling the chest with luminous calm and washing away all noise. The mind floats, weightless, like a buoy rocking freely on soft waves. As the fragrance settles, watery notes and metallic musk linger like the ocean芒聙聶s quiet afterglow, clean, liberating, and radiant on the skin.Dreamy Nautica isn芒聙聶t just a scent for some- it芒聙聶s a scent for anyone who craves the feeling of drifting free, of living by their own rhythm, unbound by rules or definitions.

name: Lu Bu
notes: Clove, Gunpowder, Armenian Paper, Iris, Blood, Black Vanilla Absolute, Tonka Absolute, Amyris Essence, Guaiac Essence, Almond, Cashmere Wood, Virginia Cedar Essence, Tolu Balsam, Hot Metal
style: Metallic, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Unusual / Unexpected, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Black and grey descend upon the plain. In the shadows of falling mists that cling to the hills, L脙录 Bu appears. He stands apart, a folded shadow, sublime fog at the end of battle. Nearly dead, once the most feared man of the Empire, son of iron and fire, betrayed by his own and traitor to the Kingdom, he is consumed by his own legend.In a dense, dark, and magnetic perfume, Sora Dora marks his rebirth today. Like an olfactory scar, the effluvia- direct, almost metallic- opens on a vivid, tannic clove, sketching in their trail the acridity of blood on a still-warm blade. When the heart beats louder, between the first shock and silence, a strip of Armenian paper burns while iris, noble and powdery, whispers the hero芒聙聶s solitude.More than glory and power, L脙录 Bu speaks of sacrifice and memory. A fragrance like an oath. One that does not seek to please. One that chooses you as a weapon chooses its warrior. Loyal to all who carry their shadows with pride. Whose presence is an epitaph. Whose silence is a declaration.To your battles.

name: Resplendent
notes: Saffron, Olibanum, Absinthe, Egyptian Jasmine, Chinese Osmanthus, Indian Tuberose, Sandalwood, Tonka Bean, Labdanum, Amber
style: Floral, Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - White, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Amber, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Resplendent is just as the name describes- a lustrous veil of shimmering intrigue, incense and rose. It's an elixir made of rare and exquisite ingredients smoldering in an imagined stone palace high in the mountains, a labyrinth of scented rooms and whispering voices. Secrets float on floral draughts. A woman in dark red silk, her face hidden by threads of gold and crimson looks out from a high balcony, behind her, shadows gather, woven from ghosts of scented love and the resistance of control. She is resplendent in her contemplation, her skin diffusing dewy white flowers and the piquancy of ancient spices. She may be a Queen or the phantom of one who still walks the floors of her sprawling palace.The frankincense that opens Resplendent is judged perfectly, lit by saffron and creamy ylang-ylang. The ruby glow of Resplendent and the complexity of its composition make it a truly beautiful scent to wear. It is a seductive performance of refinement, a perfume that consumes and wears on the skin like crimson silk. Our resplendent Queen may be contemplative, but she has an aura of spiced floral smoke that keeps her safe high in her fortress. Boadicea the Victorious perfumers are aware of impact and power, the priceless impact of perfumes that define and enslave us.

name: Lannosea
notes: Bergamot, Confit Lemon, Kholas Date, Pink Pepper, Rum, Coffee Bean, Litsea Cubeba, Fir Balsam, Orange Blossom, Wild Elderflower, Clean Leather, Cedar, Guaiac, Labdanum, Oakwood, Smokewood
style: Earthy, Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Citrus, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Spicy
description: Named after one of Boadicea芒聙聶s two daughters, Lannosea is a study in contrasts and a stylistically new fragrance for the brand. A journey from citrus dawn to woody dusk, Lannosea balances luminous brightness with earthy depth. Bergamot and confit lemon open the fragrance with sparkling clarity, while roasted coffee bean, litsea cubeba and elderflower absolute lend a wild, sun-drenched heart. The base of soft leather, oakwood and whispering smoke grounds the scent in a rich, smoky elegance that lingers like a hidden forest at dusk. The resulting fragrance is a joy to a wear, a scent that will stay with you like the memories of a first love.

name: Cor Serpentis
notes: Ozone, Acidic Ocean, Camphor Crystals, Blackcurrant, Pine Absolute, Alien Minerals, Vetiver
style: Avant-Garde, Green / Herbaceous, Metallic, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Cor Serpentis, 芒聙聵The Heart of the Snake芒聙聶, is the brightest star in the constellation of Serpens. In Ivan Yefremov芒聙聶s novella of the same name, the planet revolving around ?or holds a cool, shimmering, radioactive biome of purple icebergs and acidic oceans that is beautiful but nothing like ours 芒聙聰 in fact, deadly to humans. What would a living forest smell like in a world unimaginably distant and savage, powered by the light of a strange star? Would it have any resemblance to the smells of the Earth, be somehow relatable to us, earthlings? These questions are answered in Cor Serpentis, an alien woody fragrance from another solar system.A jungle in deep space 芒聙聰 imagined by St脙漏phanie Bakouche.

name: Moon Child
notes: Aldehydes, Raspberry, Stargazer Lily, Cool Metal, Smoky Gunpowder, Sandalwood, Musk, Moondust Accord
style: Avant-Garde, Floral - Light, Metallic, Unusual / Unexpected, Woody - Light
description: We are a species of explorers, always looking up into the sky and longing for worlds unknown 芒聙聰 moon children. That very emotion 芒聙聰 the need to go higher, further, faster than everyone else, to step where no man has stepped before 芒聙聰 is what fuels Moon Child, a perfume faced upwards like the blooms of a Stargazer lily.A floral aldehydic fragrance to make you soar, launched into space by St脙漏phanie Bakouche.

name: Rose Gambit
notes: Rose, Almond Milk, Roman Chamomile, Tobacco, Liatrix, Hay, Bitter Liqueurs, Chessboard Wood
style: Boozy, Floral - Light, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: In chess, a gambit is a strategic move where a player sacrifices a piece to gain advantage and, eventually, take control of the board. In Rose Gambit, the conventional prettiness of a rose is given up in order to achieve something more ambitious 芒聙聰 a fragrance charged with electricity, strong and precise like the ticking of a mechanical clock in a chess game.A woody rose to checkmate your expectations, deviously played by St脙漏phanie Bakouche.

name: Tansu Silk
notes: Blooming Osmanthus, Camphor Incense, Pink Pepper, Hinoki Cypress, Orris, Ambrette, Vintage Musks, Sandalwood
style: Floral - Spicy, Powdery / Soft, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Light
description: In Japan, it芒聙聶s customary to store one芒聙聶s things of value 芒聙聰 books and kimonos passed on from generation to generation 芒聙聰 in wooden chests known as tansu. A rare combination of beauty and utility, each tansu carries the history of the family it belongs to. The scent it exhales upon opening 芒聙聰 the warmth of precious textiles kept fresh by incense 芒聙聰 is at the core of Tansu Silk, a perfume imbued with golden patina of the past.A woody musk to keep your memories alive, gently preserved by Maria Golovina.

name: Empire T
notes: Tuberose, Champagne Accord, Cigarette Smoke, Cold Ash, Night Air, Vintage Fur
style: Floral - White, Smoky
description: There芒聙聶s an otherworldly quality to night-time Moscow, an eerie landscape of light and shadows, of sweeping towers and imposing facades 芒聙聰 a black and white empire not built to human scale. Its dramatic character is reflected in Empire T, a fragrance straight from a noir film, conjured up from night air and cigarette ash.A tobacco floral to find your way in the dark, lit up by St脙漏phanie Bakouche.

name: Hall Of Fame - Susannah's Picks
description: Featured on the 5th episode of our podcast,It芒聙聶s Just Perfume,Steve and Susannah discuss the unforgettable, best-of-the-best fragrances that they couldn't live without- a personal Hall Of Fame. And we've put together a perfect little Sample Pack so you can sniff along with them!Sussanah芒聙聶s Hall of Fame:1. Indult - Tihota2. Oddity - Delulu3. Papillon Artisan Perfume - Salome4. Sarah Horowitz - Perfect Veil5. Trudon - Mortel NoirBONUS!One of Susannah's most newest favorite, Infiniment CotyEncore Une Fois, while this vanilla gem didn't get a mention on the Pod... it made it here in time to be included as a complimentary sample. Enjoy!Listen and subscribe to our podcast 芒聙聯It芒聙聶s Just Perfume芒聙聯 available wherever you listen to podcasts!

name: Sylhet
notes: Lemongrass Lime, Jasmine Grandiflorum, Mint, Black Tea, Petitgrain, Geranium, Black Pepper, Katrafay, Galbanum, Aquilaria Agallocha (oud), Benzoin, Vanilla, Tonka Bean, Musk, Patchouli, Vetiver, Seaweed, Leather
style: Earthy, Exotic, Floral - Ambery Spice, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Sylhet, a region in the north of Bangladesh, borders the Assam tea estates of neighboring India. It is also the source of some of the world芒聙聶s most characterful oud, combining lightly sweet aromas of fruit and florals alongside notes of roasted coffee beans and dark chocolate. In Sylhet, Italian perfumer Antonio Gardoni creates a turbulent, earthy counterpoint to Ashar芒聙聶s glimmering rainshower flowers and greenery.Here, the rains soak deep into the earth, as patchouli and vetiver release the crushed scent of leaves trodden in the soil.

name: Ashar
notes: Kadam Flower, Ozonic Rain, Citrus, Bamboo, Fresh Green Rice Shoots, Green Tea, Animalic Accord, Salt Accord, Amber, Muguet, Musk
style: Animalic, Exotic, Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Clean, Green / Herbaceous, Salty / Oceanic
description: Shekor compositions are meant to capture the very soul and soil of Bangladesh. Ashar, composed by London-based Sultan Pasha, himself Anglo-Bangladeshi, is a personal memory of the unique scents stirred by the monsoon during a childhood rickshaw ride in Dhaka.It opens with the spray of fine rain on bamboo, ozonic, saline and green. As the ripe with overripe citrus fruit and flowers that have fallen off the branch. For a moment, the fragrance is still. Skies open and the monsoons drench the parched ground. rain striking dry earth before softening into green, humid florals. Ashar is the lush scent of the land awakening from its long sleep.

name: Discovery Set
description: Ready to revisit the golden age of perfumery? Try the incomparable Sultan Pasha perfumes in this convenient (and limited) sampler pack.

name: Doux Ennui
notes: Apricot Marmalade, Ylang Ylang, Peach, Salted Butter, Osmanthus, Vanilla, Benzoin
style: Creamy, Floral, Fruity, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet
description: Doux Ennui tells the story of Marie Antoinette through the simplest,yet most indulgent, of treats: salted butter and jam. This combination, spread on fresh brioche, is a contrast to the excesses of the French court; as a fragrance, it is as intoxicating as its inspiration.Apricot marmalade and ylang ylang blend into a peachy heart, smoothed over with a salted butter accord. Osmanthus, vanilla, and benzoin give the fragrance an addictive, rich drydown.

name: Ultra
notes: Neroli, Ylang Ylang, Narcissus, Jasmine, Floral Nectar, Leather, Hay, Tobacco, Resins
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic
description: To Hiram Green, the 1980s conjures up images of bold fashion with big shoulder pads, mullets, catchy synth music, and neon-hued interiors. The intense energy, confidence, and relentless optimism of the decade inspired the creation of Ultra, a vibrant and romantic bright green floral with all the nonstop verve of the go-go 80's.At the heart of Ultra shines a gorgeous and unique flower- the narcissus. Derived from an exquisite harvest of fresh flowers from Lozere, France, and extracted using a novel 100% bio-sourced solvent, its rich and radiant character brings to life the vibrant spirit of the times, both crisply green and warmly rustic. At the same time, the flower芒聙聶s name and its more narcotic, intoxicating facets also hint at something darker, recalling the Greek myth of Narcissus- a cautionary tale that was most likely lost on the hedonists of the decade. Caught between exotic and playful ylang-ylang and deep, animalic labdanum, the narcissus weaves a tale of exuberance, pleasure, and mystery that makes Ultra a luscious and alluring experience not to be missed.

name: Creme Ebene
notes: Cardamom, Cumin, Saffron, Atlas Cedar, Virginia Cedar, Medjool Date, Papyrus, Sandalwood, Patchouli, Vanilla, White Musk
style: Creamy, Earthy, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Spicy
description: Cr脙篓me 脙聣b脙篓ne is an enchanting fragrance which blends the majestic strength of precious woods with the addictive sweetness of creamy notes highlighted by leather and spices.A bouquet of spices, cardamom, cumin and saffron weaves a captivating, mysterious aura that opens onto a woody soul anchored by the noble elegance of cedar. A note softened by the sweet, velvety generosity of Medjool dates and creamy vanilla provides roundness and subtlety.This Eau de Parfum Intense ultimately reveals a deeper, darker facet. A refined leather infused with papyrus essence with slightly smoky accents blends with the earthy richness of patchouli, the milky warmth of sandalwood and the sensual touch of white musk for an enveloping and seductive attire. A textured elegance, both opulent and intimate, like a warm breeze on bare skin.

name: Otherwhere
notes: Green Cardamom, Pink Pepper, Juniper Berry, Almond Blossom, Strawberry Leaves, Violet, Caramel, Alaskan Cedar, Sandalwood, Olibanum Incense, Myrrh, Oud
style: Avant-Garde, Floral - Light, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Skin Scent / Minimal, Woody - Light
description: Introducing the Nostalgia SkinScent Collection, a trio of nostalgia-inspired Functional Fragrances developed using neuroscent technology to create a sense of comfort and personal intimacy. Built for layering, each Functional SkinScent blends seamlessly with your body's unique chemistry, evoking memories through gourmand notes and the subtle power of emotional recall. Wear them individually, as amplifiers, or layered together to create a scent story that feels personal- familiar, yet entirely your own.An ethereal journey to the now, shaped by everything that has come before, Otherwhere is the smell of skin, but better. Unlike other skin scents, yet familiar. Surprising, but grounding and comforting. Notes of caramel, gentle oud, sandalwood, cardamom, and incense create a unique and uncategorizable fragrance, reminiscent of the past, yet grounded in the present.

name: Past Time
notes: Black Pepper, Coconut Milk, Rhubarb, Ambrette, Musk, Amber, Haitian Vetiver, Wolfwood, Virginia Cedar, Sandalwood
style: Creamy, Powdery / Soft, Skin Scent / Minimal, Woody - Light
description: Introducing the Nostalgia SkinScent Collection, a trio of nostalgia-inspired Functional Fragrances developed using neuroscent technology to create a sense of comfort and personal intimacy. Built for layering, each Functional SkinScent blends seamlessly with your body's unique chemistry, evoking memories through gourmand notes and the subtle power of emotional recall. Wear them individually, as amplifiers, or layered together to create a scent story that feels personal- familiar, yet entirely your own.Past Time is abstract and enveloping. Amber resin leads with a rich, smoky sweetness lifted by creamy coconut milk, tart rhubarb, smooth sandalwood and a gently spicy vetiver. It lingers like a familiar thought at the edge of your mind- unnamable, but deeply felt.

name: First Milk
notes: Pink Pepper, Almond Milk, Iris, Cypriol, Musk, Amber Woods, Tonka Bean, Cashmere Woods
style: Floral - Light, Milky, Powdery / Soft, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: Introducing the Nostalgia SkinScent Collection, a trio of nostalgia-inspired Functional Fragrances developed using neuroscent technology to create a sense of comfort and personal intimacy. Built for layering, each Functional SkinScent blends seamlessly with your body's unique chemistry, evoking memories through gourmand notes and the subtle power of emotional recall. Wear them individually, as amplifiers, or layered together to create a scent story that feels personal- familiar, yet entirely your own.Delicate and comforting, First Milk blends almond milk, tonka bean, and iris with a whisper of pink pepper. It dries down to a cocoon of amber and cypriol. Sweet but never cloying, it melts into the skin with a subtle and intimate warmth- an evocative return to a foundational sense of closeness and comfort.

name: Exclusive Collection Discovery Kit
description: Embark on a thrilling and romantic globetrotting journey through the world of Fabbrica Della Musa with this exclusive Discovery Kit. This specially priced, perfectly giftable sample set contains generous 2ml atomizer spray samples of the six dynamic and enchanting extraits of the Exclusive Collection:Opera Infernal脙聨le BourbonOud TuaregTribeca VibesDynastyPiccadilly Hero

name: Tribeca Vibes
notes: Basil, Grapefruit, Cut Grass, Violet, Jasmine, Rose, Incense, Clove, Haitian Vetiver, Musk, Cetalox
style: Floral - Light, Fresh, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Fresh
description: In New York, every moment is alive with possibility, making it a city that never sleeps and always evolves. Tribeca Vibes reflects the essence of New York City, with a strong focus on the interplay of past and present that makes this megacity so unique. An innovative and modern green and mineralic floral given an energetic twist of woody and sparkling notes, it evokes the sexy and resilient spirit of the urban jungle. Cut grass and herbaceous basil combine with the effervescence of grapefruit, leading into a light, airy mineralic heart enhanced with delicate petals of jasmine and rose. In the sensual, comforting drydown, incense set against soft, comforting musk infuses a captivating duality, reflecting the ever-changing nature of the city, where tradition and trend co-exist harmoniously. Blending past and present, nostalgia and modernity, Tribeca Vibes is as dynamic as NYC itself.

name: Piccadilly Hero
notes: Pear, Orange Flower, Apple, Praline, Cherry, Violets, Egyptian Geranium, Lavender, Sri Lankan Black Tea, Solar Flower, Pink Pepper, Sandalwood, Guaiac Wood, Vanilla, Leather, Balkan Tobacco, Saffron, Patchouli
style: Floral - Spicy, Fruity, Smoky, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: From Piccadilly to Carnaby Street, London pulses with fashion, blending individuality, provocation, and confidence. A bold and stylish woodsy scent with a gorgeous cherry soul, Piccadilly Hero captures the spirit of fashion capitals, with a particular focus on London and the way fashion comes to life on the streets. Gourmand and fruity, it opens with an opulent cherry note paired with mouthwatering praline. In the fresh and smoky heart, a cool touch of tobacco blends with the smokiness of black tea, creating a deeply powerful and elegant impression that leads into the creamy, woody sandalwood and vanilla drydown. Like the London fashion scene itself, Piccadilly Hero fearlessly embraces boldness, breaking conventions with natural ease and delivering a signature worthy Extrait for anyone with fashion in their soul.

name: Dynasty
notes: Bergamot, Ginger, Mandarin, Melon, Orange, Cypress, Tea, Neroli, Jasmine, Magnolia, Lavender, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Ambrox, Cinnamon, Cashmere Wood, Nutmeg, Musk

description: In ancient Asia, craftsmen viewed their work as art, weaving silk as fine as moonlight and embroidering stories of dragons and lotus flowers. These fabrics were more than clothing; they reflected the deep bond between man and nature. In the nearby kitchens, spices like turmeric and saffron turned meals into culinary journeys, passed down through generations. Dynasty pays tribute to this legacy of tradition, craftsmanship, and skill with an intriguing interpretation of a classic fougere filtered through a unique blend of fruit, spices, and tea, creating a zesty and richly meaningful fusion of both east with west, and vintage with modern- a distinctive and unforgettable ode to legacy and artistry.

name: Ile Bourbon
notes: Somalian Incense, Caramel, Clove, Guatemalan Cardamom, Chocolate STT, Madagascan Vanilla
style: Creamy, Exotic, Smoky, Spicy, Sweet
description: A trubute to the majestically untouched landscape in the middle of the Indian ocean, 脙聨le Bourbon is a stunningly exotic gourmand crafted like an expedition's diary- a smoky and mysterious adventure into the rich chocolate heart of Reunion. Just as the explorers ventured into the unknown in the 17th century, the journey is  a sensory adventure through an island's unspoiled luxurious nature.In a burst of warm spices, vanilla, clove, and cinnamon, 脙聨le Bourbon unfolds its senses in the island's mystical forests, where the mist of woods芒聙聶 essence intertwines with a whisper of earthy wilderness.

name: Oud Tuareg
notes: Ginger, Mandarin, Myrrh, Taif & Damascena Roses, Oud, Sandalwood
style: Exotic, Floral - Ambery Spice, Woody - Amber, Woody - Dark, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Draped in an emblematic indigo turban, Oud Tuareg pays homage to the Tuareg's blue symbolism, connecting the codes of their culture with the timeless art of living in the desert. At the heart of this elixir lies an enigmatic oasis town, a desert jewel. The memory of ancient caravans infuses it-a tale of boundless wealth shared generously.As treasured as gold, Oud Tuareg unveils the sheer fragrant opulence of real oud paired with modern rose, warm sandalwood, and hints of mandarin and ginger. It radiates with the alluring, enduring spirit of the Sahara's enchanting mystique, the desert's whispered secrets, and the resplendent legacy of kings.

name: Opera Infernal
notes: Calabrian Bergamot, Pineapple, Egyptian Geranium, Magnolia, Haitian Vetiver, Praline
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Spicy, Fruity
description: Opera Infernal channels the vibrant spirit of Latin America, where the rhythm of tango music flows through the streets, and a sensual, artistic energy seems to float in the very air. Drawing inspiration from a volcano eruption, its fire and molten lava ribbons, the scent captures a fervent energy that crescendos with emotion and freedom.The deep-dark red flacon recalls the red velvety opera stage curtains and the captivating allure of Carmen's dress. Like an opera in two acts, the fragrance opens with sweet, juicy pineapple before embracing the intense floral heart of the scent. Infused with a unique combination of praline & vetiver, it adds a fiery intensity and provocative sensuality that lingers with the enchanting sillage.Ignite your senses, embrace the crackling fire of Opera Infernal and let the undying power of Havana's streets set your soul ablaze.

name: Maniac
notes: Raspberry, Green Apple, Clementine, Lemon, Mint, Strawberry, Coconut Milk, Ambrette, Ambroxan, Brown Sugar, Vanilla Bean, Ambergris, Musk, Sandalwood
style: Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Gourmand, Green / Herbaceous, Sweet
description: A vibrantly juicy explosion of a full year's harvest of fresh fruit, Maniac will drive you absolutely crazy- but only in the best possible way. Imagine the irresistible tartness of fresh raspberries and sweet strawberries, perfectly blended with crisp green apple and clementine. A subtle whisper of mint enhances the freshness, while vanilla beans and ambergris add depth and allure. Bold, intoxicating, playful yet refined, Maniac is a delightful fragrance crafted to leave a lasting impression and captivate those who experience it.

name: Bright Aura
notes: Lavender, Bergamot, Grapefruit, Apple, Basil, Artemisia, Juniper, Ambergris, Green Apple, Lilac, Ambrette, Musk, Oakmoss, Virginia Cedar, Sandalwood
style: Fougere, Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: Crisp, green, and bold, the legendary foug脙篓re is a true icon in the world of fragrances dating back well over a century. With Bright Aura, Ibrahim Fuhaid brings his marvelous touch to the timeless genre, presenting a vibrant and delightful unisex foug脙篓re that radiates both luxurious elegance and ebullient wonder.It opens with a bright, invigorating blend of lavender, grapefruit, crisp apple, and bergamot, fresh and full of energy. As it evolves, the heart reveals a deeper, more aromatic layer of basil, wormwood, juniper berries, and cinnamon leaves, adding intrigue and warmth. Finally, it settles into a rich, lasting base of Virginia cedarwood, creamy sandalwood, oakmoss, amber seeds, and the rare depth of natural ambergris, leaving behind a lingering, magnetic aura that stays with you long after the moment has passed.

name: Cry Baby
notes: Milk, Strawberry, Forest Fruits, Powdery Notes, Caramel, Woody Notes
description: Sweet and nostalgic, 芒聙聹Cry Baby Perfume Milk芒聙聺 captures the spirit of the girl who is playfully innocent, but conceals an irreverent edge. The first impression is a complicity of dark fruity notes, while strawberry milk and a lipstick accord are layered to contrast the dark fruits. The heart of Cry Baby Perfume Milk invites you to experience innocent darkness while Melanie芒聙聶s childhood memories are evoked through a soft, nostalgic baby lotion accord. Feminine yet mischievous and unapologetic, the base of the fragrance is wrapped in a sweet layer of burnt caramel complimented by a blend of sinister woods.

name: Moonwalk Seacoco
notes: Italian Mandarin, Iced Lemon, Pineapple Sugarloaf, Passionfruit, Madagascar Ginger, Seychelles Seacoco, Whipped Cream, Comores Vanilla Extract CO2, Indian Sandalwood, Lemon Zest

description: A fragrant journey connecting golden sandy beaches across continents, Moonwalk Seacoco entices us into a mouthwatering pavlova reimagined with a tropical twist. On first spray, Hawaiian Sugarloaf pineapple reveals its pearly-white flesh, tender and uniquely sweet. Its tangy freshness rises like a tropical wave, bright and juicy, evoking the colorful markets of the islands. Then comes natural ginger from Madagascar, with its lively, spicy facets. Harvested from generous red earth, it breathes a fiery impetus, a golden warmth that awakens the senses and imbues the journey with spicy sensuality. From the heart of the Seychelles, the mysterious sea coco offers milky-smooth, almost creamy notes that envelop the fragrance in a caressing veil. Finally, the olfactory journey ends in Italy, where lemon frapp脙漏 washes over the fragrance with its zesty, lively, thirst-quenching brilliance. Combined with mandarin orange and a hint of Comoros vanilla, it provides a luminous, refreshing contrast. Simple, sunny and irresistibly sparkling, Moonwalk Seacoco is a sheer burst of tropical gourmand delight.

name: Powder Love

style: Floral - Light, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: Powder Love is the fragrance of a dreamy haze, a soft embrace, a refined accord, a sweet nostalgia. Powder Love is an airy whisper, a cloudy kiss, a fluffy caress. Immersed in a pink fantasia, the trail of Powder Love swirls into the air, stretching into cotton candy clouds across an endless pastel sky, morphing into orange blossom flowers, and landing on a bed of sweet, pillowy marshmallow. Coated in sugared almond, it all melts into an orgasmic alchemy where powdery musk lingers like the sweetest of memories. A dreamy fragrance that gently wraps your body, and sweeps your mind into a deliciousr脙陋verie, Powder Love is a cloud of pure bliss.

It's a soft and strong feeling at the same time. You're on the edge, and the chemistry is about to unfold. Wear it when you feel the need to reset the meters and bring everything back into balance.

name: I Fig You

Boasting a robust, naturalistic blend of smooth green tea, fresh herbs and aromatics, and the essence of a living, growing tree, it wears beguilingly close to the skin, inviting others in with a slyly vivacious panache. A contagious and lively celebration of new life and our living planet, I Fig You is for those who treasure freedom above all.

name: Sel A Vie
notes: Mandarin, Sweet Orange, Ylang Ylang, Jasmine, Tiare, Sea Salt, Driftwood, Vanilla Infusion
description: Sel 脙聙 Vie captures a summertime romp in the height of the midday sun-  your hair tangled in salty water, waves crashing in without warning, skin soaked in sun cream, and the unmistakable nostalgia of summer romance. A vividly bright squeeze of fresh orange juice on top of a joyfully tropical floral bouquet, kissed by the salty energy of an ocean breeze and sweetened with indulgently creamy vanilla, it's a euphoric and richly evocative portrait of sheer happiness. Whether you're riding the waves in mid-summer or simply looking for a serotonin boost when the days are shorter and cooler, Sel 脙聙 Vie is, we might say, a whole vibe.

Immerse yourself in a cocoon of gorgeously soft hazelnut, spiked with fiery spice and cooled with milky sandalwood that leaves a luminous trail as if at the end of a long cosmic journey. Uninhibited, uncategorizable, and utterly free, Milky No Way is unlike anything else out there- a true signature scent for those who dream of the cosmos.

You feel just right. Wear it anytime you dream of escaping into another dimension of pure serenity.

name: Creme Brulante

Wear it to warm the moment and awaken nostalgic, gourmet memories all your own.

name: Oceano Viola

style: Avant-Garde, Earthy, Floral, Green / Herbaceous, Salty / Oceanic, Woody - Fresh
description: In the heart of the third part of Twin Peaks The Return, the violet ocean emerges as a cosmic threshold, fluid and luminous. A sea without defined limits. An expanse vibrating with purple and mystery. David Lynch presents it as womb of pure consciousness, origin of being, and dissolution of identity. Oceano Viola is a fragrance born of a gesture already fulfilled: it gathers the light of paintings and amplifies the vibration of Lynch芒聙聶s ocean. Translating that vision into scent, into subtle presence, the fragrance preserves another existence with the dramatic patience of the iris: its rhizome, fleshy and horizontal, absorbs waiting and transforms it into aromatic memory. Years pass before its fragrance rises to the surface. And it is precisely this long gestation that grants it depth.

name: Thebes
notes: Bergamot, Muguet, Aldehydes, Rosemary, Orris Butter, Rose, Jasmine, Musk, Vetiver, Amber, Ambergris, Oakmoss, Animalics
style: Earthy, Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Spicy

A complex fragrance for those seeking inner truth and solace, or just olfactive pleasure, it delivers both with impeccable balance, with a somber, earthy vetiver note and a rooty dose of real orris contrasting fascinatingly with a bright, uplifting jasmine, muguet and rose bouquet. Hauntingly beautiful, stunningly sophisticated, Thebes is luxury perfume as pure art- an elegantly wearable portrait of beauty and a spiritual journey to worlds beyond.

Quintessentially Amber is designed to be a truly kaleidoscopic amber, one that uses all of the various elements of the amber genre together in harmony. And it more than delivers on that promise- warm, resinous, creamy, spicy, sweet, salty, camphoric and smoky all at once, it's a dynamic and richly layered amber fragrance of untold depths, impossibly complex but intricately structured so as to never feel heavy, with a festive and joyful flair that make it the perfect accompaniment to an elegant outfit or special occasion. Amber lovers, rejoice- Quintessentially Amber may indeed be The One you've been waiting for.

Built around an exceptional lavandin enfleurage, it begins with very fresh aromatics and citruses, and transitions to warm, radiant hay and sweet earth. It is far from simplistic though, and a satisfying base of resins, clary sage and leather intertwines this surprisingly long-lasting fragrance.

description: A radiant celebration of citrus and resin, Yuzu Cologne captures the brightness of dawn with the depth of natural materials. The opening shines with the sharp, sparkling freshness of Japanese yuzu, softened by the balsamic clarity of elemi. This luminous accord sets the stage for a fragrance that is both invigorating and refined. At the heart, the rare marine-mineral facets of ambergris meet the golden sweetness of Siam benzoin, creating a sensual warmth that contrasts beautifully with the brightness of the top notes. The base reveals a sophisticated depth: the resinous mystery of Trat oud blended with the soft, comforting roundness of vanilla. Together they anchor the composition, leaving a smooth yet powerful trail on the skin.Yuzu Cologne is more than freshness 芒聙聰 it is a dialogue between light and shadow, citrus and resin, vitality and calm. A contemporary cologne with the unmistakable character of Bortnikoff.

name: Siberia
notes: Bergamot, Black Pepper, Orange, Pink Pepper, Benzoin, Musk, Oakmoss, Vanilla, Burma Oud, Cedarwood

This vivid, energetic accord evokes the sharp clarity of frosty air. At the heart, warmth emerges: benzoin and vanilla weave a soft, resinous sweetness, balanced by the earthy green texture of oakmoss and the sensual presence of  musk. Cedarwood lends dry, smoky elegance, while Burma oud adds a profound depth- dark, resinous, and meditative.Siberia is both luminous and powerful: a contrast between freshness and density, clarity and shadow. A bold, elemental creation for those drawn to untamed nature.

At the heart, cedarwood lends its dry, smoky elegance, while the presence of hyraceum deepens the texture with its wild, resinous facets. Tonka bean brings warmth and nuance, balancing the animalic tones with soft almond-like sweetness. In the base, the fragrance finds its true obsession: the bold, enveloping aroma of freshly roasted coffee, enriched by sensual musk. This finale is both intimate and magnetic, leaving a lasting impression of power and refinement.Manie du Caf脙漏 is an ode to contrasts 芒聙聰 animalic yet comforting, wild yet inviting. A perfume for those who seek intensity and character, wrapped in the familiar warmth of coffee.

name: Cafe Des Delices

The warmth of the bean rounds out upon contact with a golden, crisp, melting, almost caramelized biscuit. Then vanilla gently glides in, enveloped in tonka bean with hints of praline and hazelnut. The whole rests on a cloud of velvety musk, which prolongs the pleasure, like the scent of warm linen or beloved skin. Gourmet without excess, warm without heaviness, Caf脙漏 des D脙漏lices is a sweet interlude, a fragrance that comforts as much as it seduces. An olfactory madeleine to savor at any time.

name: The Abandoned Mansion
notes: Cedar, Quince, Petitgrain, Pimento Berry, Oakmoss Absolute, Ambreine, Old Paperback Book Accord

description: "Aimless twenty-somethings Calvin and Millie didn芒聙聶t mean to drop off the face of the earth but when they stumbled onto an abandoned mansion while hiking in the Adirondacks, that芒聙聶s just what they did. Lounging in the autumn light and lost among the stacks of paperbacks they decided to weather the winter in their found fortress. Spring brought hordes of wildlife, both indoors and out, but no sign of other humans (other than the one growing in Millie芒聙聶s belly). It would be another four years before the burgeoning family would be forced out of their assumed home but they don芒聙聶t plan to leave without putting up a fight."

name: In The Belly Of The Beast
description: "Today I remembered the only way out is through. I read the Salt Mountain芒聙聶s thirst for water. I found the tears the world couldn芒聙聶t hold enclosed inside me. A bottle balancing a ship that sailed years ago. I think I recall my name now. I scream it at 52-hertz but nobody can hear. My ceiling is rotten ice, the plank I had to walk on- they now carry to me. It shall be my blanket. I try to fall asleep and wonder, Do androids dream of electric sheep?"

name: Ichigo Ichie
