description: "Today I remembered that one time芒聙娄 and all the things that got lost in translation.The abandoned theme park and the burnt bridge with the two missing links. Us having to not look back芒聙娄Leaving your favorite film case on a hotel desk and me losing the 24 photos I took of you in that never-ending rush.Then the empty train stations. The new places, travels, and so-called homes that life took me and you on.We were there when quantum entanglement was proven, we just didn芒聙聶t know it yet. Only years later芒聙娄It was just one moment. Just one lifetime.And there were many glimpses of beauty along the way."

description: "Today I remembered there is but one truly serious question.I芒聙聶ve grown resentful of all of this, I芒聙聶m done pretending I like cake, done counting the days.Done searching for grains of zenith at the bottom of the barrel.I made it a long way for somebody with a short fuse anyway. Ran, then walked, then crawled. All for a roadside picnic?Make a wish they said. Any wish, they keep saying芒聙娄Few of them even know what they wish for.My happiest days are probably behind me. A battlefield of fleeting fireworks spurs in front.Flickering lights are born - then gone before I can even think.In the distance a big boulder starts rolling on the hill.I remainundecided."

name: Annacamento

I looked at you like a kid seeing the sea for the first time.Or me seeing it the last.If you look back at that beauty, you芒聙聶ve most likely already lost it. Or is it me?Douce melancholy breeze, of summers never lived, of places never been, of sunshine melting skin.You cast such a shadow.Take a seat. Have a treat.Hurry up. We are late."

description: "Today I remembered people coming together. For thousands of years I observed them take part in the same congregation. The elders going silent, no longer being able to hear the same tune.This unsound dance passed on to the next generation.A stranger tells me to read their lips. 芒聙聹Words don芒聙聶t matter芒聙聺.Darkness harbors truth while the melody nurtures my long distance relationship with sleep.Go with inertia. Dance the absurd.But dance without love is as hollow and ridiculous as love without dance.Yet at standstill, we self-destruct."

name: Pining Dew 2

Only very specific ones, however. His human partner would not like how they would ferment, and they couldn芒聙聶t speak the same tongue. I guess nothing makes sense when you are in love, and little more matters when you are drunk on it.The days that followed I went swimming so often. Sometimes it felt like waves of lavender bringing sleep, more often though it was tides of gin & tonic drowning it. There were always tears at the end, burning my cheek and salting my glass. But there is no end."

name: Empty Wishes Well

Father told me the holy water font became mouldy. Marble cracked and prayers turned to dust on walls.But I still have my hope. I know rain will come and I will melt in the soil I walked on and nature will bring nurture. And more shall live again."

The linens smelled so calm. It was spring and the garden by our hotel room was in full blossom. I remember playing with my toys, staying inside芒聙娄. It was never-ending, unlike the rides.I remember the screams and their hugs. Twenty years fly by but I don芒聙聶t seem to芒聙娄"

And when most prepared for the warmth, I was stuck chasing it.Mourning.I wasn芒聙聶t home, I wasn芒聙聶t present then and there芒聙娄when I visit those old places, I step gentler on our roots芒聙娄芒聙娄we had so much more to speak about.But I was a child for the longest time. I know you would say that isn芒聙聶t such a bad thing.It passed.A sea of darkness followed it. That will pass too.I am the son of the whitest flower and the blackest leaves. I am the abandoned home searching for its lost keys.I allow the light you left inside of me to burn free.And I thank you."

It芒聙聶s a tribute to Room 1015's 10th anniversary, taking the original spark, the lacquered wood, the cool touch of metal, the synthetic lining of an open guitar case and cranking it all the way up. Like a guitar solo that rises, bends, and finally bursts into flames, Electric Wood Extrait is pushed it to the limit: amplified, distorted, and intensified until it芒聙聶s wilder, deeper, and electrifying.

Now, a new legend rises as Elysium Noir casts the iconic freshness of the Elysium accord into shadow. A darker, more sensual expression of a modern classic, this is paradise after midnight. A bold evolution of the original accord, this creation unveils a deeper, more seductive sillage 芒聙聰 crafted for the man who moves effortlessly from day into night and never relinquishes control.Infused with the carnal appeal of sensually smooth leather and musks while adding the addictively juicy allure of blackberry, Elysium Noir retains the freshness of its precursor while introducing a sensuality that balances refinement with raw power. A new era of modern haute perfumery, ELYSIUM NOIR is for the man who rules his own reality.

name: Vanilla Haze - Extrait

description: Vanilla Haze just got louder. This "XDP" extrait is the after-hours version of the EDP. It is stronger, bolder and unapologetically intense. Think late nights, locked eyes, and a hint of mischief in the air. It kicks off with a sharp twist of lemon, wrapped in toasted hazelnut and coconut milk that make it creamy, zesty and irresistible. Things get warmer when smooth vanilla meets smoky tonka, clove, and the sensuality of cashmeran. It all melts down to a base that lingers like a saffron, caramel, musky skin with a final touch of bourbon-laced vanilla. This isn't your typical vanilla. It芒聙聶s spiked, smoked, and turned all the way up. It芒聙聶s for those who lean into the night, who like a little danger with their elegance.It芒聙聶s made for you.

name: Above The Waves
notes: Taiwanese Oolong, Ceylon Black Tea, Green Mate, Bergamot, Cardamom, Incense, Rose, Tonka Bean, Patchouli, Vetiver, Cedar
style: Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Fresh
description: A luminous tribute to Mazu, the guardian of sea and sky, Above The Waves follows the pilgrim's path through Taiwan in a wave of devotion. Sparkling bergamot and the spiced clarity of cardamom rise with sacred incense, while green mate and Ceylon black tea swirl with the soft bloom of rose. In the base, tonka bean, patchouli, cedar, and vetiver combine to anchor the scent with strength and serenity- a fragrant blessing of protection, connection, and joy.

name: Coro
notes: Tropical Fruits, Orris, Jasmine, Pineapple, Mango, Vanilla, Musk, Sandalwood, Amber
style: Fruity, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy, Woody - Fresh
description: Coro is a scent with an invigorating energy. Its vibe is that of an early riser, a go-getter who is ready to take on the world. Curtains drawn at dawn to bask in the glory of another new day, hikes to the summit and back before lunchtime. Its energizing freshness is its defining feature, a result of its purposefully curated composition.Part of the Vibe collection, Coro comes with a gorgeous additional gift- an elegant silk foulard scarf. Designed by Xerjoff, made by the renowned silk weavers of Como, sprayed and styled by you to match your vibe.

name: Tropiques
notes: Bergamot, Mandarin, Tropical Fruits, Lavandin, Mahonial, Rosyfolia, Caramel, Amber, Musk
style: Fresh - Aquatic, Fruity, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy
description: Tropiques: a charismatic elixir for the bold explorer, capturing the essence of hidden paradises. A vibrant infusion of mandarin and papaya, entwined with subtle roses, it's a scent that dances on the skin like sunlight. Crafted by Fragrance Du Bois with innovative molecules, it mirrors the allure of native flowers and the ocean's embrace, finishing with a warm amber and musk caress. Perfect for the bold and the sun-kissed, Tropiques is your passport to paradise.

name: Nearly Nude
notes: Wild Oats, Bubble Bath, Clean Skin, Linden Blossom, Oat Milk, Iso-e Super, Benzoin, Ambroxan, Sheer Musk
style: Fresh - Clean, Milky, Skin Scent / Minimal, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Imagine freshly bathed, warm skin wrapped in a layer of delicately sweet oat body cream. It芒聙聶s fresh. It's soft. Nearly Nude is a fragrance designed to bloom on the skin with a fluid effortlessness.Nearly Nude opens with the freshness of wild oats and a soft bubble bath accord. A delicate bloom of linden flower mingles with the scent of clean skin, capturing the essence of being freshly bathed. Creamy oat milk and golden benzoin add a gentle sweetness, comforting and quietly addictive. Ambroxan, iso e super, and skin musk melt together seamlessly, enhancing your natural warmth.

name: Centerfold
notes: Milk Chocolates, Amaretto-soaked Cherries, Almond Brittle, Praline, Mimosa, Pretty-girl Musk, Styrax, Fancy Mixed Nuts, Patchouli
style: Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet
description: It芒聙聶s a fantasy. The girl in the centerfold doesn芒聙聶t exist. She芒聙聶s like a dream. -Dorothy StrattenA blushing confection wrapped in rich marzipan and cocoa-patchouli icing floats in on a warm amaretto cloud, settling into a pretty-girl skin scent that lingers in soft focus. The nose behind this fragrance is Nose Candy podcast芒聙聶s Maddie Phinney.

name: Mango Mania
notes: Mango, Davana, Salt, Peach, Osmanthus, Ambergris, Patchouli
style: Fruity, Salty / Oceanic, Sweet
description: Sweet, exotic, seductive. A bright and juicy explosion of ripe mango and velvety peach blend in a sunny embrace, sweet but never cloying. An unexpected, salty note emerges like a breath of wind, unobtrusive. It is that hint of mystery that gives depth to the sweetness. Finally, notes of osmanthus and amber add a touch of refinement and class to the fragrance.

name: Delicious Rice Milk
notes: Rice Milk, Oats, White Flowers, Green Leaves, Hazelnut, Vanilla, Light Woods
style: Creamy, Floral - White, Gourmand, Milky, Sweet, Woody - Light
description: A fragrance that envelops the senses like a soft and delicate caress, but with a delicious and enveloping character. The creamy delicacy of rice milk glides over the skin with its soft and clean sweetness. Then come the white flowers, which rest gracefully on the rice milk, lending class and sensuality. Finally, notes of hazelnut and vanilla add a delicious, warm, and enveloping touch, blending perfectly with the rice milk.

name: Warm Air
notes: Geranium Essence, Roasted Caramel, Rhum Extract, Davana Essence, Vapor, Amber Woods, Cashmere Woods, Grey Amber
style: Animalic, Boozy, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Skin Scent / Minimal, Woody - Fresh
description: Lovers' body heat in sync.Soft musk and tonka melt into the skin,capturing the warmth of skin-to-skin contact.Warm Air opens with a flash of bright geranium, metallic and clean. It quickly melts into roasted caramel, rum extract, and beguiling davana- syrupy and strange, rich but never heavy. Then comes a transformation: vapor rises, air takes shape. Amber woods and cashmere wrap around a core of grey amber, creating a molecular hum. Warm Air is an abstraction- textural, sensual, and provocatively synthetic.

name: Gold Juice
notes: Rhubarb, Durian, Mango, Osmanthus Absolute, White Flowers, Solar Notes, Caramel, Almond, Gaiac Wood
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy
description: Durian and mango in wild collision.Sweet, funky, radiant chaos.A golden scent on the edge of control.Gold Juice is all about contrast. Sharp rhubarb and the pungent bite of the exotic durian fruit open the fragrance with a visceral, sensual, mouthwatering intensity, giving way to a surprisingly gentle heart- osmanthus absolute and a bouquet of delicate white florals glowing with solar warmth. But then the base tells an altogether new story: caramelized almond and woodsy gaiac blend into a dark nectar, ripe with danger. A seductive and bewitching treat you can't quite wrap your arms around, Gold Juice is addictive either in spite of itself- or perhaps because of it?

name: Musc X
notes: Olibanum Resionoid LMR, Cistus Absolute, Cotton Candy, Ambroxan, Ambrexteme, Benjoin Resinoid LMR, Ambrette Absolute LMR, Cocktail Of Musks, Sinfonide
style: Fresh - Clean, Powdery / Soft, Skin Scent / Minimal, Sweet, Woody - Dark
description: The scent of skin, memory, and closeness.A trace of your lover left behind.Warm, musky, and deeply sensual.Musc X opens with a soft pulse: ambrette and incense curl around the skin like heat rising. As it unfolds, resinous notes of benzoin and labdanum bloom into a heart of warm musk, sweetened just enough with a cloud of mouthwatering cotton candy. But it's in the richly seductive base that things really get sexy- AmberXtreme and Sinfonide crash into each other in a rush of chemical heat and carnal vibration. Musc X doesn't aim to please; it dares to seduce, leaving an indelible mark on your memory.

name: Cuvee Skin
notes: Ambrette Absolute, Oakmoss Absolute, Vanilla Orchid, Tonka Bean Infusion, Tonka Bean Absolute, Tonka Bean Resinoid, Blond Woods, White Leather
style: Floral - Light, Fresh - Clean, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Light
description: Champagne on bare skin.Effervescent, teasing, and intimate.A soft sparkle that warms into the rhythm of your body.Cuv脙漏e Skin opens with the soft, pear-like musk of ambrette seed, balanced with the earthy, subtle tension of oakmoss. It quickly melts into the creamy, velvety richness of a full spectrum of tonka- infused, absolute, and resinoid- layered with vanilla orchid and soft, supple suede. As it settles, blond woods and white leather emerge, enveloping the skin in a second, invisible layer. Sensual, persistent, and intimately addictive, Cuv脙漏e Skin doesn't perfume the body- it becomes it.

name: Candy Dust
notes: Bergamot Essential Oil, Insolent Raspberry, Juicy Pear, Pink Dragibus, Milk, Sensual Peony, Powdered Sugar, Moss, Orcanox, Tonka Bean
style: Creamy, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: Spun sugar and neon dreams.Cotton candy swirls in the air, sweet & addictive.A nostalgic sugar rush.Candy Dust opens with a burst of tart raspberry and pear, made electric with a crackling bergamot. The heart swirls into candied dragibus (gummy snacks) and smooth, creamy milk, grounded in the powdery petals of a peony blossom. Then, a plunge: a cloud of powdered sugar, moss, and tonka bean fuses with Orcanox musk, adding depth behind the fluff. Candy Dust is a confection with confidence- cloudlike, but sharp. Feminine, but feral. One spray and you're hooked.

name: L'air du Desert Marocain Noir
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Petitgrain, Spices, Labdanum, Leather, Jasmine, Amber Gris, Oakmoss, Cedarwood, Vetiver, Patchouli
description: There are moments in life when scent becomes memory, and memory becomes a place. Twenty years ago, I created L芒聙聶Air du D脙漏sert Marocain, inspired by a memory that stayed with me: lying on a narrow bed in a simple Moroccan hotel room, the window open to the warm evening air. The life of the city drifted in with spices from the souk, smoke from distant fires, the sweetness of pastries, and above all, the breath of the desert, dry, warm, infinite. That moment became a perfume.After many years, I revisited L芒聙聶Air du D脙漏sert Marocain again. As a perfumer, I have created many fragrances, but I have always had a soft spot for Air du D脙漏sert Marocain. Over the years, I often thought about my desert perfume, and the night in the desert was one of many lines of thought. How the landscape changes when the sun disappears. How shadows take the place of mirages, how the air sharpens, how everything becomes more silent, more profound. And this, I wanted to encapsulate in a new fragrance.L'Air du D脙漏sert Marocain Noir is not a reinterpretation of the original, but a continuation, a deeper and darker step into the same story. I wanted to create a perfume that captures the experience of walking into the desert at night. When the sun is gone, but the stones and boulders still radiate the heat of the day. The horizon is black and empty and there are no mountains, no trees, just a line where sand kisses sky. It is a sinister, peaceful environment, dark and deep.I imagined this elixir as the scent of a walk into this desert at night.I imagined the warmth of the night. Besides many smaller changes, at the heart of L芒聙聶Air du D脙漏sert Marocain Noir I have intensified the cistus and the resinous warmth. The amber is drier, more expansive, vast like the night. The perfume is richer, deeper, with strength and with 30% concentration this elixir feels unending.And then, there are the stars. I imagined their cold, distant, blinking shine.  I added more sparkling citrus notes to the perfume formula of L芒聙聶Air du D脙漏sert Marocain Noir,  from bergamot to lemon to petitgrain , to evoke their shimmer, a sharp brilliance that contrasts the depth of the fragrance and adds a fresh airiness.When I created this elixir, I wanted to capture that feeling: experiencing a desert night that is simply beautiful. L芒聙聶Air du D脙漏sert Marocain Noir is my invitation to perfume lovers: To walk further into the night. 芒聙聯 Andy Tauer, creator & perfumer

name: Volupte Noire
notes: Bergamot, Davana, Medjool Date, Linden, Acacia, Jasmine, Black Oak, Euphorbia Honey, Amber, Musk
style: Animalic, Floral - Ambery Spice, Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet, Woody - Amber
description: Volupt脙漏 Noire is an olfactory interpretation of Ambrosia, the mythical food of the gods. It draws inspiration from the high Atlas Mountains of Morocco, where a powerful and animalic floral nectar is harvested: euphorbia honey. A radiant burst of bergamot, davana and medjool date opens the fragrance. The heart reveals a bouquet of white flowers, linden, acacia, jasmine mixed with the sweet tannins of black oak. Richly ambered and musky, euphorbia honey dresses the composition in an umber robe leaving in its sovereign wake the imprint of a tawny, floral caress.

name: Discovery Travel Kit
description: The Travel Size Discovery Kit is the best way to gift the gorgeously Greek-inspired Hellenist Eau de Parfum collection, or to discover Hellenist for yourself and ensure you芒聙聶ll find your most beloved fragrance. It includes 3 generously sized, travel-friendly 15ml bottles in an adorable coffret:le chant d'Achille, 脙聽 l'ombre d'Artemis,&les bras de Morph脙漏e.

name: Les Dieux aux Bains
notes: Juniper Berries, Lemon, Eucalyptus, Water Flowers, Rosemary, Flowerpool, Patchouli, Vetiver, Ambroxan
style: Fresh, Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean, Green / Herbaceous
description: 芒聙聹Beneath the shadow of a majestic pine,the crystalline waters of a cascading aromatictumult. Two nude silhouettes of insolent beauty.Dream? Mirage? Chimera? A secret paradise."An aromatic fragrance bathed in freshness, like a divine ritual. 芒聙聵les dieux aux bains芒聙聶 radiates the invigorating sparkle of lemon and juniper berries, rounded with aromatic notes and enveloped by the humid softness of patchouli. Its fresh and sensual trail evokes the steam of a waterfall where gods once came to rejuvenate.

name: Les Bras de Morphee
notes: Violet Leaf, Peach, Heliotrope, Orris, Violet, Hazelwood, Vanilla, Tonka Bean, Cashmeran
style: Floral, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft
description: 芒聙聹Arms around me, like a wave of ecstasy, an artificial paradise toheal my melancholy. An invisible belonging, an untold addiction.Hypnotic and powdery, his scent is my shelter in total intimacy.芒聙聺An ethereal veil, a suspended embrace between dream and reality... "les bras de Morph脙漏e" is an enchanting fragrance driven by the nobility of orris. Its hypnotic, cloud-like trail softens with ambered touches where vanilla, hazelnut, and tonka bean melt into a comforting and elegant caress.

name: A l'Ombre d'Artemis

style: Floral - Fruity, Floral - Light, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Fresh
description: 芒聙聹Woodland's edge, morning's tender light.Between mist and dew, I see the velvet floor of the forest.In the distance, a babbling stream's sweet melody ascendsor perhaps it is muffled laughter that joyously transcends.芒聙聺A refined fragrance with a vibrant trail of shadow and light... "脙聽 l芒聙聶ombre d芒聙聶Art脙漏mis" captures the mysterious aura of sacred forests, where the woody freshness of fig and moss gently intertwines with a barely blooming rose. Both joyful and profound, it evokes the free and untamable strength of the goddess.

name: Le Chant d'Achille
notes: Neroli, Lemon, Black Pepper, Geranium, Orange Blossom, Ylang-ylang, Vetiver, Immortelle, Musk
style: Floral - Citrus, Floral - White, Powdery / Soft, Spicy
description: 芒聙聹I could recognize him by his salty immortelle scent.His voice is music and his breath shimmery.A hero crowned with flowers and gold.A true legend, an eternal soul.芒聙聺A radiant fragrance, full of light and nostalgia... "le chant d芒聙聶Achille" blends the comforting softness of musks with the floral brilliance of orange blossom. Warmed by the solar sweetness of immortelle, its trail caresses the skin like an indelible memory imbued with strength and delicacy.

name: Mooncake
notes: Golden Syrup, Salted Egg Yolk, Mung Bean, Lotus Seed, Honey, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Sweet, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Vast and luminous, China stands as one of the great cradles of civilization, with landscapes that stir the soul and a legacy that shaped the world. This collection offers not a full portrait, but a series of quiet glimpses into its spirit. Each fragrance is a passage: to a scholar芒聙聶s desk, a tea house at dawn, a lantern-lit reunion, a road that once connected empires, a precious childhood memory...let each scent take you on a journey.Mooncake is a scent of sweet nostalgia芒聙聰a warm, golden crust giving way to a luscious center of salted egg yolk. Shared during Mid-Autumn Festival, this beloved treat marks memories of childhood joy and cherished tradition.

name: Miami Tropical Confessions
notes: Coconut Milk, Hibiscus Nectar, Tahitian Lime, Jasmine, White Rum, Magnolia, Vanilla Orchid, Tonka Bean, Myrrh, Sandalwood
style: Creamy, Floral, Milky, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy, Woody - Fresh
description: Balmy nights. Sun-drenched days. The pulsating heat from the dream lover's skin. Take yourself on a journey of passion and pure seduction. Let yourself go and float on the waves of pleasure.The tropical sweetness of coconut milk and vanilla Orchid blended seamlessly with the sinful notes of white rum and blooming hibiscus makes Tropical Confessions the perfect scent for occasions that will forever be etched on your soul and rhythm.Spray it on. Breathe it in. Live it out. Make your times together confession-worthy.

notes: Mango Milk, Guava, Pineapple, Quince, Coconut Pulp, Lime, Cane Sugar, Canary Melon, Milky Vanilla, Ambergris, White Driftwood, Rum
style: Boozy, Fruity, Salty / Oceanic, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy

Combining the essence of Puerto Rico and St John, results in a harmonious blend where each fragrance compliments the other in a very unique way. Puerto Rico softens the saltiness and rum notes of St. John, while St. John refines the sweetness of Puerto Rico in unexpected ways.

name: Manhattan Midnight

This special edition features the new heavy metal engraved City Rhythm cap and a fabulous "blue shimmer" effect on the bottle. Expect a refined, intense Elixir interpretation of the original classic, now perfectly suited for crisp autumns and chilly winters.

notes: Coconut, Blood Orange, Lime, Juniper Berries, Heliotrope, Sea Salt, Sugar Cane, Almond, Moroccan Jasmine, Nutmeg, Osmanthus, Rum, Ambergris, Tonka Bean, Beachwood, Vanilla

description: To create 2654 (previously called Red Line 2654), City Rhythm decided to honor the most frequently demanded customer request and combine two of their most beloved offerings. Closing the distance of the 2,654 miles between San Diego芒聙聶s Pacific coastline and Miami芒聙聶s Atlantic beaches, Red Line carries the best of both worlds in its cargo. This flawless fusion allows the notes of two City Rhythm classic fragrances, Miami and San Diego, to enhance and play off of one other for an utterly unique experience. The juniper berries and blood orange of San Diego shine brightly next to Miami芒聙聶s coconut and lime notes in the opening, before Miami芒聙聶s floral and rum notes merge seamlessly with San Diego芒聙聶s sea breeze and ambergris, to create a fantasy beach you can take with you wherever you go.

name: Puerto Rico
notes: Mango Milk, Pineapple, Spanish Lime, Toasted Coconut, Apricot, Neroli, Canary Melon, Milky Vanilla, Fluffy Musk, White Driftwood
style: Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy
description: "Before City Rhythm, my travels led me to Puerto Rico, the island of enchantment. I visited three times that year, captivated by the rich culture, pride, and hidden gems like Icacos, Culebra, and Vieques. It felt like home, I could feel the deep history embedded in the atmosphere and music. To my Puerto Rican friends, I hope this Fragrance has done justice to your beautiful island."

name: Miami

style: Boozy, Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy, Woody - Spicy

The flow of this scent continues to evolve as saffron and Caribbean sugar-cane rum make their dramatic entrance to complete a sultry dry down that will linger on the skin for hours. Miami by City Rhythm invites you to a sun-soaked tropical beach vacation.

name: Opus XVI Timber
notes: Cypress, Cardamom, Juniper, Pink Pepper, Cocoa, Lavandin, Fir Balsam, Hojari Frankincense, Palo Santo, Vanilla Bourbon, Sandalwood, Cedarwood, Patchouli

description: A fragrance that begins with tremendous monumentality, Opus XVI Timber is a firm, sturdy, boldly vertical expression of woods. Within moments, the scent begins to reveal a wealth of nuances. The bright, woody facets of cypress, cardamom and lavandin add luminosity to the scent. Frankincense, juniper and fir balsam introduce their own uniquely kinetic energy. Finally, palo santo, sandalwood, cedarwood and patchouli ground the whole with their uncompromising authoritativeness: symbols of a wisdom that remains firm and is not swayed by the tides of changing fashions.

name: Pomelo Crush
notes: Pomelo, White Florals, Rhubarb, Tarragon, Vetiver, Musk, Amber
style: Citrus, Floral - Citrus, Floral - White, Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Powdery / Soft
description: Uniquely fresh and instantly appealing, Pomelo Crush is a delightfully bittersweet, utterly refreshing elixir that sparkles with effortless unisex charm. Like a freshly frozen grapefruit sorbet, it's tantalizingly bright and refreshingly tart, blended with soft floral notes of orange blossom and musk to give the fragrance an air of sophistication and longevity rare in a fresh citrus scent. Like a perfect grapefruit sorbet enjoyed on the back of a vintage Vespa on a perfect Italian summer day, Pomelo Crush is a portrait of elegant, carefree Mediterranean living sure to become a warm weather classic for citrus lovers everywhere.

name: Dirty Milk

style: Animalic, Creamy, Gourmand, Milky, Spicy
description: White gone wild. Milk on the edge.Inspired by the thrill of contrast - the softest milk, right before it turns wild. On skin. On sheets. On purpose. Warm, thick, and slow. It芒聙聶s milk at the peak of decadence. Dirty Milk starts with a splash of creamy milk and gooey caramel, cut through by a flash of black pepper. Sharp, hot, and just enough to make it dangerous. It芒聙聶s the spark, the heat before the dirtiness. Then it softens: buttery iris blends into warm akigalawood, like skin meeting skin. The dry-down is slow and thick, with vanilla and musk sinking into the body like cream left on warm skin. Rich, sweet, and just on the edge of decadence.

name: Can't Get Enough
notes: Rose, Pink Pepper, Hedione, Caramel, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Floral, Floral - Ambery Spice, Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet
description: Can't Get Enough is a bold, sexy new floral gourmand from Initio that captures the endless rush of desire that makes you feel fiercely alive. A deeply carnal scent that captures the essence of temptation, this stunning EDP is constructed around a lush, sensuous rose, ignited with a fiery explosion of pink pepper to spark the senses. The fascination deepens with an intoxicating blend of shamelessly rich caramel and voluptuous vanilla- gourmand, hypnotic, and utterly irresistible. Draped in the haunting sensuality of hedione, it's lavishly romantic and seductively daring- a fragrance of pure obsession that keeps you coming back for more and more...

name: Apricot Innocence
notes: Sweet Orange, Apricot Nectar, Exotic Fruits, Osmanthus, Rose, Sambac, White Musk, Amber
style: Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Sweet, Woody - Amber
description: Apricot Innocence encapsulates the purity and unbridled joy of childhood candor, inspired by Simone Andreoli's nostalgia for the freedom of summer days frolicking in his grandparents' countryside orchard and basking in the simple pleasures of nature's bounty. Lush notes of nectarine and ripe apricot envelope the senses with enchanted magic while juicy sweet orange nuances lend delicate brightness with a sophisticated embrace; a memorable opening that instantly transports you to carefree moments, running with unbridled joy through illuminated gardens, plucking ripe mellow apricots warmed by the sun芒聙聶s golden rays. At the heart of Apricot Innocence lies a radiant bouquet of creamy sambac and luscious osmanthus expertly blended with delicate rose petals and vanilla hints capturing a sense of childlike wonder and innocent joy. Like stumbling upon along-forgotten treasure from youth, this harmonious composition unfolds like a symphony, revealing layers of complexity with each passing moment; soft amber and velvety white musk create a long-lasting shelter of unspoiled bliss.Apricot Innocence is not just a fragrance; it's a reverie of pure childhood innocence that enraptures the senses with the golden hues of sun-kissed apricots and the warm breeze of exotic florals.

name: Criminal Lipstick
notes: Red Grape, Fig, Pear, Jasmine, Iris, Muguet, Oud, Vanilla, Cedarwood, Musk, Black Amber
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Woody - Amber, Woody - Dark
description: Criminal Lipstick is a luxurious fragrance that embodies the enduring strength and power of fierce women. Simone Andreoli芒聙聶s inspiration is a tribute to all women who left an indelible mark in his personal growth and path of life making him realize how extraordinary women are and contributing to forge his resilient and strong credo.Opening with a fruity burst of decadent red grape, fresh pear and silky fig, this bold scent quickly deepens into a captivating floral heart of jasmine, iris and muguet blended with a refined oriental rose; a daring bouquet that exudes confidence and sensuality with feminine notes that are balanced by the opulent warmth of woods and balsams. A touch of mystery and provocative intrigue magnifies a charm that is so fine to be 芒聙聹criminal芒聙聺. A blend of lavish oud, sublime vanilla, dry cedarwood, velvety musk and rich black amber that lingers on the skin as an overwhelming echo.Criminal Lipstick is an olfactory rebellion that epitomises the daring modern woman; feminine yet formidable, passionate yet poised. A seductive parfum nectar that dares you to defy conventions and tell the world who you are.

name: Xanat

style: Creamy, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet
description: Xanat, the Tomavicci Luxury Gourmand crafted by Master perfumer Christian Provenzano, is a sumptuous tribute to the enchanting world of vanilla. This irresistible fragrance opens with the luscious sweetness of black sugar and the rich depth of dark chocolate, creating an inviting and indulgent introduction. As it unfolds, the heart reveals a sumptuous vanilla absolute that takes center stage, beautifully complemented by the bold aroma of freshly brewed coffee, wrapping you in a warm, comforting embrace. The base notes of tonka absolute, benzoin, and musk provide a sensual foundation that enhances the creamy, luxurious quality of the vanilla. Xanat is a masterful celebration of vanilla芒聙聶s richness, designed for those who crave a deeply comforting and opulent aromatic experience.

name: Gateau a l'Ananas
notes: Pineapple, Cake, Rum, Cinnamon, Coconut, Nuts, Sugar, Vanilla, Tonka Bean, Musk
style: Boozy, Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy
description: Indulge your senses with Tomavicci's G脙垄teau 脙聽 l'Ananas, a fragrance inspired by the elegance of French pastries. It opens with juicy pineapple, fluffy cake, and a splash of rum, evoking a sun-kissed patisserie. The heart delivers warm notes of cinnamon, creamy coconut, and rich nuts, while the base features velvety vanilla, tonka bean, and soft musk. Delight in this fragrant feast for the senses, capturing the essence of culinary artistry.

name: Zenobia
notes: Blackcurrant, Orange Blossom, Madagascar Vanilla, Syrian Royal Jasmine, Orchid, Turkish Rose, Amber, Saffron, Leather, Moroccan Cedarwood, Oud
style: Floral, Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Fruity, Sweet, Woody - Dark
description: Immerse yourself in the allure of luxury and let it become an exquisite reflection of your own personal style. Zenobia is a symphony of opulent notes meticulously blended to perfection, with a velvety blend of lush florals, mouthwatering gourmand notes, and luxuriously rich woods combine for a lavishly romantic indulgence. Unveil a sensory journey that transcends ordinary realms.

name: Siren's Veil
notes: Plum, Anis, Cinnamon, Rum, Birch, Peach, Whipped Cream, Raspberry, Mate, Sage, Powdered Sugar, Vetiver, Patchouli, Benzoin, Musk, Tobacco, Moss, Amber
style: Boozy, Creamy, Floral, Floral - Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet, Woody - Amber
description: A fragrance of shadow and seduction, Siren芒聙聶s Veil embodies the femme fatale芒聙聰captivating, untouchable, unforgettable.It begins with a forbidden kiss of plum, anise, cinnamon, rum, birch, and peach, drawing you into a heart of whipped cream, raspberry, mat脙漏, sage, and powdered sugar芒聙聰sweetness laced with danger. Finally, its true power is revealed in a dark, smoldering base of vetiver, patchouli, benzoin, musk, tobacco, moss, and amber. It is the fragrance of stolen glances, whispered promises, and the dangerous beauty of a woman who doesn芒聙聶t wait to be desired, she commands it. Siren芒聙聶s Veil is for those who dare to enchant, who live between shadows and silk, and who leave the world breathless in their wake.

name: Blue Talisman Extrait
notes: Pear, Bergamot, Orange Blossom, Jasmine, Vanilla, Sandalwood, Musks, Ambrofix, Ambery Woods
style: Floral - Citrus, Fresh, Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Woody - Fresh
description: Just like its original signature, Blue Talisman Extrait has been designed as an immersive journey into a precious jewel and invites you to lose yourself into a kaleidoscope of sensations.The Extrait de Parfum intensifies the original creation with deeper, more powerful notes. Jasmine sambac blends with orange blossom, revealing warm, rounded, and solar tonalities. The base, enriched with vanilla and sandalwood, becomes more textured and captivating. It enhances the fragrance's intensity and creates an addictive allure. Bewitching and multifaceted, this creation embodies the House芒聙聶s Avant-Garde spirit through its ultimate version.

name: La Chant des Sirenes
notes: Rosewood Leaves, Carambola, Opoponax, Almond Wood, Sea Fennel, Sandalwood
style: Fresh - Aquatic, Fruity, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy, Woody - Fresh
description: Le Chant des Sir脙篓nes : the evocation of a fantastic and romantic marine universe, questioning the notion of temptation and promises that are too good to be true芒聙娄This new opus takes a new approach to the marine theme, with its silky, balmy notes, experimenting with a 芒聙聵tender marine or aquatic芒聙聶 accord. The opening is aromatic and fruity, with rosewood leaves and the apple-citrus-pineapple notes of star fruit. A round, balmy heart dominated by almond wood and opopanax, evolving in trompe l芒聙聶脜聯il towards a woody-salty base of sandalwood and sea fennel. This fragrance is like a rising wave of plant life, like a song on the surface of the water. A fruity facet gently settles in, slightly herbaceous. Carried by the gentle bitterness of an almond wood accord, sea fennel, reminiscent of the sea spray of wild coasts, infuses the sandalwood. Under the tension of this plant salt, this usually milky wood rediscovers a verticality, a vibrant character tinged with a subtle animality.

name: Blood Spider Orchids
notes: Cinnamon, Smoked Clove, Nutmeg, Frankincense, Egyptian Jasmine, Patchouli, Tonka, Benzoin Siam, Blood Cedar
style: Floral - Spicy, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Blood Spider Orchids is rich, warm, spicy, woody and addictive. It芒聙聶s a portrait of dark opulence.脗聽The heat of cinnamon and smoked clove fuse with frankincense, patchouli,脗聽blood cedar oil, tonka absolute and benzoin Siam.In 2024, Regime des Fleurs produced an 8ml limited edition and the reaction脗聽was extraordinary-- so much so Blood Spider Orchids is now a 75ml in the permanent collection.

name: Oud Zarian
notes: Bergamot, Frankincense, Ginger, Spice Accord, Rose Centifolia, 80-year Aged Oud, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Myrrh, Liquorice Root, Tonka Bean
style: Floral, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Enter a rarefied realm with Oud Zarian. Crowned with the most precious 80-year-aged oud, this fragrance is a testament to patience and the pursuit of perfection. A rare oud masterpiece that pays tribute to the patience that true artistry demands. Expertly hand-crafted using some of the most precious gifts in nature, it opens with swirls of rich, resinous frankincense veiled in warming spices, before revealing a radiant Rose Centifolia heart. Meanwhile, at the soul of this creation lies a treasure 80 years in the making 芒聙聯 a prized, age-perfected oud that bestows an unequalled woody depth and aromatic intensity to the fragrance that is nothing short of extraordinary.

name: Molecule 01+ Discovery Set- 8.5ml
description: The Molecule 01+ 8.5ml Discovery Set is created to encourage and satiate your scentual curiosity. Designed for exploration, this set enables you to explore all six of the Molecule 01+ scents before determining your preferred olfactory escape. The fragrances are housed in 8.5ml mini vials, scaled down to explore the radial world of Molecules and quench all your on-the-go scenting needs.Molecule 01 + IrisMolecule 01 + MandarinMolecule 01 + PatchouliMolecule 01 + GingerMolecule 01 + Black TeaMolecule 01 + Guaiac WoodAll six Molecule 01+ fragrances are brimming with character and unbeholden to gender distinctions. These moody beauties all hold a web of multifarious meanings, definitions and sensations.

name: Molecule 01 + Guaiac Wood ATOM.iser Set
description: An ultimate artcessory, the ATOM.iser. is a luxurious, travel-sized fragrance case crafted for durability and designed to elevate your on-the-go lifestyle. Its twist-and-spray mechanism ensures your favourite EM scent is always at hand. The sleek metal is meticulously blasted with stainless steel 'sand' to burnish the surface to a soft lustre and is then anodised for lasting resilience. A perfect fusion of practicality and elegance, each ATOM.iser. holds 8.5ml of fragrance and comes with two additional refills, so you can carry your scent effortlessly wherever life leads.
