name: Ansongo
description: The Imprint of the Doum Fruit芒聙聹As captivating as the harmattan caressing the dunes, Ansongo carries within it the echoes of the lands dear to A脙炉ssa: Senegal, where vetiver takes root, and Mali, cradle of the doum palm fruit. It is the alliance of primordial elements, earth and water, resonating like a whispered echo of the extreme seasons that marked the early years of the actress and director: the monsoon, the wind, the drought. Vetiver, cypriol and pepper convey the power of a land cracked by the sun, while the sweetness of Doum NaturePrint, mixed with an accord of date and fig leaves, expresses nostalgia for a childhood spent in Malian communities. Ansongo is a straightforward, raw and sincere fragrance, deeply rooted in the soul of Africa. It envelops and protects like a talisman, outlining the olfactory portrait of a dignity unadorned by artifice.芒聙聺

name: Pomelo Oolong
notes: Oolong Tea, Pomelo (Grapefruit), Osmanthus, Porcelain, White Musk
style: Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean
description: Vast and luminous, China stands as one of the great cradles of civilization, with landscapes that stir the soul and a legacy that shaped the world. This collection offers not a full portrait, but a series of quiet glimpses into its spirit. Each fragrance is a passage: to a scholar芒聙聶s desk, a tea house at dawn, a lantern-lit reunion, a road that once connected empires, a precious childhood memory...let each scent take you on a journey.In China, tea is a daily ritual of reflection and connection. This scent captures the layered elegance of oolong, infused with notes of pomelo and white blossoms. A refreshing harmony that echoes quiet conversations in sunlit tea houses.

name: Gardelia 2025
notes: Siam Benzoin, Bergamot, Gardenia, Osmanthus, Rose, Java Vetiver, Haitian Vetiver, Ylang-ylang, Yuzu
description: The entirety of a decade passes in an instant, lives change, evolve, and take on new forms.  Gardelia , in its renewed incarnation, ten years later, is a conscious nod not only to the masterpieces of perfumer Antonio Gardoni , whose sensibility is as sharp as a blade, but also to the lives that are dedicated to one another, beyond the passage of time, and to the continuity of passions.Some fragrances, as soon as they touch the skin, silently implore a connection, a silent desire that spans the space between them.  Gardelia 2025 is one such creation; the classicism of its previous incarnation has been revitalized into a clear, modern, and elegant vision. Brighter and lighter, in Antonio's hands the  gardenia becomes, with ylang -ylang , rose , and osmanthus , a sensual and multifaceted beauty that brings you to your knees in reverence, weeping with a joy so pure, as if it gushed from the very source, pure and simple. Your eyes open, the potions thin out, the gardenia, not as you already knew it, shows itself naked, revealing its deepest core, a sublime and addictive essence. An enveloping caress of soft memories and silent promises. Linear concepts vanish once they are let in; past, present, and future dissolve; the pages of the past roll inside, leaf by leaf, bound to the present moment like a breath of life, to then soar in the winds of the future, floating among the scented breezes.An encounter beyond the periphery of perception, a glimpse into the fragrant soul of nature, splendid and magnificent.

name: Chapter 1 Discovery Set: Enchanting Vietnam
description: "Enchanting Vietnam" is a love letter to Vietnam. Each of the 9 fragrances is a personal and contemporary interpretation of the elements found in Vietnamese's rich heritage:White RiceMonsoon TeaIn The GardenHarvest SeasonPhu QuocDa LatPho BreakfastThrough The ForestVietnamese Coffee

name: Chapter 2 Discovery Set: Memories of Japan
description: "Memories of Japan" is loving tribute to the rich heritage of Japanese culture. Each of the 9 fragrances in this collection is a humble attempt at distilling Japan's magnificence:Moonlight SamuraiTokyo NightsSakura SnowMatcha Soft ServeStrawberry MochiKimonoArashiyamaHinoki MeditationJapanese Whiskey

name: Bal d'Afrique Absolu
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Blackcurrant, Musks, Praline, Violet, Cedarwood, Vetiver, Black Amber
style: Floral - Spicy, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Woody - Spicy
description: Bal d'Afrique Absolu reimagines the iconic scent with a more gourmand intensity, heightening the contrast between vibrant lightness and addictive depth, paying tribute to founder Ben Gorham's personal memories and the vibrant artistic influence of African culture. This reinterpretation elevates the gourmand notes of Bal d'Afrique to an addictive level, all surrounding a heart of sweet praline. Notes of bergamot, lemon and blackcurrant offer a bold vibrance before melting into praline, sweet musks and violet. A woody blend of cedar and vetiver add depth and drama to the base, with warm black amber extending the gourmand push of the praline right to the very end.

name: Neon Veil
notes: Pink Pepper, Amber, Orange Flower, Orris, Cedar, Musk
style: Avant-Garde, Fresh - Clean, Powdery / Soft, Skin Scent / Minimal, Unusual / Unexpected, Woody - Light
description: With Neon Veil, Andrea Maack and master perfumer Domitille Michalon step back and put up an invisible veil of shimmering, futuristic transformation. In a world increasingly shaped by artificial intelligence and digital identities, Neon Veil imagines what scent might feel like in the future芒聙聰free, unbound, and charged with electric optimism.The scent itself is a sensory projection into that imagined future. It opens with a burst of sparkling pink pepper, sharp, bright, and effervescent, tempered by the soft, skin-like warmth of ambrette seed, grounding it in nature. The heart blooms into a luminous floral core, where orange blossom radiates with solar energy, softened by the ethereal, elegant texture of real iris. As it finally settles into the drydown, it lingers with an intimate aura of powdery musk and refined cedarwood, as hypnotic and weightless as a flash of neon light in the night air. Soulful, clean, complex, and filled with undeniable optimism, Neon Veil is a celebration of the infinite possibilities that lay ahead for our digital future.

name: Mystique
notes: Leather, Saffron, Cedar, Agarwood, Sandalwood, Papyrus, Amber, Patchouli, Ebony Wood
style: Woody - Amber, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Extremely rich and remarkably textured, Mystique channels spiritual intensity and mystical allure in a beguiling olfactory marriage of leather, oud, and amber. This fragrance draws us into a secret world of ritual and magic, where smoke and leather reveal an almost incantatory nature. As mysterious as it is refined, it creates a powerful and intense wake: the rare, intense, saffron-kissed leather is accompanied by the majesty of richly woody and smoky notes of oud and refined, suave amber. Stunningly potent, yet seductively modern, Mystique is an unforgettable journey into the glow of dusk.

name: Midnight Omen
notes: Mandarin, Peony, Orris, Saffron, Violet, Leather, Cashmeran, Sandalwood, Amber Wood, Patchouli, Musks, Moss
style: Floral, Floral - Ambery Spice, Powdery / Soft, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Midnight Omen is a richly layered woody amber fragrance that evokes the pull of the unknown. Enigmatic and bold, it hints at omens- good or bad- and keeps the wearer guessing. Seduction, danger, intrigue: each note whispers a secret. A powerful composition, Midnight Omen opens with bright mandarin, unfolds into a heart of buttery orris and violet, and settles on a base of rich, smooth, suede-like leather and rare Nepalese sandalwood, an exceptional raw material with a natural creaminess that perfectly compliments the iris. A uniquely deep and sensual nocturnal floral, Midnight Omen is as sultry as it is sophisticated.

name: 45脗掳
notes: Honey, Bergamot, Madagascar Vanilla Absolute, Vanilla CO2, Georgywood, Benzoin, Natural Vanillin
style: Animalic, Boozy, Creamy, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Sweet
description: 45脗掳 flirts with a rising temperature: this original fragrance radiates passion and desire. Built around a trio of luscious vanillas- animalic Madagascan vanilla, boozy and smooth CO2 vanilla, and creamy, floral vanillin- it achieves primal sensuality, unleashes suppressed passions, and reveals tantalizingly carnal facets. In the heart, Laotian benzoin adds a dimension of mystery, complemented by the timeless sweetness of real honey. Addictively seductive, 45脗掳 offers an audacious reinterpretation of vanilla, unfolding in both sinful and playful ways, bringing an unexpected twist to the voluptuousness of a dynamic and delicious vanilla.

name: Born To Stand Out
notes: Bergamot, Geranium, Rose, Pepper, Akigalawood, Amber, Cedarwood, Tobacco, Leather
style: Floral, Floral - Ambery Spice, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Dark
description: Love stories often start with roses, but like the thrill of new romance, they soon fade into mystery. This special collaboration with beloved Korean cult perfumery BORNTOSTANDOUT explores all that love's journey has to offer.As you embark on this adventure, a cheeky blend of pomarose and pepper adds a spicy twist, bringing confidence and allure. The journey deepens with smoky notes of amber, akigalawood, cedarwood, tobacco, and leather, wrapping you in intrigue. This fragrance captures the essence of second love, celebrating individuality and elegance, leaving a trail of whispered secrets. A seductive and stylish, richly full-bodied fragrance, this unique globe-spanning fragrance delivers all the best of BTSO and Fugazzi in one irresistible bottle.

name: Passionfroudh
notes: Ginger, Taget, Black Tea, Passionfruit, Mango, Black Pepper, Rose, Olibanum, Gurjun, Balsam, Cypriot, Oudh Assafi
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Smoky, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Dark
description: From Brazil with love, Passionfroudh is a tantalizing elixir bursting with sophisticated sensuality. It bursts open with tropical passionfruit, mango, and spicy ginger, balanced by the warmth of black tea. A heart of black pepper and gurjun balsam brings depth and intrigue, while an overdose of natural Oudh Assafi and cypriol creates a smoky, seductive foundation. Inspired by the indelibly joyful energy of Ipanema Beach, Passionfroudh is Brazil芒聙聶s soul, bottled.

name: Cocco Tiare
notes: Tiare Absolute, Coconut Pulp CO2, Organic Tonka Bean Butter, Vanilla Beans And Cream
style: Creamy, Floral - Light, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy, Warm
description: The scent of sun-drenched tiare petals melting into creamy coconut oil feels like a secret escape to a tropical getaway. Soft, sensual, and radiant, Cocco Tiare wraps the skin in a golden glow of warmth and tenderness. More than a perfume, it芒聙聶s a memory of sunlit shores and languid afternoons, bottled for every season. A must-have treasure for anyone who longs to carry summer芒聙聶s allure wherever they go.

name: Vanilla Haze EDP
notes: Mandarin, Coconut Milk, Almond, Hazelnut, Vanilla Pod, Tonka Bean, Jasmine, Creme Brulee, White Amber, Sweet Musk
style: Creamy, Floral - Ambery Spice, Gourmand, Sweet
description: The ultimate all day indulgence for the unapologetic gourmand lover. Start your day with a burst of mandarin, coconut milk, and almond. Transition into a rich mix of hazelnut, vanilla pod, and tonka bean, uplifted by jasmine. As the day unfolds, let the scent reveal burned cr脙篓me br脙禄l脙漏e, white amber, and sweet musk. Unforgettable, dynamic, and oh so delectably sweet, Vanilla Haze is a modern, uncompromising gourmand for trendsetters and go-getters alike.

name: Nocologne
notes: Calabrian Bergamot, Grapefruit, Lemon, Mandarin, Orange Blossom, Ginger Zest, Mimosa, Pink Pepper, Clary Sage, Dutch Herbs, Amber Crystals, Ambrette Seed, Moss, Vetiver
style: Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: A fragrance meant to provoke, excite, and stimulate, infused with an audacious helping of Dutch herbs and hand-squeezed notes of electrifying citrus. Its boldness is matched with suave sophistication, as hints of mimosa, pink pepper and clary sage set the scene. A striking and long-lasting mood enhancer and attention grabber, down to the unique red flacon- Nocologne is so much more than an everyday scent.

name: Orange Crush- Extrait
notes: Orange, Musks, Pepperwood, Akigalawood
style: Citrus, Fresh - Citrus
description: An extra special "XDP" version of the original cult classic, Orange Crush Extrait takes everything you love about the original EDP and makes it even more intense. It芒聙聶s bolder, deeper, and built to last even longer. It explodes with bright, juicy orange, bursting with energy and warmth. This vibrant intensity is balanced by the spicy warmth of pepperwood and the deep, woody character of akigalawood, while a beguiling collection of sexy, modern musks add a soft, lingering sensuality. The original Orange Crush was a perfect beam of sunlight; this seductive Extrait is for the kind of adventures that might last all night.

name: Orange Crush- Eau de Parfum
notes: Orange, White Amber, Transparent Wood
style: Citrus, Fresh - Citrus, Powdery / Soft, Skin Scent / Minimal, Woody - Fresh
description: More is less. Orchestrated around just three main ingredients: Iso-E Super (with its ability to arouse the sensation of soft, transparent wood). White amber (with its power to invoke a warm, comforting almost skin-like warmth). And, of course, orange (fresh, juicy, aromatic, and vibrantly refreshing). The effect: a warm-fresh soothing fragrance that only gets more seductively velvety the longer it stays on your skin. It's sunshine in a bottle.

name: Angel Dust - Extrait
notes: Dark Wood, Cashmere, White Amber, Pink Pepper
style: Powdery / Soft, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: The quiet, subtle notes of Angel Dust were a breakout hit for Fugazzi, leaving the user cocooned in heavenly cloud of sheer, woodsy musks. But some wanted to take this introverted elixir out out on the town, so for them, there's this- a bolder, sexier, more intense Angel Dust that turns the EDP into an XDP. By doubling the infusion of white amber crystals and cashmeran, and enhancing black pepper with the intensity of pink peppercorn, this much more highly concentrated concoction declares itself loudly and proudly,  a hedonistic and seductive secret weapon that won't be much of a secret once you step into the room.

name: Angel Dust - Eau de Parfum
notes: Transparent Wood, Cashmere, White Amber
style: Powdery / Soft, Skin Scent / Minimal, Woody - Light
description: The calming and peaceful notes of Angel Dust blend together to celebrate the introvert. This gentle but strong and silent type mystically revolves around Cashmeran; the 芒聙聹polite molecule芒聙聺 which is notorious for its intimacy and privacy. It芒聙聶s for the quiet and confident one, that doesn芒聙聶t need to scream to get attention, but simply attracts it.

name: Sugardaddy
notes: Tangerine, Bergamot, Blackcurrant, Nutmeg, Clove, Jasmine, White Ambergris, Moss, Cashmere, Patchouli
style: Citrus, Floral - Fruity, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: If the mood of a perfect beachfront golden hour could ever be brought to life, it would drown itself in Sugardaddy. Tangerine dances with bergamot in this seductively sweet cashmere, jasmine and patchouli based elixir that will have you feeling naughty and nice all at once. Strong enough to seduce any spirit that dares to cross your path, Sugardaddy is made especially for the rare few who see the world as their oyster.

name: Savant Manhattan Cherry
notes: Black Cherry Accord, Davana, Whisky Accord, Cinnamon, Clove Bud, Tonka Bean, Oak Chip, Patchouli, Vetiver, Wood, Leather
style: Boozy, Fruity, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Spicy
description: Savant Manhattan Cherry is a captivating fruity boozy fragrance, with a blend of bold notes of rich whiskey and a hint of rum. It captures the essence of a classic Manhattan cocktail, with a cherry twist. The smokiness of oak chips, combined with the warmth of clove and cinnamon, adds depth and character. The sour cherry absorbs the whiskey, creating an intriguing contrast with its addictive undertones. It's a celebration of sophistication and complexity, evoking the perfect balance of indulgence and refinement.

name: Workaholic
notes: Coffee, Bulgarian Rose, Nutmeg, Muguet, Gourmand Accord, White Musk, Amber, Australian Sandalwood, Tonka Bean
style: Earthy, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: All work, all play. Workaholic bends the rules for the ambitious ones that want to smell like pure success- the get up and go of an early morning double shot of espresso and the sheer, sexy confidence of someone who lives for the hustle. The powerful appeal of white musk, Australian sandalwood, coffee and amber. Watch out now, this one is highly addictive.

name: Coco e Vanille
notes: Coconut, Madagascar Vanilla
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy
description: Exotic. Airy. Addictive. And made to be enjoyed again and again. A luminous, exotic escape in a bottle, Coco e Vanille is a bright and refreshing EDT sure to become your perfect everyday indulgence.Infused with radiant notes and an irresistible lightness, Coco e Vanille evokes the carefree elegance of sun-drenched days and warm breezes. Uplifting citrus, delicate florals, and soft musks come together in a scent that feels like a gentle caress on the skin that's never overpowering and always inviting.Thanks to its generous 200ml size and perfectly fresh EDT concentration, you can spritz it generously throughout the day-morning, noon, and night- refreshing your senses and leaving a delicate trail of fragrance wherever you go. It's the ideal scent for those who want to feel effortlessly fresh, sweet, and radiant from dawn to dusk.

name: Black Soul
notes: Almond, Vanilla, Oud Wood, Cinnamon, Licorice, Cherry, Musk
style: Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Black Soul: a sweet and sensual fragrance, a scent that seduces the senses with its mysterious, captivating depth. At its heart, delicate notes of vanilla and almond melt into the richness of oud wood, creating a warm and luxurious embrace. A bold twist of licorice adds a hint of darkness and intrigue, balancing the sweetness with unexpected depth. As the fragrance unfolds, the sensual trail of ambergris lingers on the skin, enhancing its allure with long-lasting intensity and elegance.Sophisticated yet addictive, Black Soul is the perfect scent for those who crave something sweet, but with an edge- a balance of light and dark that delights and seduces all at once.

name: Crema Pasticciera
notes: Lemon, Orange, Custard Accord, Bourbon Vanilla
style: Citrus, Creamy, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Crema Pasticciera is a deliciously smooth, velvety scent that wraps you in the warm embrace of your favorite dessert. Bright top notes of lemon and orange give way to a rich heart of creamy custard, evoking the comforting aroma of pastries straight from the oven. In the base, Bourbon vanilla adds a luxurious touch of warmth and indulgence.An irresistible invitation to sweetness- perfect for lovers of indulgent gourmands who want to feel comforted and pampered all day long.

name: Crazy Candy
notes: Bergamot, Peach, Coconut, Vanilla, Sugar, Caramel, Jasmine, Violet, Patchouli, Woody Notes, Grey Amber, White Musk, Cotton Candy
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: Ready for a sugar rush like never before? This ultra-intense gourmand is a full-on celebration of sweetness- bold, addictive, and impossible to resist. It opens with a juicy burst of bergamot, peach, and creamy coconut, setting the stage for a heart that芒聙聶s pure indulgence: rich vanilla, golden caramel, soft jasmine, and a generous helping of sugar. Violet petals add a touch of elegance, while the base wraps you in warm patchouli, soft woods, sensual grey amber, and fluffy cotton candy. Indulge your innermost sweet tooth with Crazy Candy- just don't blame us when you never want to smell like anything else again.

name: Coconut Latte
notes: Creamy Coconut Milk, Almond Milk, Solar Notes, Peach, Vanilla, Heliotrope, White Florals, Musk, Sugar, Soft Woods
style: Creamy, Floral - Light, Gourmand, Milky, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy, Woody - Fresh
description: A sip of summer on your skin: creamy coconut, warm vanilla, and sweet milk. Coconut Latte is the scent of sun-drenched skin, sandy beaches, and tropical memories. It芒聙聶s your go-to fragrance when you want to feel sensual, radiant, and effortlessly free. The creamy blend of coconut milk, almond milk, sun-kissed notes, and juicy peach instantly transports you to a blissful escape. At its heart, delicate white flowers and soft heliotrope melt into a swirl of golden vanilla. The drydown lingers with airy musk, soft woods, and a touch of sugar- like the sun芒聙聶s last kiss on your skin.

name: Milk's Note
notes: Caramel, Milk, Honey, Tonka Bean, Vanilla, White Musk
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Milky, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: Imagine finding yourself in front of a warm cup of milk, the comforting steam rising as you slowly dip your favorite biscuits芒聙聰soft, crumbly, and just sweet enough to melt into the moment. Milk's Note captures that feeling of quiet indulgence, where time slows down and nostalgia takes over. Creamy milk notes blend seamlessly with hints of vanilla and buttery shortbread, creating an embrace that's both familiar and irresistible. A touch of honey and a whisper of caramel add depth and warmth, evoking the golden edges of oven-fresh treats. As it settles on the skin, the scent becomes a cocoon of fuzzy tonka bean sweetness and softness, like the lingering aroma of dessert in a cozy kitchen.For true lovers of gourmand fragrances, this is more than a scent芒聙聰it芒聙聶s a memory made wearable.

name: Mandarine
notes: Cardamom, Pink Pepper, Fig, Lemon, Mandarin, Juniper, Geranium, Neroli, Labdanum, Cedar, Ambroxan
style: Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Citrus
description: A delightful fragrance full of elegance and energy, Mandarine by Widian is a masterful interpretation of fresh mandarin orange- radiant, refined, and irresistibly modern. Perfumer Sophie Labb脙漏 blends luminous citrus notes with spicy warmth and woody depth into a composition that feels both invigorating and elegant. A vibrant opening of sun-ripened mandarin and fresh lemon is dynamically enhanced by spicy cardamom and pink pepper. A hint of fig adds a soft fruity roundness, leading into the beguiling heart, which reveals an aromatic-green elegance carried by juniper and geranium and gently caressed by the floral brightness of neroli. In the deep, rich base, resinous labdanum, noble cedarwood, and clean, musky ambroxan lend a warm, sensual signature that lingers for hours. Energetically modern, yet subtly sophisticated, Mandarine is like a ray of pristine sunlight over a fine velvet surface- vivid and bright, yet smooth and elegant, all at once.

name: Crush
notes: Roasted Almond, Lychee, Bulgarian Rose, Praline, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Floral - Fruity, Gourmand, Milky
description: Crush is Akro's fragrance inspired by the addiction to rose macarons. The crunchy shell of these sweet treats hides a melting heart, ready to intoxicate the taste buds with their subtle flavours. Rose macarons are an explosion of textures and aromas just waiting to resonate, a symphony of sweetness ready to pour out.Crush is the delicious reimagining of rose macarons, a fragrance that allows you to forget about time and invites a moment of pure delicacy.

name: Dubai
notes: Pear, Neroli, Saffron, Jasmine Sambac, Tea, Honeysuckle, Cypriol, Vetiver, Musks, Amber
style: Floral - Fruity, Floral - White, Powdery / Soft, Smoky
description: As romantic and dynamic as the city itself, Dubai is an enchanting fragrance for lovers of jasmine and tea, an olfactive portrait of hidden spaces and private moments amidst a hyper-modern metropolis. Crisp and sparkling, this is the Dubai known only to those willing to venture past the shopping malls and skyscrapers, a fragrance constructed from lovely memories of sumptuous gardens full of flourishing blooms, of sipping tea infusions watching the sun set in the balmy evening air. It's the nocturnal beauty of jasmine and honeysuckle wafting on the cooling breeze, painting a portrait of a more easygoing, quiet luxury- sophisticated, lush, and gently smoky, with an amber afterglow that lingers for hours.

name: Alto Astral
notes: Aldehydes, Coconut Water, Ambroxan
description: With Alto Astral, Byredo unveils a luminous new chapter in its olfactory narrative芒聙聰a fragrance that pays vibrant homage to the emotional topography of Brazil. Taking its name from a Brazilian Portuguese phrase evoking elevated mood and spiritual brightness, Alto Astral distills the soul of optimism, rhythm, and cultural vitality into scent.Radiating with the color, energy, and warmth of Brazil, Alto Astral is inspired by the country芒聙聶s everyday poetry: samba at sundown, the salty rush of ocean winds, motorcyclists weaving through Rio芒聙聶s streets with effortless flair. This fragrance is more than a composition芒聙聰it芒聙聶s a shared emotional resonance. A sensory portrait of collective exuberance that persists, pulses, and uplifts.Crafted by longtime Byredo collaborator J脙漏rome Epinette, Alto Astral opens with a vibrant interplay of aldehydes and creamy coconut芒聙聰an effervescent yet soft introduction that captivates immediately. At its heart, jasmine petals entwine with airy incense and milky musk, forming an abstract warmth that seems to hover just above the skin. The base unveils a sensual trail of sandalwood, cashmere wood, and salted amber, offering texture, depth, and lingering luminosity.Balancing clarity with comfort, freshness with familiarity, Alto Astral is a fragrance of emotional light芒聙聰an olfactive expression of upliftment and ease.

name: Evergreen In Snow
notes: Crisp Greens, Lush Citrus, Snow Accord, Limber Pine Natureprint, Iced Florals, Amber, Cedarwood, Sandalwood, Dry Woods
style: Woody - Fresh
description: Take comfort in the serene beauty of a forest blanketed in fresh snow with notes of crisp greens, snow accord, and cedarwood. Step into the quiet majesty of Utah芒聙聶s Rocky Mountains, where winter begins to surrender to spring. Inspired by forests still dusted in snow, this fragrance captures the peaceful beauty of nature芒聙聶s seasonal shift. A blend of crisp greens and lush citrus evokes the first signs of life beneath the frost, stirring the senses with clarity and calm. At its heart, a snow accord and iced florals mirror the clean chill of alpine air, while Limber Pine NaturePrint脗庐 adds a hint of evergreen vitality. These frosty elements form a veil of cool elegance, reflecting the serene stillness of a forest waking from its slumber. The mood is introspective yet luminous, like sunlight filtering through frozen branches. As the composition settles, warmth slowly rises through rich cedarwood, golden amber, and smooth sandalwood. This woody foundation brings depth and sophistication, grounding the freshness in quiet strength. It is a scent of transition and renewal, capturing the quiet power of nature as it begins to stir.

name: Isola Collection
description: The Isola Collection embodies the meeting of a place's soul and the creator's inspiration.Isola Blue, Isola Sol, Oceania,and now the latest olfactory escape,Isola Verde,all invite you to explore dreamlike horizons, from a chic Mediterranean retreat to a golden-sand tropical paradise- each creation a sensory journey, a luxurious destination to captivate the senses. Discover all 4 scents in this elegant Travel Set, presenting easy-to-pack 10ml atomizers to accompany you on adventures across the world.

name: Bitter Melon Lemon Tea
notes: Perfume Lemon, Bitter Melon, Cucumber, Jasmine, "duck Poo" Oolong Tea, Vetiver
style: Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Oolong, Smoky
description: This unexpected drink on a menu from a visit in Guangzhou led to the creation of this perfume. Sometimes, the unexpected turns out to be just what you needed!One spray, and you'll feel the cool cleansing bite of bitter melon. Suddenly, the pulp of "perfume lemon" native to the Guangdong region burst forth, bringing vibrant joy. The beautiful fragrance of Oolong tea stirs curiosity and leaves you craving for more. Crisp, citrusy and wildly refreshing!

name: Cognac Reign
notes: Caramelized Bergamot, Antique Wood, Cognac Essence, Orris Concrete, Tonka, Limousine Oak
style: Boozy, Creamy, Floral, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Dark
description: A fragrance inspired by Baroque music, in which one hears Versailles billowing out with visions of dances, intrigues, powder wigs, sumptuous gardens, & of course rivers of cognac flowing. Cognac is the spirit that reigns supreme over all of France since its inception in the 1600s.  Cognac Reign captures an evening of Lully sipping the fine French spirit with notes of caramelized bergamot, violetty orris, & tonka beans.C'est tr脙篓s fran脙搂ais!

name: Hall of Fame - Emi's Picks
description: Featured on the 11th episode of our podcast,It芒聙聶s Just Perfume,Steve and Emi discuss the unforgettable, best-of-the-best fragrances that they couldn't live without- a personal Hall of Fame. And we've put together a perfect curated Sample Pack so you can sniff along with them!Emi芒聙聶s Hall of Fame:1. Escentric Molecules - Molecule 01 + Patchouli2. Parfum d'Empire - Un Bel Amour d'Ete3. Lubin - Korrigan4. Marc Antoine-Barrois - Ganymede EDP5. Ella K - Reflet Sur L'OkavangoListen and subscribe to our podcast 芒聙聯It芒聙聶s Just Perfume芒聙聯 available wherever you listen to podcasts!

name: La Decouverte Extraits
description: Joining the best-selling La Decouverte Parisienne, this elegant coffret contains 3 x 10ml glass travel sprays ofGris Charnel Extrait, Pas Ce Soir Extrait, and Rouge Smoking Extrait.The Les Extraits have previously not been available in a travel spray size, making this set both an appealing gift and a wonderful introduction to anyone looking to experience these stunning fragrances.

name: Fig Leaf
notes: Fig Leaf, Petitgrain, Orange Blossom, Osmanthus, Musk
description: Juicy green. Ribbon strewn braids. Afternoon confessional. Romance movement. Sheer luminosity.

name: Mona
notes: Warm Stone, Cassis, Burnt Sugar, Red Amber, Vetiver, Musk
style: Avant-Garde, Earthy, Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Spicy, Sweet, Warm
description: Lustrous shadows. Asphalt steam. Silver veil. A radiating blood red glow on serpentine leather. The polished resilience of an ancient echo.A tribute to Claudia Dey's new novel DAUGHTER, one of the most anticipated literary releases of the year.

name: Tales Of Amber
notes: Moss Accord, Orange Blossom, Orris, Cistus Oil, Musk, Cinnamon Madagascar Oil, Labdanum Absolute, New Zealand Ambergris, Australian Agarwood, Vanillin, Oud Accord
style: Earthy, Floral - Spicy, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Dark
description: Tales of Amber is not a fragrance of water- it's a story told in warmth, spice, and elemental depth. Born of ambergris washed ashore on the rugged coast of New Zealand. Shaped by the heart of Australia's red earth. Composed with labdanum, oud, and musk, nature's oldest materials, made new again. Not a nostalgia trip, but a transformation, a fragrance that reawakens geological relics and makes them modern, vibrant, and vital. It wears like sunlight on traveler's skin, leaving an indelible trace of the foreboding land, a permanent mark of the heat, a breath of something timeless. A rich, elemental extrait that reimagines amber through the lens of Australia芒聙聶s sunbaked terrain and the rare beauty of deep, primal ambergris, Tales of Amber blends spice, smoke, and floral powder into a scent that feels both ancient and modern- a fossil reawakened through warmth, depth, and time.

name: Snowbird
notes: Pink Pepper, Dewy Pear, And Fig Natureprint, Carrot Seed, Violet Absolute, Patchouli Prisma, Natural Myrrh, Guaiacwood, Virginia Cedar
description: Snowbird is a radiant ode to summer, where light lingers and everything feels awake. With pear and fig at its heart, it captures the lush sweetness of fruit and bare skin warmed by the sun. There芒聙聶s an air of calm, of joy, of something deeply rooted yet gently rising, as if your body is photosynthesizing the sun芒聙聶s light itself. Though named for winter芒聙聶s wanderer, Snowbird sings of the season it calls home.

name: Discovery Set
description: Explore the vibrant, stylish, playful, and sexy world of Miami's own Binaurale with this specially priced, on-the-go set containing 2ml atomizer samples of all six fragrances in the collection:SnowbirdMatchbox  RomanceHappy HardcorePetal JusSupersolidIncident Light

name: Supersolid
notes: Italian Mandarin, French Lavender, Spanish Labdanum, Ambroxan, Amber
style: Fresh - Clean, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: A molecular skin scent that balances sleek intrigue with familiar comfort. Supersolid opens with a crisp Italian mandarin and settles over pristine ambroxan. Its futuristic clarity is softened by a hint of warm lavender and Spanish labdanum, creating an aura that feels modern and quietly magnetic. Intimate and otherworldly, Supersolid is a second skin made of style, panache, and pure, magical confidence.

name: Petal Jus
notes: Peony, Tuberose, Nectar, Vinyl, Condensed Milk, Musk, Tonka
style: Avant-Garde, Floral, Milky, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: An alluring juice of nectar and cream made of delicate peonies and sensual tuberose entice before deepening into a trap of addictive tonka and enveloping woods. After its initial act, Petal Jus reveals itself with a carnal musk and a tantalizing whip of vinyl to linger on. A tantalizing floral with impure intentions

name: Matchbox Romance
notes: Cardamom Pods, Cinnamon Leaf, Fennel, Rose De Mai, Carnation, Vanilla Bourbon, Olibanum, Tobacco Leaf, Haitian Vetiver
description: An unforgettable fragrance that lingers long after the night fades. Deeply layered and undeniably addictive. Matchbox Romance opens with a fiery spark, like the strike of a match, before diving into rich, dark florals- black rose and carnation- blended with warm spices and enveloped in swirling clouds of bourbon vanilla and incense smoke. Sensual and primal, the flame calls out, drawing you in- even if you could resist, would you want to?

name: Happy Hardcore
notes: Nutmeg
style: Fruity, Spicy
description: A cooling spice mix of saffron, nutmeg and black pepper pulsate to the hedonistic rhythm of rose oxide and jasmine sambac until the beat drops with an electrifying shot of guava jelly making way for a pumping bass of fractionated patchouli and oakmoss.

name: Incident Light
notes: Italian Bergamot, Aldehydes, Pink Pepper, Orange Zest, Fresh Grass, Solar Musks, Cashmere, Vetiver
style: Citrus, Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft
description: Pure joy abounds with Incident Light, a radiant fragrance that evokes sparkling sunny skies above endless green meadows. Clean aldehydes float skyward with bursting citruses and uplifting pink pepper to join a serene solar accord, while back down on earth fresh cut grass and deep rooted vetiver ground the senses. Vibrant, carefree, and utterly delightful, Incident Light is more than just a "freshie"- it's a whole new state of ecstatic existence.

name: Venus In Tuberose
notes: Raspberry Gelato, Hibiscus, Tuberose, Lime Pulp, Cream Soda, Grass
style: Creamy, Floral - White, Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Sweet
description: A scent of pure, love-drunk bliss, the giddy moments of sensuality when a new crush becomes something more passionate, physical, real. When blushes turn to embraces, melted lip gloss, two lovers begging each other for more. Ecstasy in indelible moments, the future tantalizingly uncertain. More honey, more sweetness, just- more, sweetheart!

name: Cuir InfraRouge
notes: Raspberry Accord, Cedarwood, Leather Accord, Suede, Vanilla CO2, Tonka Bean Orpur
style: Creamy, Fruity, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Sweet
description: Developed in collaboration with perfumer Jordi Fernandez, Cuir Infra_Rouge was inspired by the taste of a raspberry cocktail while attending an electronic music festival. Founder Thibaud Crivelli shares, 芒聙聹This creation is a delight: it sees an incredible contrast between a young, vibrant, luminous and nearly fluorescent raspberry accord on one side, and a deep, comforting and sophisticated leather accord on the other.芒聙聺This vibrant contrast sets the tone from the very first notes, an invigorating blend of raspberry accord and fresh, juicy citruses. The heart sees cedarwood coupled with the powdery notes of orris & cinnamon, while osmanthus brings leather and apricot tones. The drydown is built on a beautiful combination of leather suede accord, oud and patchouli. Vanilla prolongs the elegance of the creation with its addictive and intoxicating warmth.

name: Oud Sapparot
notes: Thai Pineapple, Cambodian Oud, Indian Saffron, Dark Leather, Smokey Silver Birch, Cinnamon, Coconut, Sweet Vanilla, White Musk
style: Fruity, Smoky, Spicy, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy, Woody - Dark
description: In Thailand, pineapple is more than a fruit... it is kissed by flames, caramelized to reveal its smoky, golden intensity. Just like this transformation, Oud Sapparot balances tropical radiance with the dark elegance of oud. Juicy Thai Pineapple meets the spicy heat of Indian Saffron and Ceylon Cinnamon, before melting into a bold heart of Dark Leather and Smoky Silver Birch. At its core, the deep, resinous soul of Cambodian Oud lingers, softened by Mexican Coconut, Sweet Vanilla, and White Musk. A sensual whisper on sun-warmed skin. Oud Sapparot- where fire sweetens the fruit, and shadows embrace the light.

name: Delizia Esotica
notes: Bergamot, Tropical Fruits, Passionfruit, Guava, Lemon, Wild Berries, Epiphyllum Flower, Gardenia, Karo Karounde, Tolu Balsam, White Chocolate, Davana, Agarwood, Musk, Cambodian Oud, Vanilla, Civet
style: Floral - Fruity, Fresh, Fruity, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy, Warm, Woody - Fresh
description: Delizia Esotica is a vibrant and enveloping combination of mouthwatering exotic notes that whisks you away to a tropical paradise. From the sublimely fruity and fresh opening of mango and pineapple, to the heart of rich, enveloping bouquet of tropical flowers and sweet spices, this is a fragrance of both intimate comfort and cheerful adventure- an unforgettable vacation of excitement and relaxation in equal measure. The warm, soothing base of Delizia Esotica features sensual woody and musky notes that lend exceptional longevity, keeping the initial freshness alive for hours and leaving an attention-grabbing trail. Escape from the humdrum of everyday life with this tantalizing getaway of a perfume, and leave your troubles at home.

name: Portuguese Man O' War
notes: Ginger, Saffron, Immortelle, Caribbean Gunpowder, Jasmine Sambac, Geranium, Seaweed Absolute, Sandalwood, Tonka
style: Green / Herbaceous, Salty / Oceanic, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Blazing sunlight glistens then fractures on the roiling surface of an angry tropical sea. A caravel bobs among the waves, its tall sail blasted by hot, salty winds. Dangling beneath the ghostly vessel, a curtain of lethal tentacles sways menacingly in the swell. The Portuguese man o芒聙聶 war drifts, letting its unwitting prey approach. Up to 100 feet long, their lacy tentacles exude crippling venom with the merest touch. In an instant, the prey is paralyzed, and as its organs slowly liquify, the colony of zooids begin to feed.While it芒聙聶s wise to avoid a Portuguese man o芒聙聶 war in the wild, prepare for danger and excitement when you encounter this Zoologist perfume. Crisp ginger and metallic gunpowder deliver a fiery sting to open, before casting you adrift on a wave of briny seaweed absolute, immortelle and geranium. You芒聙聶ll thrill to this enticing scent where the only pain is the delicious pang of longing.

name: Fleur De Peau - Eau de Toilette
notes: Aldehydes, Pink Pepper, Rose, Iris, Ambrette, Ambergris, Musk
description: A tribute to the mythical love between Psyche and Eros, which produced their daughter, Hedone, this new Eau de Toilette version of Diptyque's bestselling musk takes the warm, sweet, sensual combination of iris and ambrette at the core of the EDP and presents it in a lighter, brighter, everyday perfect concentration. This new balance tilts slightly away from the still richly multifaceted iris, and towards the absolute ambrette seed extract, which is drawn from hibiscus flowers and smells sweet and pear-like with a subtle animalic purr, this deeply captivating fragrance feels cottony, downy soft, and gently but compellingly sexy. If Fleur de Peau EDP was the more casual side of elegant, the EDT is just the reverse- the most elegant side of casual, perfect to reach for every day you feel like your lightest, brightest self.

name: Peche Velours
notes: Peach, Violet, Tuberose, Jasmine, Vanilla, Musk, Sandalwood
style: Classic Feminine, Creamy, Floral - White, Sweet
description: The sun is high, the air is warm, and on a crumpled tablecloth, a fresh peach is waiting to be bitten. P脙陋che Velours, that's the moment. The one where summer settles on the skin, sweet, tender, luminous.From the first notes, a juicy and velvety peach explodes in the mouth, melting and full of light. It evokes the still warm pulp of a fruit picked by hand, in the shade of a tree in the middle of August. Then come the flowers. Solar tuberose, powdery violet, delicate jasmine... A white bouquet that dances gently with the heat, bringing a feeling of airy, almost cottony softness.Sweet vanilla, light musk, silky sandalwood... A comforting base that melts on the skin like a golden memory. The trail is tender, enveloping, subtly greedy 芒聙聰 like the last bite of a summer dessert that you don't forget.

name: Looking for Vanilla
notes: Jasmine Sambac, Orange Accord, Bitter Almond, Tonka Bean, Cherry, Vanilla Absolute, Patchouli
description: Perfume often comes with endless stories, sometimes too many. We chose to smile at this reality and give a simple and honest answer to one of the most frequent questions: 芒聙聹I芒聙聶m looking for vanilla perfumes.芒聙聺 A clear way to express a taste without technical vocabulary. A lab sample left on a desk, discovered by chance芒聙娄 and from that spark, Looking for Vanilla/43 was born.Starting with Indian jasmine and a hint of orange, Looking For Vanilla immediately bursts forth with a sunny brightness that is effortless to enjoy. The heart reveals a bold combination of bitter almond, tonka bean and cherry that offer a deep, sweet, yet confident gourmand impact. Finally, the base composed of vanilla and a special specimen of patchouli provides intense power, warmth and depth.Immediate, intense and long-lasting, Looking for Vanilla is a pure unisex fragrance that instantly captivates the nose from the very first spray芒聙聯 this is the vanilla everyone has been waiting for.

name: J'ai Trois Amours
notes: Banana Flower Accord, Triple-origin Jasmine Extract, Pink Pepper Extract
style: Floral - Fruity, Floral - White, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous
description: Delicious sparkles of laughter. A dance of elation whisked away by love at first sight. Head-over-heels, and the unquenchable desire to embrace the world in laughter unleashed. Notes of banana blossom, delectably chypre. Passion poised on the precipice of joy.Please note:Complimentary samples availablewith any product purchase. Please request at checkout in the comments box.

name: Numero Uno (I)
notes: Pink Pepper, Rum, Violet, Raspberry, Patchoui, Cedarwood
style: Boozy, Earthy, Floral - Ambery Spice, Fruity, Woody Ambery Floral
description: An intriguing and sultry blend of floral, woody and gourmand notes, Numero Uno (I) is an embodiment of indulgence. Built around powdery allure of violet, it is framed by spiced baies rose and laced with a dash of rich, satiny rum. Violet芒聙聶s velvety aroma, a symbol of romantic love, takes center stage, unleashing an aura of sensuality and refinement.

name: Eden
notes: Grapefruit, Plum, White Flowers, Woods
style: Citrus, Floral - White, Fruity, Woody - Fresh
description: Indulge in the forbidden with a fragrance that embodies both temptation and elegance芒聙聰a daring overdose of the world芒聙聶s most luxurious florals and woods, crafted to captivate every sense. The opening is a tantalizing blend of juicy plum and sparkling grapefruit, igniting the senses with a burst of fruity freshness. As it unfolds, a captivating symphony of florals and opulent woods takes center stage, creating a mesmerizing, layered complexity that芒聙聶s as timeless as it is modern. Elegant yet daring, sensual yet mysterious, this fragrance evokes the allure of the Garden of Eden芒聙聰where beauty becomes sin and innocence is lured by darkness. A fragrance for those who dare to embrace their inner power, it芒聙聶s both classic and cutting-edge, seductive and bold芒聙聰an intoxicating signature scent for anyone who seeks to leave a lasting, unforgettable impression.

name: Juanillo
notes: Mandarin, Orange, Lemon, Pistachio, Coconut, Dates, Ambroxan, Praline, Musk
style: Citrus, Fruity, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy
description: An intensely tempting fragrance evocative of the tropical beaches of the Dominican Republic, Juanillo is built around a delectable fusion of sultry gourmand notes. An opening of airy mandarin and vivacious orange delves into the heart of savory pistachio entwined with honeyed sweetness of dates, their delectable aromas softened and smoothed by the creamy coconut.

name: Uluwatu
notes: Matcha, Lemon, Blackcurrant, Mint, Orange Blossom, Lily Of The Valley, Vanilla, Amber, Patchouli
style: Citrus, Floral - White, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous
description: A mesmerizing and sensual fragrance, this perfume opens with an exhilarating burst of blackcurrant, zesty lemon, and the show-stopping note of matcha tea, blending vibrant freshness with a subtle, green elegance that captivates from the first breath. As it unfolds, the heart reveals the delicate romance of orange blossom and the soft, airy sweetness of muguet, creating a perfect harmony of floral sophistication. The scent then deepens into a rich, warm base of amber, velvety vanilla, and earthy patchouli, adding depth and lasting sensuality. This fragrance is a masterful blend of contrasts芒聙聰bright and refreshing yet warm and mysterious芒聙聰leaving an unforgettable trail of elegance and allure wherever you go.

name: Clifton
notes: Fig, Cardamom, Peach, Sandalwood, Orris, Orange Blossom, Cedarwood, Tonka, Vanilla, Vetiver, Amber
style: Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Warm, Woody - Spicy
description: A charismatic woody gourmand boasting the savor of cardamom-infused fig, Clifton transports the wearer to Cape Town芒聙聶s luscious coastal landscape, weaving warm smoky spices with the milky sap of the fig for an olfactive escape that is both enveloping and serene. At the heart, vibrant notes of peach and sweet orange flower melt into the creamy layer of orris, while balmy sandalwood whispers of romance.

name: Vanillium
notes: Bourbon Madagascan Vanilla Tincture, Vanilla Absolute, Thai Oud, Black Coffee, Tobacco, Cocoa, Patchouli, Banzoin And Musk

So here I blended the best of Thai Oud with a profile perfectly balanced between those fruity floral sweet notes that Thai Oud are known for, and that smooth clean woody quality without the funk. name: L'Oud Marin
notes: Atlantic Brown Algae, Lamanaria, Seawood Kombu Tincture, Amyris, Styrax, Nagarmotha, Cacao, Oud Kinam, Ambergris, Beeswax, Vanilla, Virginia Cedar, Vetiver
style: Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Salty / Oceanic, Woody - Dark
description: L芒聙聶Oud Marin is a meeting of elements, a dialogue between salt and smoke, tide and timber. It captures the quiet violence of a post-storm shoreline, where sea-drenched wood crackles underfoot and the air hums with mineral tension. The opening is cold and bracing: a surge of Atlantic seaweed and a rare in-house kombu tincture bring an immediate hit of saline, marine intensity. This is not a stylized sea breeze- it is the sea itself, wild and organic. At the heart lies a tapestry of dark botanicals. Amyris from Haiti lends a soft, smoky glow, while Honduran styrax deepens the composition with its tarry, resinous undertone. Nagarmotha root from India adds an earthy, wind-swept dryness, and a trace of Madagascan cacao absolute suggests storm-scorched wood, bitter, dry, and elemental. The base anchors the entire composition in depth and memory. Kinam oud from Hainan is the soul of the fragrance: dense, meditative, and rare. Around it swirl notes of ambergris tincture- a blend of black and white- and warm, tactile beeswax. Finally, Madagascar vanilla, Virginia cedarwood, and Indian vetiver close the scent with a golden, slightly smoky warmth, like sun returning after the flood. L芒聙聶Oud Marin is a fragrance for those who hear the sea not in the wave, but in the silence that follows. Powerful yet tactile, it doesn芒聙聶t narrate- it remembers.

name: Bestia Sacra
notes: Bergamot, Frankincense Serrata, Frankincense Boswellia Sacra, Myrrh, Opoponax, Nagarmotha, Musk, Castoreum, Civet, Sandalwood, Oakmoss, Benzoin, Labdanum
style: Animalic, Earthy, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Dark
description: Bestia Sacra is an offering to the sacred wild- a fragrance that speaks in incense and shadow, skin and smoke. It recalls ancient rituals where the divine met the feral, and scent was both invocation and surrender. The opening is sharp and luminous: a resinous burst of Italian bergamot and a dual dose of frankincense; one refined (Boswellia Serrata from India), the other raw and personal, a home tincture of Boswellia Sacra from Oman. Together, they strike like flint: sacred and searing. The heart is where the beast stirs. Myrrh and opoponax create a molten resin core, while Nagarmotha threads through with dark, rooty smoke. Then the animalic chorus emerges: musk, castoreum, and civet form a primal accord that feels both intimate and otherworldly. This is scent as flesh, breath, and instinct- as far from modern and clean as it gets. The drydown smolders: Indian sandalwood, oakmoss, and benzoin wrap the composition in warmth and balsamic depth. Labdanum adds its leathery, sun-drenched gravitas, while a final echo of nagarmotha lingers like a shadow on skin. Bestia Sacra is not for the tame- devotional, carnal, and unforgettable, it's meant to be worn as a sacred mark.

description: The newest release from one of the most unique and creative voices in niche perfumery, COME is Antonio Gardoni's olfactory exploration of all things green. COME explores the full spectrum of green odors: fragile, layered, elusive, complex, and ever-shifting. It welcomes us with the bright lights of bergamot and helichrysum (immortelle flower), evoking the dewey-fresh natural green of a wet lawn in the early glow of sunrise. It takes shape in a thicker green, that of fig leaves falling from the tree, the darker tones of tea lives and animalic civet, the green oxidization of exposed metal, or the deep, shimmering green lacing across a pool of petrol, smoky and resinous. COME vibrates between contrasts and harmonies: the balsamic sweetness of benzoin and hte earthy intensity of oud, outlining a rich emerald green, unveiled against the dustier nuances of tonka bean and musk. And COME is a palpable green: the patchouli note mimetic and vegetal, the honey melting into a celadon-green pool of vanilla and jasmine, milky and lithe, vast and luminous.COME is an open question, a declaration of perceptual, chromatic, and olfactive freedom.

Drifting through strange, uncharted skies, the moon wanders across the boundless cosmos, searching for a place to belong. A scent cold and fragile, yet also warm and tender. description: Embrace the romance of the dark with this seductive and haunting creation, a collaboration with the musical version of 芒聙聵Dracula,' which has been a decade-long beloved show in South Korea. The hypnotic power of Dracula芒聙聶s eternal love is captured in a gorgeously gothic floral that crosses the boundaries of science and art. Black roses symbolizing immortal love, vanilla and coconut resembling Dracula芒聙聶s sweet whispers, and sweet tobacco with its addictive and dangerous charm come together in an intoxicating ode to eternal feelings of falling in an irresistible, fateful love.

name: Rose Absolue
notes: Fruity Accents, Citrus Sparkle, Soft Spices, Rose Absolute, Floral Warmth, Amber, Soft Woods, Resin, Benzoin, Amber Gris
style: Floral - Spicy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: ROSE ABSOLUE builds on the rich Rose Flash from Tauerville, reimagined with touch greater depth, and a hint of added richness. It reflects Andy Tauer芒聙聶s deep love for rose and his passion for creating expressive, long-lasting fragrances.The scent opens with a bright flash of gourmand fruity berries, citrus, and soft spices. The rose shows its uber rich presence right from the beginning. It blooms into a velvety heart of luxurious rose absolute, and settles into a warm, embracing base of amber, woods, and resins.Familiar, yet fuller. A rose with presence; it is  bold, elegant, and unmistakably Tauer.

name: Vanilla Absolue
notes: Spices, Rosy Geranium With A Dash Of Dried Fruits, Dark Vanilla, Rose, Rich Dried Tobacco Leaves, Labdanum, Patchouli, Balsamic Resins, Coumarin, Ambergris
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: VANILLA ABSOLUE builds on the Vanilla Flash from Tauerville, offering a deeper, and a bit more luxurious interpretation of vanilla.It reflects Andy Tauer芒聙聶s ongoing exploration of warm, resinous themes and his love for long-lasting, characterful perfumes that unfold slowly on skin. The fragrance opens with a soft glow of spices and a hint of fruits over a rich rosy geranium layer, leading into a rich, textured heart of dark vanilla, rose, and tobacco. The vanilla builds on a natural C02 extract of vanilla pods that is warm, balsamic and woody. A warm base of patchouli, amber, and balsamic resins anchors the composition with lasting depth and sensuality.Vanilla absolue is a perfectly unisex, warm and radiant, comforting vanilla perfume far beyond the ordinary. A vanilla with soul.

name: Discovery Set
description: Discover our six curated favorite perfumes by Carine Roitfeld! Samples include: Carine, Vladimir, Kar-Wai, Forgive Me, Sebastian, George.

name: Pluck!
notes: Tomato Leaf, Pine Nut, Sichuan Pepper, Basil, Blackcurrant Bud, Lavender, Geranium
style: Floral, Fresh, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy
description: Sliced, squished, whole or chopped. The simple tomato brings such disproportionate joy.Pluck! is a perfumed panzanella; tomato芒聙聶s of all shapes and size, pine nut sprinkles, tear of basil, splash of balsamic, drizzle of olive oil and a pinch of Sichuan pepper. The vine that nurtures shouldn芒聙聶t be overlooked, crushed between fingers. Yum!

name: Immortelle Solaire
notes: Helichrysum Full Spectrum Ultrasound Grand Cru, Patchouli Oil, Hazelnut Ultrasound Grand Cru, Styrax Oil
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Light, Floral - Spicy, Fruity, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: An elegant and gorgeously contrasting fragrance that captures the essence of a scorching summer in the South of France, Immortelle Solaire is a sunlight-drenched floral, vibrant and unforgettable, featuring a a truly unique new Helichrysum extract developed from 18 months of painstaking research by L'Atelier Fran脙搂ais des Mati脙篓res. This groundbreaking "full spectrum" extract combines traditional steam distillation with an ultrasonic distillation of the previously discarded leftover materials, resulting in a far more complete olfactive portrait of immortelle, faithful to the true smell of the natural plant- aromatic and sweetly fruity, with contrasting tones of spice and leather- without the harsher, drier edge deriving from prior techniques. By combining this luminous accord with facets of licorice, hazelnut, and candied fruits in subtle balance with darker notes of resin, wood, spice, and patchouli, it evokes gorgeously intense summer heat on Proven脙搂al limestone- an unforgettable play of light and shadow.

name: Tabac Dore
style: Animalic, Earthy, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Experience the true depth and complexities of Bortnikoff's mastery in this rare collection of attars. These intense, concentrated oils provide hours of enjoyment even with the most minimal application.Combining a richly rounded tobacco absolute- robust and regal, with naturalistic fresh spice to compliment the warmer, smokier tones- along with exceptional wild oud from Thailand and Vietnam, Tabac Dore Oil is the ultimate way to enjoy this standout scent.

name: George
notes: Cannabis, Iranian Galbanum, Violet Leaf, Jasmine, Rose, Iris, Oakmoss, Wood, Earth, Leather
style: Earthy, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Fresh
description: Poised between tradition and modernity, this is an eclectic perfume. Electrified and inspirited by accords of Iranian galbanum resin. The delicate green and floral notes of violet leaf 芒聙聯 an utterly exceptional leaf absolute 芒聙聯 are combined with florals and enhanced by the classic notes of wood, earth and leather offered by oakmoss.

name: Sebastian
notes: Immortelle, Tuberose, Sandalwood, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Floral, Floral - White, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Dark
description: Strength and sensuality. The duality of black and red. The fragrance evokes passion, energy, ardor and the languid spirit of dance. It is constructed around the immortelle (with the evocative Latin name of 芒聙聹golden sun芒聙聺) and opens with the strong, energetic scent of immortelle and Indian tuberose absolutes. These are lightened by an aqua flora captive merged with the soft notes of sandalwood. At its base a magnificent, creamy, natural vanilla seals the romance.

name: Vladimir Travel Spray Set
description: Stylish, practical, and easy to bring just about anywhere, this must-have travel set is the perfect way to enjoy the elegant unisex iris and amber of Vladimir Eau de Parfum. Each set includes one elegant black travel case and two 7.5ml atomizer vials designed to fit perfectly within.

name: Vladimir
notes: Iris, Incense, Amber, Grapefruit, Bergamot, Sage, Cedar, Geranium
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Light, Woody Ambery Floral
description: A story of contrasts finding its inspiration in Carine芒聙聶s Slavic roots. The story of a family, of love and transmission. Vladimir is the name of Carine芒聙聶s son. The contrasting ingredients of iris, incense and amber blow hot and cold, express rigor and fluidity. The fragrance opens with the icy effect of grapefruit and natural bergamot enveloped in the aromatic notes of French sage. The heart reveals the spicy notes of natural cedar and Egyptian geranium. Then arrives the warmth of Moroccan iris, a modern leathery note and a complex ambery accord composed of sensual, woody, vanilla notes.

name: Kar-Wai Travel Spray Set
description: Stylish, practical, and easy to bring just about anywhere, this must-have travel set is the perfect way to enjoy the stylish, cardamom-forward modern leather of Kar-Wai Eau de Parfum. Each set includes one elegant black travel case and two 7.5ml atomizer vials designed to fit perfectly within.

name: Kar-Wai
notes: Smoked Longjing Tea, Osmanthus, Vetiver, Bergamot, Cardamom, Turkish Rose, Jasmine, Musks, Saffiano Leather
style: Animalic, Floral, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Spicy
description: Addiction of the senses. A perfume offering the forceful contrast of violence and sensuality. The exploration of another continent. Smoky tea combined with the modern leather notes of natural osmanthus conjures an invitation to dangerous, romantic games. Vetiver creates imperceptible fluidity. Cardamom, rose, and jasmine sambac nurture the intrigue. Many musks and saffiano intensify the mystery.

name: Forgive Me Travel Spray Set
description: Stylish, practical, and easy to bring just about anywhere, this must-have travel set is the perfect way to enjoy the complex and elegant tuberose of Forgive Me Eau de Parfum. Each set includes one elegant black travel case and two 7.5ml atomizer vials designed to fit perfectly within.

name: Forgive Me
notes: Tangerine, Pink Pepper, Tunisia Orange Blossom, India Tuberose, Ylang Ylang, Gardenia, Indonesian Patchouli, Cashmeran, Olibanum, Labdanum
style: Earthy, Floral, Floral - Citrus, Floral - White, Resinous / Balsamic
description: Wearing 芒聙聹Forgive Me芒聙聺 is like revealing the other woman who is in you, like seeing yourself differently in the mirror. A fragrance expressing feelings of duality, passion, irresistible attraction. The trail left by the perfume is surprising, narcotic, and filled by a magnetic elegance.

name: Carine Travel Spray Set
description: Stylish, practical, and easy to bring just about anywhere, this must-have travel set is the perfect way to enjoy the fresh, romantic beauty of Carine Eau de Parfum. Each set includes one elegant black travel case and two 7.5ml atomizer vials designed to fit perfectly within.

name: Carine
notes: Patchouli, Vetiver, Cashmeran, White Amber, Pink Pepper, Jasmine, Gardenia, Rose
style: Earthy, Floral, Floral - Spicy, Spicy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: As the strains of gypsy music float in the air, her gaze reveals the sensual intimacy of the words she murmurs in his ear. A scent of patchouli lingers, expressing all the passion of this enigmatic Parisian芒聙聶s fantasy. Carine is a portrait perfume, a seductive and surprising olfactory reflection.

name: Kheerin
notes: Jungle Pepper, Trat Oud, Kaffir Lime, Finger Root, Oakmoss, Champaca Leaf, Ginger, Jatamansi, Austalian Sandalwood, Hay Absolute, Litsea Cubeba, Turmeric, Guava Leaf, Vetiver, Galbanum
style: Earthy, Exotic, Fresh, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Dark, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: Kheerin, a word derived from Sanskrit and roughly translated as "Lord of the Mountain," is a perfect description for this fresh, fiery, and richly woodsy green oud parfum- a rare and priceless limited release from Prin Lomros. Like the dawn mist rolling over a sacred mountain, where dense jungle meets an endless sky, Kheerin is a fragrance thick with the scent of earth, ancient trees, and untamed life. Made from exquisite all natural materials, this fragrance truly captures the spirit of the Sacred Wild.

name: Nisatiruk
notes: Siberian Musk, Thai Oud, Black Spruce Absolute, Tuberose Absolute, Boronia, Hiba, Tulsi, Orris Concrete, Caraway, Jatamansi, Vetiver, Clove, Beeswax Absolute, Blackcurrant Bud Absolute, Mate Absolute, Ambrette Seed Absolute, Mushroom Absolute, Clary Sage Absolute, Hay Absolute
style: Earthy, Floral - Ambery Spice, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Nisatiruk paints a vivid picture of a forest bathed in the stillness and mystery of night. In the hush of night, when the ancient forest breathes under a canopy of stars, a solitary spirit awakens. A journey into the depths where earth, wood, and shadow entwine. It evokes the primal instinct and quiet mystery of a creature that thrives in twilight. Silent and elusive, it moves through shadows and moonbeams. An ethereal creature born from the heart of the wild, this green, fruity, earthy, and animalic Pure Parfum is a rare treasure, with an extremely limited edition of 120 total bottles produced in a one batch production run.

name: Eau de Cologne
notes: Verbena, Bergamot, Orange, Petitgrain, Lavender, Basil, Rosemary, Neroili, Musk
style: Citrus, Cologne, Fresh, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy
description: A fresh splash that would energise and enliven even Sleeping Beauty. Frank, direct, addictive, it is each morning芒聙聶s shockwave. Fusing verbena, aromatic lavender, rosemary, basil, and the lightness of a flower note. Add a trace of benzoin for long-lasting freshness. Contains Essences of Verbena, Bergamot, Orange, Petit Grain, Basil, Rosemary, Neroli, Musks. Cologne designed by Fran脙搂oise Caron and the Takasago perfume team.

name: Purple Accento
notes: Bergamot, Mandarin, Hyacinth, Pineapple, Loganberry, Orris, Jasmine, Pink Pepper, Amber, Musk, Sandalwood, Vanilla, Oud
style: Creamy, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Sweet, Woody - Dark
description: Purple Accento: the ultimate fresh and fruity exotic amber scent. This perfume is beautifully dressed in extravagant purple crystals, the perfect appearance to introduce the blend guarded within. Opening with succulent Mediterranean fruits and zesty citrus notes that help to revel the elegance on first impact. The well orchestrated opera of naturally distilled florals firmly stands out after a few seconds from the first spray, conveying to the skin an intense and rich style reminiscent of glorious times. The base notes proudly support the whole pyramid with amber, musk, vanilla and oud for a long lasting exclusive dream.

name: Crush Balls
notes: Green Grass, Rosemarin, Yellow Fuzz, Hedge Flowers, White Cotton, Sporty Accord, Hard Court
style: Fresh, Fresh - Clean, Green / Herbaceous
description: From the unmistakable crack of a sealed can of vibrantly yellow tennis balls, with that oh-so-satisfying aroma of sealed ozone, to the crisp pop of clean white outfits against the deep green of a freshly mown grass court, tennis is a game of impeccable style and unforgettable moments. But you don't need to be at the Center Court of Wimbledon to appreciate the simple beauty of the game- from the maniacal precision of top-level professionals to the blood, sweat, and joy of the weekend racquet-swinger: on every level, tennis is meant to be savored. Crush Balls is a love letter to the peerless aesthetics of this remarkable sport, a bright, sporty, and endlessly cheerful blend of fresh green grass, summertime florals and aromatics, freshly unsealed tennis balls, and clean linens. It's a vision of tennis courts, tennis culture and a deep evocation of the uniquely perfect feeling of that crisp crush of a tennis ball.

name: Smoke Jumping II
notes: Charred AMBURANA, Mulled Concord Grapes, Purple Oud Resins, Alpine Smoke, Vanilla, Deer Musk
style: Smoky
description: A nod to the fire seasons which overlapped with Napa and Sonoma芒聙聶s harvests in 2018, 2019 and 2020. As I recall my time spent in cellars, it芒聙聶s impossible to separate those memories from living in and around wildfire smoke..Mother Nature is powerful. Smoke Jumping II builds on the success of the original芒聙娄the only differences stem from upgrading the charred oak accord to charred AMBURANA, and incorporating agarwood resins. These changes make for a more true-to-life alpine smoke experience. Fans of the original Smoke Jumping have a lot to look forward to芒聙娄

name: Solstice
notes: Watermelon, Marine Accord, Jasmine, Violet, Muguet, Amber, Sinfonide
style: Floral - Fruity, Floral - White, Fruity, Salty / Oceanic, Sweet
description: A youthful waft of sun-ripened watermelon, honeyed lily, and night-blooming jasmine grounded in soft, sexy amber. Solstice is the scent of clean, ocean-sprayed skin during the longest days of Nordic Summer.

name: Sampler Set
description: Discover the treasure of Le Gout de Peau (The Taste of Skin). Through journeys across continents Le Gout de Peau distils cultures into scents that awaken memories of distant horizons lingering in the colective consciousness.2ml Dab-on Vial Sampler Includes:KyotoAurora BorealisHoh XilLei Gong MountainDun Huang

name: Zuko
notes: Turmeric, Cinnamon Leaf, Camphor, Hinoki, Clove Bud, Red Pine, Todo Pine, Agarwood, Vetiver, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Benzoin
style: Earthy, Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: This perfume represents 芒聙聵Zuko芒聙聶, which has been used in Japan for more than 1,200 years, and has been fused and evolved with modern science and technology to create a liquid perfume.This is a modern version of Zuko using herbal medicine such as turmeric and clove, camphor and agarwood, which are said to have been used as medicine by Kobo Daishi Kukai (774芒聙聯835) about 1,200 years ago.Traditional Zuko is a fine powder made by drying and mixing herbal medicines such as agarwood, clove, cinnamon and turmeric, which has also been used as a medicine. Before beginning their ascetic practices, monks would take Zuko in their mouths or apply it to their bodies to remove impurities and purify their bodies and minds. This is believed to purify three elements: body, speech and spirit.

name: Summer Yummer
notes: Apple Juice, Pear Juice, Blackcurrant Juice, Raspberry Candy, Peach Candy, Vanilla Bean, Sour Cream
description: Summer Yummer is a celebration of sweetness and nostalgia, inviting you to revel in its playful and indulgent charm. The perfume opens with a juicy splash of apple, pear, and blackcurrant, instantly evoking the joy of stepping into a whimsical sweet shop. Its heart blooms with raspberry and peach candies, wrapping the senses in nostalgic, fruity delight. The scent settles into a creamy finish of vanilla bean and tangy sour cream, leaving a luscious, velvety trail that芒聙聶s both comforting and irresistibly sweet. Whether it's the fruity sparkle or the creamy richness that captures you, this fragrance transports you to a whimsical world of sweet, joyful indulgence.

name: No. 4 Sport
notes: Lemon, Grapefruit, Bergamot, Melon, Agave, Pineapple, Ozonic Notes, Sea Water
style: Fresh, Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean
description: The original Thomas Kosmala No. 4 Apr脙篓s l芒聙聶Amour was an immediate breakout hit- a sheer, warm musk with a sultry amber sensuality and stunning longevity that elevated it far beyond "skin scent" and into secret weapon territory, it quickly became a cult favorite, as well as a top choice for potent, sophisticated layering. In an inspiring dialogue between perfumer and audience, Thomas Kosmala now presents a set of dynamic new reimagined versions of No. 4, layering vibrant new themes over the seductive intensity and projection of the original.No. 4 Sport, as you might have guessed, takes the musky sensuality of Apr脙篓s l芒聙聶Amour and adds an energetic and complex layer of vibrant citrus, sweet tropical fruit, and fresh, bracing seawater and ocean air to produce an uplifting yet sophisticated eau de parfum with an invigorating flair. Sporty, spicy, and more than a little sexy, No. 4 Sport evokes the classic sport scents of the 90's, all grown up and ready for prime time.

name: No. 4 Neon
notes: Pomelo, Yuzu, Mandarin, Melon, Galbanum, Mango, Ozonic Notes, Aldehydes, Solar Notes
style: Citrus, Fresh, Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous
description: The original Thomas Kosmala No. 4 Apr脙篓s l芒聙聶Amour was an immediate breakout hit- a sheer, warm musk with a sultry amber sensuality and stunning longevity that elevated it far beyond "skin scent" and into secret weapon territory, it quickly became a cult favorite, as well as a top choice for potent, sophisticated layering. In an inspiring dialogue between perfumer and audience, Thomas Kosmala now presents a set of dynamic new reimagined versions of No. 4, layering vibrant new themes over the seductive intensity and projection of the original.No. 4 Neon is an exhilaratingly fresh and fruity interpretation of Apr脙篓s l芒聙聶Amour that glows with the piercing energy of Shibuya or the Vegas Strip. Vivid, exotic citrus notes of yuzu and pomelo combine with the spiky green intensity of galbanum, balanced with the juicy ripeness of mango and melon. A base of solar and ozone notes combine with the original No. 4's nuclear projection and longevity, crafting an unmistakably modern profile bound to cause smiles and attract attention wherever it goes. Looking for a positively electric fresh, fruity unisex you'll want to wear everywhere? Look no further than No. 4 Neon.

name: Ambre Liquide
notes: Myrrh, Damask Rose, Styrax, Labdanum, Vanilla, Amber, Frankincense
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Amber
description: Drawn straight from the fantastical Middle Ages and the legendary pomander- that perfume-jewel used to ensure good health for body and soul- Ambre Liquide, like a precious talisman, exhales a marvelous amber, vanilla and slightly sweet scent with mystical, comforting powers.Reinterpreted today by Dominique Ropion from an incredible recipe dating from 1348, rich in fragrant ingredients to ward off the Black Death and the forces of evil, its intensely fragrant formula immediately transports us to another world. Delectable scents of spices and aromatics are released, including warm amber, resinous absolute of cistus, a wild shrub from the arid Spanish scrublands; damask rose, the sweetest, most opulent and honeyed of all roses; heady, intoxicating wild myrrh; styrax resin with its warm musky trail of leather tones; and highly spiritual frankincense.

name: Summer Street
notes: Bergamot, Cassis, Blackcurrant And Apricot Jam, Davana, Rose, Muguet, Night-blooming Jasmine, Honeysuckle, Benzoin, Cedar, Vanilla, Spanish Honey
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Floral - Light, Fruity, Sweet, Woody - Amber
description: Summer Street welcomes you into the bliss of saturated summers past, soaked in the dreamy glow of golden hour, and invites you to slip into your favorite memory, when the air was rich with honeysuckle, and evenings were lit by fireflies.A luminous opening of mouthwatering blackcurrant and apricot jam, brightened by cheery bergamot and tempered by davana, evokes the sweet warmth of a sun-drenched afternoon. A floral heart of fresh honeysuckle and lush rose unfolds like a painting of fields of flowers glowing in the midday light, while night-blooming jasmine, harvested during the summer solstice at its richest potency, infuses the fragrance with romantic depth. Meanwhile, muguet, captured in all its gorgeous subtlety via a molecular triumph of headspace technology, lends a dewy, delicate facet. Finally, the fragrance settles into a luxurious base of benzoin, cedarwood, and vanilla, mirroring the glowing amber warmth of the lingering sun. Spanish honey, infused with subtle orange-blossom nuances from the bees芒聙聶 floral gathering, adds an elegant sweetness that mingles with the enveloping feel of the precious woods.Summer Street embodies everything that made your favorite summers so enchanting. A captivating perfume that lets you breathe in the golden haze of what summers used to feel like.

name: Plum Cream
notes: Davana, Rum, Salted Prune Accord, Immortelle, Cistus Absolute, Cypriol, Saffiano, Oakwood
style: Boozy, Fruity, Resinous / Balsamic, Salty / Oceanic
description: The inspiration behind Obvious Parfums' new Kakigori series- a unique trio of distinctive fragrances- draws from the Japanese art of finding beauty in the ephemeral nature of the present moment. Andkakigoriis a perfect representation of the fleeting nature of all things: a traditional Japanese frozen dessert that long predates refrigeration, made from snow carefully collected from the heights of Mount Fuji topped with syrups, fruit, or tea, available only as a treasure to those lucky enough to afford such a rarity. Designed to layer together or wear individually, this collection invites you to craft an olfactory moment all your own- one that's all the more meaningful in its transience.Rounding out this unique trilogy, Plum Cream reinterprets the traditional Japanese plum dish known asumeboshi,which sees a plum thoroughly macerated in salt before serving. This process reveals rich umami, the famed "fifth flavor," which is captured in perfumery through the salted plum note enhanced with a distinct combination of rum, davana, and cistus labdanum, which blend together to reveal a complex fruit-infused leather that hums with potent sensuality. Worn alone, it's rich, warm, and sexy, but paired with White Crush, the clean dimensionality of the snow-themed base fragrance activates the suppler side of the leather, softening it into a luxurious suede with fruit, rose, and musk for an unforgettable combination.

name: Dulce de Leche
notes: Hazelnut, Cardmom, Black Pepper, Dulce De Leche Accord, Sesame, Vanilla Bean, Guaiac Wood, Sandalwood
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet, Warm, Woody - Light
description: The inspiration behind Obvious Parfums' new Kakigori series- a unique trio of distinctive fragrances- draws from the Japanese art of finding beauty in the ephemeral nature of the present moment. Andkakigoriis a perfect representation of the fleeting nature of all things: a traditional Japanese frozen dessert that long predates refrigeration, made from snow carefully collected from the heights of Mount Fuji topped with syrups, fruit, or tea, available only as a treasure to those lucky enough to afford such a rarity. Designed to layer together or wear individually, this collection invites you to craft an olfactory moment all your own- one that's all the more meaningful in its transience.The first of the two syrups, Dulce de Leche is as warm and comforting as its namesake dessert, with milk and sugar melting together in a slow dance of sweetness and sensuality. Notes of nuts, cardamom, sesame, vanilla, and sandalwood all combine in the background to weave a spell to seduce all who seek indulgent elegance. When paired with White Crush, it adds velvety creaminess to the chill of shaved snow, creating a floral gourmand full of airy beauty and luscious texture.

name: White Crush
notes: Clean Accord, Pink Pepper, Iris Concrete, Rose, White Musk, Tonka Bean
style: Avant-Garde, Floral, Fresh - Clean, Powdery / Soft
description: The inspiration behind Obvious Parfums' new Kakigori series- a unique trio of distinctive fragrances- draws from the Japanese art of finding beauty in the ephemeral nature of the present moment. Andkakigoriis a perfect representation of the fleeting nature of all things: a traditional Japanese frozen dessert that long predates refrigeration, made from snow carefully collected from the heights of Mount Fuji topped with syrups, fruit, or tea, available only as a treasure to those lucky enough to afford such a rarity. Designed to layer together or wear individually, this collection invites you to craft an olfactory moment all your own- one that's all the more meaningful in its transience.It all begins with the purity of White Crush, a fragrance that evokes the pristine whiteness of the snow that sits atop Japan's most legendary summit. Built around a delicate white musk accord, elevated by an extraordinary natural iris concrete from renowned natural fragrance laboratory LMR, White Crush captures a bright, pure sense of icy innocence. Worn alone, it's a striking, almost crystalline second skin; combined with the rich syrups of its two companion scents, it becomes an elegant base for a sensually charged gourmand creation that's unique every single time it's layered.

name: Love-O-Matic
notes: Strawberry, Blackcurrant, Lemon, Clean Accord, Bubblegum Accord, Ambrette Butter, Musk, Cedar Essence
style: Fresh - Clean, Fruity, Sweet, Woody - Light
description: Inspired by the unexpected, cinematic moments of real life, Love-O-Matic is a fragrance born from the countercultural magic of laundromats. These everyday spaces, charged with raw energy, secret romances, and spontaneous creativity, serve as the unlikely muse for this joyful new scent.
