Rich, bright fruit and a dynamic and evocative bubblegum accord burst off the skin, evoking the spontaneous thrill of instant attraction, while a clean, fresh laundry accord reminds us of the setting, and a comfortingly musky, gently woodsy base lingers like the buzz of a newfound infatuation.Love-O-Matic is about letting connection happen, not forcing it, just being open to love in all its forms. Even in a laundromat at 3PM on a Tuesday. A fragrance that captures the vibrant tension between routine and romance, solitude and connection, with a bright, playful twist.

name: Club Lonely
notes: Passionfruit, Maple, Amaretto, Cassis, Ink, Jasmine, Muguet, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Cedarwood, Leather
style: Floral - Spicy, Fruity, Sweet, Woody - Dark
description: When one trains and thinks, a creation suddenly appears, and it is still with you, unnoticed. This is the invitation that comes to you with an invention that will never see the light of day.

name: Kagamigoshi
notes: Frankincense, Mandarin, Juniper Berry, Tonka Bean, Iris, Clary Sage, Vetiver, White Cedar, Vanilla
style: Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy
description: A blurry sense of a d脙漏j脙聽 vu in memory. Its true identity is vague, like a parallel world in a mirror. Is it real? Or just an illusion? Sweet, herbal and spicy, Kagamigoshi is a scent that evokes an impulse to do something special. A remix of Reminisce from EDIT(h)'s original collection, perfumer Leslie Gautier created a new scent with the idea to reflect its formulation. Each ingredient mirrors an ingredient of Reminisce, like a reflection of Reminisce. The world in the mirror. As if something exists although it should not exist at all. This scent may cause confusion in your memory.

name: Jardin des Mots
notes: Petitgrain, Galbanum, Mandarin, Ginger, Bergamot, Rose, Muguet, Green Notes, Crystal Moss, White Musk, White Cedarwood
style: Floral, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: A garden nestled snugly in the bustle of the city. The whispering of grass, flowers, moss, and trees that you hear when you take a deep breath through your nose. Enwrap yourself in The Fragrance Garden of Words- green, floral, mossy, and beautiful.Jardin des mots is a new piece by perfumer Alexandra Carlin, who used a unique musical perfumery method to create La collection Remixes from the first 脙聣DIT(h) collection Jardin Tokyo. In contrast to the green, dignified and clean scent of Jardin Tokyo, Alexandra used floral and green notes to create a scent that contains splendor, as if a garden awakens and the plants are talking to each other.

name: Black Moonlight
notes: Bergamot, Mandarin, Cardamom, Saffron, Lavender, Ylang-ylang, Myrrh, Jasmine Sambac, Patchouli, Tonka Bean, Labdanum, Tolu Balm
style: Earthy, Floral - Citrus, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Sweet
description: Pioneers of the infectiously catchy, groundbreaking new wave of dance rock that took the 1980s by storm, with over 100 million records sold, Duran Duran is inarguably one of the most important bands of their era. Now, Xerjoff's Sergio Momo has teamed up with Simon Le Bon, Nick Rhodes, John Taylor, and Roger Taylor in locations around the world to collaborate on a bold new set of fragrances paying tribute to the iconic group. From the development of the scent to the design of its packaging, the new perfume collaboration represents a true fusion of artistic vision and creative synergy.Sensuous, daring and irresistibly evocative, Black Moonlight accompanies the wearer on a journey deep into the heart of the night, where untold secrets whisper and the edge of darkness ignites intrigue. Inspired by the interplay of light and shadow that defines Duran Duran芒聙聶s music, this exquisite scent embodies the allure of mystery and the quiet power of self-expression. Black Moonlight wraps the wearer in a veil of sophistication, daring the mind to explore the enigmatic corners of the soul and celebrate the complexity within. Bergamot and mandarin awaken the senses, whilst saffron, lavender, sambac jasmine and hazelnut envelop the senses in an intimate embrace. It芒聙聶s all grounded by the base notes of patchouli, vetiver, tonka bean and benzoin to create a sensual, timeless scent that mirrors Duran Duran芒聙聶s legacy: constantly-transforming yet introspective 芒聙聯 a harmonious blend of art, innovation and emotion.

name: NeoRio
notes: Candied Fig, Elemi, Rum, Cistus, Maple Syrup, Rose Oil, Saffron, Balsam, Patchouli, Tonka Bean
style: Earthy, Floral, Floral - Ambery Spice, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet
description: Pioneers of the infectiously catchy, groundbreaking new wave of dance rock that took the 1980s by storm, with over 100 million records sold, Duran Duran is inarguably one of the most important bands of their era. Now, Xerjoff's Sergio Momo has teamed up with Simon Le Bon, Nick Rhodes, John Taylor, and Roger Taylor in locations around the world to collaborate on a bold new set of fragrances paying tribute to the iconic group. From the development of the scent to the design of its packaging, the new perfume collaboration represents a true fusion of artistic vision and creative synergy.NeoRio is a testament to limitless creativity and artistic fusion. Bold and captivating, it mirrors Duran Duran芒聙聶s ever-evolving spirit and boundary-breaking energy- a quality embedded in Xerjoff芒聙聶s DNA. Past, present and future collide in a perfume as magnetic and unpredictable as the band itself. NeoRio combines an irresistible burst of candied fig and rum with the sparkling freshness of elemi absolute, before unfolding with the fiery warmth of saffron and the elegance of soft rose oil, all anchored by the creamy richness of tonka bean and the timeless depth of balsam from Peru. Delivering all the thrilling, life-affirming joy of Duran Duran's most beloved songs, NeoRio is a celebration of boundless energy, freedom, and the thrill of life's most exhilarating moments.

name: Arabians Rose Leather
notes: Black Leather, Taif Rose, Cambodian Oud, Ylang-ylang, Sandalwood, Cedarwood, Labdanum Absolute, Madagascar Vanilla, Black Musk
description: A tale of fire and elegance, whispered under starlit arches. The raw intensity of black leather meets the opulence of Taif rose, deepened by oud and sandalwood. Spices flicker, musk lingers. A bold, sensual legend.

name: Rose Mojito
notes: Lime, Peppermint, Rum, Squash, Magnolia, Rose, Lily, Amber, Cedarwood
style: Boozy, Floral, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: A rose fragrance that can be worn regardless of gender. The fragrance has a voluptuousness that takes you beyond your everyday self, and becomes a special spice that causes people to take notice at a fancy dinner party.

name: Jardin Tokyo
notes: Petitgrain, Bergamot, Lime, Muguet, Rose, Galbanum, Fresh Green Notes, Herbal Musk
style: Floral - Light, Fresh, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous
description: The fragrance, made by weaving petitgrain oil, lime, herbal musk, and other fragrances, leaves a fresh yet deep impression and brings to mind an imaginary Tokyo garden wrapped in green. It creates a mysterious world that lies concealed in the Greennote.

name: Dandelion Butter
notes: Pollen, Dandelion Greens, Yellow Dandelion, Snapped Stem, Milky Sap, Salted Butter, Dandelion-stained Chin
style: Floral, Floral - Light, Green / Herbaceous, Milky, Unusual / Unexpected, Warm
description: The boundlessly creative noses behind Clue draw fragrant inspiration from every nostalgic and evocative aspect of the American midwest, and for their fifth fragrance, they've targeted nostalgia itself- Dandelion Butter takes its name from a classic schoolchildren's game that goes back centuries. A plucked dandelion is held under someone's chin as they're asked, "Do you like butter?", as they turn their face to the sky to see if the flower casts a yellow glow on their chin. In some versions, the head of the flower is rubbed into the chin ("Chin Up, Buttercup!"), leaving a bright yellow streak that indicates, however silly the idea, that  the bearer of the mark has an obvious love of butter. It's the kind of whimsically illogical tradition that survives countless generations precisely because it doesn't quite make sense- except, perhaps, in the wonderfully playful and boundlessly curious world of childhood.Drawing from this amusement, Dandelion Butter is itself playful- bright, fresh, and imbued with na脙炉vet脙漏. Bright, green dandelion stalks and warm yellow florals give off a vibrant pop, evoking an arrestingly realistic portrait of summertime, with a sprinkling of dusty pollen to complete the portrait. Meanwhile, a creamy, salty butter note adds a delectable warmth that feels like sunlight itself, calling to your younger self to come outside and enjoy a perfect day. Fresh, green, warm, and intimate, Dandelion Butter is another delightfully imagined fragrant experience from one of our new favorite houses.

name: Mandi Rhubi
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Lime, Green Mandarin, Rhubarb, Cassis, Elemi, Galbanum, Juniper, Black Pepper, Cedar, Cypress, Vetiver
style: Citrus, Fresh, Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: Fresh, green, and sparkling, Mandi Rhubi is a joyfuleau de viethat feels like sunshine on the skin. Deeply infused with vibrant wild herbs, zesty rhubarb, and spicy aromatic woods, it's a call directly from nature, an invitation to walk barefoot in the grass, pick wildflowers, and nap in the shade of your favorite old tree. From the thirst quenching citrus opening, every moment bursts forth with energetic effervescence, weaving in the tart fruits and heady green herbs and spices without a hint of cloying artificial sweetness, letting the exceptional quality of the natural materials shine through. A summery fruit fragrance of a more elegant variety, Mandi Rhubi is the kind of sophisticated, yet deeply evocative fragrance we've come to expect from Isabelle Larignon- one not to be missed.

name: Afternoon Delight
notes: Bitter Almond, Angelica Root, Madeleine Accord, Carrot, Ambrette, Sandalwood, Vanilla, Musks
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Woody - Amber, Woody - Light
description: Afternoon Delight captures a sublime moment of self-indulgence, transporting you to a Parisian caf脙漏 where the uplifting aroma of warm madeleines fills the air. Like the famed madeleine of Proust's脙聙 la recherche du temps perdufrom which master perfumer Carlos Bena脙炉m was inspired, Afternoon Delight stimulates a deep reverie from, the first spritz, opening with a mouthwatering madeleine accord that captivates the senses, causing the ordinary to simply fade away. The rich but never heavy pastry note blends with a creamy but grounded sandalwood, while the deliciousness of Madagascan vanilla pod lingers in the air. Sweet yet light, this delectable ambery gourmand provides a joyful escape from the everyday.

name: Grand Cuvee
notes: Vanilla Bean, Chardonnay, Peach Eau De Vie, Sabered Champagne Cork, Argan, Sunwashed Sails, Sunkissed Skin, Amber, Cedarwood, Cognac
style: Boozy, Creamy, Fruity, Salty / Oceanic
description: Grand Cuvee is the signature scent of the "Luxuriant" Vacation Brand Chardonnay Oil. Serving as a ceremonious toast to the finer things in life, it transports the wearer atop a teakwood yacht at sunset, with warm notes of boozy amber, peach eau de vie, and an oceanic hint of sun-washed sails.

name: Zantol
notes: Salt, Santol, Jasmine, Sugar
style: Floral - White, Fruity, Salty / Oceanic, Sweet
description: Zantol draws inspiration from the fragrant, refreshing Thai dessertKraton Loy Kaew, a dish that captures the unique aroma of the tropical santol fruit in an icy, lightly sweetened infusion. Crafted to evoke the experience of this traditional dessert, Zantol opens with a subtle hint of salt, mimicking the refreshing contrast of the santol芒聙聶s light tang against a cooling background. This bright opening sets the stage for a heart of lush santol notes, with a touch of jasmine that adds a soft, floral dimension, mirroring the delicate complexity of the dish.The fragrance then settles into a warm, comforting sweetness in its base, as sugar notes linger, rounding out Zantol芒聙聶s composition with an inviting softness that captures the essence of thesantol loy kaewdessert. Zantol is a vibrant, playful scent, evoking a feeling of nostalgia and warmth. Each spritz is a sensory journey through Thai culture, bringing the joyful memory of refreshing santol to life.

name: Mirage Exotique
notes: Mandarin, Passionfruit, Saffron, Coconut, Mango, Rose, Amber, Cedar, Sandalwood, Vanilla
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Gourmand, Tropical / Beachy
description: Mirage Exotique is more than a perfume - it is an invitation to an unforgettable journey of discovery for the senses. This exquisite fragrance immerses you in the beguiling scents of the tropics, enhanced by floral and woody accords. It bursts into life as a cocktail of sun-kissed fruits: cheerful, sparkling, and abundant. A concentrate of pure escapism, Mirage Exotique adds sunshine to every day and brings the warm bliss of summertime, all year long.

name: Muse
notes: Mango Cream, Coconut, Pink Pepper, Sweet Pea, Gardenia, Sandalwood, Cedarwood, Cashmere
style: Creamy, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Tropical / Beachy
description: A summer afternoon that glows from transparent blue into molten magenta. Clean hair, sun-kissed skin, and a halo of heady florals as the afternoon heat drifts into a flourescent sunset. Melting mango creamsicles, coconut sun tans, and bare shoulders sprayed with warm freckles and glittering ocean mist. Sweet pea, pink pepper, and creamy gardenia shimmer over a base of warm sandalwood and lingering musk. The scent of a summer day that never ends, and a balmy night that never should.

name: Soleil de Provence
notes: Lemon, Mimosa, Benzoin
style: Floral, Floral - Citrus, Resinous / Balsamic
description: An homage to mimosa- the joyously fresh yellow flower that signals the end of winter. In this luminous perfume, Daphn脙漏 Bugey conveys a sun-drenched trip along the Route du Mimosa in Grasse. Clouds of fluffy yellow blooms for miles, radiating their green, honeyed scent with a sparkling freshness. Lemon, symbolizing the refreshing spirit of the Mediterranean, and a warm, calming benzoin capture the heat of the moment, imbuing Soleil de Provence with a soothing, romantic power.

name: Lens Flare
notes: Mandarin, Grape, Lavender, Sunflower, Orange Blossom, Musk, Powder
style: Citrus, Floral - Light, Fruity, Powdery / Soft
description: Lens Flare is inspired by vast sunflower fields, where every sunflower tirelessly faces the sun. If we imagine ourselves as sunflowers turning towards the light, we witness the phenomenon of Lens Flare, which occurs when light enters the camera lens, creating extraordinary patterns. This fragrance reflects the profound beauty of light and the relentless vitality of life.Lens Fare first touches the skin with an initial burst of refreshing aroma of Mandarin and Grape, evoking the bright and exhilarating feeling of sunlight piercing through morning clouds. The scent gradually transitions into invigorating and fresh heart of sunflower and orange blossom, while lavender enhances the natural essence to perfection.The comforting base features the softness of musk and powdery notes, providing a gentle warmth reminiscent of soft sunlight spreading across the sunflower fields.Lens Flare is a harmonious blend of scents that reflect beauty bathed in the vitality of life, a light that heals the soul and helps us overcome obstacles, bringing brightness and warmth with every wear.

name: C Major
notes: Peach, Bergamot, Sweet Orange, Oolong Tea, Jasmine, Mate, Musk, Vanilla
style: Citrus, Floral - White, Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Smoky
description: The music of stillness, steeped in tea and light. There are moments when the world seems to pause 芒聙聰 not in silence, but in harmony. The rustling of leaves, the distant birdsong, the golden warmth of sunlight- they form a quiet symphony. And in the stillness, a cup of tea rests in your hand.C Major is a fragrance inspired by those unspoken melodies of nature, a moment suspended in time where scent and sound meet. It opens with the fresh, radiant brightness of bergamot and sweet orange, gently illuminating the juiciness of peach, like the first note of a morning sonata. As the scent evolves, a soft infusion of oolong tea emerges- refined, steeped, and serene, accompanied by a tender floral breeze of jasmine, barely there, yet ever-present.The base settles into the grounded warmth of mate, deepening the illusion of sipping freshly brewed tea. The sweetness lingers softly, upheld by smooth vanilla and a gentle caress of musk, cradling the entire composition in warmth and peace.The name 芒聙聹C Major芒聙聺 draws from both music and tea: 芒聙聹C芒聙聺 as the foundational note of a scale, and 芒聙聹Cha芒聙聺, the word for tea in many cultures. Together, they create a scent that doesn芒聙聶t just perfume the skin, but plays a quiet song for the soul.

name: Dimlight
notes: Cardamom, Rum, Almond, Tobacco, Oak, Cedarwood, Sandalwood, Vanilla
style: Boozy, Creamy, Smoky, Sweet, Woody - Amber
description: Dimlight is a scent that transports you into the cozy allure of a dimly lit bar where time feels suspended and secrets are shared over cocktails. Inspired by the charm of a shadowed bar scene, this fragrance begins with an inviting splash of rum blended with a touch of spicy cardamom芒聙聰a warm, intriguing start that芒聙聶s as alluring as the first sip of a finely crafted drink. The heart reveals the rich warmth of almond and smoky tobacco, mingling with the ruggedness of oak to evoke the scent of wooden shelves stacked with bottles, aged with stories and memories.As Dimlight settles on your skin, it reveals a deeper layer of comfort, grounded by cedarwood, creamy sandalwood, and the soft sweetness of vanilla. This base adds a refined softness, capturing the glow of candlelight and the calm of unwinding in a familiar place. Dimlight is more than just a fragrance; it芒聙聶s an experience that lingers, a reminder of nights filled with good company, laughter, and a touch of mystery.

name: Golden Hour
notes: Durian, Pandan Leaf, Yellow Mung Beans, Ripe Mango, Jasmine, Sticky Rice, Coconut Milk, Sugar, Sandalwood
style: Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy
description: Golden Hour is inspired by the famous golden-yellow fruits of Thailand- mango and durian, which both reach coveted peak season during the height of the sweltering summer months. Plucked right from the tree, the ripe fruit is enjoyed with sweet coconut milk and Thai sticky rice- a memorably delectable balance of textures and flavors equally beloved by adults and children alike.The name Golden Hour is drawn from the color of the fruits themselves, but also from the blissful memory of enjoying this unique dessert in the early evening, when the warm, soft golden light of the setting sun makes everything appear gently beautiful, evoking a rich and lasting feel of contentment. The fragrance opens with a luscious combination of juicy, ripe mango and durian (don't worry about what you've heard about the aroma of durian- here it's fragrant, rounded, and sweet), balanced with the refreshing green aroma of pandan leaves and the depth of roasted mung bean. As the fragrance unfolds, you芒聙聶ll encounter the cool and delicate scent of jasmine, enhancing the complexity and depth of the sticky rice aroma. This is complemented by the sweet, sugary scent of coconut milk, reminiscent of a Thai dessert. Finally, the fragrance is grounded with sandalwood, ensuring it lasts longer.A harmonious blend of sweetness, warmth, and pure refreshment, Golden Hour glows with the contentment of the perfect treat to close out a day of hard work done well.

name: Star Trails
notes: Coca-cola, Lime, Anise, Cinnamon, Geranium, Amber, Cedar, Violet
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Sweet, Woody - Amber
description: The fragrance Star Trails draws inspiration from the song 芒聙聹Sparkle,芒聙聺 a soundtrack from the Japanese romantic fantasy anime film 芒聙聹Your Name."Star Trails begins its journey with the refreshing and vibrant scent of warm Coca-Cola, blended with the sweet and tangy notes of lime, creating a lively sparkle. This is complemented by the warmth and complexity of anise and cinnamon, intertwined with the fresh essence of geranium, sustaining the bright middle notes. Violet adds a layer of complexity and a base note, alongside the sweet warmth of amber and cedar, enriching the fragrance芒聙聶s depth in the final notes.The name 芒聙聹Star Trails芒聙聺 not only reflects the perfume芒聙聶s scent but also symbolizes the journey of life, which may loop and bring us back to good or bad times, akin to the path of stars rotating in the universe.Star Trails is crafted to remind us of dreams, hopes, and life芒聙聶s journey. No matter the obstacles, there is always the light of the stars guiding us confidently ahead.

name: Fluffy Cake
notes: Pandan Leaf, Jasmine, Milk, Nom Maeo, Sandalwood, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Floral, Gourmand, Milky, Sweet
description: Fluffy Cake is a fragrance inspired by the cherished Thai dessertkanom thuay foo, celebrated for its delicate, airy texture and gentle sweetness. Rooted in Thai tradition, this dessert is one of the nine auspicious sweets symbolizing prosperity and joy. But it also holds a deeper connection to the Chinesefa gao(?? or ?? or ??)芒聙聰a dessert known as the 芒聙聹cake of rising fortunes,芒聙聺 crafted to convey blessings of growth and good luck. Fluffy Cake captures this essence, intertwining rich cultural heritage with the warmth and sweetness of a treasured treat.Opening with the fresh green scent of pandan leaf, Fluffy Cake invites you in with a natural, comforting sweetness. The heart of the fragrance unfolds into a creamy bouquet of jasmine and milk, along with the exotic allure ofnom maeo(a native Southeast Asian flowering shrub related to ylang-ylang), evoking the fragrant softness of the dessert itself. Finally, it settles into a warm base of sandalwood and vanilla, leaving a lasting impression that is both soothing and uplifting.

name: Luminique
notes: Lychee, Soju, Aquozone, Melon, Magnolia, Musk, Ambroxan
style: Boozy, Floral - Light, Fresh - Aquatic, Fruity, Sweet
description: Luminique is inspired by moments spent sipping cocktails at a poolside bar, surrounded by a joyful atmosphere with friends and a sense of relaxation. The backdrop of sunlight reflecting off the surface of the pool creates a beautiful scene, evoking the feeling of stepping into a world filled with shimmering light and laughter. The fragrance was created to capture these memories and sensations through its fresh and enchanting scent.Luminique opens with the refreshing and distinctive scent of sweet lychee, combined with the cool aroma of soju and the invigorating scent of Aquozone, giving the impression of standing by a sunlit pool. Then, the sweet and refreshing scent of melon becomes more prominent, offering a bright and juicy feeling, complemented by the soft fragrance of magnolia. The base is composed of musk, which provides a soft and warm sensation, blended with ambroxan to add a touch of luxury and lasting charm, making this fragrance long-lasting and memorable.Crafted for those who seek freshness and fun in their daily lives, perfect for days when you want to add color and start your day brightly, Luminique is like enjoying a cocktail in a beautiful and memorable setting.

name: Criollo
notes: Coffee, Plum, Dark Chocolate, Raspberry, Jasmine, Honey, Patchouli, Tonka Bean
style: Earthy, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Inspired by a rare and precious form of cacao, Criollo invites you on a journey of layered richness and complexity, weaving together the indulgent aromas of cocoa and fruits in a captivating and elegant blend. This fragrance opens with the intense, earthy scent of coffee, a deep and inviting bitterness that perfectly complements the fruity sweetness of juicy plum. This opening sensation is only the beginning, setting the stage for a sophisticated heart where dark chocolate and vibrant raspberry come together as the stars. Here, jasmine adds an ethereal layer, a delicate floral backdrop that enhances the raspberry芒聙聶s brightness and rounds out the chocolate芒聙聶s depth with a refined balance, creating a luxurious middle that deepens with every inhale.As Criollo begins to settle, it reveals a base of honey, patchouli, and tonka bean, which wrap the fragrance in a warm, comforting sweetness that lingers on the skin. The honey adds a golden glow, while patchouli lends an earthy grounding, and tonka bean enhances the creamy sweetness, ensuring that Criollo leaves a memorable impression. Criollo is more than a scent; it芒聙聶s a sensory escape into a world of sophistication, for those who seek a fragrance that is bold, yet refined, with each layer unveiling a new facet of its charm.

name: Vernus
notes: Petitgrain Sur Fleurs, Quince, Marigold, Sunflower, Magnolia, Narcissus, Jonquil Absolute, Jasmine Absolute, Hickory, Paprika, Goldenrod, Hay Oil, Hay Absolute, Eau De Brout Absolute
style: Earthy, Floral, Fresh, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Spring has sprung, and Vernus, the newest and most exclusive limited-edition release yet from Jorum, is the scent of gilded blooms awash with hazy vernal sunshine, enticing noses to hover ever closer.In rural Scotland, nothing signals spring like the first signs of narcissus piercing through soil, and Euan McCall's formative childhood memories involve spending most of his youthful years in one of the woodlands in his village, a simply magical place especially in spring 芒聙聯 muscari, hyacinth, bluebells, snowdrops and millions of narcissus rioting mostly undisturbed beneath ancient chestnuts, oaks and peculiar hickory trees planted by friends and family decades ago. Combined with the powerful aroma of fresh-hewn hay from the fields that flanked the floral-laden woods, that fragrant balance of fresh, floral, and earthy provides a deeply nostalgic evocation of carefree childhood and the natural beauty of rural springtime.

name: TX Lavender
notes: Bergamot, Lemon Peel, Dry Cedar, Lavender Absolute, Geranium, Tonka Bean, Incense, Spiced Musk, Labdanum
style: Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Warm, Woody - Fresh
description: In the rolling vistas of Texas Hill Country, surrounded by orchards and vineyards, you can also find fields of wild lavender nurtured by the rocky limestone soil. TX Lavender is an ode to this wild and beautiful region, which evokes the ecological diversity of the Spanish Dehesa in the heart of Texas. Combining vibrant freshness with soft, warm florals, TX Lavender embraces the contrast between the lightness of bergamot, lemon, and geranium with the darker elements of spiced lavender, tonka bean, frankincense, and musky vetiver. Threads of dry cedar and oak along with clary sage and labdanum connect the light and dark elements, producing an unforgettable and long-lasting drydown reminiscent of black tea and soft leather. Rugged and robust, yet soothing and calming, TX Lavender is an undeniably evocative and authentic snapshot of the natural splendor of Texas Hill Country.

name: Green Vetiver
notes: Pressed Lime Peel, Citrus Oil, Coriander, Green Neroli, Rosemary, White Rose, Vetiver, Musk, Moss
style: Earthy, Floral - Light, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Dark
description: Timeless and genderless, an ode to a bygone era, Green Vetiver is the signature scent of Boyd's Of Texas- a classic citrus chypre inspired by the great mid-century musks worn by a prior generation of true Texans. Fresh citrus notes of bergamot and lime burst off the skin, given depth and complexity with coriander and fresh herbs. A green neroli and smooth floral heart dries into a soft but robust musk base featuring natural oakmoss, vetiver, and patchouli. The complexity of the composition is experienced in how uniquely it evolves on different wearers, with some experiencing a close-to-skin lingering neroli and citrus, while others notice a warmer, muskier, more masculine drydown. But in every configuration, Green Vetiver is utterly enchanting- a true heritage scent for a new generation.

name: High Desert
notes: Red Grapefruit, Dusty Cedar, Trailside Herbs, Sage, Texas Cedar, Birch Tar, Smoked Vetiver, Labdanum
style: Earthy, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Fresh
description: Developed in collaboration with the minds behind INDY C.C. and Temple Of Offering in San Antonio, High Desert is inspired by the sublime experience of stumbling upon a dusty summer watering hole along a well-worn trailhead in the stunning high desert of New Mexico. Woody and smoky, rich with the green and aromatic dryness of wild herbs growing alongside the dust-lined trail, High Desert is an agreeably untamed fragrance that evokes the profundity of being alone in the vast beauty of the American Southwest and the serenity of understanding one's place amongst the grandeur of the natural world. In other words, if you're the type of person who only feels at ease far, far away from the din of the modern world, High Desert is inner peace in a bottle.

name: Cuero
notes: Bright Citrus, White Florals, Dusty Woods, Jasmine Grandiflorum, Leather, Cypress, Labdanum, Smoke, Vetiver
style: Citrus, Floral - Spicy, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky
description: The legendary Stash leather factory is the inspiration behind Cuero, a ruggedly beautiful all-natural leather fragrance as only Boyd's Of Texas could imagine. Over a century old, the venerable building holds its own powerful scent, baked into the shiplap walls by the heat of countless South Texas summers. The warm patina of aged leather permeates the air, but the open windows also carry a dusty breeze sweetened by the aromas of the floral meadows and stout cedar trees that surround it. Smoky, earthy, and resinous, yet touched with just the right hint of citrus and floral brightness, Cuero is a natural leather fragrance imbued with the true spirit of Texas.

name: Yellow Rose
notes: Cumin, Caraway, Pink Pepper, Rose Water, Egyptian Rose, Texas Cedar, Sandalwood, Guaiac, Styrax Resin
style: Animalic, Earthy, Floral - Spicy, Smoky, Woody - Dark
description: A mysterious, spiced rose fragrance created for those who usually hate rose scents, Yellow Rose is the first dedicated floral from Boyd's. Spicy,  dark, and dusty, this noir-inspired unisex stunner mixes the earthy elegance of Egyptian rose with the gently smoky, aromatic sweetness of real Texas cedarwood. Hints of fiery pepper and the almost sweaty carnality of cumin are balanced with the soft sensuality of guaiac wood, marking Yellow Rose a fragrance that, in the words of the legendary Texas song, you'll want to be yours forevermore.

name: Tonka Latte
notes: Milk, Honey, Coffee, Tonka Bean, Musk, Vanilla
description: Tonka Latte represents a new era for brand founder and perfumer Pissara Umavijani 芒聙聯 the brand芒聙聶s first true gourmand fragrance. Inspired by her morning ritual of a croissant and latte before heading to the brand芒聙聶s Paris boutique, Tonka Latte is an indulgent fragrance with rich, roasted coffee blended into a mouthwatering steamed milk accord, a heart of syrupy honey and intoxicating tonka bean, and a sensually musky vanilla drydown. It's a moment of blissful relaxation before a day immersed in the bustling world of Parisian high fashion- a reminder that amongst the glamour and luxury, the City Of Lights also holds space for simpler- if no less elegant- pleasures.

name: Miami Shake
notes: Wild Strawberry, Whipped Cream, Ice Cream Cone, Vanilla Absolute, Creamy Musk
description: What is it about Miami that makes even the wildest times seem so carefree? From the glitzy clubs of South Beach to the street parties of Calle Ocho, every sun-soaked day and endless night resonates with the vibrant, musical energy of endless summertime. Inspired by the joyful indulgences of this unique city, Miami Shake is an elevated wild strawberry fragrance, blending sweet notes of whipped cream and vanilla, with a subtle floral touch of orange blossom for a delicate twist to its gourmand feel. Reminiscent of a delectable strawberry milkshake, it leaves a long-lasting, addictive trail- perfect for the beach, the club, and everything in between.

name: Speachless
notes: Sweet Orange, Bergamot, Pink Grapefruit, Lemon, Lychee, Lime, Peach, Citron Zest, Apple, Ginger, Green Tea, Peach Blossom, Tabacchera Peach, Nectarine, Osmanthus, Jasmine, Heliotrope, Rose, Violet, Magnolia, Rosemary, Absinthe, Verbena, Lavender, Clary Sage, Cannabis, Patchouli, Vetiver, Sandalwood, Elemi, Ambrette Seed, Vanilla Pod, White Musk
style: Floral - Fruity, Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: If Speachless were a sensation, it would be a sun-soaked orchard in full bloom-- ripe, lush, and impossibly vibrant. A rush of citrus awakens the senses, fresh and sparkling, before the sumptuous sweetness of peach steals the show. This peach is no shy note; it芒聙聶s the heart of a vivid, luscious experience-- juicy, velvety, and almost too delicious to resist.Around it, a wild garden unfurls: hints of raw green cannabis and cool, earthy vetiver add a beguiling twist to the golden fruit. Together, they weave a story that芒聙聶s not just worn, but lived芒聙聰a fragrant journey that intoxicates and delights.Speachless is a fleeting summer romance in a bottle芒聙聰bold and unforgettable. It doesn芒聙聶t whisper on your skin; it sings with abandon, carrying you to a place beyond words.

name: Innocent & Delicious
notes: Lime, Lychee, Mint, Cream, Hot Milk, Cotton Candy, Vanilla, Caramel, Sugar
style: Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Green / Herbaceous, Milky, Sweet
description: Inspired by a beloved cocktail from a famous Bucharest bar, Innocent & Delicious is a delight for the sense that perfectly captures the exquisite taste of this inventive libation. Bright, juicy fruit and aromatic mint blend seamlessly with a warm, sweet, creamy sugared base for a combination of flavors as delightful as they are unexpected. Indulge in an intoxicating treat and feel your cares simply melt away.

name: Biker's Soul
notes: Bergamot, Grapefruit, Lemon, Mandarin, Juniper Berry, Peach, Violet Leaf, Gasoline, Jasmine, Champaca, Ylang-ylang, Frankincense, Clove, Leather, Suede, Texas Cedar, Virginia Cedar, Castoreum, Oppoponax, Vanilla, Cypriol, Labdanum
style: Animalic, Avant-Garde, Floral - White, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky
description: The intoxicating sting of gasoline. The smoky yet smooth crackle of well-worn leather. The refreshing breeze of the open road, carrying the scents of summer flowers in full bloom. This is the ruggedly romantic olfactory portrait of Biker's Soul, a fragrance for outlaws and lovers,  where a new adventure is just a stretch of blacktop away. Industrial and floral, leather and citrus, machine and man- a signature scent for anyone with a wandering spirit and poetry in their soul.

name: Delizia Tropicale
notes: Green Bananas, Mandarin, Exotic Fruits, Jasmine, Coconut, White Flowers, Musc, Vanilla, Tolu Balsam, Honey, Castoreum, Butter, Santal, Civet
style: Creamy, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy
description: A new frontier in CALAJ's gorgeous Delizia series of irresistible gourmands, Delizia Tropicale is a sumptuous portrait of tropical paradise. Juicy, mouthwatering exotic fruits and a bright pop of fresh greenery blend to majestic effect with a luscious and sensual white floral heart, given an indulgent beachy character with the addition of rich, creamy coconut and a buttery-sweet vanilla base. The perfect touch of sensual animalics adds a sexy, grown-up contrast, ensuring that this vacation promises to offer just as much fun after the sun sets. Take a trip with Delizia Tropicale- you may never want to come home.

name: Breathe
notes: Bergamot, Lavender, Water, Musk
style: Earthy, Fresh, Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus
description: Not every addiction is bad for you. With Breathe, Akro takes their theme of addiction and vice themed fragrances in a refreshing new direction- the addictive and intoxicating power of being alone in nature, enjoying breathtaking landscapes as far as the eye can see. Breathe is about the power of silencing the modern world- no phones, no cars, no electronic beeps or buzzes- just the gentle rhythms of the breeze, the echo of birdsong, the gentle lapping of water on the lakeshore. Bright, fresh bergamot, fresh lavender, and smooth freshwater encapsulate the quiet power of nature- escape, serenity, splendor, and simplicity. A return to the real world beyond humanity, Breathe is truly a breath of fresh air.

name: Unlock Collection Discovery Set
description: The Unlock Collection brings together all four Belnu fragrances-Chai Fleur, Incense Antique, Bergamot Brio, and Rose Steady, in deluxe 3ml atomizer samples. Whether you're exploring Belnu for the first time or looking for an effortless way to scent your day on-the-go, this collection is your invitation to turn inward and connect outward through fragrance.

name: Marzipan Gourmand
notes: Almonds, Marzipan, Sugar, Marshmallow
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Mouthwateringly sweet and fragrant, Marzipan Gourmand is Theodoros Kalotinis' most beloved note- almond- in its most tender and delicious form. Almond paste crafted from fresh almonds and crystalline sugar blends magically with the fluffy, caramelized texture of toasted marshmallows, melting into your skin with all the warm, soothing comfort of the most irresistible dessert. Magical, nostalgic, and richly sensuous, Marzipan Gourmand is the pinnacle of gourmand luxury.

name: Matcha Ice Cream
notes: Matcha Tea, Lime Zest, Vanilla, Sugar, Matcha Ice Cream, Crispy Waffle Cone
style: Citrus, Creamy, Gourmand, Green / Herbaceous, Sweet
description: Take a fragrant journey to Japan with this one of a kind gourmand deeply infused with traditional Japanese matcha green tea combined with the stunning, mouthwatering gourmand accords that have made Theodoros Kalotinis the Greek King of Gourmands. Picture yourself stepping off the JR train in the heart of Tokyo's humid summer bustle and heading directly from the platform to a nearby snack shop for the perfect heat-beating treat: velvety vanilla cream blended with matcha tea and lime zest, frozen to perfection and served in a delicious crispy waffle cone. Matcha Ice Cream melts onto the skin, revealing creamy vanilla, sugar, matcha ice cream, and crispy waffle cone, while preserving the lively freshness of matcha and lime. Delightful, evocative, and refreshing, Matcha Ice Cream is every bit as unique and revitalizing as its namesake- with none of the calories.

name: Peach Macaron
notes: Burnt Sugar, Vanilla, Peach, Macaron
style: Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet
description: As anyone who's ever wandered into one of their beautiful, bountiful patisseries can attest, Paris' reputation as the City Of Love doesn't refer only to romance- one can just as easily fall head over heels for an irresistible, masterfully baked pastry. Peach Macaron is a love letter to the pastries of Paris from the Greek King of Gourmands, a spellbinding extrait that pairs a bright, juicy, stunningly realistic peach note blended magically with burnt sugar and soft vanilla, all wrapped inside a freshly baked, dreamlike macaron. Sweet, fresh, elegant, and sensually indulgent all at once, Peach Macaron is a truly Parisian delight.

name: Fiery Passion Extrait Pendant
notes: Strawberry, Pink Peony, Vanilla, Musk, Woods
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Warm, Woody - Fresh
description: Born from the flames of love and desire, Melanie Martinez's fire-inspired entry in her Portals collection is a tantalizing blend of innocence and sensuality. Sparkling and seductive, Fiery Passion is a floral gourmand that recalls the delicious confections of youth with a mouthwatering strawberry candy opening, while a romantic pink peony infused with the warmth of avant-garde musks and woods create a complex and compelling bouquet for creative souls of all ages. The perfect companion for a summer fling or a lifelong love, Fiery Passion has everything needed to keep hearts aflutter.Stylish and convenient, this collector's pendant contains a unique Extrait de Parfum concentration of Fiery Passion- richer, deeper, and longer lasting than the EDP version. A dab on your skin lasts all day, making each scent feel more personal and powerful.

name: Water Of Intuition Extrait Pendant
notes: Sandalwood, Amber, Cedar, Musk, Vanilla, Cocoa
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Woody - Amber, Woody - Fresh
description: An elemental voyage into the realms of mist and rain, Water of Intuition is a soothing blend of gourmand and woody notes that creates an atmosphere of pure, ethereal bliss. Composed around a comforting cloud of creamy and sustainably-sourced sandalwood, this dreamlike fragrance floats in a soft haven of amber and musk, which merge with lush swirls of vanilla and cocoa to create the perfect sensual elixir.Stylish and convenient, this collector's pendant contains a unique Extrait de Parfum concentration of Water Of Intution- richer, deeper, and longer lasting than the EDP version. A dab on your skin lasts all day, making each scent feel more personal and powerful.

name: Earthly Abundance Extrait Pendant
notes: Green Tea, Turmeric, Jasmine, Lavender, Vanilla
style: Earthy, Floral, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy
description: Inspired by all things green and growing, Earthy Abundance is a beautifully lush aromatic green floral that may well be the jewel of the Melanie Martinez Portals Collection. Infused with the leafy freshness of green tea and responsibly sourced aromatic herbs and flowers, Earthy Abundance is a captivating song in tune with nature, enhanced with the harmonizing richness of vanilla bean for a joyfully romantic and long lasting signature both playful and sophisticated.Stylish and convenient, this collector's pendant contains a unique Extrait de Parfum concentration of Earthy Abundance- richer, deeper, and longer lasting than the EDP version. A dab on your skin lasts all day, making each scent feel more personal and powerful.

name: Air Of Clarity Extrait Pendant
notes: Caramel, Coconut, Ambroxan, Musk, Tonka Bean, Sandalwood
style: Fresh - Aquatic, Gourmand, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy, Woody - Fresh
description: Inspired by the Element of Air, Air Of Clarity is a bright, smooth solar gourmand with an irresistible aura of sheer tropical delight. Sun-kissed coconut drenched in delectable caramel emanates the golden glow of a radiant sun on a distant white sand beach, evoking relaxation, calm, and purity. Mouthwatering, romantic, playful, and deeply soothing, Air Of Clarity is more than just a "vacation in a bottle"- it's a journey to a higher plane of existence.Stylish and convenient, this collector's pendant contains a unique Extrait de Parfum concentration of Air of Clarity- richer, deeper, and longer lasting than the EDP version. A dab on your skin lasts all day, making each scent feel more personal and powerful.

name: How To Say Bicycle In French
notes: Sweet Basil, Rosemary, White Thyme, Clary Sage, Lavender, Gentian Oil, Provence
style: Floral - Spicy, Green / Herbaceous
description: Bright, lush, and romantic, this fragrance is inspired by the French region of Provence: French cooking, lavender fields, farmer芒聙聶s markets, bike rides through the countryside, kir royales at sidewalk bistros, and the window-sill herb gardens of charming European villages. Vibrantly aromatic, How To Say Bicycle In French is a vicarious vacation to the sun-soaked fields of southern France- an utterly charming and completely unforgettable tribute to a place where, as the locals say,"L'amour est de tous les temps."

name: Tiramisu
notes: Mascarpone, Vanilla, Savoiardi Biscuits, Sugar, Espresso, Coffee, Cocoa, Marsala Wine
style: Boozy, Creamy, Earthy, Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet
description: Luxurious and delectable, Tiramisu brings Italy's most iconic dessert to life as only Theodoros Kalotinis could- a dynamic and modern gourmand as stylish as it is evocative. Taking full advantage of the indulgent richness of its extrait concentration, Tiramisu unfolds on the skin with rich, dark cocoa, delicately crystalized sugar, fluffy biscuits, creamy mascarpone, bold espresso, and the enchanting aroma of authentic Italian Marsala wine- layers of seductively mouthwatering notes that perfectly replicate the construction of real tiramisu. Sophisticated far beyond mere sweetness, Tiramisu is an elegant gourmand extrait that makes a lasting impression.

name: Hall Of Fame - Claire's Picks
description: Featured on the 5th episode of our podcast,It芒聙聶s Just Perfume,Steve and Claire discuss the unforgettable, best-of-the-best fragrances that they couldn't live without- a personal Hall Of Fame. And we've put together a perfect little Sample Pack so you can sniff along with them!Claire芒聙聶s Hall of Fame:1. Atelier des Ors - Lune Feline EDP2. Grandiflora - Saskia3. ONE DAY - Jasmine Tea4. Parfum d'Empire - Corsica Furiosa5. Universal Flowering - Holy HellListen and subscribe to our podcast 芒聙聯It芒聙聶s Just Perfume芒聙聯 available wherever you listen to podcasts!

name: Velvet Iris
notes: Agathoma, Galbanum, Mastique, Orris, Leather, Sandalwood, Labdanum
style: Earthy, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody Ambery Floral
description: If Essential Parfums was content to offer simple, high-quality fragrances at a great value, surely we'd be content with that also- but thank goodness they have higher ambitions than that. Velvet Iris is the latest example of just how lofty those ambitions truly are- an elegant and complex unisex leather featuring an exquisitely deep, multifaceted orris layered with unique aromatic green notes, this masterful creation from the legendary Dominique Ropion stands tall beside some of our favorite iris creations of all time. A vibrant, intoxicatingly verdant opening showcases a sophisticated collection of bright, bitter green notes, drawing out the woodsier and drier facets of a gorgeous, generous dose of real orris, which also showcases a gently sweet powdery aspect that blends perfectly with the delicate resins in the leather and sandalwood base. Were an iris fragrance this magical to come from any of the venerable old guard of luxury fragrance, with a price to match, we'd still say it was a must-try, but from Essential Parfums? It's the easiest decision you've ever made.

name: Japanese Whiskey
notes: Whiskey, Mizunara Oak, Malted Barley, Clary Sage, Sandalwood, Chestnut
style: Boozy, Woody - Amber, Woody - Fresh
description: With over 150 years of craft and tradition, Japanese whiskey stands alongside Scotland and the American South as one of the most important and well respected whiskey producers in the world. It's this rich legacy that d'Annam honors with a unique and special release amongst its offerings- a gorgeously evocative olfactory interpretation, presented in an eye-catching decanter-inspired oversized bottle fit for presentation alongside the rarest of aged spirits. True to the distinctive personality of legendary Japanese whiskies from renowned houses like Yamazaki, Nikka, and Hibiki, Japanese Whiskey has a more subtle power to it than smoky, peaty Scotch-inspired whiskey scents, or the rich, syrupy vanilla of a Bourbon fragrance. Instead, it hums with the quiet intensity of aged Mizunara oakwood and warm chestnut, with the gentle sweetness of malted barley filling in for anything more overtly gourmand. And from this skillful restraint, it manages to establish itself as unique among our very favorite whiskey scents- stronger and more complex than a skin scent, but with all the versatility of one, an everyday-perfect, totally unisex whiskey scent with all the elegant sophistication of real Japanese single malt. We understand now why the bottle is so big- you're going to want to spray this one as much as possible.

name: Rose Steady
notes: Frankincense, Cashmeran, Bay Leaf, Rose, Sandalwood, Fig Leaf, Patchouli Heart, Cedarwood, Musk
style: Floral, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody Ambery Floral
description: The sensation of being held by nature, a soft step into the forest. Resinous frankincense and cashmere woods lead to a heart of comforting rose petals, fig leaf, and sandalwood. An unexpected velvety musk settles into smoky patchouli and cedarwood. The scent brings forth an earthy elegance, both grounding and alluring.

name: Incense Antique
notes: Black Pepper, Cardamom, Lemon, Tobacco Leaf, Incense, Patchouli, Cistus, Cypress, Cade, Guaiac, Amber
style: Earthy, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: A moment where past and present converge. The space around you reveals its silent stories芒聙聰soul seen, heart intrigued. Spicy black pepper, cardamom, and honeyed lemon unfold into a moody, smoky heart of tobacco leaf and olibanum. The fragrance settles into a rich, woody blend of cistus, guaiacwood, and amber. Incense, tobacco, and antique wood linger, leaving a trail of enigmatic sophistication.

name: Chai Fleur
notes: Nutmeg, Cinnamon, Green Cardamom, Lavender, Cistus, Violet, Vanilla Bean, Cypriol, Cedarwood, Sandalwood
style: Creamy, Floral - Spicy, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: To romanticize the beauty of life芒聙聶s rhythms芒聙聰mind at ease, turning inward. Comforting nutmeg, cinnamon, and cardamom soften into a bouquet of fresh lavender, smoky cistus, and soothing violet. Vanilla bean, cedarwood, and sandalwood ground the fragrance in a decadent warmth. Chai spices, fresh florals, and creamy vanilla create an indulgent moment for oneself.

name: Bergamot Brio
notes: Bergamot, Pink Pepper, Orange Blossom, Lavender, Verbena, Jasmine, Patchouli, Vetiver, Sage, Amber
style: Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy
description: A love letter to your most vital self. Clear minded, expansive, radiant. Energizing bergamot and spicy pink pepper give way to calming lavender, soft jasmine, and bright verbena. Warm undertones of vetiver and amber evoke a hint of sensuality. The scent芒聙聶s vibrant spirit lingers on the skin.

name: L'Explicite
notes: Lemon Peel, Ylang Ylang, Banana Bread, Peanut Butter, Amber, Fruity Musks
style: Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet
description: The mouthwatering latest addition to The House Of Oud's vibrantly gourmand Crazy Collection, L'Explicite is modeled after a beloved and irresistible delicacy we don't think we've ever quite experienced as a fragrance before- a warm, buttery, perfectly moist slice of banana bread. Built around a rich and evocative banana bread accord- sweet, fruity, and mouthwateringly rich- and enlivened with lemon zest, a bright touch of ylang-ylang, and a generous spread of creamy, nutty peanut butter, this is the gourmand banana scent we've always dreamed of.

name: Vetiveria
notes: Timur Pepper, Sage, Juniper Berry, Lime, Snowbell, Lavender, Jasmine, Orange Blossom, Vetiver, Moss, Rockrose, Tonka Bean
style: Citrus, Earthy, Floral - Citrus, Fresh, Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: Inspired by the Islands of Indonesia, Vetiveria is an ode to the magnificent vetiver plant, a vibrant celebration of nature芒聙聶s most elegant grass. Rooted in the essence of the earth, the fragrance opens with a deluge of boisterous Sicilian lime, invigorated by the lively and aromatic Timur pepper and enhanced by lime, sage and juniper berry. The heart blooms with a striking blend of snowbell and lavender, their softness smoothing the edges of this bold composition. Anchored in a deep, earthy soul, Vetiveria showcases the richness of vetiver intertwined with verdant moss, resinous rockrose and the creamy warmth of tonka bean. A bold and addictive fragrance journey for those with an adventurous spirit, Vetiveria already feels like the bottle we'll be reaching for all summer long.

name: Nearly Noon
notes: Fig Nectar, Cream, Cardamom, Rice Pudding, Toasted Coconut, Saffron, Vanilla Bean, Sandalwood, Amber Woods
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Spicy, Sweet
description: Introducing Nearly Noon, the first collaboration between DefineMe and fragrance and beauty influencer Sniff with Steph.The name Nearly Noon captures that in-between moment when you芒聙聶re still in your pajamas, reluctant to leave the warmth of your bed. You芒聙聶ve just ordered brunch, and the world feels like it can wait a little longer. We all need more of those moments.At its heart, Nearly Noon is a smooth, creamy blend, anchored by two of Steph's all-time favorite notes: sandalwood and vanilla. These elements melt into a deliciously soft sweetness, enhanced by the spiced warmth of rice pudding and a milky fig nectar. The result is a unique scent that perfectly balances sophistication and indulgence.

name: R&B
notes: Honey Tangerine, Guava, Papaya, Bulgarian White Rose, Opoponax, Osmanthus, White Chocolate, Cedar, Amberwood
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: From Little Richard to Al Green to Toni Braxton, the expansive and always evolving genre formally known as Rhythm & Blues has encompassed a multitude of musical, cultural, and thematic influences over nearly a century, but at its core, two things remain constant: an emphasis on musicianship and songwriting and an outsized ability to express profound, sincere emotion, both undoubtedly born from its powerful connection to the Black experience in America. It's only appropriate that R&B the fragrance is both vibrantly joyous and deeply moving, an unforgettable combination of explosively juicy tropical fruit, lush Bulgarian rose, and a rich, warm, gourmand-inflected amber base that feels appropriately timeless. Whether you're kicking back to Marvin Gaye or Mary J., this intoxicating fragrance is the perfect companion.

name: Ocean The Rive
notes: Bergamot, Mandarin, Grapefruit, Sea Accord, Armoise, Basil, Blue Chamomile, Cashmere Wood, Patchouli, Vanilla, Musk, Amber
style: Fresh, Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Clean, Woody - Fresh
description: Ocean The Rive by Unique芒聙聶e Luxury is a refreshing and invigorating blend of marine accords, warm and sensual blue chamomile and basil, and zesty citrus undertones. Its vibrant sea breeze and herbal notes, including armoise and basil, along with the calming blue chamomile take center stage, delivering a crisp, aquatic, and uplifting experience. Its citrusy notes provide a sophisticated and aromatic depth. The cashmere wood, patchouli, vanilla, musk, and amber base provide a warm, smooth, and lasting impression.

name: Idolatry
notes: Pistachio, Praline, Labdanum, Vanilla, Hazelnut, Patchouli, Incense, Smoke, Benzoin
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Smoky, Sweet
description: An interpretation of that most delicious of sins, Idolatry is an irresistible gourmand temptation to stray from the righteous path. Sweet, aromatic pistachio and shamefully indulgent praline seduce from the very beginning, while a heart of dangerously luscious black vanilla blends with mystical swirls of incense and deep, dark resins that seem to call out from realms beyond. Once you're led astray, you may never be able to return- but will you even want to?

name: Divanche
notes: Apple, Pineapple, Pear, Gardenia, Champaca, Jasmine, Tuberose, Hedione, Powdery Notes, Heliotrope, Creamy Notes, Benzoin, Intense Woods, Ambroxan, Ambrette, White Musks
style: Creamy, Floral - Fruity, Floral - White, Fruity, Powdery / Soft
description: A scent from heaven, Divanche is the embodiment of purity, elegance, and quiet luxury. Inspired by the ethereal scent of blossoming Japanese Gardenia, this beautiful extrait de parfum unfolds with a touch of ripe fruits, leading into a floral heart of gardenia, jasmine, and tuberose. Crystal clear white notes create a refined and lingering charm, leaving a long lasting impression of grace and sophistication. Crafted with the finest ingredients in the world, Divanche is a truly divine scent- a whisper of radiant beauty captured in an unforgettable gold bottle.

name: Sisters B4 Misters
notes: Ginger, Lime, Banana, Strawberry, Sandalwood, Amber
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: If you weren't around for the Spice Girls revolution of the 1990s, it's hard to explain just how big a moment it truly was. Vibrant, joyful, stylish, and cool, Scary, Sporty, Posh, Baby, and Ginger were a global sensation, with singles and albums at the top of the charts, millions of screaming fans turning out for globally sold out world tours, and ear-catching pop music that still gets played every day. But the best part of all is how they did it- by celebrating solidarity among women and promoting a vision of Girl Power that, despite the carefree fun of the music itself, conveyed a powerful message about confronting misogyny and rejecting the patriarchal control over female autonomy and friendships. In other words, it wasn't just fun music- it was music that raised a generation of girls to believe in themselves.An olfactory tribute to the Spice Girls and all they still embody, Sisters B4 Misters is every bit as bubbly, catchy, and empowered as the iconic group themselves. Fizzy ginger and explosive lime capture the rapturous effervescence and infectious danceability of a perfect pop tune, while a sweet, fruity heart of banana and strawberry radiates youthful joy over a warm, comforting amber base that adds the perfect touch of grown-up sensuality for those who want to recapture the feeling of being young in the 90s without having to sacrifice the quality of real niche fragrance. In other words, Sisters B4 Misters is another musically inspired triumph for Jusbox, and a much needed return to the magic of Spice World. Girl Power, indeed.

name: Love Is Coming
notes: Blackcurrant, Tomato Leaf, Bell Pepper, Rose, Geranium, Lavender, Ambery Woods, Musk, Sandalwood
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: "I am born from stories of love, missing souls and renewed vows. I am inspired by the work of nature, the unexpected associations of aromas and the guilty pleasure of fruits, flowers and vegetables ripened under the sun.I am a tingling and deep new scent."A delightfully bright, deeply felt treatise on the nature of love, attraction, and, well, nature itself, Love Is Coming, Chapter II is a vibrant and invigorating traipse through a summer garden in full bloom. Bright green aromatics and ripe vegetable plants provide a refreshing splash of coolness in the hot breeze, while fresh blooming unisex florals sing with lush, romantic energy that seamlessly relaxes into a glowing twilight of musky amber. Whether it's human connection or the joyous feeling of being attuned to the natural world, love is about growth, renewal, and cooperation- and Love Is Coming, Chapter II is a celebration of all that brings us together.

name: San Pedro
notes: Italian Lemon, Italian Bergamot, Citrata Mint, Litsea Cubeba, Peach Skin, Green Cactus, Cashmere Wood, Vetiver, Violet, White Musk
description: Vibrant, sexy, and full of unique and intoxicating twists, San Pedro pays homage to Laurel Canyon: the home of countless parties and LA rock musicians during the experimental era of the late 1960s and 1970s, where everyone from Frank Zappa to Jim Morrison to Joni Mitchell made a once sleepy corner of the Hollywood Hills into the epicenter of music history.

name: Pink Jesus
notes: Blue Ginger, Pink Bubblegum, Galbanum, Canapa Sativa Essence, Clary Sage, Vanilla, Cypriol, Cashmere Wood, Virginia Cedarwood, Grey Amber, Ambroxan, Woods
description: Renowned for its delicate temperament, the marijuana strain  "Pink Jesus" was discovered during the 2000s by Sonoma Hills Farm in California and quickly gained an underground following. Amazed by the herb's striking, vibrant color, many who encountered the sativa blurted out "Jesus, she芒聙聶s pink!", earning her the nickname Pink Jesus.

name: Atlantico
notes: Pink Pepper, Bergamot, Lemon, Melonal, Calone, Nettle, Galbanum, Grass, Passionfruit, Rose Oxide, Styrax, Incense, Cashmeran, Ambroxan, Musk
description: A fragrance collaboration with Nic Von Rupp. Inspired by the renowned coordinates 308 NWN, famed for its towering waves near Nazare's (Portugal) coast.

name: Vaniglia
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Orange, Vanilla, Jasmine, Sweet Woods, Benzoin
style: Creamy, Powdery / Soft, Spicy, Sweet, Warm, Woody - Fresh
description: The joy of a Santa Maria Novella fragrance begins with the vibrant freshness that bursts forth from every bottle- infused with centuries-old tradition and the bountiful fragrant materials that abound in the hills of Tuscany, SMN scents exude a timeless, sophisticated vibrance that connects past to present and nature to civilization in a way that few houses can. So it stands to reason that when Santa Maria does vanilla, it's a bit different from the cloyingly sweet, plasticky vanillas that flood the market, and even from the indulgently creamy high-end gourmand vanillas that we love (but are already amply represented). Instead, Vaniglia is a delicate yet enveloping journey to the fresher side of vanilla- bright, boozy, woodsy, and spicy. It's sweet, warm and comforting, as any vanilla should be, but those facets are balanced with a sophisticated, smooth, and light on its feet character that make it immediately identifiable as a Santa Maria Novella, and the blissful drydown of gentle woods and resins lingers all day long, making this the perfect fragrance for vanilla lovers looking for something that makes a statement without ever overwhelming the senses. A vanilla we can reach for any day, any season, any occasion? Sounds like a match made in heaven.

name: Castley
notes: Fresh Ginger, Bergamot, Black Pepper, Petitgrain, Timut Pepper, Neroli, Akigalawood, Labdanum, Benzoin
style: Fresh, Fresh - Citrus, Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: Castley captures the bold spirit of 18th-century French explorers, embodying the modern man's drive for adventure. Boasting a vibrant, eye-opening blend of electric citrus, fiery ginger, and the unmistakably unique crackle of timut pepper set against a luxurious yet lively base of resins and akigalawood, this dynamic interpretation of the timeless gentleman's formula of citrus, spice, and woods has the sophistication of a classic masculine but the brio and energy of a chic, modern creation- a combination that makes it irresistibly easy to wear for any occasion or climate, and yet distinctively, unforgettably seductive. Set sail on your own journey of adventure with Castley- who knows where it might take you?

name: Calin d'Ete
notes: Iris, Solar Notes, Honey, Amber, Bergamot, Tobacco, Amyris, Vanilla, Elemi, Gaiac, Musk, White Chocolate, Cypress, Aldehyre, Ambergris Accord, Leather, Orange, Patchouli
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Fresh - Citrus, Warm, Woody - Fresh, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Inspired by Fran脙搂ois Ozon's evocative film 脙聣t脙漏 85, C脙垄lin d芒聙聶脙聣t脙漏unfolds like a sun-drenched memory of first love, capturing the essence of youth and the bittersweet nature of fleeting moments. The journey begins with bright bergamot and orange, whose zesty notes evoke the warmth of a summer day, As the heart of C脙垄lin d芒聙聶脙聣t脙漏 reveals itself, delicate iris mingles with solar notes and the sweetness of honey, embodying sunlit afternoons spent in laughter and longing. Musk and ambergris add a sensual depth, capturing the intoxicating pull of desire and the weight of grief. Finally, grounding notes of cypress and patchouli resonate with the film's themes of mortality and the ephemeral nature of youth, reminding us that while the summer may be vibrant and alive, it is also tinged with a sense of impermanence.

name: Narkissos
notes: Daffodil Accord, Salted Butter, Chamomile, Cruelty-free Deer Musk Accord, Jonquille, Narcissus Absolute, Carnation Absolute, Orange Flower, Jasmin Sambac, Geranium, Honey, Patchouli Absolute, Tobacco Accord, Leather, Vanilla, Benzoin Siam, Ambrette Seed Oil, Fir Balsam Absolute
style: Classic Feminine, Floral, Floral - Spicy, Powdery / Soft
description: Named for the mythological Greek man whose beauty was so profound that even he couldn't escape its power, Narkissos is a celebration of the narcissus poeticus flower- heady, lush, alluring, a star player in some of the most unforgettable masterpieces of the great eras of perfumery. Now, it returns to center stage- ready to seduce you.

name: Existence
notes: Lily Of The Valley, Rose, Frankincense, Mystikal, Labdanum, Ambergris, White Musk, Benzoin
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Light, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic
description: Conceived by Quentin Bisch as an expression of the serenity of endlessness, Existence is based around a heart-breaking note of lily of the valley. Delicate and fragile, the addition of frankincense gives it a remarkable expansiveness. As the scent develops, an aldehyde facet enhances the impression of pristine whiteness, while rose adds a living, breathing physicality. In the base, labdanum and benzoin connects the landscape to the complex reality of the earth. Bright, sincere and emotive, Existence conveys the incomprehensible vastness of the infinite, with all of its life-affirming optimism.

name: Decision
notes: Pink Pepper, Bergamot, Cardamom, Frankincense, Juniper, Myrrh, Patchouli, Cedarwood, Vanilla
style: Earthy, Fresh, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Light
description: Starting with an olfactory bolt of lightning, Decision banishes the darkness of uncertainty with the cool woodiness and citrus-mineralic sparkle of frankincense, bergamot, myrrh and juniper berries. The light spreads further, aided by the gleaming sheen of Atlas cedarwood. Finally, a warm vanilla in the base conveys the profoundly liberating effect of acceptance. Uncompromising, distinctive and incandescent, Decision captures the paradox that lies at the core of all of life芒聙聶s most powerful decisions: it is focused on its goal while remaining open to countless possibilities.

name: Orchid Mantis
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Dewy Green Accord, Pear, Basil, Pink Orchid, Queen Of The Night, Ylang Ylang, Jasmine Absolute, Rose Absolute, Patchouli, Vetiver, Sandalwood, Moss, Musks
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Floral - Light, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: In the muggy shade of a tropical rainforest, an orchid sways seductively. Its glistening petals tremble in anticipation, inviting a passing butterfly to consummate the intimate act of pollination. Succumbing to the allure of the silken flower, the butterfly eagerly flits forward. But as it prepares to alight, the exotic bloom abruptly transforms. Delicate leaves contort into dagger-like forelegs, seizing the bug芒聙聶s fragile wings. Before the butterfly can comprehend its fate, its head is devoured, crushed between the powerful jaws of the stealthy orchid mantis.Zoologist Orchid Mantis entices you into a fragrant illusion. Juicy pear, exquisite rose and dainty jasmine entwine with basil and ylang to conjure the intense scent of orchids, set against the backdrop of a humid rainforest evoked by patchouli, moss, sandalwood and vetiver. Ultimately, an enduring musk serves as a captivating reminder - that beauty can also be beastly.

name: Amber K
notes: Pink Peppercorn, Spider Lily, Havana Cigar, Orris, Cocoa Bean, White Cedarwood Oil, Indonesian Patchouli, Tonka Bean, Olibanum Oil, Amber, Vanilla
description: During a trip to Punta Cana last December, Sonia Constant's senses were captivated by the gorgeous tropical aromas of the Dominican Republic. The nuances of cocoa and vanilla from the mysterious spiderlily flower, as well as the deep accents of Dominican cigar tobacco, were captured using Scent Trek technology, allowing Amber K to immortalize the uniqueness of these accords. To enhance the sweet notes of the spiderlily flower, Ambe K intertwines woody and amber accords by overdosing Ambrofix, a modern amber note, and Georgywood, an extremely diffusive cedar, creating a sophisticated balance highlighting both brilliance and depth against a musky background. The marriage of the addictive feminine notes of the spiderlily flower with the masculine and intense accords of tobacco and tonka bean evoke a spirited escape to the Caribbean in a fluid and captivating fragrance experience- a memory of travel and romance never to be forgotten.

name: Pacific Rock Flower
notes: Lemon, Eucalyptus, Tea Tree, Sea Salt, Cocowax, Coral Flower, Mimosa, Tuberose, Moss, Cedarwood, Patchouli, Sandalwood
style: Floral, Floral - Citrus, Floral - Light, Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Clean, Salty / Oceanic, Woody - Fresh
description: Seize the day and experience a moment of pure bliss with this oceanic and creamy perfume. A radiant blend of coastal tea tree and delicate florals transports you to a sun-drenched Australian shoreline, where sea mist kisses wild dunes. A burst of Italian lemon, infused with a touch of sea salt, awakens the senses before melting into a soft, creamy heart of tuberose and coral flower. As the fragrance settles, Australian sandalwood and patchouli create a warm, lingering embrace- an echo of golden sunsets over endless blue horizons. A fragrance  inspired by the untamed beauty of Australia芒聙聶s coastal landscapes, where waves whisper against sunlit shores and native blooms thrive under the open sky.

name: Extrait Sampler Set
description: Try the Extrait collection including the newest (and most delicious) Chemin d'Amande.Includes 2.5ml atomizers:Estrella de la Manana ExtraitJardins de Misfah ExtraitChemin d'Amande Extrait

name: Water Of Intuition
notes: Sandalwood, Amber, Cedar, Musk, Vanilla, Cocoa
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Woody - Amber, Woody - Fresh
description: An elemental voyage into the realms of mist and rain, Water of Intuition is a soothing blend of gourmand and woody notes that creates an atmosphere of pure, ethereal bliss. Composed around a comforting cloud of creamy and sustainably-sourced sandalwood, this dreamlike fragrance floats in a soft haven of amber and musk, which merge with lush swirls of vanilla and cocoa to create the perfect sensual elixir.

name: Earthy Abundance
notes: Green Tea, Jasmine, Turmeric, Lavender, Vanilla
style: Earthy, Floral, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy
description: Inspired by all things green and growing, Earthy Abundance is a beautifully lush aromatic green floral that may well be the jewel of the Melanie Martinez Portals Collection. Infused with the leafy freshness of green tea and responsibly sourced aromatic herbs and flowers, Earthy Abundance is a captivating song in tune with nature, enhanced with the harmonizing richness of vanilla bean for a joyfully romantic and long lasting signature both playful and sophisticated.

name: Fiery Passion
notes: Strawberry, Pink Peony, Vanilla, Musk, Woods
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Warm, Woody - Fresh
description: Born from the flames of love and desire, Melanie Martinez's fire-inspired  entry in her Portals collection is a tantalizing blend of innocence and sensuality. Sparkling and seductive, Fiery Passion is a floral gourmand that recalls the delicious confections of youth with a mouthwatering strawberry candy opening, while a romantic pink peony infused with the warmth of avant-garde musks and woods create a complex and compelling bouquet for creative souls of all ages. The perfect companion for a summer fling or a lifelong love, Fiery Passion has everything needed to keep hearts aflutter.

name: Air Of Clarity
notes: Caramel, Coconut, Ambroxan, Musk, Tonka Bean, Sandalwood
style: Fresh, Fresh - Aquatic, Gourmand, Salty / Oceanic, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy, Woody - Fresh
description: Inspired by the Element of Air, Air Of Clarity is a bright, smooth solar gourmand with an irresistible aura of sheer tropical delight. Sun-kissed coconut drenched in delectable caramel emanates the golden glow of a radiant sun on a distant white sand beach, evoking relaxation, calm, and purity. Mouthwatering, romantic, playful, and deeply soothing, Air Of Clarity is more than just a "vacation in a bottle"- it's a journey to a higher plane of existence.

name: Chambre52 Discovery Set
description: Explore the beautifully crafted, eco-conscious world of Chambre52 with this specially priced collection containing 2ml atomizer samples of all six scents from the debut collection: Bois Flott脙漏, Orencie, Soleil Tonka, Tobacco Memories, Cuir 脙聽 Corps, and Contre Ta Peau. Six fragrances, six facets of a rare and refined sensory experience, where each note is a tribute to subtlety and olfactory art.

name: Portals Debut Collection Set
description: Discover a whole new aspect to the astonishingly creative, unforgettable world of Melanie Martinez with this one of a kind collector's set featuring the fragrances inspired by her third album, Portals. The stunning one foot tall sculpture opens to reveal 15ml atomizers of the four wholly transportive compositions of the initial collection, fragrances that recreate vivid worlds that can be visited with just a little spritz.Each fragrance- Air of Clarity, Fiery Passion, Earthy Abundance, and Water of Intuition- is inspired by one of the four classical elements, providing a captivating variety of fragrant choices for any style or moment.

name: Orencie
notes: Angelica Root, Lychee, Pyrazine, Geranium Rhodinol, Rose Oxide, Amber, Musk, Sandalwood, Cedar, Milk
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Fresh - Clean, Powdery / Soft
description: Waking up with a sense of blissful relaxation in a room slowly filling with joyful sunlight; the feeling of fresh linen against soft, clean skin, a connection to the world renewed in elegant sensuality; Orencie is a sheer delight to the senses, vivid and youthful lychee and sheer, fresh rose against a luminous aura of gentle, creamy amber musks. A room all to yourself- Orencie is the scent of freedom.

name: Bois Flotte
notes: Turmeric Leaf, Coolwood, Fleur De Sel, Cashmeran, Patchouli Heart, Cedar Heart, Vetiver, Guaiac, Suderal, Sandalwood
style: Woody - Fresh
description: Bois Flott脙漏, an ode to the voyage of driftwood as it travels on ocean waves, polished by time and nature to an elegant smoothness and irresistible natural beauty irreplicable by human hands. The nobility of this concept and the introspection it invites takes the olfactive form of a soft, smooth bouquet of quietly rich woods, gently salt-kissed by ocean water with its touches of spice and vegetation, peacefully whisked along the unpredictable waters as the glow of twilight sparkles on the caps of the waves.

name: Soleil Tonka
notes: Amber, Sea Salt, Solarys, Mate, Coconut Bark, Vanilla, Benzoin, Labdanum, Tonka Bean
description: Soleil Tonka is a sublime plunge into tropical waters of pure, refreshing delight. From the warm sand glowing with an evocative solar accord, the fragrance dives out into the salty ocean spray, the indulgent energy of exotic vanilla and creamy coconut gliding on the powerful waves and then drawing back to shore, deliciously brushed by notes of tonka beans and the sunset glow of warm resins. Sophisticated, refreshing, and delightfully, deliberately unsweet, Soleil Tonka is a vacation for a traveler of a more refined variety.

name: Tobacco Memories
notes: Saffron, Genieve, Morello Cherry, Tobacco Absolute, Iris, Incense, Oakmoss, Vanilla
description: Like a deliciously balmy evening on a hotel rooftop with a very expensive drink in hand, Tobacco Memories is a fragrance of powerful reminiscence that stirs together an explosive Morello cherry accord with the lingering veil of smoke that lingers as it would on a well-worn coat. Laced with sweet melancholy, it blends an evolving scent of tobacco- first sweet, then smoky, then rich and warm- with the opulence of saffron and the intimacy of iris. With a smooth, rich vanilla in the base to match the boozy warmth, everything blends together in a blissful haze of elated inebriation that won't wear off until the last partygoer leaves.

name: Contre Ta Peau
notes: Pink Pepper, Neroli, Aniseed, Orange Blossom, Petitgrain, Heliotrope, Animal Accord, Musk, Vanilla
description: Inspired by the real-life Parisians who love orange blossom and its luminous floral beauty, Contre ta Peau is a magnetic attraction of a fragrance. Sweet and bright with a tingle of pink pepper, it evokes lovers brushing against each other and inevitably drawing closer, the musks and animalic notes becoming the scent of skin sublimated by orange blossom and blended with richly sensual vanilla It's a fragrance of pure pleasure, a poem for lovers that leaves a trail sure to encourage your very own wake of followers.

name: Cuir A Corps
notes: Mandarin, Pink Pepper, Cinnamon, Orange Blossom, Vanilla, Patchouli Heart, Leather, Animal Accord, Benzoin
description: An exhilarating night that lingers well into the light of dawn, Cuir 脙聽 Corps is an enigmatic and unforgettable sensual experience. Centered on a bold pairing of robust, smoky leather and rich, warm Madagascar vanilla, Cuir 脙聽 Corps draws forth evocations of intimate moments over cocktails and canapes, embraces exchanged on the dance floor, blissful moments that seem to last forever. The fire of red pepper, the smooth elegance of suede, the carnal purr of musky animalics, all set against the rich, sensual, gently boozy sophistication of real vanilla. Reach for this one the next time you want to have a night you hope never ends.

name: Extrait Discovery Kit
description: Night. The mind wanders. Our eyes rest on the moon芒聙聶s glow. The silence of the sleeping world excites our imagination. Here we find enchanted lands, magic, and mystery. And legends. We go from story to story, changing destinations, heroes, and landscapes. The Extraits de Voyage collection is a scent exploration of these real and imagined stories, passed down from generation to generation.This Discovery Kit features 3 select fragrances from this set, each in 2.5ml atomizer samples:Jardins de Misfah ExtraitChemin d'Amande Extrait (NEW!)Estella de la Ma脙卤ana Extrait.

name: Chemin d'Amande Extrait
notes: Almond, Wheat Absolute, Pure Jungle Essence Conscious Bourbon Vanilla
style: Creamy, Earthy, Fresh, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: Long ago, before Portugal was Portugal, the Moorish king Ibn-Almundim ruled over Chelb in the Algarve. Returning victorious from conquest, he brought many captives, including Gilda, a beautiful queen from the northern lands.Though initially content, Gilda grew increasingly sorrowful, longing deeply for snow's whiteness. Healers failed to cure her sadness until, advised by a mysterious woman, the king filled the valley with blooming almond trees. When Gilda saw the valley blanketed in white blossoms, her joy returned.Ever since, the Algarve remains the kingdom of almond blossoms, guardian of this ancient tale.Chemin d'Amande is a warm breeze of wheat, tinged with the whiteness of a freshly picked almond. Its gentle warmth carries notes of enveloping sweetness.

name: Jardins de Misfah Extrait
notes: Davana, Rose Absolute, Dates, Honey, Almond
description: It was very early when she entered Misfah. The village awoke gently to the sound of water meandering wildly along thousands of irrigation canals, the falajs. With hands covered in unknown symbols, she gently touched the trees, buds, and young fruit.Nature began to rustle. Pomegranates, apricots, figs, and almonds ripened.
