Roses opened into a kaleidoscope of brilliant colors. The palm trees bent under the weight of their arrogant dates. As she passed, Misfah transformed into an extraordinary village. An open-air cornucopia, where each breath was an opportunity to discover a new scent.Jardins de Misfah Extrait is a reimagined Jardins of Misfah. In this smoother, deeper version, abundance does not mean excess. In the heart of a unique rose garden, the scent of dates, honey, and almonds whet both the appetite and the desire.

name: Estrella De La Manana Extrait
notes: Birch, Vanilla, Cocoa, Benzoin Tears
style: Creamy, Smoky, Sweet, Woody - Dark
description: The mountainous coasts of Eastern Mexico blended into the warm, damp veil of late summer.In Veracruz, the daughter of King Tenitzi III, a devastating beauty nicknamed Estrella de la Ma脙卤ana, was running through the plains. She met the gaze of a young boy with antlers - the Deer Prince. They exchanged only a few words but the magic of love was set in motion.When King Tentizi III learned of this romance, he became blind with rage. He sent his priests after them. The sky darkened. He decided that the souls of Morning Star and the Deer Prince would be sacrificed to calm the wrath of the Gods.Tears of their blood gave birth to a small shrub. The branches intertwined like lovers in their last embrace. Star-shaped flowers covered the entire tree. A few days later, many shoots rose out of the ground and the first strands of black vanilla swayed in the wind, whispering the fragrance of the missing lovers.芒聙聵Estrella de la Ma脙卤ana芒聙聶 is a black vanilla pod, its heart cut and consumed in the burning hearth of a fireplace. The smoke of wood and black cocoa powder is married with the roundness of vanilla.

name: Jasper no Kodo II
style: Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: You芒聙聶re sitting in an alpine meadow, overlooking a glacial lake. You take a break with a Kodo ceremony. You芒聙聶ve brought along your favorite agarwood. This is Jasper no Kodo II.Top-notes of Wild Blackberries, Boronia, Copal, Palo Santo, Juniper Berries, Canadian Hemlock and Century Old Canadian Fir AbsoluteHeart notes of Green Kyen Agarwood, Gardenia, Jonquil, Blue Water Lily and Wild White Malinau from Yaseen.Base notes of Moss, Green Sacra Absolute, Jade Wood, Wild Papuan Agarwood, White Ambergris, and Pine Needle Absolute.50ml Cask Strength Extrait. Ships with black anodized aluminum caps.

name: Delulu
notes: Bergamot, Mandarin, Rhubarb, Cedrat, Strawberry Jam, Raspberry, Blackcurrant, Rose Oil Bulgaria, Olibanum, Vetiver, Ambroxan, Musk, Sandalwood, Osmanthus
description: The escapee hideout filled with memories and joys of fading youth, sunlight of idle day and never ending romance.Everything that we don芒聙聶t want to endPack of crayons, paper, white glue, the whole dayFrozen yogurt, perfect movie-like berry pieOversaturated garden, laying in sunlight, doing nothingA memory of favorite toy, that you hope is still somewhere thereMelted candy in the jeans pocketPool of tears, a gentle smile, an escape from tomorrow

name: Hall of Fame - Dana's Picks
description: Featured on our 3rd episode podcast,It芒聙聶s Just Perfume,Steve and Dana talk about their Hall of Fame fragrances... their absolute favorite scents that have made a lasting impression. Luckily we have five of their favorites in this special sample pack.Dana芒聙聶s Hall of Fame:1. Mediterraneo - Carthusia2. Relique d芒聙聶Amour - Oriza L. Legrand3. Mississippi Medicine - DS & Durga4. Paradisi - Jorum Studio5. Annabel芒聙聶s Birthday Cake - Marissa ZappasListen and subscribe to our podcast 芒聙聯It芒聙聶s Just Perfume芒聙聯 available wherever you listen to podcasts!

name: Hall of Fame - Steve's Picks
description: Featured on our 3rd episode podcast,It芒聙聶s Just Perfume,Steve and Dana talk about their Hall of Fame fragrances... their absolute favorite scents that have made a lasting impression. Luckily we have five of their favorites in this special sample pack.Steve芒聙聶s Hall of Fame:1. Wulong Cha - Nishane2. Avignon - Comme des Garcons3. Invasion Barbare - Parfums MDCI4. Melograno - Santa Maria Novella5. Eau de Protection - Etat Libre d芒聙聶Orange5-piece sample pack, limited supplyListen and subscribe to our podcast 芒聙聯It芒聙聶s Just Perfume芒聙聯 available wherever you listen to podcasts!

name: Almafolia
notes: Tuberose, Sweet Orange, Peach, Jasmine, White Rose, Ylang Ylang, Coconut, Rosewood, Amber, Vanilla Berries, White Musk, Benzoin
style: Floral, Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Woody Ambery Floral
description: The intimacy of the senses merges with the sensuality of the inner self, in the synthesis of an olfactory signature that is so intensely satisfying in the immediate, that in the following moments it succeeds in quelling by paradox every other odorous impulse.The tuberose, undisputed queen of this composition, is revealed, transforming each spray into an intimate and passionate embrace. Almafolia is a sensory journey into the heart of emotions, an olfactory symphony created with passion to explore our inner selves.

name: Salm
notes: Ginseng, Ginger, Cypress, Pine, Incense, Cedar, Patchouli, Vetiver, Peru Balsam, Sandalwood
style: Fresh, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: The scent of lineage, root and life. Eaves and beams, wooden frames. Below the pine tree lies the root in soil, grabbing the soil is a man-shaped key. The incense marks the passage of time, the ash falls to the sand and blend. You walk into thehanok, sharing the shape as the root-shaped key. The wood and you and the scent, has lived for countless thousand years.

name: Jeju
notes: Yuzu, Grapefruit, Basil, Bitter Orange, Tomato Leaves, Green Accord, Orange Blossom, Moss, Musk, Cedar
style: Floral - Light, Fresh, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: An island in the southernmost, an oasis. The wind combs through the green hair on the back of the hills and detangles the scents. The rustle of grass cuts through the breeze and leaves a long-running lime-colored hue. Fruits grow on the island芒聙聶s skin and gradient to yellow, the mark of fingernail on its peel looks like a sickle moon. The color brushes through the landscape and runs down the sea. A splash of turquoise. The blue of water on shore washes up and meets the yellow of the island. A beautiful blend of colours.

name: Odeur 10
notes: Aldehyde, Mint, Ambrette, Lily Of The Valley, Ambroxan, Musk
style: Avant-Garde, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Odeur 10 is a chemical composition of clean. Oxygenated ultra-purity, distilled into scent. A precise volume: the scientific measure of clinical comfort. Hydrogen peroxide, a molecular cocoon, softly encapsulated. Entirely new, yet distinctly familiar. An intangible sensation. The scent of the everyday subverted.Launched in celebration of Comme des Gar脙搂ons Fragrances芒聙聶 30th anniversary, Odeur 10 builds upon other scents from the 芒聙聹anti-perfume芒聙聺 series. The fragrance distils the idea of cleanliness into an abstract, atmospheric fragrance. Composed with ultra-pure elements like oxygen and hydrogen peroxide, it evokes a sense of clinical calm and quiet protection.

name: Impadia
notes: Bergamot, Mandarin, Pear, Bulgarian Rose, Turkish Rose, African Orange Flower, Akigalawood, Vanilla Absolute, And Sandalwood
description: Inspired by the duality of an urban landscape and the symphony of colors that envelop it during sunrise and sunset, Impadia takes inspiration from shades of pink and orange, and from the intersection between a cityscape and the beautiful splashes of nature that come alive within it each spring. The resulting scent 芒聙聯 created by perfumer Jordi Fernandez脗聽- is a luxurious floral, gourmand, and woody masterpiece with notes of Bulgarian and Turkish roses, Madagascar vanilla, and an addictive toffee accord.

name: Burnt Hinoki
notes: Juniper Berry, Smoked Hinoki Wood, Cedar
style: Woody - Dark, Woody - Fresh
description: Bright. Blissful. Meridional. A fragrant dance of charred elegance, capturing the essence of the Japanese Shou Sugi Ban, an ancestral process of burning wood renowned for its immortality, longevity and strength. The aromatic juniper berry lends a subtle, piney freshness, while smoked hinoki and cedarwood intertwine, creating a rich, elegantly charred signature.The scent was inspired by the smoked hinoki wood marquetry walls of a mansion that left a lasting impression on perfumer Domitille Michalon.With a captivating and enigmatic aura, Burnt Hinoki transports you to a world where tradition and artistry unite in a harmonious olfactory journey.

name: Abi Roya
notes: Grapefruit, Juniper Berry, White Camphor, Pink Lotus, White Lotus, Blue Lotus, Mimosa, Gardenia, Osmanthus, Hay, Mate, Cedarwood, Guaiacwood
description: A fragrance born from the whispers of a diaphanous dream. Abi Roya opens with the tender kiss of camphor and citrus, guiding you into an ethereal lotus garden, containing the lotus rainbow of blue, white, yellow and pink lotus flowers. Kissed with the gentle touches of gardenia, and mimosa blooming in quiet harmony. Like a secret carried on the wind, this scent reveals itself only to the skin that embraces it. Mystical and timeless, Abi Roya invites you to step into a world where every moment is laced with beauty and hidden stories, waiting to be discovered.

name: Bonded
notes: Bourbon Whiskey, Oakmoss, Vietnamese Agarwood, Tobacco
description: Much like France's AOC or Italy's DOP standards indicate that a local product has met rigorous standards for the methods, origin, and quality of its production, so too did the Bottled-In-Bond standard reign in pre-Prohibition America as the only reliable way to know that a bottle of whiskey was distilled, concentrated, and aged according to safety and quality standards determined in an 1897 Congressional Act- not only a mark of superior quality, but also an important distinction at a time when poorly-controlled bootleg liquor cut with dangerous additives could pose a serious health risk. Bonded is a fragrance inspired by the imagery of oakmoss steeped in a vial of Bonded whiskey. Crafted over several months, this unique scent features a meticulously developed bourbon accord that transcends the typical sweet gourmand experience, delivering the complex profile of spice, wood, and grain that accompanies bourbon's vanillic sweetness. At its core lies a mossy foundation, harmonized with the richness of tobacco and Vietnamese agarwood. The result is an amber cocktail of masculine woody notes, seamlessly blending with the bold character of bourbon to produce a long-lasting sensation of warmth and sophistication. It's no surprise that a niche house as dedicated to uncompromising ingredient quality and traditional production methods as Rogue would be inspired by the equally rigorous standards of Bottled-In-Bond whiskey, and it's perhaps equally no surprise that the results are a whiskey fragrance we're confident is up there with the very best we've ever experienced.

name: Socotra
notes: Dragons Blood Oil, Civet Abs, Jadewood, Chilli Seed, Cinnamon, Olibanum, Labdanum, Malaysian Oud, Red Cedarwood, Aged Benzoin Abs, Saffron Oleoresin, White & Black Ambergris, Bulgarian & Greek Tobacco Abs Red & Green Hojari Frankincense.
style: Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: SOCOTRA is a rare and groundbreaking fragrance, a collaboration between Hunayn and Dr. Rajesh Balkrishnan, capturing the untamed essence of the Socotra Archipelago. Inspired by the island芒聙聶s legendary Dragon芒聙聶s Blood Tree and the sacred bakhoor traditions of the Socotran Yemenis, this perfume is a deep, resinous, and smoky tribute to one of the world芒聙聶s most unique landscapes.Its striking red hue comes from an aged tincture of Dragon芒聙聶s Blood Resin, enriched with Saffron Oleoresin and Civet Absolute, while Red Hojari Frankincense, Olibanum, and Malaysian Oud recreate the island芒聙聶s burning incense rituals. A touch of Tobacco, Cinnamon, and rare Ambergris completes the composition, evoking the richness of Socotra芒聙聶s biodiversity and culture.

name: Asubuhi
notes: Cardamom, Galbanum, Coriander, Lavender, Ginger, Jasmine, Tuberose, Blue Chamomile, Mimosa, Ylang Ylang, Violet Leaf, Sandalwood, Amber, Vanilla, Eaglewood, Patchouli, Vetiver
style: Earthy, Floral - Spicy, Green / Herbaceous
description: A fragrance deeply rooted in the perfumer's cherished childhood memories. A delicate scent that will travel with you throughout the day; Asubuhi evokes the fresh sensation of the morning sun shining over a dew-kissed grass field. The air is filled with the earthy scent of wet grass, blooming flower beds, and a hint of soft spices. This perfume captures the essence of nature芒聙聶s awakening.

name: Jardin de Musc
notes: 1991 Sultani Deer Musk, 2001 Sultani Mysore Sandal, 1970s Sultan Gardenia, 1970s Sultani Rose Saffron Co-Distillation, Burflower, Kewra (Pandan), Kashmiri Saffron Tincture, 1990 Dutchman's Pipe Cactus, 1960 Rose, Jasmine, Neroli Co-Distillation, 1960 Violet, 1960 Gardenia, Jasmine Basil Co-Distillation, White Kinam, Green Kinam, Yellow Kinam And Wild Kinam Tincture
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Spicy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: At Hunayn, they don芒聙聶t just create perfumes, they create stories, memories, and emotions. Jardin de Musc is one of those stories, crafted from a deep love for rare ingredients and a desire to push the boundaries of what a perfume can be. This isn芒聙聶t just a fragrance to wear; it芒聙聶s a piece of art to experience.Jardin de Musc began as a simple passion project, a desire to harness the warmth and depth of deer musk, sandalwood, and burflower, all known for their rich, mellow qualities. The initial goal was to create something that surrounded the wearer in a soft, harmonious 芒聙聹bubble芒聙聺 of scent. But as the process evolved, Hunayn was on the verge of something far greater.Drawing from an archive of rare ingredients, Jardin de Musc is infused with treasures like a 34-year-old Kashmiri musk pod, steeped in 25-year-old Mysore sandalwood oil. Then added a 1980 gardenia, a 1960 violet oil, a jasmine and basil co-distillation from 1990, and a 1980 white rose otto. In total, Jardin de Musc holds over 70 of the rarest, most exquisite oils collected, each ingredient carefully chosen for its timeless beauty and history.This is no ordinary perfume. Jardin de Musc was never created with wearability in mind, it was crafted to challenge and inspire. Hunayn didn芒聙聶t set out to make something conventional; they set out to push boundaries and let these ancient ingredients speak for themselves. A perfume to be discovered, not defined. Creative work done in Collaboration with MonsieurMadame Oud

name: Duty & Death
style: Smoky, Woody - Dark, Woody Ambery Floral
description: The soul of Hunayn distilled into scent, Duty & Death embodies the harrowing dance of war. This is our most complex creation, a fragrance that captures the relentless weight of courage, duty, honour, and death. Built upon a skeleton of thick, unwavering smoke, with cade, birch, and oud as its backbone, this scent does not fade but persists like the fog of battle. The smoke coils through every moment, a ghostly reminder of the dread that lingers over war芒聙聶s every breath. While fleeting notes paint glimpses of the unseen, those rare moments of heroism and humanity in the chaos芒聙聰the smoke remains. It is the inescapable truth, the shadow of loss, and the price of victory. For though one may stand victorious, the scent reminds us: in war, no one emerges untouched. Duty & Death is the fragrance of sacrifice, a reminder that even triumph carries the weight of finality.

name: Hinoki Meditation
notes: Hinoki Cypress, Forest Leaves, Incense, Spices, Japanese Cedar, Sandalwood
style: Earthy, Green / Herbaceous, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Light
description: For all of the sophistication and serenity associated with Japan and its culture, Japanese nature is as punishing as it is beautiful. Monsoon rains, earthquakes, tidal waves, blizzards- all frequent natural occurrences that have challenged the island nation for millennia. But from those challenging circumstances emerge remarkable adaptations, including the Hinoki Cypress- a unique tree with stunningly resilient properties- hinoki wood is amazingly durable, highly moisture and rot resistant, and even features antimicrobial and insect repellent properties to go with its fresh, robust, aromatic aroma- it's largely due to their construction from hinoki that explains the durability and longevity of Japan's most famous shrines, temples, and other historic sites. Hinoki Meditation is a fragrance that shares with us both the strength and the subtlety of this miraculous species, a naturalistic and potent EDP with the lemon-accented aromatic richness of hinoki supplemented with spice, earth, and gentle incense smoke all evoking a walk through an ancient Kanto forest, eventually settling into deeply comforting layers of cedar and sandalwood. Stronger and longer-lasting than most hinoki scents we've come across, this is the one for anyone who loves the classic niche hinoki perfumes but has always wanted something with the kind of robust power worthy of the tree itself.

name: Arashiyama
notes: Bamboo Leaves, Rain, Fresh Grass, Violet, Bamboo Wood
style: Earthy, Floral - Light, Fresh - Aquatic, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: A stroll through the legendary Arashiyama bamboo grove in Kyoto, where the wild monkeys dance through the dappled sunlight and a lingering morning mist releases the green and woody essence of the bamboo into the cool, fresh air. Gentle florals and fresh springtime grass drift on the breeze as you gaze out onto the temples and shrines of a city that looks quite the same as it did when the warriors and poets of eras past might well have looked out from the very same vantage. Refreshing, contemplative, simply lovely- Arashiyama is a fragrance for those who enjoy natural, elegant simplicity.

name: Moonlight Samurai
notes: Sake, Steel Sword, Leather Armor, Wild Flowers, Cedarwood
style: Animalic, Boozy, Smoky, Woody - Dark
description: Immersed in ancient and elegant tradition, yet supremely skilled in the deadliest of combat, the Samurai warrior class emblemized the dichotomy of the spirit of feudal Japan. In order to properly represent these larger-than-life figures, Moonlight Samurai, therefore, is both ferocious and also surprisingly poetic, a rugged and smoky leather-driven masculine-leaning fragrance with a richly boozy sake opening, but also a tempering balance of aromatic cedarwood and gentle wildflowers to suggest the contemplative depths of the soul within. As it dries, the leather reveals more subtle and dry aspects to play against the smoky, animalic intensity, further embodying the noble yet unbending spirit of the Samurai. Lovers of rich, smoky, masculine leather scents that reveal their gentler side only to those with patience and wisdom could do no better than to honor Moonlight Samurai as it so richly deserves.

name: ARA(GON)
notes: Aragon Pipirigallo Flower, Aragon Artemisia, Aragon Thyme & Rosemary, Aragon Cypress, Aragon Basil, Lavender, Elemi, Cumin, Cardamom, Special Natural Oakmoss
style: Floral - Spicy, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: ARA(GON) is an olfactory tribute to the Aragon region of Spain, where Mallo originates from. A unique aromatic fougere, the scent showcases local aromatic plant extracts from cypress, basil, thyme, rosemary and artemisia. Added to this intriguing mix is the pipirigallo flower that grows only in this region of the world. The scent is rounded off by mossy resinous elements that give this intriguing composition a warm enveloping feel. A scent experience like never created before, come and experience the natural beauty of the Aragon region of Spain in a bottle.

name: ORA
notes: Azerbaijani Rose Otto, Rose De Mai Absolute, French Rose De Mai CO2 Extract, Aragon Rose, Oud Assam, Oud Wild Khao Yai, Oud Meghalayan, Pink Pepper, Pine CO2
description: An airy mountainous rose oud that takes you to new spiritual heights, the fifth collaboration between Antonio Lasheras and Rajesh Balkrishnan combines exquisite absolutes from the east and west to create an austere, delicate and coniferous floral woody experience, which has been rarely experienced before in natural perfumery. Rose and oud absolutes from various regions of the world intertwine with peppery pines and create a feeling of elevated awareness and calming tranquility.

name: Aldebaran
notes: Tuberose, Paprika, Mate, Tonka Bean
style: Floral, Floral - Spicy, Floral - White, Resinous / Balsamic
description: This exceptional scent is the second creation in the floral constellation imagined by designer Marc-Antoine Barrois and master perfumer Quentin Bisch.Aldebaran is the embodiment of a star 芒聙聯 radiant, mysterious, and powerful. It unveils itself as a bright, white light in the darkness, with a delicate yet bold presence that captures the caress of the moon on a field of tuberoses. The immaculate petals reflect the star芒聙聶s glow, creating an enchanting and unforgettable aura.With its modern simplicity and captivating elegance, Aldebaran exudes a powerful halo of fragrance, effortlessly blending notes of white flowers for a fragrance that is both protective and haughty, like the diva of the night sky.

name: Federico Cantelli Extraits Discovery Pack
style: Gourmand
description: Try all four Federico Cantelli extraits in one convenient sample pack!Includes 2ml spray vials of: Berries Passion, Pistachio Obsession, Popcorn Cake, and Sweet Banana.

name: Red
notes: Bergamot, Pink Pepper, Clementine, Coconut, Cardamom, Mandarin, Jasmine, Hazelnut, Fig, Iris, Nutmeg, Ylang-ylang, Clove, Mugwort, Frangipani, Tiare, Sandalwood, Caramel, Woods, Musk
style: Floral, Floral - Citrus, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Light, Woody - Spicy
description: A fragrance created during the celebration of Sora Dora's first anniversary, one which saw the brand captivate lovers of chic, elevated, gourmand-influenced niche fragrance, Red is like the culmination of everything we can't get enough of from this house- modern and timeless, daring and comfortable, utterly unique and effortlessly seductive. As with all Sora Dora creations, it was conceived of in three distinctive phases- bergamot, jasmine, and sandalwood- but it's the harmonies between these phases- the sparkle of pink pepper, the toasted creaminess of cardamom-laced coconut, the nutty gourmand satisfaction of hazelnut, an intoxicating yet sheer collection of spiced florals- that makes us feel like we, too, were clinking glasses in a Parisian club as this distinctively festive recipe was being created, the full spirit of celebration infused into each note. Finally, as the night concludes, a glowingly sensual musky and woodsy base with just a touch of caramel sweetness sends us home still buzzing with the warm thrill of creative comradery. A celebration of all things Sora Dora, Red is a gorgeous, dynamic, addictive fragrance- one we'll be wearing out on the town every chance we get.

name: Il Padrino
notes: Dark Rum, Amaretto, Blackcurrant, Bergamot, Patchouli Blossom, Dry Amber, Sandalwood, Labdanum, Vanilla Wood, Siam Benzoin
style: Boozy, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet, Woody - Amber
description: Il Padrino is a testament to power and complexity. It embodies the essence of a man who commands his destiny, one who understands the intricate dance of power and influence.A powerful oriental woody amber scent, it opens with a tart bite of black currant and citrusy bergamot, laced with boozy rum and bitter amaretto. The heart of Il Padrino reveals its true nature: smooth, creamy sandalwood, warm amber, and earthy patchouli. The base lingers with deep labdanum and soft, sweet whispers of vanilla.

name: Eladaria
notes: Mandarin, Bergamot, Pink Pepper, Rose Trio, Peony, Lily Of The Valley, Powdery Notes, Musk, Vanilla, Ambroxan, Cashmere Wood
style: Classic Feminine, Creamy, Floral, Floral - Citrus, Fresh, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Discover Eladaria, an enchanting floral rose fragrance from The House of Creed that blooms with modernity. Capturing a dreamlike garden reawakening in the silvery mist of dawn, it opens with radiant and refreshing mandarin, gently warmed by the soft spice of pink pepper. As the fragrance blossoms, a trilogy of rose unfolds at its heart, dancing with delicate peony and lily of the valley, before settling into a sumptuous base of warm cashmere wood, creamy vanilla, and smooth, romantic musk. This luxurious layer lends a subtle sweetness and grounding warmth, surrounding the wearer with enduring sensuality.

name: Al Ghaliya Bulgare Fleuri Et Animalique
style: Animalic, Exotic, Floral, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Dark
description: The "Galiyah of Galiyahs," this Extrait-based new edition of the beloved attar oil is truly loaded with the most precious fragrant materials on the planet, featuring an exquisite Sri Lankan oud sourced from Ensar himself and a plethora of very costly floral enfleurages, including ultra-rare lilac enfleurage, freesia enfleurage, Bulgarian rose enfleurage, gardenia and tuberose enfleurage, and many more treasured florals. It contains a huge dose of ambergris, both black and white, and real musk including Nepali, Kashmiri, and Siberian.This intensely beautiful mixture of rose-driven florals is balanced out by New Zealand white ambergris, black ambergris, and a rare-aged Mysore sandalwood. While the musk is macerated, the ambergris is not macerated in the sandalwood but actually melted into it, carrying intense and unique animalic properties. Finally, for this Extrait edition, a rare and precious ancient Celtic white ambergris that only magnifies the astounding value of this treasured elixir.

name: Dun Huang
notes: Saffron, Desert, Frankincense, Myrrh, Red Cedarwood, Papyrus, Benzoin, Agilawood
description: Dun huang was the starting point of the Silk Road. Over the centuries, spices from the Fertile Crescent intersected with ceramic and silk from the East here, while Buddhism spread through the region. Even through dynastic changes, the people maintained their devout Buddhist faith, carving ten thousand Buddha statues into cliff faces across the long milennia.The Dun huang perfume cap, crafted in colaboration with ceramic artists, employs multiple ceramic techniques to achieve ever-unique textures. Each bottle becomes a one-of-a-kind artwork through unrepeatable craftsmanship.

name: Hoh Xil
notes: Butter, Dust, Sandalwood, Patchouli, Musk, Incense, Ambergris
description: Hoh Xil, the boundless wilderness: In this dust-choked expanse where desolation teems with life, Tibetan herders share their wind-scoured existence with Tibetan antelopes, assembling mani stones芒聙聰wind-etched fragments of sacred geometry芒聙聰 to anchor prayers in the mountain's breath, invoking deities of the peaks.May this elixir become your olfactory key to the Tibetan plateau芒聙聰 where wind-carved wilderness with Tibetan antelope, yak butter tea steams through glacial dawns, and every breath becomes sacred communion with earth's primal pulse.

name: Lei Gong Mountain
notes: White Orchid Leaf, Wormwood, Juniper, Rockrose, Horny Goat Weed, Oakmoss
description: Lei Gong Mountain, veiled in mystique, is the ancestral mountain where Miao shamans have gathered medicinal herbs through generations. Like an enchanted realm from folklore, its slopes are shrouded in dense forests shimmering with perpetual dew, where lurking beasts and perilous ravines guard the land. Amidst this untamed wilderness, golden herbs glimmer nestled within rocky crevices along precipitous cliffs, as if placed by the mountain's own spirit.Lei Gong Mountain explodes with bitter earth, traditional Miao medicine wormwood anchoring a heavy moss from Guizhou, scent like the humid air after rainstorm, the strange complexities of vetiver and patchouli. A talisman of mysterious nation's traditional medicine blessed absolution that wil boldly defend mind and body. The cap fashioned from the jewelry of Miao silver, moulded by the hands of artist intangible cultural heritage, dignified and therefore unique.

name: Aurora Borealis
notes: Lemon Balm, Snow, Green Tea, Pine Needles, Siberian Fir, Honeysuckle, Changbai Pine, Earth, Herbs
description: Between moss and ice, a gentle glacier quells the bonfire. Beneath the celestial curtain, the aurora starts to dance.A vision of the spectacular, ethereal beauty of the Northern Lights as seen from the near-arctic reaches of Heilongjiang Province, Aurora Borealis is a meditative and deeply moving fragrance that perfectly captures the almost overwhelmingly gorgeous meditation on the natural phenomenon that links heaven to earth.

name: Kyoto
notes: Double Weeping Cherry, Decayed Wood, Pine, Frankincense, Incense, Smoke
style: Earthy, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Smoky, Spicy
description: In tranquil escape from worldly strife,but touched by the fire of human life.A journey through Kyoto 芒聙聯 a city woven with ancient heritage and romantic charm. The top notes capture crushed cherry blossoms with a hint of fresh grass; the middle notes evoke ancient forests and mist-kissed flagstone paths; the base notes reveal subtle Japanese cypress and smoldering incense, reminiscent of aged temple woods.The Kyoto scent unfolds with an ethereal subtlety, almost elusive, yet deeply resonant with quiet grace.

name: Popcorn Cake
notes: Popcorn, Caramel, Cane Sugar, Butter, Brioche, Vanilla, Strawberry
style: Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet
description: If you've ever heard the phrase "it does what it says on the bottle," then you already understand what Popcorn Cake is all about. Butter-drenched, freshly popped popcorn, salted and toasty, transports you into a comfortably well-worn seat at your favorite movie theatre, giddy with anticipation as the lights dim. Then, the cake--impossibly rich, with vanilla, butter, and brioche delivering the intensely savory and sweet facets with equally mouthwatering aplomb--provides the perfect gourmand base for the still fresh-from-the-bag popcorn note. It's popcorn. It's cake. Most of all, it's a unique and delicious sensory experience you won't be able to resist.

name: Sweet Banana
notes: Banana, Bergamot, Mandarin, Jasmine, Lily Of The Valley, Oud, Tuberose, Cedar, Musk, Patchouli, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet
description: One of the reasons we fell in love with Federico Cantelli's remarkable olfactive creations is the unpredictability of his concepts--a simply titled fragrance that you might assume to be a straightforward gourmand might reveal so much more. That's certainly the case with Sweet Banana, a remarkably complex and enveloping original that blends the fruity gourmand notes you might expect with a breathtaking floral bouquet and a rich amber and oud base to deliver something else entirely. Banana is absolutely present, but it's a surprisingly fresh, slightly green banana note without a hint of cloying fakeness. The florals, too, are complex and lovely--rich, fruity tuberose works perfectly against the banana, while the sweeter aspects of jasmine are coaxed out by a touch of oud and the rich, sensually musky patchouli and vanilla base. To put it simply, Sweet Banana is a lot more than the name, as lovers of complex floral gourmands are about to discover.

name: Pistachio Obsession
notes: Lily Of The Valley, Almond Flower, Orange Flower, Pistachio, Hazelnut, Milk, Vanilla, Tonka Bean, Musk
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Milky, Sweet
description: One of the (let's be honest, of many) things Italy appreciates on a greater level than we do here in America is that the most wonderful, most delectable, most unforgettable desserts are those that step away from mere sugar. Pistachio, in particular, with all its elegant nutty sweetness, its creamy, almost floral touches, and its subtle earthy richness, makes for one of the most sophisticated and mouthwatering ingredients on earth--a true gourmand's delight. With its explosion of delicious and irresistible pistacho-forward gourmand notes, Pistachio Obsession also incorporates complex hazelnut, creamy vanilla, and sweetly floral almond blossom, all concentrated into an all-day-long Extrait that truly allows the notes to evolve on the skin with surprising and delightful balance. This special composition celebrates this most irresistible delicacy in all its glorious complexity.

name: Berries Passion
notes: Caramel, Jasmine, Strawberry, Blackberry, Sugar, Amber, Oak, Musk
style: Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet, Woody - Amber
description: Imagine the perfect fruit cup: berries impeccably glazed with sugar and arranged with painterly precision atop a simple custard base. It's as much a visual feast as a gourmand one--a confection both richly indulgent,  yet brighter, lighter, and more energetic than some lavish pastry meant to knock you out at the end of the night. This is the kind of mouthwatering treat that fills you with vitality, a swirl of juicy red fruits and perfectly ripe berries that blends perfectly with a delectable swirl of caramel and sugar--all resting on a base of warm, sensual amber and musk that adds just the right amount of sultrier grown-up appeal. Passionate and irresistible, and wonderfully long lasting due to this special Extrait presentation, Berries Passion is the kind of all-season gourmand meant for full days of sunshine.

name: Akatsuki Melba
notes: Akatsuki Peach, Siberian Raspberry, Guernade Salted Butter
style: Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet
description: The Akatsuki peach from Japan is a uniquely luscious fruit with juicy, sweet flesh tinted a delicate pink. Born in Fukushima prefecture, it is distinguished by its perfect balance of sweetness and acidity. As soon as it's picked, it exhales a bewitching fragrance, combining fruity freshness and subtle floral notes. Its velvety, slightly translucent skin reveals a melting heart that evokes sunny days in Japanese orchards. The olfactory journey begins here, carried by the pure, gourmand essence of this exceptional peach.Born in the icy lands of Siberia, frosted raspberries captivate with their deep red color and crystalline texture. Their intense fragrance, both lively and sweet, evokes the purity of boreal forests under snow. On the palate, dazzling freshness mingles with a light acidity, awakening the senses with exquisite indulgence. Each berry contains the soul of Siberian winters, where nature preserves its treasures with a rare intensity. The olfactory journey continues here, carried by the icy, bewitching vivacity of this exceptional raspberry.Born of Breton know-how, Gu脙漏rande salted butter caramel captivates with its golden smoothness and aromatic richness. Its warm, gourmet fragrance blends the deep notes of cooked sugar with the finesse of butter and the hint of salt marshes. On the palate, it oscillates between melting sweetness and iodine bursts, revealing a perfect balance between sweet and salty. Each spoonful evokes the sea breezes and artisan traditions of the Atlantic coast. The olfactory journey concludes here, carried by the addictive elegance of this Breton treasure.Through this perfumed road trip, Akatsuki Melba becomes more than just a perfume: an olfactory adventure where each spray evokes a memory, each note captures an emotion. Uniting the fruity richness of Ataksuki peach, the sharpness of Siberian raspberry, and the authenticity of Gu脙漏rande salted butter caramel, this fragrance embodies a perfect fusion of the exotic and the gourmet, the familiar and the unexpected.

name: Safran Secret
notes: Spices, Saffron, Blonde Woods
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Warm, Woody - Dark
description: Safran Secret recalls a mysterious adventure lived by Thibaud Crivelli during which he discovered a saffron field shrouded in a very thick fog. This deep, sensual composition is as captivating as it is enigmatic. It sees the brightness of a comforting saffron contrast with the opacity of warm and highly-diffusive woods.

name: Extract Discovery Set
description: The new Extracts by Bon Parfumeur are absolutely swoon-worthy! Don't miss the newest release Myrrh Shadow 403-- exclusively at Luckyscent & Scent Bar this season.Discovery Set includes 6 x 2.5ml mini splash bottles:Myrrh Shadow 403 (new & exclusive)Iris Cartagena 502 (best seller)Bois Narcotique Intense 602 (best seller)Marbre Rouge 303Cuir Sahib 603Nappa Tuberosa 107 (new staff fav)

name: American Amber
notes: Red Currant, Rosa Rugosa, Mulling Spice, Amburana, Styrax, Carnation, Oud Smoke, Agarwood Resin, Vintage Deer Musk, Vanilla
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Amber, Woody - Dark
description: Dive headfirst into a heated pool infused with ambered resins, sultry roses, and mugs of mulled cider. As the temperatures drops, warm yourself up with the true essence of full-spectrum Amburana in a bottle.This perfume began with one goal; give Amburana the finale it deserves. What芒聙聶s bottled up is a full spectrum Amburana accord, complete with fruits, woods, ouds, and resins galore, all blended into vast amounts of Amburana extract. Accompanying this accord are supportive elements such as vintage Kashmiri deer musk, mulling spices, sultry carnation and rose absolutes, and unique smoke materials. These all culminate into a smoldering ambered perfume, designed to warm you up for the cold winter we芒聙聶ve got ahead of us. This is American Amber.We have a small allocation of the total Limited edition of 100 bottles.

name: Himitsu Violets
notes: Muguet, Heliotrope, Violet, Saffron, Tolu Balsam, Suede
style: Floral, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Sweet
description: A delicate mauve-tinted secret behind teeth. The whisper of violets and heliotrope芒聙聰a flushed purple flower casts a shadow over the sweetness of saffron. The comforting powdery silkiness of suede and tolu balsam linger longer.Sweet and addicting, transparent but memorable. Perhaps it芒聙聶s no surprise that Himitsu means secret in Japanese. Created by master perfumer, Dominique Ropion.

name: Jade Vines
notes: Yuzu Blossoms, Sparkling Ginger, Water, Green Gardenia, Tuberose Buds, Rare Liana Wood, Cedar
style: Floral, Floral - White, Fresh, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: "I'm fascinated by the jade vine, a plant with incredible claw-shaped flowers that glow luminously at twilight but have no obvious aroma. I wanted to explore the feeling of that verdant glow and the blooms' imaginary scent. The result is a green, woody, spicy, tart white floral. There's nothing else like it." -Alia Raza

name: Lucius
notes: Pink Pepper, Bergamot, Mandarin, Orange Blossom, Cedarwood, Dry Amber, Tonka Bean, Vetiver
style: Creamy, Fresh - Citrus, Powdery / Soft, Spicy, Woody - Amber
description: Unleash unstoppable power with Lucius, the first masculine-focused fragrance from Fragrance Du Bois. Crafted for the modern champion, Lucius opens with a bold surge of Bergamot, Mandarin, and Pink Pepper, igniting an undeniable aura of strength. At its heart, Cedarwood and Orange Flower command attention, while a base of Vetiver and Dry Amber leaves a trail of raw, unbreakable confidence - the essence of invincibility for those who conquer all. Everyone芒聙聶s wearing Lucius.

name: Soul Of The Forest
notes: Pimiento Berry, Blackcurrant Buds, Moss Accord, Labdanum, Maple Sap, Balsam Fir, Indonesian Patchouli, Atlas Cedarwood
description: Let yourself be drawn into the deepest whispers at the heart of the forest with Soul of the Forest EDP. Be absorbed by this sylvan fantasy, boasting a powerful woody fragrance trail. Soul of the Forest芒聙聶s evocative scent is defined by a surreal ingredient at its heart, the Mystical Wood. Its deep woody note captures the intangible sensation of connecting with the soul of an otherworldly woodland, and the sense of eternity elicited by encountering this enigmatic forest芒聙聶s essence.

name: Orange Hyper Essence
notes: Ginger, Bitter Orange, Orange Valenica, Orange California, Prosecco Accord, Cardamom
style: Citrus, Fresh - Citrus, Spicy
description: "A breakfast in the garden on the French Riviera, a sip of sunshine. Just the right amount of light, freshness and energy. Sunny spring outside, an April morning when the softness still remains." - Michel AlmairacOrange Hyper Essence, the stunning new fragrance from Parle Moi de Parfum, expertly blends a gorgeous citrus heart with fine bubbles and a hint of spices. Two exceptional varieties: oranges from Valencia under the Spanish sun, and oranges from the California valleys come together, blending with the spicy zing of ginger. A luminous intensity, perfectly balanced between the zestful glow and juicy sweetness of the fruit, capturing the purest essences of orange from multiple natural sources, becoming an orange like you have never experienced before. Cardamom, a solar and woody spice, adds a soft and warm richness, while fine bubbles inspired by a Prosecco accord mix the composition with a light and refreshing sparkle. Orange Hyper Essence appeals to those who enjoy bold, fresh, and balanced fragrances. This scent will captivate admirers of Tomboy Neroli, Wake Up World and Haute Provence, or anyone who appreciates vibrant yet sophisticated citrus fragrances.

name: Melogold
notes: Grapefruit, Juniper Berries, Saffron, Violet, Leather, Raspberry, Cashmeran, Vetiver, Musk
style: Floral, Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Citrus, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Inspired by the concept of sensual duality- that perfect contrasting balance where radiance meets intensity and softness meets power- Melogold is a beautifully balanced symphony of fruity freshness and leather elegance. A vibrant bite of juicy grapefruit- tart, bright, and refreshing- clashes beautifully with the deep sensuality of warm, smoky-rich leather, providing an addictive push and pull between ligth and dark. Delicate violet and golden saffron weave their way through the bold richness of cashmere wood and musk, leaving behind a scent both sophisticated and untamed. Crafted by master perfumer Nathalie Lorson, this stunning, yet utterly wearable spicy floral redefines the balance between intensity and light- a fragrance that speaks in golden whispers, yet commands attention.

name: Samar
notes: Bergamot, Raspberry, Clove, Pink Pepper, Jasmine, Osmanthus, Gardenia, Cinnamon, Patchouli, Cistus Labdanum, Oud, Vanilla
description: Samar is a deeply evocative word and concept in Arabic that represents the warm feeling of connection that comes from spending time with loved ones and friends. Literally translating to "evening talk," it evokes the warmth of shared stories and laughter, of intimate conversations unfolding late into the night around a crackling fire under the stars, where time stands still and lifelong relationships are made ever more precious.A captivating fragrance that embodies the spirit of these gatherings, Samar is a harmonious dance of light and dark notes that present a lovely olfactive representation of the warmth of the campfire contrasted with the cool night air. It opens with fresh, bright bergamot and raspberry against a crackling clove and pink pepper. A rich, blended heart of spicy cinnamon echoes the intimacy and warmth of old friends gathering together, while delicate white florals add an ethereal softness to the composition. As the hours float by into early morning, a lingering base of warm, earthy patchouli, rich resins, and vanilla-laced oud give off the enduring glow of the still-kindled fire, creating a deep, grounding finish that carries the memory of the night long after it has passed. A celebration of the timeless joy of human connection, Samar is a lovely, deeply felt fragrant treasure.

name: Risvelium
description: Risvelium is a dedication to the inner landscapes of human potential--a fragrance meant to be experienced as a sacred ceremony, a ritual of transcendence. It evokes the moment of spiritual breakthrough, when mental barriers are burned and the mind connects to the broader, more expansive universe of multidimensional consciousness. A gateway to understanding that physical existence is but one dimension of a much larger reality.The first batch of Risvelium is infused with a unique and sacred element:  holy water collected from the Nile River, which was blessed by a collective of shamans, elders, and tribal leaders from across the globe on exactly 12:12 on December 12, 2024. Infused with their sacred codes, spells, and prayers to awaken and connect humanity, Risvelium spreads this profound energetic blessing with every spray, transcending borders and resonating across dimensions.

name: Power Self
notes: Black Pepper, Osmanthus, White Rose, Magnolia, Ambroxan, Musk, Sandalwood
style: Floral - White, Fresh - Clean, Powdery / Soft, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Fragrance is more than a fashion accessory--it's an experience, an identity, a force of nature. With Power Self, Initio takes that mandate to a higher plane, introducing a unisex musky floral consciously designed and scientifically formulated with ingredients known to have positive aromatherapeutic influence on self-confidence and emotional strength. In other words, Power Self is a real-life vitality potion to reveal the inner power within us all.As true inner power can manifest itself in multiple human qualities, so too does Power Self deliver a range of impressive materials that showcase three aspects of true strength. Unlike a more traditionally composed fragrance, they weave together throughout the lifespan of the scent to provide a reinforced, harmonious vitality. Sensual power comes by way of the velvety white floral bouquet featuring a rare white rose flanked by osmanthus and magnolia, while energy and intensity are represented with crackling black pepper and modern, airy ambrox. Finally, spiritual and emotional power--the endless potential within us all--comes by way of a dynamic and luminous musk accord and the smooth elegance of sandalwood. Simultaneously soft and invigorating, Power Self truly does create a unique alchemy of self-actualizing, confidence-boosting, all-day aura that turns your fragrance into an everyday-perfect secret weapon for success.

name: Heliodose
notes: Galbanum, Tiare, Indole, Musk
style: Animalic, Floral, Green / Herbaceous, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy
description: The second collaboration with renowned perfumer St脙漏phanie Bakouche, H脙漏liodose is the culmination of a long held vision of a uniquely Marlou floral, one that explores the naturally animalic side of flowers. After copious research and experimentation, Marlou and St脙漏phanie found inspiration in the sun-kissed tiare flower, also known as the Tahitian gardenia--a richly fragrant flower that combines delightfully tropical sweetness with a lushness made all the more compelling for its subtle undercurrent of indole, the natural component of white florals responsible for heady, dirty, animalic sensuality.Tiare is featured front and center and its skankier, muskier elements are accentuated with a burst of green galbanum and pure indole. It is abundantly clear that H脙漏liodose is a Marlou soliflore through and through, albeit one where the aforementioned skankiness is balanced with a lovely honeyed natural sweetness that evokes the classic Mono脙炉 oil (tiare soaked in coconut oil) beloved throughout Polynesia. The results are, for lovers of animalic florals, quite simply perfection--a unique floral that showcases both the sunny and sultry sides of tropical paradise.

name: Printemps Blanc
notes: Orange Blossom, Grapefruit, Jasmine Sambac, White Tea, Vanilla, Sandalwood
style: Floral - White, Fresh - Citrus, Sweet, Woody - Light
description: Printemps Blanc is that soft, irresistible sensation that captivates from the very first note. Like a radiant morning when the air is filled with light and promise for the day to come, it opens with the juicy sparkle of grapefruit and the floral tenderness of orange blossom--an invigorating and refreshing duo that mesmerizes from the first sniff. Then, jasmine sambac unveils its hypnotic trail, caressed by the airy elegance of white tea, as light as a spring breeze. With every inhale, its luminous aura pulls you in deeper--impossible to forget, impossible to resist.Finally, suave vanilla and creamy sandalwood melt into the skin like a comforting shiver, an addictive trail that leaves an unforgettable impression. You find yourself returning to it again and again, unable to let go, wrapped in a sweet embrace you never want to leave.Printemps Blanc is more than just a fragrance, it is a soft and intoxicating obsession, an addiction to light and indulgence.

name: Arezzo
notes: Mandarin, Bergamot, Plum, Spices, Brandy, Labdanum, Orris Butter, Tobacco, Incense, Oud, Patchouli, Musk, Ambergris
description: Known as the City of Gold, the capital of high fashion in Tuscany, Arezzo is a stunning Italian city--a grand fusion of tradition and modernity where style and sophistication abound. Opulent and elegant, Arezzo Eau de Parfum perfectly captures the timeless, fashionable elegance of an impeccably dressed Italian gentleman, not a hair out of place, sipping Chianti at a cafe on the Piazza Grande. A vibrant citrus opening adds an effervescent sparkle to the rich, smooth heart of warm plum brandy, complemented with classic masculine spice and luxurious orris butter. A commanding and elegant base of tobacco, incense, and real Cambodian oud feels both decadent and refined, evoking the grand masculine fragrances of the past while offering head-turning modern versatility--this is the kind of mesmerizing balance we've come to expect from Naughton & Wilson.

name: Cinque Terre
notes: Italian Rosemary, Lemon, White Cedar, Pine, Fig Leaves, Sea Salt, Amber, Oakmoss, Tonka, Sandalwood, Labdanum
style: Fresh, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Salty / Oceanic
description: Cinque Terre by Mancera is a fragrant homage to the stunning landscapes of Italy芒聙聶s Cinque Terre. While many fragrances evoke the familiar and the everyday, Cinque Terre stands out by capturing the wild, enchanting essence of a coastline where mountains meet the sea in an eternal embrace. Each note tells the story of a journey through the picturesque Italian villages where nature harmonizes with colorful architecture and the endless horizon.

name: Fig Me Up
notes: Mediterranean Fig Leaves, Rhubarb, French Violet, Creamy Fig Milk, Oud, Sandalwood, Plum, Geranium Bourbon, Hot Toffee, Tonka Bean, Tobacco, White Musk
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Milky, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet
description: Fig Me Up is more than just a fragrance芒聙聰it is an invitation to smile and experience pure joy. Inspired by a happy memory shared between Pierre Montale and his daughter Am脙漏lie, it captures a magical moment when Pierre handed a fig to his daughter, saying "If happiness had a smell, this would be it.芒聙聺

name: Arabians Musk
notes: Sweet Honey, Bergamot Zest, Medjool Dates, Tunisian Orange Flower, Vanilla Sugar, Intense Amber, Fluffy Musk
style: Animalic, Exotic, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy
description: Following the remarkable success of Arabians Tonka, Montale proudly unveils the newest addition to its Arabians collection: Arabians Musk. This fragrance shines a spotlight on the sensual and mysterious essence of musk. Just like the previous creations from Montale, Arabians Musk is more than a scent; it芒聙聶s a horseback journey through the Moroccan desert, where each moment of the voyage offers as much enchantment as the final destination itself. Delectably sweet, syrupy honey and sparkling citrus whisk you away to a faraway sandscape, while romantic and smooth orange flowers and pillowy amber musk linger dreamlike for countless hours of fantasy. Majestic and wondrous, Arabians Musk is a fragrance to savor.

name: Dallachai
notes: Indian Cardamom, Clove, Saffron, Juicy Passionfruit, Arabian Blonde Coffee, A Hint Of Milk, Intense Amber, Fluffy Musk
style: Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Spicy, Sweet, Warm
description: Dallachai is Montale's latest innovative fragrance, inspired by the richness of Arabian traditions and the iconic ritual of serving Arabic coffee in a dallah. This perfume pays homage to the generosity and opulence of the Arab world while incorporating a touch of European elegance, a hallmark of Pierre Montale. The name Dallachai is a clever play on words, blending "dallah," the renowned Arabic coffee pot, with "chai," which evokes the spices and tea, symbolizing the fusion of East and West.

name: Eshal
notes: Tuberose Absolute, Red Mandarin, Bitter Orange, Lime, Petitgrain, Cinnamon, Turmeric, Beeswax, Patchouli, Vanilla, Peru Balsam, Labdanum
style: Classic Feminine, Creamy, Exotic, Floral - White, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy
description: "Tuberose has been a constant in my life intertwined with the fragrant tapestry of tropical blossoms. From childhood to each return to India, this queen of flowers, etching its lush, opulent scent into my soul. Eshal is a verdant tuberose, an olfactory embrace designed to uplift and transport you to moments of pure happiness. A parfum to illuminate even the most uncertain days, evoking joy and serenity with every breath."Eshal opens with a luminous burst of citrus notes, featuring Red mandarin, bitter orange, and lime, intertwined with the green freshness of petitgrain. The heart reveals the intoxicating richness of tuberose absolute, enhanced by the warmth of cinnamon oil and the resinous depth of galbanum oil. A unique touch of turmeric oil adds an exotic spice, while beeswax absolute lends a subtle sweetness. The composition is anchored by a sensual base of patchouli oil, vanilla absolute, Peru balsam resin, and labdanum absolute, creating a lasting and memorable sillage.

name: Kimono
notes: Magnolia, Silk, Rice Flour, Lipstick, Powdery Notes
style: Floral, Floral - White, Powdery / Soft
description: Elegance and comfort. Formality and flow. The traditional Japanese kimono is a study in contrasts, a simple garment with complex rituals, functional and ceremonial in equal measure. It's only appropriate that the scent it inspires walks that same delicate line, and Kimono EDP is a lush and ethereal fragrance, delicately feminine and yet vibrantly spirited, with a sumptuous main note of magnolia woven with shimmering threads of silk and the powdered refinement of rice flour and pristine lipstick. Every note stands out, and together they paint an indelible portrait of timeless sartorial grace- Kimono is a one of a kind journey into Japanese elegance.

name: Sakura Snow
notes: Cherry Blossom, Snow, Solar Notes, Juniper Berry, Muguet, White Musk
style: Floral - Fruity, Floral - Light, Fresh - Clean, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft
description: Snowfalls on snow-and remains silent.-Santoka TanedaThe austere beauty of winter in Japan, a perfect subject for the evocative minimalism of haiku, is also an intensely compelling olfactory tableau- the crisp chill of winter air, an early bud of cherry blossom, and a bright ray of sunshine melting the soft powder snow. This is Sakura Snow, a poetic and gently compelling portrait of the cherry blossom tree at the turn of seasons. On a bed of fresh, musky snowfall, warm solar notes illuminate a smooth, delicate cherry blossom note accented with clean muguet and aromatic juniper. Lovely, gentle, and deeply, compellingly relaxing, Sakura Snow is a meditative beauty.

name: Limonata
notes: Grapefruit, Red Currant, Ginger, Pink Pepper, Mango, Ambroxan, Marine Notes, Fig, Elemi, Moss, Cedar, Musk, Amber
style: Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean, Spicy, Sweet
description: A radiant symphony of sweet juicy mango, grapefruit and sea, Limonata is an olfactory journey to the sun-drenched Mediterranean coast. Created by renowned master perfumer Claude Dir, this scent opens with a luminous burst of semi-sweet exotic fruits, evoking the essence of fruity Italian lemonade. The zesty brightness is beautifully balanced by refreshing marine notes, capturing the crisp, aquatic breeze of the coastline.Effortlessly uplifting and irresistibly fresh, Limonata embodies the warmth of golden sunshine, the sparkle of the sea, and the carefree joy of endless summer days. A fragrance that lingers like a cherished memory芒聙聰vibrant, refreshing, and utterly captivating.

name: Osmanthud
notes: Bergamot, Apricot, Dried Fruits, Peach, Oud Trat, Osmanthus, Incense, Gaiac Wood, Tobacco, Leather, Prachin Oud, Rose, Laotian Oud, Indian Oud, Sandalwood, Musk, Amber
style: Floral, Floral - White, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Dark
description: A fragrance that combines the breathtaking complexity of the osmanthus flower with the unique characteristics of a treasured Thai oud, Osmanthoud is a sophisticated and sumptuous new fragrance featuring exceptional natural materials. With tones of peach, dried apricot and smooth, supple leather, osmanthus is among the rarest and most valued florals in perfumery, with natural extraction only possible during its 15-day flowering period every year. Ibrahim Fuhaid finds the ideal companion for this wondrous flower with oud drawn from Prachin, Thailand- renowned for its gentle sweetness and smooth incense tones. Combined, these exalted ingredients create a romantic accord both potent and gorgeously sophisticated, made even more complex with elegant Azerbaijani rose, creamy Mysore sandalwood, Scottish ambergris, and touches of exquisite 100% natural oud from several other sources, all painstakingly hand-extracted by the perfumer. A remarkable achievement in showcasing the sophistication of the finest materials on Earth, Osmanthud is not to be missed.

name: Knight of Oud
notes: Trat Oud, Prachin Oud, Chintaburi Oud, Burmese Oud, Venezuelan Tonka, Jasmine Sambac, Leather, Tobacco, Guaiac Wood
style: Earthy, Floral - White, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Dark
description: Knight of Oud is the story of a warrior travelling the world to establish an army of the best oud oil from across his travels. This adventure begins in the Trat region of Thailand, where the oud is characterized by a very pleasant sweet smell that perfectly pairs with the earthy, semi-gourmand warmth of tonka bean. The journey then moves to Prachin, where the oud is characterized by a smoky floral smell complimented beautifully with narcotic jasmine, and then to the Chintaburi region, where the almost unctuously rich oud presents a unique pairing challenge, ultimately combining with potent tobacco and aged leather. Moving from Thailand to Burma, our hero discovers the most distinctive oud of all in the Machina region- as potent as Indian oud and as sweet as many of the Thai offerings, pairing with rich, creamy Mysore sandalwood. A quest for those of noble purpose and true spirit, Knight of Oud is a remarkable adventure indeed.

name: Tulum Junglescape
notes: Lime, Sea Salt, Mint, Exotic Fruits, Tiare, Ylang-ylang, Green Tea, Precious Woods
description: Close your eyes and imagine walking a jungle path alive with the perfume of untamed plants and ripe tropical fruits. Tulum Junglescape transports you to a place of lush natural wonder in the unforgettable Yucatan Peninsula. Refined and vibrant, this dynamic scent opens with a fresh citrus burst of minty lime, blended with invigorating sea salt and smooth, gently earthy green tea. Delicate tiare and sweet ylang-ylang flowers join natural green and floral oils in an olfactory trek through the verdant tropical jungle along the azure sea. As you inhale the heady floral notes, you can feel the warmth of the Mexican sun on your skin and hear the calls of the exotic birds in the treetops. In the warm,  long-lasting base, the precious aromas of rare woods ground you and instantly lift your mood, whisking you to a place of pure tranquility and joy, far removed from the stress of everyday life.Tulum Junglescape is the perfect retreat - a sensual journey to a tropical haven where you can discover a new, blissful peace through a connection with the scents of pure nature.

name: The Code Of Emotion
notes: Bergamot, Pink Pepper, Exotic Fruit Accord, Lavender, Geranium, Sandalwood, Cedar, Oakmoss, Vetiver
style: Classic Masculine, Fresh, Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Light
description: "My creative journey has always been driven by the concept of an "Emotion Generator Machine," crafting fragrances to spark specific feelings. With this scent, I began with the classic foug脙篓re structure芒聙聰green, aromatic, and woody芒聙聰then disrupted it with an unexpected tropical twist, led by juicy mango. The result is a fragrance that balances comforting familiarity with playful brightness, evoking joy and surprise."In creating this perfume, Francesca Bianchi delved deeper into the mechanisms of emotional response through scent. Can emotions be decoded and replicated? This experiment aimed to write a "Code of Emotion," fine-tuning each note like a mechanic working on an engine to evoke nostalgia, passion, or comforting warmth.The Code of Emotion bursts forth with citrus and spice, which make way for an exotic fruit accord that refreshes the traditional foug脙篓re base, making the fragrance both recognizable and intriguingly new. It芒聙聶s mouthwatering without becoming gourmand, pampering yet invigorating. The grounding woody notes creates a vibrant constrat with the lively fruitiness. As a final challenge, Bianchi avoided iris-like accords and minimized animalic notes, opting for just a hint of clean musks to preserve the scent芒聙聶s clarity and brightness. Familiar yet surprising, The Code of Emotion has all the artistry and beauty we've come to expect from Francesca Bianchi.

name: Cuir Sahib 603
notes: Lemon, Nutmeg, Violet Leaf, Incense, Cypress, Clary Sage, Labdanum, Leather, Tonka Bean, Cashmeran, Cypriol, Patchouli
style: Earthy, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy
description: "The golden temple of the Sikhs in perfume. A magnetic place to which I returned every morning." -Ludovic BonnetonThe scent of burned incense circulates, crosses paths, and intertwines, captive within the walls of the Golden Temple in India. Incense sparks in a leather glove.

name: Marbre Rouge 303
notes: Cardamom, Pink Pepper, Chili Pepper Berries, Ylang-ylang, Patchouli, Tolu Balsam, Vetiver, Woody Amber, Musks
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Spicy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: "Marvel at the fusion of the Taj Mahal's cold marble and its warm garden. In my fragrance, I bring the flowers inside the palace walls." -Ludovic BonnetonLike a bewitching ballet of spices, 303 makes pepper and chili dance in the head. Initially spicy, the fragrance warms up around cardamom and then displays its floral ylang heart. The amber notes of benzoin and Tolu balsam leave an intensely sensual signature on the skin.

name: Bois Narcotique Intense 602
notes: Incense, Black Pepper, Pink Pepper, Jamaican Chili Pepper, Cedar, Green Apple, Neroli, Patchouli, Vetiver, Amber Woods, Moss
style: Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: "My intention was to make our 602 more intense to prolong its hold and make it even more addictive thanks to an overdose of incense." -Ludovic BonnetonA walk after a torrent of rain. Rays of sunshine after the storm, glimpsed through the foliage of the undergrowth. Overdose of pepper, pungent incense and wet earth. Cold spices scattered in amber woods. Unexplained addiction, bewitching fragrance.

name: Myrrh Shadow 403
notes: Bitter Orange, Grapefruit, Blackcurrant, Basil, Cinnamon, Timut Pepper, Cypress, Cedar, Akigalawood, Patchouli Heart, Myrrh, Benzoin, Vanilla, Cosmone
description: Sumptuous and seductive, a great amber fragrance is impossible to resist- but with all of their rich, layered warmth, one thing they don't tend to be is modern. Myrrh Shadow, the newest from Bon Parfumeur's exclusive extrait collection and a collaboration between the can't-miss duo of Quentin Bisch and Am脙漏lie Jacquin, is something unique- a truly contemporary and dynamic amber that draws on beautifully textured woods and unexpected aromatics and spices to deliver a vibrant fragrance that pulses with energy and light.An opening of authentically bitter, zesty citrus and juicy fruit announce up front that this is a different kind of amber scent, and the crackling heart of chic modern spices and aromatic cypress cements Myrrh Shadow as not only a fashionably contemporary amber, but also a completely unisex one. But, of course, we'd feel cheated if we weren't getting our requisite amount of velvety amber goodness, and the base of Myrrh Shadow delivers just that, with a gorgeously warm, gently powdery myrrh, a creamy vanilla balanced with clean cosmone musk, and a rich but never heavy patchouli and resin balance. A fashion-forward amber with unisex appeal and all-day extrait strength, Myrrh Shadow is bound to be the next cult classic.

name: Iris Cartagena 502
notes: Rum, Cacao, Petitgrain Mandarin, Iris, Sandalwood, Vanilla, Cedar, Sugar Cane, Papyrus, Vetiver, Coffee
style: Boozy, Exotic, Floral, Floral - Ambery Spice, Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet
description: "I wanted the Cartagena night to become a perfume. I wanted to remember forever that summer evening under the stars with my wife. A tribute to Colombia and its scents." -Ludovic BonnetonA dinner for two under summertime stars. Conversations fade, the tablecloth stains and crumples. Coffee, rum, and chocolates are served, and a gourmand dance of aromas floats along a calm, warm breeze.

name: Nappa Tuberosa 107
notes: Bergamot, Saffron, Tuberose, Ylang-ylang, Suede Accord, Papyrus, Cashmere Wood, Patchouli
style: Floral - White, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy
description: "Tuberose enfleurage and leather came to me as an obvious choice in memory of a summer stay in Grasse. This perfume became a tribute to Grasse and its savoir-faire, which I admire so much." -Ludovic BonnetonA stroll through Grasse, city of a thousand scents, city of leather craftsmanship and flowers. Bells ring, night falls on the heights of the peaceful town, tuberoses exhale their narcotic fragrance. Combining twilight tuberose with tanned leather- a tribute to the heritage of Grasse. Creamy tuberose in a protective suede cloche.

name: Sun Bleached
notes: Clean Linen Accord, White Flowers, Bergamot, Ambrette Absolute
style: Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean, Powdery / Soft
description: Muscat, the capital of the Sultanate of Oman, also known as the White City. The sun drowns the immaculate walls with its rays. It is a bright light that makes eyes squint. Omanis wander the streets, elegantly wearing their dishdashas, a long white tunic decorated with a pom-pom that is delicately dipped in perfume.芒聙聵Sun Bleached芒聙聶 is adorned with freshness, in an accord of clean linen, white flowers and a zesty flight of citrus fruits as if biting into a piece of orange, with white musks and sandalwood rounding off its explosiveness.

name: Nothing But Sea And Sky
notes: Bergamot, Sandalwood, White Musks
style: Fresh - Clean, Milky, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Fresh
description: In his celebrated poetry collection 'Leaves of Grass', Walt Whitman wrote 'From Montauk Point', where his contemplation led him to quote: 'Nothing, but sea and sky'. At Montauk Point, also called The End, the world stops during winter. The sky is veiled in pale white and the breath of a blizzard sprinkles the beach with snowflakes. The rough sea gives the impression of a large cotton field in bloom.'Nothing but Sea and Sky' is a tribute to Montauk under its coat of snow. It is a reassuring fragrance, a stole of white musks infused in sandalwood with milky notes.

name: Ambre de Noir
notes: Green Accord, Herbal Notes, Saffron, Frangipani, Magnolia, Shamama, Tobacco, Ambergris, Amber Accord, Sandalwood, Tonka Bean, Madagascar Vanilla
style: Creamy, Floral - Ambery Spice, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Ambre de Noire by Maksim Perfume transports you to the warm atmosphere of an exotic bazaar, where spicy herbs, resinous woods, and tropical flowers blend into a harmonious symphony. Top notes greet you with the gentle bitterness of saffron and fresh herbal accents, creating an intriguing opening that sparks curiosity for the fragrance芒聙聶s deeper facets. In the heart, elegant Indian shamama (an oil infused with a unique blend of herbs and spices) envelops refined magnolia and creamy frangipani from Thai gardens. Smoky, earthy tobacco lends a sweet, woody warmth to the blend, shaping a dark spicy floral amber character. The base is built around a rich amber accord, where Irish ambergris serves not only as a rare and precious ingredient but also as a powerful fixative, unifying each layer of the composition into a cohesive whole. Creamy sandalwood and the powdery sweetness of tonka beans soften the sillage, while Bourbon vanilla adds a velvety, subtly smoky finish. The result is a deep, multi-layered creation in which every ingredient reveals its full potential, maintaining perfect harmony throughout.

name: Chypre de Grand
notes: Bergamot, Lime, White Grapefruit, Beeswax, Benzoin, Guaiac, Rose De Mai, Siberian Deer Musk, Styrax, Thai Liquorice, Virginia Cedar, Labdanum, Light Patchouli, Oakmoss
style: Chypre, Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Chypre de Grand by Maksim Perfume reinterprets the traditions of chypre perfumery, drawing inspiration from the classic colognes once favored by Maksim芒聙聶s great-grandfather. This version maintains the signature balance of fresh citrus accents, floral nuances, and a deep woody-earthy base, while incorporating rare ingredients from Thailand and Siberia that add an unexpected and modern touch.The fragrance opens with sparkling notes of bergamot, lime, and grapefruit, creating an invigorating brightness. This quickly transitions to the heart, where Rose de Mai softens the crispness, while guaiac wood introduces a subtle smokiness. A standout element is Thai licorice, grown and distilled in local provinces芒聙聰it adds a refined sweet-spicy nuance while preserving the essence of a true chypre. Siberian deer musk unifies the composition, lending a smooth and well-rounded character.The base brings forth the classic chypre structure: oakmoss and a refined 芒聙聹light芒聙聺 patchouli accord that provides noble depth without the weightiness of traditional chypres. Chypre de Grand pays homage to the past while embracing a new perspective, proving that the timeless elegance of chypre can evolve with unexpected ingredients. The result is a versatile fragrance that respects tradition yet fully embodies the spirit of modern perfumery.

name: Green Vanille
notes: Green Hazelnut, Almond Milk, Blue Chamomile, Vanilla, Coriander, Siam Benzoin, Haitian Vetiver, Atlas Cedar, New Caledonian Sandalwood
style: Creamy, Floral - Spicy, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy
description: Vanilla fragrances are typically warm, sweet, and simple芒聙聰but not this time. Green Vanille captures vanilla in its natural habitat: a vine winding through the lush jungle. No sugarcoating here. True vanilla, layered with spicy coriander, hazelnut, and woody vetiver to keep things cool, complex, and intelligently alluring. This is vanilla all grown-up芒聙聰and she芒聙聶s complicated.

name: Incenso
notes: Cardamom, Pink Pepper, Incense, Cypriol, Vetiver
style: Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: A fragrance that can summon the most intimate and evocative settings. Incenso Eau de Parfum guides us on a sensory journey through time and space, to discover an element that is resin, plant and precious substance all at once. An olfactory harmony of wood and spices, as subtle as it is intense.

name: Ambra
notes: Bergamot, Amber, Myrrh, Patchouli, Sandalwood
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Woody Ambery Floral
description: A fascinating olfactory story that forges a bond between the enigmatic East and the citrus fruits so beloved by the Medici family. A collaboration as irreplaceable as the raw ingredients of Ambra Eau de Parfum, which link the history of Florence to the most remote lands.

name: Vanilla Oud
notes: Bergamot, Jungle Pepper, Pink Pepper, Apricot, Jasmine Sambac, Madagascar Vanilla, New Guinea Vanilla, Red Vanilla, Ylang-ylang, Benzoin, Birch Tar, Cambodian Oud, Labdanum, Peru Balsam, Trat Oud, Trat Oud Tincture
style: Creamy, Floral, Fruity, Smoky, Sweet, Woody - Amber
description: A bold new statement in the world of gourmand oud scents, Vanilla Oud combines a delicate mix of three gorgeously different vanillas with the softest facets of Thai and Cambodian oud to create a fragrance both profoundly striking and remarkably comfortable.From the very first moment, Vanilla Oud stands out, greeting us with the sparkling spiciness of jungle pepper and pink pepper, which smoothly flows into a floral wave of jasmine enriched by juicy notes of apricot. At the heart of the fragrance lies Maksim's breathtaking signature vanilla accord: three types of natural vanilla, carefully aged to impart warmth and gentle sweetness. This rich center is supported by subtle accents of ylang-ylang, adding a touch of softness and refined luxury to the composition. The final accord is a velvety, gently smoky oud blend drawn from sustainable sources in Thailand and Cambodia, woven into the blend to highlight the nobility and depth of the previous sweet notes without any of the heaviness or harshness sometimes associated with oud, enveloping the wearer in a warm aura that unfolds with lavish smoothness on the skin- a tale of treasured natural ingredients crafted into a sensual masterpiece. Romantic, profound, and richly comforting, Vanilla Oud represents Maskim's dream of showcasing the softer side of real oud.

name: Blanche Absolu
notes: White Rose, Pink Pepper, Aldehyde, Violet, Neroli, Peony, Blonde Woods, Sandalwood, Musk
style: Floral - White, Fresh - Clean
description: A new iconic intensity: The Byredo Absolu Parfum collection takes the boldness of our icons to the extreme. Our next installment in the collection features Blanche. This Absolu edition amplifies Blanche芒聙聶s signature olfactory profile, pushing it to new extremes with a more pronounced aldehydic composition, a stronger floral heart, and intensified musk, accented by black pepper at the top. At its core, Blanche Absolu delves into the striking contrast between purity and strength, grounded by an enduring base enriched with amber wood notes.Featuring a bio-sourced cap inspired by the Japanese charring wood burning technique and a tailor-made glass neck sublimated by a silver and gold collar.

name: Rhubarb & Custard 1:29
notes: Rhubarb, Grapefruit, Lemon, Bergamot, Biscuits, Vanilla, Hay, Tobacco
style: Citrus, Creamy, Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet
description: It's named 1:29, not after a train timetable, but because it's 1 part Rhubarb & Citrus Cologne to 29 parts Vanilla Custard; this turned out to be the ideal combination of the two separate fragrances which we tested at the special 4160Tuesdays/Mrs Gloss & The Goss afternoon workshop. The ideal blend of tart with sweet, smooth with sharp, bright with soothing, as chosen by eight discerning Glossers as the perfect balance between the two contrasting themes. A pudding in a perfume.

name: Apricot in Cognac
notes: Bergamot, Neroli, Orange, Cedarwood, Orange Blossom, Jasmine, Amber
style: Boozy, Fruity, Gourmand, Woody - Light
description: Creating a new gourmand structured with elevated fruits, blonde woods and sensuous booze, Apricot In Cognac explores the indulgent side of nature. Invigorating juniper berry and juicy orange and tangerine heart create a sparkling brightness on top that is met with sweet Apricot and airy orange flower. Sandalwood adds a luxurious creaminess that is perfectly complimented by the rich, nutty complexity of toasted sesame. Warm benzoin resinoid and cognac accord grounds the fragrance in an addictively sweet booziness that is good enough to eat. As lavishly rich as it is vibrantly energizing, Apricot in Cognac is an intoxicating brew to bring an encompassing satisfaction to all.

name: Delizia Oscura Gold
notes: Milk Chocolate, Lemon Waffles, Vanilla, Milk, Salty Caramel, Tobacco
style: Gourmand
description: Imagine your perfect childhood dessert: the sweet treat you stayed up at night dreaming about, the delectable confession that would have made you abandon everything for one bite. Would it have chocolate? Well, of course it would. But also the satisfying chew of a perfectly fried lemon batter waffle, the decadently rich and creamy smoothness of vanilla, and the mouthwatering complexity of sweet ribbons of salted caramel? Well, come on, why wouldn't we throw that in there too? We're trying to treat ourselves, after all. And while the original Delizia Oscura featured an arresting note of violet to represent the beauty of high Italian fashion, this Gold edition incorporates a warm, sweet, smooth tobacco in the base to evoke late nights outside cafes with great food and even better company, all concentrated at a gorgeously rich 30% Extrait that lingers for untold hours. Everything you love in once delicious gourmand treat? This is Delizia Oscura Gold.

name: Rococo Pie
notes: Peach Pie, Tangerine Zest, Coconut, Walnut, Jasmine, Amber, Sandalwood, Milky Notes, Vanilla Ice Cream, Musk
style: Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet, Woody - Amber
description: A sophisticated and sultry gourmand, Rococo Pie is a richly musky, seductively sweet fragrance inspired by sleepless nights of sheer sensory indulgence in a Venetian palazzo. It's a sweet, juicy peach pie with walnuts shared in a canopy bed on crumpled sheets, rays of citrus sunlight sparkling through cracks in drawn curtains, a smooth, sexy floral amber that clings to soft skin and draws you back into a passionate embrace. Mysterious, elegant, and more than a little naughty- this is a peach fragrance for consenting adults only.

name: Pastel Rumours
notes: Peach, Fruit Loops, Milk, Ginger, Cardamom, Caramel, Orris, Custard Cream, Vanilla, Musks
style: Creamy, Floral, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet
description: "You grab a fruity milkshake and jump on the back of the Vespa, sucking on the straw. You notice they're all staring at you; whispers. Defiantly, you smile at them as you speed off."Bursting at the seams with carefree gourmand delight, Pastel Rumours is a fragrance about living your unapologetic best life. At its heart is the fruit milkshake that our unnamed heroine brings with her on her unapologetic joyride- juicy peach and a perfect evocation of sweet, fruity cereal blending into cold milk, cutting through the heat of a sweltering Italian summer. Gentle spices linger in the seaside breeze, while a warm, musky vanilla base glows like the just-approaching sunset. Adventurous, nostalgic, and more than a little addictive, Pastel Rumours is a gourmand for free spirits.

name: Kurky
notes: Fruity Notes, White Musk, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Fresh, Fruity, Milky
description: Kurky - the affectionate nickname of Francis Kurkdjian in his youth, and still a name that evokes within him an insatiable sense of childlike freedom and wonder. Inspired by those feelings, he created a perfume that encourages us to see life in color, to dream, to feel that childhood amazement every time we take a sniff. It's a magical, joyful blend of tangy fruits, creamy vanilla, and soft, clean musks that paints a portrait of colorful candies, endless sunshine, and pure laughter. Enough wonder to dream, enough adventurousness to accomplish those dreams - Kurky is the fragrance for those who still dare to stay young at heart.

name: Extrait Extreme Discovery Set
