description: Intoxicating presence. Unmatched longevity. With an extraordinary 50-60% concentration, these groundbreaking BTSO creations shatter the conventions of traditional perfumery.Discovery Set includes:Black Guava - Black Mango - Purple Stain - Oud Candy

name: VetiVerde
notes: Grapefruit, Geranium, Palo Santo, Vetiver, Tonka Bean
style: Floral - Spicy, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: Telling the fragrance story of a humble vetiver seed blown long ago to the nation of Haiti, where resilience and hope are an eternal theme against a tragic history of foreign exploitation and disastrous political interference. Like this oppressed but proud country and the hardy vetiver plant itself, VetiVerde is a powerful and inspiring fragrance that presents sophisticated layers of green, woodsy complexity.VetiVerde opens bright, with an intense burst of citrus-tinged green notes that evoke crushed wet leaves and broken plant stems that move smoothly into the fragrance's spicy floral heart. The calming presence of gently smoky palo santo wood emerges in perfect balance with warm, sweet tonka bean, all of which balances with the intense and soulful essence of vetiver. Edgy and bright, yet soothing and naturalistic, VetiVerde is a perfectly rounded and unique fragrance that fits perfectly into the dynamic and sophisticated world of Xinu.

name: Torino24
notes: Bergamot, Mandarin, Mango, Plum, Orange Blossom, Pink Lotus Blossom, Styrax, Patchouli, White Musk
description: Since the debut of their collaboration in 2021, there are few yearly releases we look forward to more than Xerjoff's annual collaboration with the ATP professional tennis tour to commemorate the Nitto ATP Finals in Turin- each release offers the explosive excitement and festive atmosphere of this spectacular sporting event, while establishing a unique and compelling identity all its own. For the 2024 edition, Xerjoff serves us up yet another ace- a vibrant and deliciously enticing unisex fruit-infused orange blossom scent with an undeniable energy reminiscent of current champion Jannik Sinner's powerful and high-tempo playing style. Juicy mandarin, mouthwatering mango, and sweet plum all fuse together with a rich, smooth floral heart featuring smooth pink lotus in addition to the main orange blossom note, before drying to a luxurious and long-lasting close with a base of moss, patchouli, and white musk. Stylish, sporty, and unforgettably energetic, Torino24 marks another straight-set victory from the house of Xerjoff.

name: Discovery Set: The Fairy Tales
description: Embark on a magical journey with this enchanting Discovery Set, inspired by the captivating fairy tales of our universal childhood. With each scent, unlock a new and delightful surprise as you explore this fantastical adventure. This whimsical and lovely set contains generous 2ml spray samples of all 7 fragrances from the Fairy Tale collection:Winnie The PoohThe Little MermaidThe Mad HatterThe Cursed AppleHansel & GretelPinocchioThe Jungle BookPackaged with custom printed blotters for a truly elevated experience.

name: The Jungle Book
notes: Forest Foliage, Fig, Pear, Muguet, Amber, Sandalwood, Cedarwood
style: Earthy, Fresh, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: Venture into the jungle with this vibrant fragrance that celebrates Mogwai's wild upbringing in the classic Rudyard Kipling tale. A rich, green, wildly woody base forms the foundation, while at the heart of the fragrance lies a luscious fig accord, complemented by clean, airy floral notes. Celebrate a story of life, adventure, and connection within the friendly, protective embrace of this dynamic and thrilling scent.

name: The Cursed Apple
notes: Red Apple, Poison (bitter Accord), Rose, Violet Lipstick, Wild Berries
style: Classic Feminine, Floral - Fruity, Fruity
description: Capturing the whimsy, and the darkness, of the tale of Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs by the Brothers Grimm, The Cursed Apple is a juicy and enchanting red apple scent layered with romantic floral notes. Both bewitchingly youthful and elegantly feminine, it mirrors Snow White's innocent beauty, but also her perilous adventure, as beneath the bright floral allure lurks a subtle bitter contrast- a nod to the Evil Queen's poison. A true fairytale of a fragrance, The Cursed Apple is a must for storytellers of all ages.

name: The Mad Hatter
notes: Cognac, Rum, Toffee, Condensed Milk, Butter, Leather, Black Tea, Saffron
style: Boozy, Creamy, Milky, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Sweet
description: Let the mad tea party begin! The Mad Hatter is an electric fragrance, a madcap romp featuring bold rum and toffee accords, enriched by the the creamy savoriness of milk and butter. Edged with notes of leather, black tea, and saffron, it transports us to the unbridled chaos of Lewis Carroll's iconic tea party- indulgent, intoxicating, and just the right amount of dangerous. Join the Mad Hatter for a scent experience full of unpredictable delights!

name: The Little Mermaid
notes: Pink Champagne, Lilac, Sea Salt, Ocean, Lemon Zest, Seaweed
style: Floral, Floral - Light, Fresh - Aquatic
description: Inspired by Hans Christian Anderson's classic tale, The Little Mermaid is a magical lilac scent that will have you feeling like a princess. Led by a sparkling champagne note in the opening, its floral heart is translucent, bright, and joyful, with a delicate effervescence that captures the shimmer of sun rays beneath the surface and the crispness of a salty breeze above. Playful and lovely, The Little Mermaid glows with a vibrant femininity- a festive celebration of life under the sea.

name: Winnie The Pooh
notes: Honey, Beeswax, Bergamot, Lemon, Lavender, Clary Sage, Vanilla, Tonka Bean
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Green / Herbaceous, Sweet
description: Celebrate Pooh's legendary birthday bash with this mouthwateringly sweet yet beautifully complex fragrance featuring a robust and realistic dose of his most favorite treat- pure, delicious honey. Specifically honey soaked generously into a spongy, fresh-baked vanilla cake, brightened with sparkling top notes of lemon zest and bergamot, while clary sage and lavender provide a comforting aromatic touch. Join the party now!Note: This fragrance is NOT vegan as it contains beeswax absolute.

name: Pinocchio
notes: Palo Santo, Sandalwood, Peach, Saffron, Vetiver, Cedarwood
style: Smoky, Woody - Light, Woody - Spicy
description: A uniquely woody fragrance that captures the essence of a wood-carved puppet brought to life, Pinocchio is a gorgeously gentle and whimsically creative scent experience. With notes of delicately smoky palo santo, aromatic cedarwood, and smooth, creamy sandalwood, it offers an impossibly soft woodsiness, balanced with hints of peach and saffron, to tell an olfactory story of transformation with a subtly striking sophistication.

name: Hansel & Gretel
notes: Gingerbread Cookies, Hot Chocolate, Rum, Cinnamon, Clove, Tonka Bean, Vanilla
style: Boozy, Creamy, Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet
description: Let yourself be transported to the gingerbread home from the infamous Brothers Grimm tale, where scents of freshly baked gingerbread cookies meld with the comforting embrace of hot chocolate. Gourmand spices and rich vanilla notes add depth, crafting an enveloping and warmly cozy fragrance that feels just like home. Sure, in the original fairytale this was all a trap- but in this version of Hansel & Gretel, the only danger is that you'll never want to stop smelling this delicious.

name: Muscat Jasmine Tea
notes: Black Tea, Jasmine Tea, Muscat Grape, Mint, Lemon Zest, Mandarin, Nashi Pear, Lotus, Gingko, Sorbet, Tea Blossom
style: Citrus, Floral - Fruity, Fresh, Fresh - Citrus, Fruity
description: Muscat Jasmine Tea is a boundlessly refreshing and cheerfully uplifting fragrance that perfectly captures the essence of summer in a single bottle. It opens with a bright burst of mandarin, and lemon zest, invigorating the senses with their lively citrus sweetness, complemented by a cool hint of mint. The juicy sweetness of Shine Muscat grapes add depth and richness, evoking sun-drenched vineyards. A touch of crisp Nashi pear enhances the fruity freshness, infusing the scent with a playful quality.At its heart lies the lush aroma of scent of jasmine tea; a delicate blend of sweet, intoxicating jasmine blossoms and fresh black tea notes. Initially, you are greeted by the rich, floral aroma that soothes and uplifts, complemented by subtle grassy undertones. A hint of honeyed sweetness emerges, evoking serene afternoons in a tranquil Japanese garden. The base features delicate lotus blossom, grounding the fragrance with a serene aura, along with fresh ginkgo leaf that adds an earthy dimension, and a whisper of tea blossom that leaves a lingering warmth. A harmony of floral, fruity, and green notes, Muscat Jasmine Tea is both invigorating and calming芒聙聰an invitation to savor the beauty of nature and the sweetness of summer.

name: Hurrem Sultan
notes: Loukoum, Rose Otto, Palm Dates, Red Apple, Honey, Incense, Amber, Thai Oud, Patchouli, Orris Concrete, Baklava, Benzoin, Shisha, Cumin Seed, Nutmeg, Myrrh
style: Animalic, Exotic, Floral - Ambery Spice, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Sweet
description: H脙录rrem Sultan, also known as Roxelana, was a remarkable and influential figure who rose to prominence within the court of Ottoman Sultan Suleiman the Magnificent due to her intelligence, beauty, and captivating personality. Inspired by her extraordinary legacy, this namesake extrait reflects her intelligence, beauty, and indomitable spirit. This enchanting scent opens with a sweet and inviting blend of loukoum and crisp red apple, instantly evoking the lush gardens of the imperial palace and the vibrant energy of a thriving court. The initial burst of sweetness is further enriched by the exotic warmth of palm dates, which adds a rich, almost decadent note reminiscent of the sumptuous feasts enjoyed by the sultan and his guests.As the fragrance evolves, the heart reveals a captivating bouquet thatbeautifully captures H脙录rrem芒聙聶s essence. The precious floral note of rose otto symbolizes her unmatched beauty and grace, embodying romance and sophistication. This is harmoniously intertwined with the warm, golden sweetness of honey, evoking feelings of love and devotion that reflect the profound bond H脙录rrem shared with Sultan Suleiman. Complementing this opulent floral heart is the rich, nutty aroma of baklava, reminiscent o the lavish desserts served in the palace, creating an indulgent and celebratory experience. The addition of orris concrete, with its soft, powdery elegance, wraps the wearer in a velvety embrace, enhancing the fragrance's intimate allure.In the base, the fragrance anchors itself in deep, resonant richness that mirrors H脙录rrem's strength and complexity. Thai oud adds an earthy, woody animalic depth, infusing the scent with a sense of mystery and allure, while patchouli contributes an earthy, grounding quality that enhances the overall depth of the composition. The warm, resinous qualities of amber, myrrh, and benzoin evoke the opulence of the imperial court, conjuring vivid imagery of grand gatherings filled with laughter, music, and celebration. Hints of incense introduce a spiritual, smoky dimension, reminiscent of sacred rituals and the enchanting atmosphere of the royal palace, further enhancing the fragrance芒聙聶s captivating character. To finish, the pungent earthy facets of cumin seed and the sweet spiciness of nutmeg introduce an intriguing complexity that reflects H脙录rrem's bold personality and her ability to navigate the intricate politics of the court with grace and cunning. An opulent fragrance that captures the essence of a legendary woman, H脙录rrem Sultan is an inspiring creation that leaves a lasting impression.

name: Indigo Night
notes: Orris Concrete, Blue Chamomile, Tobacco Absolute, Jacaranda, Lavender, Fenugreek, Blackcurrant, Clove, Labdanum, Heliotrope, Orange Flower, Cade, Amber, Patchouli, Lichen, Violet, Nutmeg, Geranium, Leather, Hyrax
style: Animalic, Earthy, Floral - Spicy, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Amber
description: Indigo Night is a fragrance that encapsulates the essence of twilight芒聙聶s enchanting embrace, where deep blue hues blend with the whispers of dusk. It tells the story of a young man feeling lost and disconnected. The fragrance opens with delicate notes of fenugreek, black currant, lavender, and blue chamomile, evoking a sense of calm and introspection. As the night deepens, warm, inviting aromas of tobacco absolute and orris concrete add depth, intertwined with the purple floral notes of jacaranda, violet, and heliotrope, evoking a lush, twilight garden.Hints of clove and nutmeg introduce a warm spiciness, while grounding scents of labdanum and patchouli create a rich, earthy foundation. As the fragrance develops, the comforting warmth of amber envelops you, bringing a sense of security and nostalgia. The interplay of leather and hyrax adds a touch of darkness, echoing the complexities of the night. Mysterious, moody, and pensive, Indigo Night is the kind of mature, sophisticated, evocatively artistic fragrance that only Prin Lomros can deliver.

name: Strawberry Mochi
notes: Strawberry, Rice, Red Bean Paste, Brown Sugar, Vanilla
style: Fruity, Gourmand, Milky, Sweet
description: Joyfully fruity, playfully chewy, lusciously creamy- a mochi-wrapped confection is an unforgettably satisfying indulgence. With Strawberry Mochi, d'Annam delivers the full sensory experience, with a beautifully realized glutinous rice note that delivers the milky, starchy chew of mochi kissed with sugared strawberry and the unique gourmand nuttiness of Japanese azuki red bean paste. Delicately balanced and deeply evocative, Strawberry Mochi is another deceptively sophisticated, delightfully unique gourmand from d'Annam.

name: Fragola
notes: Red Fruits, Strawberry, Speculoos, Almond, Meringue, White Musk, Sandalwood, Ambroxan
style: Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet
description: A true unisex gourmand dream, Aziri Paris' second creation further establishes this young house as a bold and stylish new voice in niche perfumery. Fragola is a fragrance of sensory immersion, a modern and chic gourmand with a unique sweet and fruity notes that weave together to create luxurious alchemy. The dynamic opening awakens the senses, combining a luscious collection of juicy, syrupy red fruits with the indulgent spiced pastry notes of real Belgian speculoos. A heart of intoxicating almond pairs perfectly with soft, airy meringue, while a warm and sensual base of white musk, creamy sandalwood, and clean, sexy ambroxan lend sensual sophistication, making the pulse race every bit as much as it makes the mouth water. Seductive, stylish, and altogether enveloping, Fragola is a fragrance you simply won't be able to put down.

name: Granita
notes: Peach, Exotic Fruits, Passionfruit, Melon, Caramel, Vanilla, Coconut, Musk, Sandalwood, Amber
style: Fresh - Aquatic, Fruity, Gourmand, Salty / Oceanic, Sweet
description: The goal of Aziri Parfums is to combine exquisite French craftsmanship with the culinary and cultural zest of Italy, and with the delectable Granita, we're delighted to say they've succeeded on their very first try. An ode to the classic frozen dessert, Granita is a vibrant breath of fresh air for the gourmand genre, an electrically refreshing, mouthwateringly fruity, seductively enticing fragrance to put a smile on your face and a strut in your step. Sunshine bursts from every seam of Granita, opening with an impossibly juicy collection of sweet, tropical fruits coalescing around a bright, round, delightfully quenching note of melon that floats on a seaside breeze of aquatic and ozonic supporting notes. As it dries, a warmly romantic sunset of ambered sandalwood and sweet vanilla musk lends a base any gourmand lover won't be able to resist, while a rich, creamy coconut note ensures that the beachy vibes last until the very end of the evening. Delicate yet complex and as sexy as it is sweet, Granita is a perfect debut from a house that brings us the best of Italy and France, together.

name: Eucalyptus 20
notes: Eucalyptus, Cedarwood, Labdanum, Musk, Frankincense
style: Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: Picture a place so vast, so remote you can journey weeks without encountering another soul. Endless miles of rolling red sand, endless miles of sky. In the unforgiving heat, a lone white tree on the next horizon can feel like an illusion. But the eucalyptus is the oasis, a waystation where tumbleweeds and rusting dust come to settle in the hallowed shade of silver leaves. This is the inspiration for EUCALYPTUS 20, the unambiguous scent of vastness, where the freshness of eucalyptus and cedarwood is softened by the leathery warmth of labdanum and grounded on a bed of musk notes and frankincense. And so, with this scent comes an invitation: Get off the grid.Personalize your fragrance:Enter your custom message or name at checkout and we'll have Le Labo print it on your label.Please note:Complimentary samples available with any product purchase. Please request at checkout in the comments box.

name: Purple Stain
notes: Saffron, Cinnamon Bark, Nutmeg, Ginger Extract, Mandarin, Bergamot, Orange Blossom, Caramel, Peru Balsam, Vanilla, Akigalawood, Oud, Patchouli, Cypriol, Ambrofix, Cistus Concrete
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Purple wine stains spread across the pages of an old leather journal, soaking into the paper with vivid, uneven marks. They tell of nights filled with life芒聙聶s simple pleasures芒聙聰laughter, quiet moments, and sparks of creativity. The journal, its edges softened by time, holds these memories on every page, capturing the joy and warmth of a life well-lived.Purple Stain opens with the warm spice of saffron, cinnamon, and nutmeg, brightened by the fresh zest of mandarin and bergamot. The heart is rich and indulgent, blending the radiant sweetness of orange blossom with creamy caramel and vanilla. As it settles, the base reveals a deep, smoky blend of oud, patchouli, and cypriol, softened by the resinous richness of cistus and the woody elegance of akigalawood. Velvety and bold, Purple Stain is a fragrance that lingers, leaving a powerful and unforgettable impression.

name: Oud Candy
notes: Brown Sugar, Candy, Nuts, Milk, White Flowers, Oud, Saffron, Black Woods, Oakmoss, Vanilla, Caramel, Ambroxan, Sandalwoo, Cedarwood, Leather
style: Floral - White, Gourmand, Sweet, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: The smell of brown sugar melting on a warm stove is pure comfort- sweet, rich, and buttery. But when it starts to burn, the dark, smoky edge that emerges is a seductive addiction all its own- impossible to ignore. Oud Candy captures that moment, where sweetness transforms into something bolder, sexier, more mysterious. A fragrance that truly blends the warmth of gourmand indulgence with a smoky, sultry opulence- a perfect balance of light and dark.Oud Candy opens with the rich sweetness of melting brown sugar, creamy nuts, and warm milk, creating a cocoon of gourmand bliss. As the scent evolves, soft white florals bring a touch of romance and refinement. But in the base, Oud Candy reveals its darker side, with smoky oud, saffron, and black woods layered over velvety caramel and vanilla. Hints of leather and oakmoss add a sultry, bold finish. Sweet yet smoky, comforting yet daring芒聙聰Oud Candy is a deliciously addictive journey into the dark side of indulgence.

name: Black Mango
notes: Mango, Orange Essential Oil, Mango Lassi, Bourbon Vanilla, Tolu Resoinoid, Sublimolide, Oud, Leather, Sandalwood, Cypriol
style: Creamy, Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy
description: Sinking your teeth into a perfectly ripe mango, its golden juice drips down your fingers, flooding your senses with tropical sweetness芒聙聰it芒聙聶s one of life芒聙聶s simplest, purest pleasures. That moment when you reach the core, where the sweetness fades into something raw and primal- it's precisely that experience, the essence of desire, that Black Mango captures.An ode to indulgence, Black Mango it opens with the juicy sweetness of ripe mango and the zesty brightness of orange essential oil, instantly flooding the senses like biting into a perfectly ripe mango. As the scent deepens, the creamy richness of mango lassi blends with the warm, seductive notes of bourbon vanilla and resinous tolu, evoking a delicious, irresistible pull. But it doesn芒聙聶t stop there芒聙聰the base dives into the dark, smoky allure of oud, supple leather, earthy sandalwood, and spicy cypriol. Black Mango captures the raw, primal pleasure of savoring every last bite, down to the core芒聙聰bold, addictive, and unforgettable.

name: Black Guava
notes: Guava, Cardamom, Mandarin Madagascar, Oud, Geranium Madagascar, Peony, Rose, Cypriol, Patchouli Madagascar, Ambrostar, Grey Amber
style: Floral - Fruity, Floral - Spicy, Fruity, Spicy, Woody - Dark
description: Embodying the eternal duality of light and dark, Black Guava is a richly addictive elixir of seductive contrast, where the sweet, vibrant energy of guava is slowly overtaken by the smoky depth of oud to create an unforgettable olfactive experience.From first spritz, Black Guava is bursting with juicy tropical brightness, the mouthwatering guava note spiced with cardamom and the zesty kick of mandarin from Madagascar. As the mysterious heart unfolds, the floral elegance of rose and geranium is gradually subsumed into the dark richness of the oud, creating a stunning contrast of sweet and smoky. In the rich base, earthy patchouli, smoky cypriol, and the animalic allure of grey amber combine to form a resinous and brooding foundation. A captivating interplay of light and shadow, Black Guava is a vibrant, compelling fragrance that truly feels alive.

name: Purpose 50
notes: Bergamot, Pink Pepper, Frankincense, Pimento Berry, Rose, Sand Vetiver, Sandalwood, Papyrus, Saffron, Suede, Mystikal, Akigalawood, Vanilla
style: Earthy, Warm, Woody - Amber, Woody - Spicy
description: An unwavering totem of strength and assertiveness, the original Purpose Eau de Parfum employed the ageless power of Frankincense to convey a sense of feeling at peace, of finding one芒聙聶s roots, of being complete. Now in the form of an Exceptional Extrait, dosed at an astonishing 50% concentration, Purpose 50 delves deeper into the base of the scent. Joining the Frankincense, the Papyrus and the Sand Vetiver from the Eau de Parfum are an authoritative Sandalwood accord 芒聙聯 lending the whole a unique, creamy-woody earthiness 芒聙聯 as well as a Vanillin note, which creates a more intimate bond with the wearer芒聙聶s skin. Purpose 50 is a profoundly moving connection to the earth itself 芒聙聯 with its ancient soul , its endless patience and its timeless wisdom.

name: FLUX
notes: Cardamom, Menthol, Blueberry, Eucalyptus, Cypress, Fir Needles, Cistus, Cedar, Sequoia, Cashmeran
style: Fresh - Clean, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Metallic, Resinous / Balsamic, Unusual / Unexpected, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: A moonlit walk through the ancient forests in Big Sur. Flux is a midnight bath of liquid moonlight芒聙聰luminous, hypnotic, and spellbinding. Wet on the skin it's an ice-cold berry cordial, a shimmering frost that melts into luscious earthiness. A scent that wraps you in ancient forests and foraged wild berries spiced with cardamon that dry down to soothing eucalyptus, aromatic pine needles, and delicate cistus petals under the shadow of Big Sur芒聙聶s towering redwoods. Flux is the invigorating scent of a moonlight-dappled redwood forest, laced with wild berries, frozen branches, and ancient mystery.

name: Valaya Exclusif
notes: Velvety Almond, Bergamot, Mandarin, Orange Blossom, White Flowers, Powdery Facets, Akigalawood, Sandalwood, Ambroxan, Vanilla
style: Floral - Light, Floral - White, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Woody Ambery Floral
description: A fragrance of refined luxury, exuding a powerful aura that embodies feminine elegance for contemporary aesthetes who desire it all. Valaya Exclusif, a unique yet universal floral woody creation, unveils the sensual and velvety allure of almond, the lightness of transparent white flowers, and the refined strength of creamy white woods. Enhanced by powdery notes, it radiates an enticing warmth and delivers a sensation of velvety softness that tenderly envelops the skin.

name: Louis XV 1722
notes: Grapefruit, Plum, Saffron, Liquor, Aromatic Notes, Cocoa, Coffee, Lavender, Rose, Hazelnut, Amber, White Musks, Cashmere Wood, Leather, Sandalwood, Incense
style: Boozy, Floral, Gourmand, Woody - Amber
description: Tradition, passion, and expertise collide in a unique and thrilling collaboration between Xerjoff and the House de Venoge, one of the largest and most important wine libraries in Champagne. Inspired by Louis XV, the King of France who first gave the sparkling wine of Champagne its letters of nobility, and his legendary "Perfumed Court," where exquisite fragrance was just as treasured as fine wine. Louis XV 1722 Perfume is a true celebration, a fresh and original composition with a vibrant, joyful spirit as romantic as it is exuberant. Gourmand, woody, and amber elements intertwine with playful sensuality, while an intriguing metallic accord mirrors the sensation of sparkling champagne, its effervescence leaping from the flute and tickling the senses, while an emerging warmth in the rich amber base reveals increasingly seductive nuances on the skin as time goes by. A collaboration of boundless elegance between two legendary Houses, Louis XV 1722 is as luxurious as fragrance can be.

name: Jasmine Freak
notes: Mango, Black Pepper, Blackcurrant, Sweet Orange, Bourbon Ylang-ylang, Egyptian Jasmine, Indian Tuberose, Musk, Cashmere Wood
style: Floral - Fruity, Floral - Spicy, Floral - White, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Extravaganza! A fragrance that dives into the transgressive art of self-expression. With the tropical vibrancy of mango, the exotic allure of jasmine, and the creamy sensuality of tuberose, it allows a bold world to flourish, where individuality thrives. Fashion, music, cinema, literature, and fragrance intertwine to celebrate freedom and creativity. Boy by day, girl by night芒聙聰this scent invites you to break the rules and defy expectations. Come as you are.

name: Sun Cities
notes: Juicy Pineapple, Italian Mandarin, Cardamom From Sri Lanka, Dark Leather, Violet, Greek Saffron, Oakmoss, Corsican Immortelle, Chinese Osmanthus, Indonesian Patchouli, Amber, Pink Sugar, Musk
style: Fresh, Fresh - Citrus, Fruity
description: Vilhelm Parfumerie芒聙聶s Triptych Collection includes three new fragrances: Great Lord, Chimilka, and Sun Cities. Each is a modern fragrance owning a strong base of a luxurious, powdery leather. The common structure of this collection features an osmanthus with leathery and powdery facets, paired with a velvety immortelle, enriched by earthy notes of patchouli and oakmoss. Each scent is characterized by a unique accent note, but all other notes remain the same.Sun Cities offers a wonderful haven, a meeting between opulence and refinement, between history and desire. Don't think that it's a refuge or a great escape: it's a magical place where the heart and mind recharge their batteries. A powerful journey. Peacefully, the senses are awakened here. Like a call to greatness, your sacred fire reveals your secret desire. Between sun and opulence, between movement and calm, Sun Cities is a powerful creation that invites you on a quest bold. What do you dream of?

name: Chimilka
notes: Velvety Peach, Italian Mandarin, Cardamom From Sri Lanka, Dark Leather, Violet, Greek Saffron, Oakmoss, Corsican Immortelle, Chinese Osmanthus, Indonesian Patchouli, Amber, Pink Sugar, Musk
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Spicy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Vilhelm Parfumerie芒聙聶s Triptych Collection includes three new fragrances: Great Lord, Chimilka, and Sun Cities. Each is a modern fragrance owning a strong base of a luxurious, powdery leather.?The common structure of this collection features an osmanthus with leathery and powdery facets, paired with a velvety immortelle, enriched by earthy notes of patchouli and oakmoss. Each scent is characterized by a unique accent note, but all other notes remain the same.With Chimilka, Vilhelm invites you to discover a noble woman made of fire. Between duty and desire, strength and passion, Chimilka is an ode to all women who transcend their femininity to express what they are made of. Strong, free, magnetic, Chimilka is a leader and an inspiration. Beyond femininity, she embodies the idea of freedom. A promise of emancipation, a story of freedom, and a bold journey.

name: Great Lord
notes: Plum, Italian Mandarin, Cardamom From Sri Lanka, Dark Leather, Violet, Saffron, Oakmoss, Corsican Immortelle, Chinese Osmanthus, Indonesian Patchouli, Amber, Pink Sugar, Musk
description: Vilhelm Parfumerie芒聙聶s Triptych Collection includes three new fragrances: Great Lord, Chimilka, and Sun Cities. Each is a modern fragrance owning a strong base of a luxurious, powdery leather.?The common structure of this collection features an osmanthus with leathery and powdery facets, paired with a velvety immortelle, enriched by earthy notes of patchouli and oakmoss. Each scent is characterized by a unique accent note, but all other notes remain the same.A timeless promise of emancipation. An attractive feeling of mystery. Between past and future, between power and secret, the golden path is an invitation to daring experiments. With Great Lord, Vilhelm invites you to follow your destiny: write your story, elevate your life and reveal your sacred fire. Doubts are part of the path. Just dare.

name: Outlands
notes: Cadamom, Bergamot, Lemon, Sichuan Pepper, Elemi, Frankincense, Patchouli, Rose, Orange Blossom, Cumin, Geranium, Davana, Saffron, Anise, Coriander, Benzoin, Labdanum, Amber, Ambergris, Opoponax, Vanilla, Birch, Musks, Oud
style: Floral - Citrus, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Amber, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: The Amouage Essences are a collection of three universal fragrances that push the boundaries of high perfumery. The Essences embody the vision, symbolizing Amouage's commitment to continuously reinvent, elevate, and redefine what perfumery can be. It is about forging new paths and inspiring generations of future lovers. Each fragrance is highly concentrated with 30% pure perfume oils, having undergone a meticulous six-month ageing protocol including a double infusion with pure, 65-year old Australian sandalwood chips and custom French oakwood barrels, resulting in a remarkably deep and layered scent experience.

name: Lustre
notes: Cardamom, Orris, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Cedarwood, Benzoin, Labdanum, Cypriol, Styrax, Tonka Bean, Myrrh
description: The Amouage Essences are a collection of three universal fragrances that push the boundaries of high perfumery. The Essences embody the vision, symbolizing Amouage's commitment to continuously reinvent, elevate, and redefine what perfumery can be. It is about forging new paths and inspiring generations of future lovers. Each fragrance is highly concentrated with 30% pure perfume oils, having undergone a meticulous six-month ageing protocol including a double infusion with pure, 65-year old Australian sandalwood chips and custom French oakwood barrels, resulting in a remarkably deep and layered scent experience.

name: Reasons
notes: Cardamom, Hazelnut, Cinnamon, Schinus Molle, Patchouli, Pine, Amber, Cypriol, Davana, Benzoin, Cistus Labdanum, Sandalwood, Cedarwood, Vetiver, Myrrh, Oakmoss, Musks, Palo Santo
style: Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Amber, Woody - Spicy
description: The Amouage Essences are a collection of three universal fragrances that push the boundaries of high perfumery. The Essences embody the vision, symbolizing Amouage's commitment to continuously reinvent, elevate, and redefine what perfumery can be. It is about forging new paths and inspiring generations of future lovers. Each fragrance is highly concentrated with 30% pure perfume oils, having undergone a meticulous six-month ageing protocol including a double infusion with pure, 65-year old Australian sandalwood chips and custom French oakwood barrels, resulting in a remarkably deep and layered scent experience.A meditation on the unique nature of our own most cherished and personal memories, Reasons is an intriguingly vibrant spicy woods scent with all the complexity and unique depth of the human soul. Rich hazelnut, enlivened with a bouquet of fiery spices, joins an aromatic and resinous plant-based heart and a warm, gently smoky backdrop of richly ambered woods to form a resonant and potent Essence de Parfum as unforgettable as our most treasured moments.

name: Wild Orange
notes: Mandarin, Lemon, Bergamot, Orange, Lily Of The Valley, Orange Blossom, Cypress, Cedar, Patchouli, Vetiver, Sandalwood
style: Floral - Citrus, Floral - Light, Floral - White, Fresh, Fresh - Citrus, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Light
description: Wild Orange is a sensational, transformative fragrance designed to uplift and energize from bark to blossom. A dominant fruity accord opens with the force and vitality of emerging blooms on an orange blossom tree. As refreshingly untamed as its namesake, this joyous citrus-fresh, floral and woody perfume delights, revives and invigorates the senses.

name: Chocs Olfactifs Extraits Set
description: Discover the first six perfume extracts of the Maison Crivelli collection through this special giftable set comprised of 1.5 atomizer samples of the following: Oud Maracuja, Hibiscus Mahajad, Tuberose Astrale, Patchouli Magnetik, Ambre Chromatique, and Oud Stallion.

name: Spiky Muse
notes: Upcycled Natural Strawberry, Bergamot, Pink Pepper, Rose Absolute, Pistachio, Cedar, Akigalawood, Ambrofix, Tonka Bean
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Fruity
description: The portrait of a powerful and creative femininity. The Rose, Queen of Flowers and eternal inspiration for artists, wraps itself into a new addictive sweetness created from a natural Strawberry extract - obtained through an innovative upcycling process - and a tasty Pistachio accord. A crisp and juicy craving with an exotic twist captures the attention, before the muse unleashes all facets of her personality. An overdose of precious Rose concentrates - essential oil, pure absolute and two abstract notes - compose a rich and colorful palette on a deep canvas of ambery Woods.

name: 6-piece Eau de Parfum discovery set
description: New for 2025!Six 2ml bottles to sample the entire Strangelove eau de parfum collection, including their newest release,afirewithin.Beautifully presented in a luxurious box. This set includes Dead of Night, Fall into Stars, Melt my Heart, Silence the Sea, Lost in Flowers, and A Fire Within.

name: Matcha Soft Serve
notes: Matcha, Milk, Waffle Cone, Vanilla
description: This just might be the most realistic matcha fragrance we've smelled yet! Like a ten dollar matcha latte, this fragrance perfectly balances the bitter, grassy facets of green tea with creamy, subtly sweet milk. As it settles into the skin, a wisp of toasted vanilla waffle cone emerges along with the most delicate suggestion of florals. The result is an elegant, understated gourmand that we can't get enough of.Another extraordinary creation as we've come to expect from this beloved Vietnamese breakout brand.

name: Beaver Maple Edition
notes: Blue Water Lily, Neroli Essential Egypt, Carrot Heart, Maple Accord, Vetiver Oil Haiti, Peru Balsam Oil, Cedarwood Atlas, Cedarwood Virginia, Vanilla Bean Extract CO2, Cocoa Shell Madagascar, Castoreum Reconstitution, Sandalwood New Caledonia, Patchouli
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Woody - Spicy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Sun-drenched spring air infuses the tangle of timbers the beavers call home, inviting the family to venture from their cozy den. A sparse winter diet of dry buds and twigs gives way to a juicy salad of fresh waterlilies and leaves. The drive to build is awakened and soon the industrious carpenters are hard at work. Yet over the rustle of branches and the slapping of tails on wet mud, a hammering is heard. In a nearby maple forest, farmers tap thick trunks, creating channels through which sugar-laden sap can flow. Unfazed, the beavers toil on. In tandem they work, the beavers crafting lodges while farmers harvest sweet sap, guiding it to a sugar shack where alchemy will transform it to a rich, golden syrup.Evoking the onset of spring, Zoologist Beaver Maple Edition combines fresh florals with the delightful sweetness of cocoa-infused maple syrup. Within smoky woods laced with earthy vetiver and patchouli, castoreum and vanilla offer a cozy haven. Like a carefully-crafted lodge of a beaver family, this scent offers warmth while hinting at hidden depths.

name: Cigar Rum Parfum
notes: Tobacco, Rum, Oak Wood, Raisin, Dried Fruits, Davana, Rose, Tonka Bean, Cinnamon, Vanilla, Amber, Ylang Ylang, Seaweed, Honey, Cedar, Black Tea, Vetiver
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Warm, Woody - Dark, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Cigar Rum Parfum, where the richness of premium cigars meets the complexity of aged rum in a bold, unforgettable experience. At first encounter, the Cigar Rum Parfum greets you with a vibrant burst of zesty mandarin, igniting the air with a bright, refreshing energy. This initial spark gives way to a heart of richness, where the deep, succulent aromas of dried fruits芒聙聰raisin, Davana and Black Tea芒聙聰intertwine with the bold and intoxicating scent of aged tobacco. Here, the smoky, earthy nuances of fine cigar leaves meld seamlessly with the warm, spiced embrace of rum, creating an alluring accord that is both seductive and enveloping.As the fragrance deepens, the base notes emerge with profound intensity. Oakwood offers a robust, slightly charred quality, echoing the aging process in exquisite barrels that cradle the rum's essence. Vetiver芒聙聶s earthy, slightly bitter tones add sophistication, while balsamic amber 芒聙聰infuse the composition with a warm, resinous richness creating a lingering warmth that resonates on the skin.To complete this symphony of aromas, a whisper of seaweed introduces a touch of the ocean breeze, grounding the fragrance in the vibrant essence of the Caribbean芒聙聶s azure waters. Cigar Rum Parfum is not merely a scent; it is an invitation to indulge in the luxurious ritual of life.

name: Red Lime Soda
notes: Lime, Soda, Strawberry, Tropical Fruits, Salak Fruit Accord, Lemon Zest, Pomelo, Rose Petal, Cotton Candy, Roselle, Lychee
style: Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Citrus, Fruity
description: Imagine a lively market in Thailand, where the air is fragrant with the scents of exotic fruits and blooming flowers. Red Lime Soda is inspired by the beloved Thai summer drink Nam Dang Manow Soda芒聙聰 this fragrance captures the vibrant spirit of warm days filled with laughter, exotic fruits, and the joyful essence of summer. It is a tribute to carefree afternoons spent under the sun, where every sip transports you to a tropical paradise.In Red Lime Soda, Salak fruit takes centre stage, celebrated for its unique flavour and texture. The fragrance opens with the bright, zesty notes of lime and sparkling soda, capturing the initial thrill of refreshment. As the fragrance evolves, the heart reveals the lush, juicy essence of Salak fruit, often described as a mix of apple and ripped banana with a hint of honey芒聙聰 and when complemented by ripe strawberries and tropical fruits芒聙聰 it creates a delightful, fruity bouquet that feels both exotic and familiar.Delicate rose petals weave through the composition, adding a floral elegance that enhances the fruitiness. The playful sweetness of cotton candy evokes a sense of nostalgia, while Roselle or Hibiscus sabdari?a, is a flowering plant in the hibiscus family. It is cultivated for its edible calyces, which are the red, fleshy structures that surround the flower with a tart, cranberry-like flavour.Wearing this perfume is like stepping back in time to the vibrant streets of Thailand. You can almost hear the cheerful sounds of children playing, their laughter echoing as they run through sunlit markets. The air is filled with the tantalizing scents of ripe fruits and sweet treats, transporting you to a world where time feels limitless.

name: Old Fashioned
notes: Wheat Absolute, Davana, Hyper-concentrated Cedarwood Essence, Immortelle, Styrax, Tolu Balm
style: Boozy, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Amber, Woody - Spicy
description: Only better with age, Old Fashioned is a fragrance of heritage and sophistication inspired by the misty wooded moors of Scottish lore. The perfume transports directly to the Scottish Highlands, fireside inside a family estate, layered with generations, evoking only the purest, most excellent Scottish traditions. Old Fashioned is a fragrance from another era, a modern refinement in scent, a total take-over of the senses in a Scottish old-fashioned delight.

name: Cotton
notes: Lemon, Green Tea, Honey, Orange Blossom, Heliotrope, Jasmine, Clearwood, Vanilla, Patchouli
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: The innocent sugared clouds. This fragrance evokes the gentle purity of fresh lemon and green tea drying in the summer sun. It begins with a soft, airy sweetness, like the delicate scent of sugar-dusted cotton candy drifting on a warm breeze. The fragrance unfolds with notes of clean, crisp orange blossom and jasmine, where a whisper of vanilla, reminiscent of cozy afternoons wrapped in fluffy blankets. As it lingers, subtle hints of wood and patchouli create a serene, comforting aura. Cotton: the innocent sugared clouds is a tender, nostalgic journey to a place of pure tranquility and simple joys.

name: Unspoken Gesture
notes: Cardamom, Hazelnut, Fig, Almond, Canaga, Violet Leaf, Mimosa Absolute
description: Breathing, holding, existing as one. Heartbeats, a waltz.Ritardando.A chorus of haptic tingles. Inhale, exhale, taking you with me.A comforting embrace captured in scent, a vivid sensory experience. Unspoken Gesture exudes soft skin-like salinity, cocooned around a tender heart of rice and sweetened cardamom, hazelnut, almond. A trail of pollen-drenched mimosa petals precludes lingering memories of musk, sandalwood and ambrette seed.

name: Sapphire Collection Gift Set
description: Experience the pinnacle of Boadicea The Victorious with this exquisite velvet-lined collector's coffret, containing four generous and eye-catching 10ml miniature bottles of the brand's ultra-luxe, much sought-after Sapphire Collection:Blue Sapphire, Green Sapphire, Aqua Sapphire,andOud Sapphire.

name: Bestsellers Gift Set
description: Experience the finest of Boadicea The Victorious with this luxurious velvet-lined collector's coffret, containing four generous and eye-catching 10ml miniature bottles comprising the most beloved and best-selling fragrances from this exquisite and inspiring fragrance collection:Blue Sapphire, Valiant, Glorious,andComplex 2020.

name: Bible Noire
notes: Olibanum Absolute, Myrrh, Guaiac, Labdanum Absolute, Choya Loban Absolute, Castoreum, Himalayan Cedarwood
style: Animalic, Avant-Garde, Smoky, Unusual / Unexpected, Woody - Amber
description: The transgressive image of a smoldering, burnt-out church- an image that reflects the gradual loss of faith in one's own soul. Intensely smoky, tragic and forlorn, with the hallmarks of church-themed scents- olibanum, myrrh, resinous woods- perverted and corrupted with intense animalics and the acrid smoke of carbonized woods. When emotions turn to ash, Bible Noir reflects on what remains in their wake.

name: Desir Noir
notes: Iris, Honey, Dark Cocoa Absolute, Tonka Bean, Cigarette Smoke, Deer Musk, Orris Root
style: Avant-Garde, Creamy, Smoky, Sweet, Unusual / Unexpected
description: The darker side of desire- lust, shame, and secret indulgences locked deep inside. This is Desir Noir, the allure of the guilt, the darkness that hides our secret fulfillments, the sin that brings the pleasure of unvoiced transgression. A gourmand that explores the wicked and profane side of pleasure, with animalic musk and acrid smoke intertwined with rich, dark, honey-sweetened florals. A secret we keep even from ourselves.

name: Chanson Noire
notes: Absinthe, Spike Lavender, Narcissus, Sage, Geranium, Vetiver, Smoked Leather
style: Fougere, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky
description: A fragrance representing the existential terror of losing one's mind, Chanson Noire is a ballad of forgotten souls, a fougere representing an aimless wandering through the dark forest of one's own faded memories. Through the blackness and stinging thorns of overgrowth and uneven footing, through a haze of smoke that obscures the vision, we stumble towards the music that still holds inscrutable meaning somewhere in the recesses of memory.

name: Poeme Noir
notes: Aged Whisky, Tuberose Absolute, Night Blooming Jasmine, Carnation Absolute, Tobacco Absolute, Oakmoss Absolute, Vintage Musk
style: Boozy, Chypre, Floral, Green / Herbaceous, Smoky, Spicy
description: A poem composed in the blinding darkness, Poeme Noir is an agonized cry from the heart, enshrouded in tragic romance and sensuality, brimming with the lyrical essence of the void. A haunting chypre composed from an inky bouquet of nocturnal florals and musk-tinged oakmoss that replaces the clear contours of a traditionally composed chypre with a gorgeously melancholic world of shadows.

name: Soleil Noir
notes: Overripe Apricot, Decayed Flowers, Old Wood, Dust, Dry Oud, Galbanum Resinoid, Hay Absolute
style: Avant-Garde, Floral, Fruity, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Dark
description: From dust we are born, and to dust we shall eventually return. Soleil Noir, the black sun, is a fragrance of entropy and decay, the dead leaves that cling to the tree in a state of marcescence that lingers long after life is gone. Decayed flowers, rotten fruits, weathered wood, and dust particles suspended in blackened sunlight- all vividly portray the nature of objects under the harsh impact of time.

name: Molotov Cocktail
notes: Vodka, Pepper Spray, Gasoline, Metallic Note, Dust, Blood, Sweat, Burned Rubber, Burned Leather, Iodine, Metallic Musk
style: Avant-Garde, Metallic, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Unusual / Unexpected
description: A powerful statement of a fragrance, opposing and exposing the stark reality of war. Dedicated to the innocent victims of war and international aggression across the world, Molotov Cocktail is a provocative and potent extrait, an allegorical bomb of a fragrance with intense notes of charred cityscape, burnt leather, blood, sweat, and metal- a provocative statement meant to challenge our narrow views of olfactory art and shock us out of complacency. Winner of the 2024 Artisan category at the Art & Olfaction Awards, Molotov Cocktail is, quite simply, a uniquely spectacular piece of fragrance art.

name: Romance Noire
notes: Wild Berries, Aged Wine, Dried Rose, Dusty Leather, Dark Smoke
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky
description: Time fades and darkness is inevitable, and yet still we wait for eternal love- a bittersweet glimmer of hope all the more beautiful for its futility.    Romance Noire is a poetic exploration of love gained and lost- remnants of wine stains, withered roses, and the scent of aged leather combine for a hauntingly gorgeous statement of lingering anticipation and the lasting power of lost love.

name: London Fog
notes: Bergamot, Earl Grey Tea, Smoky Accord, Steamed Milk, Lavender, Whipped Honey, Sandalwood, Vanilla Absolute, White Musk, Ambergris
style: Creamy, Milky, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Woody - Light
description: The House of Brandt introduces London Fog- an ode to cherished rituals and moments of calm, quiet luxury. Imagine a cup of freshly brewed Earl Grey tea, bright with bergamot, yet infused with the gently smoky depth of black tea. Silky steamed milk frothed with decadent vanilla bean and a hint of lavender, sweetened with whipped honey and savored at a cozy cafe on a quiet London street as the remaining morning fog mingles with a pleasantly soft rain shower.Let London Fog be your invitation to pause and indulge in the serenity of a moment of warmth and quiet luxury.

name: Nota Vanilla
notes: White Nougat, Vanilla, Hazelnut, Milk Chocolate, Whipped Cream, Almond, Praline, White Musk, Amber
style: Gourmand
description: Immerse yourself in the captivating world of Nota Vanilla, a fragrance that embodies seduction through an olfactory experience that is both gourmand and vanilla. From the very first notes, this perfume fascinates with its sweet accords of vanilla, hazelnut and white nougat, offering an opening that is both intense and irresistible. Its heart reveals a delicious fusion of milk chocolate and whipped cream, creating an explosion of gourmandise that caresses the senses. In the base, vanilla and tonka bean intertwine to bring a gentle warmth and creamy richness, leaving behind a bewitching and infinitely seductive trail.

name: Kumo no Koromo
notes: Bergamot, Neroli, Todo-pine, Hinoki, Himalayan Cypress Wood, Star Anise, Cypriol, Agarwood, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Vetiver
style: Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: On the Tanabata ("star festival") holiday, the deities and lovers Hikoboshi and Orihime, stars in the sky separated by the Milky Way, are allowed to meet for one day only, where Orihime (the star Vega) gives her beloved Hikoboshi (the star Altair) the kimono she has woven for him during the long wait. Tanabata is celebrated with joyful festivities, with parades, carnivals, picnics, and colorful decorations- in honor of the long-anticipated reuniting of lost lovers, people write their wishes for the future on pieces of paper that are then burned, sending them to the skies where the gods await. Kumo no Koromo is a gorgeously full-bodied commemoration of Tanabata, aromatic and richly woodsy, featuring a rare specimen of Japanese todo pine (abies sachalinesis) with intensely earthy, sweet, and resinous tones. Combined with a collection of warm, spicy resins, pure kyara agarwood, and supporting woodsy notes of hinoki, cypress, and sandalwood, Kumo no Koromo is a perfect celebration of lovers' reunion.

name: 6 Hours to Rio
notes: Bergamot, Ginger, Mandarin, Cardamom, Rose, Ambrettolide, Galaxolide, Sandalwood, Vetiver, Woody Ambers
style: Boozy, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Amber, Woody Ambery Floral
description: A boarding pass for a First Class seat to paradise on the legendary Concorde, 6 Hours To Rio is an intoxicating woodsy amber with a passionate spicy floral heart. An electric ginger and citrus opening evokes the crackle of anticipation of being seated on the luxurious supersonic jet, a transoceanic journey across hemispheres scheduled to pass by in the blink of an eye, the experience every bit as rare a privilege as any that await in the tropical paradise of your destination. Lush, romantic musky heart enchants and seduces, while a base of rich, smooth woodsy amber glows like a perfect pour of rich Frapin cognac from the cabin crew. A supersonic luxury journey spanning decades and miles, 6 Hours To Rio is a sheer, seductive adventure.

name: Boswellia Scotia
notes: Royal Green Hojari Frankincense, Pink Pepper, Saffron, Cistus Labdanum, Mysore Sandalwood, Cypriol, Patchouli, Black Hemlock, Fir Balsam, Olibanum
description: While frankincense draws its origins trees found in South Asia, the Middle East, and the Horn of Africa, it takes its Latin name of Boswellia from a source thousands of miles away- Scottish botanist William Roxburgh, who named it in honor of his friend Dr. John Boswell. With that unlikely connection in mind, Boswellia Scotia is a uniquely Scottish take on incense, built for the bracingly crisp air of autumn and the deep cold of winter in Edinburgh. Atmospheric, with enough warm richness to provoke a nuzzling sensation but also a striking inherent undulating freshness, Omani-harvested Hojari frankincense is the star ingredient, presenting a silvery incense profile that feels worlds apart from the cold austerity of ceremonial or church-y incense fragrances. Instead, Boswellia Scotia is both dense and warm but simultaneously weightless, with aromatic, amber, and woodsy elements providing layers of luxurious smoothness that only serve to highlight the exceptional quality of the frankincense. Rich, deep, and ethereal, Boswellia Scotia is a superior incense for those looking for a truly exquisite experience.Limited Edition:Only 597 bottles available worldwide (now sold out) - we received the last 40 bottles!

name: A Fire Within Oil
notes: Cypress, Chamomile, Oud, Vanilla, Incense, Cedarwood
style: Creamy, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Dark, Woody - Fresh
description: Inspired by the indomitable spirit of resilience, afirewithin is a sensory journey through self-discovery and inner strength. It channels the beauty that emerges from adversity, much like the desert bloom that thrives in desolation. The fragrance blends a captivating combination of rare, sustainable ingredients, including oud, vanilla, incense, and cedarwood, to create an enveloping aura of warmth, strength, and serenity. In the serene and brisk opening, crisp cypress and calming chamomile evoke clarity and inner peace, while a powerful heart of sustainable, natural, hand-selected Indian oud mirrors the resilience found in our deepest introspections. And a deeply comforting and warmly sophisticated drydown showcases rich vanilla, swirling embers of incense, and the protective aura of cedarwood- delivering a long-lasting sensation of well-being and self-discovery.

name: A Fire Within
notes: Cypress, Chamomile, Oud, Vanilla, Incense, Cedarwood
style: Creamy, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Dark, Woody - Fresh
description: Inspired by the indomitable spirit of resilience, afirewithin is a sensory journey through self-discovery and inner strength. It channels the beauty that emerges from adversity, much like the desert bloom that thrives in desolation. The fragrance blends a captivating combination of rare, sustainable ingredients, including oud, vanilla, incense, and cedarwood, to create an enveloping aura of warmth, strength, and serenity. In the serene and brisk opening, crisp cypress and calming chamomile evoke clarity and inner peace, while a powerful heart of sustainable, natural, hand-selected Indian oud mirrors the resilience found in our deepest introspections. And a deeply comforting and warmly sophisticated drydown showcases rich vanilla, swirling embers of incense, and the protective aura of cedarwood- delivering a long-lasting sensation of well-being and self-discovery.

name: Ultima Storia
notes: Black Citrus, Almond, Roasted Coffee, Pear, Orris, Clearwood, Saffran Leather, Talcum, Linen
description: Ultima Storia, a boundless devotion to Italy; its warmth, its people, their stories脗颅芒聙聰a souvenir of joy and light.

name: Almond Tart
notes: Almond, Vanilla, Tart Crust, Balinese Cacao, Butter, Sugar
style: Gourmand
description: Dive into a world where sensuality meets pastry perfection. ALMOND TART opens with a rich, buttery almond note that evokes the warmth of freshly baked treats. The heart of the fragrance reveals the delicate sweetness of sugar, as if you're savoring a golden, crisp tart crust. At the base, an indulgent layer of rich butter and rare Balinese cacao melts into the composition, wrapping the gourmand symphony in irresistible decadence. The tart crust adds the final touch of pastry charm, creating a full-bodied and mouthwatering fragrance. Each spritz transports you to a patisserie, where rich, edible aromas dance through the air芒聙聰a truly luxurious and sensual gourmand experience.A creation by Theodoros Kalotinis, the king of gourmands芒聙聯脗聽exclusively for LUCKYSCENT.

name: Blossoms Smoke
notes: Vetiver, Smoke, White Flowers, Bourbon Vanilla, Tonka Bean
style: Creamy, Earthy, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Light
description: Blossoms Smoke / 57 embodies the evolution of the family legacy, with Romain Almairac carrying on the tradition of his father, Michel, while adding his own creative and personal touch.The fragrance opens with smoky, intense, and earthy notes, creating an immediate impact. This smoky signature quickly fades, revealing white flowers that bring a luminous softness, with a burning, dangerous undertone, giving the fragrance a complex, evolving character. The contrast between strength and softness is an elegant balance of light and shadow. Over time, the base reveals warm, ambered notes of Tonka Bean and Vanilla, creating a rich, spiced atmosphere with a remarkably powerful sillage.

name: Sleepy Hollow
notes: Night Blooming Jasmine, Patchouli, Spices, Amburana, Apple Brandy, Jonquil, Oakmoss, Balsam Fir, Fallen Laves, Winter Rose, Wool Musk, Hay, Beeswax, Stewed Orchard Fruits, Immortelle, Agarwood, Styrax
style: Avant-Garde, Earthy, Fruity, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy, Sweet, Unusual / Unexpected, Warm
description: In the works for nearly a year, it芒聙聶s our pleasure to introduce Sleepy Hollow. This is the first collaboration between Folkwinds and Rajesh Balkrishnan. Sleepy Hollow is an unapologetic nostalgia trip through the autumns of your childhood; the autumns of your dreams; the autumns filled with haunted houses, sacks full of candy, leaf piles and hay rides. Sleepy Hollow is the scent which haunts your vague memories of staying up past bedtime, walking through the woods at night, playing manhunt, and listening to ghost stories.....And maybe you believed them...VERY LIMITED - We have been allotted the last 15 bottles of the sold out 100 bottle batch edition.  *One bottle per customer please.

name: Evasion Bonbon
notes: Caramel, Strawberry Candy, Marshmallow, Jasmine, Ylang-Ylang, Vanilla, Musk
style: Fruity, Sweet
description: Evasion Bonbon is the candy that takes you straight back to your childhood, the one that makes you smile as soon as you smell it. From the first notes, a sweet and melting wave envelops you, like a comforting candy that delicately melts in your mouth. Powerful, delicious, and very soft, it transports you to simple and happy memories. A perfect escape, full of tenderness, like a little sweet pleasure that we can't help but love.

name: Brownie Pop
notes: Brown Sugar, Biscuit, Popcorn, Chocolate, Hazelnut, Vanilla, Sandalwood
style: Gourmand
description: Brownie Pop captures the essence of a fudgy brownie topped with caramelized popcorn. Imagine yourself in a light-filled kitchen, where the rich aroma of caramelized brown sugar fills the air. The fragrance opens with the comforting sweetness of a soft, still-warm brownie, with chocolate chips gently melting on your tongue. Then, a swirl of caramelized popcorn joins the party, crunchy and sweet, adding a funfair note to this indulgent treat. Finally, creamy sandalwood and vanilla wrap it all up in a comforting warmth, like a sweet hug. Brownie Pop is more than just a fragrance, it's a gourmand escape into a world of irresistible sweetness.

name: Cuor di Cioccolato
notes: Cocoa Powder, Frosted Almonds, Caramelised Sugar, Dark Chocolate, Glazed Almonds, Vanilla Cream, Vanilla Bean
style: Creamy, Earthy, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet
description: Pure gourmand perfection, Cuor di Cioccolato beckons us into a delectably rich fantasia of suagared almonds, rich dark chocolate, and smooth, creamy vanilla for a mouthwatering concoction guaranteed to satisfy your sweet tooth.

name: Intense Vanilla
notes: Cinnamon, Lemon, Strawberry, Coconut, Amber, Tonka Bean, Vanilla, Sandalwood, Patchouli
style: Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Warm and rich, infused with dry, woodsy amber, creamy coconut, and fiery spice, Intense Vanilla is an addictive and unique gourmand full of unexpected delights. Beguilingly sweet, yet seductively spicy, it sidesteps a typical "dessert" profile to present something sexier and more complex, where every element of vanilla is given equal time to shine. If you love sweet yet sophisticated ambers like Baccarat Rouge 540, don't miss Intense Vanilla.

name: Fico
notes: Fig Leaves, Almond Milk, Sandalwood, Coconut Milk, Dried Figs
style: Creamy, Fruity, Milky, Tropical / Beachy
description: Juicy, creamy, sweet, green, aromatic- there's nothing quite like the olfactive versatility of the humble fig, and it's thus no surprise that fig fragrances offer a remarkable range of styles. But the truly special fig scents- and we're very pleased to report Fico more than qualifies for that honor- showcase that versatility in full. With a vibrant, green fig leaf opening, a juicy, fruity and gently aromatic almond milk and sandalwood heart, and a richly sweet and creamy coconut milk base, all wrapped around a lovely and rich blend of fresh and dried figs, Fico is a pure delight for fig lovers looking for a complex yet everyday wearable fragrance.

name: Gelsomino Bianco
notes: Bergamot, Grapefruit, Caramel, Apricot, Peach, Cyclamen, Heliotrope, Dewdrops, Jasmine, Lily Of The Valley, Tuberose, Neroli, Powder Notes, Amber, Violet, Patchouli, Talc, Musk, Almond, Vanilla
style: Floral, Floral - Citrus, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: Elegant and feminine, Gelsomino Biano is a celebration of feminine beauty. Leading with a gentle yet sensual white floral bouquet- tuberose and jasmine, kissed with crisp citrus and juicy fruit, supported with smoothly powdery purple florals and and a delicately sweet base of musk, almond, and amber, Gelsomino Bianco feels cheerful and romantic, seductive yet understated, a daily floral to be worn memorably anywhere and everywhere.

name: Mistico
notes: Red Fruits, Cherry, Raspberry, Cinnamon, Geranium, Neroli, Lavender, Jasmine, Tonka Bean, Vanilla, Sandalwood, Oud, Patchouli, Musk, Amber
style: Creamy, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Right from the box, you'll know this fragrance is different. Exotic notes of juicy, mouthwatering fruits blend to perfection with an elegant floral bouquet full of unexpected facets. An intensely woody base, kissed with creamy vanilla and warm amber, completes a rich, sophisticated composition with an amazing sillage that lingers for hours. There's nothing quite like Mistico, and those who smell it even once are bound to fall under its spell.

name: Ambra e Tabacco
notes: Orange, Aloe Vera, Amber, Tobacco, Tonka Bean, Cinnamon, Cedarwood, Musk, Vanilla
style: Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Amber
description: Warm, spicy, sophisticated, and seductive, Ambra e Tobacco is a meeting of two richly perfumed worlds. Combining a sweet, glowing amber with a soft and rounded tobacco, this fragrance offers a bewitching and sensual dance of light and dark.

name: Gourmand Power
notes: Panna Cotta, Pear, Vanilla, Caramel, Milk, Honey
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Sweet
description: A great temptation. A sweet delicacy. The absolute pleasure of a last spoon sinking into an indulgent dessert- transformed into perfume. The exquisitely mouthwatering aromas of panna cotta, pear, and vanilla, drizzled with caramel, and enriched with honeyed milk for a gourmand experience as sensual as it is delicious.

name: Phoenix Flame
notes: Sumac, Cardamom, Cinnamon, Immortelle, Frankincense, Myrrh, Oud
description: An aromatic amber and incense story, this scent invites you on a journey of rebirth and renewal.Fierce yet tender, the phoenix wraps you in its protective wings and invites you on a voyage of rebirth and renewal. Aromatic spices, richly glowing amber and meditative incense uplift and steady. You are invincible.

name: Vanille Debauche
notes: Vanilla Bourbon, Beeswax, Boozy Notes, Amber, Dried Fruit, Wood, Tobacco
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: Why does debauchery get such a bad reputation? Sure, it's defined as "excessive" indulgence in sensual pleasures, but when it comes to pure, unadulterated pleasure, isn't indulgence kind of the point? And while every delectable fragrance in the Kyse collection offers a mouthwatering gourmand experience, there's truly nothing quite as unapologetically indulgent as Vanille Debauche, a fabulously rich and warm vanilla perfume only available in a single small release once per year. Why? Because all that intense vanilla presence is painstakingly developed over the course of a long and exacting process- first, vanilla bean pods are sliced, soaked, and carefully macerated for a staggering five months, producing a vanilla tincture of unparalleled depth and sophistication. Once complete, that pure vanilla tincture is blended with davana- known for its sweet, boozy, dried fruit characteristics, enriching the vanilla's tropical and epicurean facets. Styrax resin lends its warm, vanillic, sensual touches, and a beautiful beeswax absolute in the base rounds out all the edges. Could you get by with a vanilla fragrance less meticulously constructed, less excessive, less indulgent? Sure, we suppose you could. But where's the fun in that?Extremely Limited Supply:Vanille Debauche is made in small, one-time batches and only once a year.

name: Golosissimo
notes: Orange, Clove, Vanilla, Dark Chocolate, Sandalwood
style: Boozy, Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Zuppa inglese- a classic Italian dessert from the Emilia Romagna region. A simple trifle/parfait made withcrema inglesecustard, dark chocolate, andpan di spagnasponge cake soaked Alchermes liqueur, its uncomplicated construction belies the rich complexity of flavor  that a perfectly crafted bite ofzuppa ingleseprovides- elegantly creamy, delectably sweet, warmly boozy and spicy, a truly satisfying blend of textures and flavors to inspire pure joy in sweets-loving children and sophisticated adults alike. It's Hilde Soliani's favorite dessert in the world, so it's no wonder that Golosissimo boasts all of the subtly complex, yet simply delicious gourmand richness of the realzuppa- chocolate, vanilla, spice, cake, and liqueur swirl together with harmonious fullness, delivering a deeply satisfying and surprisingly multilayered fragrance. A gourmand that balances deftly between nostalgic wonder and sensual sophistication, Golosissimo instantly takes its place among Hilde Soliani's very best.

name: Lilac Brulee
notes: Lilac, Rhubarb, Mimosa, Marzipan, Cinnamon, Cream, Sandalwood, Cedar, Tonka Bean, Vanilla
style: Gourmand
description: A dreamy reimagining of lilac, transformed into an unexpectedly sophisticated gourmand. This innovative fragrance opens with delicate lilac blossoms and fresh mimosa, brightened by a surprising twist of tangy rhubarb. At its heart, sweet marzipan mingles with soft vanilla cream, while the base reveals rich notes of sandalwood and cedar wrapped in a warm embrace of praline and tonka bean.Like discovering a secret pastry shop in a spring garden, Lilac Br脙禄l脙漏e marries the ephemeral beauty of florals with the comforting warmth of French confectionery. It's a masterful balance of the familiar and the unexpected芒聙聰where classic lilac finds new expression in a modern gourmand composition.

name: E Sempre Natale
notes: Spices, Biscuits, Amber
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet
description: There's nothing like the holidays for lovers of all things sweet- it's the one time of year where you can indulge without guilt and cozy up without some place you have to be. To Hilde Soliani, the freedom of the Christmas season represents a reconnection with the uncomplicated joys of childhood- every day, a new chance to discover the world. So why not create a fragrance that spreads that childlike holiday joy year round? This is the inspiration for E' Sempre Natale, which captures the essence of Christmastime cookies- warm, buttery biscuits rich in holiday spices- cinnamon, star anise, nutmeg- and sweet with the crystalline crackle of pure sugar. Indulge in a pure dose of childhood nostalgia with this Yuletime-perfect EDP- guaranteed to transport you to a crackling fireplace and the cozy comforts of Christmas no matter what time of year you spray it.

name: Chai Desert
notes: Saffron, Raspberry, Pink Pepper, Arabic Coffee, Cedar, Vanilla, White Florals, Patchouli, Ambergris, Oud, Musk
description: Chai Desert is a captivating fragrance that encapsulates the essence of the desert beauty. The fragrance is a homage to the beautiful, historical neighbourhood of Al Seef in Dubai, taking you on a journey and giving you a glimpse into the past. It opens with delicate, spicy, and sweet top notes of saffron, pink pepper, and raspberry. Heart notes of warm vanilla, Arabic coffee (Qahwah), and earthy cedar that evoke the smooth sands beneath the blazing sun, while a base of magnificent oud, regal patchouli, and a dose of musk and ambergris anchor the scent.

name: Discovery Coffret
description: Discover the gorgeous and stylish fragrances of Maison Violet with this boxed discovery set. For one special price, enjoy generous 2ml atomizer samples of all 7 Maison Violet scents plus testing strips: Pour R脙陋ver, Ab脙庐me, Tanagra, Un Air d'Apog脙漏e, Nu脙漏e Bleue, Sketch, and Compliment.

name: Compliment
notes: Orange Blossom, Palmarosa, Freesia, Ylang Ylang, Jasmine, Tuberose, Benzoin, Vanilla
description: What's the perfect feel good fragrance? The one you can reach for any day, any weather- your go-to, your compliment-getter, your "I just want to smell as good as I feel" mainstay? With a delightfully cheery bouquet of radiantly fresh white flowers, Compliment fits the bill, and then some. It's a beautifully multidimensional bouquet- camphorated green tuberose, strikingly fresh, alongside animalic, sensual jasmine. Pink palmarosa evokes young fruit picked fresh from the vine, orange blossom with neroli is both tangy and floral, and the creamy, spicy ylang ylang feels luxuriously tropical and adds a monoi-like touch against the warm, gently sweet base of benzoin, cocoa, vanilla, and soft woods. The perfect companion to your everyday happiness, Compliment bears its name perfectly.

name: Nuee Bleue
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Orange Blossom, Iris Absolute, Carnation, Sandalwood, Benzoin, Musk
style: Citrus, Floral - Citrus, Floral - White, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: A deeply invigorating, ethereally fresh blend of citrus, florals, and smooth woods, Nu脙漏e Bleue has all the revitalizing power of a summer monsoon. It opens with an iridescent burst of citrus, ozonic and sunny bergamot that sparkles next to a richly textured, powdery iris butter. Suave, smooth, cloudlike neroli floats through the heart of the fragrance, given an additional burst of energy with the minty, camphorous kiss of cool lavender. And in the softly powerful base, a milky, richly musky sandalwood glows with gentle radiance. Sensual and sophisticated, Nu脙漏e Bleue is a magical elixir from another plane of existence.

name: Un Air d'Apogee
notes: Anise, Sage, Honey, Mimosa, Cedar, Balkan Tobacco, Leather, Labdanum, Ambrox
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy, Sweet
description: An extraordinary leather and suede fragrance with the addictive signature of only the most exceptional perfumes, Un Air d'Apog脙漏e glows with romantic presence. A seductive mimosa absolute leads the way, creamy and honeyed, with accents of sun-bleached straw. Then, a warm, waxy, almost crunchy tobacco leaf, sweetened with honey and richly aromatic, paired with a radiant iris absolute. That ethereal warmth continues with Brazilian tonka- peppery, spicy, and powdery, while the smooth, supple suede leather accord lends elegance. Sophisticated, sensual, and signature worthy, this is a leather scent in a category all its own.

name: Tanagra
notes: Mandarin, Pear, Freesia, Peony, Iris, Jasmine, Cedar, Vetiver, Musk
description: Inspired by the statuettes of Ancient Greece, Tanagra is a hymn to beauty and femininity. The peony is the flower personifying its delicacy, the iris its grace, the freesia its purity. A sensual and delicate fragrance.  Let yourself be seized by its tangy mandarin and its sweet orange full of sunshine. Its vegetal and warm Haitian vetiver with woody and slightly iridescent facets. Its balsamic Indian sandalwood, which coats the base with a creamy sweetness. And ultimately, its opulent and tender freesia trail, which leaves a feeling of a delicate veil on the nose.To honor this fragrance's inspiration as an ode to the beauty and power of all women, 20% of the profits of Tanagra are donated to the Association Solidarit脙漏 Femme.

name: Abime
notes: Elemi, Pepper, Black Pepper, Frankincense, Palo Santo, Cedar, Labdanum, Sandalwood
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: AB脙聨ME is a magnetic perfume par excellence. Both dark and characterful, its spicy/woody accord attracts like a siren song. With unparalleled power, its wake will leave a lasting mark on your journey and provide an exceptional attraction. Let yourself be seduced by its cedar wood with dry and fusing facets, bringing a palpable tension to the composition. Its elemi gum from the Philippines, lemony and woody enhancing the formula. The cold, amber smoke of his incense mixed with the warm, milky curls of his Palo Santo. The spicy green of its pepper from the islands of the Kingdom of Tonga. Its Indian sandalwood, creamy and balsamic, soaked in the Australian sun bringing roundness and texture to the bottom of the accord.

name: Pour Rever
notes: Candied Chestnut, Hazelnut, Mate, Cocoa Extrait, Iris Pallida, Myrrh, Rum, Vanilla, Guaiac Wood, Incense
style: Boozy, Creamy, Sweet
description: Pour R脙陋ver envelops you in a cocoon of warmth and intensity, offering an irresistible invitation to lose yourself in its captivating trail. Indulge in its deliciously addictive blend of hazelnut and candied chestnut, a gourmand accord that delights the senses. Rich, deep notes of chocolate and rum infuse the fragrance with added intensity and character, while smoky, resinous Guaiac wood introduces a mysterious, woody depth to the composition. And at the heart of it all, a creamy, velvety vanilla wraps everything in a comforting, soothing warmth. Pour R脙陋ver is a true olfactory escape, a fragrance that invites you to daydream and embrace well-being; perfect for those seeking to surround themselves with a cocoon of softness and sensuality.

name: Cocoa Kimiya
notes: Cardamom, Cocoa, Patchouli
style: Earthy, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Coming from the distant lands of Latin America, cocoa is considered a sacred plant, 芒聙聹food of the gods." The divine in matter. A creation around a dark and intense cocoa contrasted by the light of a singular and radiant cardamom.Rich in natural and exceptional raw materials, this 2nd extract is also at 40%, a concentration of materials as if enhanced. It oscillates between shadow and light, shine and mystery, addiction and bitterness.

name: The Peach Trilogy
style: Fruity, Sweet
description: Who doesn't love a peach? After the runaway success of the juicy, spicy, and more than a little naughty Peach's Revenge, Sarah Baker was craving more. So she teamed up again with perfumer Chris Maurice to create two additional peach-perfect fragrances, each featuring a captivating composition of peach, vanilla, and other delicious notes, creating a trio of fruity, creamy gourmands in three unforgettable acts.Now, all three fabulous fragrances are available together, in this attractive presentation box showcasing 30ml sized versions of each.This set contains the following fragrances:Pastel Rumours: eau de parfum, 30ml.dreamy, fruity, milkyPeach's Revenge: extrait de parfum, 30ml.juicy, spicy, salaciousRococo Pie: extrait de parfum, 30ml.mysterious, filigree, pie

name: Creme Brulee
notes: Caramelized Sugar, Fresh Cream, Vanilla Custard, Burnt Sugar Crust, Whipped Cream, Bourbon Vanilla
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Milky, Sweet
description: For the extraordinary new Les Delices de Jousset series, creator Jimmy Bodin made the bold decision to craft these "ultra-gourmand" fragrances exactly as he would a cooking recipe, with inspired epicurean flourishes and mouthwatering flavor combinations. The results are a ravishing new collection of gourmands featuring compellingly realistic and richly indulgent olfactive delights.Cr脙篓me Br脙禄l脙漏e is not just a fragrance; it's an invitation to savor each moment with a touch of elegance and indulgence. Each note has been meticulously chosen to capture the essence of this classic dessert, enhanced with a touch of luxury. Notes of caramelized sugar, vanilla custard, and luscious whipped cream linger on the skin, evoking the ultimate dessert experience. For those who love the richer things in life, this is the gourmand fragrance of your most lavish dreams.

name: Cafe Affogato
notes: Freshly Brewed Espresso, Madagascar Vanilla Bean, Vanilla Ice Cream, Roasted Coffee Beans, Dark Chocolate, Whipped Cream
style: Creamy, Earthy, Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet
description: For the extraordinary new Les Delices de Jousset series, creator Jimmy Bodin made the bold decision to craft these "ultra-gourmand" fragrances exactly as he would a cooking recipe, with inspired epicurean flourishes and mouthwatering flavor combinations. The results are a ravishing new collection of gourmands featuring compellingly realistic and richly indulgent olfactive delights.Caf脙漏 Affogato is not just a fragrance; it's an invitation to indulge in the perfect blend of bold and sweet. Each note has been meticulously chosen to capture the essence of this classic Italian dessert, enhanced with a touch of luxury. Dive into this sensory experience and let Caf脙漏 Affogato transport you to a world of rich, creamy delights.

name: Banana Split
notes: Ripe Banana, Whipped, Cream, Vanilla Ice Cream, Chocolate Ice Cream, Chocolate Sauce, Caramel Syrup
style: Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet
description: For the extraordinary new Les Delices de Jousset series, creator Jimmy Bodin made the bold decision to craft these "ultra-gourmand" fragrances exactly as he would a cooking recipe, with inspired epicurean flourishes and mouthwatering flavor combinations. The results are a ravishing new collection of gourmands featuring compellingly realistic and richly indulgent olfactive delights.Dive into a world of pure gourmandise with Banana Split, a fragrance that combines the fruity sweetness of banana with the richness of vanilla and chocolate ice cream, all topped with chocolate sauce and whipped cream. Equal parts nostalgia and rich, luxurious indulgence, this is a treat to be savored.

name: Sticky Popcorn
notes: Salty Popcorn, Melted Butter, Vanilla Sugar, Warm Caramel, Rice Powder, Sea Salt
description: For the extraordinary new Les Delices de Jousset series, creator Jimmy Bodin made the bold decision to craft these "ultra-gourmand" fragrances exactly as he would a cooking recipe, with inspired epicurean flourishes and mouthwatering flavor combinations. The results are a ravishing new collection of gourmands featuring compellingly realistic and richly indulgent olfactive delights.Sticky Popcorn captures the ultra-realistic essence of buttery kettle corn, richly sweet and mouthwateringly salty. Bold and irresistible, it's an unforgettable experience for anyone who's ever loved a warm, butter-soaked bucket of popcorn, with an added dose of sugar to keep things extra sweet and enhanced with just the right touch of luxury. Dive into this sensory experience and let Sticky Popcorn transport you to a world of sweet and salty delights.

name: Jazz
notes: Red Mandarin, Mahogany, Bourbon Vanilla, Tobacco, Honey, Opoponax, Cacao, White Musk, Ambergris
style: Fruity, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Sweet, Woody - Dark
