description: This signature unisex extrait de parfum embodies the soulful and free-spirited essence of Jazz music. It opens with a vibrant note of red mandarin, blending seamlessly into a rich heart of mahogany, honey, and tobacco that creates a warm, inviting harmony. The composition deepens with decadent cacao and Bourbon vanilla, balanced by the sensual touch of opoponax and smooth white musk adding a sophisticated and long lasting finish.

name: Bubble Gum Factory
notes: Gum Accord, Sugar, Balinese Strawberry, Vanilla
style: Fruity, Sweet
description: Step into a playful realm of nostalgia with BUBBLE GUM FACTORY, a fragrance that captures the pure delight of childhood. Bold and exhilarating, it transports you to a fantastical gum factory, where the air is filled with the captivating scent of freshly made bubble gum. Picture the blend of juicy strawberries and smooth vanilla, intertwining like a dream to create an irresistible aroma that dances through your senses. Each spritz feels like a burst of joy, evoking carefree moments spent savoring every delightful chew. This fragrance is a fairy-tale journey that embodies the essence of sweetness, leaving a lasting charm wherever you wander.

name: Cinnamon Rolls
notes: Cinnamon, Sugar, Butter, Vanilla Glaze, Melomakarona (greek Cookie)
style: Gourmand, Spicy
description: Indulge in the warm embrace of freshly baked cinnamon rolls with every spritz of this decadent fragrance. A symphony of golden pastry, caramelized sugar, and the finest cinnamon fills the air, enveloping you in a comforting yet luxurious aura. Rich notes of melted butter blend with a touch of creamy vanilla glaze, creating a gourmand heart that芒聙聶s as smooth as silk. To elevate this treat, a few crushed melomakarona芒聙聰the traditional Greek honey and cinnamon cookies芒聙聰are sprinkled on top, adding a unique and delicious twist to the classic cinnamon roll. This fragrance captures the irresistible aroma of baked pastry, delivering a refined yet mouthwatering sensory experience.

name: Pistachio Latte
notes: Fresh Pistachio, Pistachio Nuts, Milk
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: Pistachio Latte unveils the most authentic pistachio fragrance ever created. From the very first spray, a vibrant green essence of fresh pistachio fruit芒聙聰the tender seed on the branch芒聙聰captivates the senses, as if touched by sunlight itself. This bright, green note melts into a velvety milk accord, revealing two distinct levels: first, the bright freshness of green pistachio, then the inner warmth of the toasted pistachio nut. This warmth is soon joined by the softest notes of genuine, warm evaporated and sweetened condensed milk, lingering on your skin like a dream that lasts all day. Crafted by Theodoros Kalotinis, this masterpiece captures the essence of pistachio and milk in the most enchanting, authentic way, resulting in a fragrance like no other.

name: Rouge Smoking Extrait
style: Spicy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Following Gris Charnel Extrait and Pas Ce Soir Extrait, Rouge Smoking has been reimagined as an Extrait de Parfum, offering a more intense and sensual version of the original eau de parfum. Inspired by the vibrant Pigalle district in Paris, it pays tribute to Yves Saint Laurent芒聙聶s timeless wardrobe and couture genius, transcending both time and trends. Rouge Smoking Extrait blends the luscious sweetness of Napoleon cherry with the enchanting richness of vanilla and tonka bean. It is a modern and bold skin scent, evoking passion and seduction. Concentrated at 30%, its fruity, amber, and cherry accord notes are reimagined into an even more textured and elegant version, leaving an exquisite and captivating imprint on the skin.

name: Les Miniatures Coffret
description: Highlighting the five cornerstone fragrances of the Collection Parisienne, the elegant and eye-catching Les Miniatures Coffret set is the perfect gift to introduce anyone to the striking and stylish world of BDK Parfums. A collector's treasure, this gorgeous set houses splash-style 10ml miniature replicas of the iconic full-sized BDK flacons, with the box itself transforming into a beautiful display that makes for an ideal holiday present.This collection includes 10ml EDP splash bottles of the following scents:Bouquet de HongriePas Ce SoirRouge SmokingGris Charnel312 Saint-Honore

name: SOD
notes: Soil Accord, Mitti Attar, Vetiver Java, Davana, Olibanum, Patchouli, Civet, Cypriol, Kalakassi Oud, Benzoin
style: Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Extracted from the deep burrows of the earth SOD is an experience in wood and soil like never before. Created as a creative collaboration to also commemorate the 20th anniversary of experimental ambient music label Students of Decay, SOD invites its wearers to an earthy, brooding and spiritual realm and is reminiscent of deep dark forest woods and earthy soil beneath them. Experience the spiritual joys of heaven on earth.limited edition of 75 bottles worldwide

name: INK
notes: Ink Accord, New Caledonia Sandalwood, Oakmoss, Styrax Resinoid, Olibanum, Nagaland Indian Oud, Raspberry, Labdanum, Natural Pigment Carbon Used In Tattoo Inks
style: Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: An olfactory ode to the beauty of tattoo art, INK is a collaborative creation between tattoo artist GAKKIN and Mallo Parfum. The natural composition has at its center a unique natural carbon derived ink like pigment accord which is sweetened and beautified by the addition of exotic notes like Caledonian sandalwood, fruity notes, incense and precious resins. INK is a testament to the intricate and sensual experience of body art expressed through intricate tattoos and takes its wearers on a journey into an exotic realm of mystery and intrigue that is reflected in the art of GAKKIN.

name: Pine
notes: Pine
style: Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: PINE is the eighth perfume from STORA SKUGGAN. This fragrance diverges from the brand芒聙聶s conceptual myths, focusing entirely on a single note rather than a story. In perfumery this type of fragrance is called a soliflore, a name that stems from a type of vase designed to hold a single flower. In this case芒聙娄 a vase holding an enormous tree.Pines are the most abundant organisms on the planet, measured by mass. Reaching heights of up to 100 meters, they are also some of the largest living things. And some of the oldest too; Methuselah, a 4856 year old bristlecone pine in White Mountains, is the oldest known living individual plant, while the spruce Old Tjikko in Dalarna, Sweden, has a clonal root system twice that age. The first of the pine trees evolved over 300 million years ago, outdating both dinosaurs and the Pole Star.While the concept is minimal, the fragrance is massive, designed to evoke all facets of PINE. From the fresh spruce shoot, to the sweet and sacred smelling sap. The dry woody aroma of bark and dead needles blanketing an earthy forest floor.In short, it芒聙聶s PINE. It芒聙聶s smells like beautiful, soulful, calming, invigorating... PINE.

name: Gourmand Kit
description: Cupcakes. Caffeine. Summer. Discover our favorite gourmand set through our luxurious 10ml travel size atomizers. Addictions turned into perfumes, to be consumed without moderation.Features 10ml each:Bake / Awake / Rise

name: The Icons Set
description: Let yourself be carried away by the captivating scents of these 4 best selling fragrances:Gourmand (Bake - 100ml)Party sensation (Glow - 10ml )Happiness (Smile - 10ml)Summer season (RISE - 10ml)Addictions turned into perfumes, to be consumed without moderation.

name: Fugazzi
notes: MILK, GRAPEFRUIT, INCENSE, MANDARIN, CUMIN, SUEDE, IRIS, VETIVER, GAIAC WOOD, SAFFRON, VANILLA, STYRAX, AMBROXAN, MOSS, MUSK
style: Floral - Light, Woody - Amber
description: Who would have guessed that two perfume brands would collaborate with each other? Imagine a secret rendezvous where desire runs wild and the night blurs reality. This fragrance captures that electric thrill, the magnetic pull of forbidden love. It opens with a creamy wave of milk, cut through by the brightness of grapefruit and mandarin. Smoky incense and spicy cumin add a touch of mystery. As it evolves, the rich, powdery iris takes center stage, softened by smooth suede and grounded by the earthy green of vetiver. Saffron brings a hint of spice, giving the fragrance a sensual, animalic undertone. In the dry-down, sweet vanilla and balsamic styrax wrap around warm ambroxan, musk, and moss, leaving a cozy yet seductive trail. It芒聙聶s creamy, smoky, and deeply intimate芒聙聰an unforgettable blend of comfort and allure.

name: Green Sapphire
notes: Saffron, Raspberry, Liquor Accord, Pine Needle, Violet Leaves, Cashmere Musk, Cedarwood, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Agarwood, Amber, Musk And Vanilla
description: A bewitching and intriguing perfume. Inspired by a British woodland in spring, bursting into bloom. Elegant, enchanting and mystical.

name: Kashmir
notes: Bergamot, Cardamom, Coriander Seed, Saffron, Pink Pepper, Jasmine, Iris, Rose, Blue Poppy, Himalayan Fir, Sandalwood, Cashmeran, Benzoin, Vanilla, Patchouli, Incense, Myrrh, Musk
style: Woody Ambery Floral
description: 4000 metres above sea level, with its snowy glaciers and pristine lakes, rivers gush through deep Himalayan valleys, densely forested with majestic towering Deodar trees.  At this high altitude, the Valley of Kashmir presents a uniquely breath-taking terrain.  Home to a diverse array of plants, meadows are blanketed with wild, rare blue poppies and Kashmiri saffron each summer.Kashmir by Ormonde Jayne is not without considerable allure. The emphasis of this woody hypnotic scent is Deodar, from the cedar wood family and a soft dreamy sandalwood, underscored with iris, rose, jasmine, cashmeran, vanilla and a caress of musk to fix this pervasive perfume.

name: Angir
style: Woody - Fresh, Woody - Light
description: Inspired by the essence of the fresh Moscow Mule cocktail, ANGIR captures the notes of ginger beer where the tonic pearls are mixed with a refreshing and gingery sensation on the nose, where the fig is the base.While it might seem like this would result in a heavy, challengingly industrial fragrance, perfumer Geza Schoen has instead crafted a dynamically casual, everyday scent that we find surprisingly soft and fresh. An initial whiff of fresh ginger slowly dissipates into something more craftsmanlike, a smooth, supple but substantial leather with hints of fig to give it a playful and creative character.

name: L'eau de Parfum
notes: Bergamot, Cotton Candy, Red Apple Smell-the-Taste, Iris Petals, Fresh Freesia, Buttery Popcorn Accord, Vanilla Bean, Sandalwood, Caramelized Amber
style: Gourmand, Sweet, Warm
description: L'eau de Parfum explores and pushes the boundaries of a gourmand classification by including referential notes that blend into an unidentifiable, wholly enigmatic experience. Weaving irresistible ingredients with the delicate embrace of florals, sandalwood, and caramelized amber, this fragrance is an artful homage to Cirque du Soleil's steadfast origins and dazzling big-top spectacles. Elevating classic gourmand notes to new heights. L芒聙聶eau de Parfum unfolds like a mesmerizing performance by Cirque du Soleil's virtuoso artists, creating an inimitable, transcendent atmosphere for the senses.The glass bottle is crowned with an Art Deco tiered top and a ridged gold stopper featuring a large sun rising above the moon, paying homage to the 芒聙聹circus of the sun.芒聙聺

name: Carina
notes: Raspberry, Strawberry, Rhubarb, Cherry, Modern Ambers, Musks, Ambergris Accord.
description: Inspired by the beauty of the Carina Nebula, an awe inspiring cosmic painting of incredible colours. I imagine a time of great space exploration where humans may one day wake up to such a view as this nebula, as we journey deeper into the unknown. I chose notes based on their colour to match the visual impact of this spectacular nebula.  芒聙聯Centauri Perfumes

name: Santalamore
notes: Petitgrain, Neroli, Linden Blossom, Fig Leaf, Matcha Tea, Indian Sandalwood Essential Oil, Synthetic Sandalwood Accord, Amber, Musk, White Ambergris Tincture.
style: Woody - Amber, Woody - Fresh, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Initially inspired by my enjoyment of classic fresh floral soap. I combined that with my love of sandalwood. Creating Santalamore, a long lasting clean floral-sandalwood soap perfume.It opens with a fresh, crisp green opening of petitgrain and fig leaf, followed by the soapy qualities of neroli and linden blossom. With a subtle soft powdery green accord of matcha tea. The dry down moves into a beautiful combination of sandalwood and high quality fine grade ambergris. 芒聙聯Centauri Perfumes

name: Ciao Bello Pistachio
notes: Pistachio Cream, Waffle Batter, Brioche, Vanilla Macaron Crumbs, Almond Paste
style: Gourmand
description: From the very first spritz, Ciao Bello Pistachio welcomes you with the enticing aroma of creamy pistachio and vanilla macaron crumbs. The top notes immediately transport you to a refined patisserie, where the rich and slightly sweet scent of pistachio and vanilla teases your senses.As the fragrance develops, the heart notes of Ciao Bello Pistachio emerge, enveloping you in the irresistible scent of warm waffle batter, sweet almond paste, and delicate vanilla blossom. Imagine the warm, buttery sweetness of freshly cooked waffles filling the air with an almost mouth-watering anticipation. These heart notes capture the essence of a sweet, comforting, and decadent treat.To complete the olfactory journey, Ciao Bello Pistachio reveals its base notes, featuring the sumptuous combination of soft brioche and creamy pistachio ice cream. This note evokes the heavenly scent of freshly baked brioche generously accompanied by melting pistachio ice cream. The comforting warmth and richness of these base notes will linger on your skin, leaving an unforgettable and seductive trail.

name: Black Butterfly
notes: Tiare, Almond, Lime, Cherry, Freesia, Iris, Rose, Coconut, Vanilla, White Musk, Sandalwood, Patchouli
description: The culmination of five years' work, Black Butterfly is a dynamic and richly seductive new scent inspired by speed, beauty, and the limitless possibilities of the future. Hurtling forward with frictionless momentum, Black Butterfly announces its presence with a vibrant opening of sweet cherry, tart lime, and mouthwatering almond, leading into a luscious and richly romantic coconut-kissed floral heart. As with all Byron scents, this one is a true powerhouse, and that all-day longevity and sumptuous gourmand presence is further enhanced with an indulgent base of musky vanilla and rich, woodsy patchouli, infusing the composition with potent sensuality. An unforgettable distillation of everything that makes Byron Parfums a global sensation, Black Butterfly truly soars above the ground- just make sure you catch this Limited Edition fragrance before it flies away for good.

name: Coffret Celebration- Fleur Narcotique
description: As a special gifting opportunity to celebrate the end of 2024, Ex Nihilo has created two exclusive and generous new gift sets to feature two of their most emblematic creations- each featuring full-sized 100ml bottles of the perfume, a 45ml tube of hand cream infused with the same fragrance, and two convenient and sleek 7.5ml travel atomizers of perfume to take on the go.This version of the Coffret Celebration features the most iconic of all Ex Nihilo's feminine fragrances- the crisp, fruity, musky, and utterly seductive Fleur Narcotique.

name: Mon Tiramisu
notes: Whipped Cream, Coffee, Biscuit, Vanilla Drops, Coconut Milk, Sandalwood, Chocolate, Powdery Musk
style: Creamy, Powdery / Soft, Spicy, Sweet
description: The new gourmande eau de parfum from Chabaud. Both comforting and powerful, this perfume takes us back to our most gourmet memories. The top notes reveal the delicacy of whipped cream and the strength of coffee. The heart: biscuit, vanilla pod and coconut milk. And in the base notes of this new creation: sandalwood, chocolate and powdery musk. Pure bliss!

name: Baccarat Rouge 540 Fragrance Ritual Set
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: At this point, we don't even need to describe Baccarat Rouge 540 to you (but we will!)- its now-legendary floral, woody, ambery, mineralic, and sweet sillage is an unmistakable presence everywhere people of elegance and taste gather. This holiday season, MFK presents the inimitable scent of Baccarat Rouge 540 across three complementary products to form a fragrant daily routine- the original Eau de Parfum, the rich, nourishing scented body oil, and the elegant, long-lasting hair mist- all collected in 35ml bottles perfect for travel or any on-the-go lifestyle. Combined in a festive red and gold gift box, it's the ideal gift for anyone who wants their whole life to smell simply beautiful.Includes:芒聙聯 Iconic Eau de Parfum芒聙聯脗聽Luxurious Body Oil芒聙聯 Perfumed Hair Mist

name: Vanille de Minuit
notes: Smooth Leather, Daim Accord, Sandalwood, Vanilla, Saffron, Nagarmotha, Benzoin
style: Creamy, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Amber
description: Indulgently gourmand vanillas, lusciously floral and feminine vanillas- these are truly wonderful types of fragrance, and we'll never stop being obsessed with them. But not every vanilla scent is really for those who tend to wear more traditionally masculine and unisex scents, despite all the distinctive spicy and boozy facets of vanilla as a raw material that make it perfect for so much more than dessert. With Vanilla de Minuit, Maison Tahit脙漏 delivers a vanilla fragrance intended to break down gender and genre barriers- a compelling and versatile vanilla wrapped in rich leather and smooth, dark benzoin resin that feels sophisticated, sensual, and wearable by just about anyone. Elegant touches of saffron-driven spice and creamy sandalwood coax out even more facets of this grown-up vanilla, making Vanille de Minuit an alluring option for even the finest occasions- or simply to turn any ordinary night into an unforgettable one.

name: Buenos Aires
notes: Grape Accord, Petitgrain, Ceibo Flower, Yerba Mate, Tonka Bean, Dulce De Leche
description: Smooth, nutty, and woody, this enchanting fragrance is inspired by the suave, seductive beauty of Argentina. Opening with a fresh, novel grape accord alongside a dash of zesty citrus and Paraguayan petitgrain, the heart of this sumptuous scent includes a flamboyant and uniquely Argentine floral- the ceibo, the national flower of the country. Another iconic local material, yerba mat脙漏, adds a grassy, hay, smoky tobacco-like dimension, all leading into the rich tonka bean base, which adds multifaceted elements of creaminess, woodsiness, spice, and nuttiness that join in concert with subtle touches of dulce de leche and leather for a dynamic, richly sensual, yet easy to wear scent. As romantic and adventurous as Argentina itself, Buenos Aires is another seductively fragrant travelogue from the maestros at Gallivant.

name: Allegria
notes: Violet Leaf, Carnation, Sea Salt, Cotton, Nutmeg, Clove, Honey, Amber, Vanilla, Musk
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Light, Fresh - Clean, Powdery / Soft
description: From a root word meaning happiness, joy, and tranquility, Allegria is a deeply soothing, beautifully fresh floral musk fragrance with an alluring signature. Opening fresh and bright with a sea breeze of ocean salt and flowering carnation, Allegria's clean and sophisticated heart evokes the exquisite craftsmanship of the finest French soaps, with powdery ivory cotton and violet leaf kissed with a gentle bouquet of spices. In the drydown, a perfect balance of honeyed amber and softly sensual musk lingers for hours, leaving an impression no less indelible for its lovely softness. As sophisticated as it is soothing, Allegria is truly perfect for any occasion.

name: AMOW
notes: Juicy Peach, Cherry, Mandora Essence, Salted Pecans, Buttery Crumble, Hazelnuts, Almonds, Vanilla, Tonka Bean Absolute, Madeleine, Amber Rum
style: Gourmand
description: In the purple hues of twilight, the legend of Andromeda takes shape, a princess condemned to be devoured by a sea monster for her mother's sins. Perseus, a hero from the stars, appears like a savior and, captivated by her beauty, frees her from her dire destiny. Their meeting sets the sky ablaze with a celestial romance as captivating as the stars themselves.AMOW evokes this myth through gourmet notes of peach and cherry, enriched by a crunchy crumble and pieces of salted pecan nuts. In the base, the sweetness of madeleine blends with tonka bean, vanilla and a hint of rum, creating a fragrance that is both addictive and timeless.

name: Amazonia Love
notes: Grapefruit, Red Curuba, Coconut, Amazonian Passion Fruit, White Floral Infusion, Brazilian Mate, Vanilla, Sandalwood, Musk
description: Amazonia Love draws its inspiration from the extraordinary duality of the Amazon, both a wild land of incredible biodiversity and the myth of the Amazon, the intrepid warrior of legend.This fragrance thus embodies the subtle fusion between these two fascinating worlds. Exotic notes are represented by maracuja, pomelo and coconut which evoke the lushness of the jungle, while mate, sandalwood and vanilla symbolize the strength and bold side of the Amazon. The fragrance thus celebrates the power of nature and the ferocity of the warrior woman, capturing the free and wild spirit that animates both the Amazon and the Amazon.

name: Hysterica
notes: Rosewood, Vanilla, Liqueur Accord, Tuberose, Gardenia, Chewing Gum Accord, Plum, White Pepper, Wild Honey
style: Floral - Fruity
description: Hysterica, the explosion of life, the latest addition to the Gritti Priv脙漏, tailor-made for those who dare to stand out and show their colors.The star note of Luca Gritti's new creation is tuberose, sensual and bold, accentuated by the dark, fruity aspect of plum and the seductive sweetness of wild honey. The magnetism of the composition reaches its climax in the dramatic connection between velvety rosewood and clouds of benzoin.

name: Memoire de Roses
notes: Bergamot, Mandarin, Damascus Rose, White Musk
style: Floral, Floral - Citrus, Powdery / Soft
description: A rose and citrus hybrid a gardener could only dream of, M脙漏moire de Roses is a joyful rose fragrance, refreshed with mandarin and bergamot beneath a veil of cotton musk. Tasked with featuring the the multifaceted beauty of Damask Rose, with its combination of fruity freshness and honeyed, lush opulence, perfumer Christophe Reynaud wisely chose not to overdress the fragrance, opting instead for a simple addition of bright, vibrant citrus fruits to infuse a fresh femininity, and a pillowy base of soft, smooth musk. The final result: a joyful hymn to romance, creativity, and the art of olfactory counterplay. Gorgeous and passionate, M脙漏moire de Roses features the multifaceted Damask Rose in all of its limitless wonder.

name: The Complete Works Sample Set
description: The Complete Works is the perfect way to explore the entirety of the whimsical, literary, fragrant world of Imaginary Authors. Updated yearly, this new version includes 2ml glass spray vials of all 21 fragrances in the regular line-up, plus one extra special surprise, and comes packaged with a deluxe 21-page booklet full of art and stories. Dive in and lose yourself in an imagination-powered world of fragrance.

name: Staelios
notes: Spiced Liquor, Clementine, Davana, Ashanti Pepper, Cedar, Cinnamon, Cypress, Violet, Clove, Nutmeg, Lavender, Sandalwood, Russian Leather, Precious Woods
style: Animalic, Boozy, Fruity, Smoky, Woody - Amber
description: In Saint Petersburg during the time of Peter the Great, Russia's most skilled master tanners had developed a legendary technique that allowed them to produce the strongest, finest, most elegant leather in the world to date. Made from Siberian reindeer hide, its distinctive purple hue made this "Noble Leather" completely one of a kind. in the 18th century, a ship laden with this invaluable cargo was headed for Genoa when it shipwrecked, dooming its rare treasure to the bottom of the ocean for centuries, until it was discovered and revitalized by French artisans. When a few strips of this precious purple leather made their way to Pierre Guillaume, he knew he had the inspiration for something special, so he used it to create a one-of-a-kind fragrance, independent of all prior collections, to celebrate the 20th anniversary of the fragrance house. This, in all its unique and purple-hued glory, is Staelios. Named for the raw power of an untamed stallion and the fiery might of Helios, the sun god, Staelios is an intensely warm, sensually animalic and yet elegantly complex scent- a violet leather eau de parfum saturated with rich floral and woody notes. Luxurious and spirited, the centerpiece Russian Leather accord envelops an incandescent violet wood, soaked through with davana liquor and infused with the crackle of ashanti pepper leaves. Saturated with exquisite natural elements and high-performance base notes, Staelios generates a powerful and addictive sillage that seems to glow with the radiance of a purple sun. The seductive and unforgettable culmination of 20 years of expert niche perfumery, Staelios promises to be a cornerstone fragrance of the house of Pierre Guillaume for decades yet to come.

name: Carnival of Souls
notes: Mimosa Cream, Violet, Saffron, Amber, Patchouli, Vanilla, Incense, Musk
style: Floral, Floral - Ambery Spice, Smoky
description: Emerging from a Cadillac plunged deep beneath the muddy tide, surfaces Mary Henry 芒聙聯 the sole survivor of a car accident and protagonist of the 1962 b-horror movie Carnival of Souls. After the crash, Mary spontaneously moves to Utah to start over and work as a church organist. She develops the ability to become invisible and dances with ghosts in a seductive, electric dimension. Mary's journey into the underworld coincides with her insatiable curiosity for something more than a life of fear, and the film poignantly suggests that a dance with her demon is the only way through to the other side. The newest fragrance from Marissa Zappas contains notes of Mimosa Cream, Violet, Saffron, Amber, Patchouli, Vanilla, Incense and Musk. It emanates a melancholic celebration of life (and death), and the radiant psychedelia of survival.

name: King Cobra
notes: Petitgrain, Mandarin, Fig Leaf, Camphor, Pomelo, Ganja Accord, Black Tea, Cumin, Leather, Soil Accord, Incense, Amber, Moss, Patchouli, Vetiver
style: Earthy, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy
description: Intoxicating aromas of exotic greenery infuse the ancient Indian forest. Yet a snake on the trail of its next meal can isolate the scent of a plump rat. But a flick of its slithering tail betrays the snake, sending the rodent darting away. Thwarted, the snake curls back upon itself, only to feel the cool touch of a menacing shadow of a towering King Cobra witnessing its failure. Now the predator becomes prey and there芒聙聶s no escape. Intent on a breakfast devoured whole and without mercy, the hooded king strikes. Fangs sink deep, their venom coursing through the body of the snake. Instantly paralyzing heart and lungs, the toxins set to work dissolving the flesh from the inside out.King Cobra from Zoologist is driven by danger and a desire to dominate. It hypnotizes with camphorous notes of Ganja and petitgrain, radiating coils of aromatic spices and damp mossy soil around a body heavy with incense. Finally, after shedding a delicate green leather, the powerful king ascends to his throne. A coronation of scent, King Cobra gives you license to rule.

name: Bois Imperial Extrait
notes: Thai Basil Accord (including Egyptian Basil Essence), Timut Pepper, Black Pepper, Atlas Cedar, Vetiver, Georgywood, Rose, Fir Balsam, Patchouli, Akigalawood, Labdanum
style: Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: Designed as a quintessence of the original fragrance, Bois Imp脙漏rial Extrait takes you to the nocturnal side of the fragrance. Darker, richer, stronger, it reveals itself under a new sensuality and a rare intensity with double the concentration of the Eau de Parfum. The spices are more explosive with black pepper, the heart is richer with Atlas cedar and rose absolute. The woody signature is adorned with luscious notes of labdanum and fir balsam, giving the fragrance a renewed sense of addiction and power. An absolute of seduction.

name: Choux Choux
notes: Citrus Peel, Fresh Cream, Vanilla Beans, Fleur De Sel Caramel, Sandalwood, Cocoa, Mocha
style: Creamy, Fresh - Citrus, Gourmand, Sweet
description: "Chouchou"- a term of endearment for those who make life sweeter. Whimsical, delightful, and rich, Choux Choux is a playful and indulgent gourmand inspired by the beloved French creampuff pastry. Bright, sunny citrus, mouthwatering fresh cream, and exquisite vanilla beans evoke the scent of freshly baked choux pastry, piped full of luscious, fluffy whipped cream spiked with caramel and mocha. We've said "what's not to love?" about a fragrance or two before, but it's perhaps never been more applicable than here- Choux Choux doesn't waste a single note, delivering an evocative, perfectly wearable, and deeply comforting patisserie gourmand in the expertly blended, gorgeously ethereal style that's made Liis a runaway cult favorite fragrance house. Share it with someone who makes you feel special.

name: Doliphor
notes: Carrot Seed, Costus, Cumin, Musk
style: Skin Scent / Minimal
description: In order to define a niche fragrance house in an ever more crowded market, creative control is a must. Early releases need to be painstakingly shepherded through concept and development to ensure that they shape a strong, identifiable brand that will resonate with the sophisticated and demanding niche community. But for the few houses dedicated, talented, and lucky enough to achieve this success--what comes next? How does a house maintain their hard-earned identity while still breathing fresh life into their creations? Perhaps, if that identity is distinctive enough, the next big thing will simply find you.That, at least, is the story of Doliphor, the creation of an extraordinarily talented young perfumer named Emma Lehaut who pitched the fragrance to Marlou as a perfect match for their lineup of sensual, animalic fragrances. When they sampled it and agreed, the house's first "Publishing Project" was born: a scent perfectly suited for the line but not originally conceived in-house, and a showcase for young talent in a world where reputation often plays an oversized role. Described as "skin in a bottle," Doliphor is the scent of a lover left throughout a home--the traces of human musk left on a worn shirt on the bedroom floor, a used bath towel, a strand of hair between the bristles of a brush. Milky, musky, warm, and intimate, it's a perfect Marlou scent...perhaps even more so when you consider that Marlou didn't commission it.

name: Vivid Discovery Set
description: Explore the sunny side of Liis with this specially curated collection of their most luminous, playful, and bright fragrances- if you love fruity, fresh, clean, or sparkling scents, don't miss it.This set contains 2ml atomizer samples of the following scents:Rose Struck, Lucienne, Floating, In This World, Choux Choux

name: Unseen Discovery Set
description: Discover the sultry, sensual side of Liis with this specially curated collection of their deepest, most mysterious scents- fans of all things woody, resinous, musky, and spicy, this one's for you.This set contains 2ml atomizer samples of the following scents:Bo, Studied, Ethereal Wave, Of True Minds, Choux Choux

name: Osmo
notes: Orange, Marine, Pink Pepper, Jasmine, Orris, Cedar, Oakmoss, Musk
description: Osmo is inspired by Reynisfjara Beach, with its distinctive black sands, huge basalt columns and massive waves crashing onto the shore. Osmo has a marine strength that makes you feel invigorated, like after a walk on the beach with the base notes bringing a sense of comfort. Wild nature and the power of the elements are captured in this contrasting fragrance. Starting with the water elements, marine accord enhanced with orange and pink pepper. The floral heart has a discreet touch, ending with a woody backdrop reminiscent of the wildness of the Icelandic landscapes that contrasts the marine top with an energizing breeze.

name: Oud Boost
description: Oud Boost is the best kept secret to elevate your perfume to new heights of sophistication and distinction. This fragrance enhancer from our Xponential range is much more than just an additive. It is an olfactory experience that transforms and elevates the elegance and longevity of any fragrance to the maximum.Oud Boost infuses any scent with unrivaled richness and depth. The oud heart is joined by the same base as our Xponential Day, Night and Animalic Boost, a proven combination of elements that ensure a perfect balance and a dynamic evolution of the aroma.Xponential Oud Boost has been designed to be combined with your favourite fragrances to enhance their aroma. Its ability to add body, substance and class to any perfume makes it a natural choice for those who do not settle for the ordinary. However, its become quite popular and equally impressive when Oud Boost is used alone. Elevate your fragrance collection to new heights with Oud Boost and let yourself be enveloped by the magic of timeless elegance.

name: La Foncedalle
notes: Weed. Aromatic. Beer. Fresh. Sage. Chicken. Roast. Buttery. Musky.
style: Unusual / Unexpected
description: Perfumer Am脙漏lie Bourgeois worked alongside rising star perfumer Margaux Le-Paih Gu脙漏rin to create an ultra-faceted and truly unique Neo-Foug脙篓re. For the first time in a fragrance, an original triptych: weed, beer, and roasted (vegan) chicken. A salty, fresh, and warm combination that is sensual, appetizing, and intoxicating. This fragrance smells great, it芒聙聶s original, unisex, vegan, and made in France.

name: Vanille Havane Coeur de Oud
notes: Pure Vanilla Extract, Oud Extract Ultrasound
style: Woody - Amber, Woody - Dark
description: An opus from LES INDEMODABLES, improbable, unexpected... and in limited edition. 500 copies and not one more will be offered due to the quantity of extract we were able to make with this unique piece of Oud. It is thanks to a contact of the founder 芒聙聯 sourcing expert 芒聙聯 that we were able to evaluate a piece of extremely rare Oud heartwood, from the cellar of a collector in the Middle East, and originating from a private plantation in Cambodia.After a long process and many attempts of ultrasound extraction and fractionation of this raw and unique gem, we were able to present the fine tuned extract to Antoine Lie, who immediately fell under the spell of this ingredient with an unprecedented olfactory profile, exceptional longevity, and olfactory complexity.Antoine LIE envisioned an olfactory construction scheme to showcase this beautiful oud example, presenting a beautiful harmony between the fruity/aromatic facets in the top notes, and the more woody, smoky, and animalic in the base. That芒聙聶s when we had the idea of using this ingredient, which it would have been criminal to leave orphaned at the bottom of a drawer, to offer a variant of the original formula of the collection芒聙聶s leader: Vanille Havane!Antoine thus composed, in the utmost secrecy, a version enriched with the deep and complex facets of this extract: a truly magical accord, as the subtle is the harmony preserves the original structure while projecting us into another dimension, luminous with its aromatic and spicy facets, dark when on the skin it reveals a trail of precious woods, tanned hides, and pyrolyzed resins.

name: Peche au Yuzu
notes: Peach, Yuzu, Jasmine, Vanilla, Tonka Bean
style: Fruity, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy
description: There's nothing that says summer without the sensation of fresh, ripe peaches. Kyse's Peche au Yuzu kicks up the fresh, saturated peach with a dash of yuzu- a tart, zesty citrus that perfectly balances the sweetness of peach, yet adds a burst of vibrancy. Those seeking a delicious and realistic peach, look no further.

name: Fichi e Panna
notes: Fig, Milk Accord, Sugar, Vanilla, And Sandalwood
style: Milky, Sweet
description: Creamy, milky fig? Yes please, sign us up for this delectable gourmand. Whereas most fig scents can lean green and zesty, Fichi e Panna is quite the opposite - milk infused cream swathed in juicy, sugared fig. Its definitely a great take on fig and a must try for lovers of fig.

name: Fifty Four
notes: Pina Colada, Cardamom, Davana, Saffron, Chocolate, Nagarmotha, Cinnamon, Rum, Vanilla, Sandalwood, Patchouli, Tobacco
style: Boozy, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet, Woody - Spicy
description: New York City芒聙聶s Studio 54 has become the symbol of the 芒聙聵70s club scene, the pinnacle of hedonism where the jet-set and celebrities mingled with uproarious results. The Fifty Four eau de parfum from Jusbox pays homage to this era of bacchanal abandon, the scent crafted as a collaboration between master perfumer Julien Rasquinet and The Perfume Guy as an example of what olfactory indulgence might be worn to the club today. Creamy pi脙卤a colada accord blends with cardamom and davana for a sweet blast of excitement, while the strong, weighty notes of rhum, vanilla, sandalwood, tobacco and patchouli transform the bass vibrations of the underground scene into an energetic aroma.芒聙聹An addictive, vanillic ambery take on the patchouli, but with a contrasting lightness and fruitiness coming from pina colada notes芒聙聺 -Julien Rasquinet

name: Aoud Extraordinaire
notes: Pear, Mango, Pineapple, Transparent Jasmine, Cyclamen, Agarwood, Toffee
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Sweet, Woody - Dark
description: Taking inspiration from the world capital of luxury, Aoud Extraordinaire Parfum is the personification of the glittering lifestyle of Dubai, where ancient artisan craftsmanship comes together with the pinnacle of modern elegance. Refusing to be weighed down by the heaviness of old-fashioned oud scents, this uplifting and luxurious new Parfum adds an intoxicating and vibrant new twist to traditional oud, while still paying homage to the ancient practices, as only the pioneer of haute perfumery could. With a mouthwatering, joyful bouquet of tropical fruits, fresh florals, and indulgent gourmand notes blended together, Aoud Extraordinaire re-imagines the timeless enchantment of oud for the modern era, while still maintaining the exquisite depth and inimitable power of real oud. A sumptuous and seductive oud parfum that sparkles with avant-garde radiance, Aoud Extraordinaire is, well, extraordinary.

name: Red Keela Split
notes: Italian Lemon, Strawberry Gelato, Red Indian Banana, Orange Blossom, Sicilian Pistachio Cream, Caramel, Vanilla, Absolute Tonka, Sandalwood, Ambroxan
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: INDIAOur olfactory journey begins in the heart of the lush plantations of India, where the Red Hindi Banana, ripened under a bright sun, reveals itself in all its splendor. As we cross these tropical expanses, each note of this unique fruit is imbued with the essence of the place, promising an explosion of exotic sweetness that will mark the beginning of our sensory escapade.SICILYFrom the lands of India, our quest takes us to the sunny shores of Sicily, where the soul of the Mediterranean is revealed through the richness of local flavors. It is here, in the picturesque alleys and under an azure sky, that the creamy and irresistible Bronte pistachio dessert cream comes into play. Alongside it, the Italian strawberry gelato, bright red and bursting with flavor, adds a fruity freshness that complements the creaminess of the pistachio. This iconic duo, synonymous with generosity and finesse, infuses the Red Keela Split with a creamy sweetness and a lively touch, instantly transporting us to an endless Sicilian summer.NEW YORKThe journey doesn芒聙聶t end there. From exotic plantations to Italian alleys, we finally land in the hustle and bustle of New York. It is in this cosmopolitan metropolis, where anything is possible, that the famous American dessert, the Banana Split, takes shape, enriched with the decadence of a salted caramel coulis. This last element, as sophisticated as it is indulgent, envelops the senses in a whirlwind of gluttony, recalling the simple and luxurious pleasures of life.

name: Sniff Sniff: Exploring Asian Fragrance Houses
description: The Perfumed Pages debut series takes you on a sensory exploration into the world of Asian fragrance houses, featuring 6 select samples:Naked Danceby Oddity (Hong Kong)Yawahada (Soft Skin)by J-Scent (Japan)Dirty Riceby BORNTOSTANDOUT (S. Korea)Salted Green Mangoby Strangers Parfumerie (Thailand)Pho Breakfastby d'Annam (Vietnam)Taipeiby ONE DAY (Hong Kong)

name: APOM
notes: Orange Blossom, Lavender, Ambery Woody Accord
description: APOM. A poetic, mysterious acronym. A carnal eau de parfum with a sensually luminous, radiant, and generous sillage. A Part of Me: A part of yourself that you leave with others, your own personal story that gets told with every wear. An intimate conversation between fragrance and skin, where scents come to life. A floral, aromatic ambery fragrance, APOM unveils an immediately familiar signature. Luminous top notes give way to a soft, floral heart 芒聙聯 a skillful balance of aromatic, bursting lavender and addictively generous orange blossom wrapped in a warm and airy sillage. Ylang-ylang lends its sunny accords to vanilla, which unfurls in the comforting embrace of white musks. An intimate fragrance that hugs the contours of both body and personality.

name: Mojave Ghost Absolu
description: An intensified variation of Mojave Ghost. Long-lasting, bewitching woody signature. Embodying Mojave Ghost芒聙聶s defiant spirit, a captivating new iteration of the iconic scent, boasting unparalleled richness and depth. Crafted as a tribute to resilience, an intensified silage and allure highlighting each exquisite note. At its core, a harmonious blend of Jamaican Nesberry's sweetness, powdery Violet's delicacy, and sensual Sandalwood's warmth. Complemented by warm musk, crisp Amber, and grounding Cedarwood. Beyond a fragrance, it's a narrative embodied in scent, inviting you on a sensory journey of strength and resilience.

name: Oud Indochine
notes: Cardamom, Red Saffron, Vanilla, Frankincense Sacra, Labdanum, Myrrh, Beeswax, Guaiacwood, Oud Hindi, Oud Kinam, Oud South Thailand, Chocolate, Cocoa, Tar, Ambergris
description: An olfactive tribute to French Indochina, Oud Indochine brings together perfumers Maksim Bortnikov and Rajesh Balkrishnan to recreate the smell of sea bound voyages from ports like Saigon in the late 1800s when ships would be laden with treasures from the east heading to western shores of Paris. The scent combines eastern spicy notes and western aromatic and gourmand notes in a deep woody base accentuated with precious oud from Thailand and  Vietnam to create a deep mystical aura, an unforgettable scent of a bygone era of long haul voyages of trade ships from the east to the west.The fragrance opens with a captivating blend of cardamom and red saffron, giving the composition a spicy yet elegant warmth. The gentle sweetness of vanilla softens these vibrant notes, creating a smooth and inviting introduction. At the heart, sacred warmth from frankincense Sacra intertwines with the rich resinous notes of labdanum and the earthy sweetness of myrrh. A light honeyed nuance from beeswax adds subtle sweetness, while guaiacwood introduces a smoky, woody character, enhancing the complexity and depth of the fragrance.The base is a luxurious blend dominated by the rare and refined combination of Kinam oud, South Thai oud, and Hindi oud. These ouds form a deep, woody foundation, full of mystery and sophistication. Rich gourmand notes of chocolate and cocoa add a sensual warmth, while a hint of tar brings a dark, smoky touch. The long-lasting trail is rounded off by the smooth and oceanic notes of ambergris, giving the fragrance a sense of depth and elegance.

name: On A Cloud
notes: Peppermint, Vanilla, Sugar, Milk
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Sweet
description: A scent that brings back that summer, etched in the summer sky filled with clouds. The scent of vanilla milk, which is reminiscent of wide, fluffy snow-white thunderclouds, and the refreshing feel of peppermint evoke sparkling memories that melt away in an instant in the summer heat, and make you feel a sense of happiness in your heart. It smells like this.

name: Dolce Sonata
notes: Apricot, Raspberry, Lime, Sweet Orange, Bergamot, Osmanthus, Lily Of The Valley, Jasmine, Incense, Rose Petal, Patchouli, Musky Notes, Face Powder, Cotton Candy
style: Floral - Citrus, Floral - Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: Dolce Sonata pays homage to the enchanting world of classical music and the resonance of a captivating voice, beckoning you on a sensory journey that transcends the ordinary. Step into a sunlit haven, secluded from the bustle, where apricot and raspberry trees sway in harmony, their melodies harmonizing with zesty notes of lime, sweet orange, and bergamot. Within this tranquil oasis, the fragrance unfurls its captivating tale, echoing the timeless allure of a musical masterpiece.Amidst this secret garden, Dolce Sonata reveals its heart-a symphonic arrangement of osmanthus, lily of the valley, jasmine, incense, and rose petals. Each note crafts a chapter in this fragrant opus, evoking the elegance of a melodious aria. As daylight surrenders to the night, the enchantment deepens. Incense whispers age-old tales, patchouli and musky tones ground the senses, while face powder and cotton candy add an ethereal allure, creating a symphony that transcends mere scent芒聙聰a harmonious escape reminiscent of a beautiful voice echoing through the serenity of an unforgettable musical interlude.

name: Desert Dawn
notes: Cardamom, Rose Petals, Sandalwood, Cedarwood, Carrot Seeds, Papyrus, Vetiver, Silk, Musk
style: Floral - Spicy, Spicy, Woody - Amber, Woody - Spicy
description: Creativity can thrive in isolation. Like in nature, the imagination ebbs and flows. Desert Dawn transports the wearer to the open terrain of the vast expanse 芒聙聯 a place one can visit in their mind, where a new idea comes forth at any given moment just as the dawn.Celebrating the power of nature芒聙聶s creative juxtapositions, Desert Dawn芒聙聶s olfactive intensity finds balance in the freshness of something new. Opening with the inviting sweet spices of Cardamom, wood-forward notes recall the dry heat of the desert. The enveloping warmth of Sandalwood and Cedarwood form a powerful heart while an enticing finish lingers with the rich smokiness of Vetiver and Silk Musk, enlivened by the crisp, clean scent of Papyrus, the warmness of the first rays of dawn, symbolizing a fragrance that is both dry and enveloping.

name: Fleur Eclair
notes: Cardamom Sugar, Cocoa Butter, Rosewater, Cocoa Powder, Jasmine Sambac, Orange Blossom, White Patchouli, Blond Woods, Amber
style: Floral, Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Amber
description: Inspired by the longing between what we crave and what we savor, Fleur Eclair delights and tantalizes with every elegant note.Lush cardamom sugar and cocoa butter are lifted by the fresh, dewy touch of rosewater. An exquisite bouquet of jasmine sambac and orange blossom breathes light into cocoa powder's rich depth. Earthy white patchouli and blond woods harmonize  with resinous amber, leavign a trail of ethereal warmth on the skin.Fleur Eclair芒聙聯 A very grown up gourmand where sweet dreams breathe into the world and longing blooms into light. A faint sugar rush, poised between indulgence and restraint.

name: Yue Tu
notes: White Tea, Jasmine Tea, Sweet Orange, Osmanthus, Mandarin, Peach, Cedar, Musk, Mango, Iris, Grass, Lily Of The Valley, Pomelo, Bitter Orange, Chrysanthemum, Chamomile
style: Floral, Floral - White
description: Osmanthus holds mythological significance as the Tree of the Immortals in some cultural narratives. The Tree of the Immortals is a concept found in various mythologies and folklore, symbolizing eternal life, wisdom, and spiritual transcendence. Yue Tu is a fragrance that draws inspiration from the captivating tale of Chang芒聙聶e, the moon princess, and the mythical rabbit residing on the moon. This perfume aims to encapsulate the essence of the moon, osmanthus flowers, and the enchanting atmosphere associated with the lunar realm.The scent carries hints of floral nectar and a subtle touch of honey-like sweetness, adding to its allure. The aroma of jasmine tea is elegant and invigorating, evoking a sense of sophistication and revitalization. It has a clean and uplifting quality that awakens the senses. Jasmine tea strikes a delicate balance between the scent of the tea leaves and the infused jasmine flowers. The floral notes intermingle with the earthy and vegetal qualities of the tea, creating a harmonious and layered olfactory experience.

name: Concrete Forest
notes: Hassaku Orange, Galbanum, Concrete, Mint, Mandarin Orange Blossom, Japanese White Magnolia, Green Tea, Angelica Seed, Lily Of The Valley, Mountain Air, Orris, Cucumber, Cedarwood, Gingko Leaves, Ivy Leaves, Bamboo, Moss, Camellia
description: Concrete Forest transports you to the heart of Tokyo芒聙聶s urban landscape, where the juxtaposition of nature and city life creates a unique harmony. It is an olfactory journey that embodies the spirit of seeking spirituality amidst the chaos of a busy lifestyle. Concrete Forest opens with a luminous combination of greenness notes derived from Ginkgo leaves, bamboo, and galbanum. These fresh and vibrant notes evoke the image of bright green foliage along the streets, infusing the scent with revitalizing energy. As the main star, Ginkgo leaves have a unique fragrance that can be described as both herbal and slightly nutty. The scent carries a subtle hint of sweetness, reminiscent of freshly cut grass or green foliage. The base notes of 芒聙聹Concrete Forest芒聙聺 feature a blend of concrete and moss. This combination represents the harmonious coexistence of nature and the urban landscape, creating a captivating contrast.A testament to the allure of Tokyo芒聙聶s urban environment and its quest for spirituality, Concrete Forest is a scent that invites you to embrace the harmonious interplay of nature and city life, providing a moment of respite and introspection in the midst of a bustling metropolis.

name: Reve Du Matin
notes: Earl Grey Tea, Cedrat, French Lavender, Jasmine, Bergamot, Honey, Rose, Vanilla, Wild Flowers, Hay, Lemon Zest, Muguet, Sandalwood
style: Earthy, Floral - Light, Fresh, Green / Herbaceous, Smoky, Woody - Light
description: R脙陋ve du Matin transports you to a serene lavender field in Provence, where the morning sun bathes the landscape in a warm, golden glow, capturing the essence of enjoying Earl Grey Tea amidst the enchanting beauty of the lavender. It's not just a scent; it's an olfactory journey, unfolding like lavender petals in the morning light. Vibrant, cheerful, and romantic, R脙陋ve du Matin truly captures the magic of sipping Earl Grey Tea amidst Provence's lavender fields芒聙聰a symphony of citrus, florals, herbal notes, and gourmand elements, speaking to the soul, whispering tranquility, and rekindling cherished memories of lavender-scented dreams.

name: Ginger
notes: Lemon, Bergamot, Paradisone, Ginger, Violet, Hedione, Magnolia, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Ambroxan
style: Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean, Spicy
description: Ginger fragrance is a fresh, spicy journey to a tropical paradise. It begins with a burst of zesty ginger, invigorating the senses with its vibrant, peppery aroma. This initial spark is followed by subtle undertones of citrus and tropical fruits, reminiscent of sun-drenched shores and lush, verdant landscapes. As the fragrance unfolds, hints of warm spices and exotic flowers emerge, weaving a rich tapestry of scents that transport you to a serene, sunlit island. The ginger fragrance captures the essence of a tropical escape, leaving you feeling refreshed, revitalized, and ready to embrace the adventure of paradise.

name: Yasat
notes: Bergamot, Cardamom, Sandalwood, Caramel, Cedarwood, Vanilla, Musk, Dry Amber
description: Yasat Island, nestled in the azure waters of Abu Dhabi, is a serene oasis where the gentle sea breeze carries a delicate, invigorating unique fragrance of floral and ocean spray. As you approach the island, the scent of blooming native flora mingles with the briny aroma of the coast, creating an enchanting olfactory experience. The captivating population of flamingos adds to the island's charm, their elegant forms reflected in the crystal-clear waters, where the air is filled with the subtle, earthy fragrance of the surrounding mangroves and the sweet scent of distant desert blooms carried by the wind. This sensory symphony of scents makes Yasat fragrance brings you to a truly mesmerizing and tranquil destination.

name: Heraud
notes: Bourbon Bergamot Oil, Bitter Cocoa Head Note, Fruity, Milky Cocoa With The Sweet Notes Of Dried Dates. A Natural Touch Of Clean White Florals. Dry Timber And Spicy Cedarwood, Sensual Planifolia Vanilla, Clean Powdery Musk And Crisp Amber Gris.
style: Gourmand, Woody - Amber
description: HERAUD elixir is a fragrance circling a wonderful all natural, double distilled cocoa absolute. Hard to get. Not always available.  I crafted a perfume that is not merely a chocolate scent; it is a rich, balanced blend of sweet and bitter, featuring dried sweet dates, bitter-sweet floral delicacies, wonderfully spicy dry woods, and a musky amber base.One of the central pillars in the perfume formula is the double distilled extract of COCOA beans from the Ivory coast. Very hard to get, not available every year, produced in smaller batches: HERAUD might not be available all the time. This is the sacrifice we have to pay for quality. This extraordinary cocoa bean absolute is overdosed in the perfume formula and radiates lovely throughout the entire perfume. Heraud is a truly unisex perfume, and as elixir it is long lasting. It develops sensually on the skin and radiates without ever being loud or too potent.

name: Santa Casa
notes: Orange, Bergamot, Incense, Marine Notes, Tobacco, Rose, Vanilla, Sandalwood, Ambrette, Benzoin, Amber, Musks
style: Creamy, Fresh - Aquatic, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky
description: The unmistakable smell of candles and their smoke inside the Santa Casa di Loreto, in the Marche, Filippo regionThe Holy House is one of the main places of veneration of Mary and among the most important and visited Marian sanctuaries of the Catholic Church and is made up of three walls which according to ancient and authoritative tradition would be the part in front of the cave of Nazareth where she was born, the Annunciation lived and recipes the Blessed Virgin Mary. Devoted tradition has it that the translation of the Holy House from Nazareth to Loreto was the work of angels. Inspired by the drawers of the sacristy of the Loreto basilica.

name: Sacristie des Arbres
notes: Incense, Mint, Pine, Virginia Cedar, Damask Rose, Gaiac Wood, Ambrette, Vanilla, Benzoin, Amber, Vetiver
style: Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Amber
description: A forest is a place full of wisdom and mystery, where nature seems to speak with its tranquility and beauty. This is the environment where it is obligatory to listen in order to listen to each other, in connection with the trees, trying to understand their silent lessons.

name: La Voglia D'Amare
notes: Mandarin, Pine Tar, Iris, Coconut, Musk, Amber, Oakmoss
style: Floral - Citrus, Fresh, Sweet, Woody - Amber
description: When the sun sets and the heat of the day gives way to the coolness of night, the atmosphere is charged with an energy with a taste of mystery. The city lights come on, but the adventures and excitement are far from them... we search for them by walking by the sea, where the figures are undefined and where we sense only the sea and a few car in the distance.

name: Basilica di Assisi
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Incense, Petitgrain, Labdanum, Patchouli, Dried Fruits, White Rose, Styrax, Tonka Bean, Benzoin, Amber
style: Earthy, Fruity, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Amber
description: Inspired by the drawers of the sacristy of the Basilica of San Francesco. A spring wind that enters from the large lawn, mixing with the wood and the medieval walls frescoes by Giotto and Cimabue.

name: Notre Dame Notte di Natale
notes: Virginia Cedarwood, Chocolate, Orange Blossom, Cinnamon, Alaska Cedarwood, Tonka Bean, Benzoin, Amber
style: Floral, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Sweet, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: Inspired by the drawers of the sacristy of the Paris cathedral. It is the olfactory memory of Philip in Paris, during his visits to the sacristy of the cathedral. The person in charge of the sacristy loves to prepare an ever-changing mixture of incense, according to the numerous anniversaries of the liturgical year.

name: Homme Anniversary
notes: Lemon Mousse, Bergamot, Tarragon, Orange Blossom, Tonka Bean, Clove, Leather, Vanilla, Candied Fruits, Styrax
style: Classic Masculine, Masculine, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy
description: Xerjoff's 17th anniversary celebration of their now-legendary inaugural 17/17 Collection continues with a thrilling new edition of the classic XJ Homme that stays true to its elegant masculine leather roots while still presenting a dynamic, modern character. That unforgettably sophisticated leather note- rugged, yet refined- still carries the fragrance, while a distinctive twist of clove and a warm ribbon of tonka bean weave through the scent for a unique signature. As the fragrance dries, the rich and long lasting base reveals provocative nuances of candied fruits and styrax resin. A commemoration of the past and a bold declaration for the future, Homme Anniversary is a new masculine classic.

name: Extrait Collection Sampler Set
description: Try the new Extrait collection! 5 x2ml atomizer samples, limited supply.

name: Secret du Nil
notes: Bergamot, Bitter Orange, Bitter Almond, Orange Tree, Neroli, Toasted Almond, Honey, Vanilla, Icing Sugar, Cedar, Musks
style: Creamy, Floral, Gourmand, Sweet, Woody Ambery Floral
description: This fragrance is inspired by the Nile in Egypt, the origin of whose source remains a mystery. Cradle of civilizations, it is the source of a fertile land where we find an abundance of fruit trees and fields of flowers.The bee, a royal symbol of ancient Egypt, was born for the pharaohs from the tears of the sun god Re. Its honey was a drink for newlyweds, hence the expression"honeymoon". Honey was also widely used in pharmacopoeia as well as in embalming rituals.Secret du Nil is a fragrance that is both gourmand and floral with citrus notes such as bergamot, orange blossom and neroli and warm notes of almond, vanilla and musk. Deliciously seductive and enveloping, Secret du Nil warms the soul to savor its days.

name: Melipona
notes: Bourbon Vanilla, Cashmere Wood, Amber, Crystal Amber, Musks, Vanilla Sugar
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet, Woody - Amber
description: Vanilla originated in Mexico, where the Aztecs used it to soften the bitterness of chocolate. There were many European attempts to cultivate the pods outside of its original cradle. Louis XIV fell in love with it and wanted to cultivate it on Bourbon Island, in Reunion. But all attempts under his reign failed. No one knew how to fertilize vanilla outside its native range. Europeans were unaware that the Mexican bee Melipona was responsible for pollination. Indeed, thanks to it, the orchid provides a long, green fruit commonly called a vanilla pod.Gourmet and suave, Melipona is a fragrance that opens elegantly with woody and vanilla notes and gives way to sugared amber notes in the background.

name: Supreme Nectar
notes: Amber, Almond, Almond Blossom, Honey, Creamy Notes, Sandalwood, Musk, Patchouli, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Floral, Gourmand, Sweet, Woody - Amber
description: Supr脙陋me Nectar is a fragrance with almond as its main note. Native to Western Asia, the almond tree has been cultivated for 5,000 years. Between February and March, the buds open and form magnificent white and light pink flowers.While the trees are blooming, honey bees collect pollen and nectar from the orchards. As the bees go from one tree to another, they pollinate the almond flowers along the way. The almond tree is an excellent honey plant, rich in nectar and pollen. Each fertilized flower will give birth to an almond.

name: Untamable
notes: Leather Saddle, Tonka Resin, Saguaro Blossom, Texas Yellowstar, Cumin, Tumbleweed, Paso Fino
style: Animalic, Earthy, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Have you ever had a love so wild that you couldn芒聙聶t hold on? At its core, Untamable is a love story born in the springs, waterfalls, and Indian Paintbrush covered fields of Texas Hill Country. It芒聙聶s a classic western told through the lens of the new west, about the kind of love that stays up late after the honky tonk on Saturday night and is still up early for church on Sunday. It芒聙聶s a story populated by modern day rabble-rousers, bandits, and outlaws芒聙聰a compassionate waitress, an indigenous rodeo star, a bluegrass playboy, a female long-haul trucker, an up-and-coming rap artist, a queer sheriff, mischievous bachelorettes, and German tourists looking for the 芒聙聹real芒聙聺 America芒聙聰all of them with one thing in common: they芒聙聶re each untamable in their own way. When the sun sets on this cautionary tale, it won芒聙聶t be hard to see yourself in each of them.For those who refuse to be tamed, this rugged, spicy, adventurous fragrance is a playful middle finger to run-of-the-mill perfumes. Wear it as a reminder that you play by no one's rules but your own.

name: Story Of Your Life
notes: Citrus Essence, Davana, Benzoin, Laurel, Orange Blossom, Brioche, Rum, Cocoa, Patchouli, Vanilla, Amber Wood, Orcanox
style: Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Warm, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Is mundanity the secret to a life of bliss? It's not necessarily the message we'd expect from the iconoclasts at Etat Libre, but Story Of Your Life, their luminous and lovely new scent, does indeed seem to suggest that it's the regular moments with those who love us that make up the foundational moments of true happiness. Warm, enveloping caramel and benzoin represent waking up in a lover's arms, while buttered bread and fresh orange blossom evoke lazy weekend mornings lingering over breakfast as the sun warms the room. Equally indelible are whirlwind evenings of romance, conversation, food and drink- a dizzying blend of boozy rum, creamy vanilla, and rich, earthy cocoa. And finally, the ordinary yet extraordinary joy of falling back into bed together, with sensual musk standing in for bare skin and warm, ambered woods glowing with the embers of another day spent experiencing the fullness of life and love. Most days of your life aren't going to be a wild adventure- but as Story Of Your Life proves, those are the best days of all.

name: Of True Minds
notes: Amaretto, Nutmeg, Suede, Orris, Benzoin, Golden Patchouli, Labdanum
style: Avant-Garde, Earthy, Floral, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Sweet, Unusual / Unexpected
description: "Let me not to the marriage of true minds/Admit impediments; love is not love/Which alters when it alteration finds,/Or bends with the remover to remove./O no, it is an ever fixed mark, That looks on tempests and is never shaken"Inspired by Shakespeare's Sonnet 116- a sublime testament to the enduring nature of devotion and emotional connection- Of True Minds is an exquisitely deep unisex fragrance with the steadfast and unshakable purity of real love. Sweet amaretto and fiery nutmeg fuse with a perfectly paired heart of buttery suede and rich orris, joined at the base with a glowing golden patchouli and the warm, smoky depth of labdanum resin. A celebration of all devotion, from romance to family to deep, abiding friendship, Of True Minds is another transcendent, ethereal, emotionally resonant piece of olfactory art from Liis.

name: Falcon Leather Extrait
notes: Saffron, Leather, Birch Tar, Cistus Labdanum, Benzoin, Oud Assam Oil
style: Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: When Aur脙漏lien Guichard first conceived of Extrait versions of the most popular entries in the Matiere Premiere collection, he knew that they had to be more than your average flankers. After all, the originals are already known for being built around a generous dosage of a precious natural central ingredient. So for the Extrait Collection, in addition to an increased concentration of both the overall fragrance and a specific increase in the dosage of the main ingredient, each Extrait has been given a bold new twist of a carefully selected new guest ingredient, chosen to work specifically with those characteristics enhanced by the stronger concentration to create something distinctive and unforgettable.Falcon Leather was already an absolute beast of a fragrance- combining the raw power of smoky birch tar oil and fiery saffron with a richly resinous base that accentuated the sheer potency of the fragrance just as much as it smoothed the edges off the pungency of the central accord. In the Extrait, Guichard only pushes that philosophy further, deploying a rare Indian Assam Oud oil that adds a deeper, funkier depth to the sweetly ambery resins, marking Falcon Leather Extrait as the boldest and most masculine of the entire Matiere Premiere collection. Novices should approach with the appropriate amount of respectful caution- but brave lovers of all things smoky, leathery, and oud will find a complexly layered and captivatingly intense fragrance unlike almost any other.

name: Encens Suave Extrait
notes: Coffee, Incense, Magagascar Vanilla, Benzoin, Labdanum, Amber
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Amber
description: When Aur脙漏lien Guichard first conceived of Extrait versions of the most popular entries in the Matiere Premiere collection, he knew that they had to be more than your average flankers. After all, the originals are already known for being built around a generous dosage of a precious natural central ingredient. So for the Extrait Collection, in addition to an increased concentration of both the overall fragrance and a specific increase in the dosage of the main ingredient, each Extrait has been given a bold new twist of a carefully selected new guest ingredient, chosen to work specifically with those characteristics enhanced by the stronger concentration to create something distinctive and unforgettable.Encens Suave was already much more than a standard incense scent, combining an effervescent, delicately smoky frankincense with lush, boozy Magadascan vanilla and warmly sparkling benzoin. But by adding an even richer amber accord, the soft glow of the gourmand drydown becomes a deeply soothing chord of caramelized creaminess, an almost sunset-like symphony of smooth warmth that envelops the wearer in a rapturous aura of comfort and gentle strength. Not quite a church scent, but much more than a straightforward gourmand, Encens Suave Extrait is nothing short of a touch of the divine.

name: Radical Rose Extrait
notes: Rose, Pepper, Saffron, Everlasting Flower, Patchouli, Labdanum
style: Earthy, Floral, Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Spicy, Sweet
description: When Aur脙漏lien Guichard first conceived of Extrait versions of the most popular entries in the Matiere Premiere collection, he knew that they had to be more than your average flankers. After all, the originals are already known for being built around a generous dosage of a precious natural central ingredient. So for the Extrait Collection, in addition to an increased concentration of both the overall fragrance and a specific increase in the dosage of the main ingredient, each Extrait has been given a bold new twist of a carefully selected new guest ingredient, chosen to work specifically with those characteristics enhanced by the stronger concentration to create something distinctive and unforgettable.Radical Rose EDP already stole our hearts by presenting a truly unique Rosa Centifolia oil grown by Guichard himself- a spicy, lush rose note given earthy and romantic complexity with patchouli, spice, and resin. But with a new twist of everlasting flower (immortelle) in the mix, the blend becomes sweeter and brighter than before, the uniquely honeyed and hay-like properties of the yellow flower balancing the darker earthiness of the patchouli and bathing the composition in a stunning golden glow. It's the kind of head-turning, sumptuously romantic rose fragrance only achievable with an almost unbelievable amount of precious natural florals- a gift from Aur脙漏lien Guichard's garden to you.

name: Santal Austral Extrait
notes: Iris, Black Cardamom, Sandalwood, Tonka Bean, Benzoin
style: Earthy, Floral, Fresh, Woody - Fresh
description: When Aur脙漏lien Guichard first conceived of Extrait versions of the most popular entries in the Matiere Premiere collection, he knew that they had to be more than your average flankers. After all, the originals are already known for being built around a generous dosage of a precious natural central ingredient. So for the Extrait Collection, in addition to an increased concentration of both the overall fragrance and a specific increase in the dosage of the main ingredient, each Extrait has been given a bold new twist of a carefully selected new guest ingredient, chosen to work specifically with those characteristics enhanced by the stronger concentration to create something distinctive and unforgettable.For Santal Austral Extrait, already a dynamic contrast between clean, silvery iris, uplifting Australian santalum spiccatum sandalwood, and the smooth, creamy amber base, Guichard adds a fiery specimen of pure black cardamom that makes the uplifting opening notes crackle and adds a warmer, more resinous glow to the amber. To put it another way, it takes an already seriously sexy sandalwood and turns the sensuality up to secret weapon levels with a heavy dose of complex spice. Be careful with this one- it's not like any other sandalwood out there.

name: Crystal Saffron Extrait
notes: Musk Habanolide, Saffron, Ambroxan, Incense, Myrrh Essence
style: Fresh, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy
description: When Aur脙漏lien Guichard first conceived of Extrait versions of the most popular entries in the Matiere Premiere collection, he knew that they had to be more than your average flankers. After all, the originals are already known for being built around a generous dosage of a precious natural central ingredient. So for the Extrait Collection, in addition to an increased concentration of both the overall fragrance and a specific increase in the dosage of the main ingredient, each Extrait has been given a bold new twist of a carefully selected new guest ingredient, chosen to work specifically with those characteristics enhanced by the stronger concentration to create something distinctive and unforgettable.For Crystal Saffron, the spicy complexity of the titular Kozani saffron oil is enhanced with a sweet, resinous myrrh essence that both smooths the dusky leather of the original and deepens the musky amber glow of the drydown for a richer and more refined experience that still retains its wonderfully airy structure. Both modern and timeless, it's a journey spice lovers everywhere owe it to themselves to take.

name: Tryst
notes: Orange Zest, Green Buds, Neroli, Orange Flower, Honeyed Resins
style: Floral - Citrus, Floral - White, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous
description: Remember the drive we took down to the orange grove that spring?How the winding roads carved ribbons into the hillside, and we knew the words to every song on the radio. How the air smelled sweet芒聙聰like honey, like possibility芒聙聰and the sun warmed our skin. How we found a quiet spot to park and kissed under the orange blossoms, and the whole day felt like a secret that was just ours.Later, on the way home, you found a flower in the folds of your coat. How their smell lingered芒聙聰crisp and bright and golden.

name: Absolu
notes: Mandarin, Cardamom, Saffron, Orange Blossom, Incense, Iris, Tonka Bean, Cedar, Gaiac
style: Floral - Spicy, Floral - White, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Experience the essence of luxury with Absolu, the latest creation by Trudon, masterfully crafted by the renowned perfumer Antoine Lie. This exquisite fragrance blends the finest ingredients to evoke a sense of timeless sophistication and modern elegance.Absolu opens with the bright and alluring scent of orange blossom, enveloping you in a fresh and radiant aura. The fragrance then deepens with the rich warmth of saffron, adding a touch of spice that intrigues the senses. Finally, the creamy sweetness of tonka bean emerges, creating a harmonious balance that lingers on the skin, leaving a lasting impression.Antoine Lie, celebrated for his ability to create fragrances that resonate with depth and character, has infused Absolu with a blend that is both complex and captivating. This fragrance is a true testament to Trudon's commitment to luxury and artistry.

name: Saint Honore
notes: Bergamot, Pepper, Hazelnut, Orange Flower, Milk, Vanilla, Sandalwood, Musk, Dry Amber
style: Creamy, Fresh - Citrus, Gourmand, Sweet, Woody - Amber
description: A captivating perfume inspired by the delicacy and sophistication of the famous French pastry, Saint-Honor脙漏 is an invitation to happiness. With its refreshing character, the perfume is unveiled by bergamot opening like a sunrise on a garden of citrus trees 芒聙聯 a citrus note skillfully enhanced by a spicy touch of pepper. A symbol of purity and beauty, orange blossom brings a floral sweetness transporting us to the heart of a flowering orchard. Hazelnut, with its warm roundness and a milky chord, recalls childhood memories of freshly made pastries. The lingering trail of the perfume is a deep, rich balance in which musk pairs with vanilla to offer a creamy, enveloping texture. With its bittersweet nuances, the tonka bean adds a fascinating complexity and a last hint of sweetness.Saint-Honor脙漏 is an olfactory experience inviting you on a unique sensory journey blending nostalgia, modernity, and indulgence.

name: Macaron Bourbon
notes: Bitter Almond, Davana, Rum, Rose, Cinnamon, Clove, Caramel, Patchouli, Tonka Bean, Vanilla, Musk
style: Creamy, Floral, Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet
description: Macaron Bourbon is an exquisite, fragrant creation, an ode to sensuality and sophistication. From the very beginning, it seduces you with a gourmand note of bitter almond with a sweet rum facet, softened by caramel, whose smooth, comforting sweetness creates a veil of delight on the skin. Cinnamon and clove intertwine, offering a spicy warmth reminiscent of spellbinding aromas of pastry coming out of the oven. Davana, its nuances both sweet and slightly tart, adds a fruity and high-quality aspect. Macaron Bourbon also reveals an intoxicating mix of patchouli, vanilla and tonka beans, creating an addictive velvety feel. This smooth, powerful combination is enhanced by the subtle presence of rose which adds an elegant, refined floral touch, perfectly balancing the indulgent, sweet notes.Macaron Bourbon is a tribute to the art of pastry-making and the sophistication of perfumery, evoking an irresistible elegance and a guilty pleasure.

name: Pavlova
notes: Pineapple, Passionfruit, Rum, Peach, Coconut, Raspberry, Cedar, Sandalwood, Vanilla, Musk
style: Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: A daring, innovative scent inspired by the lightness and delicacy of the famous dessert of the same name, Pavlova is a celebration of sweetness and freshness, evoking the grace of a dance between sweet and sour flavours. Pavlova芒聙聶s theatrical opening is an invitation to discover the tangy gourmet notes of sparkling pineapple, passion fruit and coconut, creating an unapologetic sense of the exotic. There is also a raspberry note whose rich, fruity nuances have a surprising depth. This sweet and slightly bitter red berry adds a fascinating intricacy, balancing the lightness of other fruity notes such as peach. Pavlova is a fragrance enhanced by a combination of woody notes like cedar and sandalwood, a reassuring contrast to the light, fruity notes. Vanilla and musk harmoniously entwine to sign this original composition recalling the airy, melting meringue of the Pavlova.A sparkling sensory experience evoking joy, youth and freedom, Pavlova is a nod to the limitless creativity of perfumery.

name: Palatine
notes: Mandarin, Bergamot, Pear, Violet Petal, Lavandin, Musk, Sandalwood, Vanilla
style: Floral, Floral - White, Powdery / Soft
description: Palatine is an audacious feminine scent that will revolutionize the way you smell violet petal. Sophisticated yet playful, delicate yet radiant, this tribute to the legendary 18th century royal pays tribute to her legacy as the "Grandmother of Europe" by presenting a fragrance that embraces a traditional ingredient- violet- and turns it into something dynamic, invigorating, and modern.Palatine revolves around a modern floral bouquet enhanced with fresh, fruity and powdery notes. An opening of mandarin, bergamot and pear lead to a daring, contemporary violet petal. For a velvety sensation, the overall fragrance settles on beguiling musk and creamy sandalwood accord.

name: Love Me Latte
notes: Baked Pears, Caramelized Figs, White Sweet Cherries, Coconut Milk, Golden Caramel, Roasted Coffee Beans, Ambrette, Creamy Milk, Vanilla Caviar, Brown Sugar, Champaca, Lily Of The Valley, Amber, Madagascar Vanilla, Tonka Beans, Sandalwood, White Cedar, Gaiac, Musk
style: Creamy, Floral - White, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet, Warm, Woody - Light
description: Wondering why we haven't heard from Narcotica in a while? Although the new Golden Age of Gourmands has roared on even through the summer heat, the French maestros that delivered such mouthwatering cult classics as Dulce Diablo and Happy Dust has been uncharacteristically quiet in 2024. As it turns out, they've been working tirelessly on a single, unforgettable new gourmand release that we're expecting to be one of the biggest hits of a year full of gems: introducing Love Me Latte, a heavenly aphrodisiac that combines a few of our favorite gourmand elements: sweet, caramelized fruits, rich, luscious vanilla, and a steaming cup of freshly brewed coffee. Sumptuous, joyful, and deeply evocative, Love Me Latte is everything we love in a gourmand, blended with a deft touch and a smooth flourish of musks for a comforting, long-lasting romantic drydown. They say great things take time- we're delighted to report that Love Me Latte is worth the wait.

name: Glow
notes: Pink Pepper, Rose, Incense, Benjoin, Vanilla
style: Warm, Woody - Amber, Woody Ambery Floral
description: GLOW is Akro's addictive party fragrance. One of the reasons we go to parties is the chance to be noticed, admired, or possibly seduced. At their best, parties allow us to become movie stars for the night, bringing people into our orbit and watching them gaze adoringly at us. To attract people, you need to dress beautifully and style your hair perfectly, but the truth is, nothing pulls others towards you like the power of scent.Glow is a fragrance formed by our love for parties and nights out.
