It芒聙聶s a warm, sensual perfume that will make you the star of any room. A quick spray on your skin and you芒聙聶ll be brimming with confidence, ready to own the night, ready to glow

name: Black Lacquer
notes: Black Lacquer Accord, Makassar Ebony Wood, Dark Peony Accord
description: Black Lacquer shines with two exclusive innovations in modern perfumery: an incandescent black lacquer accord that captures a smoky, dimensional opulence, and a Makassar ebony wood note that evokes aspects of leather and birch. Beneath the glossy surface blooms the irrepressible mystery of a dark peony accord.

name: The Hedonist Extrait
notes: Bergamot, Ginger, Grapefruit, Cedar, Akigalawood, Lychee, Vetiver, Tonka Bean, Ambery Woods, Patchouli
description: Bold, fresh, and undeniably head-turning, The Hedonist instantly became a favorite Ex Nihilo on its release- a versatile and sexy burst of citrus and woods with an invigorating signature ginger note. For its induction into Ex Nihilo's new Quintessence collection of extraits, Jordi Fernandez has reinvented his already-iconic creation to take full advantage of its luxurious new concentration. By adding a mouthwatering twist of ripe, juicy grapefruit and lychee, and enhancing the richness of the amber and woods base, The Hedonist Extrait creates an unforgettable sillage that both dazzles with its thrilling opening and captivates with a long-lasting, richly sensual drydown. Already a classic, The Hedonist Extrait takes this effortlessly sexy bestseller to all new heights.

name: Fleur Narcotique Extrait
notes: Bergamot, Lychee, Osmanthus, Jasmine, Freesia, Peony, Orange Blossom, Sandalwood, Moss, Musks
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Fresh
description: Fleur Narcotique, the iconic creation by French perfumer Quentin Bisch, re-invents itself through a quintessential essence. This extrait de parfum expresses the most sophisticated and intensely romantic version of this beloved scent. To make it even more uniquely captivating, Ex Nihilo intensified the hypnotic heart of floral notes with a gorgeous fresh peony and adorned it with an overdose of smooth floral musks for an everlasting effect on the skin.

name: 40 Knots Body Spray Deodorant
description: A new way to experience the bold and refreshing aquatic fragrance of 40 Knots. Created with a combination of essential oils and pure essence in the base, this natural spray deodorant contains no aerosol, which allows the fragrance to linger for longer with no irritation to even the most sensitive skin. And with all packaging created from recycled and recyclable materials, it's as good for the planet as it is for your body. What's not to love?

name: Erba Pura Body Spray Deodorant
notes: Orange And Lemon From Sicily, Calabrian Bergamot, Mediterranean Fruits, Amber And Vanilla Beans From Madagascar, White Musk
description: A new way to experience the iconic and beloved mouthwatering fruity amber of Erba Pura. Created with a combination of essential oils and pure essence in the base, this natural spray deodorant contains no aerosol, which allows the fragrance to linger for longer with no irritation to even the most sensitive skin. And with all packaging created from recycled and recyclable materials, it's as good for the planet as it is for your body. What's not to love?

name: Levar Del Sole
notes: Rose, Lemon, Orange, Bergamot, Apple, Green Notes, Cardamom, Violet, Jasmine, Lily, Patchouli, Musk, Oakmoss, Tonka Bean, Caramel, Benzoin
style: Floral, Floral - Citrus, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: Levar del Sole poeticises on the skin. Literally translated as 芒聙聹rising of the sun芒聙聺, Levar del Sole is the perfume inspired by the immortal phoenix. A symbol of renewal, whose scent breathes new life onto the person it is sprayed upon in a baptism of new beginnings.Opening to fresh citrus nuances and the nurturing aura of delicate rose, these hand-picked roses were chosen especially for Levar del Sole from India芒聙聶s perfume capital, Kannauj. With cardamom, violet and lily at the heart, Levar del Sole eau de parfum breathes prosperity.New beginnings unfold and transformations are made, as the senses lean into the deliciously comforting blend of musk, Tonka bean and caramel at the base.

name: Centaurus
notes: Pepper, Cinnamon, Cardamom, Tobacco, Sandalwood, Heliotrope, Jasmine, Patchouli Benzoin, Ambroxan, Vanilla
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Amber, Woody - Spicy
description: Awaken your senses with Centaurus, the new celestial-inspired fragrance by The House of Creed. Drawing inspiration from the expansive constellation dominating the night sky, Centaurus captures the untamed energy and brilliant luminosity of the cosmos. Warm spices, bourbon vanilla from Madagascar, robust tobacco, and authentic Nepalese sandalwood provide a deep, sensual glow in a powerful and charismatic reinterpretation of an iconic amber fragrance.

name: Delphinus
notes: Black Pepper, Pink Pepper, Incense, Almond, Heliotrope, Orchid, Orris Concrete, Patchouli, Orcanox, Leather, Vanilla
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Warm
description: Experience the cosmic journey with Delphinus, a captivating new fragrance crafted by The House of Creed. Inspired by the mythical constellation that guided adventurers artists, and dreamers and featuring luxuriously sourced central notes of pure orris concrete and bourbon vanilla from Madagascar, Delphinus captures the essence of celestial beauty with its golden embrace of amber.

name: Beat Cafe
notes: Black Pepper, Coriander, Cognac, Labdanum, Black Leather, Tobacco, Vetiver, Cedar, Benzoin
style: Boozy, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Amber, Woody - Spicy
description: Smoke lingers in the air, filled with scents of cognac and leather couches. Beat Generation芒聙聶s rebellious soul permeates the caf脙漏. People stand up for their ideals in here, drawing a better future. A warm voice moves the heart and prays for freedom, accompanied by shrill notes of harmonica.A hint of poetry defines the Beat Caf脙篓 fragrance, gently evoking folk rhythms and youth protests. An olfactory melody as warm and sophisticated as Bob Dylan芒聙聶s music, drenched with Beat Generation芒聙聶s provocative spirit. The fragrance, composed by master perfumer Dominique Ropion, exudes the fervor of these iconic places 芒聙聯 the caf脙漏s, a symbol of this generation. The scent plays with cognac, tobacco and leather notes, all enlivened by a spicy touch of black pepper and coriander; in the dry down, the composition is wrapped in deep notes of Vetiver and Cedarwood. Beat Caf脙漏 is a polyhedric and multi-faceted scent that evokes the depth of an overwhelming cultural revolution.

name: Good Morning
notes: Tangerine, Sea Breeze, Magnolia, Violet Leaf, Cashmeran, Cold Musk
style: Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean, Salty / Oceanic, Woody - Fresh
description: The dawn announces the new day. The sun芒聙聶s rays brush the mountain peaks, endowing them with an unbelievable allure. Intimate emotion surrenders to the creation revealed by the rising sun. Yet the chiaroscuro of the soul awaits in contemplation. Then comes the light.Good Morning celebrates the emotion of a revelation. The wonder of Nature as it awakens is reflected in the top notes of tangerine and sea breeze, creating a mood that conveys a desire for peace and balance. Good Morning is a greeting of the new day, an emotional score in which the heart notes of magnolia and LMR Egyptian violet leaf absolute are the perfect melody for the base chords of cashmeran and cold musk. The eau de parfum is an accord between the canon of the art of perfumery and a contemporary and innovative technique, a structured olfactory intrigue with great persistence. Good Morning is a protected place, where you can breathe in a nourishing and regenerative warmth. A dreamlike atmosphere that placates daily tensions and induces restorative sleep.

name: Siren & Sailors
notes: Bergamot, Peach, Osmanthus, Rose, Rum, Whiskey, Patchouli, Vanilla, Suede, Musk
style: Boozy, Earthy, Floral, Powdery / Soft, Smoky
description: A tiny club in Camden Town. Amy Winehouse芒聙聶s sweet and husky voice enchants even the hardest souls, unveiling the fragility, the strength and the contradictions of a woman and her neighborhood.Siren & Sailors芒聙聶 warm and sensual notes go straight to the heart, like the melody of a mermaid. Powerful and contrasting nuances resound like Amy Winehouse芒聙聶s husky voice among Camden Town canals. Rose Essential LMR and osmanthus notes convey her most innocent and frivolous side, while the intense heart of rum absolute and whiskey accord evoke her strong vocality and her tendency toward unruliness. The sensual vanilla and musk dry-down lingersin our memory, like the greatness of a woman who, showing herself as audacious - and fragile at the same time- left a permanent mark on music history. An enchanting composition from master perfumer Julien Rasquinet that pays homage to a sublime voice, to a rebellious soul and to the eccentric and contradictory spirit of the Camden Town neighborhood in London.

name: Feel 'n' Chill
notes: Bergamot, Watermelon, Coconut Water, Fig Leaves, Vetiver, Musks
style: Avant-Garde, Fresh, Fresh - Clean, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous
description: Caf脙漏 del Mar, San Antonio Ibiza. Sipping a mojito while the sun is going down, a DJ is playing and thoughts are melting into the peace of a western dusk. Music soundtracks the emotion of the moment and gives life to memories. A reggae groove brings body and mind into the same rhythm and reinforced by the pulsing downbeat creates an evanescent, impalpable atmosphere. A gentle breeze brings the memory of distant blues; the unbearable lightness of being.Feel 芒聙聵n芒聙聶 Chill plays reggae, downbeat and acid jazz together with classical music and blues. Master perfumer Dominique Ropion creates a scented playlist which perfectly embodies a mood. A summer breeze of sour but fresh Bergamot notes meets sweet hints of watermelon. In the heart, body and soul melts into a reggae sensation of coconut water and fig leaves notes. Vetiver, with its blues notes, vibrates like a cello, creating the base rhythm of this soul-cocooning melody. In the final compilation, classical notes of musk invite us to surrender to our feelings; inner peace.

name: Cheeky Smile
notes: Iso-E Super, Ambrocenide, Ambroxan, Ambercore, Cashmeran, Amber Extreme
style: Avant-Garde, Woody - Amber
description: Music is religion. Acid House is a cult. The second season of Summer of Love opens in London temples Shoom and Future. DJs are the spiritual guides of this cultural movement, a youth revolution that is consecrated during musical liturgies that are synthesized and reproduced on a TB-303 base. House music芒聙聶s rituals take place in spots chosen by its disciples, the young. The Word: everlasting fun.Hypnotic, synthetic and acid sounds, such as those reproduced and synthesized by the most exclusive British clubs芒聙聶 consoles, resonate on repeat in Cheeky Smile fragrance. It is a tribute to Acid House, which finds its absolute Dogma in synthesizing. A new, musical dimension where rhythmics takes over melody. The perfumer Dominique Moellhausen created a molecular cocktail of pure joy in order to convey this expressive purism into olfactory notes: an olfactory rhythm that leads to an abstract dimension where ultra-modern notes of Iso E Super, Ambercore and Amber Extreme blends with Cashmeran. Olfactory avant-garde.

name: Carioca Heart
notes: Lemon Primofiore, Pineapple, Mango, Peony, Rum, Sandalwood, Vanilla, Labdanum, Operanide, Ambroxan
style: Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Spicy
description: The nights vibrate with a warm, intimate rhythm in the legendary clubs of Beco das Garrafas where a new musical revolution takes shape and animates every alley in Copacabana. It is the birth of the Bossa Nova. Not just new harmonies but an attitude, a way of being, in which melancholy is beauty and life.An iconic melody that begins with sparkling, sunny notes of primofiore lemon oil that combine with the tropical accents of pineapple and mango accord. The olfactive sound of peony in the heart reveals its romantic soul in an unexpected and intense combination with sandalwood and rum absolute. A deep, enveloping song of vanilla rises in the background with an elegant jazz of labdanum, operanide and ambroxan. An eclectic composition by master perfumer Julien Rasquinet that pays tribute to the joy of life and the freedom to be oneself.

name: Oud Stallion
notes: Cardamom, Saffron, Nutmeg, Rose, Geranium, Osmanthus, Tonka Bean, Leather, Oud
style: Animalic, Floral - Spicy, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Dark
description: Oud Stallion was inspired by personal memories of Thibaud Crivelli, during which he smelled oud wood while attending horse races. From the grandstands, you can feel that the horses and the jockeys are in perfect symbiosis, and you are captivated by the energy and excitement of the crowd - which is unlike anything else. Maison Crivelli was created with the aim of surprising people with mixed, daring olfactory creations that defy conventions & stand out from the classics. The unexpected contrast here is the smoky leather contrasting with the depth of oud wood.

name: Lust Oud Delice
notes: Dark Chocolate, Hazelnut, Walnut, Orris Concrete, Benzoin Resin, Cypriol Heart, Oud, Sandalwood, Musks
style: Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet, Woody - Dark
description: Lust Oud Delice evokes the deepest realms of sensuality and desire. The intoxicating allure of mouthwatering dark chocolate, hazelnut, and walnut mirrors the magnetic pull between two souls craving one another.In the heart, a rich and luxurious orris concrete, sensual and mysterious benzoin resin, and complex, earthy cypriol weave a tapestry of sophistication and passion. The base notes of regal oud Assafi, creamy sandalwood, and sensual musks lingers, creating an indelible trail, like the lingering touch of a lover. Lust captures the essence of deep, carnal desire芒聙聰an olfactory masterpiece that resonates with the profound connection between two hearts.

name: Oud Malinau
notes: Mimosa, Cardamom, Raspberry, Beeswax, Cinnamon, Oud Malinau, Benzoin, Black Pepper, Pink Pepper, Vanilla, Oakmoss
style: Creamy, Floral - Spicy, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Oud Malinau is crafted using wild agarwood from the island of Malinau in Indonesia. This wood is not plantation-grown but sourced from the wild, making it rare and special. The Indonesian oud aroma is distinct from its counterparts from other parts of Southeast Asia. The oil used in this perfume is distilled from wild agarwood trees, which are gradually disappearing. In the coming years, sourcing such wood will become impossible, so Bortnikoff is stockpiling it to continue creating this unique scent.The perfume also includes a vanilla tincture instead of pure alcohol. Vanilla pods from Papua New Guinea and Madagascar, infused in alcohol and filtered, give the perfume a multi-layered aroma different from artificial vanillin. The oud and vanilla from the same region create a harmonious blend. The result is a rich and intriguing scent combining oud, oakmoss, and vanilla, with a unique character impossible to find in any other fragrance.

name: Oud Kinam
notes: Bergamot, Bitter Orange, Afghanistan Rose, Madagascar Vanilla, Papua New Guinea Vanilla, Ethiopian Coffee, Oud Kinam, Oud Zozan, Oud Khao Yai
style: Woody - Dark
description: This perfume is created using two unique components: Afghan rose and Oud Kinam Oil.The Afghan rose is grown on former opium poppy fields through an international drug eradication program. Farmers were trained to cultivate roses and extract oil from them. The special soils and climate of Afghanistan give this rose a unique scent that differs from traditional rose fragrances. It is a modern and unexpected aroma. Kinam oil is a variety of agarwood that is cultivated in China. Unlike regular agarwood, kinam contains oil throughout its trunk without needing any damage. Kinam oil has been used in traditional Chinese medicine and is valued for its unique properties. The combination of Afghan rose and kinam oil creates an unparalleled fragrance that gives the perfume a modern and elegant character.

name: Knight Of Love
notes: Bergamot, Cardamom, Juniper, Rose, Violet, Magnolia, Sandalwood, Amber, Leather, Vanilla, Tobacco, Moss
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Knight of Love takes you on a journey of discovery. The bright and optimistic opening dances with excitable yet sophisticated citrus tones. Leading to a heart of heady euphoric rose that stir the senses, before a soothing and altogether seductive dry down leaves you aching for more.

name: Cuir 404
notes: Citrus Accord, Clove, Bergamot, Cardamon, Leather Accord, Pink Pepper, Suede, Cedar, Vetiver
style: Woody - Spicy
description: Cuir 404 is a reimagined version of the classic fragrance R脙陋ve en Cuir.This scent offers a fresh, modern interpretation of leather, with an airy lightness that sets it apart. It opens with lively, citrusy notes gradually revealing hints of leather emerging within a subtle spicy and woody cloud. As the fragrance evolves, it sparks curiosity, inviting contemplation on whether its leather will be revealed over time.

name: Oud Hindi
notes: Amber, Pink Lotus, Orange Blossom, Sour Cherry, Indonesian Vanilla, Gaiac Wood, Oud Hindi (40 Years Old), Cedarwood
style: Fruity, Sweet, Woody - Amber
description: This perfume is based on Indian agarwood, known as Hindi. It uses oil distilled more than 20 years ago, giving the fragrance a special depth and richness. A unique cherry note blends harmoniously with the bright, woodsy oud, presenting a memorable sweet and sour contrast.

name: Riders
notes: Grass, Peach, Bergamot, Lily Of The Valley, Hay, Leather, Metal Tack, Vetiver, Amber, Musk, Fir, Tobacco
style: Green / Herbaceous, Smoky, Spicy, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Horses. Leather warmed at a canter, verdant green in the air. You work up a sweat as you press the stallion harder, breathing in unison. Then the reward of a sun-ripened peach, hoofs crunching the sea of wild lily of the valley beneath the tree. Never far from an illicit tryst in the stables on a bed of hay.Courage is not being unafraid of being thrown. It芒聙聶s getting straight back in the saddle when you are.

name: Incense Crush
notes: Clove, Cardamom, Leather, Creamy Accord, Olibanum, Cedarwood, Oakwood, Vetiver
style: Smoky
description: Oak and cedar light the embers of our days, cardamom, saffron and cloves add even more spice to our evenings. Incense Crush is a fragrance extract that opens the chakras, reveals our power of seduction and inexplicably draws others to us.Each D'ORSAY perfume extract is a powerful love potion, designed by a legendary perfumer around a precious raw material in overdose to seduce, enthrall, and leave you wanting more. Concentrated over 30%, these addictive essences reveal their intensity from the very first notes and make hearts beat faster with their potent projection and tenacious longevity.

name: Flower Lust
notes: Pink Pepper, Black Pepper, Orange Blossom Accord, Ylang, Sandalwood, Tonka Bean, Benzoin Resinoid, Patchouli, Vetiver
style: Floral
description: Here we love excess, we take the right measure of luxury. Red pepper and black pepper intoxicate the air, while thick sandalwood ignites ylang-ylang and orange blossom in this perfume extract, this Flower Lust, powerful and ambery, which explodes with voluptuousness all day long.Each D'ORSAY perfume extract is a powerful love potion, designed by a legendary perfumer around a precious raw material in overdose to seduce, enthrall, and leave you wanting more. Concentrated over 30%, these addictive essences reveal their intensity from the very first notes and make hearts beat faster with their potent projection and tenacious longevity.

name: Tonka Hysteria
notes: Mandarin, Pink Pepper, Olibanum, Cinnamon, Orris Butter, Orris Resin, Myrrh, Benzoin, Vanilla Madagascar, Tonka Bean Absolute, Caramel Accord, Cistus, Cedarwood, Musk, Georgywood, Akigalawood, Ambrofix, Moxalone
description: Mandarin and pink berries light the first fuse. Iris Pallida and Tonka Bean open the breach. This perfume extract captures the hidden weave of our attraction. Follow me until the day you flee me, but the memory of Tonka Hysteria will remain...Each D'ORSAY perfume extract is a powerful love potion, designed by a legendary perfumer around a precious raw material in overdose to seduce, enthrall, and leave you wanting more. Concentrated over 30%, these addictive essences reveal their intensity from the very first notes and make hearts beat faster with their potent projection and tenacious longevity.

name: Naked Laundry
notes: Mandarin, Aldehyde, Ambrinol, Skatole, Mimosa Absolute, White Caramel, Honey, Zafryl, Tonka Bean Absolute, Tonkitone, Sensual Milk, Ambery Woods
description: STARTS CLEAN, FINISHES DIRTY. STARTS INNOCENT, ENDS SINFUL.From freshly washed linens to the steamy heat of bodies entwined in them芒聙聰pure at first, then descending into the unmistakable warmth of sweaty skin.Naked Laundry opens with the crisp, airy scent of mandarin and aldehydes芒聙聰freshly laundered sheets, clean and innocent. But beneath the surface, things are about to heat up. Ambrinol and skatole bring an animalic, sweaty undertone, hinting at bodies pressed together, tangled in those once-pristine sheets. Mimosa and white caramel add an irresistible sweetness, but it芒聙聶s the honeyed warmth and musk that turn this into a dirty, unapologetic embrace.As the fragrance dries down, tonka bean and ambery woods merge with sensual milk, creating a lingering warmth that feels like the memory of skin-on-skin, sweat-soaked and utterly shameless. The scent starts fresh but finishes in full, heated dirtiness.

name: Filthy Musk
notes: Pineapple, Honey, Animalic Musk, Patchouli, Nutmeg, Jasmin Absolute, Vanilla, Caramel, Ambroxan, Grey Amber, Tonka Absolute, Rhum Extract, Civet
description: A PRIMAL MUSK, UNLEASHED. ENTER AT YOUR OWN RISK.Forget clean, polite, and innocent. This is musk in its purest form芒聙聰raw, untamed, and unapologetic. It芒聙聶s the musk of skin-on-skin, heated by the night, clinging to the sheets long after the lovers have vanished.A sweet tease of pineapple and honey opens the fragrance, but don芒聙聶t let it fool you芒聙聰this is just the calm before the storm. Enter musk芒聙聰raw, carnal, and primal. Nutmeg芒聙聶s warmth and patchouli芒聙聶s earthy richness push the scent into the untamed wild. Jasmine flirts with spice, amplifying the intoxicatingly dirty allure. Then comes vanilla and caramel, but not the soft, innocent kind. This is a dark, seductive sweetness, entangled with the musk芒聙聶s raw energy. A sexual growl of civet laces the base, while amber and tonka bean leave a trail that lingers long after you芒聙聵ve left the room. The final impression? Dirty, Dirty, and Dirty. This is musk at its most primal state.

name: L'Animal
notes: Rum, Nutmeg Oil, Almond Paste, Suede, Heliotrope, Mugane, Gaiacwood Oil, Dirty Honey, Sandalwood, Erotic Vanilla
description: UNLEASH YOUR PRIMAL INSTINCTS. EMBRACE THE WILD.L芒聙聶animal is an olfactory journey that captures the essence of human desire and the untamed wilderness, bottled in a provocative yet refined blend.The fragrance opens with the warmth of rich rum, unfolding on the skin like a lover芒聙聶s caress. Spicy nutmeg adds intrigue, while creamy almond offers a soft, comforting embrace. The heart reveals layers of velvety suede paired with the seductive allure of heliotrope, while Mugane adds a fresh, verdant touch. The base erupts into a sensual display of earthy gaiac wood, creamy sandalwood, and a touch of decadent honey, leaving a lingering trail of erotic vanilla. L芒聙聶animal invites you to unleash your inner beast, a reminder that at our core, we are all animals inside.

name: Bois de Santal
notes: Cardamom, Orris Butter, Violet, Vanilla, Cashmere Woods, Olibanum, Sandalwood
style: Floral, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: A celebration of the rich note of sandalwood, Bois de Santal is an artful composition where sandalwood's rich and woody depth meets the subtle spice of cardamom and the warm sweetness of vanilla.This central note of sandalwood is a golden thread seamlessly interwoven with the sensual allure of cardamom, creating a lightly spiced composition that whispers luxury. The heart of the fragrance continues with supple cashmere woods lending a soft, velvety quality, while violet and orris emphasize the powdery edge of sandalwood.As the fragrance settles on the skin, notes of olibanum and vanilla envelop the wearer to produce a subtle warmth, a serene endnote to a fragrance that is both tranquil and tantalizing. Bois de Santal is an experience of understated luxury, an homage to the refined and the sophisticated.

name: Guava Sorbet
notes: Guava, Passionfruit, Bergamot, Mandarin, Grapefruit, Sugar Crystals, Osmanthus, White Jasmine, Vanilla, Sandalwood, Dry Amber, Musk
style: Creamy, Floral - Fruity, Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy
description: An homage to the joy of life, designed for the sophisticated yet playful at heart. Guava Sorbet opens with the lush, vibrant notes of mandarins, fresh guava and juicy tart passionfruit. As the fragrance dries down, notes of sugar crystals, peachy osmanthus and white jasmine mix with the ever present note of tropical, juicy guava. The fragrance is a refreshing, almost effervescent blend that tells a story of leisurely days spent under the sun... perfect for those who want their fragrances to be both refined and a bit whimsical.

name: Genesis
notes: Saffron, Cassis, Rose, Javanol, Sandalwood, Tobacco, Kashmir Fusion
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Perfect for anything from a signature scent to a special occasion, Genesis was made for making a memorable impression. On the opening, saffron lends an airy sweetness and a hint of spice while cassis and rose provide a lush freshness. Javanol, a molecular component reminiscent of a creamy sandalwood and rose, creates a powerful sillage. Natural sandalwood and a warm tobacco ground the fragrance, adding depth and richness. Kashmir Fusion utilizes a complex molecular distillation process and rounds out the fragrance with a sensual, velvety silhouette.

name: Guidance 46
notes: Pear, Frankincense, Hazelnut, Rose Water, Pink Pepper, Bitter Almond, Saffron, Rose, Jasmine, Osmanthus, Cistus, Sandalwood, Akigalawood, Ambergris, Vanilla, Ambrette, Georgywood, Cypriol
description: Enthralling and beguiling, Guidance 46 is a study in light and shade, fragility and strength, subtlety and luxury- paradoxes resolved in the beautiful balance of this exceptional extrait.Guidance 46 reinterprets the Amouage triad of Rose, Frankincense, and Ambergris, while introducing new elements such as Pear, Hazelnut, and Sandalwood. The scent is designed to heighten contrasts and reveal more of the mysteries at the heart of the Guidance story.

name: La Tarte Tatin
notes: Brown Sugar With Salt, Vanilla Beans, Red Apple, Tonka, Caramel, Vanilla Powder
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: La Tarte Tatin is more than just a perfume; it's a sensorial journey that celebrates the rich tapestry of flavors found in this beloved dessert. Whether you're drawn to its sweet and comforting allure or intrigued by its gourmand complexity, this fragrance invites you to savor every moment of its deliciously aromatic composition.

name: Mystic Bliss
notes: Mint, Fig, Cassis, Kunzea, Cedar, Incense, Orris
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: Perfumer Florian Gallo took brand creator Dmitri Weber芒聙聶s inspiration of Flinders Island and the kunzea bushes that grow there to create a unisex fragrance that evokes the Aurora Australis, which can be viewed from Flinders Island.This cooling, sparkling scent has top notes of mint, fig, and cassis. The aromatic kunzea is at the heart of the fragrance, resting upon a base of cedar, incense, and orris. The resulting fragrance evokes the splendor and calming nature of the Tasmanian starry night.

name: Ylop
notes: Roasted Apricot, Tea, Apple, Rosemary, Almond, Osmanthus, Black Sesame, Vetiver, Black Vanilla
style: Fruity, Gourmand, Woody - Fresh
description: Ylop is a fragrance imagined through touch: it caresses the skin and overwhelms our senses with its playful romanticism. Playing on the echoes between the velvety sweetness of an apricot and the sensuality of fresh, clean skin, this textured perfume wears like a prismatic vision of our most romantic fantasies.

name: Mirage Gourmand
notes: Almond Cake, Pistachio, Hazelnut, Tonka, Vanilla, White Musk, Woods
description: Take flight on an enchanting journey reminiscent of the gourmand notes of your childhood, creating a delicious and prestigious olfactory experience to elevate your presence with Mirage Gourmand.Much more than a fragrance 芒聙聯 it芒聙聶s an invitation to unforgettable sensory discovery. This exquisite fragrance will immerse you in the scents of fine patisserie, particularly that of almond financier. Designed for the most demanding connoisseurs, Mirage Gourmand embodies the spirit of Les Nobles Essences: luxury, gourmandise and originality.

name: Fragrance Discovery Set
description: Discover the fresh, joyful, unique compositions of Le Jardin Retrouve with this exclusive discovery set collecting 2ml mini sprays of the following scents:Violette Kew, Osmanthe Lin Yuan, Mousse Arashiyama, Verveine d'Ete, and Citron Boboli.The samples are presented in a unique pouch from Arlette Gutsatz's personal fabric collection. (Each pouch may vary in color and pattern)

name: Osmanthe Liu Yuan
notes: Mandarin, Blackcurrant, Green Notes, Osmanthus, Jasmine, Iris, Peach, Apricot, Patchouli, Leather, Musk
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Floral - Light, Fresh - Citrus
description: You stroll along the galleries of this millenium garden, savouring the different landscapes that reveal themselves to you as you move forward. You approach the water and encounter upright rocks with evocative shapes. On one of them stands a precious bottle. When you open it, a scent escapes. Its notes of osmanthus, peach, leather, jasmine and iris fill your heart with memories and stir your imagination Life here takes on its true meaning.Osmanthe Liu Yuan (O.L.Y.) is a gender free eau de parfum brought to fruition by perfumer Maxence Moutte and inspired by his Provencal childhood. With sparkling citrus top notes, a floral heart of osmanthus, jasmine and iris and basenotes nuanced with leather, apricots and gentle musks, Osmanthe Liu Yuan is a ray of sunshine, bottled.

name: Mousse Arashiyama
notes: Bergamot, Frankincense, Lentisque, Aquatic Notes, Fig Accord, Oakmoss, Vetiver, Cedar
style: Earthy, Fresh - Aquatic, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: You walk in this forest as in a sacred place. Cradled by the softness of the moss, your steps obey an old instinct, a deep intuition. At the bend of the trail, your eyes finally meet this powerful tree you know, but whose name you do not remember. Your soul, freed from gravity, subtly separates itself from the ground and lingers to savor the scents of oak moss, patchouli, lentiscus and frankincense.Mousse Arashiyama is a genderless Eau de Parfum inviting to contemplation, serenity and spirituality. In this creation, Maxence Moutte gives us his poetic vision of the mossy undergrowth of a Japanese bamboo grove, with green notes of lentisk, fleshy figs and dew pearls. From a temple escape volutes of incense and sacred woods sublimated by the freshness of bergamot.

name: Violette Kew
notes: Violet, Cardamom, Violet Leaf, Cumin, Sandalwood
style: Floral - Light, Floral - Spicy, Powdery / Soft, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: In the diamond-like greenhouse, the protected nature reflects your serene mood. As you make your way through the sun-drenched gardens, you discover a pair of elegant gloves at eye level. When you smell them, the scent of violets is revealed. Like a second skin, mysterious accords of cumin, sandalwood and cardamom envelop you in their sweetness. The caress of the air smells like rediscovered childhood.Violette Kew is a mysterious Eau de Parfum. Seemingly innocent, pure and delicate, it quickly reveals itself to be very carnal, milky, almost pheromonal, "on the skin". It is a unisex fragrance that will be perfect from dusk onwards, spreading its powerful charm throughout the evening. It will take you in the footsteps of the refined visitors to Kew Gardens, with their velvet clothes, polished manner and hidden but intense emotions. Violette Kew has a light, gourmand, sparkling quality that brings back memories of childhood through its top notes of Violet and Cardamom, its heart of Violet and Violet Leaves, while the base notes of Sandalwood and Cumin give it its mysterious, endearing depth.

name: Neroli Botanica
notes: Turmeric, Ginger, Pink Pepper, Black Pepper, Neroli, Jasmine, Orange Blossom, Vetiver, Sandalwood
style: Floral - Spicy, Floral - White, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Essential Parfums has become an instant legend in the world of niche fragrance for delivering dynamic, artistic, alluring fragrances that feature impressively high-quality and eco-friendly materials at an unbeatable value. And for their 10th creation, they invited master perfumer Anne Flipo to create a new take on one of the most iconic flowers of perfumery: orange blossom. And what a take it is- inspired by the thousand subtle nuances of orange blossom, Neroli Botanica is a thrillingly androgynous floral perfume, spicy, vibrant, and full ofjoie de vivre.From the first spray, Neroli Botanica bursts off the skin with fiery notes of curcuma leaf & ginger, which crackle alongside an electrically studded duo of pink and black pepper. Gloriously enhanced with neroli and Sambac jasmine, the signature orange blossom unleashes all its floral strength, with its voluptuous lushness and blissful solar facets blending perfectly with the hypnotically green & velvety woody base notes of vetiver & sandalwood. Is Neroli Botanica the best Essential Parfums release yet? We certainly can't put it down.

name: Pomod'ORO
notes: Tomato, Anise, Basil, Hyacinth, Licorice, Carrot, Vetiver, Oakmoss, Patchouli
style: Earthy, Green / Herbaceous, Unusual / Unexpected, Woody - Fresh
description: Evocative, intense and original, Pomod芒聙聶ORO is a bold and striking new direction for Omnia- rather than seeking to represent the symbolic scent of a precious metal or stone, they've found the precious gold inside a humble, yet powerfully symbolic plant- the tomato. Hypnotically green, with a captivating freshness, Pomod'ORO invigorates with the stemmy, spicy herbaceousness of tomato plant blended with an innovative and complex accord of licorice-like spices, wild hyacinth, basil, and carrot, for a sophisticated yet primal vegetal kick. A softly spicy and mossy base only reinforces the naturalistic elegance- like an immaculately tended garden in the courtyard of a Campanian villa. Refreshing and refined, Pomod'ORO is one of our favorite Omnias yet.

name: Ororosa
notes: Bitter Orange, Yellow Mandarin, Freesia, Tobacco, Bitter Cocoa, Amber, Tonka Bean, White Musk, Vanilla
style: Earthy, Fresh - Citrus, Resinous / Balsamic, Warm, Woody - Amber
description: The reflections from a polished piece of rose gold are like the glow of the setting sun- colors that blend from yellow into pink like the tangerine tones of the sun disappearing over the horizon at the end of a perfect day. It's this tableau, and the gradually darker tones of evening, that inspire Ororosa, a vibrant and sensual unisex blend combining the vivid energy of mandarin essence with the warm, comforting richness of ambered tobacco. Just like watching a sunset soothes the soul and nurtures the spirit, so too does wearing Ororosa- it's a dose of deep and abiding satisfaction you won't be able to stop revisiting.

name: Perla
notes: Milk, Red Fruits, Tiare, Vanilla, Amber, Cedar, Sandalwood
style: Creamy, Floral
description: Perla is a gourmand fragrance that captures the essence of milk and tiar脙漏 flower, creating a delicious and delicate combination. Like the precious and uniquely formed stone from which it takes its name, Perla projects a delicate but deeply lovely glow, with the lush, romantic sweetness of the tiar脙漏 kissed with a touch of mouthwatering fruit and the creamy smoothness of a gorgeous milk note reinforced with a gentle base of warm ambered woods. A perfectly formed pearl of a fragrance, Perla is simply luminous.

name: Epona
notes: Warm Horse Skin, Saddle Soap, Green Meadows, Leather Saddle
style: Animalic, Earthy, Fresh - Clean, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic
description: Epona embodies the cherished memories of Liz's bond with her beloved horse amidst the beautiful English countryside. Inspired by their intimate connection, it captures the essence of long summer days, a warm leather saddle, and the sweet meadow breath of her horse. The fragrance intertwines notes of leather, opoponax, labdanum, and vetiver to evoke the rich scent of a well-worn saddle and the sensual aroma of a horse's coat. With a subtle hint of saddle soap accord, reminiscent of the tender care lavished upon a faithful companion. Epona is a nostalgic ode to the timeless bond between horse and rider held in nature's embrace.Liz has placed her own leather accord and distinctive horse accord against honey, oakmoss, and petitgrain for a complex and stirring capturing of horse skin, leather, and summer meadows.

name: Seoul
notes: Coffee, Nutmeg, Bergamot, Cedarwood, Cocoa, Vetiver, Vanilla, Sandalwood
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Sweet
description: Off-white snowy day, take a sip of hot cocoa in front of clear shielded glass. Gentle blizzard landing, baby it芒聙聶s cold outside. Enjoy the peace inside the cafe and watch the silent hustles outside. People swim through, the world is like a giant aquarium.Chocolate embodied in your thick white cup, the steam mixes with aroma of coffee across the space. There芒聙聶s barely just sound of a coffee machine running, almost as if you could hear the snow fall on the white.

name: Thai Soda
notes: Lemon, Bergamot, Orange, Petitgrain, Neroli, Lavender, Patchouli
description: Land of spice. Greens and reds and yellows lay open on the riverfront pier market, big spoons pour broth over freshly cut herbs. Crowds on wide pavement with cameras on sore necks, teens on holiday with their families; lime soda, summer flings, exotic print pants.Weary souls get rested while roaming to find their tourism dreams, and the refreshing tingle of soda and spice are imprinted as flavors of eternal summer. Pop the lime, let it sting. Sniff feel chill. If summer never ends, you can feel young forever.

name: Thailand
notes: Ginger, Sweet Basil, Lemon, Tomato Leaf, Ylang, Jasmine, Vetiver
style: Floral - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy
description: Green and red, neon or spice, Thailand is always summer. The riverside night market at the wharf sells cheap snacks and hot soup, and the spoons from the boat river are poured on the freshly cut spice leaves. Tourists with sore necks hang their cameras on the avenue, and teenagers in undershirts follow the tails of their families.The tingling of summer heat is relieved by the lime combing on the tongue, the short summer encounters and love affairs, the soft pants of exotic and colorful totems. The tingle of Thai spices and sparkling water will always be the smell of long summer. Cut a small lime, let it refresh your body and mind, and come here to feel youthful.

name: Taipei
notes: Soy Milk, Rice, Taro, Guaiac Wood, Iris, Musk, Vetiver, Sandalwood
style: Gourmand, Milky, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Ground soy, steamed glutinous rice and taro. The scent and nuance of beans, grains and roots. Soybeans strained and boiled into milk, the aroma of steamed rice and taro rising in the air. Flour and dough kneaded into taro balls, rolled hearty in bowls. The gourmand sweetness enters the Taipei morning, moves into mid-day alleys and into the night. Through rusted concrete and its rigid colors, the aged scent remains in the wooden builds between cool-toned concrete lofts. The rootyness stains the narrow alleys between the low-rises downtown, brushing through the gates and chairs, kitchens and windows. The rice lingers and weaves into the background, meeting the underlying tone. The scene of old temples by the night markets. The intimate human touch of the city.

name: Pho Breakfast
notes: Star Anise, Charred Ginger, Fresh Basil, Cilantro, Cardamom, Mandarin, Patchouli, Cedarwood
style: Gourmand, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Pho Breakfast captures the experience of savoring beef pho, Vietnam's national dish. This fragrance mirrors the dish's core ingredients, echoes the warmth of spice blend, and weaves in hints of fresh herbs like basil and cilantro. While not a literal translation, Pho Breakfast invites you to appreciate the dish's complex symphony of aromas and tastes.

name: Oranger Sirocco
notes: Orange Blossom Flower Absolute Morocco, Petitgrain Oil Morocco, Royal Cinnamon Laos Extract 芒聙聹Grand Cru芒聙聺
style: Fresh - Citrus, Woody - Fresh
description: Oranger Sirocco was born out of a desire to imagine an olfactory landmark, a sensory compass that is both bright and joyful. This beautiful creation embodies a return to simpler values, presents itself as an ode to life, and aims to be somewhat contemplative. From the first notes, the mind is carried away by a warm, shimmering wind of sand, on the other side of the Mediterranean, in the heart of an orange blossom grove. With closed eyes, scents and sounds intertwine: the powerful and intoxicating fragrance of orange blossoms, echoing the distant hustle and bustle of a souk, where the aroma of spices mixes in waves, saturating the regular breath of the sirocco.

name: The Point
notes: Jasmine Tea, Crushed Porcelain, Honey-Soaked Patchouli, Ocean Water, Ambergris, Wet Sand
style: Fresh - Aquatic, Green / Herbaceous, Salty / Oceanic, Skin Scent / Minimal, Unusual / Unexpected
description: If we had to put our finger on what makes Clue fragrances so special, it's what we might call their gift for Midwestern Magical Realism- fragrances that take the relatable comforts of everyday Americana and imbue them with a whimsical touch of fantasy. So hopefully, when we describe The Point as a cup of jasmine tea brewed with saltwater and stirred with a pearl spoon, it's not too difficult to picture what we mean- smooth, fragrant jasmine tea, gently sweetened with earthy, honey-soaked patchouli, contrasted with brackish ocean water (perhaps a Great Lake?), and glimmering with a porcelain sparkle. It's elegant and elemental, refreshing and refined, sentimental and sensual. Or, to put it more plainly, it's the kind of uniquely crafted, wonderfully wearable fragrance that explains why Clue is quickly becoming our new niche obsession.

name: Pnoi
notes: Petitgrain, Bergamot, Violet Leaf, Neroli, Hedione, Green Breeze, Orrris Butter, Jasmine, Rose, Muguet, Star Anise, Styrax, Hay, Mimosa, Carnation, Sandalwood, Deadwood, Castoreum, Beeswax, Cistus Labdanum, Jonquille, Fir Balsam, Mousse De Saxe, Musk, Honey, Benzoin, Leather, White Birch
description: Pnoi in Greek is such a complex word with too many literal and metaphorical meanings and interpretations... Always positive though, with some of the most commonly encountered being: breath (human芒聙聶s breath with the help of lungs), pleasant air current, force of wind and also inspiration.Therefore, I was inspired to create my most complex formula thus far (267 raw materials), trying to achieve a composition with incredible versatility and agreeable wearability. Pnoi is a powdery/ violet smooth leather composition in 26% concentration, a melange of my most favorite facets and techniques I learnt in modern and classical perfumery.

name: Pacific Grapefruit
notes: Grapefruit, Tangerine, Bergamot, Yuzu, Marine Notes, Ginger, Neroli, Orange Flower, Marigold, Cactus Flower, Palm Tree Bark, Vetiver, Oud, Hinoki, Musk
style: Floral - White, Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus
description: "I lost sight of the shore, I ventured out into the grand Pacific and found my courage."

name: Atlantic Fig
notes: Bergamot, Cardamom, Coriander, Fig, Lavender, Blue Sage, Geranium, Narcissus, Rose, Vetiver, Cedar, Patchouli, Moss, Cypriol, Agarwood, Musk, Amber, Sandalwood
style: Fresh, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: "Sail over the horizon and let the Atlantic waves carry you where light cannot."

name: Indian Vetiver
notes: Juicy Orange, Tangerine, Pear Flower, Magnolia Petals, Sun Drenched Honeysuckle, Mimosa, Neroli, Coconut Milk, Ocean Mist, Skin Musk, Vetiver
style: Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Aquatic, Salty / Oceanic, Woody - Light, Woody - Spicy
description: "Find quiet moments and embrace their extraordinary wonder."

name: Soft Focus
notes: Lime, Chili, Sea Salt, Guava, Pineapple, Leather, Sandalwood, Coconut, Cashmeran
style: Floral - Light, Fresh - Aquatic, Fruity, Salty / Oceanic, Tropical / Beachy, Woody - Fresh
description: Laid back and sensual, Soft Focus invites you to lounge by the pool on a perfect summer day. A juicy splash of guava and pineapple kicks off the opening, with lime and a hint of chili keeping things interesting, like the best tropical drink at a sophisticated resort.As the day wears on, you'll notice the sea salt and sun-drenched woods. By evening, things get a bit more sultry. Smooth leather and warm sandalwood take center stage, with cashmeran adding a soft, velvety feel. Throughout it all, a subtle fruity halo lingers, adding a refined sweetness that's more cocktail than candy - a grown-up nod to summer indulgence.

name: Crushed Fruits
notes: Plum Flesh, Raspberry Seed, Peach Skin, Cognac Grape Oil, Orris Butter, Jasmine, Rose Hips, Bitter Orange Tree Wood, Pineapple Husk, Amber
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Woody - Fresh
description: Exuberance is beauty! Precious Moroccan orris butter and exquisite absolute of jasmine sambac provide the elegant heart of this vivacious perfume, with top and base notes derived from plums, raspberries, peaches, grapes and pineapples. Fruity, white floral, woody elements.

name: Unue
notes: Bergamot, Anise, Pink Pepper, Pineapple, Jasmine, Plum, Ylang-ylang, Musk, Sandalwood, Patchouli
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Light
description: Powerful yet subtle, Unue is a fruity-floral extrait that radiates the sensual afterglow of the sky right after sunset. Italian bergamot and Egyptian jasmine create a vibrant and romantic opening, while a fruity heart of plum and pineapple blend mouthwateringly with pink pepper and a tantalizing shot of anise. In a luxurious drydown, silky sandalwood and luscious musks linger on the skin, creating an elegant and refined trail. Gorgeously sophisticated, delightfully versatile, Unue is another ideal Jeroboam scent- built to travel with you and perfect for any place and time.

name: Escentric 05 Body Lotion
description: Escape to an island getaway with the Escentric 05 Body Lotion. Experience the radiant warmth of Cashmeran intertwined with pine resin, bergamot, orange, rosemary, and delicate fig notes. Immerse yourself in the essence of Mediterranean summers with every application, and let this fragrance-rich lotion transport you to sun-drenched vistas.The Escentric 05 Body Lotion embodies the perfect fusion of luxury and skincare innovation. With a hybrid texture akin to light lotion and velvety cream, these body lotions are enriched with active biomimetic ingredients, including moisture-locking essential fatty acids, hyaluronic acid and sorbitol, calming phytosterols and natural oils like antioxidant rich squalane, jojoba oil, and shea butter, working to condition and provide silken-soft, long lasting hydration. Expect to transform your body care ritual into a moment you never want to end.All Escentric Molecules Body Lotions complement our fragrances and are dermatologically tested, cruelty-free, and suitable for all skin types.

name: Escentric 04 Body Lotion
description: Elevate your senses with the Escentric 04 Body Lotion. Enriched with refreshing pink grapefruit peel and juniper notes, its hydrating formula deeply nourishes the skin, leaving behind a subtle scent of lime zest, pink pepper, and rose. Experience the invigorating psychedelic freshness of Escentric 04 Body Lotion, a perfect blend of fragrance and hydration for your skin.The Escentric 04 Body Lotion embodies the perfect fusion of luxury and skincare innovation. With a hybrid texture akin to light lotion and velvety cream, these body lotions are enriched with active biomimetic ingredients, including moisture-locking essential fatty acids, hyaluronic acid and sorbitol, calming phytosterols and natural oils like antioxidant rich squalane, jojoba oil, and shea butter, working to condition and provide silken-soft, long lasting hydration. Expect to transform your body care ritual into a moment you never want to end.All Escentric Molecules Body Lotions complement our fragrances and are dermatologically tested, cruelty-free, and suitable for all skin types.

name: Escentric 03 Body Lotion
description: Immerse yourself in the luscious scent of Escentric 03 with our luxurious Body Lotion. Crafted around a smooth, woody aroma-molecule Vetiver and invigorating grapefruit accent, it's infused with fresh lime peel, ginger, green peppercorn, and musk, enveloping your skin in the herbaceous notes of our greenest scent offering.The Escentric 03 Body Lotion embodies the perfect fusion of luxury and skincare innovation. With a hybrid texture akin to light lotion and velvety cream, these body lotions are enriched with active biomimetic ingredients, including moisture-locking essential fatty acids, hyaluronic acid and sorbitol, calming phytosterols and natural oils like antioxidant rich squalane, jojoba oil, and shea butter, working to condition and provide silken-soft, long lasting hydration. Expect to transform your body care ritual into a moment you never want to end.All Escentric Molecules Body Lotions complement our fragrances and are dermatologically tested, cruelty-free, and suitable for all skin types.

name: Escentric 02 Body Lotion
description: Feel the revitalising touch of Escentric 02 Body Lotion, centered around Ambroxan, a  sensual amber molecule that exudes a clean, mineral freshness. Enriched with green jasmine bud (hedione) and a sparkling 'gin + tonic' accord, this ultra-crisp lotion offers all over rejuvenation for a truly revitalizing experience.The Escentric 02 Body Lotion embodies the perfect fusion of luxury and skincare innovation. With a hybrid texture akin to light lotion and velvety cream, these body lotions are enriched with active biomimetic ingredients, including moisture-locking essential fatty acids, hyaluronic acid and sorbitol, calming phytosterols and natural oils like antioxidant rich squalane, jojoba oil, and shea butter, working to condition and provide silken-soft, long lasting hydration. Expect to transform your body care ritual into a moment you never want to end.All Escentric Molecules Body Lotions complement our fragrances and are dermatologically tested, cruelty-free, and suitable for all skin types.

name: Escentric 01 Body Lotion
description: The cult-favorite Escentric 01 Body Lotion is as sensual as you'd imagine, and the scent likely needs little introduction. This Escentric 01 Body Lotion blends Iso E Super with the warmth of spicy pink pepper, the zesty freshness of lime, and a hint of gentle balsamic notes that linger gracefully on your skin, resulting in a long-lasting and intoxicating veil of  scent.Escentric Body Lotions embody the perfect fusion of luxury and skincare innovation. With a hybrid texture akin to light lotion and velvety cream, these body lotions are enriched with active biomimetic ingredients, including moisture-locking essential fatty acids, hyaluronic acid and sorbitol, calming phytosterols and natural oils like antioxidant-rich squalane, jojoba  oil, and shea butter, working to condition and provide silken-soft, long-lasting hydration.  Expect to transform your body care ritual into a moment you never want to end.All Escentric Molecules Body Lotions complement our fragrances and are dermatologically tested, cruelty-free, and suitable for all skin types.

name: Elle Anniversary
notes: Bergamot, Green Apple, Lychee, Jasmine, Peony, Cashmere Wood, Musks, Amber
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Floral - White, Fruity, Woody Ambery Floral
description: A celebration of the much beloved XJ Elle, the very first perfume created for the legendary Xerjoff 17/17 collection, Elle Anniversary is an enchanting and richly sensual feminine floral that captures the true spirit of the original.Graceful and floral, the true spirit of Elle is carried in the flair and elegance of Elle Anniversary, scattered with light flecks of fresh notes in the opening, with lychee and bergamot at the top.A calming and uplifting heart, Elle Anniversary is threaded with delicate jasmine and warm cashmere wood that merge to create a rush of romanticism, which slowly settle to an illustrious base of amber, musk and patchouli.

name: Al-Mendoos
description: After close to 4 years of aging our very own extraction of osmanthus blossoms, it's time to share it with the world and unleash one of the most beautiful fragrances Agar Aura has ever created. If Layali reshaped what people think of the oud-rose combo, Al-Mendoos defines the oud-osmanthus love affair. You haven't smelled something like this, guaranteed. A "mendoos" in Arabian tradition is a chest of gifts presented to the bride. Our Al-Mendoos extrait is the spray version of our popular oil attar with the same name from a decade ago.Osmanthus lovers, rejoice. Utilizling our in-house osmanthus extract, the otherworldly beauty of the attar is taken to a whole new level. Unlike synthetic rose, synthetic jasmine and many other synthetic floral aromachemicals which have a clear resemblance to the real thing, natural osmanthus extract possesses an aroma that couldn't be any more different from it's synthetic counterpart. There's absolutely no similarity between the two, and most have only smelled the synthetic version in perfumes due to the high cost of the natural extract.The apricot kompot and tea aroma of the osmanthus extract are the shining stars of the show. Leafy-green Malaysian oud complements the tea-like aroma, an airy Indonesian oud fuses with the bright facets, and a fruity Thai oud deepens the dominant fruity-floral aroma of the precious flower. A hint of cedar gives the oil a touch of bitter woodiness, and papyrus oil gives it a crackly-dry woodiness. A soft background ensemble of classic "bakhoor" (incense) notes one would encounter in the bridal quarter imparts the perfume an aura of ebullience and nostalgic love.Al-Mendoos is easily the most 'feminine' Agar Aura fragrance. In the international scheme of things, i.e. compared to mainstream / western fragrances, that would make this the most unisex of all our fragrances, with a slight masculine leaning.Rugged woodiness tamed by sweeter fruity-floral highlights. Let yourself fall in love.

name: Private Teahouse
notes: Peach, Cacao, Smoke, Lapsang Souchong Tea, Cedarwood, Labdanum, Peach Sap
style: Earthy, Floral - Fruity, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Fresh
description: Private Teahouse is a fragrance inspired by a peaceful location and the feeling of stepping out of the daily world as one enters a teahouse to rest.

name: Musk Couture
notes: Lychee, Raspberry, Herbal Green Notes, Roman Chamomile, Ylang-ylang, Tobacco, Guaiac Wood, Nagarmotha, Siberian Musk, Oud, Vanilla, Benzoin, Cedarwood, Oakmoss
style: Floral - Citrus, Floral - Fruity, Floral - Spicy, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Embrace the artistry of Musk Couture, a fragrance that adorns the skin with a rich, textured mosaic of scents, inviting you to discover the profound beauty and complexity of the world芒聙聶s natural wonders and artisanal traditions. With Musk Couture, every moment becomes an opportunity to explore the depths of your own sensuality and the boundless possibilities of fragrance.Musk Couture opens with a sparkling and succulent beginning, where the sweet, juicy scent of Lychee, cultivated on a select farm in Thailand, blends with the bright, fruity sweetness of Raspberry. This vibrant pair is balanced by the fresh greenery of Herbal Green, reminiscent of freshly cut grass, and the soft, soothing aroma of Roman Chamomile, introducing a gentle serenity to the olfactory journey. The heart notes delve deeper into the essence of Musk Couture, showcasing a rich canvas of Ylang-Ylang from the island of Java, Indonesia, handpicked to infuse the fragrance with its exotic and sensual aroma. The heart is further enriched by a complex blend of three distinct types of Tobacco芒聙聰Nicaraguan, Virginia, and Turkish芒聙聰each contributing warm, spicy, and woody nuances. The inclusion of Guaiac Wood and Nagarmotha introduces smoky, earthy dimensions, adding layers of warmth and richness. Finally, the base notes secure the fragrance with a foundation of profound warmth and lasting depth. Siberian Musk, carefully harvested in the harsh climates of Yakutia, grants the fragrance an unmatched warmth and deep character, reminiscent of the wild expanses of the Siberian taiga. Indian Oud, sourced from the ancient forests of India, endows the scent with luxurious warmth, complexity, and mystique. Sweet Vanilla and resinous Benzoin offer comforting warmth and softness, while Cedarwood and Oakmoss contribute masculinity and fortitude, enriching the aromatic base with their clean, woody, and earthy notes.Embrace the artistry of Musk Couture, a fragrance that adorns the skin with a rich, textured mosaic of scents, inviting you to discover the profound beauty and complexity of the world芒聙聶s natural wonders and artisanal traditions. With Musk Couture, every moment becomes an opportunity to explore the depths of your own sensuality and the boundless possibilities of fragrance.

name: Cafe Mystique
notes: Bergamot, Kopi Luwak Coffee, Black Pepper, Frangipani, Cardamom, Ylang-ylang, Labdanum, Vetiver, Myrrh, Frankincense, Vanilla, Oud, Turkish Coffee, Beeswax
description: Discover a coffee fragrance like no other with the complex, mysterious, and utterly captivating Caf脙漏 Mystique. A bright and exotic opening whisks you away to the sun-kissed citrus groves of Calabria, where Bergamot sparkles with a light, effervescent quality. The journey takes an intriguing turn with Kopi Luwak Coffee, offering a unique coffee accord that pays homage to Indonesia芒聙聶s rich coffee culture. The introduction of Black Pepper adds a spicy spark, reminiscent of the vibrant markets of Southeast Asia, setting the stage for an enticing adventure. The heart notes unveil a bouquet where the tropical Frangipani reigns supreme, its tender blossoms collected in the lush, sun-drenched tropics. Cardamom weaves its spicy threads through the heart, a prelude to adventure from the dense forests of Guatemala. Yiang-Ylang, with its exotic floralcy from the Philippines, and Mediterranean Labdanum, with its resinous depth, interlace to create an enchanting heart, rich with complexity and warmth.Finally, a complex and gorgeous base grounds the fragrance in the earthy richness of Haitian Vetiver, a tribute to the island芒聙聶s vibrant spirit and natural beauty. The mystical duo of Myrrh and Frankincense, sourced from the ancient lands of Somalia and Oman, weave their storied scents through the base, adding layers of mystique. Madagascar Vanilla swathes the senses in sweetness, while the dual notes of Oud Siam and Turkish Coffee introduce a mysterious woody depth paired with a gourmet twist. The soft aroma of Beeswax rounds off the composition, accentuating its inherent gentleness.

name: Amber Balsam
notes: Bergamot, Cardamom, Clove Leaf, Gurgan Balsam, Cinnamon, Ylang-ylang, Ruh Khus Vetiver, Green Team, Copaiba Balsam, Tolu Balsam, Peru Balsam, Ambergris, Oud, Labdanum
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Citrus, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Amber, Woody - Spicy
description: Discover Amber Balsam by Maksim Perfume, a fragrance that embarks on a journey through the world芒聙聶s natural wonders, from the sun-kissed citrus groves of Calabria to the spiritual depths of Thailand. Each note tells a story, and every accord reveals a discovery. The fragrance unfolds with a bright burst of Calabrian bergamot, carried by winds from the southern shores, while spicy Guatemalan cardamom and Indonesian clove leaf add a spicy warmth, reminiscent of the first rays of the morning sun. An adventurous heart reveals the woody tones of Gurgun balsam from the wild Australian outback and refined cinnamon from Sri Lanka芒聙聶s spice gardens. Ylang-ylang and Ruh Khus (Vetiver) add earthy and warm notes, while Chinese green tea enriches the composition with its freshness and depth. The drydown immerses the wearer in a mysterious world with rare and precious ambergris, adding a unique maritime saltiness and earthy sweetness that perfectly harmonizes with the aromatic Copaiba balsam from the depths of the Amazon, sweet Tolu balsam, and vanilla hints of Peru balsam. Oud Siam and musky Labdanum lend this rich bouquet a distinctive depth and longevity, reminiscent of mysterious rituals and ancient ceremonies.Amber Balsam is not just a fragrance; it is a gateway to a world where every scent leads to a new discovery. Combining exceptional ingredients and unique notes, this fragrance promises not only instant enchantment but also a lasting impact, leaving behind a trail of mystery and refined luxury.

name: REA
notes: Valencia Orange, Chocolate, Indian Night Tuberose, Spanish Carnation, Sandalwood, Vanilla Planiflogia, Ambrette Seeds
style: Woody - Dark, Woody Ambery Floral
description: An ode to youthful beauty and charm named for co-creator Rajesh Balkrishnan's niece, REA is a floral gourmand like no other. An encore collaboration between Balkrishnan and Mallo's Antonio Lasheras, REA features a captivating combination of rich, full-bodied Indian night blooming tuberose and spicy, spirited Spanish carnation, balanced with a striking chocolate note that complements the florals with beautiful maximalism- this is a sumptuous, deeply romantic fragrance meant to overwhelm you with the pure joy of it all. Vibrant, sensual, and powerful, REA is another triumph of exceptional materials and inspiring creativity- in other words, another gift from Mallo to all who love unique and beautiful niche fragrance.

name: Blu Mare
notes: Pink Pepper, Lemon, Bergamot, Grapefruit, Marine Accord, Cypress, Grey Amber, Oakmoss
style: Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus, Salty / Oceanic
description: Blu Mare captures the invigorating essence of the Mediterranean coast. Imagine the sparkling ocean waves crashing against the shore, the scent of salty air mingled with the freshness of pine trees and the vibrant energy of a sun-drenched day. This fragrance evokes a sense of escape and connection with the natural world.Blu Mare opens with a burst of sparkling freshness. Luminous notes of bergamot, lemon, and grapefruit shimmer like sunlight dancing on the rippling water surface. A touch of pink pepper adds a subtle spicy intrigue to this invigorating introduction. The heart of the fragrance reveals the magic of the seaside. A marine accord, expertly crafted by the perfumer, transports you straight to the seashore, where the lapping of the waves mingles with the fresh, aromatic scent of cypress trees. This captivating combination creates a sense of tranquility and rejuvenation. The base settles into a warm and sophisticated foundation. Grey amber and oakmoss provide depth and persistence, enveloping the skin like a caress of sea breeze and leaving a magnetic and sensual trail.

name: Dream Sequence
notes: Petitgrain, Bergamot, Lilac, Neroli, Ambrette, Musk, Tonka, Vanilla, Soil
style: Floral - Citrus, Floral - Light, Floral - White, Fresh, Powdery / Soft
description: Dream Sequence is a tornado of lilacs, a swirling rush of greenery, earth and purple petals, painting the dark technicolor of an August sky. As the tornado approaches, it looks like a stunning arabesque and there is the impulse to dance alongside it. In the wake of the storm, you are left soporific and in awe of this natural phenomena, as this ecstatic experience has suddenly gone.Note - Dream Sequence is a re-imagined version of Marissa's discontinued Lilac Dream.

name: Promises, Promises
style: Creamy, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Amber
description: Kerosene, will you please make a vanilla scent?!A - Vanilla scent? It's been done a million times!Kerosene, I don't care, please make one!I promise, one day I will.Unlike the song from 1983, you can trust my words:Finished is something started.Promises, Promises is vanilla, amber, and musk.Believe it.

name: Pelagos
notes: Begamot, Litsea Cubeba, Sea Breeze Accord, Orris Butter, Jasmine, White Thyme, Tonka Bean, Leather, Sandalwood, Amyris, Patchouli, Vetiver
style: Floral, Fresh - Aquatic, Green / Herbaceous, Salty / Oceanic, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Pelagos is a dynamic extrait that evokes the sense of limitless possibilities, inspired by my deeply cherished memories of the Aegean Sea islands. There, gazing at the sky and sea merging in the horizon, I felt and believed that anything was possible. Pelagos encapsulates a contemporary, exhilarating notion of freshness, with its every note presented under a prism of joyous, spirited luminosity芒聙聰thus reflecting the extraordinary light of Greece. - Pissara Umavijani

name: Musc Moka Extrait
notes: Musk, Coffee, Rose, Jasmine, Tuberose, Orange Blossom, Amber, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Earthy, Floral, Powdery / Soft, Warm, Woody - Amber
description: The perfect treat for lovers of the beloved Musc series and coffee fanatics alike, Musc Moka Extrait is a carefully crafted and distinctive tribute to the deep and historical bond between Bruno Acampora and the city of Naples, where coffee is a tradition rooted in local culture. From the very first spray, the warm and seductive allure of Bruno's signature musk- earthy, loamy, deeply comfortable- blends perfectly with a robust coffee note that imbues the vitality of the morning espresso ritual. A complex and opulent floral heart soon follows, where lush notes of rose and white florals are warmed with the glow of amber, creating a perfect balance between mouthwatering sweetness and rich, romantic depth. A seductive base of patchouli, sandalwood, and vanilla persists for hours, enveloping the wearer in both comfort and sensuality and keeping both the musky and coffee elements of the scent lingering in the potent sillage. A perfect synthesis between tradition and innovation, Musc Moka is both intense and soothing, historic and modern- the kind of fragrance that anyone lucky enough to experience won't easily forget.

name: Cedre Figalia
notes: Bergamot, Basil, Jamaica Pepper, Spinach, Mate, Fig, Cedar
style: Earthy, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: A vibrantly green ode to plant life in all its forms- wood, sap, leaf, and fruit- Cedre Figalia is a breathtakingly refreshing tribute to the raw materials of nature, constructed around the dynamic contrast between crisp, vegetal fresh fig leaf and dry, warm, enveloping cedarwood.Cedre Fiaglia opens with an uplifting rush of bright, fresh Calabrian bergamot, given herbaceous depth with a twist of basil. Jamaican pepper adds a distinctly spicy and subtly woodsy spark to the mix, leading into the unique green heart, intriguingly anchored with a delightful and surprising spinach note- lush, vegetal, and delicately floral- cultivated from real Egyptian spinach harvested from the banks of the Nile river. It blends perfectly with rustic mate and bright, gently milky fig, playfully balancing a feeling of raw naturalism with an abiding comfort and smoothness. In the base, a gorgeous cedar essence- aromatic, dry, gentle yet stout- brings earthy depth and woody warmth to the sparkling vegetal blend. A true original and a must-try for lovers of all things unique and green, Cedre Figalia is the perfect example of Atelier Materi's dedication to sophisticated, artistic, one-of-a-kind fragrance.

name: Nota Loca
notes: Acai, Coconut, Yuzu, Cardamom, Mango, Papaya, Vanilla, Musk, Tonka Bean
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Tropical / Beachy
description: What does paradise smell like? Find out with Nota Loca, an irresistibly alluring essence from the creators of the cult smash hit Nota Sugar. Like its much adored older sibling, Nota Loca whisks us away to the tropics, but if Sugar was an intoxicatingly sweet cocktail, Loca is something even more beguiling- a mouthwatering buffet of tropical fruit, enhanced with nothing more than a subtle touch of gourmand spice. Elegant notes of a脙搂a脙颅 and coconut awaken exotic sensations, along with a thrilling rush of tart yuzu and juicy mango, all kissed with creamy vanilla and warm tonka. Refreshing, delightful, and restorative, Nota Loca is a tropical delight.

name: Traviata
notes: Citrus, Lavender, Herbal Notes, Floral Notes, Fruity Notes, Spices, Amberwood, Patchouli, Cedar
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Spicy, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Step into the enchanting world of "Traviata" where each spritz unveils a symphony of scents, inspired by the elegance and grandeur of classical music. Harmonizing citrusy bursts, calming lavender, and an herbal embrace, the top notes set the stage for an aromatic overture. As the composition progresses, a crescendo of floral blooms, luscious fruits, and a hint of spicy allure forms the heart notes, echoing the rich melodies of a captivating performance.Towards its grand finale, Traviata gracefully lingers with a blend of earthy Patchouli, opulent Woody Amber, and the resonating echoes of Cedarwood, creating an enduring composition. This fragrance encapsulates the timeless beauty and poetic essence of classical music, harmonizing diverse notes into an olfactory gem.

name: Beast Love
notes: Juicy Pear, Sweet Plum, Sicilian Bergamot, Black Leather, White Cedar, Turkish Rose, Leather, Vanilla, Tonka Bean, Musk, Amber
style: Fruity, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet
description: Where a beast lies, there always resides a beauty. BEAST LOVE is akin to a gem hidden in a forgotten castle embraced by lush nature. This mixed sanctuary is jealously guarded by juicy pear and sweet plum. Sicilian Bergamot extends its hand, leading you into a fruity and edible experience.Immerse yourself in the captivating world of Beast Love, a unisex fragrance where skin becomes the heart note, revealing a unique sensual alchemy. Let yourself be intoxicated by the deliciously sweet scents of pear and plum, awakening your senses with delight.

name: Bubble Forever
notes: Sparkling Grapefruit, Sicilian Lemon, Williams Pear, Neroli, Cinnamon, Jasmine, Bulgarian Rose, Orange Blossom, Sweet Toffee, Vanilla Pods, Fluffy Musk, Amber
style: Floral, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Discover Bubble Forever, an enchanting fusion of fresh orange blossom and the sweetness of pear, evoking the scent of bubble gum. Indulgence unfolds in a gourmet symphony where vanilla, caramel, neroli, cinnamon, jasmine, rose, musk, and amber harmoniously blend, sculpting a pastel pink bubble of femininity.

name: Iommi Deified
notes: Saffron, Cinnamon, Apple, Rose, Leather, Musk, Papyrus, Patchouli, Moss
description: Step into a parallel universe where mystery possesses the mind in a dark and decadent experience that casts subliminal shadows on the wearer. The second chapter of the almighty collaboration between the greatest riff master of all time, Black Sabbath芒聙聶s legendary guitarist and rock composer, Tony Iommi and Xerjoff芒聙聶s esteemed founder, Sergio Momo.A combination of forces that play on the palindromic nature of sound, scent and sensorial sequences, Tony Iommi Deified parfum is the new Xerjoff Blends venture that presents Deified perfume with a soon to come soundtrack and music video. Created on a duality of leather and spice, Deified plays in a loop with no beginning and no end, accompanying the wearer with its omnipresent aura. Authentic and warm accents of saffron meet powdery and leathery facets that dance with the delicate touch of gourmand freshness. Cinnamon exalts spicier notes, complemented by gentle rose at the heart.The woody base of papyrus and patchouli leaves the senses longing for more in a rhythmic exchange of back and forth.

name: Tanger
notes: Italian Mandarin, Bergamot, Ylang-ylang, Neroli, Cashmere Wood, Rose, Amber, Madagascar Vanilla, Resins, Moss
style: Citrus, Creamy, Floral - White, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Amber
description: While the fragrance world can be a unforgiving place, a truly special scent will always eventually find its audience. Take Tanger as a perfect example- criminally underrated by the European market on its original 2020 release, its sunny combination of fresh citrus, lush neroli, and sweet ylang may have just seemed too different from the dry, exotic sophistication of much of the rest of the Ormonde Jayne line. But a beautiful perfume can't be denied for long, and soon enough, a robust following of fragrance bloggers, content creators, and niche fanatics had given new life to this joyfully golden creation. And because the loyal fans never abandoned Tanger, Ormonde Jayne is proud to offer that loyalty in return- Tanger is back, in a newly enriched 30% concentration that makes the citrus juicier, the florals lusher, and the warm amber-vanilla drydown more romantic than ever before. A cult classic, back from the dead and better than ever? It must be your lucky day.

name: Smile
notes: Bergamot, Raspberry, Sage, Musk
style: Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean, Fruity, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: SMILE is an addictive fragrance inspired by the pursuit of joy and born out of a unique family connection. Many years ago, as a young girl, Akro founder Ana脙炉s Cresp asked her father, the Master Perfumer Olivier Cresp, to create a perfume just for her, one that nobody else in the world would have. Olivier set about creating a scent that was as powerful as it was personal, a bottle full of joy for his daughter to carry through life. To do this, he combined notes of Sage, Bergamot, and Raspberry, building a bright and vivid fragrance that could work at any time and any place.For years, Ana脙炉s kept this scent to herself, but now she wants to share it with the world. SMILE is addictive and spirited; a fragrance that will brighten your day.

name: Lunar Dust
notes: Iris, Cedarwood, Amber, White Wood
style: Skin Scent / Minimal, Woody - Light
description: A sensual, woody skin scent inspired by the cosmic contrasts of the moon芒聙聶s cool powdery surface and warming lunar glow.In the quiet stillness of a darkened sky, a momentary absence of scent precedes a lingering whisper, revealing its hidden stars. An intimate skin scent unfolds, inviting only the closest few, as powdery and molecular iris unveils itself. Then, bathed in the glow of the shimmering moon, the surface begins to shift, caressed with the warm sensuality of white woods and amber.

name: Forbidden Bloom
notes: Pear, Peach, Frangipani, Gardenia, Coffee Absolute, Cedarwood, Ambergris And Musk
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Spicy
description: A seductive floral tribute to Gardenia and Frangipani, two breath-taking blooms entwined in an act of rebellious, forbidden love.In the heart of Astarte's secret garden, Frangipani and Gardenia, two flowers of unparalleled beauty and scent, grow defiantly side by side. Their proximity was feared, for the blend of their intoxicating aromas was deeply hypnotising. Yet, against all odds, they bloom together, intertwining to create a seductive scent story of forbidden love.

name: With the Candlestick
notes: Cherry Communion Wine, Cinnamon Leaf, Labdanum, Melted Wax, Burning Church Incense, Extinguished Candle, Hot Musk
style: Metallic, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy, Warm, Woody - Spicy
description: While we've experienced our fair sure of church-themed scents- austere, cold incense, mossy cathedral stone, or waxed-wood pews- we're happy to report that With The Candlestick is something different and far more delightful altogether. Thousands of miles removed from the severity and sanctimony of European fragrance, Clue Perfumery has given us a church-themed scent of playful, gently transgressive mischief- a smoky, fruity, spicy amber unlike any church-themed scent we've ever encountered. With The Candlestick is the scent of stolen sips of sweet, fruity communion wine, melted wax on metal candlesticks, and the oddly compelling acrid smokiness of an extinguished wick- deeply evocative accords that come together for a warm, smoky-sweet fragrance it's impossible to stop sniffing. What a blessing!

name: Warm Bulb
notes: Burning Dust, Hot Air, Black Pepper, Immortelle, Paper, Sparked Tobacco, Sandalwood, Amber-Preserved Vanilla
style: Avant-Garde, Floral - Light, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Unusual / Unexpected
description: A fragrance need not be overwhelmingly rich or complicated in order to be a true masterpiece- sometimes, all you need is a combination of uniquely conceived notes so perfectly aligned that a single whiff jolts you from reality into reverie. That's exactly what the brilliantly compelling Warm Bulb has to offer- a scentscape of understated simplicity, yet dramatically evocative power. Clue describes Warm Bulb as "a lamp's light bak[ing] yellowed pages underneath," and sure enough, this is the scent of an incandescent lightbulb- the yellow glow of the hot bulb, a layer of dust gently baking on its surface, illuminating the dry, cracked pages of a well-loved paperback book in a suburban rec room where the curtains still carry the faint trace of indoor smoking, while a soft vanilla wafts in from the kitchen. To call Warm Bulb "cozy" seems like a dramatic understatement- its sense of time and place is so distinct, the warmth it creates so palpable, that it's easy to lose yourself in its gentle power. Nostalgic, unique, clever, and captivating, Warm Bulb is more than deserving of the accolades coming its way.

name: Morel Map
notes: Birch Leaf, Balsam Fir Needle, Red Currant, Wisconsin Wood Violet, Violet Leaf, Galbanum, Morel Mushrooms, Oakmoss, Dead Elm Tree, Forest Floor
style: Earthy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: In the Wisconsin springtime, as the days start to grow longer and the last of the snow has melted into the soil, leaving the ground warm and damp, the hunt begins for the elusive morel mushroom. Morel Map is the scent of the hunt, as intrepid funghi foragers make their way through the forests and orchards and along the streams and rivers- the loamy nuttiness of the morel mushroom note blending with aromatic woods, green moss, and damp soil to evoke the lush beauty of woodland flora springing back to life after the long midwestern winter. It's all delivered with the whimsically conceived, yet richly captured olfactive verisimilitude that sets Clue Perfumery apart- a magical journey to the heart of the forest that you can experience anywhere, anytime.

name: Hyper Musc
notes: Peppermint Essence, Musk, Vanilla
