style: Avant-Garde, Fresh - Clean, Green / Herbaceous, Skin Scent / Minimal, Sweet, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Layered and evocative, the fragrances of the 芒聙聵Hyper芒聙聶 line are fashioned with the preci-sion, attention to detail and modernity that allow Courr脙篓ges芒聙聶 wardrobe to break free from tradition to define its own narrative. Essential lines, rare materials and raw emotions are the pillars of a vocabulary that runs through all Courr脙篓ges芒聙聶 creations, expressing a radical universe that resonates with its time.Evocation of an emptied candy box, of a longing vessel imprinted with mint and the sugar icing that coats the inside, like the promise of a secret exchange. Through the muted, sensual desire of musk, split by the freshness of peppermint and enveloped in an ambroxan base, lingers the sweet intoxication of an anticipated emotion.

name: This Is Not A Blue Bottle 1.6
notes: Sweet Orange, Grapefruit, Yuzu. Lotus, Neroli, Orange Blossom, White Musks, Vanilla, Vetiver
style: Floral - Citrus, Floral - White, Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Tropical / Beachy
description: Green souls fall in love in the shade of Citrus trees. Your laughter exhales a song of Yuzu zests and my kisses flutter, white, like petals of Neroli 芒聙聯 as they rest on your Grapefruit lips. Red. The pulp of my fingers run along your Jasmine neck, I drink the blue seas of your eyes and the smell of your smiles. There is a heat, a whiff of Vanilla, of two bodies entwined in a shape of White Musks. Hypnotic Lotus and dilated pupils, there comes from my fingers like a moan of Geranium, a desire to taste you like a sip of Orange juice. Green. I waft towards you on the wings of your skin-of-clouds. 芒聙聹Words do not lie芒聙聺. There is no end to me.

name: Quattro Pizzi
notes: Rum, Davana, Pink Pepper, Coriander, Tuberose, Coconut, Tonka Bean
style: Boozy, Classic Feminine, Floral, Floral - Spicy, Spicy, Tropical / Beachy
description: Quattro Pizzi transports the wearer to a summer in the sun-drenched south of Italy. Reminiscent of the Belle 脙聣poque era, the scent tells a story where love, beauty and nobility entwine with secrecy and sin. A juxtaposition of sweet and spicy hits the senses on first spray with rum, davana and pink pepper, where the intoxicating notes of tuberose enchant and seduce at the heart, a sensual scent that lingers like a lover's forbidden touch on the skin long after the sun goes down.

name: Oud Dukhan
notes: Cardamom, Black Pepper, Aldehyde, Oud, Olibanum Resin, Ambergris, White Musks
style: Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: A fantasia horseman芒聙聶s smoking gun. Smoldering oud on a slab of cool white marble, with elegant, musky, masculine elements. Oud Dukhan is a an exploration of oud that feels like a new direction, inspired by the paintings of Moroccan artist Hassan El Glaoui, and his depictions of elegant mounted cavalry. Those portraits, with their hypnotic blend of inky gun smoke and equine power, come to life with Oud Dukhan's contrast between cool, aldehydic spices and resinous smoky oud, which wears with a compellingly modern ease. Powerful and invigorating, classic and avant-garde- what else could you hope for from Regime des Fleurs?

name: Nitesurf Neroli
notes: Neroli Water, Salty Mist, Neon Petals, Ginger Lily, Transparent Citrus, Hedione, Smoked Seashells, Ambroxan
style: Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean, Salty / Oceanic
description: "I had a vision of Southern California as paradise when I was growing up on the east coast. I imagined not sun and palm trees but cool surfers in day-glo swimsuits spending evenings in the ocean, moonlight glowing on the water. This perfume captures that freedom and exhilaration. It's both refreshingly tart and uniquely sensual. Crashing waves and untamed youth."A soft breeze of classic neroli, drifting across the beach with an intoxicating dose of summer nostalgia. A glowing marine floral on a hot summer night. Smoked seashells, neon surf, salty ocean air, bioluminescence under the waves, and phosphorescent foam on top. Originally released as a handmade extrait, the one and only Nitesurf is now part of R脙漏gime des Fleurs permanent lineup.

name: Captured By Candlelight
notes: Toffee, Cognac, Cinnamon, Beeswax, Fruity Notes, Oak
style: Boozy, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet, Warm, Woody - Dark
description: Rich, fruity & boozy, with oak woods and a hint of dripping hot candle wax. Captured by Candlelight first came into being when our philosopher friend, Professor Barry Smith asked for the aroma of Christmas pudding for a television programme he was appearing on the following morning. Very quickly, Sarah blended the scent of dark sugar, dried fruits soaked in cognac and toasted hazelnuts.The studio was full of visitors at the time, and they all wanted to wear it too, so it developed into a full fragrance, the story of a huge Christmas pudding alight with blue brandy flames, served in an oak panelled dining room, lit with candles. It's a warming amber, worn by our customers around the world, even those who have no idea what Christmas pudding smells like.

name: Mother Nature's Naughty Daughters
notes: Rose, Broom, Cedarmoss, Raspberry, Strawberry, Opoponax, Hedione, Maltol
style: Floral, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Fresh
description: Here we芒聙聶re celebrating nature芒聙聶s rich harvest by using many of perfumery芒聙聶s most beautiful but restricted materials, plus molecules which are totally safe. Deliciously naughty.

name: Hammersmith Tea & Biscuits
notes: Tea, Biscuits, Lemon, Vanilla, Hazelnut, Ginger, Wholemeal Flour, Friendliness, Hope
style: Gourmand
description: We moved to our Hammersmith studio in September 2019, and Sarah wanted to honour the London Borough which became our new home. She made four fragrances, of which Hammersmith Tea & Biscuits is the first. Hammersmith is on the River Thames, home to the Apollo, two tube stations with the same name, and a wide and varied range of people and eating places and we all muddle along together. She made Tea & Biscuits as a symbol of the British way of making friends and getting through a crisis which Hammersmith seems to epitomise. The biscuits featured are wholemeal lemon and ginger with toasted hazelnuts. The tea is black, with oat milk.It was almost finished when our friend, philosopher/perfumer/walking-perfumery-encyclopedia Harry Sherwood came to visit bringing some brilliant biscuit accords of his own. He suggested adding our bran absolute to give it more fibre, and so it was complete.

name: Warm Sands Blue Ocean
notes: Suntan Lotion, Sea Air, Vanilla, Soft Woods, White Flowers, Musk, Salt Water
style: Floral - Light, Fresh, Fresh - Aquatic, Tropical / Beachy
description: In the world of 4160 Tuesdays, seaside fragrances can vary- different beaches, climates and atmospheres. This is an escape to a warm sandy beach, somewhere you can swim in the sea and emerge to dry off in the sunshine: the Mediterranean or the Indian Ocean perhaps. The modern description is to call this style 芒聙聹solar芒聙聺; all fragrances of this type have a white flower, suntan lotion note. We added vanilla, musks, and Timbersilk - a pale woods molecule. It gets interesting when we take you away from the poolside, put you on the beach then drop you right in the blue ocean with a blend of oakmoss and Calone, the molecule responsible for the ozone aroma of sea air. Close your eyes feel transported to the seaside.

name: Seven Charms Discovery Set
description: Take an unforgettable journey into the thrilling, dynamic, unforgettable world of Liquides Imaginaires. This elegantly presented Discovery Set collects the seven global bestsellers from the across the beloved French house's uniquely creative offerings, all in travel-perfect 7.5ml atomizers.Blanche BeteAme du CoeurDom RosaBuveur de VentFleur de SablePhan-tasma

name: No Limit
notes: Coconut, Fruity Accord, Caramel, Musk, Ylang Ylang, Iris, Vanilla, Sandalwood, Patchouli
style: Creamy, Exotic, Fruity, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Amber
description: What is it about a magical vanilla scent? We're not talking about one that takes you straight to the kitchen, either- though we certainly love those too. But we're thinking more of that grown-up kind of vanilla, where the rich, luscious creaminess of the star ingredient is enhanced with elegant companions like florals and musks to create something that can surround the wearer in a uniquely perceptible aura of joy and confidence. That's why we can't stop wearing No Limit, a luxurious and enveloping new vanilla fragrance that feels sophisticated enough for special nights and comfortably sexy enough to turn heads any day of the week. The vanilla here, mouthwatering and caramel-sweetened, is given a sparkling brightness from a coconut and tropical fruit opening, which in turn leads into a lush and romantic iris and ylang floral heart. A warm, sensual drydown finds smooth sandalwood and seductive patchouli, which linger alongside the vanilla with the kind of long-lasting sillage that captures the imagination of anyone lucky enough to pass by. Discover No Limit, and feel yourself drawn towards the extraordinary.

name: No.13 Nouvelle Vague - Eau De Parfum
notes: Muguet, Coconut Water, Lemon, Tuscan Fig, Tonka, Agave, Vetiver, Amber, Sandalwood
style: Floral, Floral - Ambery Spice, Fresh - Clean, Tropical / Beachy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: This refreshing, rich scent takes you to the Italian island of Capri where Marie frequently traveled with her sister while visiting the Amalfi coast. Nouvelle Vague transports you to spring on the Italian coast, where you芒聙聶re walking on a tiny oceanside street lined with blooming wildflowers and native lemons. Its signature aroma captures an uplifting citrus accord, a sheer floral bouquet, and coconut wrapped with Tuscan fig and agave throughout. Tonka and undertones of golden woods ground this blend in comfort and warmth.

name: No.13 Nouvelle Vague- Perfume Oil
notes: Muguet, Coconut Water, Lemon, Tuscan Fig, Tonka, Agave, Vetiver, Amber, Sandalwood
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Fresh, Fresh - Clean, Tropical / Beachy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: This refreshing, rich scent takes you to the Italian island of Capri where Marie frequently traveled with her sister while visiting the Amalfi coast. Nouvelle Vague transports you to spring on the Italian coast, where you芒聙聶re walking on a tiny oceanside street lined with blooming wildflowers and native lemons. Its signature aroma captures an uplifting citrus accord, a sheer floral bouquet, and coconut wrapped with Tuscan fig and agave throughout. Tonka and undertones of golden woods ground this blend in comfort and warmth.

name: Blue Madeleine
notes: Bergamot, Pink Pepper, Cinnamon, Rose Centifolia, Black Tea, Milky Note, Cade, Peruvian Balsam, Praline, Sandalwood
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Light
description: In Proust'sRemembrance of Things Past, just a single bite of a petite madeleine cookie, washed down with just a spoonful of tea, brings back a flood of nostalgia and memory that pushes the narrator to recall his past in vivid detail. A tribute to perfume as an artform of living and intense olfactive memory, Blue Madeleine is a sumptuous and vibrant scent, with lush florals, smoky spices, and sweet gourmand notes all intertwined around the smooth elegance of black tea. True to the rush of memories long set aside, every element of Blue Madeleine sweeps over you with great emotional power- the spices crackle, the rose is sensually full-bodied, and the smoky cade note adds a degree of adult sophistication, reminding us that our memories are only so sweet because of all we've done and become since they happened. Romantic, whimsical, and mouthwatering all at once, Blue Madeleine would be enough to make Proust himself come back for a second sniff.

name: Guilty Crush
notes: Champagne, Cherry, Strawberry, Lipstick, Jasmine, Rose, Musk, Benzoin, Cedarwood, Vanilla
style: Boozy, Classic Feminine, Floral, Floral - Fruity
description: Both a symbol of elegance and a sensual declaration of transgression, lipstick holds a uniquely prolific feminine power in the imagination of those who wear it and those who can't stop looking. And as befits such a richly symbolic and evocative icon, Guilty Crush is a gorgeously rich and full-bodied lipstick scent- one that captures both the unmistakable fragrance of expensive lipstick and all the charm, confidence, and temptation imbued within. Beyond the powdery floral sweetness of the lipstick, Guilty Crush seduces us with a deeply enveloping creaminess, in which scarlet notes of black cherry and wild strawberry blend with fizzy, boozy champagne in a seductive cocktail. Voluptuous petals of rose and jasmine gradually warm on the skin until they've achieved a gorgeous depth, which then explodes into a base of warm and intoxicating resins, musky woods, and even more indulgently creamy vanilla. Looking for a lipstick fragrance that smells the way lipstick makes you feel? Look no further.

name: Hotel Cotton
notes: Cotton Blossom, Mimosa, Floral Musk, Sandalwood, Black Amber
style: Floral - Light, Fresh - Clean, Powdery / Soft
description: A sheer floral scent with milky cotton nuances. This warm and powdery cotton scent makes you feel sooo comfortable芒聙聯脗聽as if you're tucked into bed under the softest cotton sheets.

name: Red Burning Night
notes: Bergamot, Jasmine Sambac Absolute, Ylang-ylang, Pink Peppercorn, Lactonic Accord, Akigalawood, Cedarwood, Tonka Bean, Patchouli, Georgywood, Musk
description: I am a provocative perfume in the night of Cordoba, an evening jasmine transcended by a blazing sun on the ochre of my land. My perfumer has tailored in an intense freshness for me, made of a juicy bergamot, spiked with pink berries. Here, my narcotic flowers are crafted the old-fashioned way, to reveal their gourmand and subtle facet, balanced by dry and woody notes, enhanced by tonka bean and luminous musk. I am the proud and burning gaze of the Andalusian women when music sets the night on fire in the light of the candles. I am a fatal, hypnotic, powerful perfume. I am a fatal, hypnotic, powerful perfume. I am Red Burning Night.

name: Dirty Rainbow
notes: Red Saffron, Yellow Peach, Orange Blossom, Green Ivy, Blue Lavender, Purple Violet
description: A symphony of defiance. Dirty Rainbow opens with a deceptively sweet punch of peach and saffron, like a forbidden pleasure. The classic rainbow florals (lavender, violet, orange blossom) are present, but twisted 芒聙聯 shadowed by green ivy, hinting at something earthy and unexpected. This isn芒聙聶t a polite Pride scent; it pulses with life, with individuality, with a touch of dirty rebellion. Wear it, and you embody a rainbow after a summer storm 芒聙聯 vibrant, defiant, breathtaking, tangly real.LIMITED EDITION - 2,000 BOTTLES WORLDWIDE

name: Pannaco Tahaa
notes: Orange Vanilla, Curd Mango Mahachanok, Creamy Pannacotta, Tahitian Vanilla Extract, Tonka Absolute, Benzoin, Saffron, White Musk
style: Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet
description: In the heart of Thailand, on winding roads through the land of smiles, our olfactory adventure begins. A vibrant road trip leads us to discover the sensory treasure that will give life to Pannaco Tahaa fragrance. In Bangkok's bustling market, the Mahachanok mango offers itself to us, an exquisite fruit promising a sweet elixir that evokes the vibrant colors of local stalls. After capturing the fruity nuances of Thailand, we cast off for Tahiti, a jewel of Polynesia where Tahaa vanilla exhales its bewitching fragrance. On the golden shores, between gentle waves and palm trees swaying in the breeze, each vanilla pod contains the essence of a faraway island.Leaving the paradisiacal shores of Tahiti, our olfactory journey takes us to the bustling streets of Florence, Italy. In the warm atmosphere of a traditional dessert, the master perfumers precisely blend the harvested elements. The heart of Pannacotta blends delicately with the Mahachanok Mango Curd, creating a sweet and fruity harmony. Now we can fully experience and relish in Pannaco Tahaa as the olfactory pyramid takes shape, blending influences from Thailand, Tahiti and Italy. Every drop is carefully measured, every note orchestrated to capture the essence of our journey. Get ready for a delicious, out-of-this-world experience!

name: Orchid K
notes: Petitgrain, Oleander, Marshmallow, Black Vanilla Orchid, Magnolia, Wild Pink Sequoia, Vanilla, Ambrofix
description: DREAMY ROMANCE ON LAKE COMO.This hymn to the passion evoked by the black vanilla orchid combined with oleander and magnolia was born on the slopes of Monte Rosa. This delight of the senses opens with a delicious touch of marshmallow, saffron and small grains and then transports us among the redwoods on the shores of Lake Como with woody notes of incense that come out of thousand-year-old churches.

name: Stella Sonata
notes: Cassis, Dewberry, Rose Damask, Peony, Magnolia, Amber, Sandalwood
description: The story of the night when the flowers of damask rose, peony and magnolia boomed on each roof in the village. A fairytale atmosphere i which cassis and sweet dewberry harmonize with flowers.

name: Full Moon
notes: Lemon, Thyme, Orange, Violet, Carnation, Lily, Jasmine, Iris, Musk, Amber, Patchouli, Cedarwood
description: Among the changing seasons, autumn invites us to look back on ourselves. Autumn, the shortest season among the four seasons, is a full moon facing only one day in that season. Stop for a moment and take some time to reflect. After the lemon and orange pass like a gentle breeze, Lily and Jasmine slowly reveal what they saw. Full Moon is a floral woody type fragrance with a soft charisma added with a hint of spice that comes from classic floral notes. A meditative atmosphere connected to black amber, patchouli, musk and cedarwood seems to speak to us of generosity.

name: Cypress Opera
notes: Mandarin, Cypress, Hinoki, Olive Leaf, Pine Scotch, Amber, Cedarwood
description: A majestic cypress forest in the middle of winter that I came across while driving from Germany to Austria. Natural cypress oil and natura hinoki oil depict the grandeur and turbulent vitality of Mother Nature, which continued endlessly as if on a folding screen, even in the bitter cold of midwinter. Mandarin, the calmest of the citrus notes, and the primitive comfort of nature from the leaves of the olive tree. Cypress Forest creates an atmosphere that's both fresh and meditative.

name: Mossy Glen
notes: Bamboo, Fig Leaf, Narcissus, Black Tea, Cyclamen, Patchouli, Cedarwood, Tobacco
description: Mossy glen is a fragrance that expresses Scotland's Glencoe area. A feast of cute yet lyrical flowers blooming in the great nature of Europe. It matches the theme of nature and meditation and leads the space to a calm forest mood. The sweetness of figs and green notes of bamboo pass through the calm floral notes of daffodils and bitter black tea, leading to heavy patchouli and woody notes. The complex beauty of fruits, flowers, herbs and trees is a harmonious treat.

name: Bambini Soap
notes: Bergamot, Orange Blossom, Mimosa Petals, Yellow Freesia, White Musk, Amber
style: Fresh - Clean, Powdery / Soft
description: Do you like the smell of soap? It is a fragrance that combines the reverberation of baby soap with the powdery scent of mimosa and yellow freesia, amber that exudes an atmosphere of comfort and relaxation, and familiar musk and white musk. Soft soapy scent, as if the smell of soft baby's flesh and powdered milk brings you back to innocence and tenderness.

name: Fig Whiskey
notes: Peach, Fig Juice, Hay, Rum, Frankinsence, Myrrh, Sandalwood, Labdanum
description: A fragrance that expresses the classic atmosphere of drinking whiskey with peaches and figs. After the first scent with the complex taste of fruit, the scent of fig fruit gently leads to the scent of leaves, and the scent gradually moves downward, centering on notes of sandalwood and guaiac wood. It is a bold scent reminiscent of feeling warm and nostalgic芒聙聯 with the intoxicating aroma of boozy fruit.

name: The Colour of Pomegranate
notes: Pomegranate Accord, Blackcurrant, Soapy Note, Citruses, Rose Damascena, Black Pepper, Elemi, Incense, White Flowers, White Musk, Guaiac Wood, Labdanum, Sandalwood, Costus
style: Floral - Fruity, Woody Ambery Floral
description: The air is thick with the scent of white roses, that weave through your senses like a delicate white lace; unfolding like a page from a mystical manuscript, illuminated with vibrant colors and enigmatic symbols. the taste of ripe pomegranates lingers on your tongue, sweet yet tangibly bitter, a metaphor for the complexities of creative existence. With every heartbeat, you芒聙聶re drawn into a dance of poetic visuals, a celebration of life and artistry. 芒聙聯Mark Buxton

name: Dictator
notes: Birch Tar, Oak, Vetiver, Spices, Damask Rose, Labdanum, Myrrh, Cedar, Oud, Rum, Ambergris
style: Boozy, Earthy, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Amber, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Elegance and violence, power and charisma- Dictator is a classically constructed, commandingly rich fragrance that seizes the imagination and refuses to relinquish. Both intense and carefully proportioned, Dictator's velvety central combination of smooth woods, lush Damascus rose, warm resinous labdanum, and exotic spices evokes aristocratic sophistication, while an intriguing twist of birch tar provides a touch of bitter contrast that brings out supporting notes of myrrh and agarwood. It's a compelling balance of Old World charm and a tantalizing hint of darkness and danger, another deeply sensual, warm, and unforgettable release from Piotr Czarnceki.

name: Metal Redux
notes: Blood Orange, Grapefruit, Bourbon Geranium, Incense, Metal, Aldehydes, Myrrh, Sandalwood, Mineral Amber.
style: Avant-Garde, Citrus, Fresh - Clean, Metallic, Spicy, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Raw and industrial, yet oddly comfortable, Metal Redux is a thrillingly avant-garde fragrance that just happens to also be surprisingly suited for everyday wear. Like a glass-and-steel building set against the canvas of a clear blue sky, the metallic heart of this fragrance reflects and distorts the natural materials around it- the shimmering intensity of the bright citrus opening, the spicy floral nuance of bourbon geranium, and a dose of resinous, clean incense all weave around the cold sharpness of metal and soapy sparkle of aldehydes. While a hint of warmth does peek around the edges of the sandalwood and myrrh base, a uniquely dry and mineralic amber keeps the modernist balance intact and perfectly captures what makes Metal Redux so compellingly fun- like the 1979-by-way-of-hipster-Brooklyn stylings of Couteau's previous cult hit Fumabat, it's more than distinctive enough to turn heads, but balanced just right to keep you coming back long after the novelty fades. In other words, it's everything we want out of contemporary niche fragrance.

name: Isola Sol
notes: Citrus, Apricot, Peach, Jasmine, Ylang Ylang, Coconut, Sandalwood
style: Floral - Fruity, Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Salty / Oceanic
description: For those looking to chase the glow of sunset across the globe in pursuit of one glorious, endless summer, Isola Sol is an immersive ode to the perfect holiday- a warm and shimmering composition of tropical notes that evokes golden vistas over calm seas. Gorgeously genderless, Isola Sol's mouthwatering bounty of sun-kissed fruits- bright, crisp mandarin, sweet apricot, and juicy peach- melt into a creamy coconut-infused jasmine and ylang floral bouquet that, in the true spirit of a five-star island getaway, feels as cheerfully romantic as it does luxurious. In the amber glow of the base, a rich, smooth sandalwood suggests the relaxed sensuality of skin still warm after a day in the sun. A snapshot of a blissful day on the perfect stretch of sand, Isola Sol is a burst of radiant nostalgia to bring a small piece of paradise to you anywhere.

name: No. 8
notes: Pineapple, Apple, Citrus, Pear, Amber, Cinnamon, Rose, Patchouli, Iris, Vanilla, Cedar, Gaiac, Vetiver
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Fruity, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Rosendo Mateu 8 is an exotic product, fresh and vibrant and at the same time deep in its base notes. Classified within the fruity-floral-amber family, it is a versatile and intriguing perfume that can be enjoyed by anyone. It is a creation that stands out for its complexity and offers a sophisticated and multidimensional olfactory experience. The top notes are tropical and refreshing, with the sweetness of apple and pear combining harmoniously with the exotic touch of pineapple. The top notes give personality to the perfume and evoke a feeling of tropical paradise. The heart notes of No. 8 present a transition towards a deeper and more sensual territory. Amber provides a warm and sweet touch to the fragrance, while patchouli provides an earthier and slightly smoky air. Cinnamon adds a touch of spice and Bulgarian rose provides quality floral elegance. Finally, the base notes are rich and robust. Cedar wood provides a woody and soft character, while vetiver adds an earthy and slightly bitter facet. Guaiac, with its smoky, sweet aroma, complements these woody notes. Vanilla, for its part, softens and sweetens the composition, providing a warm and comforting closing.

name: Sexiest Fougere
notes: Petitgrain, Pineapple, Clary Sage, Green Tea, Geranium, Lemon, Bergamot, Lavender, Neroli, Rosemary, Labdanum, Vetiver, Cedarwood, Butter, Tonka Bean, Vanilla, Oakmoss
style: Classic Masculine, Fougere, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous
description: Is calling a fragrance "Sexiest Foug脙篓re" a bit bold? Sure, but a great fougere should be bold- a rich, classic, vibrant dose of timeless elegance that makes the world sit up and take notice. And having gotten our nose on Sexiest Foug脙篓re, it's hard to take issue with what's really, if anything, a modest assessment of just how good this intoxicatingly aromatic and complex extrait truly is. Potent yet exquisitely balanced, it opens with the brightness of French petitgrain alongside wild rosemary, Sicilian lemon, and Calabrian bergamot, all supporting the classic gentleman's combination of lavender from Grasse and Egyptian geranium. In a distinctive addition to the traditional oakmoss-oriented foug脙篓re base, a gourmand-forward blend of creamy vanilla and rich tonka bean with a sweet twist of pineapple add a warm sensuality that lingers for hours. Not every fragrance can get away with calling itself the Sexiest- but for something as unforgettably good as Sexiest Foug脙篓re, we're going to let it slide.

name: Creme Brulee
notes: Vanilla Cream, Coconut Milk, Burnt Sugar
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Milky, Sweet
description: Inspired by the perfumer芒聙聶s love for the most famous French dessert, this journey of inspiration began in the high elegance of a leading Parisian patisserie. An accomplished confectioner had the idea to create a delicious cr脙篓me br脙禄l脙漏e for the perfumer by adding coconut milk, giving the perfume a rich taste and smell. The attractive aroma and delightful taste ignited the perfumer芒聙聶s imagination, leading him to create this aromatic masterpiece.Crafted with precision and passion, Cr脙篓me Br脙禄l脙漏e may show simplicity in its aromatic notes but hides a complex blend of precious ingredients. At its heart lies a creamy union of coconut milk and vanilla, while at the top, caramelized sugar sets the emotions on fire just like the fire that burns sugar and releases the sensual smell of caramelized sweetness.Created right under the iconic Eiffel Tower, with the innovative idea of the perfumer taking the perfume workshop with him, compressed into a suitcase, allowing him freedom of inspiration. Prepare to be endlessly asked about the divine essence you wear.

name: Cherry Powder
notes: Powder, Macaron, Milk, Cherry
style: Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: Introducing Cherry Powder- a fragrance born from an irresistible impulse to capture the beloved scent of baby powder in its most elegant form, bottled to ignite your senses with the vibrant colors of love.Inspired by a desire to evoke endless joy, Cherry Powder unveils a base of luxurious powder that lingers on your skin for hours, creating an enchanting canvas for its creamy and velvety heart. Imagine indulging in the decadent sweetness of macarons and milk, leading to an exhilarating explosion of juicy cherries 芒聙聯 each note as bright and delightful as life itself.Let Cherry Powder be your daily reminder to embrace the beauty of each moment, wrapped in its irresistible allure. Let it awaken your senses to a world of boundless possibilities.

name: Pear Gelato
notes: Waffle Cone, Milk, Sugar, Vanilla, Pear
style: Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Milky, Sweet
description: Pear Gelato is more than just a fragrance, it芒聙聶s a journey back to the sweet nostalgia of childhood. Picture yourself strolling down memory lane, clutching the most delectable ice cream while the sun芒聙聶s warm rays paint a smile on your face. The crisp waffle cone, sturdy as a biscuit and utterly delicious, mingles with the scent of fresh milk and sugar, whisking your mind away. But the true magic unfolds when these elements intertwine with the irresistible aroma of ripe pear. Inspired by authentic Italian ice cream, this creation reflects the perfumer芒聙聶s adoration for Italian gelato.Crafted with meticulous care, 芒聙聹Pear Gelato芒聙聺 is a testament to the perfumer芒聙聶s artistry, infusing each molecule with passion and creative brilliance. It offers an aesthetic experience that speaks to the soul, capturing the essence of pear gelato with unparalleled realism.This fragrance isn芒聙聶t merely a blend of ingredients, it芒聙聶s an immersive experience that transports you to a realm where the love of ice cream transcends gender and age.

name: Infuse
notes: Bergamot, Guaiac Wood, Freesia, Mate, Oolong Tea, Osmanthus, Ambrox, Vetiver
style: Smoky, Woody - Spicy
description: In Asia, the ancient drink of tea must be prepared with the utmost attention to detail, sometimes with an accompanying ceremony. At its best, tea is both relaxing and invigorating, sensual and stimulating. A tonic to carry you through the day. To celebrate the joys of Asian tea culture, we came up with INFUSE, a fragrance based on the flavours and aromas of the famous Oolong brew. Infuse is a fragrance that is spicy, deep, smoky and herbal芒聙聰perfect for tea connoisseurs.

name: Sweet Leaf
notes: Grapefruit, Eucalyptus, Cannabis, Angelica Root, Turpentine, Jasmine, Cashmeran Wood, Patchouli
style: Green / Herbaceous
description: 芒聙聹Throughout history, cannabis has served as a catalyst for spiritual exploration and inner liberation. Its significance traces back to the counterculture movement of the 1960s, where it blossomed into a realm of expression through language, art, literature and music. The act of smoking a joint carries profound symbolism, representing a gateway to newfound freedom. In the realm of fragrances, behold the captivating essence of Sweet Leaf, capable of elevating your senses to soaring heights.芒聙聺 芒聙聯 Room 1015

name: Purple Mantra
notes: Lavender, Freesia, Pink Berries, Iris, Floral Transparent, Clary Sage, Incense, Myrrh, Ambroxan, Musk
description: 芒聙聹In 1968, The Beatles traveled to Rishikesh, India, to meet Maharishi Mahesh Yogi. He introduced them to Transcendental Meditation, an alternative to psychedelic drugs as a tool to attaining higher consciousness and boosting creativity. The long meditation sessions resulted in recording the White Album, one of the most creative records ever produced芒聙娄 PURPLE MANTRA is an olfactory experience designed to bring the pleasurable feeling of inner calm into your daily life. Allow it to amplify the voice of Intuition and quieten everything else.芒聙聺 芒聙聯Room 1015

name: The Mariner's Rhyme
notes: Bergamont, Grapefruit, Ozonic Notes, Lavender, Elemi, Orange Flower, Iris, Ambergris, Oakmoss, Musk, Patchouli, Incense
style: Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Clean, Salty / Oceanic, Tropical / Beachy
description: "My relationship with the sea is conveyed through some references dear to me: the sacred sense of the drama in 芒聙聹The Rime of the Ancient Mariner芒聙聺 by S.T. Coleridge, the epic and theatrical adaptation by Iron Maiden, but especially the mysterious, evocative, contemplative, experimental, immersive instrumental song 芒聙聹Sailor芒聙聶s Tale芒聙聺 from the album 芒聙聹Islands芒聙聺 by King Crimson."The Mariner's Rhyme is a fascinatingly constructed oceanic scent-  a fresh and transparent unisex fragrance on one side, yet densely structured on the other. The citrusy and ozonic opening has a lively and modern character, reinforced by the sharp edge of aldehydes. We are at sea, but there is a hint of orange blossom in the background coming from the mainland. The salty ambergris and the metallic aldehyde associated with oakmoss evoke the taste of oyster shells, as well as the shadowy depths of the sea. The transparency of the ozonic accord transforms into a more opaque and thick accord, thanks to iris, which adds an almost sacred and mystical character, evoked by elemi and incense. Transparent and luminous, with a subtle sense of animalic sensuality, The Mariner's Rhyme is Francesca Bianchi's most sophisticated and fascinating composition yet.

name: Rabbit
notes: Green Vegetable Leaves Accord, Cinnamon, Bergamot, Apple, Clover Flower Accord, Carrot, Jasmine Absolute, Violet, Patchouli, Musks, Hay, White Almond, Vanilla, Biscuit Accord
description: Tonight, the air is green with clover, hay,and little clumps of grasses on the breeze,unsettled dirt, the dusty mysteriesof rabbits tunnelling the dark. They strayinto the meadow, sniff the wind芒聙聰bouquetof violets. They hop in twos and threes,their shadows cotton-tailed. Or else they freezewhen something feathered screeches far away.They stand like tufted stones. But now the nightgoes soft and jasmine-sweet again. A scentof petals presses to their fur. There芒聙聶s fruitto eat. There is the skittering delightof digging into earth, the sedimentof dreams perfumed with carrot-top and root.芒聙聯 Jehanne Dubrow

name: Arabican Rose
notes: Rose, Almond, Raspberry, Coffee Beans, Vanilla, Sandalwood, Patchouli
style: Creamy, Earthy, Floral, Floral - Spicy, Gourmand
description: A charming and sumptuous stroll through an enchanted garden cafe, Arabican Rose is an elegant treat for rose and coffee lovers alike. It opens with an intriguing and lively dance of fresh and fruity notes, led by the deep tonalities of pure rose essential oil harmoniously blended into the reassuring aromatic sweetness of almond. Raspberry adds a playfully sparkling touch that builds into the sophisticated and romantic heart, where the rose reveals itself in all its lush majesty. Providing rich and earthy contrast, the coffee note proves every bit the perfect pairing, striking a full and indelibly seductive chord. As the enveloping sweetness of the vanilla base emerges, the roasted coffee tones take on newly gourmand significance, with sandalwood and patchouli adding a mouthwateringly creamy, mysteriously sensual depth. Luxurious, timeless, and beautiful, Arabican Rose is a bold new direction for Maison Tahite.

name: Vanilla Park
notes: Ho Wood, Heliotrope, Tangerine, Vanilla, Cotton Candy, Coconut Milk, Benzoin, Styrax
style: Creamy, Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Milky, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet
description: Inspired by the magical atmosphere of a travelling carnival, Vanilla Park is a joyfully timeless gourmand to make those of all ages recall the carefree pleasures of a day of sweets and thrills. The woody and sweetly floral opening summons the essence of the fairgrounds themselves, buzzing with the freshness of nature in summertime, leading into the mouthwatering heart of rich, smooth vanilla absolute, given a touch of exotic mystery with an accent of coconut milk and a lively and evocative cotton candy accord. A warm, resinous, deeply nuanced base of styrax and benzoin completes the portrait of childhood delight, giving the fragrance the same kind of enveloping comfort as a pleasantly hazy memory of a perfect day. Lusciously, whimsically nostalgic, Vanilla Park is the perfect scent for anyone who never forgot what it was like to be young.

name: L'humaniste Extreme
notes: Aldehyde, Bergamot, Black Pepper, Cardamom, Lemon, Pink Pepper, Jasmine, Nutmeg, Patchouli, Quince, Rose, Moss, Tolu Balm, Tonka
description: L'Humaniste Extreme revisits freshness in perfumery, starting on top, as its illustrious predecessor, with notes of bergamot, lemon, pepper and pink berries, enhanced by a liquorous, powerful heart.A fleshy note of quince, a hint of patchouli, melting with a comforting, elegant tolu balm, rounded out by a delightful accord of moss and Tonka bean.

name: Smoke of Desert
notes: Oman Incense, Elemi Resin, Styrax, Cashmere Wood, Absinth, Amirys, Leather, Incense
description: Nighttime journey in the Oman desert, chosen land for the production of the most prestigious incense in the world. An extraordinary resin down from ancient times to communicate and to pay tribute to gods. Smoke of Desert is the celebration of the most exclusive and pure incense enriched by absinth and cashmere notes.

name: Queen Of Silk
notes: Osmanthus, Magnolia, Saffron, Tuberose, Passionfruit, Agarwood, Patchouli, Vanilla, Incense, Myrrh, Ambroxan, Cedar, Musk
style: Classic Feminine, Creamy, Floral, Floral - White, Woody - Amber
description: Queen of Silk is presented in the Creed signature bottle, boasting a rich purple hue in tribute to the majestic and vibrant purple dyes that were reserved for the highest echelons of the nobility. Notes of Chinese osmanthus, Javanese patchouli, and decadent tuberose weave together with an ethereal beauty that evokes the opulent robes that once clothed emperors and kings. These heady notes dance over complex cedar, agarwood and smolderingly soft Madagascan vanilla in a lingering, sensual testament to timeless refinement. As luxuriously smooth as it is unforgettably lovely, Queen of Silk is a fragrance that truly captures the luminous elegance of this precious fabric.

name: House
notes: Fig, Jasmine, Raspberry, Hawaiian Sandalwood, Saffron, Cashmere, Orange Flower, Heliotrope, Ambrette, Oud (Hindi, Cambodian, Sri Lankan), Tonka Bean, Cedarwood
style: Fruity
description: A signature scent worthy unisex fragrance inspired by the House music created in Chicago In the mid to late 80's.

name: Sun-Gria
notes: Blood Orange, Mandarin, Lemon, Bergamot, Green Notes, Ginger, Cinnamon, Cloves, Pink Pepper, Apple, Blackcurrant, Peach, Raspberry, Red Grape, Vino Tinto, Turkish Rose, Cardamom, Brown Sugar, Vanilla, Vanilla Pods, Tonka Bean, Benzoin, Sandalwood, Patchouli, Musk, Birch Wood, Cedar Wood, Amber
description: An irresistibly fruity and lively sensory experience awaits you in Sun Gria 芒聙聯 an authentic explosion of summer joy packed into a fragrance. Sun-Gria captures the bright light of a sunny day with a symphony of citrus notes that awaken the senses and bring joy to the heart. Blood orange, bergamot, ginger, and pink pepper blend with mandarin and lemon, creating a sparkling bouquet that evokes the freshness of a carefree summer. The juicy heart of fruit, enriched with accents of black currant, raspberry, peach, grape, apple, and Turkish rose, recalls the festive atmosphere of Spanish sangria, transporting you into a whirlwind of joy and fun. Finally, the soft, sugary finish, enhanced by notes of brown sugar, vanilla, and tonka bean, envelops the skin in an embrace of warmth and sweetness. Sun-gria is an ode to summer, ready to transport you to a world of pure enjoyment.

name: Tilia
notes: Linden, Broom, Jasmine, Vetiver, Heliotrope, Woody Accord, Ambroxan
style: Floral, Floral - Light, Warm, Woody - Fresh
description: A simple, yet beautiful solar floral guaranteed to leave a smile, Tilia is a scent of neverending summer sun. The first in a constellation of upcoming floral scents from Marc-Antoine Barrois and his longtime collaborative partner Quentin Bisch, Tilia was imagined as a fictional star that shines brightest after simple, happy days, and that's exactly what this carefree floral does- delightfully fresh and sunny notes of linden blossom and honeyed broom frolic alongside the almondy tones of heliotrope and a smoothly romantic jasmine. A cleanly woodsy base adds a twinkling stellar element that incorporates Tilia into the brand's larger cosmic theme without diluting the wonderful warmth that sets this fragrance apart- like an eternally blooming flower that glows even under the stars, Tilia is a blissful departure from the everyday.

name: Corylus
notes: Toasted Rice, Hazelnut, Anise, Clove, Wheat, Amber
description: Corylus holy tree, carrier of wisdom and divinatory knowledge which, through its fruits, sends us prescient dreams, ancient view and bring us into a magical superhuman dimension.

name: Artik Sea
notes: Bergamot, Lime, Yuzu, Pink Grapefruit, Cedar, Mandarin, Orange Blossom, Pink Pepper, Ozone Notes, Aquatic Notes, Green Notes, Absinthe, Rose, Jasmine, Davana, White Flowers, Fig, Myrtle, Marine Notes, Arctic Wisteria, Oakmoss, Seaweed Absolute, Wakame Seaweed, Ambrette Seeds, Salt, Ambergris, Patchouli, Precious Woods, Amber
style: Salty / Oceanic
description: A frozen sea, like a Lime granita sprinkled with salt and then Yuzu, Arctic Wisteria, and suspended dreams. A fresh and powerful scent that knows how to overwhelm with elegance. A hug with a sensual and magnetic trail. One of the most beautiful olfactory paintings ever painted. In Lorenzo Pazzaglia's Artik Sea, the cold and icy sea of the North Pole manifests itself majestically from the first spray, transporting us beyond the Arctic Circle to lands whipped by a cold wind, where the sea and untouched nature are at the center of everything. The swirling marine and aquatic notes meet the balsamic freshness of Mint and green notes, and are softened in their progression by a warm, woody, musky, and persistent accord. Finally, the salinity of Gray Amber is indissolubly linked to the water element and transfers its immense power in service of this splendid niche perfume. A best-seller!

name: Zucchero
notes: Sugar
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: Sometimes, all you need to enjoy the sweeter side of life is a bit of sugar, and that's exactly what Zucchero is- a pure, sweet, fluffy cloud of pure sugar. Use it to add a delicious burst of gourmand indulgence to any other scent, or wear it alone to turn heads and make mouths water wherever you go.

name: Panna Montata
notes: Whipped Cream, Milk, Sugar
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Milky, Sweet
description: Delectably rich, impossibly light- true hand-whipped Italian whipped cream is a universe away from the cheap canned stuff. With Panna Montata, the Queen of Gourmand delivers the ultimate whipped cream scent- fluffy, milky, delicate - and just the right amount of sweet.

name: Cacao
notes: Chocolate
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Like a bar of delectably smooth milk chocolate studded with satisfyingly crunchy crispy bits, Cacao is a mouthwatering journey to pure gourmand indulgence as only Hilde Soliani could envision. Chocolate lovers, cookie lovers, and anyone with a sweet tooth- this is the one.

name: Magic Mushrooms
notes: Cypress, Grapefruit, Cardamom, Magic Mushrooms, Blackcurrant, Herbal Notes, Thyme, Lavender, Clove, Davana, Immortelle, Ylang-ylang, Cannabis, Liqueur Notes, Patchouli, Vetiver, Moss
description: Magic Mushrooms is a fragrance that embodies transformation, spiritual magic, and dimensionality, brimming with unconventional, energetically extraordinary ingredients. The composition, fused with notes of calming cypress, vivacious grapefruit, and healing cardamo, teems with life, opening gates of perception just as vividly as its namesake. The heart of the composition beats in an eccentric rhythm of mushroom and blackcurrant, enshrouded in herbs and the secretive energy of davana, ylang-ylang, and consciousness-elevating cannabis. It's a fragrant gateway to one芒聙聶s inner self, where, through the incredible power of thyme, lavender, clove, and immortelle, magic intertwines with the everyday. In the deeply resonant base, a shadow of liqueur notes, patchouli, vetiver, and moss holds the promise of deeper dimensions of existence. A transformative composition that unveils the uncharted landscape of the soul, Magic Mushrooms will leave you forever changed.

name: Un Bel Amour d'Ete
notes: Gardenia, Magnolia, Champaca, Ylang-ylang, Turmeric, Sandalwood, Vanilla, Cumin
style: Creamy, Floral, Floral - White, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: It芒聙聶s the feeling that you芒聙聶ve met the love of your life. Mad passion against a backdrop of blue waves, hot shiny skins embracing on warm sand, exhaling the scent of white flowers and their animalic notes.How can you translate a season of pleasures on the beach that thrills all your senses? Here, Marc-Antoine Corticchiato has crafted the quintessential beach scent, gorging it with the sumptuous natural ingredients he blends so masterfully in his compositions. Flesh-soft corollas waft fleshly scents melding skin and petals, suffused with sun-kissed eroticism. Rounded and milky, gardenia is the beating heart of the fragrance. It is enhanced by a radiant magnolia flower essence with nuances of apricot, and the golden languor of ylang absolute.The rare and exotic tropical cousin of magnolia, champaca lends the balsamic, jasmine-y, oily lavishness of its absolute to this mirage of floral flesh. Blond vanilla from Madagascar conjures golden skin. The essence of Indian sandalwood intensifies the creamy sensation of this bouquet. Precious ambrette, a vegetal musk, sheds its light on silky sand.Carnal and solar, the perfume blooms on skin in a searingly sensuous evocation of an unforgettable, beautiful summer love.

name: Nota Sugar
notes: Caramelized Sugar, Tropical Apple, Coconut Infusion, Vanilla Pod, Wild Raspberry, Almond Praline, Tonka Bean Absolute, Musk, Heliotrope
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: Immerse yourself in the world of Nota Sugar, a fruity and sweet gourmet fragrance, the true embodiment of addiction. Upon opening, this captivating fragrance reveals captivating notes of caramelized sugar and tropical apple, providing an introduction that is both sweet and tantalizing. The richness of its composition creates an irresistible scent, where each scent is an ode to indulgence. Nicknamed 芒聙聹The Addiction芒聙聺, Nota Sugar is designed to seduce and captivate, boldly blending sweet and fruity aromas, creating a unique and deeply addictive olfactory signature.

name: Sonic Flower
notes: Pink Pepper, Carrot Seeds, Orris, Jasmine Petals, Ambroxan, Cashmere Woods, Skin Musks
style: Creamy, Floral - White
description: There's no such thing as 芒聙聹a girl in a band芒聙聺, but there is definitively a thing as THE girl in the band. Sonic Flower vividly narrates the journey of front-women who not only embrace music but also reshape the very way we create and experience it. Just as Blondie or Joan Jett revolutionized the musical landscape, these women forge paths, break barriers and command stages, infusing their unique voice into the rhythm of history. Let the flower capture your attention with its singular ability to stimulate your imagination.

name: Cherry Punk
notes: Cherry, Saffron, Sichuan Pepper, Violet, Jasmine Absolute, Mimosa, Patchouli, Tonka Bean, Black Leather
style: Fruity
description: 430 King芒聙聶s Road, London, the Vivienne Westwood's store called SEX, this is where it all begins. Cool kids with bleached hair swapping rare vinyl records. Distressed denim, hand-painted leather, latex, tartans, prints that would make your parents blush and lock you in the house for the whole summer芒聙娄 Did Punk invent fashion or fashion invented Punk? From underground clubs to the national TV, Punk always had its own style, its own press (fanzines), its own movies, its own poetry...So we figured it should have its own fragrance. Loud like the rehearsal in the room without sound isolation. Powerful like youth riot but still sweet and romantic - the idealism of adolescence wrapped in a heavy leather jacket.

name: Wavechild
notes: Orange, Mandarin, Lemon, Watermelon, Coconut, Amber Woods, Cocoa, Ambergris
description: Immerse yourself in an olfactory journey and embark on tribute to Surf Culture, riding the olfactive waves of Orange, Watermelon, Coconut and Ambergris. From the legendary Huntington Beach to the surf gangs, bikers, and the electrifying blend of edginess and creativity, Wavechild is a celebration of the art of surfing. Stripped to the core, the perfume in your hands is a raw, wire-to-wire, rebellious burst of energy. Open your nostrils, expand your mind, and become the Wavechild.

name: Sirene
notes: Cherry, Pepper, Oud, Incense, Lactonic (milky Accord), Moss, Benzoin, Cistus, Labdanum, Cypriol
style: Floral - Fruity, Sweet
description: Sir脙篓ne is crafted for those who dare to stand out. Infused with a seductive burst of cherries and a captivating blend of pepper and incense, Sir脙篓ne embodies a story of empowerment that resonates with every spray.

name: Drunk Maple
notes: Pink Pepper, Davana, Rum, Coffee Resinoid, Maple Syrup, Soft Suede, Sensual Vanilla, Creamy Sandalwood, Benzoin, Orcanox
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: The perfect pre-drink for a wild night. An ultra-addictive maple syrup accompanied by a golden rum. An intoxicating blend...

name: Angels' Powder
notes: Pink Pepper Extra Pure, Icing Sugar, Vanilla Sugar, Raspberry, Cotton Candy, Heliotrope, White Musks, Guaiac Wood
style: Sweet
description: Inspiration: Cotton candy, nail polish, cocaine, fresh paint, the guilty pleasures.

name: Le Flocon de Johann K
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Cyclamen, Cardamom, Incense, Mimosa Absolute, Aqueous, Ozonic, Menthol Notes, Evernyl, White Musk, Narcissus Absolute
description: Mimosa and narcissus absolutes snort amid fresh, aqueous and ozonic notes. A cold wind swirls yellow pompoms and white petals to the surface of a pool of water stuck in the ice. The flakes of late snow cover a Japanese mineral garden in silence and white. Surrounded by swirls of incense, a meditating Zen master contemplates this floral and airy ballet. And since only packed and solidified snow can burn, the aldehydes metallize and harden the sweetness of the accord while warming it.

name: Bangla Yasaman
notes: Bergamot, Bucchu, Cardamom, Lemon, Turmeric, Bitter Orange Petit Grain, Jasmine Accord, Celery Seed, Osmanthus, Saffron, Clary Sage Absolute, Fir Balsam, Indole, Peruvian Balsam, Absolute Tobacco, Absolute Vanilla
description: To create Bangla Yasaman, Isabelle Larignon plays on her craft as an illusionist and constructs without a drop of natural jasmine absolute, a soliflore of incredible reality. The jasmine accord is dressed with spices and the celery facet of cis-jamone is accentuated. Like curries and immortelle, celery seed essence recalls the warm, sensual scent of the skin.Like a hybrid of jasmine, Bangla Yasaman exudes the fruity and animal aspects of Sambac, and the green and tobacco aspects of Grandiflorum. The accord is softened and warmed by Peruvian balsam supported by vanilla absolute. Cardamom brings freshness and creamy effects to the top notes. The osmanthus flower naturally supports the leathery and country notes of paracresol, while providing the velvety feel of apricot skin.

name: Milky Dragon
notes: Bergamot, Bucchu, Cardamom, Rose Ketones, Cis-jasmone, Ionones, Lactones, Hazelnut, Ozonic Note, Clary Sage, Virginia Cedar, Fir Balsam, Evernyl (oak Moss)
description: Although widely discussed in perfumery, tea inspired Isabelle Larignon and more particularly Milky Oolong, a semi-oxidized "blue" tea appreciated for its naturally milky note. The opportunity to work on the gourmet side by discarding vanilla or sticky notes of caramel and cotton candy.Immersing your nose in the dry leaves of this tea is like diving into the fur of a home cat: it is warm, soft and dry. The olfaction is delicious like milk on the stove, comforting like a barely roasted chestnut in autumn. Coumarind notes reminiscent of hay dried by the summer that has passed, exude like a consolation. Cis-jasmone obliges, mixing with the whole a bouquet of white flowers. On the palate, the floral, creamy, milky liqueur is enriched with jammy fruit effects: apricot, mirabelle plum, fig芒聙娄This is all we feel in Milky Dragon. As well as the memory of a tea garden caught in the mist of the dawning day. Vegetation and humidity meet in the brilliance of green foliage beaded with dew, as shiny as lacquered leather.

name: Love Delight
notes: Ginger, Mandarin, Rosewater, Cinnamon, Heliotrope, Jasmine, Rose, Vanilla, Cocoa, Rum Absolute, Cypriol
style: Gourmand, Powdery / Soft
description: The interplay of delicate florals and irresistible treats, radiance and insouciance. Love Delight is an invite to savor every moment of indulgence.

name: Peach's Revenge
notes: Peach, Guava, Nectarine, Amaretto, Orris, Cardamom, Ginger, Cinnamon, Bark, Amber, Vanilla, Caramel, Musks
style: Fruity
description: A handsome villain struts out of the orchard trumpeting an exuberance of salacious fruit芒聙聰peaches, guava and prunella. The creaminess of vanilla and caramel builds mouthwatering anticipation. Orris creates a velvet fuzz under Renaissance skies. The Machiavellian plot thickens as spices emerge芒聙聰cardamom, ginger, cinnamon. Bark threatens to turn into wood; these amber daggers are hard. With one sip of amaretto you芒聙聶re reminded that even a sweet peach芒聙聶s stone can be poisonous.

name: Elysium Pour Femme
notes: Mandarin, Peach, Peony, Violet, Musk, Pink Pepper
style: Floral - Fruity, Floral - Light, Spicy
description: Introducing Elysium Pour Femme, a fruity floral fragrance inspired by a confident woman who forges her own path becoming the perfect counterpart to her brother, Elysium Pour Homme.Casting a kaleidoscope of colors across the horizon, this fragrance is brought to life through notes of Mandarin, Peach, Peony, Cyclamen (Lily of the Valley), Violet and Musks.

name: Delhi Parfum
notes: Champaca, Orange Blossom, Myrrh, Patchouli, Vetiver, Red Cedar, Bergamot, Cardamom, Rose
style: Earthy, Floral, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy
description: A spicy, mystical plunge into the winding, chaotic streets of the old city. Amid the sounds of car horns, rickshaws and mopeds, the maelstrom of smells from the bazaars and the smoke of incense from sacred sites, the atmosphere is sultry and effervescent. Suddenly, a divine fragrance fills the air: a gust of heady, sun-kissed champaca, warm, sensual myrrh, the woody, smoky, earthy accents of patchouli and vetiver, mingled with the sweet notes of rose petals, peppery cardamom and fruity green bergamot.

name: Mantes La Jolie
notes: Mint, Basil, Bergamot, Lemon, Eucalyptus, Ginger, Arabian Jasmine, Green Fig, Blackcurrant, Cedar Oil, Mat脙漏
style: Floral - Fruity, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: On a hot summer芒聙聶s day, take a morning stroll by the majestic collegiate and down the narrow historic streets of the town. From the market stalls wafts a delicious scent of freshly-picked aromatic herbs: mint and bergamot, with its distinctly lemony aroma, the crisp, green notes of eucalyptus leaves and fig mingled with the honeyed fragrance of spicy ginger, sun-drenched Arabian jasmine and herbaceous mat脙漏. The fresh, invigorating scent lingers on the skin for a long time.

name: Silver Marble
notes: Ice Crystals, Cold Molecules, Frozen Woods
style: Avant-Garde, Fresh - Citrus, Unusual / Unexpected, Woody - Fresh
description: Crystallized in icy elegance, Silver Marble is an olfactory epic inspired by the frozen Kingdom of Niflheim from Nordic myth that evokes the frosty majesty of pristine snowy landscapes. Fresh, crisply bright notes of frozen citrus blend with a mantle of sharp, crystalline woods, creating an atmosphere of purity and mystery. Like an arctic storm enveloping the brave traveler, Silver Marble transports its wearer on a journey through the cold embrace of the northern wilderness. A symphony of icy, penetrating aromas, this fragrance is an invitation to explore the unexplored, to embrace the primal power of ice, and to find beauty in its raw majesty. Silver Marble is more than a perfume; it is a sensory experience that defies the boundaries of the possible and envelops us in a world of Nordic charm and mystery.

name: Vietnamese Coffee
notes: Roasted Coffee, Dark Chocolate, Condensed Milk, Muguet, Tonka Bean, Amber, Cedarwood
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Milky, Sweet
description: Vietnamese Coffee EDP honors Vietnam's delightful brew, crafted from dark-roasted Robusta beans, which exude a bold, caramel-chocolate richness and a pronounced bitterness that harmonizes exquisitely with creamy condensed milk. Topped with ice, it becomes the iconic drink that is the perfect way to start the day.

name: Da Lat
notes: Juniper Berry, Cypress, Red Wine, Rose, Magnolia, Peony, Cedarwood, Cypriol, Musk
style: Floral, Floral - Ambery Spice
description: Da Lat EDP pays homage to the charming city of Da Lat, a haven of romance and serenity in central Vietnam. Nestled amidst lush pine forests, Da Lat boasts year-round idyllic weather, drawing visitors seeking inner peace. At its core, Da Lat EDP is an innovative rose scent that unfolds like a love letter, where every spray carries the promise of romance and surprise.

name: Monsoon Tea
notes: Bergamot, Petitgrain, Lime, Green Tea, Muguet, Amber, Musk, Vetiver
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Green / Herbaceous
description: Monsoon Tea captures the tranquil moment of savoring green tea after a rainstorm. Brewing Vietnamese green tea is a unique process, which begins with selecting young tea leaves, followed by swift boil to create a drink that is light, bright, and refreshing. As the rain subsides, every spray of Monsoon Tea is a sip of optimism, clarity, and renewal.

name: Maraschino
notes: Red Cherry, Almonds, Strawberry, Apple, Peach, Jasmin Sambac, Rose, Heliotrope, Mimosa, Orris, Vetiver, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Tonka, Musk, Amber, Vanilla
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Sweet
description: Welcome to the whimsical world of 'Maraschino', a fragrance that embodies the luscious allure of the sweet symphony of Red Cherries, tempting Almonds, ripe Strawberries, juicy Apples, and velvety Peached that compose an exquisite overture, evoking the vibrant hues of a sunrise. As the day unfolds, the heart notes bloom into a captivating garden filled with Jasmine Sambac , Roses, Heliotrope, Mimosa, and Orris, evoking the image of a lush floral tapestry in full bloom.With dusk's arrival, "Maraschino" transforms yet again, as Vetiver, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Tonka, Musk, Amber, and Vanilla take center stage. These base notes craft a warm , sultry embrace, weaving an irresistible take that lingers delicately on the skin, a lingering tale of allure and sensuality.

name: Jest
notes: Plum, Cardamom, Apple, Heliotrope, Rhum, Chocolate, Vanilla, Ambroxan, Musk
style: Creamy, Floral, Floral - Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic
description: JEST is that happy state that carries us into the moment where the soft, warm spring seems right around the corner. The opulence of the scent embarks us on a journey through the wast highlands of Iceland on a warm spring afternoon, with no none in sight.Along this exhilarating path of exploration, the sweetness of the plum and apple soon gives way to the feverish power of the Rhum and chocolate. An experience of all senses that the smooth vanilla and the wild musk enrich with their earthy envelope.

name: TestoX
notes: Spices, Patchouli, Oud, Birch Tar
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Does a unisex scent have to walk a gentle line? Or can it harness the explosive energy of traditionally gendered notes and repurpose them into something both thrillingly dynamic and universally accessible? With TestoX, a potent and intoxicating blend of all things spicy, smoky, earthy, and balsamic, Aura presents a new kind of unisex fragrance- one that never shies away from the power of its composition while brilliantly repurposing that strength into something compellingly elegant and wonderfully wearable. At its center, a crystal-clear, high-definition patchouli molecule that's been cracked open and reconstructed, stripping away every trace of stale mustiness and emerging on the other end as a sophisticated and graceful modern heart. Combined with similarly reimagined and polished supporting notes of oud, spice, and tar, TestoX carries an undeniably masculine profile, and yet it shimmers over the skin with the same perfectly calibrated sillage as all Aura fragrances. A new kind of fragrance, TestoX accentuates the natural energies of all who wear it, defying the boundaries of conventional gender definitions to unfold into a stunning, energetic perfume like no other.

name: Tirtha
notes: Incense, Sandalwood, Herbs, Clove, Galbanum, White Champaca, Lemongrass, Jasmine, Sambac, Smoke, Frangipani, Davana, Vetiver, Patchouli, Moss, Papyrus, Amyris, Cumin Seed, Nutmeg, Bodhi Tree, Camphor, Aldehyde, Angelica, Benzoin, Cinnamon
style: Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Spicy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Tirtha draws its inspiration from the profound spiritual and ritualistic significance embedded in the Sanskrit word it embodies. Like the sacred pilgrimage sites it is named after, Tirtha is a sensory journey that transcends the ordinary, guiding you to a realm where the earthly and divine converge. Much like the ritual baths taken at the holy fords, the top notes of Lemongrass, Sacred Herbs, and Galbanum initiate a refreshing and cleansing experience. These opening notes set the stage for a fragrant pilgrimage, reminiscent of the purifying ceremonies performed at revered sites along rivers and lakes. The heart of the fragrance unfolds, much like the sacred landscapes, featuring the luxurious scents of Jasmine Sambac, White Champaca, and Frangipani, embodying the grace and beauty found in these spiritual spaces.The spices woven into the composition芒聙聰Cumin Seed, Nutmeg, and Cinnamon芒聙聰reflect the complexity of spiritual teachings and the warmth of communal rituals. Just as a pilgrimage is a crossing point between the material and spiritual realms, Tirtha's fragrance bridges the tangible and the divine. It captures the essence of sacred connections, as seen in the harmonious blend of Camphor, Angelica, and Aldehyde, forming a fragrant tapestry that transcends the boundaries of ordinary experience. Tirtha's essence is anchored in the grounding elements of Vetiver, Patchouli, and Bodhi Tree, mirroring the connection between the earthly and the divine. This aromatic symphony symbolizes the transformative nature of pilgrimage, where the seeker undergoes spiritual metamorphosis. The base notes, characterized by the sacred trinity of Sandalwood, Moss, and Smoke, encapsulate the lingering aura of incense, offering a fragrant tribute to the sacred ceremonies held in these hallowed places.As one embarks on this fragrant pilgrimage, Tirtha serves as a vessel for spiritual merit, cleansing, and blessings.

name: Tubereuse Astrale
notes: Cinnamon Bark, Tuberose, Osmanthus, Peach, Leather, Musk, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Floral - Fruity, Floral - White, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy
description: A cloud of sparkling tuberoses illuminates a harmonious blend of velvety leather and musk. Tub脙漏reuse Astrale opens with a spicy, powdery cinnamon accord. The floral heart complements this warm opening with a duo of honeyed, unctuous tuberose and fruity Osmanthus with light accents of peach and leather. At the base, musk, reinforced by surprising and addictive vanilla, melts onto the skin leaving an irresistible trail.

name: Super Nova
notes: Mineral Notes, Artemisia, Green Pepper, Ozone, Gunpowder, Oud, Cashmeran, Grey Amber, Metallic Notes
style: Avant-Garde, Metallic, Smoky, Unusual / Unexpected, Woody - Fresh
description: Born from explosion, born to glow bright. Chaos-to-order. Cosmic violent beauty bursts through the dark to light; a teal blaze smears the horizon. Open your eyes. Inhale the night. Discover the mineral abyss of space through subtle metallic accords entangled with frosty aromatic nuances and a deep, dusky mix of oud and grey amber.

name: Mango Aoud
notes: Guava, Mango, Neroli, Osmanthus, Ylang Ylang, Coconut Milk, Vanilla, Amber, Oud
style: Creamy, Exotic, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Mango Aoud is a tale of two words, an eclectic blend of memories, tastes, and smells captured between Mexico and India. The meeting point of East and West, inspired by creamy, juicy nuances of mango and the dark side of oud, brought to the light together with a delicious vanilla accord and adorned with fresh, floral guava notes.

name: Granada
notes: Bergamot, Pink Pepper, Black Pepper, Raspberry, Rose, Juniper, Cinnamon, Cedarwood, Vetiver Haiti, Oakmoss, Patchouli, Labdanum, Amber, Musk
style: Woody Ambery Floral
description: Resting beneath the majestic Sierra Nevada mountains, with multiple World Heritage Sites dating back over a millennia, Granada sits at the crossroads of nature and history. A tribute to this rich legacy in all of its contrasts, the newest fragrance from Widian is a symphony of fiery passion and tranquil breezes, an exquisitely constructed parfum that combines exotic spices, lush florals, and a rich amber base to create an unforgettable, wholly unique experience. Delicately calibrated between he softness of rose and the freshness of juniper, the opening harmoniously blends with the intense heat of black pepper and cinnamon supporting a robust cedarwood heart. The luxurious scent is deepened with rich undertones of amber, musk, vetiver, and patchouli, creating a captivatingly perfect balance that sets you on an historic olfactory journey.

name: Perseus
notes: Bergamot, Grapefruit, Blackcurrant Bud, Vetiver, Green Mandarin, Geranium, Dry Woods, Cashmere Wood, Ambergris Accord
style: Classic Masculine, Fresh - Citrus, Woody - Light
description: Perseus evokes early morning at the royal residence of Marly, at the moment when the sun芒聙聶s first rays waken the ch脙垄teau, warm its gardens and make its fountains sparkle. A sun-kissed perfume, it celebrates the radiance of citrus and boosts energy. Perseus芒聙聶s secret lies in the novel blending of very classic men芒聙聶s fragrance ingredients 芒聙聰 notably the brightness of grapefruit, which contrasts immediately with an elegant, woody facet.A contemporary twister grapefruit citrus accord and a vetiver heart come to life the moment they meet. The former immediately invigorates, its freshness electrifying the skin even as the latter芒聙聵s refined, comforting and sensual earthy facet emerges. The fragrance trail is further enriched by ambergris and long-lasting dry woods.

name: In This World
notes: Blood Orange, Violet, Fig, Lavender, Sage, Eucalyptus, Tonka
style: Citrus, Floral, Floral - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: Rarely has the word "ethereal" described the vibe of a fragrance house quite as accurately as it does for Liis- every scent in this gracefully lovely line seems born from a frictionless higher plane of existence, where joy and light are in endless supply. And while In This World has more than enough weightlessly fresh beauty to make it another undeniable Liis treasure, there's a little something extra in the mix as well. As the name might suggest, In This World features a variety of decidedly terrestrial fragrance notes- blood orange, green fig, an invigorating blend of wild herbals and aromatics- all in rapturous tribute to the beauty all around us right here on Earth. Side by side with all the gently sensual smoothness any Liis lover could hope for, the effect is a fragrance of both heaven and earth- a perfect afternoon on your back in a meadow, staring up at a bright blue sky.

name: Sparkling Jo
notes: Champagne, Bergamot, Juniper, William Pear, Fresh Ginger, Ambrette, Musk, Oakwood, Ambergris
style: Boozy, Fresh, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: Queen of the night, queen of the musical hall, that芒聙聶s Josephine Baker 芒聙聰 always Jo. She enflames the Paris vibe and the hearts of the city芒聙聶s night-lifers. Forever Josephine.Following Josephine Baker芒聙聶s frenetic steps, Vilhelm Parfumerie has translated this entrancing party rhythm into a sparkling fragrance. A homage to the night, an ode to Josephine. As soft as a feather boa芒聙聶s caress, as bubbly as a glass of champagne, Sparkling Jo is a rambunctious invitation to live a festive and bright, never-ending night. A mix of lightheartedness and fun, it芒聙聶s what partying is all about.All night long, all day long, from the evening until the next day, Sparkling Jo will set the tempo of your emotions and desires. And each day will only be better than the last. The Master Perfumer has bottled/captured the essence of party life by creating this scintillating perfume with hints of pear. This fragrance celebrates the joie de vivre of the most American of all Parisians, Jo herself.

name: Irida
notes: Neroli Oil, Violet Leaf Absolute, Orris Butter 15% Irones, Orris Absolute 68%, Orris Absolute 80% Irones, Carrot Seed, Violet, Jasmine, Clove Bud, Cinnamon, Sandalwood From East India (Aged), Amyris, Vetiver, Guaiac Wood, Ambrette Seed Oil, Cistus Absolute, Labdanum Resinoid.
style: Earthy, Powdery / Soft, Warm
description: Iris or Irida was the Goddess of Rainbow according to Greek Mythology, but also is one of the most spectacular flowers. The Goddess of Rainbow shows her full character in an Extrait (33% !!) concentration.Accentuated proportions of Orris butter 15% Irones with Orris Absolutes of the highest quality and value at 68% and 80% Irones (Iris Pallida from France) from the glorious raw materials producer Biolandes will take you on a journey of pure happiness and bliss. An addition of Labdanum Resinoid to the already resinous, herbal and mildly fruity Cistus Absolute will reveal her whole depth.Last but not least a more profound and generous proportion of aged Santalum Album Essential Oil from East India that makes the creation more delicate and rich in the dry down. This is the second limited batch of Irida Extrait (first one sold out in 2 days). A creation not to miss if you are a fan of Iris...芒聙聰 Limited amount of bottles 芒聙聰

name: Philtre
notes: Flower Stems, Clove, Rose, Carnation, Jasmine, Resins, Vanilla, Black Pepper
description: For as long as we芒聙聶ve been falling in love, we芒聙聶ve been making potions to induce that feeling in others. We called them philtres. These, when drunk, would cause the recipient to fall madly in love with the giver. Such was the story of Tristan and Isolde, and the fate that befalls Titania in A Midsummer Night芒聙聶s Dream.Perfumes are modern-day love potions芒聙聰potent and bewitching, with the ability to change moods instantly. This is Hiram Green's version. No unicorn dust or dragon芒聙聶s blood, just the world芒聙聶s most beautiful flowers, spices, and resins, built around the flower of love: carnation. Use it carefully.

name: East
notes: Raspberry, Oud Assafi, Leather, Ambroxan
style: Earthy, Woody - Amber, Woody - Spicy
description: For Olivier Cresp, co-founder of Akro, travel is every bit as addictive as coffee or chocolate. Olivier first got the travel bug working as an international perfumer, travelling the world, meeting clients and discovering new flavours and aromas along the way. To this day, he travels as much as he can, constantly finding inspiration and community in every part of the globe. One of Olivier芒聙聶s favourite places to go is the United Arab Emirates, a place of deep intrigue and power - and one which comes with its distinct set of scents. For Olivier, this part of the world is forever connected with the scent of oud, the rich and mysterious woody oil that is burned all over this region.In tribute to the UAE, and his own addiction to travel, Olivier has come up with a new fragrance: EAST, a perfume inspired by the street markets of Dubai and the welcoming homes all over the Emirates.It's a scent that will transport you to this incredible part of the world, wherever you may be in that moment.

name: Zen'gi
notes: Grapefruit, Bergamot, Wine, Pink Pepper, Vetiver, Olibanum, Vanilla, Patchouli, Cedarwood, Amber
style: Citrus, Floral - Citrus, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous
description: Zen'gi is a golden elixir bottled in a shimmering vessel. Its artful design evokes a golden fruit, hinting at the grapefruit essence within.The name Zen'gi is a fusion of wealth and enlightenment. In Turkish, zengin means "rich," and Zen practice emphasizes inner riches and enlightenment. Zen'gi is a fragrance that embodies both of these qualities: it is a luxurious, opulent scent that also evokes a sense of spiritual richness. Zen practice teaches us to appreciate the beauty and freshness of the present moment & being mindful. Mindfulness is a simple way to cultivate inner peace and well-being and experience the world with a fresh perspective.Just as a fresh flower is a symbol of new life, the freshness of Zen'gi represents the possibility of spiritual transformation. Zen'gi opens with a burst of citrusy freshness, courtesy of grapefruit and bergamot. Wine and pink pepper add a touch of spice and complexity. As the fragrance develops, it reveals its true depth and richness, with notes of olibanum, vanilla, patchouli, vetiver, cedarwood, and amber. Zen'gi is long-lasting (all day!) and projects well; a perfect choice for those lookning for a statement fragrance.

name: 312 Saint-Honore
notes: Pink Peppercorn (co2 Extract), Pink Peppercorn Leaf Essence, Angelica Root, White Orange Blossom Accord, Tonka Bean, Iris, Ambroxan, Ambery Musk, Warm Muscs, Oud Wood Essence From Thailand
description: 芒聙聹For the opening of my first flagship store in Paris, I wanted to celebrate this new chapter with a creation in honor of this Parisian address. The inspiration of this perfume comes from the raw materials that were selected to create the boutique: the glass of the window, the concrete and the white stone from Bourgogne which bring some freshness and light into the space. They give all together a mineral design approach, like the perfume.312 Saint-Honor脙漏 is composed of pink peppercorn notes for an addictive spicy opening. At the heart of the fragrance, white musks, amber musks and lactones mingle with the freshness of orange blossom. In the base notes, you will find a sensual and animalic accord. With perfumer Alexandra Carlin, we imagined a fragrance that could be worn at any time of the day and for all seasons.芒聙聺 芒聙聯 David Benedek, Founder

name: ASKR
notes: Ash, Salt, Chamomile, Angelica, Elemi, Sichuan Pepper, Galbanum, Elm, Calamus, Atlas Cedar, Orris, Copal Resin, Driftwood, Seamoss, Ambergris, Papyrus, Vetiver, Woodruff
description: Askr erupts in rugged botanicals swirling through a melange of peppered balsamics. Dark, ozonic and ink-stained origins fracture and meld into papery driftwoods, tendrils of resin smoke and seamoss underfoot. As ash moves into elm, the voices of the ancients reverberate in ambergris, papyrus, and fresh hay.

name: Ame du Coeur
notes: Mandarin, Blood Orange, Grapefruit, Ginger, Pink Pepper, Black Pepper, Cardamom, Cypress, Elemi, Cocoa, Guaiac Wood, Pomarose, Tonka Bean, Akigalawood, Vanillin, Vetiver, Cedar Wood
style: Fruity, Woody - Amber, Woody - Spicy
description: The heart has been associated with love, passion, emotion, and romance for centuries; Cupid's arrow piercing the heart is a well-known image in art and literature, the source of our deepest emotions and desires - the place where our truest self resides.脙聜me du C脜聯ur is an ambery, spicy wood fragrance with notes of blood orange, guaiac wood, tonka bean, and Pomarose, a Givadaun captive with a baked apple note. Precious as a ruby, explosive as a bomb and bold as spice: 脙聜me du C脜聯ur is love, the soul of the heart.

name: Oceans of a Midnight Moon
notes: Seawater, Citrus Peel, Mint, Myrtle, Juniper Berries, Oakmoss, Fir, Leather, Driftwood
style: Fresh, Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Salty / Oceanic
description: The white foam of an overwhelming wave carries the oceanic freshness of a night sea illuminated by the glow of the moon. A refined, rich and captivating fragrance that releases all the strength of the sea and its deep freshness in the time of night. Marine scents and sparkling citruses join aromatic notes of mint, myrtle and juniper berries. Mediterranean salt that crystallizes on driftwood, beaten by the waves and shaped by the night sea of Formentera.

name: Rose of Dangerous Flamenco
notes: Dried Fruits, Dates, Raspberry, Saffron, Damask Rose, Oud
description: A flamenco of luxurious rose and silky oud dancing like unknown lovers in the warm Andalusian sunset of Seville, awakening a passionate seduction that aspires to sin. Hints of dates and dried fruit are grafted into a texture of spicy and woody tones recalling a whispered sweetness between the West and the Middle East. Rose of Dangerous Flamenco is the expression of a poignant and romantic art that suspends time and breath in a pure sense of beauty.

name: Sale e Pepe
notes: Salt, Fresh Air, Black Pepper
style: Gourmand, Salty / Oceanic, Spicy
description: There's no shortage of salt-based fragrances these days, and we love a bracing, salt-kissed sea air scent as much as anyone. But this is Hilde Soliani, so the salt at the heart of Sale e Pepe isn't inspired by the rolling seas, but instead by the elegant crystal salt and pepper shakers on Ms. Soliani's holiday table growing up. So while Sale e Pepe certainly features a bright, invigorating salt note, it's balanced with a fiery burst of freshly cracked black pepper- the perfect epicurean contrast to ignite the senses. Joyous, refreshing, and oh-so-wearable, Sale e Pepe is a delight.

name: Latte Freddo
notes: Ice Milk
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Milky
description: In the hands of the Queen of Gourmand, the simplest concepts can offer the richest depths. Take Latte Freddo- "cold milk" in Italian, and that's exactly what's on offer- no embellishment or gimmicky twist to consider. But it's the profound simplicity of the fragrance that reaches deep within to conjure up the purest of childhood memories- the soul-quenching delight of a perfect, ice-cold glass of creamy milk. Delectably true-to-form, Latte Freddo revitalizes body and spirit, mouthwateringly creamy and invigoratingly fresh.

name: Caramel Oud
notes: Caramel, Toffee Macaron, Oud, Saffron
description: Caramel Oud, an opulent olfactory masterpiece that seamlessly marries the mystique of the orient with the allure of gourmand indulgence.At its heart, Caramel Oud boasts an exquisite interplay of caramel and oud wood, derived from the rare and revered Agarwood. This union creates an aromatic journey that is nothing short of enchanting. The result is a creamy, lush, and utterly decadent aroma that seduces the senses and transports the wearer to a world of unadulterated luxury. The fragrance unfurls with the intoxicating sweetness of a toffee macaron accord, weaving its magic into every note. This exquisite introduction is gracefully complemented by the inclusion of Kozani saffron, the world芒聙聶s most coveted variety of this precious spice. This infusion of saffron elevates the fragrance to unparalleled heights, adding a refined complexity that is truly hypnotic.

name: The Language Of Glaciers
