notes: White Pine, Lilac, Cashmere, Juniper, Forget Me Not, Blue Bugle, Virgin Snowfall
style: Floral - Light, Fresh, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: 芒聙聹Let芒聙聶s do marvelous things, says the glacier, sit with me and consider the magnitude of what we are capable of.芒聙聺 - Margaux ZweigHave you ever stood alone atop a mountain with chunky snowflakes swirling all around?  Such is the splendor you will experience within The Language of Glaciers, a romantic epic which reaches incredible heights and inspires one to leave no moment unappreciated.From the stillness of a moonlit snowshoe excursion, to the rush of witnessing an avalanche safely from above, the recollections of our unnamed narrator will captivate you the same way the solitary song of the snow owl captivated them.

name: The Icons Discovery Kit
description: We love Simone Andreoli fragrances for their joyous sophistication 芒聙聰 never overwrought nor heavy-handed 芒聙聰 delivering a luxuriously sultry fun-to-wear experience, from the beach to the dance floor. The long-awaited Simone Andreoli Discovery Kit gives us six 1.7ml spray samples comprising his iconic best-sellers in a sleek kit perfect for gifting or travel: Born From Fire, Don't Ask Me Permission, Leisure In Paradise, Malibu Party in the Bay, Ocean of a Midnight Moon, and Rose of Dangerous Flamenco.

name: Courreges Discovery Set
description: Enter the world of Courr脙篓ges fragrances and discover the colorama with its 6 olfactory creations in 1.5 ml sample format.C:The indulgent purity of clean laundry, energized by textured jasmine.L'eau de liesse:A pure and addictive scent. A head note of fresh macadamia nut gives way to an abundance of enticing musk.Slogan:Opens on an airy and transparent note of fresh, bright juniper berry, enhanced by a base tinged with musky ambrox.Seconde peau:A pine wood/tea leaf 芒聙聹boyfriend芒聙聺 accord, combining resin with signature freshness.La fille de l'air:A surge of lightness, a radiant sillage, la fille de l芒聙聶air inspires and fascinates in equal measures.L'empreinte:An updated chypre structure. A bergamot/patchouli accord with gourmand and amber accents.

name: L'eau de Liesse
notes: Neroli, Iris, Macadamia Nut, Heliotrope, White Musk
style: Floral, Floral - White, Powdery / Soft, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: The first transparent and luminous notes of a sparkling neroli mixed with the aldehyde accents of cristalfizz give way to a dazzling floral heart where the iris is adorned with the solar force of sambac jasmine and the sensuality of heliotrope.

name: L'empreinte
notes: Bergamot, Patchouli, Ambroxan
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Skin Scent / Minimal, Spicy, Woody - Light
description: Part of the House heritage, the legendary 芒聙聹empreinte芒聙聺 symbolises a removed emotional space-time. It evokes a relationship between two beings who meet, which endures in an olfactory setting: L芒聙聶empreinte.

name: La Fille de L'air
notes: Neroli, Orange Blossom, White Musk
style: Floral - Light, Floral - White, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: A female icon of the House, La fille de l芒聙聶air reveals all the freedom of expression, movement and life that Courr脙篓ges gives its creations. With its rush of lightness and trail of light, La fille de l芒聙聶air inspires as much as it fascinates.

name: Seconde Peau
notes: Tea Leaf, Pine Wood, Vetiver
style: Fresh, Skin Scent / Minimal, Spicy
description: The House芒聙聶s iconic 芒聙聹Second Skin芒聙聺 knits envelope the body and comfort the wearer. This eau de parfum by Courr脙篓ges is designed to envelope free, unconstrained bodies, giving free rein to sensory intuition.

name: Slogan
notes: Juniper Berries, White Musk, Ambroxan
style: Fresh, Skin Scent / Minimal, Woody - Fresh
description: The scent of a beating heart. A fragrance with an evocative name: Slogan. The energy of free, moving bodies, coming together and pulsing in unison: this is the radical yet romantic aesthetic of the emotion that Nicolas di Felice, Artistic Director of the House, wanted to highlight. A creation marrying physical pulsation and olfactory addiction.

name: Le Messager
notes: Bergamot, Ink Accord, White Musks
style: Animalic, Avant-Garde, Creamy, Resinous / Balsamic, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: An olfactory interpretation evoking the blue of the ink deposited on the correspondence between two lovers. Le Messager, the alliance between a fresh start of essence of bergamot and a background of vanilla musk enveloped by a suave ink accord. A note that gives this eau de parfum a magnetic trail; a simple desire to connect with each other.

name: C
notes: Clean Laundry Accord, Jasmine, Ambroxan
style: Floral - White, Milky, Woody - Light
description: C is the Courr脙篓ges initial but also part of the 芒聙聹AC芒聙聺 House logo. This letter is striking with its curve and its simplicity. Symbolising a universal fragrance, the new impetus of a couturier-perfumer. C, floral-woody. The indulgent purity of clean laundry, energized by textured jasmine.

name: Comete Paradis
notes: Sandalwood, Coconut, Cacao, Musk, Tonka Bean
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Milky, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy
description: The richly textured interplay between creamy sandalwood and warm, sensual musk made Parle Moi de Parfum's Milky Musk a modern cult classic- Gucci Rush updated with a healthy dose of 21st century Parisian chic. For Com脙篓te Paradis, both a new interpretation of Milky Musk and a unique collaboration between all three perfumers in the legendary Almairac family (Parle Moi founder Benjamin, his father Michel, and brother Romain), our scent journey spans the globe, building a delightfully cozy blend of New Caledonian sandalwood, West African cacao, and Venezuelan tonka bean atop the signature musk base to create a totally new, blissfully warm olfactory experience. An elegant coconut finish pairs gorgeously with the lactonic sweetness at the core of this almost entirely basenote-driven fragrance, ensuring a gently tropical touch of relaxation.For Milky Musk fanatics looking for the next level of blissful comfort, or anyone needing a quick escape from a cold winter day, Com脙篓te Paradis is a direct ticket to, well, paradise.

name: Silky Woods Elixir
notes: Fig, Saffron, Rose, Peru Balsa, Orris, Agarwood Australia, Guaiac Wood, Ambroxan, Clearwood, Vanilla, Musk, Oakmoss, Cypriol, Oud Assafi
style: Earthy, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Dark and excessive, Silky Woods Elixir is a smoky reawakening of the Australian agarwood originally used in Silky Woods Eau de Parfum. This exotic botanical is one of the most mysterious and revered essences in perfumery. Meticulously crafted with fig, saffron, orris, and syrupy balsam to reveal both the complex heart of agarwood and its verdant foliage, this woody and gourmand perfume is rich with luxurious intensity and sensuality.Silky Woods Elixir opens in flurry of green aromatics as verdant as the canopy of the agarwood groves where its essence is born. Heightened by the lushness of sun-ripened figs and the earthen verdure of fig leaves, an overdose of the hypnotic essence of Australian-grown agarwood from the world芒聙聶s oldest rainforest flourishes, intensifying the depth of the composition, and painting it in rich shades of auburn and gold. Prized for centuries for its exquisite quality and rarity, the precious Oud Assafi elevates the Elixir with a lavish woodiness. The animalic and ambery notes from the Oud Assafi combined with the Australian agarwood creates the ultimate luxurious and complex Oud experience on your skin. Against this resounding intensity, iris root lends its soft touch, taming the bitter effect of the fig leaves, with rose lending an exquisite floral dimension to the perfume芒聙聶s burgeoning heart. As the Elixir deepens, Tolu balsam weaves a rich tapestry, infusing warmth, and complexity into a gourmand base of oud, saffron, musk, and oakmoss.A woody and gourmand perfume, Silky Woods Elixir is for true connoisseurs.

name: After Sun
notes: Aloe Vera Essence, Green Tea Verjus, Melon De Cavaillon, Cardamom Absolute, Aqua Di Colonia, Ozone, Tonic, Minibar Gin, Resort Towel Plush, Open Weave Linen
style: Green / Herbaceous, Tropical / Beachy
description: The signature scent of the 芒聙聹Illustrious芒聙聺 Vacation脗庐 Brand After Sun Gel. Developed in conjunction with ARQUISTE Parfumeur and Rodrigo Flores-Roux, AFTER SUN captures the quintessential 芒聙聹After Sun Setting芒聙聺 with notes of Aloe Vera Gel, Green Tea Verjus, Aqua di Colonia, Minibar Gin, Line Dried Open Weave Linen and more.

name: Babylon Ballad
description: Babylon Ballad (No.10) centralizes on labdanum, one of the most prized and earliest incenses of all time. When we started to plan our ballads, we had many raw materials to consider, we wanted to showcase their beauty in new ways that were rarely done in modern perfumery. Labdanum was a bit of challenge to make central because usually in perfumery it is used as a fixative or a very slight trail of amber presence in the dry-down. Here it takes a larger role, central to Babylon, it is a very vivid costar.Labdanum here is laced in sweet orange and caraway, with patchouli, vetiver, oakmoss, and cedarwood. Some floral elements support the composition without being central namely jasmine, geranium, and lavender.The idea is giving you an olfactory sensation of the ancient Babylonian civilization, with the Ishtar gate both on the label and the cap made to the shape of Ishtar Gate, an iconic landmark from ancient Babylon, currently located in modern day Iraq. Unlike Yan Huang Zisuns芒聙聶 3D printed resin caps, Babylon芒聙聶s cap is from solid zinc alloy and is a hefty one, a very nice decorative item on its own.The surprise with Babylon is, it comes with an extra gift of an attar named Ishtar, 0.5 ml, along with the 15ml Babylon. Ishtar attar continues the Babylonian olfactory experience with the ancient notes of spikenard, labdanum, anise, a whole lot of ambergris, oud, frankincense, bubbly cola, and a lot more. Enjoy an olfactory trip to Babylon...

name: August / 7th / 2088
description: A daring composition, refreshing and zesty. The scent bursts to life with a bracing twist of green grapefruit, green cactus, rhubarb and aquatic elements. The heart is a tangy m脙漏lange of exotic essences from around the world: orchid, lentisk leaves, pampas grass, jasmine and iris root.The background is, on the contrary, sensual and long lasting, a precious warm accord of tonka and vanilla beans. Surrounded and refined by vintage oakmoss and elegant sandalwood, a mystical musk gives the extraordinary fragrance added depth. August 7th 2088 is an intensely emotional glimpse into what the future may hold.

name: Pistachio Pocket Perfume
notes: Pistachio, Cardamom, More Pistachio, Roasted Almond, Even More Pistachio, Patchouli, Vanilla Creme
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: Pistachio, both an elegant nut, and a fun one. Initially made on a whim as a D.S.D. "STUDIO JUICE" (a 100-bottle limited edition), this fragrance was a labor of pure love- no complex backstory, just a fun, mouthwatering fragrance meant to evoke everything that people love about pistachio, especially as a a dessert flavor- rich and creamy, unabashedly sweet, with a ribbon of savory cardamom. People went nuts (pun intended) for it, and now Pistachio is available for fragrance lovers everywhere to enjoy. D.S. & Durga doesn't tend to go gourmand, but this delightful treat is not to be missed.This Pocket Perfume is a 10ml perfume oil roll-on ideal for travel or daily carry.

name: Narcotic Delight
notes: Cherry, Cognac, Vanilla, Black And Pink Pepper, Tobacco, Hedione
description: Narcotic Delight sets its sights on the erogenous Vanilla bean, electrified by pink pepper, drenched in a draught of Cognac, before finally succumbing to the intoxicating swirls of a cigar. At the heart of the fragrance lies hedione, a molecule that stimulates the brain's pleasure centers and acts as the final trigger in a formula that is decidedly carnal. A cheeky twist of plump and juicy cherry celebrates the indulgence of a polished proposition. Sensual and provacative is an understatement.

name: Notre Dame 15.4.2019
notes: Patchouli, Vetiver, Moss, Precious Woods, Tonka Bean, Amber, Sandalwood, Lily Of The Valley, Geranium, Ambrette, Neroli, Basil, Coriander, Ginger, Iris, Lemon, Orange, Bergamot, Incense, Galbanum
description: The d脙漏lire de voyage collection is enriched with the second fragrance, dedicated and inspired by the terrible event of the FIRE OF THE NOTRE-DAME CATHEDRAL IN PARIS, which took place on April 15, 2019. However, the invitation is not to stop at that date, but TO UNLOCK THE TRUE ESSENCE TO THE WORLD.Filippo Sorcinelli, known as the tailor of the popes, wanted to fix three main moments in the new extrait de parfum: THE TRIGGERING EVENT, the WATER ON THE STONES and the ESSENCE THAT REMAINS.The Notre-Dame Cathedral is undoubtedly one of the best known and most visited sacred buildings in the world. Filippo had the privilege of being able to access places off-limits to tourism and be able to grasp unexpected images, smells and values.BUT WHAT IS THE ESSENCE OF THE CATHEDRAL? We are immediately led to believe that it has only the strong smell of incense. Nothing more incomplete! The smell of Notre-Dame is not incense. TODAY IS THAT MOMENT OF SMOKE THAT AFFECTS HISTORY. It is also water that overflows from the stones, which descends to the sides of the organ. Today, it is a glimpse of the vaults that let the light in from the naked sky. It is the scent of uninterrupted life, of the unimpaired Soul, it is the Cross made of spouting gold. IT IS THE TRUTH THAT ADVANCES.NOTRE-DAME 15.4.2019, the true essence, will be a small support to the Maitrise, the group of singers and musicians who guard the priceless heritage of the Cathedral芒聙聶s Sacred Music. The proceeds from the sales will in fact be donated to the MUSIQUE SACR脙聣E ASSOCIATION, to help keep its business and mission going, currently outside their 芒聙聹home芒聙聺.

name: Amore Caffe
notes: Black Coffee, Amaretto Liquor, Vanilla Ice Cream, Speculoos, Vanilla Pods, Brown Sugar, Grey Amber
style: Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Sweet
description: Affogato: a deliriously delightful Italian combination of two delicious opposites- creamy vanilla ice cream and hot, robust espresso coffee. Amore Caffe gives you the full experience of that perfect affogato after a rich and satisfying meal- the ebb and flow between sips of potent cafe noir and whippings of lusciously sweet gelato, all coming together to deliver a sensational, rounded gourmand fullness where every ingredient claims its perfect contrasting role. Coffee lovers, gourmand fanatics- discover your bliss today.

name: Lucky Candy
notes: Cocoa Beans, Bergamot, Sweet Honey, Marshmallow, Frangipani, Vanilla Pods, Sweet Toffee, Dry Amber
style: Floral, Gourmand, Sweet
description: In response to your eternal appetite for sweetness, Montale has created a lavish experience for the senses that takes you far beyond a simple sugar essence. Lucky Candy is a deep and enveloping dive into pure sentiment, a gourmand delight that uncovers the magic hidden in your fondest memories- a mouthwatering, senses-tingling indulgence of honey-drenched cocoa beans, marshmallow-kissed florals, and a rich, smooth, indulgently delectable toffee amber base that radiates pure, essential happiness. Lucky Candy? Lucky You.

name: HAEC DIES
notes: Vanilla, Sandalwood, Patchouli, Amber, Musc, Cedar, Peach, Rose, Myrrh, Aloe Vera, Bergamot, Orange, Jasmine
style: Avant-Garde
description: The new fragrance from Filippo Sorcinelli's delire de voyage collection, is being unveiled today right on the heels of Easter events.Philip emphasizes these moments by interpreting in olfaction some passages from Mark's Gospel, particularly the moment of the women's astonishment and fear when they realize that the stone of the Sepulcher has rolled away.In an ideal image to describe this moment, the bottle the very expensive aloe- and myrrh-based aromatic oils that they had prepared to anoint Jesus' body is dropped to the ground the moment they saw not only the stone rolled away, but all the white linen cloths that wrapped the body. Hence the announcement of a young man dressed in blazing white....The bottle along with the four "wings" that open as "ritual" are covered with sand, with dust, just to remind us of the steps, the road and the place. But the attention-blocking element is the cap that mimics the stylistic features of the tombstone that has rolled away, just as they used to be built.The artwork is covered in its entirety by a white linen veil, on which the name of the fragrance is reproduced: H脙聠EC DIES.The outside of the packaging is also covered with the same linen.

name: Theodoros Kalotinis Sample Pack
description: Get your noses on the first Greek perfume brand!Includes 15 samples of:Lemon TartAegean Salt & CitrusCoffee AddictAlluring FigJasmine of AthensVanillaVelvet ChocolateCaramel OudPear GelatoCherry PowderCreme BruleeCinnamon RollsBublegum FactoryPistachio LatteNew!Almond Tart (Exclusive creation)

name: Jasmine of Athens
notes: Tiare Blossom, Jasmine Absolute, Vanilla
style: Floral - Citrus, Floral - White
description: Every fragrant creation of mine hides an enticing story behind it. In my perfumes you can discover my deepest emotions. For this fragrance, Jasmine of Athens, I was inspired while strolling around the alleys of Athens. There on a sunny day the jasmine flirted with my heart, I took a blossom of the jasmine bush and headed to Acropolis. Up there, a breeze caressed my emotions and I felt free. Suddenly I felt the need to memorize in my mind those notes, those unique notes that will make every woman explore her deepest dreams. An explosion of true freshness and energy that consists of vanilla, giving the fragrance a slightly powdery feeling, Jasmine Absolute and Tiare Blossom. Jasmine of Athens has come to seduce everyone with its unique scent!

name: Alluring Fig
notes: Fig, Fig Leaf, Cream Vanilla
style: Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean
description: The unisex fragrance ALLURING FIG exudes the freshness of fig leaves. An alluring composition that brings in mind the milky and sensual vanilla under the bitter smell of fig leaves. The smell of Greek summer in the islands and all the picturesque paths that emerge from the figs and lead to the sea, constituted the inspiration for the new perfume-ode to the fig tree, from the bole till the cool leaves and the milky fruit. A bittersweet accord that will leave you speechless!

name: Vanilla
notes: Vanilla, Caramel, Patchouli
style: Sweet
description: This unique fragrance combines ingredients of exceptional quality that will entice you. The gourmand fragnance vanilla eau de parfum is the olfactory declaration of happiness, signed by 3 favorite ingredients: Patchouli essential oil, Vanilla and Caramel. This delicious, woody, like a biscuit full of vanilla taste, fragrance is for all ages, all seasons and all skin types.

name: Aegean Salt & Citrus
notes: Grapefruit, Aegean Salt, Lemon
style: Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus, Salty / Oceanic
description: The unisex perfume Aegean Sea salt & Citrus extraordinarily combines the cool air with the refreshing waters of the Aegean Sea. Its islands with their rich history, the secret beaches, the rare beauty, the colours, the smell, the landscapes showered with the background of the endless blue constituted the source of inspiration for the creation of the Aegean Sea salt & Citrus Eau de Parfum. The notes of the perfume from sea salt and citrus fruit such as lemon, orange, grapefruit , spark the senses creating an exuberant sense of freshness and coolness , so distinctive as the breeze of the Aegean Sea.

name: Coffee Addict
notes: Coffee, Caramel, Cacao, Vanilla
description: Coffee Addict is a unisex, long-lasting perfume that consists of the Coffee Roasted essential oil of the Coffea Arabica plant. The sensual touch of vanilla in combination with cocoa, gives the perfume an unprecedented sweetness that makes it irresistible. Who is not addicted to the incomparable smell of freshly roasted coffee? A harmonious, aromatic agreement that awakens the senses and 芒聙娄 makes heads turn!

name: Velvet Chocolate
notes: Cacao, Vanilla, Tonka Bean, Chocolate
style: Sweet
description: A unisex fragrance that melts on the skin the way a delicious chocolate cube melts in the mouth. The fragrance芒聙聶s composition unfolds like a chocolate bomb with intense cocoa and vanilla essences that settle into the velvety gourmet embrace of tonka beans. It will remind you of luxurious chocolate pralines richly sprinkled with cocoa. Discover the most voluptuous temptation that goes by the name of Velvet Chocolate and create a path to love in your wake.

name: Lemon Tart
notes: Tart Crust, Vanilla Cream, Lemon Juice, Butter, Lemon Zest, Sugar
style: Gourmand
description: Lemon Tart, inspired by a visit to a traditional Patisserie, born in the paradise of gourmand addictions.The luscious, buttery crust releases its soft and seductive scent. Its sensual heart is revealed through vanilla cream and fresh lemon juice while the rush of intensity, imparted by lemon zest, culminates the addictive power of the unisex Lemon Tart Eau de Parfum.

name: Discovery Kit
description: Explore the full line of Sora Dora fragrances with this dynamic and chic discovery kit containing 2ml atomizer samples of the full collection:MandorlaBroceliandeGreasqueGladiatorOrchidee RougeVanuatuKamel OudMallowJanyYlop7LabuRed

name: Mallow
notes: Pink Pepper, Raspberry, Sugar, Violet, Almond, Heliotrope, Orange Blossom, Musk, Ambrette
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Mallow is the story of a candy-flower that explodes in the infinite sweetness of violet powder. A temperamental, mel- lifluous fragrance. A singular contradiction. The real illusion of a harmonic vision in contradiction. An incessant olfactory morsel for our ears, eyes, mouths and fingers. Mallow cannot be smelled. You listen to it, you see it, you drink it and you touch it. Like so many ultra-ephemeral pep- percorns, this fragrance is dangerously inspired by your most sensual shadows. Updated by heliotrope and the most secretive of orange blossoms, violets will encircle your neck and wrists all the way to absolutes. The score is written. Over to you.

name: Jany
notes: Apple, Peach, Apricot, Puff Pastry, Osmanthus, Hazelnut, Plum, Caramel, Almond, Musk, Vanilla
style: Exotic, Fruity, Gourmand, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Once upon a time... A middle summer garden afternoun. The calm of a sunny nap. And the children芒聙聶s snack. Jany. She芒聙聶s getting busy in the kitchen, between sugar and flour. What she loves to prepare, above all other delicacies, is tarte tatin. The butter melts on the glass. She drops grains of brown sugar into it, in the silence of a fine, icy rain. Its scent swirls around the room, echoes to the veranda, travels to the path. Baked apples and cinnamon sticks fade into the exha- lations of puff pastry. Then come caramel, almonds and va- nilla, powerful aromas that linger into the evening. Antoine芒聙聶s daughter, Jany carries the fragrance of his recipes, cakes, madeleines and cookies. An original childhood pastry, Jany delivers the aromatic memories of all our unforgettable delicacies. Here芒聙聶s to your emotions.

name: Orchidee Rouge
notes: Bergamot, Cinnamon, Orange, Elemi, Vanilla, Heliotrope, Ylang-ylang, Almond, Rum, Caramel, Resin, Musk, Benzoin
style: Boozy, Creamy, Exotic, Floral - Spicy, Gourmand, Sweet
description: After several successive trips to the islands of the indian ocean, the Sora Dora family managed to bring together numerous extracts of black vanilla grown in the comoros and on reunion island in order to obtain a deep and remarkable blend. Orchid脙漏e rouge sublimates the suppleness of vanilla thanks to an accord of heliotrope flowers, almond milk in the heart. And we are addicted to its base notes, a benzoin/rum accord. A true perfume of character that transports us to warm and exotic lands while assuming its tonic temperament. To sublimate the whole, a musky accord reveals the balance of its powdery and round notes.

name: Gladiator
notes: Pineapple, Lemon, Neroli, Bergamot, Grapefruit, Geranium, Coumarine, Apple, White Flowers, Mint, Ambergris, Cedarwood, Vetiver, Woody Notes, Patchouli
style: Fougere, Fresh - Aquatic, Smoky, Spicy
description: Gladiator achieves the unique feat of being elegant, fresh, and seductive, all while delivering a familiar simplicity. The secret lies in a subtle balance of scents evident from the first sniff of the striking opening- a blend of grapefruit, pineapple, and Italian bergamot, embellished with essences of bigarade. A noble heart features exquisite extracts of Egyptian geranium and peppermint, sublimated into the delicacy of ambergris. Intended to make the wearer feel like a king, Gladiator also sports a regal base of Indonesian patchouli, supported with Haitian vetiver, that envelops you in its delightful and irresistible power.

name: Kamel Oud
notes: Elemi, Cardamom, Pink Berries, Bergamot, Rose, Cumin, Labdanum, Saffron, Raspberry, Oud, Cedarwood, Papyrus, Gaiac
style: Exotic, Floral, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky
description: Kamel oud is an elegant perfume with subtle and refined aromas. It borrows from the scents found in the far east and delivers a generous and gourmand result. The subtle blend of incense and agarwood (oud) with notes of red fruits conveys a unique dynamic. It will suit both men and women. Kamel was a precious friend of Antoine, he was the one who introduced him to the whole spiced amber olfactory universe. This perfume was created to pay tribute to him.

name: Penguin
notes: Antarctic Air, Ice Accord, Juniper Berry, Pink Pepper, Saffron, Ciste Absolute, Sandalwood, Musks, Seamoss, Suede
description: Emperors they may be, but when a massive cyclone unleashes its merciless austral winds, the colony of penguins bow to its power. It's from such extremes that the male penguin must guard his precious bundle. Passed tenderly from mother to father, the egg is their shared purpose. She embarks on a perilous odyssey to the sea for food. He begins his own monotonous march, packed tightly in a circle of trudging penguins. So intent is he on protecting his egg that even the dazzling aurora australis against a lonely night sky escapes his notice.Zoologist Penguin opens with saffron caught upon a salty blast of crisp antarctic air. Against the cool desolation, anticipation glimmers as lively aromas of pink pepper and sea moss swirl over musks, suede and sandalwood. Brace yourself for a vibrant scent that is always invigorating, a reminder of nature芒聙聶s harsh reality in a welcome blast.

name: Sweet Xplosion
notes: Lime, Grapefruit, Coconut Milk, White Honey, Taif Rose, Ylang Ylang, Gorse, Davana, Coffee Beans, Vanilla, Tonka Bean, Patchouli, Benzoin, Musk
style: Sweet
description: Star anise- an almost mystical spice, with an intense blend of sweet and savory flavor and a wide variety of medicinal, mystical and culinary uses dating back millenia. It's a potent ingredient that demands a perfumer with both a gastronomic touch and a good measure of spiritual attunement alike- how fortunate for us that Lorenzo Pazzaglia more than checks those boxes. And sure enough, Sweet Xplosion delivers- a wondrously spicy and joyful scent that melds the unique complexity of star anise with a vivid melange of aromatics, florals, and gourmand notes to create an elegantly rounded delight. Bright, sunshine-drenched citrus notes and honey-sweetened coconut milk give a burst of cheerful energy to a vibrant opening, leading into a spicy floral heart that accentuates the gorgeous depth of the star anise, which evokes hints of rich myrrh and palo santo along more aromatic tones of fennel and liquorice, all with a gently natural sweetness that might surpise anyone expecting a fragrance with this name to be a pure sugar bomb. Instead, it's all about the contrasts- cold and warm, spicy and sweet, energetically fresh and richly intoxicating. A new standard for spice-based gourmands from a master perfumer reaching new levels, Sweet Xplosion is so much more than a cure for your sweet tooth- it's one of the most exciting anise-based scents we've ever experienced.

name: Mandorle
notes: Cocoa, Almond, Heliotrope, Rum, Tonka Bean, Suede, Cashmere, Wood, Musk, Vanilla
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Gourmand, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Mandorle tells the story of seduction. Unabashed seduction that never hesitates. An unmistakable charm that never shuts up. After the initial explosion of almonds in the top note, an icy cherry in the heart lures us into the powerful leather accord in the base. A dreamy pairing of intoxicating gourmand notes and ardently magnetic musky roundness. Tones of Mandorle captivates with its sensuality, swirling - for hours on end - on smoky leather backdrops. This fragrance, invulnerable with grace, will be your first choice when attraction arises from intuition. Here's to your bewitchment.

name: Liquide Gold
notes: Saffron, Mandarin Orange, Jasmine, Solar Notes, Orange Blossom, Carrot Seeds, Coriander, Vanilla, White Musk, Ambroxan, Patchouli, Labdanum, Woody Notes
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Woody Ambery Floral
description: In the Tarot, the Star represents a woman pouring liquid, the water of life, from a silver pitcher into a gold pitcher. The silver pitcher represents the material world; the gold - the spiritual one. The Sun governs gold, the precious metal above all others, which symbolizes perfection, the goal to be attained, an image of a new life.Created by Nisrine Bouazzaoui Grilli脙漏 and Quentin Bisch芒聙聯 liquide gold is part of the Liquides Imaginaires Alchemy trilogy, drawing inspiration from the warm, luminous quality of the metal. This Amber Floral fragrance boasts a potent, comforting, and slightly spicy aroma with saffron as a prominent note.

name: Gioiosa
notes: Amber, Bergamot, Coconut, Jasmin, Moss, Orange, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Floral - White, Gourmand, Green / Herbaceous
description: Gioiosa means pure and unbridled joy, in the inimitable Italian fashion- warmth, energy, spirit, and a deep appreciation for the indulgences that make life worth living. In the hands of Profumum Roma, the creators of some of the most precious and enduring niche gourmand scents of all time, we knew that name suggested something special- and Gioiosa does not disappoint. It's an invigorating, complex, and sensuous gourmand, featuring an intriguing blend of notes both bright and rich, comforting and invigorating, floral and gourmand, all to create a delightfully unique fragrance that spreads happiness wherever it goes.Profumum describes Gioiosa with one simple phrase- "at the expense of everything else, my thoughts go to you," and from the first burst of zesty citrus in the opening, it's truly hard to think of anything else. Sweet, bright orange and bergamot dazzle us with their cheery energy, and quickly lead into a dreamy blend of coconut, jasmine, and vanilla, at once tropically rich, alluringly sweet, and warmly creamy, while a perfect touch of aromatic moss provides a hint of dynamism and contrast. The gourmand sensuality is only increased with the long-lasting, supremely cozy base of amber and musk, which leaves a lingering trail of joyful comfort for countless hours. Creative, compelling, and yet oh so easy to wear, Gioiosa is everything you want your next favorite gourmand to be.

name: Vanilla Sex
notes: Vanilla Tincture, Vanilla Absolute, Sandalwood
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet
description: Addictive by nature and glamorous by design, a captivating interplay of deep and bright vanilla notes stars in Vanilla Sex. It芒聙聶s an unforgettable experience and an icon of sensual pleasure that芒聙聶s far from innocent. Vanilla Tincture India, an ingredient created specifically for Vanilla Sex, exudes a soft sensuality. Vanilla reveals a pristine glamour, warmed by mysterious florals and bitter almond essence. A timeless sandalwood quality mingles with enticing tonka absolute and an exquisite Ultravanil芒聞垄 molecule.

name: Maison Tahite Discovery Set
description: Sometimes it's hard to choose when you're spoiled for choice...Discover all 14 of the fabulous fragrances from Maison Tahite, encompassing the Vanilla, Cocoa, and Coffee Collections, all in generous 2ml spray samples and enclosed in an elegantly giftable box.

name: Nuts
notes: Pistachio, Davana, Almond, Honey, Black Sesame, Caramel, Vanilla, Gaiac, Tobacco, Grey Amber, Tonka, Patchouli, White Musks, Rum
style: Boozy, Creamy, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet
description: Life is happier when you're nuts! Happy Nuts is an over-caloric megadose of pistachio cream, richly mouthwatering nuttiness, and indulgent caramel. Paired with an unexpected duo of warming rum extract and invigorating davana essence, a surprising and delightful olfactory signature emerges- something for gourmand enthusiasts and lovers of the weird and wonderful alike. Addictive and voluptuous, Happy Nuts is an intoxicating experience unlike any other pistachio fragrance out there.

name: Mad Honey
notes: Pink Pepper, Rum, Sassy Honey, Damascena Rose, Bourbon Vanilla, Tonka Bean, Patchouli, Benzoin, Orcanox
style: Boozy, Creamy, Floral, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Sweet
description: Aphrodisiac & hallucinogen. Blessing & curse. Psychotropic sensation. Just one lick is all it takes.Mad Honey defies the conventions, infusing an overdose of honey and rum on an ultra-addictive vanilla absolute. A burst of Damascena Rose and pink pepper reveals a bolder vanilla, which grows irresistible thanks to tonka bean absolute and benzoin resinoid. Patchouli and orcanox intertwine to add texture and lasting power to the fragrance, unveiling darker and deeper tones for a euphoric yet seductive scented embrace.

name: Nanatopia
notes: Nutmeg, Cinnamon, Rum, Banana Bread, Melted Caramel, Tonka Bean Absolute, Cypriol, Orcanox
style: Fruity, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Sweet
description: Ripened bananas dipped in melted caramel, enriched by a cocktail of sensual nutmeg, cinnamon, a rum liquor, adding a playful and carnal signature. Deeper and more seductive, dark cypriol pairs with the sensual sillage of orcanox in the base. Appetizing, yet seductive, Nanatopia is a mouthwatering treat you can't get enough of.

name: Delizia Oscura
notes: Bergamot, Ylang Ylang, Raspberry, Coffee, Violet, Hazelnut, Lily Of The Valley, Milk, Dark Chocolate, Vanilla, Caramel, Musk
description: A violet-forward gourmand of unparalleled creativity and power, Delizia Oscura is a truly one-of-a-kind niche experience. Inspired by the elegance of Italy, this gorgeously chic scent reveals a wealth of complexity: luscious dark chocolate to represent the warmth of the Italian people, coffee to symbolize their appreciation for family, friendship, and life, and, most uniquely, that sophisticated violet petal heart to celebrate Italy's world-class fashion scene. It all comes together to create a scent unlike any other- mouthwatering and stylish, delicious and dynamic. Celebratela dolce vitawith Delizia Oscura, and discover the joy and charm of Italy.

name: Odile
notes: Blood Orange, Dark Chocolate, Rubber, Suede, Musk

name: Odette
notes: Grapefruit Soda, Rhubarb, Rose, Orris, Tonka, Musk
description: ODETTE, the white swan. Pale blue skies part for a moment, sun illuminates the silvery edges of sheer clouds. A singsong sound from above announces 芒聙聹For a couple of hours, I am this person芒聙聺.Graceful vulnerability, Living doll, Pastel blush walls (dusted in white and bronze paint), Wistfulness for another universe outside of time and space, 7 Up & half a grapefruit as a snack, A first encounter with a sparkly stranger

name: Patchouli Mania
notes: Hazelnut, Davana, Coriander, Cocoa, Clearwood, Tea, Patchouli, Vetiver, Cetalox
description: Intoxicating, chic, and mouthwatering, Patchouli Mania is a dynamic new fragrance from Essential Parfums and the great Fabrice Pellegrin that combines the richness of patchouli with the powdery sweetness of cocoa to create something uniquely and deliciously balanced. Constructed as a modern gourmand chypre, Patchouli Mania surprises from the very first spritz, as any preconception of stuffy, dirty patchouli vanishes in a burst of aromatic davana and fiery coriander against sweet, nutty hazelnut, which builds to a sensual, yet comfortingly smooth and delectably sweet patchouli and cocoa richness. Mysterious, addictive, and easy to wear any time, Patchouli Mania is a must-have for patchouli lovers, and the ideal introduction to the note for anyone who has yet to find their perfect patch.

name: Happy Dust
notes: Mango Juice, Green Mate Absolute, Coconut Water, Bourbon Vanilla, Matcha, Star Jasmine Absolute, Vanilla Madagascar Absolute, Brown Sugar, Gold Amber, Black Vanilla, Creamy Sandalwood, White Musk, Peru Balsam, Tonka
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: A blissful creation highlighting the world芒聙聶s most desired and attractive scent to humans... Vanilla! Happy Dust will transport you to a fairyland where Vanilla sky is the limit.Not just Vanilla. Silky and smoothly blended, exposing the king and the queen of the fragrance, vanilla Madagascar absolute and green matcha absolute. Complemented by candied golden amber, dazzling white musk, and a touch of white flowers to pave the way to wonderland.Bitterly sweet, an aroma that attracts, the scent that turns heads. A lustrous addiction without limits.

name: Night in Andalus
notes: Aged Agarwood Oil From Several Regions Of Papua, Cambodia And Asam, Mysore Sandalwood Produced In 1996, Tincture With Deer Musk Ambergris; Tonka Bean From Venezuela And Jasmine From Egypt
description: A Night in Andalus is a fragrance that takes you back to that time in one of the palaces of Andalusia, those architectural masterpieces that only contain natural oud from Cambodia, India, and India, embraced by Egyptian jasmine, guaiac wood, amber, and tonka bean. The journey will not be complete without dear musk and ambergris.Limited edition, one time offering.

name: The Omniscient Mr Thompson
notes: Pink Pepper, Orris, Sesame Seeds, Leather, Rum, Vanilla, Sandalwood
style: Smoky, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Serving smoky, rum-like and leather hints calmed by vanilla and sesame milk, Mr Thompson is reassuring at every turn 芒聙聯 yet a master in the art of spying. As for what the butler saw芒聙娄 well, he never forgets, but is ever discrete. All the best butlers keep your secrets芒聙娄

name: Arabians Tonka
notes: Bergamot, Saffron, Rose, Oud, Amber, Oakmoss, Tonka Bean, Cane Sugar, White Musk
style: Exotic, Floral - Spicy, Woody - Dark
description: Arabians Tonka, intended for lovers of rare perfumes, is a companion scent to the original Arabians, meant as a tribute fragrance to the Arabic Horse. A fine blend of spiced smoke, bewitching Bulgarian Roses, Tonka Bean and Bergamot gives way to the animal temperament of Oud, Amber and Musk. An audacious, racy and fiery fragrance.

name: Ambre Fume
notes: Caramel, Vanilla, Benzion, Amber, Spices, Opoponax Absolute, Oud
style: Woody - Amber, Woody - Spicy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: The result of an intriguing composition, "Smoked Amber" is a direct, sweet, warm and subtly woody fragrance in which the worlds of incense and spices meet. Imagine yourself in an arid eastern land with not a single flower on the horizon, where a hot sandstorm is blowing, and then an unexpected caravan crosses the landscape, loaded with incense and sweet spices. Such a caravan shouldn't go unnoticed...A perfect illustration of a fragrance as fiery as incense yet as sweet and mild as honey. In this composition, I took up the challenge of deliberately omitting floral essences. Surprising as it may seem, "Ambre fum脙漏" contains no floral notes whatsoever.It opens with a pleasant surprise: notes of roasted chestnuts and almonds quickly introduce you to the honeyed, sweet side of this fragrance, with amber and incense adding even more warmth and subtlety. To enhance the character of this fragrance, I've added clove and cardamom spices, which blend perfectly here and play a major role in this composition. Tonka bean accompanies the fragrance, giving it an almost unexpected vanilla-smoke and exotic touch, further enhanced by woody notes of Gaiac wood and Thai oud.Ambre fum脙漏 is an olfactory caravan, an original and intriguingly direct composition with an assertive character; an ardent fragrance with spicy woody notes that also accentuate its sensuality, a fragrance where the worlds of incense and spices meet and become one.

name: Toor Toor
notes: Grapefruit Rind, Violet Leaf, Peppery Freesia, Jasmine, Vetiver Oil, Tuberose, Vetiver Heart, Ditax Wood, Leather, Vetiver Concentrate
style: Floral - White, Fresh - Citrus, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy
description: I芒聙聶ve been mesmerized by tuberose since childhood. Once I began creating fragrances on my own, I was shocked by the complexity of the natural tuberose absolute - it smells green, raw, earthy, and spicy.Dominique Ropion, the undisputed king of white florals, helped me formulate this rule-breaking new white floral. I call it a brutalist tuberose: it芒聙聶s complex, unisex, beguiling and totally unexpected. 芒聙聯 Alia Raza, founder

name: Ruade
notes: Narcissus, Oud, Hay Absolute, Leather
style: Animalic, Floral - Ambery Spice, Woody - Dark
description: A perfumed snapshot of the equestrian world, when the horses have been unloaded from their truck and escorted to their stalls. Next out of the van are the tack trunks, from which emanate a mixture of strong animalic smells: leather from the harness and gaiters, saliva from the bits, perspiration from the saddle pads, pine tar for smearing on hooves, remnants of straw and hay on the blankets. All the fervor of the horse and his accoutrements is distilled in this exceptional fragrance, built around a profusion of natural agarwood. Ruade is an intrepid and magnificent perfume with precious materials in overdose, saturated with rich animality and as rebellious as an equine kick.

name: Sugar Kisses
notes: Milk, Cocoa Butter, Heliotrope, Orange Peel, Frangipani, Moorea Vanilla, Cocoa Flower, Tonka Beans, Chocolate, Toasted Hazelnut, Date, Coconut, Vanilla Bean, Brown Sugar, Benzoin, White Musk, Caramel, Toffee, Bay Rum
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: What's sweeter than the smile of a happy little girl for her gift? A gift made from the heart, the big heart of Lorenzo Pazzaglia: a perfume, to little Sveva, on October 12th, the day of her eighth birthday. A gourmand fragrance that portrays with its harmonious olfactory symphony the most beautiful and pure characteristics of childhood: Fior di latte, sweet orange peel and delicate vanilla leave room for cocoa flowers, chocolate, fior di panna, becoming velvety and even more delicious thanks to the tonka bean and toasted hazelnut.The drydown is soft and sugary, thanks to the base notes including brown sugar, caramel, toffee and musk. Being children again and seeing that wonderful smile appear on our faces, surrounded by the memory of the most innocent and pure times. A little girl who blows a kiss from her hand to say thank you, a direct and sincere gesture that fills the heart with tenderness: this is Sugar Kisses.

name: Oud Beyond
description: Beyond Oud. The definitive Oud. What makes this Oud unrivaled is the superb quality of its ingredients.The idea of an Oud with Musk has existed for a long time, but has never been interpreted in a totally natural way.At the heart of Oud Beyond is a very elegant, rich and woody Thai Oud, combined with a more animalic essence of Laos Oud. A musky note is introduced from hibiscus seeds known as Ambrette Musk as well as real ethically farmed Civet Musk. Powerful yet delicate, Oud Beyond can be worn by both men and women.

name: Karikia
notes: Aldehydes, Blood Orange, Acacia, English Oakwood, Saffron, Tobacco Leaves, Blue Tansy, Boronia Absolute, Omani Frankincense, Madagascan Black Pepper, Nutmeg, Hinoki Wood, White Cypress, Bois De Siam, Mahogany, Virginia Cedarwood., Bulgarian Tobacco Absolute, Hazelnut Sirup Pancake, Madagascan Vanilla Absolute, Tonka Beans Absolute, French Hay Absolute, Beeswax Absolute, Castor脙漏um (recreation), Australian Sandalwood Spicatum, Ambergris.
style: Smoky, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Tobacco farming has been, especially during last century, one of the major sources of income and livelihood for many farmers and families in Northern Greece. I芒聙聶ve been told multiple stories with regard to the very sophisticated, extremely demanding and complex procedure from cultivation to crop of tobacco from my ancestors. Drawing inspiration from those stories and visiting some of the remaining crops fields myself I decided to create an incredibly complex tobacco based composition. Kar脙颅kia were land ramps that were precisely created after loosening and turning the soil at least twice with wooden and iron ploughs. That芒聙聶s where the seedlings were carefully planted when they reached 10 to 15cm height after the initial planting of the seeds in a sun and rain protected nursery. In my forthcoming creation you will experience multiple facets created by dry and earthy, sweet and resinous and also bright, foresty and aldehydic notes. 芒聙聯Angelos

name: Big Sur Eucalyptus
notes: Wet Wood, Pacific Spray, Eucalyptus Globulous, Cardamom, Rosemary, Magnolia, Eucalyptus Cone, Cypress, Dry Leaves
style: Earthy, Fougere, Green / Herbaceous
description: The BIG SUR AFTER RAIN candle by DS & Durga is one their most successful selling products.  People have asked for  to make it as a perfume, but according to David芒聙聯脗聽芒聙聹I really don芒聙聶t dig candle oils on the skin.芒聙聺  So he took the dominant accord, and many of the same materials and fashioned them into a foggy meditation on coastal California eucalyptus groves that sits wonderfully on the ol芒聙聶 epidermis.  Eucalyptus is one of DS & Durga's top five favorite smells in the world.  The oil alone cannot encapsulate its real essence 芒聙聯 balmy, green, woody, and deeply spicy. This perfume captures this for all the seekers and tweakers out there.

name: Le Gourmand
notes: Grilled Toast, Salted Butter, Cookie Dough, Chocolate, Hazelnut
style: Gourmand
description: At the very first spritz, Le Gourmand welcomes you with the tantalizing aroma of grilled toast slathered with salted butter. The top note immediately transports you to a cozy morning in a charming bakery, where the rich and slightly smoky scent of perfectly toasted bread tickles your senses.Freshly Baked Cookie Dough As the fragrance develops, the heart note of "Le Gourmand" emerges, enveloping you in the irresistible scent of freshly baked cookie dough. Imagine the warm, buttery sweetness of cookies being prepared, filling the air with an almost mouthwatering anticipation. This heart note captures the essence of a sweet, comforting, and decadent treat.Chocolate Spread, Chopped Hazelnut To complete the olfactory journey, Le Gourmand unveils its base note, featuring the sumptuous combination of chocolate spread and chopped hazelnuts. This note evokes the heavenly scent of a velvety, nutty chocolate spread that's been generously slathered over a fresh-baked loaf. The comforting warmth and richness of this base note will linger on your skin, leaving an unforgettable and alluring trail.Le Gourmand is not just a fragrance; it's an experience that promises to transport you to a bakery, where you can almost taste the buttery toast, the sweet cookie dough, and the luscious chocolate spread. It's the best gourmand perfume ever created, meticulously crafted to encapsulate the essence of a bakery and the aroma of bread just out of the oven. Perfect for those who appreciate the indulgent and comforting scents of a warm bakery, this fragrance is the epitome of gourmand perfection. Don't just wear a perfume; wear an experience with Le Gourmand.

name: Vanille Leather
notes: Pink Peppercorn, Violet, Tuberose Absolute From India, Jasmin Absolute From Egypt, Orange Blossom Absolute, Vanilla From Madagascar, Patchouli From Indonesia, Oak Wood, Leather Accord, Orris, Benzoin
description: Vanille Leather honors vanilla, a precious spice from Madagascar, in a creation with voluptuous and textured tones. Majestic, it invites you on an olfactory journey between warmth and sensuality. It melts into a trilogy of Indian tuberose, Egyptian jasmine and orange blossom. To this harmony of white flowers is added a spicy facet of pink berries to give way to the addictive notes of Indonesian patchouli and oak wood. An intoxicating and audacious trail with leathery and smoky facets.芒聙聹My intention was to combine the precious vanilla pod with a bouquet of white flowers to slowly reveal its warm and sensual personality. The vanilla is adorned with the sulfurous and slightly honeyed tones of tuberose, then drinks in the powerful sweetness of jasmine and finally melting into the round, carnal notes of orange blossom. To intensify the trail, I chose to work around the notes of oak wood and patchouli.芒聙聺 芒聙聯 Dominique Ropion, perfumer

name: Baccarat Rouge 540 - Scented Body Oil
description: Baccarat Rouge 540 body oil delicately perfumes the skin with its light texture, leaving it softer and more radiant. Spray the oil onto the skin and gently massage in. The oil is rapidly absorbed, leaving an immediate sensation of comfort. The skin feels nourished and moisturized. A graphic and highly condensed signature. Baccarat Rouge 540 lays on the skin like an amber floral and woody breeze. The aerial notes of jasmine and the radiance of saffron carry mineral facets of ambergris and woody tones of freshly cut cedar wood. Baccarat Rouge 540 scented oil, held in the House芒聙聶s iconic glass bottle, is composed of sweet almond, macadamia, virgin argan and apricot kernel oils.

name: Oud Pagode
notes: Black Tea, Lotus, Chrysanthemum, Rice Powder, Cashmere Wood, Oud, Musk, Smoke
style: Woody - Fresh
description: Step into the mystique of Chapel Factory's OUD PAGODE, a fragrance that transports you to the tranquil heart of a distant pagoda. The scent reveals an unexpected interpretation of Oud wood, venturing beyond Middle Eastern influences into the solemnity of a Kodo ceremony. Notes of black tea mingle with the delicate florals of lotus and chrysanthemum, crafting an air of serene spirituality.The core of imperial OUD commands attention, its majestic presence enhanced by the gentle caress of rice powder, the comforting warmth of cashmere wood, and the subtle depth of musk. OUD PAGODE joins the Chapel Factory collection as a tribute to the rich heritage of incense, inviting the wearer to embrace the sacredness of ancient traditions in every drop.

name: Trompette 8
notes: Incense, Labdanum, Black Pepper Absolute, Cedar Wood, Chilli Pepper, Bergamot, Pink Pepper, Elemi
description: The "extrait de musique" collection aims to describe with incense the many sounds of the registers of the Great Organ of Notre-Dame Cathedral in Paris. Trompette 8 speaks synaesthetically of the trumpet register, belonging to the reed family, one of the oldest organ registers. The first documented attestation of this register is found in a description of a large organ from the first century B.C., placed in a gladiator arena. Reed registers the sound due to the vibration of a tab (the reed) on two walls.Characterized by a particularly metallic and "scratchy" sound just like real trumpets, they enrich and complement the instrument. The cap, like the previous extrait de musique, faithfully reproduces the stops of the registers of the Parisian Grand Organ. Trompette 8 is enclosed like its predecessors inside an entirely handmade wooden box, reminiscent of the wooden case of large pipe organ soundboxes.

name: Ne Il Giorno Ne L'ora
notes: Sandalwood, Tonka Bean, Amber, Musc, Marine Note, Jasmine, Rose, Iris, Lemon, Bergamot, Cardamom, Galbanum, Cedar, Lily Of The Valley
style: Smoky
description: The twelfth fragrance in the monolithic UNUM collection is designed to confront the most heightened of emotions: fear. Almost as per tradition, the starting point inspiring it is an extract from the Gospel of Matthew, the parable of the ten virgins. The story 芒聙聯 which also gives the fragrance its name 芒聙聯 is that of ten women who prudently save oil so they can burn their lamps as they await the bridegroom芒聙聶s arrival. We know that of the ten, only five 芒聙聯 described as very wise - participate in the wedding party; the others, having gone to find more oil for their lamps, find the door closed to them. 芒聙聹Lord, open to us芒聙聺, they say upon arriving, receiving the response: 芒聙聹Truly I say to you: I do not know you芒聙聺. We also know that, while they were awaiting the groom芒聙聶s arrival, they too fell asleep, but were ready to wake up and rejoice: "stay awake, therefore, because you know neither the day nor the hour", we read in Matthew.This is just the start. The idea is to go beyond the evangelism of these words and face our fears on a deeper, more intense level, evoking conflicting emotions and experiencing the seductive charm of danger 芒聙聯 an "amor fati" as Nietzsche claimed 芒聙聯 or at least, the presence of things beyond our control. This is a characteristic feature of horror literature (and more); it芒聙聶s the power of the uncontrolled over us. Yet the existence of fear always requires something else: not lack of courage, but the presence of what we most desire. What remains most men芒聙聶s highest aspiration is also a harbinger of trouble: freedom.The perfume conveys the idea of destruction, the choice to be silent, and the introspection needed to delve into the depths of the skin芒聙聶s most remote existence. Yet seeking to control it stirs attraction and even feelings of pleasure towards that sought-after, desired fear.Man is caught in a horrific fate, and our society, with the violent approval of the mob, tries to daze itself and deny the truth, or rather Being-for-death.Only in this way does man become I in his darkest, unspoken shadow, displaying his true nature made up of contradictions and desires. Faced with fear, seemingly chaotic primordial needs composed of dormant, hidden, and dangerous eroticism are triggered, making the impossible possible.The packaging is in line with the UNUM collection; this time it is sealed with a cold transparent film and a silver label. The bottle (also silver) is placed in a "silent" black velvet bag, sealed in a heat-shrunk sheath which needs to be cut physically using the metal scissors contained in the box.Following his religious fall into the realm of dust, faced with life on a fragile planet, and having lost all his bearings, man is inextricably connected to fear, forced to wander in the dark side of the soul. Inside that room, he perceives a dim light that reveals deformed limbs sharing monstrous things that seek to destroy respectability and take pleasure in suffocating souls, no longer reckoning with life芒聙聶s balance sheets but with a form of salvation that芒聙聶s ever more distant.

name: Risk
notes: Bergamot, Yuzu, Vintage Oud Trat, Oud Assam, Two Vintage Oud India, Oud Prachin, Oud Laos, Tuberose Absolute, Iris, Ambergris, Musk Tonkin, Civet, Benzoin Sumatra And Benzoin Siam
description: I love Oud芒聙聺 says Husen Baba, the maker of the Azman house of uber unique scents. 芒聙聹I have been in the business of Oud for so many years and have always been a big fan of what perfume houses have been creating with this fabulous, incredible substance.芒聙聺There are so many ways to describe Risk but none of these descriptions will be truly conclusive. 芒聙聹Two years ago, I had the dream of creating the endgame Oud scent. Despite the countless creations, I could still envision a concoction that pays ultimate homage to the sublime oud oil.芒聙聺According to Husen, the journey to create Risk was not an easy one. The concept profile and the execution process had to have a lot of time devoted to creating a matrix of Oud and another of musky, spiced florals with a hint of earthiness and leather. 芒聙聹I commissioned one of the world芒聙聶s greatest contemporary noses, Antonio Gardoni, to create these two matrices and the outcome was the perfect twin to the abstract m脙漏lange I had in my mind芒聙聶s eye.芒聙聺Risk was envisaged as a 芒聙聹crown of fire芒聙聺, as in the summit of desire and passion. The name is inspired by great endeavors in life that are achieved with vision, persistence, nonchalance and a big margin of Risk.The Oud matrix was created by mixing SIX types of Oud ranging between vintage and new, whereas the floral/musky matrix was created with the yellow immortal flower - helichrysum, tuberose absolute, iris and a few others.If you are approaching this scent with the typical notion of pyramid in mind, you are at risk. Think nothing of the kind! There芒聙聶s the citric interlude that was created with yuzu lemons and bergamot. The rest is a magical roller coaster of alternating currents of wafting notes.芒聙聹I wanted to get away from the typical pyramid segway trip. I envisioned a scent with 芒聙聹cycles of entwined auras芒聙聺 芒聙聯 a journey of Oud and musky spices done with the noblest of notes.芒聙聺  Risk - THIS IS IT!

name: 12th of Oct. 1492
notes: Rhubarb, Pink Pepper, Cinnamon, Ginger, Bergamot, Blackcurrant, Plum, Peach, Apple, Mango, Jasmine, Iris, Lily Of The Valley, Vanilla, Sugar, Leather, Agarwood, Nagarmotha, Sandalwood, Vetiver, Patchouli, Labdanum, Frankincense, Amber, Musk
style: Earthy, Floral - Spicy, Fruity, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet
description: A New World of Rundholz perfume. A rare and complex blend of very rich and precious ingredients.An intriguing blend of exotic fruits and spices give an initial lift and impressive signature to the top note. The heart is a bouquet of elegant and sensuous flowers. The unique twist of this fragrance is found in the base, which contains the sensory vortex of this creation, triggering a positive mood to the wearer, an unique accord between rich pure vanilla beans and a sophisticated smokey leather are key players of the fond. The are supported by warm, creamy musks and precious woods with a long-lasting mystical frankincense touch, a signature note in all Rundholz creations.Distinctive and long lasting, 12th of Oct. 1492 is an unforgettable voyage of discovery.

name: Evil Angel
notes: Mint, Absinthe, Musk Fruit, Tropical Light Lime, Mixed Citrus, Robinia, Pure Cedar, Whisky, Rhum, Cinnamon, Cedarwood, Sandalwood, Myrrh, Tobacco, Indian Vanilla, Bourbon Vanilla
description: 芒聙聹In my heart I have the wind whispering mint crisp and pure. In my eyes I have sails unfurled, seas of Whisky to sail and lands of Absinthe to discover. I draw my sword and find justice in the arms of sweet vanilla myrrh while my rebellious soul finally finds stillness. So comes the night source of peace and I warrior rest on a bed of flowers and woods for tomorrow is the new day芒聙聺. 芒聙聯 Antea DevonEvil Angel is a fragrance between the angelic and the diabolical, suited to a complex personality that does not fit into traditional stereotypes.

name: Dream Sea
notes: Aquatic Notes, Pink Pepper, Black Pepper, Ozone, Green Notes, White Flowers, Bulgarian Rose, Ylang-Ylang, Spices, Ambergris, Black Cyprus Salt, Sandalwood, Cedarwood, Vanilla
style: Salty / Oceanic, Sweet
description: Memories of a night of passion: the cheerful cocktail of spices and flowers mingles with the vivid green notes of the vegetation hidden by the darkness; the unmistakable scent of the sea overlaps with that of the skin sprinkled with saltiness that, like a myriad of tiny diamonds, reflects the moon's glow. The contours of two bodies merge in the night; the rustle of the waves with quick breaths. The taste of salt on the lips becomes an unforgettable memory. Precious woods, accompanied by notes of grey amber and black Cyprus salt, make Dream Sea Extrait de Parfum mysterious and irresistibly sensual.

name: Une Pistache
notes: Neroli, Cardamom, Carrot, Pistachio Milk, Heliotrope, Olibanum, Sandalwood, Cashmeran, Musk
style: Gourmand
description: Close your eyes and imagine wandering through markets where orange blossoms and pistachios rub shoulders with the scent of marzipan. Notes of heliotrope shape the fragrance to give it fullness with almond facets, while notes of incense invigorate the fragrance and give it depth. A heart of carrot unfolds the sweet notes of the perfume and amplifies its unctuousness. It is then that the pistachio milk reveals all its nuances, gourmand and sweet, bitter and dry. A Pistachio as if it had come out of the streets of Tripoli, a firm, dense, dizzying pistachio!

name: Bonne Chauffe
notes: Davana, Black Pepper, Plum, Cereal, Vetiver, Cedar, Patchouli, Benzoin
style: Boozy, Fruity, Smoky, Warm, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: The most precious secret of cognac production, the "bonne chauffe" is the all-important second distillation, whereby thebrouilliscreated after distilling wine the first time is transformed into clear, potent eau-de-vie. Honoring this intense and intoxicating elixir, Bonne Chauffe is a powerful, smoky woods fragrance that warms the bones like a roaring fire on a winter's night. With a contrast between intense davana, dark, juicy plum, spicy vetiver, and resinous woods, Bonne Chauffe is an unforgettable concoction not to be missed- a treasure of a fragrance as only the expert cognac distillers of Frapin could produce.

name: Dodo Jackfruit Edition
notes: Jackfruit Accord, Bergamot, Pink Pepper, Turmeric Leaf, Lavender, Geranium, Orange Flower, Turmeric Root, Orris Concrete, Tonka, Vetiver, Sandalwood, Patchouli, Labdanum
description: The sun sparkled across rippling waves, its morning dance upon the Indian Ocean rousing the dodos from their carefree slumber. Stumbling drunkenly across the forest floor they feasted on overripe fruit where it lay, dropped for them by the lush island paradise that nurtured them. For generations, the predator-free and bountiful shores lulled them into such a state of complacency that their wings grew idle, and flight was lost 芒聙聯 even to memory. Ultimately evolution would betray them, but while it lasted, the dodos enjoyed an existence marked by ease and comfort.In Zoologist Dodo, notes of jackfruit and bergamot border a winding path dappled with aromatic turmeric and pink pepper. Venture along it to the heart of an island forest where hints of powdery orris emerge from beneath a potpourri of lavender, geranium, and orange flower. Soothed by the comforting florals, you芒聙聶ll soon surrender, sinking into the loam where woody tonka and sandalwood sprout from an earthy base of patchouli and vetiver.Limited Edition: While Supplies Last

name: Orrisilla
description: Natural orris roots are the basis of this fragrance, which is in harmony with this character芒聙聯 you will notice every detail of the orris roots complimented with natural vanilla for an addictive drydown.

name: Hexensalbe
notes: Wormwood, Salty Liquorice, Tuberose, Rosemary, Angelica, Belladonna, Black Hemlock, Lichen, Patchouli
style: Avant-Garde, Floral, Green / Herbaceous, Unusual / Unexpected, Woody - Dark
description: Also known as witches芒聙聶 flying ointment, Hexensalbe was a hallucinogenic salve used in witchcraft in the middle ages. It was a mixture of extremely poisonous ingredients but the exact formula is not known, and several occultist scholars have died trying to recreate it. According to legend, it produced an ecstatic trance complete with powerful illusions and the sensation of flight- erotic, delirious, and, in the eyes of puritanical society, dangerous.Hexensalbe is a recreation of this potent elixir in olfactory form, a spooky and sensual exploration of nature and femininity. Dark, atmospheric herbs and aromatics combine with deeply carnal florals and dank, earthy basenotes to create a uniquely sinister aphrodisiac, a bewitching concoction with the power to take over body and soul. Do you dare to take the ride?

name: Accrodisiaque
notes: Dill, Rose, Black Pepper, Fennel, Violet, Black Tea, Benzoin, Cypriol, Leather, Mate, Musk, Patchouli, Vetiver
description: Vegetable. Dill. Blueberry. Rose. Matcha. Sensual. Leather. Smoked. Animal.Our perfumers have imagined a Neo Rose, reworked into an ultra-faceted and new accord. Vegetal (blueberry, dill, fennel), matcha tea, opulent rose and a very leathery - animal base. Mysterious, hot, sensual.

name: ARC
notes: Aragon Thyme And Rosemary, Holy Basil Himalayan, Aleppo Pine, Jasmine Sambac Himalayan, Lavender, Cypriol Heart, Benzoin Siam, Styrax Resin, Oakmoss
style: Fougere
description: Arc represents a confluence of Eastern and Western natural perfumery. Perfumers Antonio Lasheras and Rajesh Balkrishnan combine rare to obtain natural absolutes and create a fantastical mythical flowering plant that is fully contained in the bottled juice only as a unique fougere. Calming and spiritual, ARC takes its wearers to distant mountainous places where wild herbs and flowers caress the lofty pines.

name: Dimanche Flemme
notes: Basil, Lime, Lemon, Cardamom, Galbanum, Heliotrope, Amber, Sandalwood, Vanillin
description: Green. Basil. Sparkling. Cardamom. Milky. Almond. Vanilla. Musk. Sweet.A Neo Musc, reworked into a unique, ultra comforting blend. A velvety 芒聙聯 green start (pea shoots, basil) mixed with the fiery 芒聙聯 spicy flavor of cardamom. Contrasts: a sparkling lime sorbet and a sweet almond milk. More than 50% musk and a touch of vanilla.

name: Culot The
notes: Pink Pepper, Bergamot, Nutmeg, Black Pepper, Apricot, Ginger, Hedione, Jasmine, Black Tea, Amyris, Musk, Sesame
style: Floral - White, Fruity, Spicy, Sweet
description: Fresh. Jasmine. Citrus. Tonic. Tea. Apricot. Spicy. Wasabi. Sweet.A Neo Jasmine, Culot Th脙漏 is reworked into an evolving tea. A jasmine floral, apricot skin with a very fresh - spicy facet (ginger, garlic, wasabi), contrasted by a sweet and zesty facet (mandora, bergamot).

name: Sea, Sud & Sun
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Bitter Orange, Petitgrain, Aldehydes, Ambroxan, Fennel, Fir Balsam, Orange Blossom, Ginger, Rose, Fig, Pine, Musk, Marine Notes
style: Fresh, Fresh - Aquatic, Salty / Oceanic, Tropical / Beachy
description: Fresh. Pastis. Fig. Iced. Neroli. Musky. Tropezian. Salty. Marine.A new neroli, reworked with notes reminiscent of the south of France: a pastis accord, a very green and juicy fig, the sweetness of Trop脙漏zienne and the gourmandise of nougat, with iodized, musky notes.

name: Rital Date
notes: Garlic, Aldehydes, Pink Pepper, Basil, Bergamot, Bigarade, Lemon, Cypress, Red Mandarin, Oregano, Paprika, Black Pepper, Rosemary, Ambroxan, Coumarin, Fennel, Fir Balsam, Grapefruit Blossom, Blue Ginger, Olive Oil, Heliotrope, Gaiac, Musk, Sandalwood, Sesame, Vetiver
description: Aromatic. Fresh. Pesto. Tasty. Zesty. Limoncello. Sweet. Pistachio. Creamy.A duality between aromatic freshness and a sparkling but delicious citrus. Vegetable (pesto accord), Italian ingredients (fennel, olive oil, oregano, cypress) and pistachio ice cream. Very appetizing, fiery, hot, addictive.

name: Gueule de Bois
notes: Pink Pepper, Black Pepper, Cinnamon, Coumarin, Rose, Incense, Rum, Amber, Sandalwood, Immortelle, Gaiac, Vetiver
style: Boozy, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Spicy. Peppery. Incense. Rum. Ambery. Suave. Sandalwood. Warm. Woody.A new sandalwood, reworked into an intoxicating, but not overpowering, rum. Spicy notes (pepper, tose berries, cinnamon), a smoky incense note, amber notes, with sweet and candied facets. Last but not least, lots of warm, smooth woods.

name: Encounters
notes: Bergamot, Orange, Cassis, Lavender, Coriander, Iris Butter, Rose, Angelica, Cinnamon, Ambergris, Castoreum, Oudh, Sandalwood, Cedarwood, Benjoin, Peru Balsam
style: Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Where East meets West: the fascinating point of contact between different cultures, where diversity produces a new language.  Iconic materials from East and West 芒聙聯 Oudh and Iris 芒聙聯 blended into a new mysterious and voluptuous creature.The Iris is an iconic flower in the Western culture. It is the symbol of the city of Florence 芒聙聯 in the countryside of whom one of the most important areas for the cultivation of this flower has developed.The Fleur de Lys has also been a symbol for the French Kings since the 12th century. And countless times you can find iris in paintings throughout Western History.Oudh is an iconic ingredient of Eastern culture due to its crucial significance. Derived from an infection of the Aquilaria tree, it芒聙聶s native to South and South-east Asia, and parts of the Middle East.Used for spiritual and religious purposes, it is believed to help elevate the spirit and create a sense of calm and connection to the Divine.Considered one of the most precious material in perfumery for its intense and complex aroma, it芒聙聶s woody with leathery, animalic and smoky facets.

name: Bravi
notes: Bergamot, Bitter Orange, Ginger, Tuberose, Saffron, Honey, Walnut Milk Accord, Vanilla, Tobacco
description: Bravi芒聙聶s adventure begins at the opera house, which is the most iconic building in Covent Garden. A place where love and passion for the opera ignites friendships.Perfumer Bruno Jovanovic re-creates the scent of the Queen of the Night flower. During the olfactory exploration of the Queen of the Night, we take the path of sensuality, but in a dramatic and over the top sensational way.Intoxicating tuberose is spiced up with an overdose of ginger and dramatized with a novel walnut milk accord. The notes are blended in a way that accents the tension between them. Perfect for an opulent evening.

name: Absolu Aventus
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Blackcurrant, Grapefruit, Ginger, Pineapple, Patchouli, Pink Pepper, Cardamon, Cinnamon, Haitian Vetiver, Cashmeran Wood, Labdanum, Ambroxan, Musks, Oakmoss
description: Set your senses free with the limited-edition Absolu Aventus, an intoxicating new fragrance for men. This one-of-a-kind masterpiece introduces a burst of citrus energy through exquisitely fresh grapefruit that beckons to the sophisticated woods of Haitian vetiver, adding an elegant dimension of smoke to the pineapple and patchouli heart, and deepening a richly layered longevity. The special limited-edition Absolu Aventus is a striking interpretation of the iconic fragrance and is destined to become an unforgettably unique experience for true connoisseurs.

name: Clive 20 - Iconic Feminine
notes: Saffron, Damask Rose, Honey, Amber, Plum, Violet
style: Classic Feminine, Floral - Light
description: Created to celebrate the 20th anniversary of Clive Christian, Iconic Feminine more than lives up to the name. An explosion of Damask Rose, the queen of flowers, meets with rich saffron and a honeyed kiss of plum and violet. Crystal clear florals and ambers sparkle to create a glorious feminine perfume.Iconic Feminine opens with a dazzling burst of saffron, enveloping the wearer in aromatic splendor and a rich, golden warmth that captures the senses. As storied an ingredient as the rose itself, saffron's rarity, history, and precious nature made it the ideal opening for a composition of this magnitude. In the heart of the fragrance, the exquisite Damask Rose takes center stage. Like a delicate, timeless romance, it weaves floral poetry into the center of the perfume, evoking emotional depth, profound elegance, and rare sophistication. Finally, a base note of honey brings everything to a sweet and sensual conclusion. Honey grounds the perfume with its warm, luscious sweetness, leaving a lasting impression as inviting as a loving embrace. Boasting a unique blend of timeless elegance, undeniable luxury, and modern sensuality, Iconic Feminine is truly representative of everything one of the world's most legendary houses has accomplished in just 20 years.October 2025 - Final release of this limited edition fragrance.

name: Croissant Cafe
style: Creamy, Earthy, Spicy, Sweet
description: Coffee. Cappuccino. Gourmand. Tonka. Creamy. Toasted. Woody. Buttery. Warm.Elia Chiche has imagined a creamy croissant, reworked into an ultra smooth cappuccino coffee. Buttery, toasted, very warm and round notes (caramel / vanilla / milk) and woody - sweet notes. Ultra appetizing, it's a gourmand invitation to breakfast.

name: God Bless Cola
notes: Citrus, Pink Pepper, Black Pepper, Popcorn, Vanilla, Caramel, Cedar, Musk
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet
description: Cola. Popcorn. Sugar. Vanilla. Sparkling. Addictive. Caramel. Warm. Gourmand.Elia Chiche and Camille Chemardin have imagined a Neo Vanilla, reworked with ultra addictive and gourmet notes. A sparkling coke pairing, a peanut butter pairing, and above all, natural popcorn! Caramel, woods and sweet notes, deliciousness at the end of the bottle.

name: Vanilla Edesia
notes: Bergamot, Mandarin Oil, Bitter Almond, Heliotrope, Pink Pepper, Frankincense, Cinnamon, Cumin, Coriander, Rose Centifolia, Gurjum Balsam, Ylang Ylang, Milky Notes, Vanilla Absolute, Patchouli, Cypriol, Haitian Vetiver, Sandalwood, Virginia Cedar, Amber, Leather, White Musks
style: Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Dark
description: Named for the Roman goddess of feasts and celebrations, this opulent creation is a cornucopia of the gastronomic delights of creamy vanilla, mouthwatering fruits, citrus, and bitter almond. Seasoned with exotic spices of cinnamon and pink pepper, scattered with ylang-ylang, heliotrope and sweet rose centifolia florals, and all underpinned with an addictive, carnal base of amber, musk, and woods, it's a delightful and indulgent tribute to, well, indulgence.The vanilla absolute at the heart of this perfume is rich, dark and slightly salty, combined with creamy and nutty notes, mandarin and bergamot seasoned with cinnamon and pink pepper. The heliotrope, ylang ylang and rose centrifolia sweeten the scent with fruity florals and honey facets, with a carnal base of musk, leather, gourmand and robust woods.

name: Vanille Havane Extrait Absolu
description: We are thrilled to introduce an olfactory gem: the Vanille Havane Roll-On in a 10ml format, an unprecedented sensory experience that encompasses the richness and elegance of the bestseller.Vanille Havane is  reinvented it in a more convenient format, and in a huge 40% dosage (versus20% for the EDP) and an alcohol-free formula.

name: Coco n'Amour
notes: Coconut CO2 Extract, Copaiba Balsam, Sandalwood, Jasmine Abs., Pink Grapefruit, Tropical Fruit Accord, Precious Woods Accord, Island Love, Ocean Breeze
description: In the heart of the South Pacific lies a cherished island, a timeless tropical paradise deeply special to perfumer Tanja Bochnig. This fragrance is a unique coconut symphony, far from the ordinary sweetness, offering a delightful twist. It reveals the island芒聙聶s secrets芒聙聰the sun-drenched shores and lush tropical fruits芒聙聰all anchored in the grounding depth of sandalwood and precious woods. The perfume芒聙聶s essence is a sensual dance, an enchanting interplay of jasmine and grapefruit, evoking the allure of carefree island escapes. Beneath the towering coconut trees, your toes sink into fine, ivory sand, overflowing with memories of those perfect summer nights. This fragrance captures the essence of those treasured moments芒聙聰the gentle breeze, soothing waves, and laughter around a bonfire.芒聙聹Coco n芒聙聶Amour芒聙聺 isn芒聙聶t just a perfume; it芒聙聶s a vessel of cherished experiences, a reminder of a beloved island, infused with love, warmth, and resplendent beauty, featuring hints of sandalwood, jasmine, and grapefruit. Each spray transports you back to those unforgettable nights, to an脗聽island forever in your heart.

name: Sweet Muskmelon
notes: Thai Muskmelon, Coconut Milk, Jaggery, Pandan Leaf, Cashew Nut, Frangipani, Honey, Sandalwood, Melati, Coconut Nectar
style: Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet
description: An exquisite olfactory creation that radiates joyful fruitiness, Sweet Muskmelon is a mouthwatering exploration of the pure, sweet delights of nature. Combining a succulent note of muskmelon, a uniquely sweet and juicy Southeast Asian cousin of cantaloupe, with a variety of enchanting ingredients also native to Prin Lomros' home country of Thailand, this exotic and captivating fragrance feels simultaneously exotic and comfortingly familiar. Creamy coconut milk is sweetened with the unrefined dark sugar of jaggery and the floral, herbal, and almond tones of pandan leaf, contrasted with the rich nuttiness of cashew, inviting you to savor every moment. In the base, luxurious sandalwood grounds the composition, while elegant regional florals like frangipani and melati enrich the harmony of the fragrance with tropical flair. Sweet Muskmelon is more than a mere fragrance; it芒聙聶s a sensoryvoyage that captures the essence of ripe melon kissed by the sun, paired with exotic notes reminiscent of a faraway tropical paradise.

name: Sweet Celestials
notes: Pandan Leaf, Nom Maew Flower, Rice Powder, Mung Bean, Coconut Milk, Coconut Water, Jasmine Water, Sandalwood, Sugar, White Flowers, Palm Sugar
style: Creamy, Exotic, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Fresh
description: A magical fragrance inspired by Khanom Chan, the beloved traditional Thai dessert reserved for the most special occasions, Sweet Celestials is a truly celebratory and unique gourmand rich with uniquely Thai flavors. It begins with sweet, grassy Pandan leaves, while Nom Maew flower blossom, a sweet and predominantly floral aroma, infuses the scent with a crisp and exotic allure. As the fragrance evolves, mung bean lends a comforting, powdery sweetness, seamlessly blending with the seductive richness of jasmine to create a heart both familiar and tantalizingly opulent. The base rests upon the creamy opulence of coconut milk, a true homage to the Thai desserts that inspired this creation. Sandalwood adds depth and sophistication, anchoring the fragrance in a harmonious balance of sweetness and earthiness.More than just a perfume, Sweet Celestials is a true celebration- a perfect harmony of Thai culture and the universal language of mouthwatering scent.

name: Fuego Futuro Extrait
notes: Timut Pepper, Mate Absolute, Elemi, Smoked Sage, Hay Absolute, Incense, Sandalwood, Alaskan Cedar, Ash
style: Green / Herbaceous, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: A meditative journey inspired by the infinite wilderness and shamanic rituals, Fuego Futuro is a magical extrait which connects the powerful elements of Earth and Fire. Opening with the unique tingling sparkle of timut (ban timur) pepper, Fuego Futuro presents a unique and captivating blend of earthy, smoky, aromatic, and green notes in a heart featuring mate absolute, hay, smoked sage, and green elemi for a fragrance that feels both naturally raw and impressively sophisticated. Each complex facet of the fragrance is reinforced in a rich base of incense, woods, and smoky campfire ash, balanced perfectly to present an intoxicatingly mystical scent that challenges expectations and invites us on a spiritual journey.

name: Raw Gold Extrait
notes: Davana Oil, Cedar, Orris Absolute, Patchouli, Gaiac, Suede, Vanilla Absolute, Laotian Oud Oil, Benzoin
style: Earthy, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Raw Gold is a fragrance with an unmistakable character, with a top note that unfolds intensely and demandingly. A combination of seemingly sweet liqueur, intense coffee, smoky vetiver and black pepper. The heart is presented with a daring impression of lipstick and the warm notes of a texture of leather and suede.
