The base is a journey through balsamic notes - with tonka beans for the masculine, animal warmth from civet and patchouli, enhanced with the exotic notes of opoponax for a hint of dark honey. The maturing process for Raw Gold took three years. But this is the only way that the more than sixty ingredients and a patchouli that has been stored dry for over twenty years can develop properly.

name: Sol Salgado Extrait
notes: Linden Blossom, Mimosa, Cotton Flower Accord, Salt, Heliotrope, Ambergris, Sandalwood, Skin Musk, Smoked Vanilla
description: The essence of ocean air on sun-kissed skin, captured just before the heat takes a shimmering leave in the magic hour, Sol Salgado is a precious and unforgettable perfume extrait. Opening with a stunning solar burst of fresh florals, this unique fragrance adds a spray of sea salt, along with the sweetness of heliotrope and the warm, aquatic complexity of real ambergris. In the rich, seductive drydown, creamy sandalwood mingles with a blend of smooth skin musks and the complexity of smoked vanilla to evoke golden sunsets and the memories of a summer as endless as the extrait itself. Discover the magic of Sol Salgado- a journey to the edge of the horizon.

name: Supernova
notes: Cardamom, Cinnamon, Saffron, Lavender, Cypress, Cedarwood, Vetiver, Leather, Oud
style: Avant-Garde, Earthy, Fresh, Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: Supernova is an exploration around the smell of a visual explosion in space, the optical luminosity of a supernova.Moving into the darker months in Iceland, the mood shifts to the mystical fall with bright stars gazing in the sky twirled in the purple hues of the Aurora Borealis.An intense spicy opening where fresh cardamom, captivating cinnamon and racy saffron blend in a perfect accord. In the heart, aromatic lavender is enhanced by the subtlety of cedarwood and mysterious olibanum.

name: Lavande 31
notes: Bergamot, Neroli, Lavender, Tonka, Musk
description: Lavender? Perhaps you conjured up an image of your grandmother芒聙聶s wall-papered bathroom, with a bar of purple soap sitting next to the sink. Or an old-fashioned barbershop, with whiffs of lavender mixed with oak-moss floating in the air.In true Le Labo form, Lavande 31 knocks all preconceived notions of lavender on its head. Its bergamote and neroli essential oils give it a fresh lift-off to reveal a lavender of the greatest purity, where only the flower buds are distilled, giving the creation verticality and richness. Its foundation is pure Le Labo: ambery, dirty, and musky notes, blended with notes of tonka to give the perfume a regressive classic style that is both clean and dirty, recognizable yet truly unique. Nope, this isn芒聙聶t the lavender you thought you knew. Welcome to a new reality.Personalize your fragrance:Enter your custom message or name at checkout and we'll have Le Labo print it on your label.Please note:Complimentary samples availablewith any product purchase. Please request at checkout in the comments box.

name: A Whiff of Waffle Cone
notes: Vanilla, Heavy Cream, Salted Caramel, Sandalwood, Orgeat, Saigon Cinnamon, Ice Cream Shoppe
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Milky, Spicy, Sweet
description: Ice cream lovers, rejoice: Imaginary Authors' much beloved gourmand masterpiece, previously an exclusive for beloved artisan scoop shop Salt & Straw, is now available to you anywhere in the world. A sophisticated and transportive unisex perfume, A Whiff of Waffle Cone evokes the sweetness and nostalgia of stepping into an ice cream parlor, right as the freshly made waffle cones come hot off the iron. With richly sweet, caramel-infused vanilla and decadent heavy cream spiced up with a luscious cinnamon accord (enhanced from the original Salt & Straw version) and a unique twist of sandalwood, this is a gourmand both evocative and elegant. The door to your favorite ice cream shop is right there in front of you- why wouldn't you open it?

name: Melancholia
notes: Cassis, Green Apple, Violette Leaf, Bergamote, Dates, Narcisse Abs, Lily Of The Valley, Musk, Clearwood, Vetiver Java, Incense Pyrogenee, Cade Oil
description: Plain tragedy of existence: drawn on notes of violette leaf and lily of the valley and grounded by clearwood and incense pyrogenee,  the innocent moment of recognition arrives both too soon and too late;  producing a feeling of being out of time in the sense of being late but also out of sync or out of tempo.  the realization of this vertiginous experience of our present moment of loss and being lost appears to be looming  when it is already too late. 芒聙聯Mark Buxton

name: Steamed Rainbow
notes: Red Mandarin, Orange, Yellow Elemi Resin, Green Cedar, Blue Almond Flower, Indigo Grass, Violet, Vetiver, Vapors
style: Floral - Fruity, Fresh, Fresh - Clean
description: ROYGBIV reflections on soft, weightless water streaming upwards.Inspired by Terry Riley's A Rainbow in Curved Air, Steamed Rainbow chooses ingredients representing every color of the rainbow, carefully proportioned to create a truly prismatic fragrance- bright, fresh, uniquely delicate. Mouthwateringly fresh fruits gain gentle contrast from yellow elemi resin, while aromatic green cedarwood and sweet almond and violet flowers rest atop a refreshing base of clean, spicy vetiver and an evocatively watery vapor accord. What does a rainbow smell like? Perhaps unsurprisingly, a little bit of everything, and you're going to love finding out.

name: Vanilla in Armagnac
notes: Cocoa Shell, Lemon, Bitter Orange, Sandalwood, Vanilla CO2 Extract, Cocoa Absolute
style: Boozy, Gourmand
description: A creation by Natasha C脙麓t脙漏 (who also authored Praline in Maple, Oud in Calvados and Vetiver in Bloom), it was born from customer feedback when posed the question: 芒聙聹What Scents of Wood fragrance would you like Natasha to work on next?芒聙聺, The answer was unanimous... 芒聙聹A fluffy woody scent, like a dessert of sorts芒聙聺.Natasha subsequently began thinking about that strange request. Her mind wandered to French 芒聙聹B脙禄ches de No脙陋l芒聙聺, those Meringue-filled, traditional vanilla iced cakes and soon enough, her frothy, airy vanilla scent was in the works. The Armagnac barrel - with its earthy, aromatic impact - was an obvious choice. And so Vanilla in Armagnac was born. A light, fizzy companion to Vanilla in Bourbon (headier, boozier, more vanillin-centric), Vanilla in Armagnac is a luminous cedar & vanilla scent that sparkles from top to dry down.

name: Patchouli in Rye
notes: Mandarin, Nutmeg, Pink Pepper, Turkish Rose, Geranium, Labdanum, Tobacco, Patchouli, Vanilla Bean
description: A modern contrast starred by sultry woods and charred spice. The perfect signature for a seductive twist.To create this fragrance, perfumer C脙漏line Barel's inspiration was to play against the charred, woody inflections of rye by using earthy ingredients like patchouli and tobacco.

name: Oud in Calvados
notes: Calvados, Pink Pepper, Bergamot, Cocoa Absolute, Oakwood, Rose De Mai, Cedarwood, Oud
description: A celebration of the aromatic Calvados drink encouraged by dark opulent Oud. Perfumer Natasha Cote-Mouzannar wanted to capture the essence of a centuries-old distillation process resulting in calvados and to further enrichen the full-bodied spirit with inflections of precious Oud. A bold duo that jolts into a woody, resinous bourbon with hints of fruity undertones.

name: Blue Talisman - Eau de Parfum
notes: Bergamot, Ginger, Mandarin, Pear, Orange Blossom, Georgywood, Akigalawood, Musks, Ambrofix
style: Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Citrus, Woody - Fresh
description: Designed as a hypnotic jewel, BLUE TALISMAN encapsulates the best of EX NIHILO's know-how as an olfactory statement. A cutting-edge fragrance symbol of an infinite spiritual energy expressed by the subtle freshness of Ginger softened by abstract Musky and Ambery notes. This creation embodies the vanguard and singular spirit of the House through bewitching and numerous facets.

notes: Citric, Fruity Fresh, Wood, Spices, Earthy, Chocolate, Amber, Musk, Vanilla, Tonka
description: Such as the city of Paris, Rosendo Mateu芒聙聶s 1970 is associated with refinement, luxurious beauty, and glamour, like haute couture. It is a sublime expression of sweet sophistication. Citrus and fruity notes enhanced with the precious flavour of tonka bean. A complex and fascinating heart of chocolate, spices, woody, and earthy notes on a base of amber, vanilla, and caramel. Musky notes lurk among the heart notes, an incredible concentration of seduction.

notes: Citric, Fresh, Clean, Ozone, Marine, Woody, Salty, Spices, White Musk
description: At the latest 80芒聙聶s New York became the main centre of creative perfumery in the world. A place where Rosendo found the modernity which gave him the sense of individual power and freedom.1988 represents the self-confidence and the mastery, expressed in a marine fragrance. It is a delicate balance of citric and fresh top notes that give way to aquatic middle notes of ozone, sea water, marine salt and undertones of white musk, hint of spices and woody notes.The fragrance tonality mirrors the tranquillity of the ocean, a new vitality that invites us on a self-discovery journey.

name: Tea Travel Set 4x10ml
description: A beautiful set of 10ml atomizers Tea fragrances from ONE DAY. Packaged in a sleek, minimalist box with note card inserts.Limited production availability.Coffret Includes 3 x 10ml atomizers:- OOLONG TEA- JASMINE TEA- OSMANTHUS TEAPLUS - additional single item 10ml PU'ER Tea (Note: individually boxed separately)

name: Pu'er Tea
notes: Pu'er Tea Leaves, Cedarwood, Cypress, Patchouli, Incense, Vetiver
description: Puer is ripe time. From raw to ripe, green to carmine. In an old room served tea in purple boccaro clay on a wooden tray, at 80 degrees. Boiled water streams a crimson river from an altitude and settles a lake in the cup. Tea and walls fermented and tinted by the years, aged red and brown.The air travels through houses and highlands, and takes nostalgia back between the compressed leaves. Traces of people moving and leaving, become a wind that dries the tea. Then it rains. The color diffuses and unifies again in red, the water that runs through it becomes denser in time. Brew and pour the aged water anti-clockwise, breathe the moment, reverse time.Remember when the tea was new, when we still wrote letters, when it tasted fresh, and left a sweet aftertaste.

name: Osmanthus Tea
notes: Osmanthus Absolute, Jasmine, Tea Leaves, Vetiver
description: The leaves land on water. Tea of amber color flows from the beak of the pot and scattered flowers float on the sound.Seat your friends on a mat in the afternoon, let芒聙聶s gather in the name of festive rituals, and for the sake of the moon. The oolong is tinted of clear topaz, alongside the refreshing osmanthus cake and the delicatessens. Under the silver branches, we harvest the yellow flowers.When the sun fades and paints the evening gold, pour some new tea over the emerging breeze. Now drink to the tantalising scent of floral oolong, and wait for the moon to arise.Circle is the shape of the cup, yellow is the colour of the moon. It芒聙聶s a date, mid-fall.

name: Jasmine Tea
notes: Jasmine, Clary Sage, Tea Leaf, Tieguanyin Tea Extract, Vetiver, Musk
description: Early fall when jasmine falls. Stream of water slides into the white porcelain.The elegant flow of flowers concentrates time, and slows time. As the tea washes the room with a green soft floral aroma, take a sip. In each wash you taste something different芒聙聰the cycle of soil, a cycle of life, all dewy and fragrant. Spring sprouts, late summer blooms. Flower that closes at day and opens at night, emits a gentle fragrance into the dried leaves.Leaf and petals of 1OO flowers layer and become one. Three seasons as one. In one cup. On one day.

name: Oolong Tea
notes: Bergamot, Clary Sage, Oolong Tea Leaf, Honey, Jasmine, Vetiver, Tonka Bean
description: Between the trees, scent of tea and beans waves in from the quiet japanese courtyard in a tranquil Taipei alley. The sun beams through the papered window, under the aged wood flow of hot water brews dried tea leaf into stringency and earthy benevolence. The clear bitter brown twists an aftertaste in your mouth. The old man presents you plated japanese confectionery on ceramic, honeyed cake, sweet grinded rice and sugared beans thickens the air and washes the bitterness.Portioned sweetness and oolong sophistication, the afternoon delight.

name: Death Of A Ladies Man
notes: Mastic, Basil, Violet, Sweet Galbanum
description: A crystalline green worship of the romantic outdoors. A dream of violets in 35mm, baroque pearls, a lover with golden words to sing into your ear. A bracingly bright, impossibly fresh floral laden with rich, green, herbaceous notes taken to narcotic excess. Come outside and join the party.

name: Molecule Discovery Set - 8.5ml
description: The Molecule 8.5ml Discovery Set is created to encourage and satiate your scentual curiosity. Designed for exploration, this set enables you to explore all five of the Molecule scents before determining your preferred olfactory escape. The fragrances are housed in 8.5ml mini vials, scaled down to explore the radial world of Molecules and quench all your on-the-go scenting needs.Molecule 01: Revolutionary MinimalismMolecule 02: Mineral AmberMolecule 03: Grassy RootsMolecule 04: Cocooning RadianceMolecule 05: Piney CashmereAll five Molecule fragrances are brimming with character and unbeholden to gender distinctions. These moody beauties all hold a web of multifarious meanings, definitions and sensations.

name: Escentric Discovery Set - 8.5ml
description: The Escentric 8.5ml Discovery Set, designed to invoke a sense of freedom and exploration, is adventure-ready by design and allows you to experience every part of the Escentric puzzle before choosing your favourite piece. The fragrances are housed in 8.5ml, party-friendly vessels, shrunken-down for you to try, travel with and take on a night out. The Escentric fragrances highlight the unique character of the aroma-molecule with ingredients chosen to bring out the molecule's key facets.Escentric 01: Cult-scented FormulaEscentric 02: Sparkling FreshnessEscentric 03: Arboreal ConcoctionEscentric 04: Hazy FantasyEscentric 05: Deconstructed MediterraneaAll five Escentric fragrances are brimming with character and unbeholden to gender distinctions, marking nature's beauty through fresh interpretations of much-loved notes.

name: Luban
notes: Strawberry, Bergamot, Pink Berries, Cardamom, Gardenia Flower, Rose Bulgarian, Rose Turkish Absolute, Sandalwood, Oud Essential Oil, Tonka Bean, Vanilla, Cedar, White Amber, White Musc
description: Luban means Frankincense in Arabic, and also means chewing gum, which are collected in the shape of tears from Boswellia tree and used in incense, perfumes and even medicine. Luban is an woody-spiced amber fragrance, reintroducing Frankincense in a sensual and intimate way. A stunning, richly evocative and unique creation that wears like a regal masterpiece.

name: Mula Mula Double Caramel
notes: Caramel, Peach, Ginger, Strawberry, Raspberry, Vanilla, Laos Oud, Patchouli And Amber
description: A world of endless sweetness; this fragrance will awaken your senses. Sensual depth; a sophisticated experience awaits.Limited Edition.

name: Apotheose
notes: Eucalyptus, Pepper, Ylang Ylang, Rose, Benzoin, Musk
style: Floral, Floral - Light, Powdery / Soft, Woody Ambery Floral
description: In 1900, at the peak of their fame, the creations of Maison Oriza L. Legrand were a sheer triumph, and Apoth脙漏ose is a glamorous return to those golden days- a full-bodied, gorgeously vintage-styled feminine with a vibrant aldehydic sparkle. Bright spice and a dash of aromatic green add a further energetic freshness, which balances perfectly with the elegantly powdery floral heart of lush rose and sweet ylang. A classically structured base of smooth, sensual musks and resins provides the perfect grace note, connecting the past and present with a touch of flair and yet again confirming that Oriza L. Legrand's commitment to capturing not just the style but the essence of Belle 脙聣poque haute perfumery. Lovers of grand aldehydic masterpieces like Chanel #5 and Arp脙篓ge- your next great love is here.

name: Arabesque
notes: Blackcurrant, Bergamot, Black Pepper, Saffron, Jasmine, Rose, Musk, Moss, Patchouli, Oudh
style: Exotic, Floral, Floral - Spicy, Fruity, Spicy, Woody - Dark
description: Arabesque takes you on an olfactory journey through the enchanting and mystical Middle East, based on flowers, fruits and woods entwined together and found in Islamic art. A heart of rose and jasmine absolute interplay beautifully and creates a sense of well-being and serenity, patchouli and Oudh transports you to another world.

name: Erba Gold
notes: Sicillian Orange And Lemon, Calabrian Bergamot, Mediterranean Fruits, White Musk, Amber, Madagascan Vanilla
description: Erba Gold芒聙聯 once the Selfridges exclusive芒聙聯 is the scent of Mediterranean fruits opening the gates for a flood of Madagascan vanilla beans and a final act of amber and musk. Sophisticated and full of layers, this creation plays true to the brand's philosophy of connecting scent to the breathtaking art of ballet and opera.Fruity yet enticingly warm at its base, the exquisite notes of Erba Gold are beautifully presented in the strikingvelvet flacon as part of the Xerjoff V collection

name: Vanilla Powder
style: Creamy, Floral, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: A voluptuous and luminous contrast between an overdose of dark vanilla beans and a white Palo Santo wood. The MATIERE PREMIERE Vanilla. The addictive character of Vanilla is reinforced by Coconut powder. White Musks envelop the Vanilla and powders for a contemporary, luminous perfume.

name: Carmina
notes: Black Cherry, Saffron, Pink Pepper, Rose De Mai, Violet, Cashmere Wood, Peony, Frankincense, Myrrh, Amber, Musk
style: Floral - Fruity, Floral - Spicy, Fruity, Powdery / Soft
description: Drawing inspiration from Henry Creed's fashion sketchbooks, Carmina is an electric new fragrance that captures the essence of a bold and passionate woman who always dresses to impress. With a powerful and romantic sillage of fruit-sweetened florals and woodsy musks that represent the voluminous grandeur of a bold silhouette, Carmina embodies an unapologetically opulent, inspiringly grand heroine unafraid of the spotlight and ready to take on any challenge.Carmina opens with juicy black cherry and fiery pink pepper, adding modernity to an elegant floral heart of violet and soft rose. Saffron contributes a golden, spicy warmth that layers over delicate musks and glowing amber, while cashmeran adds a luxurious woodsy sensuality. A fragrance of journey, discovery, and romance, Carmina is a reminder of adventures past and those yet to come.

name: Smoking Hot
notes: Hookah Flavour, Tobacco Absolute, Bourbon Vanilla Pure Jungle Essence
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Sweet
description: At night, there are no rules but one- be yourself. Luckily, Smoking Hot is a true delight, a smoky, caramelized lesson in seduction that evokes everything from European clubs to Eastern hookah lounges to create a beguiling fragrance almost too hot to handle.Smoking Hot opens with forbidden fruit: a round, sweet Aapple hookah flavor blends with warm cinnamon bark essence. In a slow burn, notes of fire-cured Kentucky tobacco absolute emerge. Harmonized with oakmoss, this resonant tobacco heart leads into a bourbon vanilla, with balsamic tonalities. Also known as a Pure Jungle Essence芒聞垄 bourbon vanilla, it is one of the highest quality natural vanillas available, especially intense, and textured. When crossed with Orcanox芒聞垄, a powerful sensuality comes full circle.

name: Tigre d'Eau
notes: Pink Pepper, Coconut Water, Pink Grapefruit, Green Accord, Tonka Bean, Salt, Caramel
style: Citrus, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy
description: Inspired by the symbol of the Tiger on the Chinese Zodiac, Tigre d'Eau is something truly unique- a mixture of power and freshness that's part fougere, part amber, but entirely unshackled from the conventions of genre. Following its traditional role as a symbol of wisdom and intuition, this is a tiger that knows when to retract its claws, as a bitingly fresh opening of coconut water, grapefruit zest, and pink pepper is matched by smooth green foliage and a silky, enveloping base of warm salted caramel and tonka bean. Vibrant and soothing all at once, Tigre d'Eau is another intriguingly creative, delightfully wearable marvel from the ever-surprising Pierre Guillaume.

name: Sin & Pleasure
notes: White Flowers, Ylang Ylang Extra, Caramel, Almond, Vanilla, Oud, Leather, Patchouli, Rum, White Musks, Oakmoss, Sandalwood
description: Seduction. Period. Stark contrast between the dark vs. gourmand. Rich and opulent leather & oud are drowned in an indulgent combination of caramel, almond, and vanilla, creating narcotic sweetness. The scent morphs more velvety and opulent, yet more addictive as it dries down. And one would find it alive, and unpredictable. Pleasure is a Sin. And sometimes, Sin is a pleasure.

name: Dirty Heaven
notes: Jasmine, Neroli, White Flowers, Tonka Bean, Saffron, Ambroxan, Vanilla, White Musks, Grey Amber, Modern Woods
description: Elegant white flower opening blends profoundly with intense dose of delicious Tonka beans. Animalic notes subtly surround and re-inforce the composition, making it mesmerizing, addictive, and heavenly. Avant-garde and existential. Ethereal and angelic. Your breath is taken away. The authentic scent of heaven and its wonders.

name: Sugar Addict
notes: Sugar, Cocoa Absolute, Tonka Beans, Vanilla Absolute, Cinnamon Essence, Rum Extract, Labdanum Absolute, Coffee Extract, Cashmere Wood
description: Did someone say sugar!? While perfect on its own as gourmand skin scent, this fragrance sweetener is an olfactory treat that will magically turn your favorite fragrance into a sweet addiction. An explosive blast of sugar reveals notes of cocoa, cinnamon, and vanilla. Elevated with rich rum extract and creamy cashmere wood accords, you will find yourself on a sugar-high. By the gourmand lover, for the gourmand lovers.

name: Cacao Noisette
notes: Cocoa Powder, Hazelnut, Caramel, Tahitian Vanilla, And Soft Snuggly Musk
style: Gourmand, Sweet, Warm
description: A scrumptious, milky-chocolate style cocoa that is well rounded with bittersweet hazlenut nuances, vanilla, and caramel. As you'd suspect, Kyse delivers a delicious, photorealistic chocolate (hot cocoa with marshmallows, anyone?) perfume of the utmost decandance.

name: Gateau de Carnaval
notes: Funnel Cake, Vanilla Latte, Toasted Brown Sugar, And Apricot
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: A gently-sweet butter-cream cake with delicate traces of apricot and vanilla. Another delicious, super comforting, must-have from the Kyse house!

name: Ouranon
notes: Petitgrain, Elemi, Lavender Flower, Hay, Chamomile, Frankincense, Myrrh, Tonka, Patchouli
style: Earthy, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Night stretches over a vast landscape. Beneath the dimly glittering canopy, there is a barely perceptible presence of large forms. As vision adjusts to the moonlight, the forms become clearer, and when a fire is lit, they are fully revealed in their scale and splendour. They are great stones, arranged in a circle芒聙聰an ancient remnant of a forgotten ceremony; an indicator of something obscured to the conscious mind, but known to the instincts. Around the flames, along the stones, and through the darkness, an aroma drifts; a woody, spicy, resinous scent, distinguished by Frankincense, Hay and Myrrh. The fire crackles. The stones loom. The sense of ceremony heightens.The sixth and final entry in the metaphysical travelogue of Aesop's Othertopias collection, Ouranon is a blend of woody, resinous, and spicy notes, replete with an earthy minerality that hums with gentle, ethereal majesty.

name: Myrrhe Mystere
notes: Myrrh Duo (myrrh Essence, Myrrh Resin), Sandalwood, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Amber
description: Myrrhe Myst脙篓re unlocks the senses through powerfully grounding myrrh essences and a modern Ultra-Vanille accord, capturing a richly luminous aura. This seductive expression of the mystical resin elevates one of perfumery's most iconic ingredients with a duo of powerful myrrh essences and an exquisite Ultra-Vanille accord, embodying a timeless richness and unlocking a modern serenity.

name: 7-Piece Discovery Set
description: Discover the beautiful world of Ella K with these 7 foundational scents from the brand's original launch. Featuring convenient 2ml atomizers of the following:Pluie Sur HalongLettre de PushkarGhibliHarmattanM脙漏moire de Daisen InCri du KalahariReflet Sur L芒聙聶Okavando

name: Melodie de l'Altai
notes: Amber, Saffron, Styrax, Leather, Patchouli, Vetiver
style: Animalic, Earthy, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: The Alta脙炉 Mountains, Kazakhstan: a remote corner of the country, squeezed between China and Mongolia, where the harsh conditions are only rivalled by the wild beauty of the landscape.Here, nature is in its primal state and the vast open spaces generate an intoxicating impression of freedom.In the distance an eagle swoops on its prey and in its wake a majestic Kazakh cavalcade.

name: Reflet Sur L'Okavango
notes: Amarula Liquor, Papyrus, Acacia Flower, Woolly Caper, Iris, Tonka Bean, Honey, Sycamore, Mopane
style: Floral, Sweet, Unusual / Unexpected, Woody - Amber
description: In Botswana, the Okavango is known as the 芒聙聹river which never gets to the sea芒聙聺. It seems from above as if there is a huge tree spread-eagled in the sand with its innumerable tentacular roots drawing a labyrinthine aquatic tableau which the waters re-design every day.On the banks of these countless streams, all sorts of fragrances rise up from the luxurious vegetation. Be it papyrus, acacia or sycamore, the abundant flora exhumes a constant source of inspiration on which the imagination feeds insatiably.

name: Memoire de Daisen In
notes: Tangerine, Kumquat, Bergamot, Lime, Peony, Rose, Tea, Plum, Hedione, Nutmeg, White Musk, Ambroxan, Iso-e Super, Violet, Benzoin, Vanilla
style: Citrus, Floral - Ambery Spice, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft
description: Kyoto, Japan. The exquisite rose bushes in full bloom lining the alley drench the air with their powerful fragrances.Discreetly hidden at the end lies the entrance to the Japanese garden, a visual and sensual surprise.The mineral map of rocks, gravel and wood appears as if tracing life芒聙聶s internal make-up. The spirit seems elsewhere, suspended between two worlds seeking celestial inspiration.

name: Poeme de Sagano
notes: Citrus, Matcha Tea, Mint, Eucalyptus, Bamboo
style: Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: To the north-west of Kyoto, a majestic bamboo forest links the Earth to the sky above. The green topping of the bamboo stalks takes the eyes seemingly to infinity, but no, you see it gently swaying in the delicate breeze, giving the chance for a few fleeting rays of sun to pierce the shade.Sagano invites the visitor to join the bamboo and luxuriate in the poetry surrounding it.

name: Pluie Sur Ha Long
notes: Pink Pepper, Nashi Pear, Rhubarb, Lotus, Water Lily, Magnolia, Rose, Cyclamen, Neroli, White Musk
style: Floral - Light, Fresh - Aquatic, Salty / Oceanic
description: Vietnam, Ha Long Bay. 芒聙聹Water, water everywhere, not a drop to drink芒聙聺. It芒聙聶s under the junks which slice through the surface of the sea, in the saturated air above and, in the distance, in the clouds announcing the arrival of the monsoons.The aromas of nature芒聙聶s all-enveloping shroud are present in this evocative composition, which includes water flowers, lotuses, cyclamen and a refreshing accord of clear water, with a vibrant hint of pink pepper and rhubarb at the top that crackle with the energy of an impending rainstorm. Smooth, rich magnolia and neroli bloom in the heart, while a soft musk in the background provides a suitably atmospheric and long-lasting base.

name: Ghibli
notes: Jasmine, Nougat, Leather
style: Animalic, Floral, Smoky, Sweet
description: According to the legend, amorous intentions placed on the wings of the Ghibli will arrive as surely as Cupid芒聙聶s arrow. I whispered tender words for it to carry across the Mediterranean and entrust them to you in a caressing sigh. I know that my messenger will be true because believing in a myth is sure to revive it and thus our love will be alive and well!The sweetness of nougat accompanied by the scent emanating from imperial jasmine rises into the air in a warm perfumed breeze. This subtle blend is based on a note of leather which, riding on the wings of the Ghibli, transports us into the heart of the myriad markets that flourish throughout the Maghreb.

name: Cri du Kalahari
notes: Green Pepper, Sandalwood, Cedarwood, Patchouli
style: Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: Despite being the largest sand desert in the world, the Kalahari boasts a truly luxurious flora thanks to the omiramba, the ancient river beds that still provide a source of precious water.As the sun goes down in the evening, ceding its place to a star-studded canopy, the Bushmen芒聙聶s legend says that one can hear the stars calling.This perfume is inspired by the monumental baobab, an ancestral symbol which carries all the history of Africa in its thousand year-old trunk.Its woody notes are almost palpable as one traces one芒聙聶s fingers across the ribbed texture of the bark. Thanks to the meticulous assemblage of sandalwood, cedar and a touch of patchouli with a dusting of green pepper, this fragrance is a bewitching invitation to sample the fascination of the arid sands of the Kalahari.

name: Lettre de Pushkar
notes: Rose, Saffron, Amber, Nutmeg, Vanilla, Cinnamon, Vetiver, Patchouli, Oud
style: Exotic, Floral - Ambery Spice, Woody - Spicy
description: Pushkar, Rajasthan: from dawn till dusk, this sacred site arouses the senses.Visual opulence and intoxicating aromas seem to underline the power of faith in those who seek to purify their soul at the lakeside.Nature is happy to play along with the legendary nature of the site: the roses only flourish on the lakeside so as to be able easily to offer their petals to the Lord Brahma, and the setting sun forms a vivid backdrop for the bewitching melodic strains from the faithful.

name: Camelia K
notes: Bergamot, Ginger, Dragonfruit, Camellia, Orange Blossom, Jasmine, Tonka Bean, Vanilla, Patchouli, Vetiver
style: Floral - Citrus, Floral - Fruity, Floral - White, Tropical / Beachy
description: A luminous summer morning in the Sapa valley where morning dew holds on fresh flowers, sun passes through the leaves, like a unique and magic moment to admire gorgeous nature. My eyes stopped on a wild red camellia with its blooming scarlet petals, I was dazzled芒聙娄 To highlight this floral wet bouquet, I combined it with the brightness of a fresh bergamot and clean fresh facets. The sweetness of vanilla and tonka brings a sensual effect to this floral fragrance.

name: Musc K
notes: Pink Pepper, Iris, Lily, Driftwood, Vetiver, White Musk, Cedar, Ambrofix
style: Fresh - Clean, Salty / Oceanic, Skin Scent / Minimal, Woody - Fresh
description: Musc K was born in the Maranh脙拢o landscape, where the pristine white sands of the wind-sculpted dunes contrast with the many crystal-clear shades of blue, from aquamarine and turquoise to the emerald green of the lagoons.Musc K opens the score with a salty breeze of sand lily that is bright and fresh. Following the rhythm of the winds, its arabesques of white pepper on sand harmonise with a heart of salty iris and mangrove driftwood. A crescendo of sand-grown vetiver and Ambrofix anchors the fragrance, subtly nuanced at the end of its journey by a floating cloud of white musk, like the immaculate sand of the wind-blown dunes.

name: Rougewood
notes: Grapefruit, Blackcurrant, Peach Flower Accord, Amber Woods, Caramel
style: Floral - Fruity, Sweet
description: The sweet scent of red fruits meets the warmth of amber woods in a vibrant trail, softened by pomelo, peach and musks. A fiery fragrance that evokes a passionate and extravagant shade of red.The perfumer was given carte blanche to formulate an authentic creation around berries. Fruity and ambery-sweet, Rougewood is an olfactory composition obtained using the finest traditional artisan processes and contained in a jewel-like bottle featuring Maison Rebatchi Paris' signature embossed glass design.

name: Levant
notes: Bergamot, Mandarin, Tangelo, Rose Petals, Lily Of The Valley, Peony, Orange Blossom, Jasmine, Cedarwood, Amber, Musk
style: Floral - Light, Floral - White
description: A bottle of happiness that has no intention of being anything other than ravishing and gorgeous. An innocent note of peony, adored by all flower lovers, a singing note of lily, a garland of orange-blossom and jasmine. Brilliant, appealing, flirtatious and full-on jubilation.

name: Pas Ce Soir Extrait
notes: Black Pepper, Ginger, Cocoa Extract, Pear, Tangerine, Jasmine Absolute From Morocco, Quince Chutney, Orange Blossom, Patchouli From Indonesia, Benzoin, Cashmeran, Vanilla
description: Like its original signature, Pas ce Soir Extrait evokes the Parisian mystery and sensuality. Concentrated at 30%, this more faceted creation is addictive and gourmand. Cocoa blends with the spicy freshness of black pepper and ginger. The voluptuous notes of peach complement the fruity sweetness of quince chutney and orange blossom. At the base, the essence of patchouli and vanilla bring power and depth. An intoxicating trail of floral and fruity accents.

name: Oud Al Sultan
notes: Bergamot, Red Mandarin, Green Mandarin, Jasmine, Rose, Saffron, Oud Oil (Thailand), Vanilla, Guaiacwood, Cedarwood
style: Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Oud al Sultan by Bortnikoff is an intoxicating whirl of scents that engulfs you from the first seconds with a cascade of flowers and tropical citrus. The enchanting accord of bergamot, red, and green mandarin immediately captivates your senses, promising an exotic journey into the heart of the fragrance.Following the burst of citrus freshness, jasmine and rose step onto the stage, contributing a wealth of floral notes to the composition. This symphonic duet of luxurious scents forms the heart of the perfume, fully unveiling the multifaceted depth of these classic flowers. The final chord opens up a world of woody aromas where Thai Oud oil takes center stage. The unique smoky depth of Oud is complemented by sweet vanilla, earthy guaiacwood, and cedarwood, creating a warm, cozy base that lingers on the skin for hours after other notes have subsided.Oud al Sultan is a unique perfume masterpiece that boldly combines classic and exotic elements, creating a fragrance that is simultaneously daring, luxurious, and irresistibly appealing.

name: Burmite Honey
notes: Beeswax Absolute, Amber Fossil, Ambrarome, Champaca, Orange Flower Absolute, Jasmine Absolute, Tangerine, Incense, Thai Oud, Sandalwood Australia, Cumin Seed, Black Pepper, Cinnamon, Nutmeg, Coriander, Myrrh, Tonka Bean, Amyris
style: Earthy
description: Bees fossil found in early Cretaceous Burmese Amber or also known as Burmite Amber is amber from Hukawng Valley in Northern Myanmar and dated around 99 million years old.The precious amber fossil is a resin formed from fossilized conifer tree sap during years of heat and constant pressure. From the idea above, Burmite Honey is the combination of Himalayan Fossilized amber oil and Bees wax absolute as the main attraction芒聙聯 evoking the Jurassic era芒聙聯 reminiscence of ancient woods, rich mystique flowers, luminous incense and a touch of animalic effects. Burmite Honey is prehistoric golden nectar harvesting from 99 million years old bees.

name: Mandodari Mandodari
notes: Civet, Champaca, Sal Tree, Jasmine Absolute, Orange Flower Absolute, Cumin Seed, Black Pepper, Tuberose Absolute, Ambergris, Gardenia, Opium, Ash, Tobacco, Sandalwood, Teak Wood, Oak Moss, Aldehyde, Camphor, Rose Absolute, Clove Bud, Labdanum, Patchouli
description: This is the double concentration of original Mandodari (48% concentration) with smokiness from Sal tree absolute or Choya Raal and extra dimension from natural ambergris and civet paste.

name: Zakhrafa
notes: Scarlet Cherry, White Flower, Lily Of The Valley, Jasmine, Hazelnut Chocolate, Colombian Coffee
description: Zakhrafa is a perfume with an absolutely original marked character in which a Colombian coffee and a ripe cherry as base notes walk together in complete harmony accompanied by other beautiful essences.Imagine a perfume bringing together floral, gourmet and fruity essences arranged in harmony like an ornament that covers the walls of a palace, it is not without reason that this perfume is called Zakhrafa芒聙聯 which means "Ornament" in Arabic芒聙聯 because it is an olfactory adornment for whoever wears it or smells it.Zakhrafa is a fragrance that appeals from the first seconds, it begins with a strong and marked presence of cherry immediately accompanied by the aroma of Colombian coffee, in the middle notes you will discover floral notes that arise in a direct way, finally Gourmet notes of chocolate brownies come together like an olfactory puzzle that will not leave you indifferent.Zakhrafa is a perfume that will appeal to lovers of original perfumes, who are looking for a scent that is out of the ordinary, a perfume that marvelously combines floral, fruity and gourmet scents.

name: La Rhapsodie Noire
style: Fougere, Woody - Amber
description: In the opening, energetic notes of Coffee and Rum, along with Cigar nuances evoke the atmosphere of the 1920s Parisian caf脙漏s. At the heart, Clary Sage and French Lavender provide foug脙篓re-like aromatic freshness, seamlessly leading to a suave floral blend (Mimosa, Broom, Jasmine Sambac). In the base, earthy ingredients (Patchouli, Oakmoss, Oakwood, Vetiver) support the composition, while the gourmand vibe is reinforced by Sandalwood, Tonka Bean, and Madagascar Vanilla.芒聙聹One evening, I was crossing the Pont-Neuf; as I was listening to Rhapsody in Blue, I paused to take a look around me: even more so at night, Paris seems to have kept its fabled charm unaltered by time. My imagination was fuelled by images and sensations of the City of Light in the 1920s, a time of extraordinary energy and creativity. I decided to create a nocturnal, vibrant fragrance dedicated to Paris of 芒聙聹Les Ann脙漏es Folles芒聙聺; as a nod to the music and the night that inspired me, I named it LA RHAPSODIE NOIRE.芒聙聺芒聙聯 Pissara Umavijani

name: Initiation Coffret
description: Dive into the world of Initio Parfums Priv脙漏s through its collections and explore the power of their 6 most emblematic essences, all in generous 10ml travel-suitable atomizer sprays:Oud For Greatness 芒聙聯 Black Gold Project CollectionMusk Therapy 芒聙聯 Hedonist CollectionRehab 芒聙聯 Hedonist CollectionSide Effect 芒聙聯 The Carnal Blends CollectionAtomic Rose 芒聙聯 The Carnal Blends CollectionBlessed Baraka 芒聙聯 The Absolutes Collection

name: Damier
notes: Black Pepper, Pink Pepper, Aldehydes, Milky Accord, Jasmine, Cashmeran, Patchouli, Cedar, Sandalwood, White Musk
style: Creamy, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Moving, dancing, playing, pursuing on the giant checkerboard at Les Bains Paris. A mythical place. A trail of perfume. Dance floors, playgrounds. A treasure hunt.Kinetic impressions. Small tiles, large squares, black and white diagonals. Sharp, dark, and spicy head notes of black pepper contrast with a generous white base of musky, milky sandalwood.

name: Wild Summer Crush
notes: Pink Grapefruit, Red Mandarin (Italy), Green Tea Blend, Fruit Peels, Uhuru Rose Otto (Africa), Neroli (Morocco), Yuzu (Japan), Coconut, Silky Woods, Tobacco
style: Floral - Fruity, Tropical / Beachy
description: "Remembering my summer crush芒聙娄 Oh, that memory of a hot, sultry, summer night in the fruit orchards of southern Italy. We escaped the crowded party and found refuge amongst the citrus trees and rose bushes that grew in luxurious abundance. All of them were at their peak and exuded intoxicating fragrance into that glorious night. It was an unforgettable encounter; a connection that remains with me." - April Aromatics perfumer and founder, Tanja BochnigA blast of grapefruit gets you out of a dark mood. It is an uplifting, full of light, fresh and powerful fruit bomb with a touch of silky woods. Tobacco, barely noticeable in the dry down is combined with a special rose from Uhuru land. This fragrance is succulent, opulent, and seductive, with a hint of enchanting coconut. Summer at its peak reminds the darker season will come, and this kissed by the sun, natural perfume creation is what our minds and spirits long for. This scent can bring relief from extreme heat or will transport one into the heat of a singular, spectacular, summer night, while remembering the feeling of being in love芒聙娄 your summer crush.

name: Fall into Stars Oil
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Fall Into Stars is a meditation on the universe itself: dark, mysterious, yet leaving a trail of powerful illuminations. The scent contains a core of pure oud, which gives fallintostars a deep, primal quality, emphasized with amber and labdanum notes. It's complemented by ingredients like pink peppercorn and rosewood, which make the scent dreamlike and ethereal.The stardust and pollen effect come from natural and wild French daffodil; a golden amber effect comes from a Fairwild certified Peru Balsam and a Siam Benzoin resin, which cast light from the back of the scent; and an illuminating solar effect comes from fresh ginger, bergamot and saffron. That ensemble is nested in a combination of ouds, For Life-certified roses, and henna flower.

name: Bon Viveur
notes: Lime, Lemon, Orange, Mandarin, Bay, Basil, Lemongrass, British Gin, Clove, Pepper, Watermelon, Cedar, Patchouli, Oakmoss, Haitian Vetiver
description: Bon Viveur is a fragrance which celebrates the enjoyment of the finer things in life. This citrus / chypre scent exudes a joie de vivre which will invigorate and inspire the wearer in equal measure. Vibrant citrus accords are blended with herbs and spices for an uplifting and energising opening effect. At the heart of the composition a twist of British gin symbolises our home country and the playful and exuberant theme of this release. Luxurious base notes including real Haitian vetiver and crisp cedar wood maintain the air of refinement and sophistication which will be present in all our creations. This is a fresh fragrance suitable for all occasions and all seasons. It will make the perfect partner to Gravitas Pour Homme in your collection.

name: The Lover's Tale
notes: Bergamot, Honey, Mimosa, Egyptian Jasmin, Bulgarian Rose, Peach, Iris Butter, Heliotrope, Leather, Castoreum, Labdanum, Sandalwood, Vetiver, Oakmoss.
description: A secret encounter of lovers, bound tight by an impossible passion, a dominant leather animated by a narcotic jasmine. This elegant combination is the heart of this seductive potion that illustrates the obsessive and addictive nature of their liaison. His is a story of by-gone times, of lovers芒聙聶 secret encounter. The fragrance represents the buzz of being caught between sense and sensibility, between virtue and passion. The opening renders the shy but sparkling mood of the very moment they meet, with bergamot, honey and aldehydes adding a hopefulness to the occasion. The delicate scent of peach trees in bloom evoking the nights of early spring. Attraction and romance traps the lovers in blissful suspense just as the narcotic jasmine playfully elicits a powdery rose in a similar game of tension. Ultimately passion takes over, with a sophisticated leather developing over an intense ambery accord that leaves you blushed in sweet surrender.

name: Anti-Blues
notes: Dark Chocolate, Saffron, Grapefruit, Incense, Resin, Amyris, Cacao Wood, Hay, Tobacco, Vetiver, Leather, Vanilla
description: "In the paintings of Jacques Monory, blue forgives everything. It makes the crime aesthetic, the threat fascination. Bathed in shades of highly desirable blue, urban and contemporary violence paradoxically becomes hypnotic."Anti-Blues, the first in Pierre Guillaume's newConfidentielseries, is a dark gourmand that, like the paintings of Monory, bathes warm mineral and woody gourmand notes in a cool blue wash of frankincense, combining the dangerous and the delicious. The frankincense is stark and cold, mixed with an almost alien vetiver, disguising the imposing woody bitterness coming from cacao, saffron, and amyris. Touches of hay and dark chocolate coax out the animal nuances of vanilla, already dirtied with leather and tobacco. It's a fragrance of olfactory illusion, enticing edible notes and seductive woods painting a distinctly tinted portrait of delectable darkness.

name: Trimerous
notes: Carrot Seed, Bergamot, Nectarine, Thyme, Cicely, Pink Pepper, Juniper, Cloudberry, Angelica Root, Orris Butter, Kombucha, Centaury, Suede, Oud, Musk, Ambergris, Styrax, Vanilla, Incense
description: Trimerous is a funny little thing. A triptych of veils shading the finest facets of prized orris root.Quivering around the most exquisite Florentine Orris Butter, Trimerous presents undulating olfactory movements, displaying singular facets of the revered root in a landscape of dewy, verglas and silvered woods. Trimerous does not explore every kaleidoscopic nuance of the noble root, instead honoring but three slivers often overlooked. Trimerous highlights the forgotten, muted and the discarded; effervescent, buttery and exalting. Trimerous is as much an attempt to capture a mood and a process as it is to showcase the aromatic splendor of the iris, an inherently faultless raw material. This is a ballad to the devoted hand, soiled, aged yet resiliently tending to rhizome.

name: Bee
notes: Orange, Ginger Syrup, Royal Jelly Accord, Broom, Heliotrope, Mimosa, Orange Flower, Benzoin, Labdanum, Musks, Sandalwood, Tonka, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Exotic, Floral - White, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: We don芒聙聶t usually play favorites. We love all of our perfumes, and their creators, equally. Trust us, we really do. But when a perfume comes along that芒聙聶s such a unanimous hit with Luckyscent staff, then we feel obliged to mention it. Bee is just irresistible! Opening with a luscious, jellied orange and a smattering of meadow flowers, the honey accord is both extremely realistic and un-animalic 芒聙聯 a rare feat that makes Bee a real contender for the title of the baby bear芒聙聶s porridge of the honey fragrance genre.Set deep in a bombastic surround system of glittering amber and incense, the quietly golden floral honey center is magnified and broadcast until it fills the room, creating an incredible sillage that trails after you like the waves made by the Titanic. Though enormously rich and deep, the honey draws upon a doughy beeswax note to muffle its sweetness, and a softly musky, woody base of sandalwood and benzoin to keep it from sliding off into honey芒聙聶s more animalic facets. Honey is such a difficult note to do well 芒聙聯 and, in our opinion, Bee is an unmitigated triumph. If you love, the honeyed, ambery warmth of scents such as Botrytis (but could do without the booze and grape must), then this gorgeous scent by Zoologist could be the Bee in your bonnet (sorry).

name: Elae
notes: Moroccan Neroli, Apple, Ylang-ylang, Egyptian Jasmine, Loatian Benzoin, Australian Sandalwood
style: Floral, Floral - White, Powdery / Soft
description: Elae wears its femininity like a luminous offering: it unfolds like a bouquet of white petals with woody notes, filled with warmth and tenderness. Of proud descent, Elae is embedded, through her Latin name, with the protective aura of Diana, goddess of the hunt. A clear evocation of faraway lands that need to be conquered, Elae is fragrant with flowers yet bears a narcotic sensuality. Elae unfolds like a transparent floral perfume with light notes that float.

name: Chinese Tobacco
notes: Bergamot, Tobacco, Red Pepper, Lemon, Ginger, Coriander, Incense, Cedarwood, Vanilla, Tar, Oud, Vetiver
style: Earthy, Woody - Light, Woody - Spicy
description: 芒聙聹There are elements of different legendary movies like Indochine in the fragrance Chinese Tobacco. A reflection of East meets West taking place in the 30芒聙聶s to 50芒聙聶s colonial French Indochina. I芒聙聶m often captured by these strong contrasts and different ambiances when travelling in Asia. The old and the new. A major influence for the scent was the powerful scene in the movie 芒聙聺Apocalypse Now芒聙聺 featuring Aurore Clement and Martin Sheen smoking opium.芒聙聺 -Johan BergelinExotic, hypnotic, and more than a little dangerous, Chinese Tobacco is not your typically buttoned-up European tobacco scent. Fiery red pepper and coriander ignite the senses, while incense and oud add unexpected subtlety and a gently narcotic haze. Spicy and woodsy, primal and modern, Chinese Tobacco is a gripping study of East meets West.

name: Capri
notes: Mandora, Bitter Orange, Sweet Orange, Chamomile, Cardamom, Pink Pepper, Sichuan Pepper, Juniper Berries, Mandarine Oil, Mandarine Leaves Oil, Grapefruit, Galbanum, Jasmine, Osmanthus, Ylang Ylang, Orris, Ambroxan, Angelica Seeds, White Musk
style: Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus
description: "I have always been captivated by legendary, trendsetting films. The movie Le M脙漏pris from 1963 featuring Brigitte Bardot and Jack Palance is both iconic and stylish. The fragrance of Capri reflects the ambience of the movie. There are elements of wild citrus trees, orange blossoms, green olive groves, blue skies and the endless ocean that encircles the island." -Johan BergelinInspired by the settings of Villa Malaparte and the iconic Godard film Le M脙漏pris, Capri is an eye-poppingly colorful journey. From the very first spray, Capri explodes with enchantingly bright aromas of blossoming orange trees, mandarin leaves and elements of the blue skies and endless ocean that encircle the island. Edgy but fresh, light but comforting, it's a stunning tribute to the rugged yet luxurious paradise on the Tyrrhenian Sea.

name: 1900 L'Heure de Proust
notes: Bergamot, Blueberry, Grapefruit, Violet, Black Tea, Tuscan Leather, Mate, Gaiac, Praline, Vanilla, Amber
style: Fruity, Smoky, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: 1900, the height of La Belle Epoque. Legendary author Marcel Proust and a cherished confidante retire to thebains sulfureuxfor a day of elaborate pampering- steam, massage, and a grand tea service to while away the private hours. The delicacies enjoyed in these intimate moments make up the magical scent of 1900 L'Heure de Proust. Our service begins with the exquisite fruits used to flavour the tea, tart, bright grapefruit and lusciously juicy blueberry, set against the smoky richness of pure black tea and the refined leather upholstering the private couch to where our subjects have retired. The unisex freshness of violet perfumes the wood-panelled room, while a tray of mouthwatering desserts- sweet pralines and creamy vanilla cake- beckon our indulgence. The scent is gorgeous, delightful, masculine and feminine intertwined- far from scandalous, but equally far from innocent. Indeed, when naming a scent for Proust, the bar is raised- and we're delighted to say that 1900 L'Heure de Proust is evocative enough to inspire a masterpiece of your own.

name: Adameku
notes: Sweet Orange, Osmanthus Absolute, Jasmine Sambac, Benzoin, Frankincense
description: Adameku describes sensual femininity. Using the scent of Osmanthus and Rose, it is fruity, and finished with a sweet floral scent. A perfume that expresses the delicacy and elegance of Japanese women.

name: Venom of Angel
notes: Coconut, Olibanum, Black Pepper, Aloe Vera, Sugar Cane, Rum, Ivy, Cedar, White Chocolate
description: Easy to love, impossible to forget, Venom of Angel is a mouthwatering and unique coconut gourmand with a surprisingly original depth. Inspired by the feeling of first entering a world-class nightclub, Venom of Angel captures the rush of light, sound, and adrenaline from the first sniff, as energetic green aloe vera and crackling black pepper burst forth, leading into a richly intoxicating cocktail of sweet, boozy rum and a wildly sexy coconut-cedar accord, creamy, spicy, and powerful. Whispers of smokey sacramental incense add mystery and deepen the allure, while a decadent white chocolate note adds an undeniable aphrodisiac quality. Part innocence, part decadence, Venom of Angel is among the most seductive scents we've smelled in quite some time.

name: Vanilla Cake
notes: Almond Powder, Butter Cream, Milky Mousse, Caramel, Yogurt Cake, Meringue, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Could there ever be an aroma more blissful than removing a freshly-baked cake from the oven? The feeling of accomplishment for a job well done, the mouthwatering, sweet, warm smell that fills the room, the anticipation of that perfect first bite- it's heaven on earth. With Vanilla Cake, Montale invites you to enjoy that wondrous feeling every single day. This gourmand and bewitching fragrance recipe calls for blending milk, grilled almonds, warm caramel and vanilla for the ultimate meringue silllage. Creamy, sweet, toasty and rich, this is a perfect gourmand scent, the kind to leave a trail of admirers salivating. Utterly delicious.

name: Silence the Sea
notes: Ambergris, Oud, Tuber, Jasmine, Tuberose, Angelica
style: Earthy, Floral - White, Green / Herbaceous, Salty / Oceanic
description: Silence the Sea is the true essence of the sea. Forget the horrors of Calone and sweet aquatics 芒聙聯 this scent captures all the stony, mineral silence of a deserted beach in winter. Because it is a brand deeply invested in organic, sustainable raw material production, Strangelove NYC was able to source an ethically-harvested (beach cast) piece of ambergris and use it as the star in this composition.And indeed, it is the strange, salty-sweet airiness of ambergris that dominates here. It floats at the center, emanating an aura of fresh marine air, earth, dried newspapers, tobacco, and even the warm funk of a freshly-cleaned horse stable. Ambergris is, in short, the salty, yeasty smell of a child芒聙聶s head after hours of playing on a cold beach. Cleverly, the perfumer has chosen to not overshadow the ambergris but simply flank its already-complex smell with a host of complimentary 芒聙聹flavors芒聙聺, such as the minty bitterness of angelica, the earthy funk of truffle, and the vegetal, rubbery texture of tuberose. These notes play a valiant second fiddle to the ambergris, emphasizing its flinty, mineral sweetness and extending its unearthly radiance in all directions. Those who love the mysterious, almost indefinable smell of the salt air on a cold beach will adore Silence the Sea.

name: Blue Cypress
notes: Blue Cypress Australia, Lavender Bulgaria, Patchouli Indonesia, Clove Indonesia, Star Anise India
style: Fresh - Clean, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: A sophisticated fragrance of rich woods and exotic spices that is at once invigorating and grounding, Blue Cypress is a journey through a sun-speckled Northern Australian forest as the morning dew evaporates from the soft new leaves of the towering cypress and gum trees.Cobalt-colored Australian Blue Cypress extract provides a fragrantly woody base, lifted by a fusion of lively lavender and exotic patchouli, with fiery notes of clove and star anise lending energy and edge. This fusion of notes is exciting and fresh, but also substantial, with impressive depth and character- simply put, Blue Cypress is an unforgettable adventure.

name: Revolution
notes: Elemi, Angelica, Cedar, Papyrus, Patchouli, Cade, Incense, Cistus, Opoponax
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Spicy
description: Inspired by the chaos in the streets of Paris during the French Revolution, Revolution is a fragrance full of the smells of danger 芒聙聯 the peppery smoke of gunpowder mingling with raging fire, leather riding boots, and spilled musket oil. Such accords have the potential to come off as harsh or extreme, but in the experienced hands of British perfumer Lyn Harris, they convey the excitement of battle with a buttery smoothness that makes the scent a breeze to wear.So we have rugged, ashy leather and the sooty smoke from burned-out houses, but with a creamy elemi underpinning that immediately softens the punch. Cade oil muscles its way past the buttery leather, filling the nostrils with its intensely green-black, smoky smell. Adding to the powerful impression of chaos created by the opening, a peppery papyrus combines with dusty cedar to create a searing flash of gunpowder from a newly-spent musket. Together, these notes conjure up the image of a young soldier, taking temporary shelter in a burned-out house on the Champs-脙聣lys脙漏es, the searing smell of soot, ash, singed leather boots, and gunpowder softened by the creamy smell of ancient cedar bookcases, sheaves of paper, and the whiff of incense from a nearby church. And it芒聙聶s this juxtaposition between burned and creamy elements that gives the scent its power to soothe and excite at the same time.  Revolution is the smell of the vestiges of civilization meeting the approaching fires of the crusaders.

name: Cedar Woodpecker
notes: Cedar, Citrus, Iris
style: Woody - Fresh
description: The amusingly-named Cedar Woodpecker is a spicy, citrusy cedar fragrance with impeccable taste and noble lineage. At once robust and refined, the rich Virginian cedarwood forms the glowing brown heart of the fragrance, displaying a stoutness of character you just know you can rely on. On top, a turbo-charged cedrat fizzes and snaps like a cable wire loose in a storm 芒聙聯 this note is exciting and has movement, charging the sturdy cedar underneath with electricity. The contrast between the sourness of that green citrus and the warmth of the cedar is both exhilarating and comfortable. It just works.A dove-grey iris in the base is a fluffy pillow on which the cedar finally rests his grizzled, noble old head. The faint hint of powdery florals doesn芒聙聶t detract from the muscular, essentially woody, masculine character of the scent, but rather add a velvety softness that soothes and calms. The iris also introduces the faint echo of Guerlainade: lovers of the classic Habit Rouge might want to check out its more modern, stripped-down, and rugged younger brother. In an age when men are short-changed on good masculines, Cedar Woodpecker comes as a welcome surprise.

name: Iris Cendre
notes: Bergamot, Tangerine, Orris Butter, Violet, Amber, Cistus, Tobacco
style: Creamy, Exotic, Floral - Ambery Spice
description: Enigmatic, elegant and enchanting, the iris is one of perfumery's most treasured ingredients- and also one of its most challenging. So when we heard that Naomi Goodsir's first-ever floral was to be named Iris Cendr脙漏 (or "Iris Ash"), our hearts began to flutter with anticipation of an Iris fragrance that might transcend convention and offer a bold new portrait of this beloved material. And even beyond our wildest dreams, Goodsir and perfumer Julien Rasquinet have delivered a bona fide masterpiece- a lush, warm, buttery interpretation of iris with a gorgeously restrained hint of smokiness that feels both wonderfully creative, and quintessentially Naomi Goodsir.Before even the first spray, Iris Cendr脙漏 affirms its rarity with a striking green color that results from its uniquely high concentration of true iris concrete, a property that gives the fragrance its striking depth and nuance. While the opening presents a crisp, delicately fruity burst of bergamot and spiced tangerine, the rich heart of buttery iris soon takes over, displaying a gorgeously evocative facet of the flower with warmer, more sultry tones than we've ever before found in an iris scent. A light veil of violet reinforces the floral depth, while a sensually smoky accord of cistus, tobacco and amber evokes the distinctly complex drydown of another Naomi Goodsir classic, Bois D'Ascese. The overall effect is both subtle and striking, a wholly unisex floral that seems to contain multitudes without ever raising its voice, feeling vivid and deep but also masterfully restrained. With Iris Cendr脙漏, Naomi Goodsir and Julien Rasquinet have redefined what we thought an iris scent could be and in doing so, created a new reference.

name: Italian Citrus
notes: And Oakmoss, Blood Orange, Chinotto, Cold Pressed Lemon, Copaiba Balsam, Green Mandarin, Incense, Musk Ambrette, Violet Leaf
style: Classic Masculine, Fresh - Citrus
description: Any D.S. & Durga take on citrus notes will intrigue the senses and warm the blood. This is balmy sprawled afternoons under parasols, tugged gently by summer winds, books and neglected papers scattered softly in the temperate shade. The scent of citrus trees drifts by like a reminder of seasons lived and loved. There is so much depth to Italian Citrus, a balsamic, rounded fervor rare in this family of effervescent fleeting aromas. Designed traditionally to refresh and whet our olfactory edge, citrus scents use sparkle, zing and sherbet to widen our senses and awaken the torpid soul. This oddly powdered scent with its hints of sticky Campari and candied peel fuses traditional zest and peel with smoke and sweet animalics for an incredibly sophisticated patina of cocktail poise. Hours into the drydown Italian Citrus is an exercise in clean, tender classicism.

name: Burning Barbershop
notes: And Hay., Burnt Oil, Hemlock Spruce, Lavender Absolute, Lime, Spearmint, Turkish Rose, Vanilla
style: Classic Masculine, Fougere, Powdery / Soft, Smoky, Sweet
description: In 1891, Westlake NY, a bottle of blackened cologne survived a conflagration that burned the Curling Bros. barbershop to the ground. Charred, reduced and dark, this scorched blend of vintage gentlemanly notes has been vividly re-created by David Moltz in all its pungent, roasted glory. The resonance and reach of Burning Barbershop is quite magnificent; a sweet rubbed spearmint note mixed with offbeat salted lime creates wonderful fumes of nostalgia. Everything smells baked and piquant. Lavender is a beautiful rich addition, smoky, hot and sugared, crumbled across the embers of the cologne's base notes. It is scent for flesh, not for paper and abstract wanderings. You might miss the most amazing soft-shoed vanilla as it dances softy in the smoke, tempering the excesses of bitter citrus and metallic pyrotechnics. A black, rubber whiff of night pervades the drydown, as if the skin is releasing soot into a starless sky. A scent of darkened wonderment.

name: You Or Someone Like You
style: Floral - Light, Fresh - Clean, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: If Etat Libre d'Orange had set out specifically to make a fragrance that would delight us here at Luckyscent, they still probably couldn't top You Or Someone Like You. Dedicated to our hometown of Los Angeles? Check. Creative directed by our good friend and collaborator Chandler Burr and named after his L.A.-based novel? Check. And most importantly, the kind of fresh, crisply cool niche scent that's oh so wonderfully easy to wear in any situation, yet distinct and head-turning? In a city where deals are made poolside and boardroom meetings might feature more denim than Italian wool, that's a big, important check. While they're keeping the official notes a secret, we're buzzing off You Or Someone Like You's sharp, fruity opening and ultra-fresh mint and floral body--it really does evoke one of our favorite L.A. experiences- sipping a drink on the wraparound balcony of a party palace in the hills, taking in our big, weird, wonderful city.Come to think of it, did ELDO and Chandler make this scent just for us?

name: Oud Orange Intense
notes: Coconut, Fruits, Bourbon Vanilla, Oud, Musk
style: Boozy, Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet, Unusual / Unexpected
description: A beautiful rendering of a dark chocolate Mounds bar in perfume form. The opening notes of Oud Orange Intense are smoky and nutty, bringing to mind a pile of coconut husks smoldering in the ashes of a fire. Creamy musks and bourbon vanilla bring a cocoa-tinted softness to the mix, restraining the beachy exuberance of the coconut, and also its sweetness. What emerges is a dry, woody vanilla with a luxuriously boozy touch, like a log of driftwood rubbed lightly with coconut liquor.The oud note here is less of a headlining note than a calming influence on the other notes. Its austere woodiness turns what could have been a full-on, coconutty tropical extravaganza into an adult woody vanilla. Oud Orange Intense is both a surprise and a triumph.

name: FRANK No. 1
notes: Lime, Bergamot, Tomato Leaf, Berries, Juniper, Cardamom, Pink Pepper, Clove; Violet, Iris, Geranium, Lavender, Clary Sage, Mate; Licorice, Labdanum, Atlas Cedar Wood, Costus, Moss, Leather Accord
style: Fougere, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Spicy
description: Every man needs a good foug脙篓re in their fragrance collection, but not every foug脙篓re is quite like FRANK No.1. Built on crisp citrus, fresh spices and herbaceous, mossy green notes, No.1 veers away from tradition by supplementing that classic masculine structure with the strength of another iconic gentleman's genre: dry tobacco and deep, ambery leather, which transform the bright, refreshing opening into a drydown loaded with complex, seductive warmth. Provocative and modern.

name: Kai - Perfume Oil
notes: Notes Of Gardenia And White Exotic Florals
style: Floral
description: Devastatingly feminine, dangerously flirtatious - this blend of white flowers should be a controlled substance. If you love gardenia, you need to own this - it is so incredibly fresh  and true that it smells like you just pinned a newly cut gardenia in your hair. Lush, but clean. It is an oil, so remember: a little bit goes a long way. The tiniest dab should have people leaning in when they speak to you.

name: Kai - Eau de Parfum
notes: Notes Of Gardenia And White Exotic Florals
style: Floral - White
description: Devastatingly feminine, dangerously flirtatious - this blend of white flowers should be a controlled substance. If you love gardenia, you need to own this - it is so incredibly fresh  and true that it smells like you just pinned a newly cut gardenia in your hair. Lush, but clean. A spritz of Kai perfume will have people leaning in when they speak to you!

name: Kai Rose - Perfume Oil
notes: Gardenia, White Flowers, Rose Absolute
style: Floral
description: Kai is a true phenomenon unlike any other, known for the lush yet clean scent of gardenia, effortlessly captivating. This newly developed scent is Kai's fresh take on the classic rose, and as one would expect, blooms gorgeously on skin.Kai Rose is no old-fashioned tea rose, nor is it brooding - instead, imagine the platonic ideal of a fresh, romantic rose, vibrant and deep pink. Now wrap it in Kai's signature luscious, exotic white flowers - what was at once familiar and lovely feels like a new encounter all over again. Precious rose absolute and all-natural essences embody the philosophy of kai: breath, life, flow. This soft, subtle fragrance can be worn on its own, or complemented by the original Kai for added effect.Kai Rose Perfume Oil is packaged in an easy to use, roll-on vial to be conveniently carried and stored for a quick and simple application.

name: Kai Rose - Eau de Parfum
notes: Gardenia, White Flowers, Rose Absolute
style: Floral
description: Kai is a true phenomenon unlike any other, known for the lush yet clean scent of gardenia, effortlessly captivating. This newly developed scent is Kai's fresh take on the classic rose, and as one would expect, blooms gorgeously on skin.Kai Rose is no old-fashioned tea rose, nor is it brooding - instead, imagine the platonic ideal of a fresh, romantic rose, vibrant and deep pink. Now wrap it in Kai's signature luscious, exotic white flowers, and what was at once familiar and lovely feels like a new encounter all over again. Precious rose absolute and all-natural essences embody the philosophy of kai: breath, life, flow. This soft, subtle fragrance can be worn on its own, or complemented by the original Kai for added effect.

name: Perfect Veil
notes:
Top: Lemon, Bergamot
base: Musk, Vanilla, Sandalwood
style: Creamy, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: This was created to smell like clean, naked skin, but honestly, we have yet to meet anyone whose skin smelled this good all on its own. Maybe the skin of an angel? Maybe the skin of a fallen angel, looking for a little trouble? Warm, soft, subtle and extremely sexy, this very wearable fragrance is wonderful on its own and perfect for layering under other scents, as well, to make them warmer and more enduring. A staple on many Hollywood vanities.

name: Perfect Vanilla
notes: Blood Orange, Tobacco, Vanilla (four Kinds!)
description: We love vanilla. And not just because men go bonkers over it, although we are well aware of that fact. We love it for its own warm and comforting qualities, in addition to its devastating effect on the opposite sex. This vanilla is for grown-ups, not for little girls.  Smooth, a bit smoky and not the least bit cookie-like. Luscious and unusual and (of course) seductive.

name: Perfect Nectar
notes: Green Teas, Papaya, Tangerine, White Flowers, Ylang Ylang
style: Fruity
description: Luscious and exotic, this succulent fragrance features top notes of tangerine and blood orange, followed by middle notes of papaya, mango, ylang ylang and green tea. Perfect Nectar's base accord is a bed of soft, white flowers. A very tropical, yet delicious fragrance that is perfect for spring or summer!

name: Perfect Coconut Milk
notes: Coconut, Almond, Orange Blossom, Gardenia, Tonka Bean, Vanilla, Egyptian Musk.
style: Creamy, Tropical / Beachy
description: One whiff instantly transports you to your own personal paradise. Top notes of coconut accented by almond, a sheer floral middle note of orange blossom and gardenia, and a luscious base note accord of tonka bean, vanilla and Egyptian musk. Heaven!

name: Perfect Veil Roll-on
notes:
Top: Lemon, Bergamot
base: Musk, Vanilla, Sandalwood
style: Creamy, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: This was created to smell like clean, naked skin, but honestly, we have yet to meet anyone whose skin smelled this good all on its own. Maybe the skin of an angel? Maybe the skin of a fallen angel, looking for a little trouble? Warm, soft, subtle and extremely sexy, this very wearable fragrance is wonderful on its own and perfect for layering under other scents, as well, to make them warmer and more enduring. A staple on many Hollywood vanities.

name: Perfect Vanilla Roll-on
notes: Vanilla (four Kinds!), Blood Orange, Tobacco
description: We love vanilla. And not just because men go bonkers over it, although we are well aware of that fact. We love it for its own warm and comforting qualities, in addition to its devastating effect on the opposite sex. This vanilla is for grown-ups, not for little girls.  Smooth, a bit smoky and not the least bit cookie-like. Luscious and unusual and (of course) seductive.

name: Perfect Nectar
notes: Papaya, Ylang Ylang, Tangerine, Green Teas, White Flowers
style: Fruity
description: Luscious and exotic, this succulent fragrance features top notes of tangerine and blood orange, followed by middle notes of papaya, mango, ylang ylang and green tea. Perfect Nectar's base accord is a bed of soft, white flowers. A very tropical, yet delicious fragrance that is perfect for spring or summer!

name: Patchouli Antique
notes: Incense, Patchouli, Texas Cedar, Oak Foam, Amber, Benzoin And Vanilla.
style: Earthy
description: The soothing scent of rich, clean earth 芒聙聯 unsullied by industry, freshened by rain. This is the loamy soil of an enchanted hillside at dusk as you lay in the grass and watch the clouds turn periwinkle. The opening is very intense, but give it a moment and the trademark gentle touch of Les N脙漏r脙漏ides becomes apparent. The patchouli retains its earthiness, but becomes soft and deep, melding with layers of pillowy vanilla and smooth musk to create a dreamy landscape. Bewitching, since 1980.

name: Baie de Cassis
notes: Blackcurrant Bud, Peony, Rose, Vetiver
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Fruity
description: The vibrant peony and blackcurrant flowers bring sensuality and lightness to the Baie de Cassis fragrance.This combination reveals a bewitching eau de parfum thanks to the peppery and spicy notes of pink berries from Reunion Island.

name: Pas de Velours
notes: Ylang Ylang, Incense, Vanilla
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Skin Scent / Minimal, Sweet
description: The Pas de Velours fragrance leaves a delicate kiss on the cheek of its beloved. Charming and enchanting, this eau de parfum with base notes of vanilla fascinates with its elegant insouciance.On contact with incense, a spice from a faraway land, vanilla acts like a seductive caress on the skin. A bewitching and mysterious union.

name: Monyette Paris
notes: French Muguet Du Bois, Hints Of Island Vanilla Orchid, Tahitian Gardenia
style: Creamy, Floral, Floral - White
description: This isn't just sexy, it's 芒聙聹big night out芒聙聺 sexy. It's 芒聙聹reel him in芒聙聺 sexy. It's amazing. Creamy and luscious, this bewitching scent combines voluptuous gardenia and island vanilla orchid, a sweet earthy vanilla. The result is an entrancing oil blend that melts into your skin and lasts for hours. Utterly addictive.

name: Coquette tropique
notes: Hibiscus, Gardenia, Plumeria, French Anjou Pear, Madagascar Vanilla
style: Fruity, Sweet
description: Coquette Tropique is the long-awaited follow up to Monyette Paris and the second addition to the haute voyage collection. Inspired by fresh and exotic florals from Polynesian isles. Coquette is composed of Hibiscus, Gardenia, Plumeria, and delicate French Anjou pear.  Top notes of brilliant, sparkling citrus burst through a seductive middle note of rare Madagascar vanilla, settling into the purity of fresh island blossoms. Deliciously ripe, alluring and sexy.

name: Monyette Paris
notes: French Muguet Du Bois, Hints Of Island Vanilla Orchid, Tahitian Gardenia
style: Creamy, Floral, Floral - White
description: A mention in a magazine or the endorsement of a celebrity can start a buzz about a scent, but to become a true cult fragrance, it takes more than that 芒聙聯 it has to win the hearts of regular women, who love it so much they never want to run out of it. It has to be so wonderful that friends beg you for the name and you're not sure you want to tell them. It has to earn your loyalty by living up to the buzz.  Monyette qualifies on all fronts 芒聙聯 this sultry blend of come-hither gardenia, lilting muguet du bois and luscious and earthy vanilla orchid is fresh and beautiful and incredibly seductive, so it is no surprise that it is one of our perennial top-sellers. We are thrilled to offer this beloved fragrance in its newest incarnation 芒聙聯 an eau de parfum. All of the sexy tropical dreaminess remains intact, thank goodness, but it feels a touch smoother and airier to us in this version. A little less earthy, a little more island breeze 芒聙聯 still utterly bewitching. And the sillage is fabulous.

name: Serendipitous
notes: Blood Orange, Cocoa, Tahitian Vanilla
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: Scrumptious, luscious, irresistible - it's chocolate! As comforting as cocoa, as tempting as a Grand Marnier truffle, as decadent as hot fudge by the spoonful. So gloriously authentic that you can almost hear the Oompa Loompas singing. A lovely, straightforward, wearable chocolate, with a warmth and richness that melts into your skin and a hint of caramelized sugar. Sophisticated enough to satisfy our grown-up side, delicious enough to bring out our inner Veruca Salt. We want Serendipitous and we want it now!

name: Mure et Musc
notes: Wild Blackberry, Musk, Citrus
style: Fruity, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: Fresh, lovely and a bit naughty. This groundbreaking blend of wild blackberries and clean musk has become a L'artisan classic. Since its creation in 1978, the enchanting fragrance of 芒聙聹M脙禄re et Musc芒聙聺 has never ceased to cast its spell. Those who have chosen it are so attached and faithful to its scent that it has remained one of L'Artisan Parfumeur's all-time greats. Some, bemused by its powerful charm, have tried to imitate it, but none have succeeded. Elegant, playful, sexy.

name: Noir Exquis
notes: Chestnut, Orange, Orange Blossom, Coffee, Maple Syrup, Ebony, Heliotrope, Vanilla, Tonka, Sandalwood
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Woody - Spicy
description: The Parisian patisserie is so much more than a simple shop- it's a place of wonder, where exquisite pastry and invigorating coffee aromas set the backdrop for timeless friendships, fierce intellectual debates, lazy afternoons, and chance romantic encounters. It was the last of these things, the idea of love blossoming over eclairs and caf脙漏 au lait, that inspired Bertrand Duchaufour to create Noir Exquis, a wondrous new gourmand that combines the mouthwatering scents of a patisserie with a deep, sophisticated, and luminous base of woods and floral amber that sings of attraction, connection and delight.Noir Exquis opens with a succulent combination of sweet orange and deep, rich chestnut, which soon opens up to a heart of syrupy maple and a true, full-bodied coffee that balances as perfectly against the sweets as the real thing. As it dries down, a delightful, lightly almond-inflected heliotrope blends perfectly with a creamy vanilla, while a notably darker wood note, described here as ebony, lends a dynamic and romantic touch to smoother, lightly powdery notes of tonka and sandalwood. What Duchaufour has created here is not a mere representation of a patisserie, but rather a capsule of every positive feeling one could associate with such a place. The results are truly lovely, and we're happy to say that Noir Exquis is a creamy, sweet, beautiful new achievement for one of our favorite perfumers.

name: Venenum
notes: Masala Chai, Rice, Sandalwood
style: Creamy, Exotic, Gourmand, Spicy
description: Somewhere between exotic and comforting, light and dark, lies Venenum, the Natura Fabularis collection's ode to the beautiful aromas and ingredients of India. Blending captivating notes of deep, smooth sandalwood, milky and spicy chai tea, and steamed rice, Venenum is an intriguing chameleon, oscillating between the mouthwatering and the romantic with delightful playfulness, conjuring broadly painted visions of sunsets over Lake Pichola and elaborately lovely high tea ceremonies, adventures as relaxing as they are exciting. We may not be able to precisely categorize Venenum, but there's one word that perfectly describes it: beautiful.Each Natura Fabularis fragrance is presented in an exquisite glass atomizer flacon with a beautiful metal bee detail.

name: Mirabilis
notes: Ambrox, Incense, White Musk Vulcanolide
style: Fresh - Clean, Powdery / Soft, White
description: Elegant in its simplicity, Mirabilis is the Natura Fabularis collection's and perfumer Daphne Bugey's attempt to tackle one of man's deepest questions- nature vs science- with a clever, fragrant twist. Here, the debate between the rational and the spiritual plays out in Bugey's choice of ingredients, with the natural world represented first via a rich, gently earthy incense, the most fundamental of all perfume ingredients, recalling ancient devotionals and primal understandings.
