Put your misgivings to one side, for SM Caf脙漏 is simply the glorious coming together of a delicious, aromatic fresh-roasted coffee aroma and a smoky boot leather aroma. Think Aomassa脙炉 or Coze (Parfumerie Generale) on steroids. We smell two distinct and entrancing accords here 芒聙聯 the first, a pure espresso darkness mingling with a sweet and creamy waffle cone note, which conjures up the realistic aroma of a caf脙漏 ambiance, and second, the smoky, woody scent of freshly-waxed leather boots. Naughty or just nice? Wear it and decide for yourself. We think it芒聙聶s one of the all-time coffee greats.

name: Burning Ben
notes: Hay, Plum, Espresso, Tobacco, Hazelnut, Leather, Patchouli, Incense, Dark Chocolate, Tar, Castoreum, Cognac, Labdanum, Beeswax, Cherry, Amber, Allspice, Javanol, Saffron, Burning Tire
style: Earthy, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy
description: Burning Ben belongs to Prin Lomros芒聙聶 LGBTQ series, and was inspired by a subtle moment in the South Korean movie   "Burning芒聙聺 where the 芒聙聹Ben芒聙聺 character struggles with a conversation that might be interpreted as homophobic, dredging up a host of complex feelings in himself. Burning Ben is a stunning phenolic scent that similarly unites all sorts of opposing elements 芒聙聯 hazelnut, beeswax, burning tires, leather, and forest fruit 芒聙聯 creating a surprisingly harmonious and 芒聙聹complete芒聙聺 whole, just like the conflicted humanity of Ben.Burning Ben opens with a hugely realistic shot of espresso, with the dark, roasted flavor of beans brought perhaps a hair too far to burning point. Doused in a black, almost chewy sweet, spicy smoke, it feels like walking through the aftermath of a fire. But fear not, for the smoke clears and lifts in places, revealing intriguing hints of nuts, berries, saffron, and plums, notes that lend the austere smoke a gorgeously toothsome gourmand richness. A caramelized-butter amber, incense, and beeswax tandem shore all of this up from the basenotes, for a complex and rich finish that dawdles pleasurably between sweet, smoky, spicy, and sandalwoody without alighting completely on one or the other. If you love phenolic scents such as The Black Knight by Francesca Bianchi or T-Rex by Zoologist but want something softer and subtler for daytime wear, then Burning Ben could be for you.

name: Cigar Rum
notes: Raisin, Dried Fruits (prune And Cherry), Rum Absolute, Mandarin, Amber, Tobacco, Oakwood, Vetiver, Resins, Labdanum Absolute, Seaweed Absolute
style: Boozy, Gourmand, Smoky, Spicy, Sweet
description: The name - Cigar Rum 芒聙聯 is a bit on the nose. But the scent itself? A surprisingly delicate and detailed piece of work that, while definitely redolent of the rich, dried fruit and tobacco leaves soaking in oak caskets of Caribbean island booze implied in the name, has a lightness to it that makes it a fabulously easy wear.We think that part of what makes Cigar Rum such a great candidate for office wear and daytime is that the layers of balsamic woods, tobacco, and dried fruit are dry and crisp, aerated by a salty note that might be the seaweed absolute. The rum is rich and almost chocolatey in its booziness at first, but this fades quite quickly, leaving a cozy, toasted m脙漏lange of oaky tobacco and dried fruit to linger on the skin. In other words, people will think just that you smell deliciously cozy and 芒聙聵warm芒聙聶, rather than suspecting you芒聙聶ve been drinking. Sometimes a cigar is just a cigar 芒聙聯 and Cigar Rum just smells good.

name: Oliver
notes: Bitter Orange, Mojito, Grapefruit, Bergamot, Apricot, Quince, Petitgrain, Mandarin, Fig, Clary Sage, Cypress, Magnolia, Orris Concrete, Basil, Rose De Mai, Orange Flower, Pink Pepper, Coriander, Leather, Tobacco, Ambergris, Patchouli, Vetiver, Ambrette Seed, Oakmoss, Grape Leaves, Grass, Sandalwood, Sea Salt, Linden, Mahogany, Mastic, Olive, Clean Shirt (blue Billowy)
style: Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: Oliver is an original take on the aromatic herbs and citrus freshness of the traditional eau de cologne. At first, you smell the bright, tart (and always oddly dry) burst of citrus notes of the classic Farina or 4177, with their cleansing and pure aroma designed by nature to awaken and refresh the senses, supported by the crisp, herbal undergrowth of basil leaf, clary sage, and cool, green cypresses.But as the more volatile aromatic notes burn off, you notice some subtly non-traditional notes in the background. There is the musky scent of a man芒聙聶s crisp white linen shirt pulled freshly from his warm body, introducing a beautifully intimate and human tone (we suspect the glowy magic of ambrette seed and ambergris to be the responsible parties here). Then there is the exciting tang of sea salt, the dry rosy leather of quince, the incensey bitterness of oakmoss, and the powdered plushness of triple-milled French iris soap. Oliver feels personal. It芒聙聶s far more evolved than it ought to be, for all its eau de cologne inspiration. It makes sense to us that this raspy, oddball freshie was inspired by the bittersweet love story of two young men on the cusp between childhood and adulthood in the acclaimed indie movie Call Me by Your Name.

name: Strangers Discovery Set
description: A captivating and diverse collection from young nose, Prin Lomros, who uses his penchant for cinema to create intriguing fragrances that are as inspired as the films he adores. With such as strong focus on narration, we are certain you'll love each of the stories told by the fragrances in this set.Sample set includes 9 x 2.2ml atomizers of:Calin d'EteCigar RumCherry AmarettoConcrete ForestMuscat Jasmine TeaSalted Green MangoSweet CelestialsSweet FarewellSummer Peaches by the Tea Room

name: Kira Kira
notes: Mint, Pear, Green Apple, Solar Notes, Hedione, Musk, Sake, Sandalwood, Ambrette, Lily Of The Valley, White Lily, Ambroxan
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Powdery / Soft
description: The heat of summertime in Japan: families gathered in city parks, enjoying a picnic under the brilliant sun which sparkles from the windows of a thousand surrounding skyscrapers in a kaleidoscopic radiance that has a wonderfully onomatopoetic Japanese name:kira kira. Represented here in the form of fragrance, Kira Kira is a delightfully buoyant, exceptionally zen fruity musk scent that weaves Japanese minimalism together with the universal appeal of a day in the summer sun.The very first sniff of Kira Kira is sure to put a smile on anyone's face, combining the energetic snap of fresh mint and tart green apple with the luscious, mouthwatering smoothness of a perfectly ripe pear. The smooth, fresh heart marries the refreshing greenness of lily with the solar glow of hedione, all set against the comforting, gently fruity musk of ambrette spiked with a touch of sake. Delightfully Japanese, yet universally enjoyable, Kira Kira is quite simply lovely.

name: Comme Un Carrousel
notes: Cola, Rum, Red Wine, Red Apple, Honey, Basil, Rose, Orange Flower, Cinnamon, Coconut, Clove, Tobacco, Vanilla, Myrrh, Amber, Ginger
description: Summertime nostalgia isn't limited to the innocent bike rides and backyards of pre-adolescence- just as powerfully evocative are the memories (and half-memories) of teenage transgression, the furtive gatherings in cheap hotel rooms and after-dark beaches full of cheap booze, cigarettes, and nervous, hopeful yearning. That's the smell of Comme Un Carrousel, inspired by the wildness of the beach festival season in Nice, France. It's an intoxicating swirl of boozy rum and red wine, smoky tobacco, fizzy cola, and fiery spices that creates an undeniable evocation of the giddy highs and emotional depths of young lovers risking it all night after night. Surprisingly complex, deeply nostalgic, Comme Un Carrousel is the best party your 17 year old self ever attended.

name: Gheorghe
notes: Hay Absolute, Elemi, Immortelle, Cypress, Gardenia, Benzoin, Opoponax, Gaiac, Narcissus, Pear, Clove, Coriander, Black Pepper, Carnation, Tobacco, Castoreum, Heliotrope, Tonka Bean, Sandalwood, Patchouli, Labdanum, Peat, Vanilla, Whiskey, Bluebell
style: Floral, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Inspired by the love story of Gheorghe and Johnny in the film "God's Own Country," Gheorghe is a scent that captures springtime in Yorkshire, England through the prism of forbidden romance. The emerging springtime sun sparkles against a greening countryside, with earthy hay and peat contrasting with a juicy bouquet of fruits. Smooth, green florals are carried on the country breeze, while a darker animalic and lightly boozy tone to the gently woodsy base suggests the depth of the titular character's romantic desires. Complex and compelling, Gheorghe is a truly romantic scent- with all the complications that actual romance entails.

name: Scotch Peat
notes: Malted Barley, Hay Absolute, Cypress, Spruce, Labdanum, Peat, Moss, Old Oak Barrel, Cade, Clearwood, Tonka Bean, Smoke, Dried Fruits, Honey, White Chocolate, Licorice, Leather, Orris Butter, Lavender Absolute, Artemisia, Cassia, Atlas Cedar
style: Boozy, Earthy, Smoky, Woody - Dark
description: In the Scottish Highlands, the malted barley that will become premium single-malt scotch is smoked over a fire of local peat- ensuring the striking local landscape is forever enshrined in the character of the distinctive spirit to be produced. This is the central inspiration for Scotch Peat, which marries the smoky, boozy, fruity, and gourmand aspects of a complex and mature single-malt to the breathtaking terrain responsible for its magnificence. Warm and sweet, bright and aromatic, smoky and grassy, and above all rich and challenging- this is the beauty of Scotch Peat, a must-have scent for all true connoisseurs of the most sophisticated dram on the planet.

name: Roasted Coffee
notes: Roasted Coffee, Popcorn, Whisky, Honey, Tobacco, Suede, Vanilla, Hay, Patchouli, Musk, Brandy, Cashmeran, Norlimbanol, Rubber
style: Boozy, Creamy, Earthy, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Sweet
description: Prin Lomros doesn't want you to think he's repeating himself. That's the message he sent us along with Roasted Coffee (or, to be complete, Roasted Coffee Cigarette Whisky Come And Get Your Suede Honey Baby), which he worried might get overlooked as another coffee-based followup to 2019's SM Cafe. But one sniff of this impossibly rich, mouthwatering, deeply sensual extrait should quickly disavow anyone of that notion- Roasted Coffee is boldly and emphatically a fragrance all its own, and one that coffee lovers absolutely cannot miss. While SM Cafe and Roasted Coffee both feature eye-opening, fresh ground coffee and a taste of indulgence, Roasted Coffee doesn't go in the kinky vinyl-and-handcuffs direction of its predecessor- instead, this is a fragrance of lugubrious luxury and comfort. As the extended title makes clear, the leather here is the plush softness of fine Italian suede, refined with the boozy smoothness of aged bourbon whisky and a touch of tobacco smoke for invigorating (but not too acrid) contrast. With the added power and longevity of the extrait concentration, Roasted Coffee instantly vaults into the top tier of our strongest, most sumptuous coffee scents, the kind you'll be revisiting all day long. Curl up with Roasted Coffee, and feel your cares melt away.

name: Yuzu Soda
notes: Aldehyde, Camphor, Mint, Yuzu, Bitter Orange, Petitgrain, Pear, Pineapple, Rosemary, Magnolia, Soda, Orris, Basil, Vetiver, Musk, Seaweed
description: Yuzu is one remarkable little fruit. Tiny in size, with a bright yellow glow, it manages to combine the tartness of lemon, the aromatic character of bergamot, the zestiness of grapefruit, and the juiciness of mandarin orange into a single, indelible flavor. Yuzu Soda, as you might have guessed, is a fragrance inspired by a summertime refreshment made of fresh-squeezed yuzu, which bursts with vivid, summery freshness. The fizz of sparkling water is provided with the clean energy of aldehydes, while the aromatics of the garnish- mint, rosemary, and basil- lend the depth of a sophisticated craft cocktail.  To complete a summer inspired fragrance, watery magnolia blossom, Japanese nashi pear, sweet pineapple, and smooth orris create the relaxed vibe of a warm, peaceful summer in the Japanese countryside. And a base of smooth, clean musk evokes the soothing aroma of laundry drying on the clotheslines as you savor the last hours of sunlight. Simple and beautiful, Yuzu Soda is a perfect taste of zen for a hot summer afternoon.

name: Chokedee
notes: Pandan Leaf, Rice, Jasmine Sambac, Coconut, Neroli, Sandalwood, Cashew Nut, Chommanard, Frangipani, Vetiver, Musk
style: Tropical / Beachy
description: Chokedee is perfumer Prin Lomros芒聙聶 take on sweet sticky rice. It芒聙聶s a grainy gourmand, both savory and sweet, softly scented with white flowers and toasted coconut. At first, it芒聙聶s rich and viscous; a chewy, glutinous treat. But with wear it becomes much more nuanced and delicate: a grassy, nutty confection that芒聙聶s refined but not uptight.And just so we芒聙聶re clear here 芒聙聯 this isn芒聙聶t some well-mannered, porcelain-plated, Michelin star dessert. Chokedee is unstructured. It芒聙聶s home-cooked. It芒聙聶s messy and sticky and best eaten hot 芒聙聯 straight from the pan.

name: Caffeine Honey
notes: Roasted Coffee, Honey, Tobacco, Hay, Cade, Vanilla, Ambroxan, Patchouli, Popcorn, Musk, Labdanum, Cognac, Amberwood, Almond
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: Why does coffee make us feel so happy?Why do sweets make people mood better?What if you combine these two elements into one fragrance? Would it help you feel happier? The aroma of roasted black coffee from the coffee roaster wafts around the room. The olfactive note of hay, dried fruit, almond, and tobacco add to the sweetness coming from honey and  caramelized popcorn.Caffeine honey is the little brother of 芒聙聹Roasted Coffee Cigarette Whisky Come and Get Your Suede Honey Baby芒聙聺.  The differences between the two are subtle, but Caffeine Honey is softer, sweeter, no whisky or apricot, less smoky, and way more fun...

name: Summer Peaches By The Tea Room
brand: The Tea Room By Strangers Parfumerie
notes: Green Tea, Bergamot, Peach, Grass, Orris, Honeysuckle, Freesia, Neroli, Rose, Cedar, Musk, Wisteria
style: Floral - Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft
description: The olfactory experience of early summer breeze when peach blossoms begin to bloom. Dew drops on grass, coupled with the colourful charm of Japanese flowers. Nearby there is a 芒聙聹Chashitsu芒聙聺 or Japanese tea room, an architectural space designed to be used for traditional tea ceremonies.Escape the chaos and stress. Fill your life with peace, joy and serenity.

name: Limonsitano
notes: Limoncello, Mint, Tomato Leaf, Neroli, Seaweed, Thyme, Grapefruit, Bergamot, Rose, Citron, Quince, Pittosporum, Myrtle, Ambrette Seed, Driftwood, Sage, Rosemary, Patchouli, Basil, Green Apple
description: Limonsitano (combining Limoncello and Positano) is a fruity citrus chypre based on the Mediterranean's unique olfactory capture: the landscape of Positano and the Amalfi coast, where the best lemon for Limoncello grows. A place of of salty winds, citrus fruits, and Mediterranean herbs.The story behind the perfume is also based on two scenes from the movie 芒聙聹Under The Tuscan Sun芒聙聺. The first time Marcello takes Frances to his house in Positano, and she tastes Limoncello for the first time. And second scene is when Frances visits Positano alone to surprise her lover.Ocean waves at Sunset in Positano, and a glass of Limoncello.

name: Sweet Farewell
notes: Coconut Milk, Nipa Palm Leaves, Vanilla, Palm Sugar, Cedar, Rice Powder, Sandalwood, Musk, Pandan Leaves, Tonka Bean, Cashmeran, Ebony
style: Tropical / Beachy
description: Based on the Thai dessert "Kanom Jaak" made from rice powder, palm sugar, coconut milk, coconut flakes and pandan leaf. Grilled on Nipa palm leaves. Kanom is "dessert" in Thai, Jaak can mean Nipa palm leaves, or farewell. Years ago, Kanom Jaak used to be a well known dessert in Thailand. You could find it almost everywhere, but not so much anymore.Sweet farewell is a woody green gourmand base, with dominant notes of tea-like Nipa palm leaves, milky coconut, rice powder, sweetness from palm sugar, a unique sweet greenness from Pandan leaves and hint of smokiness.

name: Cachouli
notes: Cacao Powder, Patchouli, Tonka, Peru Balsam, Milk Note, Orange Flower, Honey, Benzoin, Amber, Mushroom, Soil Accord, Clearwood, Cinnamon, Nutmet, Dried Fruits, Gardenia, Labdanum
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: Cacao and Patchouli芒聙聯 hence Cachouli芒聙聯脗聽is a perfect combination, where both notes amplify each like in perfect harmony. Cachouli evokes the richness of tropical moist soil. The rich and dry earthiness contrasting with semi-gourmand, tropical white flowers and spices fully exploits its characters of an extraordinary patchouli essential oil.Created exclusively for Luckyscent to commemorate 20 years.

name: Cherry Amaretto
notes: Amaretto, Brandy, Maraschino Cherry, Sweet Cherry, Cinnamon, Heliotrope, Tonka Bean, Vanilla, Praline, Grenadine, Almond, Peach, Red Apple Juice, Red Wine, Strawberry, White Chocolate
style: Boozy, Gourmand
description: As you have seen before, some of Prin's perfumes are based on cocktails, mocktails, liquor and unique local cuisine. From the raw materials, to Prin's personal experiences and travels, one can see how the odyssey translates to the world of perfumery.Cherry Amaretto is a cocktail base on Cherry Amaretto sours that Prin had during a trip to the Lombardy region, Italy. A rich red fruity almond liqueur with the mouthwatering gourmand from Grenadine (Syrup made from Pomegranate juice), Praline, Vanilla, white chocolate and fruits. The raw intoxication and playful passion of the rich, fruity boozy-gourmand portray the allure of the nightlife in Italy.

name: A la folie
notes: Amber, Vanilla, Heliotrope, Black Tea, Macarons, Gaiacwood, Tonka Bean, Orange Blossom, Patchouli, Tobacco, Canel脙漏, Rose, Lavender, Hazelnut, Affogato, Cr脙篓me Br脙禄l脙漏e
style: Woody - Amber, Woody Ambery Floral
description: 脙聙 la folie French for into the madness. Wandering in the madness days and nights savoring the aromas of French pastries, desserts and cafe to the mysterious radiance colourful night lights of majestic historic Paris.A delicious madness sweet gourmand scent with the combination of French pastries, dessert and warm amber night lights with caramelized custardy Canel脙漏, nutty sweet Macarons, the warmth of amber and of course hint of tobacco in the air. 脙聙 la folie is reminiscent of the Parisian characters that roam the city of lights. Sparkling, addicting, and extremely romantic.

name: Mandarava
notes: Bodhi Tree, Borneol, Jasmine Sambac, Himalayan Champaca, Madagascar Ylang Ylang, Indian Marigold, Frankincense, Myrrh, Styrax, Rose, Lotus, Cinnamon, Civet, Nagamortha, Ruh Khus, Ebony, Mysore Sandalwood, Assamese Oud (Hindi), Indonesian Patchouli, Oakmoss, Gardenia, Coriander, Tolu, Siamese Benzoin, Aldehyde, Cumin Seed, Amber, Tuberose, Ash
style: Animalic, Floral, Fresh - Clean, Sweet
description: Inspired by the vision of sweet yellow flowers, white elephants, and towering mountain peaks that make up the Thai vision of Trayastrimsa 芒聙聯 the Buddhist Nirvana or Afterlife - Mandarava is perfumer Prin Lomros芒聙聶 interpretation of what heaven smells like. At first, heaven smells like a lei of heady tropical flowers laid around your neck, the lushness of ripe jasmine, rice pudding-esque champaca, and buttery, banana-rich ylang sending the senses reeling. There is an impression of red fruit swollen with juices, threatening to burst out of the pollen-soaked flowers and run down your arm uninterrupted.But this is no innocent, girlish affair. Mandarava shows us that flowers can be downright filthy when they want to be. The lasciviousness of the Hindi oud couples furiously with a sharp civet and earthy cumin to lend the floral bouquet a spicy animalic edge that seems lifted out of 1980s powerhouse canon, before the reformulation bug bit. Now envisage this dense, spicy floral knot being lifted and diffused by a clean, powdery nag champa musk and soft incense ash, wafting in and out of the animalic floral oud notes to breathe air into the composition. After smelling both Ma Nishtana and Mandarava, we are calling Prin Lomros the Master of the Eastern incense theme in perfumery, hands down.

name: Ma Nishtana
notes: Saffron, Amber, Aldehyde, Frankincense, Myrrh, Styrax, Rose, Nutmeg, Pink Pepper, Caraway, Black Pepper, Cardamom, Cumin, Labdanum, Castoreum, Sandalwood, Patchouli, Smoke, Leather, Norlimbanol, Clove, Allspice
style: Fresh - Clean, Smoky, Spicy
description: Ma Nishtana are the first two words in a phrase meaning "Why is tonight different from all other nights?", taken from the stories and lyrics of Had Gadya (the Chava Alberstein version). In a way, it makes sense to turn this philosophical question on its head and ask, 芒聙聹why is this incense scent different from all other incense scents?芒聙聺. After all, incense is a crowded genre and it really takes something special to stand out. Well, Ma Nishtana is something special.Standing somewhere between the soaring ethereality of Comme des Garcons芒聙聶 Avignon and the spiced, human weirdness of Grimoire by Anatole LeBreton, Ma Nishtana is unusual for its refusal to commit to either coolness or warmth. Instead, it is both, all at once. Its opening of smoky myrrh exploding in a cloud of fizzy aldehydes feels cooling, but immediately a bold dose of saffron, nutmeg, black pepper, cumin, and cardamom, burning through a cloud of ash and smoke turns, up the heat. There is incense 芒聙聯 mixed incense resins rather than any single one 芒聙聯 smoldering on a near-by censor, creating an aura of 芒聙聵Buddhist temple芒聙聶-like mysticism. But there is also the spicy warmth of thickly-fruited tea breads and pain d芒聙聶epices percolating beneath, filling out the hollows. Austerity balanced by comfort. If you芒聙聶re on an incense quest, then Ma Nishtana might just be your final destination.

name: Tom Yum
notes: Lime, Kaffir Lime Leaf, Lemongrass, Petitgrain, Jasmine Absolute, Galangal, Coriander, Patchouli, Grapefruit, Lemon, Chalood Bark
style: Green / Herbaceous, Natural/Organic, Spicy, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Oh boy 芒聙聯 just say the word Tom Yum and our mouths water. And the perfume Tom Yum has precisely the same effect. Spritz it on and your senses are instantly afire. Inspired by the famously sweet and sour Tom Yum soup of Thailand, Tom Yum (the scent) belongs to Prissana芒聙聶s Thammachatr (Thai for natural) series, meaning that it is all natural 芒聙聯 more a recipe than a formula, almost. An extra inducement to lick your own skin when you芒聙聶re wearing it.Tom Yum smells immediately like a steaming hot bowl of Tom Yum. Exploding with bright, citrusy lemongrass and coriander flavors, it is a perfect balance of hot, sweet, sour, and herbal. The flavors seem to go 1,000 leagues deep in each direction. The gingery heat of galangal is cooled by the soapy, lemony grassiness of coriander for a sensory experience that feels invigorating and exciting. Keeping all these explosive herbal and citrus notes in check is a backing of nutty, smoky chalood bark, and a soft sigh芒聙聶s worth of jasmine. Wonderful for a hot summer芒聙聶s day, when a dramatic twist on the traditional eau de cologne-style refreshment is called for.Made with 100% natural materials

name: Natsumeku
notes: Camphor, Yuzu, Hinoki, Orange Bitter, Mandarin, Lavender, Neroli, Orris Butter, Rose Otto, Oakmoss, Artemisia, Bergamot, Tangerine, Palo Santo
style: Floral - White, Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean, Natural/Organic
description: Natsumeku is the Japanese word for the start of the summer and is inspired by the pleasant memory of a day perfumer Prin Lomros spent wandering around the Japanese countryside on a bright, cloudless spring day. Belonging to the Thammachatr (Thai for natural) series, Natsumeku is composed of 100% all-natural raw materials.Natsumeku is pure sunshine in a bottle. Imagine an entire Japanese yuzu tree 芒聙聯 the variety of citrus native to Japan 芒聙聯 pulped, distilled, and poured into a small clear bottle, and that is what it smells like. The traditional woods of Japan 芒聙聯 silvery hinoki wood and green, minty-rosy camphor 芒聙聯 form the subtle backing to the main players, which are the stunning liquid sunshine of yuzu (both the peel and the fruit), the dark green leaves clustered around the fruit (neroli), and the bittersweet lime twang of bergamot. Being all natural, this joyful explosion of multi-faceted citrus fruits cannot last forever, but the perfumer has cleverly extended the citrus loveliness as far as he can by way of a classically clean, soapy neroli accord that seems to go on forever.Made with 100% Natural materials

name: Parfum Prissana Discovery Set
description: As beautiful and lush as the land from which they came. Journey into the rich world of Prissana Parfum. Each set comes sealed in golden  mylar bag.Sample set includes 6 x 2.2ml atomizers of:AyutthayaDunhuangHirunMa NishtanaSaharTom Yum

name: Nefer
notes: Saffron, Amber, Tangerine, Elemi, Coffee Oil, Myrrh, Narcissus, Incense, Benzoin, Nutmeg, Cardamom, Caraway, Ginger, Black Pepper, Cinnamon, Coriander, Rose, Sandalwood, Nagarmotha, Dried Fruits, Gaiac, Amyris
style: Exotic, Floral - Ambery Spice, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy
description: When Julius Caesar first met Cleopatra, her exotic beauty was reported to have left the world's most powerful man completely speechless. This transcendent elegance is the inspiration behind Nefer, a beguilingly spicy and exotic treasure of a scent. Drawing its main notes from a 2012 archaeological discovery that suggested that ancient Egyptian perfumery utilized myrrh, cinnamon, and cardamom, Nefer is rich, sweet, and ravishingly romantic, deploying luscious gourmand and invigorating spices against a warm backdrop of resinous and smoky incense. Honeyed fruits, lush rose, and a woodsy base lend additional richness and dimensionality, enveloping the wearer in a rapturous golden aura.Nefertranslates from the ancient Egyptian to "beauty," or "goddess," but don't take our word for it- one sniff and you'll know.

name: Chetyre
notes: Cuir De Russie, Aldehyde, Galbanum, Lavender, Lavandin Absolute, Orris Butter, Black Spruce, Pine Needle, Mimosa, Rose, Spikenard, Vanilla, Tar, Musk, Oakmoss, Mushroom, Rosewood, Fir Balsam, Carrot Seed, Clary Sage, Artemisia, Ivy
description: Chetyre is a 2004 Russian film by Ilya Khrzhanovsky, a story of strangers who happen to meet in a bar. Through their conversation, we learn both the intriguing and the banal details of their lives. But is anyone really telling the truth?Each note in Chetyre represents a scene or shot from this intriguing, shocking, unforgettable film.

name: Nimitr
notes: Aldehyde, Lemon, Mandarin, Galbanum, Lavender, Clary Sage, Jasmine Absolute, Opoponax, Styrax, Bay Leaf, Cinnamon, Nutmeg, Civet, Leather Accord, Costus, Patchouli, Vetiver, Musk, Oakmoss Absolute, Birch Tar, Cade, Castoreum, Gardenia, Plum, Incense, Labdanum, Tobacco, Vanilla Absolute, Hyacinth, Sandalwood
style: Woody - Dark
description: Nimitr evokes a classy middle-age man nostalgically wearing his classic masculine leather fragrance from the 80芒聙聶s or 90芒聙聶s, while he listens to jazz, of course. Due to high demand, Nimitr is a re-release from Prissana芒聙聶s 2018 first collection.

name: Karuna
notes: Tangerine, Camphor, Jasmine Sambac Absolute, Cananga Oil, Tuberose, Bullet Wood Flower, Myrrh, Basil, Ebony, Turmeric, Cassia, Clove, Cumin Seed, Cinnamon, Coriander, Cardamom, Bay Oil, Celery Seed, Nutmeg, Angelica, Styrax, Rose, Frankincense, Ylang Ylang, Champaca, Rosewood, Aldehyde, Orange Blossom, Honey, Opoponax, Benzoin, Patchouli, Moss, Sandalwood, Civet
description: Karuna means Kindness / Kind-hearted or mercy in Thai. Karuna base on memories of Prin's childhood. Every Songkarn festival (Thai芒聙聶s New year) during mid April our family will visit my grand mother elder brother芒聙聶s house outside city centre where we live. He owned Chinese/ Traditional Thai pharmacy shop. In front of his house there is a temple where we always visit. Karuna is olfactory of Incense from Thai temple in Southern part of Thailand with smell of spices and flowers they always plant around temple such as Camphor, Jasmine Sambac, Canaga, Tuberose, Cassia, Ebony, Champaca etc. And the olfactory smells of precious woods, spices and herbs from my grand mother elder brother芒聙聶s pharmacy shop. This is a perfume of memories芒聙聯脗聽festivities, joy and my grandmother's kindness.

name: Dunhuang
notes: Jasmin Tea, Mandarin, Tangerine, Plum, Jasmine Absolute, Magnolia, Lapsang Souchong, Osmanthus, Incense, Rose, Angelica, Anise Oil, Caraway, Ginger, Black Pepper, Kumquat, Cinnamon, Clove Bud, Cumin Seed, Costus, Cedar, Sandalwood, Moss, Civet, Patchouli, Amber
style: Spicy
description: Base on the Silk Road, an ancient trade route that connected the Western with the Middle East and Asia. Dunhuang is the first trading town reached by foreign merchants located in oasis of Gansu-Xinjiang desert region.With the olfactory of the ancient silk road caravan where merchants and people from Eastern meet with Western exchanging their product. From Buddhism incense with peachy honey-like of Osmanthus absolute, Citruses, Tea leaf and Spices. These smells wafted through the air, somewhere in the middle of desert under the starry skies surrounded by the warmth of campfire.

name: Ayutthaya
notes: Sandalwood Australia, Incense, Myrrh, Opoponax, Styrax, Gunpowder, Moss, Camphor, Nutmeg, Coriander Seed, Cinnamon, Black Tea, Amber, Aldehyde, Champaca, Benzoin, Papyrus, Vetiver, Jasmine Absolute, Ebony, Teak Wood, Patchouli, Cumin Seed
description: Ayutthaya was the second Siamese capital city (The first one was Sukhothai). During its glorious period Ayutthaya was one of the world芒聙聶s largest urban, a centre of global commerce and diplomacy. Ayutthaya was described as the Venice of the East by the Portuguese explorer. When the Burmese army attacked and destroyed Ayutthaya, including most of its official records, art, and literature. Our Ayutthaya base on the glorious time of trading between Western and other Eastern merchants such precious woods and spices. Sacred Buddhism incense and the collapse of the empire destroyed by war.

name: Black Ambergris
notes: Dark Chocolate, Incense, Black Ambergris, Resins, Balsam
style: Exotic, Floral - Spicy, Salty / Oceanic, Woody - Dark, Woody - Fresh
description: Black Ambergris is an enveloping fragrance that builds off the natural depth and velvety texture of natural ambergris to present the luxurious ambience of an exclusive private lounge. Sumptuously rich and intoxicating notes of dark chocolate, balsamic resins, and smoothly smoky incense give a feeling of enveloping serenity, while the elegance of black ambergris, chosen for its almost gourmand-adjacent sweetness, evokes the mouthwatering, deeply warming sensations of a perfectly crafted bespoke cocktail. It's a fragrance of comfort and sophistication in equal measure, an unforgettable night out with no expense spared. Discover the seductive satisfaction of Black Ambergris.

name: Silver Ambergris
notes: Tropical Flowers And Spicy Citruses, Silver Ambergris, Woods And Moss
description: This perfume captures the atmosphere of a deserted island gleaming in the sparkling mist of warm ocean waters heated by the mid-day sun. Revealed upon approach is an enchanted landscape: a whole isle covered with dense, emerald green, fantastically-shaped, entangled trees, their crowns sprinkled with flowers that fill the air with an intoxicating, mystic blossom bouquet.

name: Golden Ambergris
notes: Leather, Orris, Sandalwood, Spices, White Ambergris, Gold Ambergris
description: Here we have a very provocative aroma with a distinctive accent of powerful animal magnetism; a concoction of scents that is reminiscent of exclusive leather goods. Golden Ambergris flatters strong, confident and enigmatic personalities enjoying luxurious surroundings (the very clientele for which it was created).

name: Gift Set Trio: Gold, Silver and Black
description: When you love all the Anonim creations, why not have them all in one specially-priced gift set? Collection set contains one each 30ml bottle of Gold, Silver and Black.

name: Arborist
notes: Quince, Honey, Saffron, Osmanthus Absolute, Magnolia, Burdock, Papyrus, Mugwort, Rose Absolute, Tuberose, Myrrh Absolute, Spruce Resin, Douglas Fir, Labdanum, Jatamansi, Malt, Lichen
description: Arborist is an ode to enchanting woodlands, the likes of which are found across the brand's native Scotland. Be warned, Arborist is not just lumber. It is an imagined day-in-the-life of a Virideer (the keeper of the grass and green wood in the forest).Arborist possesses an overwhelming and spirited opening mellowing into sun-bleached woods, malted cereals and worked-skin. A symphony of nature untamed. The core structure of Arborist is redolent of many great Scots timbers; their leaves, flowers, fruits, roots and soil being the quintessential portrait of the forest.Arborist presents a unique blend of raw flowers, botanicals, resin sap, underwood and surprising forest fruits. Resolutely sylvan and intriguingly multifaceted with more than a hint of human skin, oily tool and distilling elixirs haunting from afar.

name: Carduus
notes: Chamomile, Bengal Pepper, Honey, Clary Sage, Sea-holly, Marjoram Tea, Myrtle, Rose Absolute, Vetch, Clove Bud, Hart芒聙聶s Tongue, Tuberose, Musk-thistle, Heliotrope, Tormentil, Mahogany, Cocoa Absolute, Tobacco, Meum, Deertongue, Cherrywood
description: Unashamedly polarizing, Carduus is a blend of jagged leaves, herbal seeds and xeric barks.Carduus assaults with a potent crash of warm gustatory herbs, tingling seeds and defensive leaves. This dry herbal bouquet prevails over medicinal botanicals, ardent barks and bruised molecules. The resulting effect conjures images of untold ceremony and ritual. The fragrance flirts with tradition; aged herbs and spices blended alchemically, it is ceremonious and spiritual. This romantic brew is woven with bundles of complex flower essences and fermented leaves before revealing its sweet confections and pounded roots. There is unusual buoyancy experienced with Carduus. Starting extremely rich, dense and laced with spices before shedding layers to reveal a veiled and noble incense facet that feels weightless.

name: Phloem
notes: Passion Fruit, Rhubarb, Mulberry, Nasturtium, Honeysuckle, Blaeberry, Camellia, Oysterplant, Meadowsweet, Gorse, Ambrette, Sesame, Amyris, Tonka Bean Absolute
description: What a sticky mess. Phloem is a diabolical assemblage of odorants that should oppose, but somehow attract.There is a violent, primal sensuality that bewitches before embracing. The entire composition is a balancing act of contradicting raw materials blended instinctually to create a shocking and diffusive bouquet of devastating release. Phloem presents a miasma of olfactory sin; flushed skin, shoreline, carnival frivolities, caviar, lipstick smears and erogenous effluvium. Sucrose-sweetness is tempered with greasy spices that hinder Phloem from sliding into tooth-achingly sweet territory. A damp note of nutty driftwood and hot gooey styrax gum continues deep into the fade. Phloem is hallucinogenic vapor with a marbled psychedelic development.

name: Nectary
notes: Bramble, Cranberry, Peach, Rose Absolute, Oud, Ambergris, Roseroot, Olibanum, Selfheal, Castoreum, Civet, Labdanum Absolute, Musk
description: Nectary is a profusion of diaphanous flowers. A modern alternative to more traditional signatures.This is a brutal floral bouquet, abundant with honeyed sweetness and oozing with precious sap. There is a beguiling tartness as Nectary unfurls. A ripe, juicy nuance compliments narcotic blushed petals adding unfiltered naturalness. Nectary is not a preened garden; there is bravado and danger lurking at every twist and turn. To disturb the slumbering flowers would prove perilous. Crude terra cotta vases spill with fruit-baring inflorescences. Cool mineral vapors radiate from ivory walls, incubating delicate seedlings.Nectary is a garden protected by hardy, thorn emblazoned flora, ouch! Rose absolute from Isparta is the sworn protector, shielding injured wood and regal bouquets.

name: Fantosmia
notes: Black Pepper, Annatto, Cardamom, Pimento, Fennel, Sisho Leaf, Mate, Cascarilla, Nutmeg, Aetoxylon, Castoreum, Saffron, Tobacco
description: Fantosmia is a perfume that marries natural phenomenon with manufactured intelligence in equal measure. The end result presents a progressive step towards a new olfactory language 芒聙聯 speaking not only in notes and aromatic raw materials, but also in shape, form, texture, surface, physicality, the elusive and intangible; giving additional lexicon to odors, their form and resulting sensation.Existing in liquid form, Fantosmia transcends materiality and showcases the inherent beauty of select natural materials and the power of harnessed molecular knowledge.

name: Athenaeum
notes: Scottish Lavender, Beeswax, Fennel, Apple, Honey, Neroli Oil, Hyacinth, Flouve, Patchouli, Morocco Leather, Gurjun Balsam, Oak, Ink
description: Athenaeum is the distillation of a once forgotten olfactory memory, awakened upon a chance encounter at the local athenaeum. It is the fragmented and hazy reminiscence of a rural childhood found once more in the urban landscape.Upon entering the athenaeum one is struck by the overwhelming aroma of degrading pulp and ink, shrouded in a haze of sun-kissed dust. Without haste, the smell transports you to arable mid-summer fields and days lost in swaying pastures, nose buried in hundreds of papery leaves in dense mulchy woodland. Like gauzy sunshine whistling through rugged lands, Athenaeum is as comforting as it is solitary. A fragrance perfectly crafted for reflection.

name: Pentimento
notes: Tiare, Orchid, Hazelnut, Broom Absolute, Carob Absolute, Tobacco Flower, Vanilla, Rum Absolute & Tonka Bean Absolute
description: Pentimento is a cornucopia of moreish delights, an extravagant still-life that rewards both wearer and audience. Decadent ormolu gilded flower details are backlit by the velveteen drapery shimmer of Hazelnut and Broom. Sumptuously smudged Tonka and Carob bean provide a soft halo-glow against the cool polished stone fa脙搂ade of Rum Absolute and the austere crystalline refraction of Tobacco flower. Pentimento is a bouquet that is baroque in its grandeur and is unapologetically rich and indulgent 芒聙聯 it is big and encompassing whilst being exceptionally nuanced, faceted, articulate and endlessly complex.Pentimento celebrates a desire for change. A change of mind brought on by reflection rather than necessity. Pentimento is not the story of repentance but of our desire to approach an idea from a different perspective where change itself is the catalyst, influence and inspiration.

name: Paradisi
notes: Pear, Rhubarb, Grapefruit, Honeysuckle, Orange, Guava, Cucumber, Pink Pepper, Magnolia, Passionflower, Tree Moss Absolute, Mushroom, Cedarwood, Patchouli, Soil
style: Floral - Fruity, Tropical / Beachy, Woody - Light
description: With an unctuous opening of exotic and near-indescribable fruit notes and augmented citrus oils, Paradisi presents a novel freshness and odd familiarity albeit from a fruit that you have never experienced before.The secret here lies in the collision between specific citrus extracts and key aldehydes pivoting around a peculiar berry extraction, which is subsequently buried within the formula being used primarily for its hidden secrets over its aromatic properties.

name: Rose Highland
notes: Azalea, Sweet Basil, Pink Pepper, Bell Heather, Clove Bud, Primrose, Rhododendron, Jasmine Absolute, Geranium Oil, Rose Absolute, Atlantic Oak, Flag Iris, Vetiver, Ambergris, Mineral Accord
style: Floral, Floral - Citrus
description: A paper cut-out of a rose, tossed in saline sea air and blasted on jagged coastline rocks.Place reference: Buachaille Etive Mor, GlencoeScottish Odyssey is an exploration of the folklore and mystery ingrained in our past and present. A contemporary fantasy built around the everyday; extending beyond geography into attitude, humour and culture. Grounded and earthy, joyful and irreverent.

name: Healing Berry
notes: Artemisia, Blackcurrant Absolute, Tayberry, Willowherb, Sloes, Wild Mint, Rose Absolute, Loganberry, Buckler Fern, Violet Leaf Absolute, Raspberry Leaf, Orris Butter, Himalayan Balsam, Cereal Accord
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity
description: Smashed to a pulp in a timeworn pestle and mortar, a tannin-sweet concoction equally fit to heal or harm.Place reference: Valley of StrathmoreScottish Odyssey is an exploration of the folklore and mystery ingrained in our past and present. A contemporary fantasy built around the everyday; extending beyond geography into attitude, humour and culture. Grounded and earthy, joyful and irreverent.

name: Gorseland
notes: Pineapple Weed, Neroli Oil, Chamomile, Gorse Flower, Crab Apple, Lemon Oil, Astilbe, Lavender Absolute, Gooseberry, Milk-vetch, Elderflower, Catchfly, Woodruff, Gorsewood, Zdravetz, Kush Accord
style: Fresh - Clean, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: As neon gold blooms erupt from sun-bleached concrete crags, beauty and dereliction coexist.Place reference: Salisbury Crags, EdinburghScottish Odyssey is an exploration of the folklore and mystery ingrained in our past and present. A contemporary fantasy built around the everyday; extending beyond geography into attitude, humour and culture. Grounded and earthy, joyful and irreverent.

name: Firewater
notes: Black Tea, Juniper Berry, Nettle, Grapefruit, Beardtongue, Osmanthus Absolute, Ginger, Bracken, Larch, Birchwood, Sugar Kelp, Guaiacwood, Vetiver, Oakwood, Benzoin, Labdanum Absolute, Peat Accord
style: Smoky, Woody - Dark
description: Let芒聙聶s dance around a smoked-out beach bonfire, skin anointed with sticky citrus char.Place reference: Corryvreckan Whirlpool, Isle of JuraScottish Odyssey is an exploration of the folklore and mystery ingrained in our past and present. A contemporary fantasy built around the everyday; extending beyond geography into attitude, humour and culture. Grounded and earthy, joyful and irreverent.

name: Pony Boy
notes: Rhubarb, Coriander Seed, Fig, Pink Grapefruit, Champaca Absolute, Pink Pepper, Beetroot, Pink Lotus Absolute, Vetiver, Ambrette Seed, Atlas Cedarwood, Raspberry Leaf, Red Cedarwood, Calamus.
style: Unusual / Unexpected
description: PONY BOY: The scent description paints a striking picture: 芒聙聵The kelpie haunts a Lochside sauna, hissing out a steamed-wood and pink-edged sour lotus haze.芒聙聶 PONY BOY is a sour, fruity-floral-green Extrait de Parfum with fresh, hot-steam elements. There is something both intoxicating and revitalising about it 芒聙聯 in a similar vein to one of Jorum Studio芒聙聶s other popular picks, Paradisi. The name and concept had been in the works for almost a year, but the fragrance itself took longer than average to complete, with tweaks being made daily until the entire team felt it fully captured their vision. The name is inspired by the Kelpie 芒聙聯 a shape-shifting folkloric figure said to inhabit lochs in Scottish folklore. 芒聙聵We芒聙聶d already touched upon elements of Scottish folklore in HEALING BERRY and FIREWATER, so it was natural to continue along this path. We liked the idea of taking this mythical horse-like figure of temptation and placing it in an unexpected setting,芒聙聶 explained co-founder and perfumer Euan McCall.PONY BOY is an alternate story of the kelpie: a shape-shifting folkloric figure said to inhabit lochs and other bodies of water in Scottish folklore. Kelpies are traditionally male, yet historically they are most often represented as the stereotypical female 芒聙聵temptress芒聙聶 in visual art. PONY BOY celebrates temptation in all its forms through the subversion of expectations: the kelpie, perpetual outsider and tired of his loch-bound existence, visits a local sauna and erupts a rhubarb-tinged cloud of steamy bliss primed to hypnotise passers-by.

name: Spiritcask
notes: New Make, Ylang-Ylang, Pear, Chamomile, Malt, Cognac, Jasmine, Rum Absolute, Leather, Cocoa, Maple, Cedarwood, Whisky Lactone, Caramel, Labdanum, Guaiacwood, Coffee, Bourbon Vanilla Absolute, Oakwood Extract
style: Boozy
description: Held in the customs house, the wistful spiritmaker plunges their head into the last empty barrel, where cooper-fired sweet nothings whisper and swirl.Place reference: Queen's Dock, Glasgow

name: Anatolia
notes: Leather, Date, Apple, Oud, Cinnamon, Cumin, Patchouli, Amber, Incense, Loukhoum, Cacao Powder, Honey, Suede
style: Exotic, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Gourmand, Smoky
description: The bridge between continents, Anatolia was a nexus for the conflicting tides of humanity- a centerpoint of economic, cultural, and even genetic exchange. Anatolia the fragrance celebrates this diversity in a sweeping ambery gourmand that incorporates a multitude of unique materials that might have passed across the plateau in ancient times- the earthy richness of dried fruits made sweet with the historic confections of loukhoum and honey, contrasted against the fiery spice of cumin and cinnamon and the spiritual brightness of incense smoke. Underneath it all, the supple, road-worn leather of the travelers and merchants who brought these treasures back and forth across the silk road, creating new cultures that endure until this day. Lovers of semi-gourmande leather, you won't want to miss this one.

name: Mandodari
notes: Champaca, Tuberose, Gardenia, Frangipani, Aldehydes, Coffee Absolute, Opium, Black Pepper, Civet*, Tobacco, Oakmoss, Ash, Cumin, Sandalwood, Teak. *does Not Contain Any Actual Animal Products
style: Classic Feminine, Floral, Floral - Spicy, Floral - White, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Spicy
description: Mandodari, or Montho in Thai: the queen consort of Ravana in Ramanyana, "beautiful, pious, and righteous": and yet, tragically exploited, ignored, and betrayed by her husband and the gods. With Mandodari, Prin Lomros honors her struggle, giving to her the redemption arc the stories never could with a sweepingly gorgeous and complex of spicy florals that seamlessly melds the divine with the earthly. Mandodari is built around a sparkling bouquet of aldehyde-kissed florals- smooth, fresh champaca, sweet frangipani, narcotic tuberose, carnal gardenia. Beneath the brightness, a swirl of mysterious spices lurk- rich coffee, fiery black pepper, and an ash-enhanced curl of smoky tobacco atop a darkly woodsy base. It's a clever, empathetic nod to the darkness that lies beneath the beauty, a gesture to the unspoken tragedy of the mythology. For those who love beautiful aldehydic florals but long for a bit more substance and sophistication, Mandodari is a revelation.

name: Mriga
notes: Deer Musk Accord*, Lime, Fir Balsam, Black Spruce, Grass, Cade, Oakmoss, Oud, Vetiver, Nagarmotha, Rose, Sandalwood, Jasmine, Costus, Wormwood, Labdanum, Peat *this Fragrance Contains No Animal Products
style: Animalic, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Fresh
description: Mriga- from the Sanskrit word for "deer." Fear not, however, animal lovers, Mriga contains no actual deer musk, but simply an ingenious synthetic deer musk accord, perhaps the most accurate one we've ever smelled, able to impressively capture the subtly sweet, powdery, furry aspects of real musk with far more nuance than the average substitute. And Prin Lomros makes the most of this striking accord, supplementing it with an array of florals and resins designed both to evoke the natural Himalayas habitat that such a deer might find himself in, while also drawing out the aphrodisiac elements of deer musk that have brought the material such breathless renown. Lime teases out that ribbon of brightness that so often separates real musk from its imitators, while a root-to-leaf collage of arboreal fragrant materials- fir balsam, spruce, oakmoss, sandalwood- lend a striking natural dimensionality. Invigorating and substantial, Mriga is a dream come true for anyone who would love a true deer musk scent without the ethical dilemma.

name: PRIN Discovery Set
description: Discover the complex sensuality of creative dynamo Prin Lomros' most ambitious and personal line to date, an exploration of his favorite type of fragrance- challenging meditations on animalics and other exotic notes.This set contains 6 x 2.2ml spray samples of the following Parfum Extraits:AnatoliaBurmite HoneyIndigo NightMandodariMrigaSaringkarn

name: Eshu
notes: Tobacco, Hay, Elemi, Copaiba, Olibanum, Nutmeg, Black Pepper, Castoreum, Atlas Cedar, Oakmoss, Cognac, Ambroxan, Norlimbanol, Cinnamon, Cumin Seed, Ash
style: Animalic, Earthy, Spicy
description: Eshu, the mischievous god of Yoruba legend, who translates between the gods and all the peoples of earth. Eshu, a groundbreaking 2000 Fall/Autumn collection from the late Alexander McQueen, which inspired Prin Lomros to create this scent. Eshu, the fragrance, a universally fluent dialogue between rich, earthy tobacco, fiery spices, sweet cognac, and touches of animalics, woods, and musk. The synthesis is surprisingly smooth, a powerful yet utterly wearable boozy tobacco with intense, sophisticated resin and spice tones, distinctive and unforgettable. An ingenious juxtaposition of traditional tribal elements and modern twists, Eshu is not to be missed.

name: Saringkarn
notes: Saffron, Champaca, Fir Balsam, Beeswax, Amber, Damask Rose, Rose De Mai, Tobacco, Leather, Dark Chocolate, Prune, Oud, Musk, Oakmoss, Ambrette, Smoke, Incense, Ylang Ylang
description: A taste of love and seduction. The value of love between lover, friend and family and humanity. A taste of happiness. Saringkarn, a tribute to the traditional and ancient Thai form of literary composition, is a tantalizing and unique scent somewhere between gourmand and floral, where dark and sensual tones of oud, amber, leather, and tobacco gain an alluring, romantic sweetness from beeswax, dark chocolate, and a bouquet of exquisite roses. Sweet, boozy prune gives a cognac-like richness, while a darker smoke note preserves just the right amount of provocative danger. Like any true work of literary genius, it's up to you how to interpret it all.

name: Arsalan
notes: Cambodian Oud, Trat Oud, Jasmin Sambac, Champaca, Olibanum, Turmeric, Clove, Caraway, Cardamom, Cinnamon, Cumin, Coriander, Gardenia, Opoponax, Saffron, Sandalwood, Patchouli, Musk
description: The Persian legend of Arsalan is a story of a royal heir who rediscovers his hidden heritage and decides to reclaim his throne. And as would befit a fragrance based on hidden power, Arsalan is a gorgeous and richly textured floral spice scent that feels warm, lush, and romantic, but also reveals an intensely potent blend of some of the finest Southeast Asian ouds available. Beneath a bright, alluring bouquet of luscious, smooth champaca and jasmine, an intense and carnal rush of Cambodian oud and Thai Trat oud displays a multifaceted profile of sweet, warm, sensual oud tones. A bright, sparkling olibanum incense plays off of an exotic spice blend, uplifting and giving sophisticated complexity. Arsalan the prince needed a long journey before he was able to reveal his nobility, but Arsalan the fragrance is undeniably, wonderfully regal.

name: Nocturnal Poetry
notes: Violet, Champaca, Rosewood, Beeswax, Frankincense, Myrrh, Coffee Bean, Rose, Tobacco, Hay, Jasmine, Leather, Castoreum, Hyrax, Civet, Musk, Oud, Turmeric, Cumin
description: Who says a nightmare needs to be a bad experience? In the talented imagination of Prin Lomros, the surreal feeling that accompanies an unsettling dream is sublime inspiration. This sensation is captured to enchanting effect in Nocturnal Poetry, a lush, intoxicating floral with the spicy, animalic complexity that PRIN is known for. A cool, green and thorny bouquet of violet, champaca, and rose sits in a misty fog of incense and myrrh, kissed with sweet, earthy notes of beeswax, hay, and coffee. A dark base of oud, animalics and leather beckons with provocative mystery, but Lomros always keeps Nocturnal Poetry from becoming too unsettling- ultimately, this dreamlike floral is a journey anyone will enjoy taking.

name: Homa
notes: Cinnamon, Ginger, Black Pepper, Cardamom, Cassia, Cumin, Turmeric, Caraway, Nutmeg, Clove, Saffron, Hay, Kaffir Lime, Oud, Galbanum, Ghee Butter, Jasmine, Champaca, Tuberose, Beeswax, Incense, Myrrh, Spikenard, Costus, Benzoin, Ash, Goat Hair Tincture, Mushroom, Civet, Hyrax
description: Sanskrit for a sacred Hindu fire ritual, Homa is a sumptuously complex blend of spices, florals, and animalics to elevate both spirit and consciousness. Using fire as the direct messenger between humans and gods, Homa transmutes these exotic ingredients into something simultaneously rich and earthy, but also transcendent and ethereal, weaving threads of smoke, ash, ozone and incense into the fragrant blend to represent the journey of these sacred offerings into the realm of the spirits. There's more than enough sophistication to satisfy lovers of Prin's deepest, most animalic elixirs- dark oud, earthy mushroom, and (natural, cruelty-free) fossilized hyrax and goat hair lend primal intensity, but Homa is balanced with bright, sparkling airiness that make it wonderfully wearable. For those looking to commune with the heavens, Homa is a sacred ritual safe to perform anytime.

name: Ganja Kasturi
notes: Cannabis Accord, Animalic Musk, Patchouli, Camphor, Aldehyde, Black Spruce, Hay Absolute, Tuberose, Coriander, Cumin Seed, Civet, Oak Moss, Ambrette Seed, Beeswax, Incense, Grass, Tobacco, Allspice, Melati, Black Tea
style: Animalic, Green / Herbaceous
description: Ganja Kasturi is based on the journey of the "hippie trail" from the late 1960芒聙聶s to 70芒聙聶s- a trip that sent countless youths disillusioned with western society from London to Istanbul, Bangkok to Kathmandu, on an often psychedelic voyage of self discovery. Fresh yet dark, Ganja Kasturi is the latest from Prin and unlike anything we've experienced before.  Although this concoction features spice, patchouli, and tobacco, this is no typical oud or kush fragrance- the ganja is there, herbaceous and potent, but it's balanced with a soft musk and fresh earthiness that feels both pastoral and a bit ethereal.  That clean soapy aldehyde finish lingers above the deep, musky animalic base, making Ganja Kasturi a perfect choice for an adventurous fragrance lover who still appreciates a touch of luxury.

name: Varuek
notes: Black Pepper, Labdanum, Thai Oud, Myrrh, Animal Fur Accord, Beeswax, Cinnamon, Leather, Amber, Jatamansi, Castoreum, Bay Leaf, Frankincense, Pine Tar, Patchouli, Moss, Teakwood, Coffee Absolute
style: Animalic, Smoky
description: Symbolic of the wolf in Mongolian culture, Varuek translates to "wolf" in Thai derived from Sanskrit. And everything that the wolf represents- power, ferocity, unity, and instinct- all come together in this beast of a dark fragrance- a primal concoction of fiery spice, savage animalics, and pitch black resins. Campfire smoke and dark woods complete the midnight scentscape, as the fiercely animalic growl of the Thai oud, castoreum, and fur accords announce the presence of the pack, primed for the hunt. One of PRIN's most intense and animalic fragrances to date, Varuek is an unforgettable howl at the moon.

name: Anatolia Anatolia
notes: Thai Oud, Indian Oud, Leather, Loukoum, Suede, Dates, Honey, Incense, Cacao Powder, Amber, Apple, Cinnamon, Cumin Seed, Patchouli
description: Based on same formula as the original Anatolia, this new offering from PRIN has double the concentration from the original (49%!), adding more natural oud oil from his two sources in Thailand and India.  This is an extremely concentrated exotic olfactive journey to ancient times.This scent contains the same story as Anatolia, with a new and different result.

name: Naruemit
notes: Yuzu, Verbena, Bergamot, Camphor, Galbanum, Amber, Rose, Angelica, Jatamansi, Cumin Seed, Sugandha Kokila, Thai Oud, Patchouli, Deer Musk Accord (no Animal Product), Oak Moss, Peach, Geranium, Civet (no Animal Product), Caraway, Nutmeg, Cinnamon
description: Naruemit is Thai for creating or constructing something into reality. Chypre is one of my favourite perfume families and I芒聙聶d like to create as much as I could. There are many stunning and accomplished Chypre since its birth a hundred years ago. Naruemit is my interpretation of the oldschool classic French Chypre type married to my signature bold skanky animalic elements style structured with exotic herbs, woods and citrus.Naruemit is the construction of my peculiar wonderland. Like an addictive love potion between heavenly erotic flesh to the bodies of dangerous desire to reveal their voluptuous world and a paradox of nocturnal forest which always occur in my creation in PRIN.

name: Atlante
notes: Yuzu, Seaweed, Orris, Lily Of The Valley, Pink Pepper, Wet Rock, Cedar, Ambergris, Seashell, Driftwood
style: Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus, Salty / Oceanic
description: A sense of the ocean permeates all layers of this fresh, taut fragrance. Here, it芒聙聶s a primordial, mythological sea. Beginning with the form of the sea shell, and giving birth to the goddess of beauty. Surrealistically symbolic, as in the work of French cineaste Germaine Dulac, where strong desire and sexuality are never far beneath the shimmering surface. Fresh and beautiful, but not without an undertow.Atlante was a finalist for the 2019 Art + Olfaction Awards

name: Charade
notes: French Tuberose, Ylang-ylang, Styrax, Benzoin, Leather, Patchouli, Honey, Sandalwood, Amber, Vetiver, Moss
style: Floral, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: Cross and double-cross. It芒聙聶s never easy to tell who芒聙聶s fooling who when high stakes and artful chicanery are at play. The glamour of Audrey Hepburn and Cary Grant. A lingering vapour that has a whiff of classic aristocratic style mixed with the very essence of a contemporary fashion icon. Impeccable taste with a few surprises.

name: Jungle Jezebel
notes: Orange, Banana, Grape, Peach, Bubble Gum, Rose, Tuberose, Ylang-ylang, Amber, Sandalwood, Civet, Vetiver, Vanilla, Tonka Bean
style: Creamy, Exotic, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Resinous / Balsamic, Tropical / Beachy
description: Inspired by cult performer and singer, Divine, this is a fragrance with real attitude. A heady m脙漏lange of tropical fruits. The exotic sweetness is balanced with far heavier, sexy tonalities that become more prominent as it dries down. The unique combinations are unexpected and make this a fragrance that stands apart, at once memorable and perhaps even a little shocking on first encounter. Yet, like its inspiration, the scandalous first impression reveals a craft that impresses and remains memorable. One for daring people who walk their own path.

name: Leopard
notes: Frankincense, Black Pepper, Cardamom, Galbanum, Cassis, Rose, Violet, Sandalwood, Patchouli, Vetiver, Labdanum, Cetalox, Castoreum, Beeswax, Cashmeran, Musk
style: Animalic, Floral, Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Spicy, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy
description: There芒聙聶s no point lying about it: the premonition of an epic night on the tiles is inescapable. Heady excess and high drama in every note, this is the promise of scandal and privilege in every drop. Classic and classical, a noble beast signifying power and the right to luxury and hedonism. The only choice when good behaviour is not an option.

name: Scented Portfolio
description: Includes 2ml of each of Sarah Baker's whimsical, enchanting Extrait de Parfum fragrances in a beautiful presentation box:Atlante:A mermaid emerging from the sea. Real beach vibes.Charade:Big white flower with a cutting edge of rustic leather. Sophisticated and contemporary.Flame and Fortune:Indulge in the guilty eroticism of petrochemicals juxtaposed with soft white florals.Gold Spot:A spotlight on film stars who love their luxuries, indulging themselves in bed all day with broadsheets and butterscotch bonbons.Greek Keys:A yacht ride in the Greek Islands. Fresh, Oceanic, Luxurious.Jungle Jezebel:Bombastic banana bootylicious beast. Love it or hate it? We love. Join us.Leopard:Power fragrance that must be worn with shoulder pads. Not for children.Loudo:A spirited and sensual grown-up gourmand featuring oud, white chocolate, and black cherry.Peach's Revenge:Succulent fruits encourage summertime madness. Hypnotic and addictive.Riders:A torrid tumble in the stables.Symmetry:A fresh oud in perfect balance.

name: Loudo
notes: Bergamot, Neroli, Petitgrain, Black Cherry, Cypriol, Orange Blossom, White Chocolate, Laos Oud, Suyufi Agarwood, Musk, Amber, Vanilla
style: Animalic, Sweet
description: Playful and sweet with the flavours of childhood appetites, Loudo dries down to something seriously grown-up. Proustian aromas and a nostalgic glimpse of a beloved game encountered in the attic, realising years later it was the seed of your adult prowess; the sensual, sexy and clever you.Loudo芒聙聶s name is a pun on 芒聙聹oud芒聙聺, one of its key ingredients, and the Latin word for 芒聙聹play芒聙聺 or 芒聙聹a game芒聙聺, though it can also mean 芒聙聹to flirt芒聙聺 or to pull the wool over someone芒聙聶s eyes in a good natured way.

name: Gold Spot
notes: Orange Blossom, Bergamot, Neroli, Butterscotch, Dark Chocolate, Cypriol, Laos Oud, Suyufi Agarwood, Musk, Amber, Vanilla, Sweet Myrrh
style: Gourmand
description: Why be a star when you can be a legend? The spotlight imbues you with a 24 karat glow when you芒聙聶re onset. There芒聙聶s nothing more delicious than the smell of success.The gold spot is what technicians of cinematic lighting call that perfect spotlight that makes every Hollywood star literally glow. True stars flourish in its liquid sensuality. Gold Spot taps into the seductive Golden Age of cinema mirrored by equally glamorous stories of larger-than-life film stars who love their luxuries, surrounding themselves with objets d芒聙聶art, indulging themselves in bed all day with broadsheets and butterscotch bonbons. Gold Spot is the third in the trilogy of oud-based fragrances created for the house by nose Chris Maurice, using a bespoke composition of orange blossom, cypriol, and 100% natural Laotian oud and Suyufi agarwood tinctured by the perfumer.

name: Auster
notes: Star Anise, Lemon, Sweet Geranium, Clove, Cedar, Ambergris, Patchouli
style: Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Auster, the god of the south winds, is the embodiment of the hot Sirocco winds bringing powerful winds and storms from Africa into southern Europe. Late summer Mediterranean lemon groves and sweet geraniums lightly laced with star anise and cloves, transform into stormy skies with a fresh earthy base of patchouli, ambergris and cedar.An exquisite fragrance of light and dark taking your senses on a flight of fancy.

name: Trajan
notes: Mandarin, Lemon, Bergamot, Blood Orange, Lavender, Sage, Saffron, Cedar, Oakmoss, Grey Amber
style: Fresh - Citrus, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: Trajan was a giant amongst men, justly earning his reputation as one of the Five Great emperors. A man of pioneering spirit, great military strength, peace, philanthropy and virtue. His rule saw the greatest expansion of the empire across the Silk Route, creating great wealth, cultural diversity and commerce.This warm citrus fragrance traverses the Silk Route across Mediterranean citrus groves , through gardens of lavender and sage, cedar woodland with a hint of Eastern sugar and spice. Fresh, sweet, and sensual, Trajan is a fragrance for those in command of their surroundings.

name: Black Caviar
notes: Caviar, Agardwood, Cedarwood, Lavender, Sage, Rosemary, Vetiver, Patchouli
style: Green / Herbaceous, Salty / Oceanic, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: An eternal luxury. With great flourish and a fanfare of flutes, drums and trumpets, Emperor Severus served caviar to the most revered guests in garlands of roses.Black Caviar captures salty sea air, with a fragrant sage and lavender heart, grounded with the powdery earthiness of vetiver and patchouli. Elegant, sensual, and invigorating, this exceptional scent is a bold and luxurious step forward in the aquatic genre.

name: Amber Aquilaria
notes: Bergamot, Rose, Cognac, Ambergris, Sandalwood, Bourbon Vanilla, Aquilaria Oudh
style: Boozy, Floral, Floral - Citrus, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Dark
description: The best Agarwood resin, as cited throughout ancient religious scriptures, is extracted from the Aquilaria tree. Its rich cognac notes form the base of the fragrance which opens with a bright, sparking bergamot that melts into a heart of roses 芒聙聯 rich, velvet petals that mesmerise before falling into an opulent pillow of warm amber, sandalwood, Bourbon vanilla and oud.The exquisite oils and resins of Amber Aquilaria are of such rare quality that larger scale production is impossible but they can be relished here in ever more intoxicating combinations.This is a fragrance for the connoisseur.

name: Mercurial Cashmere
notes: Madagascan Pink Pepper, Cardamom And Italian Bergamot, Grey Amber, Tuberose, Violet And Iris, Oud, Musk, Tonka Beans, Vanilla, Caramel, Cashmere Wood, Cedarwood From Virginia
description: The sparkling and piquant top notes of bergamot, pink pepper and cardamom are a bright, fleeting pleasure, before the sensuous, velvety, buttery, powdery iris and ambergris heart envelops you. The base of caramel, tonka, vanilla and the slightly smoky oud and cedar finally reveal a seductive and indulgent base. Irresistibly sensuous on the skin, Mercurial Cashmere exudes luxury, seduction and charm.

name: Vici Leather
notes: Cinnamon, Wormwood, Pink Pepper, Sweet Leather Accords And Tuberose, Amber Balsamic
style: Woody - Spicy
description: VICI Leather is the latest perfume release from Electimuss London Inspired by the victory cry of Julius Caesar VICI Leather is the scent of success: it exudes luxury.This refined and addictive perfume captures the soft smokiness of a warm leather armchair in a library of leather bound books; a nightcap in a heavy crystal tumbler; and a face lit by the soft glow of a fire, surrounded by dancing shadows. The aromatic wormwood, pink pepper and cinnamon conjure a slightly bitter, boozy entrance. The fragrant tuberose carries an elegant floral dimension blended with sweet smoky leather accords and the resinous amber and balsamic base. Sophisticated and luxurious.

name: Bouquet de Hongrie
notes: Pear, Blackcurrant, Strawberry, Rose Of Turkey, Sambac Jasmine, Lorenox, Musk, Cedar, Amber
description: She芒聙聶s getting ready. It芒聙聶s a beautiful day. The sky is blue. She puts her naked foot on the floor and like a dancer, travels the distance of the mirrored hallway to the dressing table. It芒聙聶s one of her favorite spots. She likes getting pretty there. There are only flowers from the garden, and both her hands, fresh and clean. Her right hand, agile and light, grabs her powder, then a bottle of perfume. Her left hand clutches eye shadow and nude lipstick. She then moves on to the closet, where she picks a light dress and fixes a rebel strap. She slides on pair of heels and fastens a belt around her waist. Just like every morning, she walks towards her balcony full of flowers. It芒聙聶s on the 4th floor and overlooks the gardens of Palais Royal. She is happy and thinks of her day ahead, smiling.

name: Pas Ce Soir
notes: Black Pepper, Ginger, Mandarin, Moroccan Jasmine, Quince Chutney, Orange Blossom, Cashmeran, Patchouli Of Singapore, Amber Wood
description: Just like every night, Madam is getting ready in her office. She won芒聙聶t have time to go back home. She freshens up, touches her make-up: red velour lipstick, sometimes Bordeaux depending on her mood. She brushes her hair and takes her necklace out from her purse. Her white shirt slightly open highlights her inviting curves. She adds a bit more black to her eyes. She slams the front door as her heels strides on the sidewalk. Just like every Thursdays, she芒聙聶s going to the cabaret Place de la Concorde. Madam has high hopes like every night. She likes people; she loves life. She finds a stool at the bar and orders a whiskey with ice before lighting her cigarette. In the darkness, she makes out a silhouette in front of her. She turns to the side. It芒聙聶s him. It芒聙聶s always him. Their paths often cross but they never speak. She smiles, gets up and goes dancing. Alone. Men line up for her attention, she politely replies. Madam is chic, she responds. Close to 2am, a dandy looking man catches her eyes and invites her to dance. She abides but only for a short period, she leans in says she has to go home. She likes him but the morning is soon approaching. She leaves after whispering these words in his ear... "Not tonight"

name: Rouge Smoking
notes: Bergamot From Italy, Cherry Accord, Pink Berries, Black Vanilla, Heliotrope, Ambroxan, Cashmeran, Tonka Bean, Labdanum, White Musk
description: At nightfall, the sky becomes misty letting the red light of the mill glimpse through the window. The horns sound and the spirit of celebration comes to the city. In front of her mirror, she芒聙聶s getting ready and doing her makeup. It芒聙聶s time for beauty to go on stage. She goes toward her wardrobe, inspired by that tuxedo that will enhance her body lines. It is the Parisian glam, she knows it well. Her bohemian style and erotic energy leaves indelible footprints on the streets. She is Pigalle, beautiful and mysterious...

name: Gris Charnel
notes: Fig, Black Tea, Cardamom Essence, Absolute Of Iris, Bourbon, Vetiver, Sandalwood From India, Absolute Of Tonka Bean
description: Quai Saint-Bernard, near the Jardin des Plantes, the first couples arrive at the Tino-Rossi garden. As the night falls, the number of dancers increases and the bleachers fill up. Under the silver moon and the lights of the tourist barges that criss-cross the quay a few meters away, the bodies mingle to the rhythm of the music. It is then that two glances cross paths. A discreet invitation brings them to the center of the track. As if they were carried away, they dance in the heat of the night. From this hand-to-hand seduction punctuated by knowing smiles, they end up slipping away to give free flow to more carnal desires. In the early morning, the sheets give off a scent of sleepless nights, mischievous and lascivious embraces.

name: Tubereuse Imperiale
notes: Pink Peppercorn, Geranium Of Egypt, Tuberose Of India, Ylang Ylang Of Comoros, Sambac Jasmine, Iris, Jasmine Of Egypt, Cashmeran, Sandalwood, Incense Of Somalia, Vanilla Of Madagascar, Patchouli Of Singapore, Benzoin Of Sumatra, Cypress
description: Nonchalant, she walks with regular strides. The swing of her hips well rehearsed. She doesn芒聙聶t want to seem too pretty in her white headdress. Sovereign, she feigns ignorance while a passerby芒聙聶s stare fixate on her light colored turban that unfolds like a corolla. Her delicate silhouette sways proudly under the weight of this crown of sunshine: the envy of all flowers.

name: Creme de Cuir
notes: Mandarin, Bergamot, Pineapple, Pink Berries, White Suede, Sandalwood, Vanilla, Birch Oil, White Musk, Grey Musk
description: An intoxicating elixir that is a pure representation of contemporary sensuality. This perfume captures the Indian summer, when the hot days are over and the sweet freshness of the evening begins to fall. The perfume transforms like the gauzy forms of a Rothko painting, shapes suspended in space and vibrating with soothing energy. The leather is stripped down made soft and creamy. The green notes passionately embraces the musk, while the bergamot push to the skies of Italy.

name: Tabac Rose
notes: Pink Pepper From Madagascar, Plum Accord, Lemon From Italy, Rose From Turkey, Cinnamon From Madagascar, Chocolate Accord, Tobacco Absolute From The Balkans, Patchouli Oil From Indonesia, Labdanum Resin From Spain
description: A dense and potent elixir that pays tribute to the most famous of all flowers used in perfumery. David Benedek chose to work with rose in a different manner in order to unveil its atypical facets. Tabac Rose is a fragrance that expresses textures, highlighting a mysterious sensuality depicted in layers of pink, purple and plum shades. Opulent addictive tobacco, boosted by delectable plum and chocolate join forces with the majestic Turkish rose. IFF perfumer Julien Rasquinet brings contrast by adding The spicy notes of pink pepper and cinnamon. The sweet voluptuousness is prolonged thanks to the deep and mystical notes of patchouli and labdanum.

name: Citrus Riviera
notes: Moroccan Neroli, Italian Mandarin, Italian Lemon, Fig, Moroccan Orange Blossom Absolute Jasmine, Strawberry, Eucalyptus, Everlasting Flower Absolute, Patchouli From Indonesia, Vetiver From Haiti, Tonka Bean Absolute
style: Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean
description: Leaving Paris, heading south, I reach the Cap d芒聙聶Antibes. It芒聙聶s here in this white house that I find those forgotten feelings again, of the breeze that freshens the veranda, of the warmth of the steps leading to the garden, and of the turquoise water gleaming in the pool. I lie down under the lemon trees, in the shade, and scan the blue sky, where a few clouds drift, lost. The song of the cicadas is slowly replaced by laughter. The sun芒聙聶s rays stroke my face, and I am soothed; seduced by the sweetness of summer.

name: La Decouverte Parisienne
description: Bring the chic, elegant world of BDK with this trio of generous 10ml travel atomizers featuring a selection of BDK Parfums' most popular and beloved fragrances:Gris CharnelRouge SmokingPas Ce Soir

name: Velvet Tonka
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Tonka bean is an ingredient full of contrasts, sometimes reminiscent of vanilla leather, sometimes of almonds, sometimes even revealing chocolatey facets. Velvet Tonka is characterized by its trilogy of tonka bean, orange blossom and almond. It coats the skin like a delicacy dusted with icing sugar. The balmy tonka bean is adorned with almonds and rose petals for a velvety touch, and with a hint of tobacco absolute to give it a honeyed feel. In the base, addictive notes of milky amyris wood unfurl, enhanced by ambroxan and vanilla absolute for an unparalleled velvetiness and sensuality. Velvet Tonka is a tribute to the Moroccan origins of founder David Benedek and to the iconography associated with the region through its flavors and its landscapes, like a sweet, indulgent breeze coming straight from the Atlas Mountains.

name: Gris Charnel Extrait
notes: Cardamom Essence, Black Tea Extract, Fig Accord, Iris From Morocco, Cistus Essence, Bourbon Vetiver From Madagascar, Patchouli Essence From Indonesia, Vanilla Absolute From Madagascar, Sandalwood Essence, Cedar Essence From The United States, Tonka Bean Absolute
style: Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Gris Charnel Extrait de Parfum, concentrated at 30%, reveals the intensity of the original signature to extract a richer and more faceted version.The woody essence of patchouli invites itself and brings depth to the sandalwood and tonka bean, which are revealed to be more textured and warmer. Gorgeous vanilla underlines this trail, with an ambery roundness and spiciness. At the top, the green and fruity accents of fig, and the freshness and vibrancy of an overdose of cardamom, illuminate the opening of an opulent and sensual note.

name: Villa Neroli
notes: Verdelli Lemon, Neroli, Petit-grain, Orange Blossom Absolute, Rose Absolute, Vanilla Absolute, Vetiver, Patchouli, Labdanum
style: Fresh - Citrus
description: "I imagined a garden of orange trees in Capri, a garden of abundance overlooking the Faraglioni, thousand-year-old rocks eroded by the wind, the rain and the sea. When the sun is barely down, this garden takes on an air of honeyed sweetness.When I first discovered Capri, I had the strange and fascinating sensation that time had stopped. Walking on the heights of the island, under the light of the setting sun, I could see sumptuous villas. In their alleys, the bigaradiers give off their fragrant scent. For me, it is like a solar joy, between optimism and serenity. This new creation from the Collection Azur is an invitation to live the dolce vita." David Benedek

name: Ambre Safrano
notes: Saffron Accord, Black Pepper, Plum Accord, Rose Absolute From Turkey, Olibanum, Black Leather Accord, Oakwood, Sandalwood Oil, Vanilla Bean Extract
style: Earthy
description: Sensual and intense, amber is at the centre of the olfactory narrative of Ambre Safrano.. previously the Harrods exclusive and now available worldwide. Ambre Safrano explores the varied facets of this emblematic raw material. Blended with saffron, suede and woods, the fragrance transports the wearer to the burning heat of the Orient. The golden tones of the saffron reveal a leathery, velvety, gourmand softness. By combining vanilla with the sensuality of sandalwood and oakwood, Ambre Safrano takes us on a heady faraway olfactory journey.

name: Black Beard
notes: Orange, Bergamot, Petitgrain, Artemisia, Basil, Bulgarian Lavender, Geranium, Rose, Carnation, Tonka Bean, Patchouli, Moss, Musk, Leather, Tabacco, Amber
description: What comes to mind when you hear about pirates? Strong, brave, devoted men... true examples of masculinity. Black Beard is not a perfume dedicated to pirates but to what these men represented, pure testosterone. Classic, elegant, bold.

name: Transilvania
description: This word is known all over the earth and is associated with something evil, devilish, frightening... and all because of the legend of Dracula. CALAJ Perfumes wanted to show the world something else-- the positive characteristics of the vampire myth and the result is magnificent, intense, powerful, rich, deep and with a magnetism that you cannot resist. Lightness in the dark; Transilvania is to attract, not frighten.

name: The Last PH 85
notes: Black Currant, Blood Orange, Orange, Leather, Coriander, Tobacco, Oakmoss, Jasmine, Cedar, Musk, Sandalwood, Amber, Peru Balsam, Vanilla
style: Smoky, Woody - Dark
description: "This perfume is my first formula as a perfumer. A unique fact is the use of an alcohol produced naturally from plums, from my garden, according to old and traditional recipes." - A note from the brand and perfumer, Flavius Calaj

name: Room Service
notes: Mandarin Nectar, Blackberry, Pink Orchid, Bamboo, Violet, Black Amber, Musk, Sandalwood
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Powdery / Soft
description: Picture this: Greta Garbo at Carlyle 芒聙聯 a superstar who chose herself above Hollywood芒聙聶s siren song. Alone in her hotel room, attired in a drift of satin and poignant allure, waiting for her ultimate luxury: a bath of flower petals, the warm water releasing this collision of citrus and red fruits, bamboo, violet, black amber and sandalwood.

name: Purple Fig
notes: Sichuan Pepper, Angelica Seeds, Galbanum, Green Fig, Jasmine Absolute, Vetiver, Cashmere Woods
style: Earthy, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous
description: What would you do if it were your last night on earth? For Johann Friedrich Struensee, doomed doctor of the Danish court, it meant a picnic with his love and their friends on the last night before his death. As always, champagne and figs, his favorite fruit, were on the menu, as dusk turned the sky purple. Joy and tears, sorrow and laughter, a bitter sweet cocktail that lives on in this Purple Fig.

name: Basilico & Fellini
notes: Dragon Fruit, Basil, Violet, Wild Fig, Vetiver, Green Hay
style: Fresh - Clean, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous
