description: Movies with a touch of basil. The unmistakable smell of risotto bianco and a minty, peppery kick as the ultra fresh basil warms on the dish. A bon vivant who wanted to show life in all its glorious reality 芒聙聯 people eating, sleeping and making love 芒聙聯 Federico Fellini was said to request extra servings of this herb, rumored to be an aphrodisiac.

name: Poets of Berlin
notes: Blueberry, Lemon, Vanilla, Green Wild Orris, Sandalwood, Vetiver
style: Creamy, Floral, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous
description: Berlin, a city that is alive with the same kinetic, magnetic energy that attracted David Bowie for a few formative, recuperative and prolific years in the Seventies. Perpetual creative movement embodied in a bold collision of blueberry, lemon, bamboo, green wild orris and Haitian vetiver.

name: Morning Chess
notes: Bergamot, Tuscan Leather, Galbanum, Patchouli, Black Amber
style: Earthy, Floral - Spicy, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Swedish summers. Bright endless mornings in a cottage, minds battling in wit over a chessboard: the memories of a grandfather's checkmate. The ripe, green lushness of summer on the Swedish coast, where grassy notes are light enough to hint at the evergreen sharpness of the distant winter air.

name: Mango Skin
notes: Blackberries, Mango, Black Pepper, Wild Orris, Black Lotus, Jasmine, Patchouli, Vanilla, Pink Sugar
style: Creamy, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet
description: Have you ever really tasted one? With a single bite, you can feel the mango in your veins. Wild colors, endless skies and untamed happiness: breathtaking South Africa becomes the backdrop for this expressionist burst of blackberries, mango and black pepper. A ripe fruit that reveals its complex flavors 芒聙聰 a cocktail of wild orris, black lotus and jasmine that leaves behind patchouli, vanilla and a hint of pink sugar.

name: Dear Polly
notes: Bergamot, Apple, Ceylon Black Tea, Oakmoss, Musk, Black Amber
description: Distance is nothing to the heart: The scent of black tea, brewed just how she likes it, and the crispiness of morning light, slowly easing away the night that still clings to the senses. Ceylon black tea immediately warms the skin while sensuous musk simmers below.

name: Black Citrus
notes: Cardamom, Calabria Bergamot, Mate Leaves, Violet, Birch, Indonesian Patchouli
style: Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Citrus, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: The triumph of London rain. A sudden shower cooling the air: the romantic smell of London after a rainsquall when water has washed away frivolity, leaving only a zesty and triumphant breeze with a soft echo of the storm. The strength of bergamot, cardamom and violet is tempered by birch tree and a dusting of patchouli.

name: Moon Carnival
notes: Passionfruit, Bergamot, Pink Freesia, Tuberose, Gardenia, Orchid, Marshmallow, Tonka Bean, Vanilla
style: Floral - Fruity, Sweet
description: His love was a dancer whose golden skin held the scent of passion who loved tuberose more than any other flower. So he travelled the world in search of all the tuberose to fill the moon. For seven days and seven nights, the moon scattered this enchanting scent 芒聙聯 pears, patchouli, ambroxan, orris and musk 芒聙聯 across the universe.

name: Faces Of Francis
notes: Aldehydes, Saffron, Grilled Pistachio, Juniper Wood, Driftwood, Oud, Ambergris, Cypriol, Vetiver, Fumed Styrax
style: Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Amber
description: What is the artist thinking about in his studio? He thinks back to this volcanic island, somewhere in the Mediterranean. He thinks back to the colors and smells of Tangier where pistachio mixes with saffron. He thinks back to all his past or imaginary trips that still awaken his senses. Inspiration is a fantastic journey between memories and desires in the present.Faces of Francis is a smoky gourmand 芒聙聯 blending saffron, grilled pistachio, amber, and oud in a sweet composition that begs the question: what is inspiring him to create?

name: Heresy
notes: Pepper, Incense, Cedar, Sandalwood, Violet, Vetiver, Patchouli, Gaiac Wood
description: Supreme luxury is the ability to live one's truest self, unabashed and unbridled. Some might even call this the sacrilege of feeling free. In this spirit Heresy unleashes its sacred notes to spur you on an inner path of discover. An incense water evoking the long desert road of the Arabian Peninsula and of treasures carried to the foot of altars where man seeks connection to a high power. A spiritual splendor echoing the mysteries of the soul.

name: Baptisma
notes: Bergamot, Ginger, Verbena, Jasmine, Milk Accord, Neroli, Incense, Oakmoss, White Musk
description: A rite of passage, a ceremony that celebrates new life- Baptisma is an immersion in a vivacious bath of aromatic citrus, taken in the sacred hall of an ancient stone cathedral laden with smoky incense. In the purified waters, invigorating jolts of bergamot, ginger, and verbena stimulate the senses and refresh the spirit, but a smooth and soothing heart of creamy milk and lush orange blossom provide a blissfully peaceful link between the physical and the spiritual. Finally, a cool, austere frankincense base tinged with green oakmoss brings a solemn and meditative element into focus, establishing Baptisma as a scent of both playful liveliness and deeply felt maturity- a unique and unusual fragrance that inducts the wearer into a larger world.

name: Holy Stick
notes: Cardamom, Cloves, Elemi, Cedarwood, Incense, Petitgrain, Amber, Benzoin, Gaiac Wood, Palo Santo, Patchouli
description: The imagination of modern big city dwellers might take an Deep in the forests of South America, branches of potent Palo Santo incense wood are used by shamans for their most sacred and important rituals. Holy Stick takes this precious material- also known commonly as guaiac wood or lignum vitae- and builds around it a spicy incense scent of uncommon depth, invigorating zest, and exotic, uplifting spirituality. A thrilling opening of rich, sweet spice opens the composition, with cardamom and clove playing against the pine-like resin of elemi. Cedarwood enhances the sweet and woodsy aspects of the Palo Santo incense, which also feels creamy and gently smoky against supporting base notes of patchouli and amber. Rich but gentle, sexy but spiritual, Holy Stick is lusciously textured with subtle, confident sensuality.

name: Hermit Coat
notes: Elemi, Heliotrope, Ash, Fir Balsam, Olibanum, Rose, Ambroxan, Balm, Musk, Amber, Smoke, Incense
style: Smoky, Woody - Dark
description: A dark ashes clothes with an eremitic look.As a hermit coat, amber, balm and smoke cover fir balsam.A captivating fragrance with it's powerful vocation of the scent of roaming incense.

name: A Moment in Manhattan
notes: Bitter Orange, Musk, Blueberry, Lavender, Vanilla Bean, Saffron, Ambergris, Aquatic Notes, Castoreum, Cinnamon Bark, Sandalwood, Cypress, Labdanum, Wood Notes, Benzoin
description: This fragrance marks a moment of immense bliss, peace of mind and an absolute knowing. A moment of slumber where time stands still and the bed envelopes like a cloud.It is a moment in the Roosevelt Hotel. Room Service arrives. Blueberries, strawberries, pancakes, freshly squeezed orange juice, fluffy croissants, creamy coffee. Happiness, contentment and a lifetime of love to look forward to.

name: Sex and the Sea
notes: Mimosa, Pineapple, Coconut, Immortelle, Rose, Iris, Sandalwood, Myrrh, Labdanum, Benzoin, Ambergris, Civet, Vanilla
style: Animalic, Creamy, Resinous / Balsamic, Salty / Oceanic, Tropical / Beachy
description: Sex and the Sea is a combination of coconut sun lotion and sunburnt, sexy sweaty skin that suggests the wild intimacy of an erotic seaside encounter. This perfume represents the memory of such an encounter. Far from being a fresh-ozonic, harmless perfume, it is a passionate and wild concoction of overheated skin, tropical fruits and florals, the saltiness of the sea and sand, and the warm creaminess of vanilla, labdanum and sandalwood caught in the atmosphere of a flirtatious rendez-vous behind the dunes.

name: Angel's Dust
notes: Black Pepper, Mimosa, Rose, Iris, Musk, Sandalwood, Tolu Balsam, Benjoin, Vanilla
style: Classic Feminine, Floral, Floral - Fruity, Powdery / Soft
description: Angel芒聙聶s Dust is reminiscent of an elegant boudoir exuding aromas of wood furnishings, bouquets of roses, face powder and lipsticks. A combination of innocence and sophistication designed to seduce. In this dusty boudoir lost to time, a mistress tints red her pouty lips waiting for her lover to arrive. Face powder floating in the air and mixing with the smell of roses and the woody projection of the boiserie.  The softness of powdery musks to balance the decadence of sensual balsamic notes.

name: The Dark Side
notes: Honey, Spices, Iris, Violet, Sandalwood, Cedarwood, Vetiver, Amber, Styrax, Incense, Patchouli, Vanilla
style: Exotic, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: The Dark Side unleashes a warmly sensual, addictive scent which evokes the private, mysterious sides we like to keep secret. Unforgettable and unmistakable, this fragrance is a unique spicy, ambery, exotic perfume with multiple facets, inspired by the rich and mesmerizing effusion of Marrakesh's bustling streets and markets.

name: Under My Skin
notes: Grapefruit, Lavender, Black Pepper, Spices, Bulgarian Rose, Carnation, Iris Butter, Musk, Castoreum, Ambergris, Leather Accord, Costus, Tonka Bean, Tolu Balsam, Peru Balsam, Sandal Mysore, Vanilla, Treemoss
style: Animalic, Creamy, Floral, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Fresh
description: Under My Skin is the seductive creation of a soft but carnal fantasy. An emotive fragrance that radiates eroticism with just one spray. Mysterious and seductive, the core of the scent is a combination of animalic and leathery notes that are tamed by precious iris butter and exotic woods. An passionate fragrance with an intimate corporeality that wears as if it naturally emanates from your own skin.

name: Etruscan Water
notes: Bergamot, Green Tangerine, Grapefruit, Petit-grain, Basil, Carvi, Immortelle, Jasmin, Iris Root, Musk, Ambergris, Labdanum, Vetiver, Oakmoss
style: Chypre, Earthy, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic
description: Etruscan Water is a green-citrusy perfume with a sexy vibe that conveys the stunning aroma of the Mediterranean vegetation and the salty, refreshing sea mist soothing your skin from the heat of the sun. A fragrance that transports you to the South of Tuscany, where you come upon an enchanting bay by walking through the most lush Mediterranean vegetation. Your skin, warmed up by the heat of the Southern sun, while your cares are swept off by a invigorating sea breeze.

name: Tyger Tyger
notes: Narcotic Flowers, Honey, Peach Jam, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Oakmoss, Oud, Leather, Heliotropin
style: Floral - White, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Woody - Dark
description: In a Post-Apocalyptic world, a survivor of a sophisticated and refined civilization is wearing a shimmering, tailor-made dress walking through a smoky obscured place. The fine line she walks between beauty and terror further marked by her trailing scent. Her irresistible charm seduces, hypnotic with her dark and ominous gaze.Tyger Tyger is built around an accord of narcotic white flowers with sweet-fruity facets, which includes an absolute of Tuberose and like a true prima donna, this absolute is the finest representation of a refined civilization of a bygone world; in opposition to that, a menacing woody base with a burnt and leathery quality. The perfect combination to conjure up a post-apocalyptic scenario of destruction, mystery and darkness where beauty may still thrive.

name: Sticky Fingers
notes: Coriander, Cinnamon, Iris Butter, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Heliotrope, Musk, Castoreum, Leather, Tobacco, Tonka Bean
style: Earthy, Floral - Spicy, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy, Sweet
description: In Sticky Fingers, a sumptuous and elegant Patchouli is the protagonist of this 芒聙聵rock-chic芒聙聶 creation. A sparkling spicy opening then reveals leather and tobacco, all infused in iris butter. Imbued with a wild, devil-may-care attitude, that never disregards its sophisticated elegance and originality.It is an arsenal of intense, almost boozy patchouli and leather.  The dry-down gets softer and more complex thanks to a dirty iris butter which makes the whole experience all the more intriguing. Don芒聙聶t be fooled by the iris, the only romance here is the love of a rockin' reckless abandon, of tobacco leaves rolled and of worn leather jackets zipped and ready to brave the winds of adventure.

name: The Black Knight
notes: Artemisia, Caraway, Honey, Bulgarian Rose, Narcissus, Iris Butter, Beeswax, Cederwood, Vetiver, Patchouli, Oakmoss, Leather
description: The Black Knight is a gothic, intense and sophisticated perfume inspired by the historical character Giovanni Dalle Bande Nere (John of the Black Bands), an Italian mercenary captain of the Renaissance who belonged to the glorious Medici family. Reminiscent of this character's stoic commitment to his cause, his loyalty, and his Spartan way of life, this perfume captures the atmosphere of a military encampment and is further narrated by the smell of wild shrubs, the smoke of camp fire and the bridle leather of horse tacks. Later delving deeper into the soul of this stern character, a romance is revealed by the introduction of a secret mistress, a powdery rose that stirs up a heart of vetiver. The vetiver being the true protagonist of this story.

name: Unspoken Musk
notes: Bergamot, Immortelle, Magnolia, Iris Butter, Musk, Castoreum, Civet, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Cypriol, Tonka Bean, Vanilla
style: Animalic, Creamy
description: 芒聙聹Unspoken Musk is my personal interpretation of Musk. It is not a realistic reconstitution of it, yet the inspiration derives from the realistic Musk Tonkin. It embraces all memories and suggestions coming from that mythical ingredient which has thrilled and excited so many people in the history of perfumery. Unspoken Musk is definitely a symbolic perfume, which conveys the values that I obsessively seek in every perfume: humanity, intimacy from one side, passion and intensity from the other. The perfume is a gentle, dirty yet sweet concoction that will offer comfort to your mind, and embrace you in the most intimate of hugs.芒聙聺 芒聙聯 Francesca Bianchi

name: Sticky Lips
description: I created this composition as a 2022 end-of-the-year gift, to thank my business partners for the support given to our small brand. I produced a larger quantity (500 pieces), also thinking that many of our collectors would have liked it.I芒聙聶ve always loved the iconic accord of Rose and Patchouli: from the beautiful Frederic Malle Portrait of a Lady, to the seductive Agent Provocateur of the eponymous brand. Sticky Lips offers my personal interpretation of that combination, taking up the Patchouli base elaborated for Sticky Fingers: leathery, animalic, with a facet of tobacco and a hug of iris. To this one, I added a luscious and powdery rose accord, thanks to the addition of geranium and an increase in iris.One time limited edition offering.

name: Byzantine Amber
notes: Bergamot, Cinnamon, Geranium, Benzoin, Labdanum, Frankincense, Leather, Styrax, Ambergris
style: Animalic, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Amber
description: Dramatic and decadent, Byzantine Amber truly evokes a great civilization in the final phase of its splendor. Reminiscent of the unforgettably unique golden brightness of a Byzantine mosaic with sparkling frankincense, fiery cinnamon, and rich, warm labdanum, this captivating Extrait also incorporates a dark, growlingly animalic touch, hinting at the darker effects of time from which even the greatest of empires are not immune. Luminous and almost theatrically opulent, yet dark and dramatic like a grand tragedy, Byzantine Amber is a unique and majestic amber fragrance with just the right touch of melancholy- not to be missed for amber lovers of all kinds.

name: Francesca Bianchi - Discovery Set
description: A complete collection of Francesca Bianchi's fragrance lineup, in 1.5ml atomizer sprays. This discovery set includes extrait de perfumes of the following:Tyger TygerAngel's DustSticky FingersThe Dark SideSex and the SeaUnder my SkinThe Lover's TaleSex and the Sea NeroliEtruscan WaterThe Black KnightLost in HeavenLuxe Calme VoluptEncountersThe Mariner's RhymeThe Code of Emotion

name: Gourmand Bakhoor
notes: Sugar, Milk, Honey, Leather, Caramel, Bakhoor, Tonka, Vanilla, Chocolate
description: The sweetness of childhood becomes the delicacies of today. The creamy and smoky fragrances combine to form the character of Gourmand Bakhoor. A soothing, warm scent to accentuate all of your unforgettable moments.

name: Accident a la Vanille
notes: Vanilla, Sandalwood, Styrax
style: Sweet
description: Whether you like it black, smoky, thick, round, delicious, creamy or subtle, you will discover all its facets. It芒聙聶s an ode to vanilla, a fragrance of character that highlights the most popular ingredient in perfumery. An innovative blend to make you feel as if you had never heard of vanilla before. Much more than your typical gourmand fragrance, we have accidentally sprinkled other ingredients into this fragrance, all revealing their vanilla attributes.

name: Gourmand Bakhoor Dehn Al Oud
notes: Amaretto, Burnt Caramel, Vanilla, Almonds, Cocoa, Honey, Oud
description: More incense and less gourmand? Never.... Gourmand Bakhoor Dehn Al Oud is truly incensed. More than ever, with the addition of a smoky and woody Laotian agarwood oil, it is irresistible. The gourmand side is still there and slightly modified for the occasion: Scents of burnt caramel and a touch of amaretto is the new composition of this intoxicating version.

name: Accident a la Vanille - Madeleine de Proust
notes: Peach, Apricot, Coconut, Madeleine, Butter, Vanilla
style: Gourmand
description: Jousset elaborates on the fluffy buttery madeleine perfume - and stuffs it with an irresistible peach marmelade and a hint of grated coconut. This elaboration immediately reminds the perfumer of wonderful childhood memories. It was so vivid that it definitely had to be produced for the perfumer芒聙聶s new atelier in France. Rich, sweet and delectable芒聙聯 a must for lovers of gourmand perfumes.

name: Accident a la Vanille - Creme de la Berry
notes: Vanilla, Strawberry And Cheesecake Accord, Whipped Cream, Sandalwood And Vanilla; Vanilla And Styrax
description: If you're head over heels in love with the sumptuous vanilla-drenched decadence of Jousset's gourmand sensation Accident a la Vanille, you're far from alone- its rich, seductive power has reached fragrance fans in every corner of the world. And now, inspired by the global success of the original, we're delighted to announce an exclusive team-up between Luckyscent and Jousset, to deliver a new gourmand holy grail: Creme de la Berry. For lovers of indulgent desserts come to life, this is everything and then some- the luscious, buttery vanilla of the original Accident, laden with sweet strawberry and heavenly whipped cream; a divine touch of a perfect cheesecake accord providing the ultimate touch of decadence. The effect is a mouthwateringly evocative burst of nostalgia- that sugary sweet, richly satisfying "cereal milk" flavor unlike any other treat out there (Cap'n Crunch Berries, anyone?), a whimsical touch of childhood delight that you can wear all day long. It's so perfect that we'd be telling you to try it even if it were someone else's exclusive- but since it's ours, we couldn't be more thrilled to share it directly with you.

name: Gravitas Pour Homme
notes: Bergamot, Mandarin, Lavender, Coriander, Cardamom, Pepper, Patchouli, Oakmoss, Ambergris, Vanilla
style: Classic Masculine, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Created by fragrance lovers and entrepreneurs  in the United Kingdom, Gravitas Pour Homme is the ultimate fougere fragrance. Dynamic, naturally harvested lavender and mandarin orange provide bracing freshness and brightness against a heart of fiery cardamom and peppered coriander, all layered atop a smooth and masculine base of patchouli and vanilla, supplemented with sensual ambergris. Gravitas may remind you of the grand fougere scents of the past, but one sniff makes it clear- this is something special, something unique, something utterly unforgettable.

name: Chypre Fulminare
notes: Lemon, Lime, Ylang-Ylang, Orange, Pepper, Incense, Leather, Vetiver, Oakmoss, Labdanum, Castoreum, Ambergris
style: Chypre
description: A Chypre scent that showcases the exceptional talents of English perfumer John Stephen. Chypre Fulminare is a bold and dynamic scent芒聙聯 Vibrant citrus accords and ylang-ylang in the opening lead to a rich heart of pepper, incense and leather. The base of vetiver, oakmoss, labdanum, castoreum and ambergris is intoxicating and magnetic.芒聙聹Fulminare芒聙聺 is a Latin word meaning 芒聙聹to strike like lightning芒聙聺. Our fragrance is suitably striking!A Chypre style scent is characterised by citrus top notes, a cistus labdanum heart and a mossy and slightly animalic base. Here we have a distinctly effervescent opening, a slightly spicy and exotic heart and a magnificently complex and enticing base.

name: Gravitas Essentia
notes: Mandarin, Bergamot, Lavender, Mint, Cardamom, Coriander, Artemisia, Bay Leaf, Patchouli, Ambergris, Vanilla, Oakmoss
style: Fougere, Fresh - Clean
description: Gravitas Essentia is the sequel to our acclaimed debut release Gravitas Pour Homme. The strident yet refined core of Gravitas is retained with an extra level of invigorating freshness added to the composition. The note of mint gives an energising and refreshing twist and lifts the citrus notes to a new level of prominence. Bay leaf gives a distinctive and appealing green twist. The new note of artemesia brings a clean camphorous tone. If you love Gravitas Pour Homme you will likely be blown away by this amazing sequel!

name: Floranilla
notes: Tangerine, Violet, Heliotrope, Iris, Vanilla Absolute, Myrrh, Vetiver
style: Creamy, Floral, Sweet
description: The beauty of real iris is how distinctive it can be- no matter how potent the notes it's combined with, some element of its multifaceted complexity is bound to take center stage. And while Maison Tahite's extravagant vanilla absolute commands attention wherever it appears, the iris of Floranilla- a perfect balance of powdery, creamy, sharp, and smooth- is the undeniable star of this show. Tangerine and violet each add their own distinctive sweetness to the ensemble, while heliotrope accentuates the purple floral character with its touch of almond-like richness. Enveloping and sophisticated, Floranilla is as good for iris lovers as it is for vanilla aficionados- a perfect balance of rich gourmand and multifaceted floral.

name: Vanexstasy
notes: Coconut Milk, Caramel Accord, Vanilla Absolute, Balsam, Sandalwood, Cedarwood
description: Vanexstasy is an enchanting journey to Jaipur, the jewel of Rajasthan, a vision of distinctive pink buildings, bustling markets, and ancient arts. The luscious vanilla of Maison Tahite meets an exotic whirlwind of scents- rich coconut milk, mouthwatering caramel, and enveloping balsam. But the true beauty lies in the perfect synergy between the mouthwatering vanilla and sensually creamy sandalwood- among India's most precious materials. The result is an impossibly smooth and sophisticated gourmand, a ravishing journey to a magical city, and a vanilla for those who want more than just dessert.

name: Sel Vanille
notes: Sage, Jasmin, Aquatic Notes, Marine Notes, Vanilla, Cedarwood
style: Salty / Oceanic
description: The sweetness of vanilla carried on a seductive ocean breeze; a journey to the seaside with beguiling aromatics, salty brine, mouthwatering vanilla, and sensual driftwood- all enriched with an elegant touch of jasmine. This is Sel Vanille, and it's a true marvel- a vanilla for the adventurous, where a sweet tooth is less crucial than an untamed spirit. Salty and sweet elements blend with a hint of herbaceous sage, creating a rugged, sensual, gently dangerous fragrance that's devastatingly sexy on men and women alike. It's just another unorthodox, unforgettable vanilla from Maison Tahite.

name: Vanilla2
notes: Vanilla Flower, Vanilla, Praline Notes, Powdery Notes, Benzoin
description: For true lovers of vanilla fragrances, Vanilla2 is an enveloping, immersive gourmand journey that heightens the natural beauty of vanilla. A journey in which luscious, mouthwatering vanilla is accompanied by sweet praline and talcum powdery notes that rest on a resinous base, leaving behind a fascinatingly contrasting trail of bright and dark, sweet and powdered. All combined, it creates an energetic and youthful vanilla fragrance of uncommon spirit- a vanilla of bright mornings and endless possibilities.

name: Vanillade
notes: Citrus Peel, Almond Flower, Coconut Flower, Vanilla Flower, Vanilla, Patchouli, Benzoin, Musks
style: Creamy, Floral - Light, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Fresh
description: While nobody would debate that vanilla can be sumptuously sexy, Vanillade asks a different question: what if vanilla was dashing? Vanillade reimagines vanilla as a smooth, sophisticated, debonair fragrance, to be worn by suave gentlemen and elegant ladies alike, a lively blend of invigorating citrus, sweet florals, and complex resins. Miles from the cloying, plasticky vanillas of mass-market synthetic sweet scents, this vanilla is spiced, gently boozy, with a hint of patchouli-inflected earthiness, kissed with benzoin and musk. Vanillade is sexy, but leave your preconceptions at the door- this fresh, lively, wholly unique scent is the kind of sexy you never expected from a vanilla.

name: Cacao2
notes: Cinnamon, Labdanum, Toasted Notes, Cocoa, Vanilla, Cedar, Vetiver, Benzoin, Amber Notes, Amber
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: For those who love strong sensations. An enveloping and reassuring, still intensely emotional fragrance. Fully embodying the Cocoa collection, it sublimates all the nuances of this divine ingredient: cinnamon reveals its spicy side, toasted notes fascinate us, while cedar and vetiver enhance its character. Just like biting a bar of extra dark chocolate.

name: Carnal Cacao
notes: Mandarin, CO2 LMR Red Pepper, Indian Tuberose Absolute, Tunisian Neroli Essential Oil, LMR Cocoa Absolute, Ambroxan, Mosses
style: Floral - Spicy, Floral - White, Gourmand, Woody - Spicy
description: The carnal nature of Tuberose meets the gourmand sensuality of Cocoa, in an unusual association obtained through a mixture of extremely precious ingredients. Cocoa Absolute and Tuberose Absolute take us by the hand and lead us through the aromatic paths of the other ingredients, such as Red Pepper extracted with carbon dioxide and a magnificent Neroli Essential Oil. The base is warm as a hug, soft and reassuring as a cuddle.

name: Vicious Cacao
notes: Raspberry, Rose Pepper, Rum, Amber, Narcissus, Cocoa Absolute, Jasmine, Salty Caramel, Sandalwood, Saffron, Oak Moss, Benzoin
style: Floral - Fruity, Gourmand
description: A tasty fragrance that is an absolute delicacy for connoisseurs. An emotional trip through memories and a soft and intriguing caress on the skin. It's ingredients remind of those of a cake, enhanced by noble flowers and enveloping resins: Raspberry and Rose Pepper; Narcissus and Jasmine associated to a precious Cocoa Absolute; Salty Caramel and Saffron. The result is a fascinating perfume that lives on contrasts and seduces with its ability to balance them.

name: Cacao in the Sun
notes: Rose, Lemon, Blackcurrant, Raspberry, Chocolate, Iris, Orange Blossom, Lily Of The Valley, Vanilla, Sandalwood, Woody Accord, Musk
style: Gourmand, Tropical / Beachy
description: A shiny cocoa, like a tasty voyage to a scented elsewhere. A tropical island. A sunny beach, where fruits and flowers walk hand in hand with sweet and enveloping notes. A light yet sensual fragrance that wards off everyday stress and brings to the skin a carefree, holiday mood. A welcoming, pampering and reassuring perfume. A gourmand fragrance for those who love travelling with their minds芒聙娄

name: Velvet Coffee
notes: Cardamom, COCOA Absolute, Benzoin Resinoid, Cedarwood, Coffee Accord, Orris Accord, Carrot Oil, Sandalwood Oil, Oakmoss Absolute, Leatherwood, Patchouli Heart, Vetiver Oil, Vanilla Accord, Ambroxan
description: The representation of a soft, warm coffee that releases its bitter scent to reveal a delicate gourmand, milky and voluptuous aroma, with sandalwood notes and rich cocoa flavours with a touch of audacious cardamom.

name: Body Lotion - Vanexstasy
description: An enchanting trip to Jaipur, the city in Rajasthan, immersed in the millennia-old scents of vanilla absolute and precious and sensual sandalwood. A composition rich in natural and precious ingredients.Body Lotions have a silky and rapidly absorbing texture, suitable for sensitive and delicate skin too. The extraordinary properties of the almond are concentrated in the mandorlat, a milk that combines the nourishing and emollient virtues of sweet almond oil with proteins, vitamins and minerals that they contain, for an antioxidant and protective action. Furthermore, this lotion is enriched with constitutional pomegranate water, providing an antioxidant action that promotes the formation of new cells and the regeneration of skin tissue and helps the skin to defend itself against oxidative stress, and with extremely moisturizing shea butter and oil from the passion fruit, an incredible tonic and rebalancing ingredient.

name: Body Lotion - Vicious Cacao
description: A tasty fragrance, which is an absolute delicacy for connoisseurs. An emotional trip through memories and a soft and intriguing caress on the skin. Its ingredients remind of those of a cake, enhanced by noble flowers and enveloping resins: Raspberry and Rose Pepper; Narcissus and Jasmine associated to a precious Cocoa Absolute; Salty Caramel and Saffron. The result is a fascinating perfume that lives on contrasts and seduces with its ability to balance them.Body Lotions have a silky and rapidly absorbing texture, suitable for sensitive and delicate skin too. The extraordinary properties of the almond are concentrated in the mandorlat, a milk that combines the nourishing and emollient virtues of sweet almond oil with proteins, vitamins and minerals that they contain, for an antioxidant and protective action. Furthermore, this lotion is enriched with constitutional pomegranate water, providing an antioxidant action that promotes the formation of new cells and the regeneration of skin tissue and helps the skin to defend itself against oxidative stress, and with extremely moisturizing shea butter and oil from the passion fruit, an incredible tonic and rebalancing ingredient.

name: Un Bois
notes: Bergamot, Black Pepper, Ambroxan, Cedar, Papyrus Wood, Gurjum, Vetiver
style: Fresh - Citrus, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Bright, refreshing, and comfortably modern, Un Bois is a perfect everyday woods scent. Built around a perfect note of Virginia Cedarwood- clean, aromatic, and dry- this luxuriously uncomplicated fragrance supplements the spiciness of the wood with an invigorating black pepper note, the freshness with a sparkle of ambroxan, and the warmth with papyrus and balsam. The result is a woods scent that's both striking and easygoing all at once- in other words, impossible to resist.

name: Un Musc
notes: Begamot, Ginger, Amyris, Vetiver, Galbanum, Globalide, Helvetolide, Ambrettolide, Muscenone
style: Floral, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: The perfect skin musk doesn't shout. Though it has so many elements it must convey- freshness, spice, warmth, softness- it presents them all behind the scenes in a perfectly blended experience, so that all you're left with is just the unmistakable feeling of tenderly caressed skin. Un Musc from Obvious Parfums is just such a skin musk, bright and refreshing, clean and sexy, but above all, irresistibly comfortable. Who could ask for anything more?

name: Une Vanille
notes: Tonka, Black Vanilla, Globalide
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic
description: While we love an indulgently sweet and creamy vanilla, it's such a small part of what makes the real thing so compelling. Real vanilla is exciting and sensual, a blend of spicy, boozy, floral, and yes, creamy tones that feel as seductive and stylish as they do mouthwatering. Une Vanille is a vanilla scent that understands the full power of vanilla, deployed in a musky, boozy, gently powdered scent that feels like the forbidden fruit of an exotic orchid. Complex enough for grown up pleasures, but smooth enough for everyday wear, this is the kind of adult vanilla that anyone can fall head over heels for- sweet tooth or not.

name: Une Fleur d'Oranger
notes: Mandora, Bergamot, Orange Bigarade, Sweet Orange, Petitgrain, Neroli, Ginger, Orange Blossom
style: Floral - Fruity, Floral - White
description: An orange blossom with vivid, naturalistic brightness and spice to match the floral lushness, Une Fleur d'Oranger is a wholistic orange blossom fragrance that recognizes the raw beauty of the orange tree in full. Bright, fresh citrus and sweet fruit layer atop spicy petitgrain and bigarade, kissed with a zing of ginger, all surrounding lush, romantic white blossoms in a dance that moves between innocence and sensuality. Obvious Parfums has a gift for finding the luxury inherent in simplicity, and Une Fleur d'Oranger may be their most straightforward- and their most luxurious- offering yet.

name: Un Oud
notes: Cardamom, Italian Bergamote, Pink Berries, Oud Essence, Papyrus, Sage, Elemi, Virginian Cedar, Vetiver Haiti, Safron, Leather
description: The Nietzsche quote "What doesn't kill me makes me stronger" is an apt aphorism for the Aquilaria Crassna tree. This tree, when wounded, produces a resin best known as oud - a precious, mythical material worth more than gold. Obvious Parfums' latest release, Un Oud, highlights this storied sap by emphasizing its resinous and smoky facets with elemi, cedar, and vetiver. Notes of bergamot and cardamom add a cool freshness. The result is a scent that is leathery, woody, and perfectly modern 芒聙聯 an obvious choice for an easy-to-wear everyday oud fragrance.Free 9ml Une Rose - no promo code needed. Offer valid for first 16 customers that purchase Un Oud 100ml.

name: Milk and Matcha
notes: Ginger Oil, Tangerine Heart, Mandarin Oil, Matcha Accord, Orange Flower Absolute, Mate Oil, Vanilla Bean Extract, Tonka Bean Absolute, Peru Balsam Oil
style: Floral - Light, Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean
description: Created around the matcha accord, the inspiration behind this fragrance is the matcha latte. Therefore, the perfumer behind this creation used to drink her matcha tea with milk, which brings creamy and soft notes to the beverage. This fragrance will remind you of the creamy notes of sunscreen on your skin after a long day at the beach. The head notes with tangerine, ginger and mandarin oil are giving the fragrance a fresh and zesty vibe. Then, the vanilla bean and the matcha accord are making it last on your skin. Previously named Un 脙聣t脙漏, this is the first fragrance of the Obvious range that is not just based on an ingredient, but rather, a season. Close your eyes and remember your last summer at the beach. Remember the wind in your hair, the sun on your skin, the sand heated by the sun, the salty smell of the sea芒聙娄

name: Iris Chypre
notes: Bergamot, Cinnamon, Cloves, Ginger, Rose De Mai, Jasmine, Ylang Ylang, Labdanum, Styrax, Oakmoss, Patchouli, Cedarwood, Tonka Bean, Orris, Iris Absolute, Ambergris, Vanilla, Benzoin
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Spicy
description: Since French Perfumery is not complete without an Iris-based perfume, we proudly present  our first Iris based French composition.The Elixir Attar Iris Chypre seeks to revive the old French tradition of using the highest grade iris and orris extracts to give an extremely powdery musky soft feel to the perfume. Done right, Iris is best used in chypre compositions as it makes the traditional oakmoss, vanilla, and top note citruses shine in a different light.A velvety feeling engulfs the wearer of a perfume with a heavy dose of iris. In the case of Iris chypre, a big chunk of orris butter and iris absolutes is used in order to make the chypre as magical as magical can get.Unlike various perfumery materials, imitating and creating Iris in a laboratory never even comes close enough to the real beauty of Iris. A mesmerizing chypre formulation that is an embodiment of French classical perfumery at its best.

name: Mythique
notes: Whisky, Rum, Cognac, Saffron, Chocolate, Vanilla, Honey, Tobacco, Heliotrope, Frangipani, Coffee, Indian Oud, Deer Musk, Ambergris
description: Perhaps the epitome of tobacco attars- Mythique. This attar is a redefinition of tobacco attars, subtle, sexy, pheromonic, masculine, feminine, and incredibly dynamic.With golden Spanish saffron strands diffusing there aromas in this incredible perfumery masterpiece, you will get an extremely potent aura surrounding you.The attar features tobacco that was specially distilled for Elixir Attar, in addition to three different tobacco extracts, Kashmiri saffron essential oil, Honeysuckle enfleurage, helichrysum, deer musk maceration in sandalwood, Taif rose, osmanthus, brown ambergris and saffron threads (co-macerated in French honey absolute!), coffee, and more secret notes. If you seek a uniquely rich, intensely complex tobacco, your quest ends here.

name: Al Ghaliya Bulgare Fleuri Et Animalique
description: This is the second release of Al-Ghaliyah Bulgare Fleuri Et Animalique due to the high demand. Known as "The Ghaliyah of Ghaliyahs"  this perfume oil attar contains Surirankah Naya Sri Lankan Oud from Ensar芒聙聶s Senkoh series. As well, a plethora of very costly floral enfleurages, some of which are: Lilac enfleurage (uber rare), Freesia enfleurage, Bulgarian rose enfleurage, Lily of the Valley enfleurage- uber rare, Gardenia enfleurage and absolute, Pink and Blue lotus enfleurages, Tuberose enfleurage and many many more. These are the Bulgare Fleuri (Bulgarian Floral) portion of the new Ghaliyah, which also has 40% ambergris (Black and White) and musks (Nepali, Kashmiri, and Siberian).This intensely beautiful mixture of rose and flowers is balanced out by a New Zealand white ambergris, La Maison Khenata's black ambergris, and a Siberian, Nepalese and Kashmiri musk in a rare-aged Mysore sandalwood. The result is as you can imagine芒聙聯 An exploding animalism and floralacy unlike anything created- a balanced delicacy is happening and the florals become silent, mellow and beautiful in the background.Limited quantity available. The Elixir Attar perfume-attars are handcrafted and made of 100% of the highest quality natural extracts.

name: Melange
notes: Anise, Saffron, Cardamom, Hojari Frankincense, Taif Rose With Deer Musk, Boronia, Aglaia Flower, Bangladesh Oud, Cambodian Oud, Vintage Cambodian Oud (1985), Laotian Oud, Burmese Oud, Malaysian Oud, Thailand Oud, Vanilla, Ambergris, Deer Musk
description: Once we released Ghaliya Rosarie, we immediately wanted to make a Ghaliyah based on oud, and this is much different than making an all oud perfume or even a typical oud-rich perfume. Its about making a very well balanced perfume where oud is the central theme and using accessory oils that will make oud perform the best.I will not talk about the insanely rare materials we sourced or the non-existant animalics that we obtained because the reality is the more one gains experience with perfume, the more perfumery becomes more than just using rare materials, perfumery becomes this extremely sensitive balance of three things, the perfume theme, the materials used, and also maximizing the beauty of any material at hand.If Rosarie was about rose and musk, Jinko was all about oud, oud, oud, Elixir Attar Melange is about how best to use a very large amount of oud with other materials to obtain a magical oud ghaliya experience, hence the product is placed in the Ghaliya section of the website.For this Ghaliya we used 8 different tinctures the most important of which are musk and ambergris, as well as various ouds from Malaysia, Bangladesh, Thailand, and Cambodia (Cambodia 1985) which we used to sell and which came from a very special collection of oils.

name: Huaxia
notes: Sichuan Pepper, Neroli, Chinese Jasmine Sambac, Chinese Osmanthus, Musk, Wild Sinesis Hainan CO2 Agarwood
description: HUAXIA is a name that reflect many things about China, it reflects the rich culture, the ancient civilization, and the amazing diversity.Huaxia is about the floral musk elements, with Chinese wild Hainan CO2 Sinesis agarwood at the base with musk and the best Chinese florals of Jasmine Sambac, Osmanthus, and Sichuan pepper, just to name a few. The result is an amazing floral oud bouquet that pierces through the citrus top notes and lies on a bed of musk that brings it all together.

name: Santal Blond
notes: Bergamot, Cardamom, Jasmine, Sandalwood, Hinoki Bourbon, Tonka Bean
style: Creamy, Floral, Spicy, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: A sacred tree, sandalwood is a peculiar exotic wood. Once distilled, powerful velvety, creamy notes with smoky undertones are unleashed. In Santal Blond, the perfumer Lucas Sieuzac selects an exceptional natural sandalwood from Australia and focuses on its luminous facets. After a fresh and spicy opening carried by the cardamom, the perfumer pairs the smooth sandalwood with rich floral jasmine notes and warm Tonka bean accents creating a gentle and luminous sandalwood with a beautifully discreet elegance.

name: Cacao Porcelana
notes: White Cacao, Rum, Everlasting, Indian Jasmine, Light Tobacco, Davana, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Tonka Bean
description: An elegant and distinctive fragrance, carried by the choice of an unusual ingredient, the white cocoa. A rare variety, this white cocoa grows in the heart of the oldest plantations in Piura, northwest Peru. Extracted by hand from the pods, the beans are fermented before being sun-dried and roasted. In order to capture the most beautiful facets of this white cocoa, the perfumer collaborated with a French Ma脙庐tre Chocolatier to obtain the perfect roasting, thus revealing sensual nutty and milky notes, with Tonka bean undertone. After a sweet rum opening, the perfumer Marie Hugentobler unveils an addictive bitterness of the cocoa that is tamed by powdery and woody notes. A dry down of light tobacco, patchouli and sandalwood follows giving Cacao Porcelana its sensual and unique signature.

name: Narcisse Taiji
notes: Pear, Ginger Root, Tuberose, Narcissus, Absolute Of Hay And Bran, Leather, Patchouli, Musks
description: The strength and fragility of the narcissus, a fragrance between shadows and light. In this composition, the perfumer Marie Hugentobler selects the exceptional narcissus from the French Aubrac mountains. Almost 1,600 kilograms of these wild flowers, picked by local growers, are needed to produce a kilogram of narcissus absolute, with its powerful and delicate floral facets. In Narcisse Taiji, the perfumer highlights the opposing forces in this precious and multifaceted flower. In contrast to the luminous and vegetal side of the freshly picked flower, the perfumer conjures up  the dark and animal side of the narcissus enhanced by leather and patchouli accents. A perfectly harmonious fragrance that is simultaneously surprising and sensual.

name: Atelier Materi Discovery Set
description: Experience the soul and craftsmanship of Atelier Materi's collection of fine fragrances in this beautifully boxed set of 2ml atomizer samples. Discovery your favorite new scent amongst one of these intriguing minimalist and contemporary compositions.Set includes:Poivre PomeloCedre FigaliaSantal BlondCuir NilamCacao PorcelanaNew!Narcisse Taiji

name: No. 1
notes: Bergamot, Tea Leaf, Sandalwood
description: The top note is inspired by the freshness of the Mediterranean, the feeling of fresh spring air that takes you to the beginning of summer: the sea breeze, with the characteristic landscapes of the coasts of Spain, Italy, Croatia and Greece. All complemented by aromatic aspects, May rosemary flowers, thyme, lavender and sage. The notes of citrus peel, such as bergamot from Calabria in southern Italy, lime from Spain or Sicilian green mandarin also play an important part.The middle note and the body, the heart of the fragrance, is based on soft white flower effects such as jasmine, muguet, bitter orange blossom or neroli. These are combined with spicy notes and stimulants such as green pepper, cardamom and especially the smell of the tea flower with its leaves which blend perfectly with bergamot and woody, smoky notes, giving the fragrance its lingering scent.The base notes have been worked with care not to neutralize on the skin, the freshness nor the character of its floral note, aromatic green tea. Sandalwood, Iris rhizomes and White Musk add the finishing touch to a fresh, dynamic and daring perfume.

name: No. 5
notes: Floral, Amber, Sensual Musk
style: Creamy, Floral, Floral - Spicy, Spicy
description: Like an impossibly exotic and beautiful flower glimpsed only in a dream, No. 5 is a vision of floral sensuality. It opens brighly with the lily-inspired top note, which combines with spicy saffron for a burst of springtime vivaciousness. A warm, sweet amber musk provides a luscious and seductive base, ambery but still fresh, with mouthwatering supporting notes of vanilla, tonka bean, and strawberries. It may only be a dream, but it's one you can return to anytime you like.

name: No. 6
notes: Jasmin, Sandalwood, White Musk, Amber
style: Creamy, Floral, Floral - White, Fresh - Citrus, Powdery / Soft
description: Sandalwood nobility from India is the main note of this floral, sweet and soft fragrance.Opens with the delicatness and freshness of Jasmin Sambac flower and Ambar and Vanilla notes bring persistence and sensuality on the skin. A combination that will surprise the most exquisite noses.

name: No. 7
notes: Patchouli, Oud, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Earthy, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Rosendo Mateu fragrances exist at the place where sophistication meets sensuality, and nowhere is that balance of power and beauty more evident than No. 7, a devastatingly gorgeous showcase of exquisite Indonesian patchouli. Perhaps the finest in the world, this particular patchouli is taken from extremely valuable leaves extracted during a special process, wherein the leaves are dried and then re-irrigated with water and left to ferment for an especially potent distillation. Earthy, spicy, and velvet-smooth in equal measure, it showcases every aspect of patchouli in perfect harmony- truly the richest and most lovely patchouli one could experience in a fragrance at any price. But No. 7 is no soliflore, and the patchouli finds exquisite balance in a blend of precious ouds from Thailand and Laos, rich, animalic, and smooth, and the creamy, spicy, boozy indulgence of Madagascan vanilla absolute. Together they find a compellingly warm and seductive wavelength, one that invites you to get comfortable and feel sexy in equal measure, with the perfect touches of indolic jasmine and daringly carnal spice. As comfortable as it is provocative, Rosendo Mateu No. 7 is the patchouli scent of our wildest- and coziest!- dreams.

name: Khaan
notes: Italian Mandarin, Pink Lotus, Himalayan Sambac Jasmine, Taif Rose, Turkish Rose, Ruh Gulab Indian Rose, Iranian Saffron, Siberian Musk, Oud Cambodia, Rose.
description: Khaan is a creation inspired by the emperor Cengiz Khaan; a very complex perfume, rich in noble ingredients as the history of this Mongolian empire. Here we find ingredients from the four corners of the world rose of Taif of Saudi Arabia, the rose of Damascus of Isparta in Turkey, the damask rose from India, the ruh gulab, the sambac jasmine from the Himalayas, the oud from Cambodia, the Persian saffron from Kesar, the green mandarin from Italy, and of course the famous Siberian musk from Russia. Be prepared for an olfactory journey on the plains between Russia and Asia, you will be transported through the history of the Mongolian conquerors  that leaves an indelible trace as Cengiz the conqueror.

name: Hayal
notes: Lily Of The Valley, White Flower, Sambac Jasmine, Tonka Bean, Vanilla, Amber.
description: Hayal is a gorgeous fresh-floral fragrance, it is the result of a subtle concentrate of various white flowers, mainly Jasmine Sambac and Lily of the Valley.Imagine yourself in a high meadow in the middle of a mountain, there is mist, it is humid, suddenly you notice many flowers around you, mainly white flowers, they exhale a sweet smell, all this mixes with some very sweet fruity smells, a feeling of freshness invades you then芒聙娄Among the white flowers used in this perfume you will notice the pronounced presence of Jasmine Sambac which plays a major role here, it is also accompanied by a flower which will perhaps bring back many memories...: the lily of the valley which raises the aromatic side of this fragrance and which gives it this great spring freshness which contrasts with the warmth of Jasmine. After having perceived this from the start, you will perceive quite pronounced citrus notes, these are notes of tangy oranges which mingle wonderfully with lily of the valley and jasmine sambac. It is a perfume that also has an interesting exotic facet; tonka bean and a sweet vanilla that pairs perfectly with amber.

name: Qadah
notes: Mandarin, Bergamot, Powdered Roses, Balsam, Jasmine, Myrrh, Frankincense, Patchouli, Leather, Sandalwood, Tobacco, Oud.
description: I still see Qadah in your eyes (Je vois encore Qadah dans tes yeux)... At the opening, the fresh and sweet side stands out, in particular the work of mandarin coupled with bergamot comes automatically to launch the burst of freshness. The base is defined by floral rosy notes, the addition of jasmine and patchouli to soften the sensitivity. On a strong final note of sandalwood, tobacco citrus, vanilla on a hint of Oud to fix this opus.

name: Hikaye
notes: White Flower, Tuberose, Amber, Black Tea, Woody Accord
description: Hikaye begins with gourmet, sweet and floral notes. There are white flowers dancing around... The tuberose spreads its warm sweet notes.It also contains a luxurious Amber which rounds off this mixture bringing an exotic touch.Hikaye means "a story" in Turkish, and as its name suggests, this perfume is a journey to different places, It also contains black tea from Japan which brings its mysterious side to make you travel in search throughout this pleasantly peaceful journey.

name: Geranium Balsamic Note
notes: Juniper Berry, Bay Leaf, Cedar Wood, Geranium, Olibanum, Balsamic Notes
description: Beautiful memories related to grandmas became an inspiration for this mysterious and surprising fragrance. In this composition, one can discover delicate balsamic notes surrounded by essential oils hidden within the rough scent of geraniums. The combination of these contrasting aromas allow for the creation of an unusual perfume, combining enigmatic spirituality with intriguing self-confidence.

name: Vanilla Black Pepper
notes: Orange Blossom, Rosebay, Heliotrope, Olibanum, Rose, Nutmeg, Black Pepper, Vanilla, Cedar Wood, White Musk
description: Vanilla Black Pepper is an invisible streak that which brings the magical layers of emotion, fascination and devotion together. This composition reflects a journey within oneself - in order to find one's true self and the path to a life of passion. Thanks the metaphysical experience, the visionary understood what real art is and from that moment he wanted it to accompany him throughout his life. In a minimalist bottle of perfume, he captured dreams of creative passion, devotion and inner excitement. This sweet and spicy scent is very seductive and lingers on in one芒聙聶s memory for a long time.

name: Sea Salt Caramel
notes: Lemon, Sea Salt, Pink Pepper, Jasmine, Bay Leaf, Seaweed, Salted Caramel, Brown Sugar, Cedar Wood
description: The contrasting notes of Sea Salt and Caramel are like a harmonious and calm, yet penetrating and decisive gust of refreshing breeze, splattered with a few drops of thick caramel. Sea minerals and pink pepper, combined with a coquettish sweetness, evoke carefree moments and magically transport you to a world where there are no limits.

name: Coffee White Flowers
notes: Cinnamon, Cloves, Chocolate, Coffee, Cocoa, Jasmine, Golden Rum, Vanilla, Leather (synthetic)
description: The eccentric Coffee White Flowers is the scent of the impenetrable power of an intriguing combination of aromas. The sensual notes of coffee, golden rum and vanilla are joined with the delicacy of white flowers, creating an addictive combination that became the quintessence of this unique composition. The contrasting combination of intense and subtle aromas symbolize leaving your own comfort zone. Uncertainty turns into blissful peace and an intimate conversation into a soul connection.

name: Red Wine Brown Sugar
notes: Dried Fruits, Red Fruits, Blackberries, Patchouli, Red Wine, Cedar Wood, Caramel, Liquor, Leather (synthetic), Brown Sugar
description: Red Wine Brown Sugar presents notes of dry red wine, enriched with the aromas of wood and brown sugar. It is an unconventional composition that awakens the senses. The enveloping sweetness gives courage, introduces you to a world full of inspiration and self-awareness. Spicy notes of red wine open the door of extravagance and allow you to overcome all adversities. This addictive perfume will let you feel spiritual bliss from both the sweet success and the bitter path that leads to it.

name: Bohoboco Discovery Set
description: Delight in a world of contrasts and wonder, enter the world of BOHOBOCO. Discover your favorite scent from the collection today.Set includes 16 x 2ml spray sample and features:SaffronVanilla Black PepperSea Salt CaramelSandalwood NeroliEucalyptus PatchouliCoffee White FlowersOlibanum GardeniaRed Wine Brown SugarDark Vinyl MuskYellow Rose IncenseWild Carrot OudEternal Lily AmberJasmine White LeatherPolish Potatoes -new releaseMagic Mushrooms -new releaseWet Cherry Liquor -best-seller

name: Yellow Rose Incense
notes: Rose, Cloves, Cinnamon, Incense, Oud, Amber, Patchouli, Benzoin, White Musk
style: Floral - Light, Fresh - Clean, Powdery / Soft, Smoky
description: Yellow Rose Incense is an addictive combination of contrasting and surprising notes. The sharp, intense aromas of cloves are reminiscent of the thorns of the proud rose. After a while, we find enveloping, courageous, and protective fragrances, such as incense, musk and amber. The expressiveness, depth and uniqueness of the scent are emphasized by the strong scent of rose and oud from the agar tree that is grown in the desert, and, like your journey, is not easy to make. In a crystal bottle of perfume, the creator hid notes inspired by mystical nirvana, which is the essence of any creative work.

name: Wet Cherry Liquor
notes: Cherry, Liquor Note, Cherry Syrup, Strawberry, Caramel, Turkish Rose, Sandalwood, Vetiver, Tonka Bean, Vanilla
description: Wet Cherry Liquor perfume is an over-sensual, almost erotic journey into the depths of temptations and memories. It is the search for elation that brings inner rebirth. They combine the intoxicating liquor, which introduces us to adulthood of passionate sensations and the tempting cherry syrup symbolizing the beginnings of innocent delight. These feelings are kindled by caramel and a subtle hint of strawberry with a deep aroma of sandalwood and aromatic vanilla. The longing mixes with fulfillment, and the fruity power is complemented by expressive, spicy accords of wood vetiver and the intense, spicy aroma of tonka beans. The composition matures and provokes, and at the same time sensually envelops our warm, excited body.

name: Musa Paradisiaca
notes: Tuberose, Banana Leaves, Celery, Ginger, Narcissus, Ylang Ylang, Absolute Tuberose, Absolute Vanilla, Cocoa, Tonka Bean, Ambergris, Sandalwood, Civet
description: Musa Paradisiaca is the botanical name of the banana tree and a celebration of tuberose. The first imperial greenhouses, in Art Nouveau style, welcomed flora from all over the world under the imposing green domes with curved lines. Tropical plants including the banana tree with its bright green and slightly leathery leaves, from which we have extracted a bright and elegant compound. On the canvases, in life and inside perfumes, the muses have conditioned and upset the lives of great personalities and the tuberose, the white flower par excellence, is perhaps a sign of perfumer Cristian Cavagna. The construction of the fragrance starts from Gustav Klimt's gold and the Royal Greenhouses of Laeken (Brussels).

name: Boa Madre
notes: Banana Leaves, Ginger, Pink Pepper, Tuberose Absolute, Jasmine, Orange Blossom, Iris, Agarwood, Sandalwood, Musk, Costus, Birch, Leather, Civet, Ambrette, Oak Moss, Castoreum
style: Animalic, Floral - White, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Light
description: This fragrance is Cavagna's tribute to Ren脙漏 Gruau, pseudonym of Renato Zavagli Ricciardelli delle Caminate, a famous Italian illustrator.Gruau took part in the revolution that began in 1947 with the New Look: when the lines of female codes were rewritten. He joins those who are now his friends, Dior, Givenchy, Balmain, for them he created shapes and created advertisements, such as the iconic woman covered in ostrich feathers. Gruau said-"The line is the basis of all the arts: a single line can express greatness, nobility, sensuality, it is the synthesis of all sensations, the concentration of all knowledge."The lines of the Boa Madre bottle are reminiscent of the curves of ostrich eggs. The egg is the representation of the primordial seed from which it all began, its iconographic use is in all cultures. Cavagna has added to the flora of Musa Paradisiaca some fauna: elements of animalic civet, castoreum, and musk.

name: Murice Imperiale
notes: Banana Leaves, Saffron, Rhubarb, Tuberose, Coral, Petricore, Tuberose Absolute, Red Seaweed Absolute, Sea Musk (molecular Distillation), Ambergris
style: Floral - Spicy, Fruity
description: Riding the waves of the sea, challenging sea monsters, the tuberose cried in the rain and dried in the sun. It embraced a block of ambergris and danced with an absolute of red algae. It defended the right to the roots with all his might, clinging to a coral. Its petals, soaked in salt water, were impregnated with purple, obtained by the secretion of a mollusc, one of the few ancient dyes that does not lose intensity with time, but becomes brighter with exposure to sunlight. An indelible pigment, like the intensity of an Extrait de Parfum. With Murice Imperiale I tried to give a scent to the color, called Tyrian red, through notes of rhubarb.There芒聙聶s a tuberose plantation in the sea. The mermaid has made it possible to cultivate it, collecting, from the sparkling seashore, the murex and the precious flower contained in it... The tuberose is a white flower that has come from far away, carried by the waves inside a shell: its home, the casket in which it has been placed, its fresh shelter.

name: Aura Sublime
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Iris Butter, Hedione, Vanilla Absolue, Ambergris, Tonka, Woods, Benzoin, Musk.
description: Aura- in the classical languages, it meant wind, breeze, or breath. An aura is one's spirit manifested from within, the fusion of soul and body. It's only appropriate that Aura Sublime is therefore a fragrance of both vibrant lightness and deep, powerful resonance, pairing a sunrise of glowing citrus with a rapturously warm, soothingly spiced, buttery iris. Creamy vanilla, salty ambergris, and warm, resinous and musky woods combine for a long lasting base that wears with a casual glamour that gives Aura Sublime a remarkable versatility. Comforting yet completely gorgeous, Aura Sublime is the fragrance for those who know that true beauty comes from the spirit.

name: AEOM
notes: Cognac, Rum CO2, Davana, Dates, Bergamot, Orange, Rose Absolute, Geranium, Ylang Ylang, White Flowers, Cinnamon, Clove, Nutmeg, Guaiac Wood, Cedar, Vetiver, Sandalwood, Patchouli, Strawflower, Labdanum, Benzoin, Tonka, Frankincense, Vanilla, Fruity Notes, Tuberose Absolute, Thai Oud
description: AEOM (aka All Eyes On Me) is certainly only for those who crave attention. An affixed note of geranium is the prominent throughline, but instead of typical lavender it is coupled with boozy, sweet cognac and jammy dates.  Genuine Thai oud emerges in the drydown, making this all-but-ordinary scent one that will not only draw recognition, but keep all eyes affixed on you.

name: Gwen
notes: Tangerine, Neroli, Almond, Jasmine Sambac, Cedarwood, Ylang-ylang, Heliotrope, Vanilla, Benzoin, Orchid, Orange Blossom, Musk, Rum, Labdanum, Woody Notes
description: Gwen evokes the dizzying power of physical pleasures through its rich arrangement of natural and complex fragrance notes, enveloping the wearer with pure sensuality. The fragrance begins so full of sweet innocence: a subtle citrus and almond combination that first arouses interest and then rapidly transforms into a beautifully defined heart of orchid, sambac jasmine and other head-turning notes. Finally, Gwen opens up in a sea of vanilla, musk, and light woods, as well as benzoin and labdanum.A long-lasting Extrait de Parfum with an extremely high degree of purity and a seemingly boundless high fragrance concentration.

name: Thumbsucker
notes: Honey, Narcissus, Violet, Cherry, Himalayan Cedar, Bitter Almond, Styrax Balsam, Candle Wax
description: Thumbsucker was inspired by an ancient Hindu myth about a childless king who got knocked-up when he accidentally drank a magic pregnancy potion meant for his wife. He carried the kid to term, gave birth, and then this high-powered god called Indra stuck his slashed thumb into the newborn芒聙聶s mouth and fed him with the vitalizing nectar that flowed from his sacred veins. Pretty cool!Stora Skuggan芒聙聶s Thumbsucker pays homage to that nutritive ambrosia. It芒聙聶s a hypnotic honey and floral concoction with a powdery violet kick that smells beguilingly vintage. Dirty narcissus keeps things interesting, while Himalayan cedar gives the scent structure and a slight camphoraceous bite. With time the fragrance dries down to a cherry, styrax, and bitter almond mix 芒聙聯 a faintly floral, sweet, and resinous godly nectar.

name: Mistpouffer
notes: Immortelle, Bergamot, Fig Leaf, Pine, Ozone, Smoke Vetiver, Malt Sugar, Cypriol
description: A Mistpouffer, a.k.a. a skyquake, is an unexplained sound; a strange, inexplicable rumbling or crash. In Japan the phenomenon is called uminari or 芒聙聹cries from the sea.芒聙聺 In Connecticut, Native Americans called the area around Mount Tom Machimoodus, meaning 芒聙聹Place of Bad Noises.芒聙聺 Possible explanations: solar winds, shallow earthquakes, extraterrestrial shenanigans, subsurface civilizations. Early settlers in North America were told by the native Iroquois that the booms were the sound of The Great Spirit shaping the earth.Stora Skuggan spent nearly four years trying to bottle the smell of this mystical thunder, and after hundreds of failed iterations they finally landed on a formula that芒聙聶s airy, eerie, and utterly addictive. It芒聙聶s sweet, subtle smoke mixed with grassy wetlands. It芒聙聶s immortelle and marshy ozone; woody vetiver and spicy cypriol. It芒聙聶s natural. It芒聙聶s supernatural. We could blast ourselves with this stuff all day and happily combust. We won芒聙聶t. But we could.

name: Moonmilk
description: In 1555, the Swiss naturalist Conrad Gessner went caving in the Alps and discovered Moonmilk - the creamy pearlescent substance that leaks from limestone and dolomite. Moved by its beauty, he wrote, 芒聙聹At night, the moon shines into the cave so brightly the light itself seems to take form like a mist. It gathers in the ceiling and makes the limestone stalactites glitter and gleam, dripping tears of white liquid into puddles on the rock floor.芒聙聺Inspired by Gessner芒聙聶s ode to liquefied minerals, Stora Skuggan created Moonmilk 芒聙聯 a muguet scent that opens with lime and black tea. At first sniff, it芒聙聶s a bright and fresh floral; classic and tart and surprisingly green. But with wear it settles into an easy, milky concoction - a lactonic sandalwood that sparks visions of molten crystals pooling in swiss caves. It芒聙聶s a sunny scent with a nighttime shadow. Unexpected, heady, and deeply intriguing.

name: Fantome de Maules
notes: Bergarmot, Galbanum, Green Leaves, Lemon, Black Pepper, Cardamom, Cashmeran, Coriander, Forest Flowers, Lavender Absolute, Ambroxan, Cedarwoods, Habanolide, Labdanum, Oakmoss, Sandalwood, Tonka Bean, Vetiver
description: 芒聙聹Who is Fant脙麓me de Maules?芒聙聺 asks Stora Skuggan, the mysterious Swedish fragrance house whose name translates to 芒聙聹Big Shadow.芒聙聺 Good question. Maules, a French-speaking village in Switzerland, is purportedly home to a fant脙麓me 芒聙聯 a benevolent loner/spirit/survivalist who haunts the local woodlands 芒聙聯 picking flowers, cracking twigs, rustling leaves and cloaking the forest in a phantasmal veil of eeriness and intrigue.And what does this specter smell like? On first blast, leaves and lemon, quickly followed by a spicy, herbaceous mix of lavender, coriander, and cardamom. He芒聙聶s cool but hot; grassy, but with a dash of earthy, edible nuttiness that dries down to a meditative walk in the wilderness. A powdery, thoughtful, mossy wood that implores us to ask, again, who the hell this Fant脙麓me de Maules really is. A spook? An outsider? A friendly wraith? We芒聙聶re still not sure. But we芒聙聶re okay with that.

name: Silphium
notes: Cinnnammon, Black Pepper, Tobacco, Ginger, Geranium, Clove, Frankincense, Myrrh, Cedarwood, Leather
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Spicy, Spicy
description: Silphium is an extinct plant that was used in the classical era as a spice, a medicinal herb, a perfume ingredient, and as an aphrodisiac. It was highly prized but would only grow wild on the North African Coast, making it hard to get and extremely valuable. The demand for silphium eventually became so overwhelming that it was harvested to extinction, and the taste and smell of the spice was regretfully lost over time.Here, Stora Skuggan has recreated the scent of silphium through research, ingenuity, hard work, and a touch of sorcery. On first spritz we get a blast of rosy, ultra-fem geranium, along with something bright and unidentifiable 芒聙聯 perhaps that silphium accord? It芒聙聶s tart, zesty and fleeting, and is quickly subsumed by a peppery, clean scent; a spicy soapy smell that芒聙聶s distinctly masculine. It芒聙聶s a dynamic fragrance 芒聙聯 boyish and girlish, warmish and coolish, spicy and fresh. There芒聙聶s some cinnamon in the drydown that leaves us with a tender, wistful feeling 芒聙聯 prompting us to ask ourselves: what exactly are we wistful for? Perhaps a beloved, bygone miracle plant?

name: Azalai
notes: Blood Orange, Mint, Saffron, Dried Fruit, Amber, Gum Acacia, Incense, Velvione
description: The Azalai is a caravan route through the T脙漏n脙漏r脙漏 region of the Saharan desert, where camel trains have transported salt and gold for a thousand years. Along the route stood one single acacia tree, the only living thing in an ocean of sand. This was the most isolated tree in the world, 100 miles from any other.This acacia, known simply as The Tree of T脙漏n脙漏r脙漏, was the last surviving plant from a time when the desert was less parched than it is today, thanks to roots reaching deep down into a water pocket, an underground pool hidden more than 30 meters below the desert. It芒聙聶s easy to see how the Tuareg caravan riders, themselves desert survival specialists, held the tree and its amazing fortitude in the highest regard. It was considered blasphemy to break its branches for firewood or let the camels eat from the leaves.This loneliest tree in the world was one of the few landmarks along the Azalai, a sacred testament to the resilience of life that had guided caravans for centuries. In spite of this and the fact that it was the only obstacle for miles around, a truck driver that had drunkenly fallen asleep behind the wheel crashed into it in 1973 and killed it.The scent is an olfactory impression of gold, with radiant warmth from saffron and blood orange, and the glossy, luxurious musk Velvione (a material that has been described as pressing the nose to the skin of a newborn芒聙聶s scalp). Gum acacia, a syrup made from acacia sap, provides sugary sweetness balanced by salty amber and incense. A touch of mint tea and dried fruit pays homage to the Tuareg caravan riders.

name: Naviglio
notes: Marseille Soap Accord, Bergamot, Neroli, Lavandar, Petitgrain, Vetiver, Cedarwood, White Musks, Acquatic Notes
style: Fresh - Clean
description: Curved backs and folk songs. A life along the 芒聙聹Vicolo dei Lavandai芒聙聺, as riches need having pristine white shirts. The damp stone bank of the canal slowly consuming the washermen to the bone. A modern fragrance with a beautiful marseille soap accord and aquatic notes.

name: Basilica
notes: Thyme, Rosemary, Warm Milk Accord, Labdanum, Incense Resinoid, Cypriol, Cedarwood, Santamanol.
style: Creamy, Green / Herbaceous
description: In the desert Basilica, a cappella singing from the choir, echoed by the sheer stone walls. By the side altar, tiny lights of many a candle warm up the heart. Incense and candlelight, adorned in aromatic freshness.

name: Panettone
notes: Bitter Orange, Mandarin, Ginger, Carrot Seeds, Davana, Rum, Everlasting Flower Absolute, Tagete Seeds, Vanilla Absolute, Vinyl Gaiacol
style: Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: A traditional Milanese savoir-faire, doughy, buttery pastry and candied fruits anticipating the arrival of the merry festive season.

name: Piazza Affari
notes: Pink Pepper, Cardamom, Blackcurrant, Lime, Geranium Bourbon, Lavender, Cedarwood, Vetiver Bourbon, Patchouli
style: Classic Masculine
description: A classic masculine scent, done up in the casually elegant style of Milano Fragranze.  Refined, subtle notes of blackcurrant and lime are added to more traditionally masculine essences of geranium, lavender, and vetiver.  The result is incredibly Italian: laid back, yet always polished and suave.

name: Mula Mula - Extreme Red
notes: Strawberry, Raspberry, Cherry, Ginger, Caramelm Oud From Laos, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Vanilla
description: Pushed to the extreme with uninhibited sensuality, the Rouge Extr脙陋me collection evokes the ultimate temptation. Mula Mula Extreme Red applies that formula to the mouthwatering, vibrantly fruity original, opting here to push the fragrance away from the gourmand and closer to the sensually ambered direction, with a distinctively vintage overdose of patchouli to accompany the delicate yet rich Oud from Laos. Soft and extremely bewitching, Mula Mula Red Extreme delivers a pleasure both satisfyingly immense and yet bewitchingly elusive- a sensual stunner that leaves those around you always craving more.

name: The Chronic - Extreme Red
notes: Whipped Cream, Melon, Pear, Raspberry, Cinnamon, Amber, Spicy Notes, Base Notes, Sandalwood, White Musk, Patchouli
style: Creamy, Fruity, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Spicy
description: The original Chronic stood out for its dynamic version of a classic amber- a spicy, creamy, tantalizing modern gourmand. For the Extreme Red edition, Byron knew better than to just reconfigure an already perfect thing. But The Chronic Extreme Red is a brand new take on a spicy amber gourmand, one that ups the ante by balancing the warmth of the original with an impossibly bright, fresh, mouthwatering collection of fruit- juicy melon and pear alongside tart raspberry. And just to turn up the seduction factor, everything is blanketed in a layer of sinfully indulgent whipped cream. Lovers of sophisticated fruity vanilla gourmands like La Danza Delle Libellule and Lira, don't miss this stunning new addition.

name: Mula Mula
notes: Peach, Caramel, Strawberry, Raspberry, Pink Berries, Ginger, Labdanum, Amber, Vanilla, Patchouli, Musk, Oud From Laos
style: Boozy, Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet
description: An intoxicating trail of fruit, spice and rich gourmand base notes, Mula Mula is a mouthwatering journey of narcotic passion. It's a perfume from another world, a purely hypnotic and complex symphony of juicy peach and bright red berries, creamy vanilla amber, and rich Laotian oud, all sweetened with a thick ribbon of caramel. It's an indulgent recipe to be certain, but combined with such an expert touch that it never turns cloying no matter how deeply you drink it in. So go ahead and enjoy Mula Mula to your heart's content- leave room for moderation elsewhere.

name: Black Dragon
notes: Honey, Pineapple, Mango, Cigar, Bourbon Vanilla, Sandalwood Base, Patchouli, Amber, Musk
description: Inspired by Gurkha's Black Dragon, an extremely rare and treasured cigar, Black Dragon is an addictive and sensual tobacco scent with a uniquely sophisticated character. Just one spray transports you to an exclusive private club, where the aroma of fine tobacco mingles with the fresh fruit and warm sweetness of handcrafted cocktails and the smooth polished wood and supple leather of tucked-away booths where the rich and beautiful mingle among the wisps of cigar smoke. And in the long-lingering, deeply sexy base, a warm glow of gently powdered, honeyed amber smolders in the low, sultry lighting. Spend an evening with Black Dragon- we're certain you'll find it impossible to resist.

name: Musc Panache
notes: Tamarind, Mandarin, Bitter Orange, Bergamot, Cardamom, Iris, Honeysuckle, Vetiver, Patchouli, Cedar, Tonka Bean, Musks, Amber
style: Fresh - Citrus
description: Maurice Roucel wanted Musc Panache to be the antidote to the pungency of natural musk, or even the sultry thickness of his Musc Ravageur (for Frederic Malle). And wow, has he succeeded! Musc Panache is fresh and sparkling from top to toe, with a glass-like shine that almost seems to refract light. The musk here, though clearly musk, is unusually transparent.All the other notes bolster the brightness of the 芒聙聵freshly-pressed linen芒聙聶 whiteness of the musk without adding any weight or volume. The topnotes of bitter orange, Italian mandarin, and Haitian vetiver add citrusy and grassy nuances to the musk but no opacity. Tonka bean contributes a delicate almond pastry facet but zero weight, allowing the scent to fly high like a bird. Even the famous De Laire amber 83, a famous amber base accord known for its complex warmth, doesn芒聙聶t disturb its sheerness. Musc Panache, fading out on the salty brightness of sea air (Ambroxide), is aptly named 芒聙聯 men and women can wear this strictly unisex musk scent in the muggiest of heat and feel like they are the most elegant (and cleanest) people in the world.

name: Rose Rebatchi
notes: Pink Pepper, Saffron, Raspberry, Peach, Apple, Damask Rose, Turkish Rose, Iris Butter, White Musks, Sandalwood, Ambergris, Leather
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Floral - Spicy, Spicy
description: Rose Rebatchi, a rose soliflore, that will make you feel like you are immersed in a personal scent cloud of powdered rose petals. The Bulgarian rose absolute used in the topnotes lends a wet, crisp lemony greenness that calls to mind a rose freshly plucked from its thorny stem, still dripping with morning dew. In time, this crystalline rose turns richer and jammier, saffron working its 芒聙聵red gold芒聙聶 magic with Turkish rose absolute to produce a deeply velvety texture that nonetheless manages, thanks to a powdery iris, to remain sheer and elegant on the skin.Touches of juicy raspberry, peach, and apple add a light fruitiness to the rose but the focus remains that gorgeous, natural-smelling rose, extended in the basenotes by the salty-woody diffusiveness of ambergris and a big cloud of clean but intimate musks that carry the rose petals aloft like jewels on a pink silk pillow. Gloriously feminine, bright, and poudr脙漏e, Rose Rebatchi takes what can be an old-fashioned note and makes it feel vibrant and modern. An ambrosial rose!

name: Feu Patchouli
notes: Sweet Orange, Citron, Bergamot, Pink Pepper, Black Pepper, Blackcurrant, Aldehydes, Clove, Cinnamon, Pink Carnation, Davana, Patchouli, Myrrh, Frankincense, Labdanum, Vanilla, Musks, Driftwood, Caramel, Oakmoss
style: Earthy, Fresh - Citrus, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: With Feu Patchouli, perfumer Bertrand Duchaufour and brand art director Mohamed Rebatchi, decided to completely reinvent the chypre structure by taking patchouli from where it usually lurks, in the basenotes, and inverting it, so that the patchouli commands center stage from top to bottom. This has the effect of infusing the entire scent with a dry but velvety darkness that sometimes reads as moss, sometimes as earth, but mostly as deeply-spiced woods.This boozy, bittersweet earthiness is introduced by way of a real firecracker of an opening, black pepper clashing into citrus peel to create a molecular explosion that snaps the wearer to attention. Clove and cinnamon add flickers of intense heat, like the sparks from soldered metal, illuminating the darkness of the patchouli draped like black velvet over a wooden frame. A current of rum-like davana and caramel pulses underneath, adding a warmth and 芒聙聵fulness芒聙聶 that is almost but not quite sweet. Brooding and mysterious, Feu Patchouli definitely leans quite masculine but can also be worn with aplomb by women who love dark, spicy chypres.

name: Joyeux Osmanthe
notes: Nectarine, Apricot, Cinnamon, Green Leaves, Osmanthus, Tuberose, Orange Blossom, Honeysuckle, Jasmine, Rose, Iris, Musk, Cashmeran, Cedar, Amber
style: Floral - Fruity, Floral - White, Fruity
description: Joyful indeed! Osmanthus absolute has a very sophisticated apricot-skin suede aroma that, alone, can seem rather discreet. By choosing to pair it with a luxuriantly rich, creamy tuberose, and a rustle of crisp, leafy greenery, Maurice Roucel has put some color back into its cheeks, imbuing it with the healthy vigor of a jungle vine. Osmanthus pulls its own weight, of course, the leathery elegance of the material restraining the peachy, creamy-mentholated tuberose until it emerges smelling modern and well-behaved (for a tuberose).This enchanting duet of osmanthus and tuberose is delicately spiced with cinnamon, freshened with honeysuckle, and wrapped in a fine, brushed suede pouch. A cashmeran-tinged musk, cedar, and ambery notes perform the perfect supporting role here, never intruding with their own scent but allowing the succulent, peachy florals to shine as brightly as they were born to do. The rich jewel tones of the floral notes never lose their luster, making this the perfect scent for those who think that osmanthus scents are gorgeous but too wan or delicate and those who think tuberose is too vulgar. Joyeux Osmanthe is not only joyful, but the happy medium you may not have realized you were looking for.

name: Cuir Tassili
notes: Black Pepper, Elemi, Lemon, Sage, Iris Concrete, Tea Leaf, Myrrh, Leather, Patchouli
style: Earthy, Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Spicy, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy
description: Cuir Tassili is less a fragrance than it is an entire scentscape, capturing the broad sweep of aromas gathered from the Tassili desert, in south east Algeria, home to the nomadic pastoralists known as the Tuareg Aijer.
