The lemon and iris in the topnotes conjure up the acidic tang of the powdery lemon sherbets the Tuareg people ingest to cool themselves after a long, hot day out in the desert, while tea, myrrh, and black pepper notes summon the thick swirls of smoke and tannins of the black tea they brew under cloth tents.Pulsing through this fragrance like a heartbeat is that glorious leather. Smooth, herbal, and slightly rubbery (tea tannins), it is definitely suggestive of a well-worn saddle taken off a camel芒聙聶s back. However, Cuir Tassili has been rendered in such a clean, elegant style that it芒聙聶s clear that the camel itself has been firmly parked outside the tent. A dark, brooding 芒聙聵fine芒聙聶 leather with a smoky black tea accent running through it 芒聙聯 perfect for both the corporate crusader and the nomadic traveler in today芒聙聶s modern man.

name: Maison Rebatchi - Discovery Set
description: Immerse yourself in the world of Maison Rebatchi. This discovery set includes 8 x 2ml atomizer sprays featuring fragrance creations from the world's most renowned perfumers: Bertrand Duchaufour, Maurice Roucel, Karine Chevallier, Randa Hammami, Ali脙漏nor Massenet.Sampler set includes:Cuir TassiliJoyeux osmantheFeu patchouliRose RebatchiMusc panacheBois d'enfantsJasmin satinNew!Ambre Blanc - launching June 2022

name: Jasmin Satin
notes: Gardenia, Palisander Rosewood, Orange Blossom, Jasmine Sambac, Lily, Peach, Sand, Virginia Cedar, Amber, Musk
style: Floral - White, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic
description: Mohamed Rebatchi, the son of Algerian immigrants, wanted Jasmin Satin to replicate the glorious smell of jasmine drifting through the night breeze he smelled while riding his bike through jasmine fields one evening in his native land. And indeed, this scent captures the heady aroma of white flowers as smelled in nature, as one passes by vine-covered walls and secret gardens in warm, Southern cities.Though distinctly a jasmine-forward fragrance, the Sambac jasmine note in Jasmin Satin is actually but one of a whole chorus of white flowers leaping into bloom under the ripening warmth of the sun. Crisp, green gardenia and salty-creamy lily are noticeable in the warm jasminey fug, as is a marshmallowy orange blossom. Flourishes of white peach give the florals a sweet, juicy facet that feels nostalgic, while the warm, polished woods in the base 芒聙聯 rosewood and cedar 芒聙聯 anchor the fruits and flowers without over-shadowing them. Jasmin Satin is, as implied by the name, a satiny jasmine scent, but its touches of fruit, sand, and airy musks give it a fun, frothy texture that make it a great choice for those who find white florals too heavy or mature for their tastes. This is the innocence of flowers in bloom, bottled.

name: Vanille Riviera
notes: Bergamot, Galbanum, Jasmine Absolute, Ylang-ylang, Cedarwood, Vanilla Planifolia Absolute
description: Vanille Riviera draws on the memory of a floral and green vanilla, freshly harvested in Madagascar. Lightened by vegetal tones, the dark and carnal side of the pod meets the brightness of jasmine. Some woody and spicy shades highlight the sensuality of this bewitching melody.Perfumer Julie Mass脙漏 draws inspiration from her travels, which feed her creativity. She composed for Maison Rebatchi a perfume marked by her memories; those of the carnal and flowery scent of green vanilla, straight from a trip to Madagascar.

name: Istanbul
notes: Citrus Medica, Lemon Tea, Grape, Neroli, Jasmine, Pink Pepper, Geranium, Woody Musk, Vanilla, Toffee
style: Creamy, Floral, Sweet
description: The art of toffee making in Turkey is an ancient and revered tradition, a blending of sweet and aromatic syrups and natural oils. Istanbul celebrates this confectionary art by combining a rich toffee note- sweet, warm, and syrupy- with an extraordinary neroli oil distilled in the Himalayas to produce a sugared orange blossom to make hearts melt and mouths water. Lemon tea adds smoothness and an extra burst of hesperidic freshness, while the juiciness of ripe grapes and the creamy richness of vanilla coax new beauty from the gourmand accord. Unique'e puts a warning next to their notes list that Istanbul might be dangerously addictive- having now worn it, we're inclined to agree.

name: Izmir
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Mandarine, Pineapple, Rose, Iris, Clove, Tonka Bean, Vanilla, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Oakmoss
style: Earthy, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Spicy
description: An ancient city on Turkey's Aegean coast, Izmir has known its share of invaders- Greeks, Romans, Macedonians, Ottomans- but in those centuries of conflict, it emerged unbowed, a proud and historic center of culture and history. Izmir the fragrance is indeed a scent for both poets and warriors, a fierce and sensual masculine with bright, sweet pineapple, sensual spices, and a rich patchouli base. In the words of Unique'e, the patchouli, a wonderful specimen sourced from the Cava islands in Indonesia, represents "power, resistance, and the willingness to stand and fight." We're more into loving than fighting, but we can certainly vouch for Izmir's power- this is a robust and seductive scent meant for the bold and unconquerable.

name: Akdeniz
notes: Aquatic Notes, Lemon, Grapefruit, Lavender, Thyme, Apple, Pineapple, Myrtle, White Florals, Patchouli, Cedar Wood, Sandalwood, Amber, Leather, Musk, Vanilla
style: Fresh - Aquatic, Salty / Oceanic, Smoky, Spicy, Sweet
description: A vast and untamable sea of brilliant blue, the Mediterranean ("Akdeniz" in Turkish) was the center of the ancient world, connecting Europe, Africa, and Asia for trade, adventure, exploration, and warfare. While it might be impossible to distill all of that history into a single fragrance, Unique'e has done just that with Akdeniz, a singularly complex and compelling aquatic scent with bright citrus and fruit, robust spices and aromatics, and a rich leather- as if every ancient treasure that crossed the sea combined with the ocean water itself to produce the fragrance. Intriguing aromatics including myrtle and thyme pop against the salinity of the aquatic notes, while a touch of creamy vanilla emerges in the drydown to complement the smoky, robust leather. Truly one of the most exceptional aquatics we've ever experienced, Akdeniz is a jewel worthy of the Mediterranean.

name: Chocolate Makes Me Happy
notes: Dark Chocolate, Cocao Accord, Grapefruit, Mandarin, Lavender, Ginger, Cinnamon, Labdanum, Olibanum, Benzoin, Vetiver, Sandalwood, Caramel, Coffee, Musk, Amber
style: Creamy, Fresh - Citrus, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Sweet
description: Rarely does the name of a fragrance so perfectly capture its essence, but with Chocolate Makes Me Happy, that's exactly what's going on here- Unique'e has delivered a sublimely chocolatey gourmand designed from start to finish to put a smile on your face. Rather than attempting to approximate a specific dessert, this mouthwatering scent is like a start-to-finish endorphin rush caused by a perfect bite- bright, herbal citrus in the opening providing a vibrant high right out of the bottle, while the tantalizing dark chocolate note- rich, sweet, and gently earthy- gets your tastebuds tingling. A spicy and resinous heart adds an energetic dose of ginger and cinnamon, while the base of creamy woods and luxurious caramel and coffee increase the gourmand factor while simultaneously giving the fragrance enough woodsy amber sensuality to make this a scent to be worn anywhere from the pastry shop to the club. If the name Chocolate Makes Me Happy lights up your pleasure centers, don't overthink it- this is the chocolate scent you've been waiting for.

name: Crush on Me
notes: Lime, Ginger, Iris, Magnolia, Saffron, Rose, Caramel, Patchouli, Woody Notes, Musk, Amber
style: Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Citrus, Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet
description: Nothing says indulgent, romantic feminine luxury like a gourmand patchouli. Sultry and mouthwatering all at once, a great gourmand patchouli- and let's cut to the chase, Crush On Me is definitely that- can turn heads and spark desire like no other type of fragrance. From the explosively crisp and spicy lime and ginger opening to the soft, creamy, lusciously caramelized floral heart, this is a swooning, sensual fragrance that balances playful indulgence with grown-up sexiness. But it's the patchouli base- classical, sumptuous, dripped in warm, creamy amber- that takes the seductive power from impressive to unmistakable. Add in day-long longevity and elegant sillage and it's a wrap- Crush On Me is more of a full blown infatuation.

name: Kutay
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Whiskey, Davana, Nagarmotha, Starwood, Caramel, Sandalwood, Tobacco, Amber, Vanilla
style: Boozy, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: The darker side of nightlife, Kutay is a growlingly sexy midnight cocktail. It's the scent of exclusive private hideaways, of crystal tumblers full of exquisitely aged whiskey enjoyed in hidden alcoves. Against the rich, boozy, unforgettable whiskey note, a velvety aromatic texture completes the olfactory portrait with woodsy nagarmotha, smoky tobacco, and creamy amber. A fragrance for the bold, Kutay has the power and longevity to last all night- so make sure you can keep up.

name: Unique'e Luxury - Discovery Set
description: Unique芒聙聶e Luxury Discovery Set - 14 x 2ml atomizer extrait de parfumes, include:Chypre ToscanoAphrodisiac TouchWoud And MoodHidden AccordsIstanbulIzmirAkdenizSoScentificBeverly HillsChocolate Makes Me HappyBerilKutayCrush On MeMashumaro -New!

name: Hidden Accords
notes: Pink Pepper, Orange Blossom, Pear, Coffee, Jasmine, Vanilla, Patchouli, Cedar Wood
style: Creamy, Earthy, Floral - Fruity, Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet
description: Lavish, elegant, and glittering outside and in, each Unique'e scent is like a perfectly packaged gift- discovering its secrets is half the fun. And Hidden Accords, in particular, is a luxurious discovery- an alluring blend of gourmand, floral, and spice notes that intrigues with its complexity even as it nearly overwhelms us with sheer, indulgent pleasure.At the core of Hidden Accords is a mouthwatering pastry confection made of of juicy-sweet pear and warm, rich vanilla, given savory depth with a robustly earthy note of freshly brewed coffee. A ribbon of lush white florals accentuates the fruity, creamy sweetness with romantic fullness, while an intriguingly fresh note of cedarwood in the base adds the perfect contrasting touch of aromatic freshness. Each delightful sniff seems to reorient the balance between the notes ever so slightly, providing a delightfully evolving experience on skin- for a scent this bold and straightforwardly satisfying, Hidden Accords still finds ways to surprise.

name: Deluxe Travel Set - 14 x 11ml
description: For perfume lovers who want to experience the complete collection from Unique'e Luxury with a deluxe, travel spray set.14 x 11ml atomizer set includes:Chypre Toscano 11 mlAphrodisiac Touch 11 mlWoud And Mood 11 mlHidden Accords 11 mlIstanbul 11 mlIzmir 11 mlAkdeniz 11 mlSoScentific 11 mlHarmonized Senses 11 mlChocolate Makes Me Happy 11 mlBeril 11 mlKutay 11 mlBeverly Hills Exclusive 11 mlCrush On Me 11 ml

name: Mashumaro
notes: Marshmallow, Cashmere Wood, Milk, Incense, Caramel, Musk, Muguet, Rose, Praline, Vanilla
style: Gourmand, Sweet, Woody - Amber
description: You could hear the name Mashumaro and assume that the newest scent from Unique'e Luxury is a frivolous, lighthearted confection, but that's a mistake that your first sniff of this potent stunner will quickly clear up. Mashumaro is, in fact, a beast of a gourmand- warm, rich, and sweet, with more than enough woodsy, masculine DNA lurking beneath the surface to place it firmly in the pantheon of signature scents that leave an long-lasting trail deep into the night. Sensually smoky vibes start with cashmere wood, followed by mouthwatering caramel, praline and vanilla that leap to life off the skin. Finally, the blend calls musk, muguet, and rose and gets even warmer and cozier. Woody, rich, and powerfully sexy, Mashumaro is a delectable and unforgettable treat.

name: Mangonifiscent
notes: Mango, Bergamot, Geranium, Rose, Jasmine, Sandalwood, Patchouli, Vanilla, Honey, Amber, Musk, And Mossy Notes
style: Fruity, Tropical / Beachy
description: Indulge in what might be the world's finest mango perfume, meticulously crafted for those who appreciate the magnificence of mango, capturing the realistic and juicy deliciousness of its exotic aroma.

name: Al-Arabiya
notes: Saffron, Coffee, Henna, Jasmine. Bakhoor, Frankincense, Oud.
description: Inspired by the sights and smells experienced in old Arabian souks, Al Arabiya features a multi-layered ensemble of scent notes that is sure to enchant your senses. Spray some on your wrist... inhale... close your eyes. You芒聙聶ll find yourself at an old attar shop in which the aromas of frankincense and bakhoor infuse every surface - even the walls emit their sacred scents. Countless gold-trimmed glass flacons ornament beckoning shelves, their sweet, floral and spicy notes vying for attention. An incense burner sitting on the vendor's table emits a plume of scented smoke. Oud, frankincense, bakhoor. Their beauty is hypnotic.As you leave the shop, you spot people lounging outside the Gahwa cafe next door, furiously puffing away on hookah pipes. Raw tobacco, molasses, sweet figs. Inside the cafe, the counters are decorated with pastries garnished with rosewater, honey and pistachios. Waiters scurry out in single file, pouring coffee into depleted cups. You inhale deeply, enjoying the smell of Arabica coffee spiced with cardamom.Jasmine garlands hang along the arched walls of the Souq, scenting the air with their scintillating, siren notes. You pick up another strong floral-herbal fragrance and discover the source: a throng of fervent girls are crowded around a henna stall, each impatiently waiting to get her hands painted - a wedding celebration must account for their gaiety. Every so often, you pass by more attar shops burning bakhoor pellets at their doors to lure customers. More coffee shops line the alleys. Spice vendors are busy haggling and stuffing bags with cloves, cardamom, and Sabah Baharat spice blends. Their bustle adds a spicy edge to the aromas already perfuming the air.

name: Blu
description: Blu is a one of those Agar Aura perfumes that doesn't fall under a particular category or genre. Its not Arabian, French, or Japanese. And yet, the way it comes together, it forms a seamless fragrance that smells simply incredible, and utterly unique.Featuring two wild oud oils from Malaysia and Thailand, Blu contains white rose, Persian absinthe, and Indian papyrus. There's even oakmoss and vetiver. But aside from a brief appearance in the opening, all you smell is blue. Clear blue skies. Ice-capped mountains. Blue hydrangea growing at the base of a waterfall. Brilliant sunshine. Ozone.Without a doubt, Blu is the freshest, brightest, cleanest oud-heavy parfum you've ever smelled...

name: Layali
description: The oud-rose combo is just about the most common pair used in perfumes that contain oud.  But when it comes to western 'oud' perfumes, virtually all of them use synthetic oud. In Arabian oud-based mukhallats, real oud might be used but as a general rule, the lowest grades of oud are used. Then there's the addition of synthetic musks, Iso E Super, and other aromachemicals - which is standard, in both traditions.So what do you get when you blend the finest all-natural ingredients into an oud-rose combo? You get Layali. Incredibly deep oud oils were carefully blended to accentuate deep tobacco and dark leather accents, giving Layali a posh gentlemen's club vibe. You can almost picture the tufted dark leather sofas, and teakwood cigar boxes sitting on top of dark mahogany tables.One of the most difficult essential oils to work with, Davana, was meticulously fused with the ouds to produce a delectable plum brandy aroma - a note so addictive that you'll find it hard to keep your wrist away from your nose.There's no musk of any kind (natural or synthetic) in Layali, another reason why it smells very different from all other oud-rose perfumes. The blend is embellished with the most sensual white rose. The union is so seamless and perfect in every way that it completely redefines the oud-rose experience. There's oud-rose perfumes, and then there's Layali.

name: Agar Attar
description: Agar Attar is what 'oud perfume' ought to smell like.Ouds from various regions of the oud producing world were blended with precision with the aim of allowing every oud profile to play a role in the symphony, without any erratic notes jutting out or awkward transitions as the scent evolves on your skin.If you have yet to experience real, well-distilled, high quality, high grade oud oil (and your only reference to oud is what's called 'oud' in mainstream perfumery) prepare to be amazed.Boasting the most diverse array of aromatic compounds of any natural substance, oud is NOT a perfumery 'note' as it has been reduced to in mainstream perfumery. Nay, oud by its very nature is a complete perfume, nature's very own work of art. And Agar Attar is a summation of the oud experience. How there can be blueberries and blue lotus in Bruneian oud, or clementine and vanilla in Malinau oud, the addictive cola and pepper in west Malaysian gaharu, the heaven-meets-jungle-meets-earth in Papuan aloes, that heart-melting iris in Maluku sirsak, and how about the mouthwatering dried fruit in Cambodian khlem chan, the vanilla and mint in Vietnamese oud, the rugged wood and zesty herbs in Thai and Laotian kritsana, and the infamous sweet hay, leather, and sweet spices in Indian and Myanma oud... and then some... and THEN some......it is the reason why real, well-distilled, high quality, high grade oud oil is often the last step of the ladder for many fragheads, who end up falling out of love with their massive collections of perfumes.Nothing comes close to oud.Not all oud oils blend well with each other, so it was no easy feat putting Agar Attar together. What you have here is the 'universal' oud aroma that covers every brilliant facet of the gem we call oud, in a seamlessly blended perfume (with other essential oils acting as bridges between the different facets).If you're new to oud, there is no better way to dive head first into the world of oud than to make Agar Attar your launch pad. In fact, you could spray this on right before a business meeting or social gathering and no one would find it objectionable in the least. On the contrary, you might get lots of folks asking you about the source of the enchanting aura surrounding you. Agar Attar... oud perfume redefined.Note: The Oud oils in Agar Attar are sourced from Malaysia, Cambodia, Burma, Thailand, and Laos- therefore every wild oud batch is a product of nature and terroir, so subtle smell variations from batches may occur.

name: Java
description: Java is successor to our Hutan Kalimantan, an attar that was so popular that it was sold out almost instantly.An engaging composition of bright and dark, jungly and earthy notes will have you constantly sniffing your wrist as Java takes you on a journey through the tropical jungles of Java.Packed with balsams, tars, and wood oils, this is one long-lasting olfactory adventure.Its all about jungly notes. Bursting with soaring notes of balsams and lemongrass coupled with papyrus and patchouli, the top notes aren't overwhelming as deep oud, earthy vetiver, fuzzy oakmoss and dark patchouli keep them balanced. Without a doubt the key players in this composition are oud and vetiver. The contrast of bitter and sweet woody and leafy notes creates an engaging orchestra of scents that is sure to delight your nose and keep it thoroughly engaged.There is no denying that there is something comforting about the scent of wood. Or the misty air in a jungle, carrying the scent of earth, wood, and foliage. With one spritz of Java, you experience all of that.

name: Le Cheikh Boheme
notes: Oud, Coumarin, Oakmoss, Labdanum, Leather, Frankincense, Spices, Amber, Rose Otto, Mimosa Extract, Citrus
style: Fougere, Woody - Dark
description: A marriage between Eastern and Western perfumery, Le Cheikh Boh脙篓me is the spray version of Agar Aura's popular oil parfum 芒聙聹Intiqa芒聙聶ie芒聙聺 芒聙聯 Arabic for 芒聙聵eclectic芒聙聶 芒聙聯 a fusion of French perfumery with an utterly traditional Arabian core. This is Intiqa芒聙聶ie in spray format, but a strong all-natural coumarin tincture base takes it to a whole new level.To provide an engaging contrast to bright and fresh foug脙篓re facets, two oud oils come together to form the woody base. A heavy dose of oakmoss keeps the chypre character alive, and there芒聙聶s plenty of labdanum, which not only reinforces the leather note, but also flows seamlessly into the more Arabian elements. Sizzling frankincense, rich spices and ambery tones form an enchanting bed, on top of which lies the leathery and mossy chypre structure. Crowning it are rose otto, mimosa extract and citrus.Despite being a very oud-heavy perfume, you芒聙聶ll be amazed by how friendly the aroma is, which comes as a result of the careful layering of oud with other elements. It fits so perfectly into the western perfumery structure that you would feel comfortable wearing it anywhere. And yet, it has elements so exotic and traditionally Arabian that your scent trail will capture the awe and attention of everyone you pass by.

name: Malinau
description: After the immense success of 'agarwood soliflore' perfumes like Kinam Attar and Kelantan, we are excited to unveil the next installment in the series, Malinau. Together with Kinam (Kyara), agarwood from the Malinau region of Borneo island ranks as the most appealing of the all the agarwood varieties. And not just any agarwood from Malinau, but specifically Aquilaria Microcarpa species wood from the Mentarang district.Connoisseurs love it. Even folks who would consider the smoke of other varieties of agarwood to just smell like a campfire love the scent emitted by Malinau wood. It doesn't stop at the wood either; well-distilled Malinau oud oil is arguably the most universally loved oud profile. And why wouldn't it? With the unexpected blueberries and cinnamon, platters of juicy pears and melon flesh, orange-vanilla creamsicle and orris butter, a creamy woodiness that would make any vintage Mysore sandalwood envious... all this riding on chewy gummy oud resin... Malinau oud is a full perfume unto itself.The hardest aromatic facets of the wood heating experience to capture in oud oils are the cinnamon and vanilla cake notes. Almost NO straight Malinau oud oil captures these two facets accurately. So what did Agar Aura do? Instead of using plain alcohol for the base, they utilized a matured cinnamon tincture (less sharp, and creamier than cinnamon essential oil) along with an even longer aged Papua island vanilla tincture. Papuan vanilla is very different from the typical varieties like Madagascar and Tahitian vanilla beans. It's less sweet, creamier, and amazingly close to the 'cake in the oven' aroma you get from heating agarwood chips.The Malinau extrait was carefully crafted to emulate gently heated Malinau agarwood. To do so, 3 different references were used:- Agar Aura old oud oil, Royal Malinau (and it is one of the ingredients),- An unreleased sinking-grade oud distillation- heating the raw material (wood) used for distilling Royal Malinau.  Combining these three, the end result is an unbelievably accurate representation of heated 'Super King' grade Malinau agarwood nuggets.

name: Oud Fougere
description: If the ambergris doesn't hit you over the head, the oud certainly will. Although the Foug脙篓re genre marked the beginning of the widespread use of synthetics in perfumery with the ingredient coumarin, our Oud Foug脙篓re was crafted using solely nature-derived ingredients.And that includes Agar Aura's very own in-house natural coumarin extract.Oud Foug脙篓re opens with a blast of oud and ambergris alongside sparking citrus and geranium, blending into rich green foresty notes. Reminiscent of a foggy morning, fern leaves heavy with dew, intoxicating absinthe and sharp lavender provide crisp fresh overtones, further honed by the greenest Indian galbanum and betel leaf extract. The vibrant top notes are anchored by a seductive dark foresty base of oud, oakmoss, and patchouli that lasts for hours on end.If you've jumped the bandwagon and discovered Agar Aura's pure oud oils, you'll immediately realize why north Malaysian Aquilaria Malaccensis oud was the perfect choice for this fragrance. Natural, unwarped oud oil is not what most folks imagine it is. Those barnyard and fecal notes most associate with oud are the result of fermenting and rotting the wood prior to distillation 芒聙聯 something Agar Aura never does. With it's naturally jungle-green, sparkly fresh, and nutmeg-peppery flavors, Malaysian oud pairs perfectly with the absinthe to make the ultimate summer oud fragrance.As for the ambergris, Agar Aura utilized the stinkiest Irish black ambergris that would turn your tummy if you smelled it straight. But blended carefully into this fragrance, what you get is an amazing oceanic-breezy facet that pairs with the coumarin extract so well... you'd swear its impossible to achieve the behavior, performance, and 'texture' of Oud Foug脙篓re with all-natural ingredients. By definition, no mainstream Foug脙篓re perfumes are all-natural. So here is your chance to experience an utterly classic foug脙篓re fragrance that goes against the grain.

name: Yellow Kinam
description: For the *PERFECT* yellow kinam aroma, I would need agarwood from Hainan. And I insist on distilling only wild agarwood. The scarcity, cost, and logistics rendered an in-house wild Hainanese agarwood distillation it unfeasible.In the end, I opted for a wild Hainan oud oil that a Chinese gentleman crafted many years ago and insisted that I try. I was reluctant, given my high standards. But when I tried it... I was sold. I knew I had found the perfect oud oil for making Yellow Kinam.Whereas all flavors of kinam wood display some form of floral / honeyed aroma, yellow kinam is easily the most floral of them all. It's not like any specific flower, it's more pollen-y, honeyed, and something akin to the sweet floral aroma you would encounter during a summer stroll in a prairie with wildflowers.The perfect backdrop for this floral aspect is the betel-nutty bittersweetness of Hainanese agarwood (if you don't know what that's like, think cacao nibs without the chocolatey aroma), and the tannic bite of a well-steeped Orange Pekoe tea.  Some of you have already tried some of our unreleased kinamic oud oils with a brazen yellow kinam flavor. If you're wondering why I didn't use any of those oils for crafting this perfume, one whiff of the Hainan backbone will convince you why the oud here had to be Hainanese.Honeyed-floral, zesty bittersweet tea-like and woody, cooling, peppery-spicy, and with just the right amount of milky-vanillic creaminess, this perfume is the perfect representation of the most dynamic and complex kinam, yellow. Within the Japanese classification, this aroma would fall under White Kyara (not to be confused with White Kinam). Our strong tea tincture serves as the base for the spray, ensuring a wholesome and complete yellow kinam experience with aromatic high peaks and deep valleys.If you haven't tried Agar Aura's previous Kinam / Kyara fragrances, you owe it to your nose to experience Yellow Kinam. If you've already obtained the four previous installments, Yellow Kinam will be a welcome addition to your color palette.

name: Bushi no Kaori
description: In medieval Japan, among the most avid users of agarwood were the Samurai. They would scent their body armor and helmets with the smoke of agarwood before heading into battle. Bushi No Kaori is an agarwood-intensive blend created to mimic what a Samurai warrior's quarters would have smelled like just before he headed out for battle.The Rikkoku-Gomi descriptions of the various genres of agarwood as classified by the Japanese incense masters suggest that the bitter agarwood genre was associated with Samurai warriors. The scent can be described as nigai (bitter),karai (hot), and amai (sweet).This spray version of the former oil attar consists of wild Vietnamese (bitter, hot) and wild Cambodian (bitter, sweet) oud oils.Bushi No Kaori is dry, slightly smoky, and dark-agarwoody, with a touch of sweet woodiness. The blend has been garnished with a fantastic aged clove oil. The highest grade of clove oil was used by Samurai warriors to clean and maintain their swords passed down to them from their ancestors, and this tradition is upheld to this day by their descendants.The meticulous fusion of the high quality ingredients in this blend results in a powerful aroma that evokes the vivid image of a Samurai warrior, his armor well-scented and his glistening sword unsheathed.In Neriko and Bushi No Kaori, you have two very accurate emulations of early Japanese incense genres. But where the former has a very sweet and delicate aroma, Bushi No Kaori has a bolder and more serious character. Its all sophisticated composure and dignified glamor.

name: Bois Datchai
notes: Blackcurrant, Black Tea, Cinnamon, Patchouli, Cedar, Leather
style: Fruity, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Bois Datcha脙炉 is a nostalgic delight! The pop of juicy, mentholated blackberries against a backdrop of soft, smoky woods, incense, and rubbery black tea, all warmly spiced with cinnamon, puts us immediately in a Fall frame of mind. Created to summon the atmosphere of a Russian dacha in the middle of the woods, Bois Datcha脙炉 indeed does tease the senses with the suggestion of roaring fires, mulled wine, and blackberry picking in the woods with one芒聙聶s grandparents. It smells innocent, a big fruity-woody experience simply designed to invoke joy.But fear not, this is no Feminit脙漏 du Bois redux. There芒聙聶s a streak of animalism snaking underneath the berried woods in the form of a green, somewhat bitter-rubbery leather note, which adds an unexpected 芒聙聵bite芒聙聶 to the fragrance. It gives the childlike pleasure we find in this scent an adult edge that elevates the whole idea, like tearing a small rip in the fabric of that imagined forest to let the light of the modern world penetrate, if even just an inch. And it芒聙聶s this that makes Bois Datcha脙炉 a fruity-woody scent that is both juicy-delicious and elegant 芒聙聯 a rare occurrence in the fruity-woody genre, we think you芒聙聶ll agree.

name: Santal Volcanique
notes: Ginger, Cardamom, Limette, Sandalwood, Cedar, Ylang Ylang, Coffee, Musks
style: Earthy, Powdery / Soft, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Santal Volcanique is a thoroughly modern take on the spicy, musky foug脙篓re genre once populated by the likes of Gucci Envy and By (Dolce Gabbana), but now largely overridden by new tastes in masculine perfumery, which run much more towards sweet and ambery. Santal Volcanique is, however, a glorious return to form for the genre, and if anything is capable of making these rugged, manly woods-and-spice affairs the (old) new standard for masculine perfumery, then it is this.The crackle of cardamom and ginger against a bristling, sour lime in the opening immediately sets the scent down in barbershop territory, redolent of spicy shaving foam, hot towels, leather seats, and the cleansing aroma of soap. The sandalwood element veers sharply away from creamy, sweet Santalol territory, and allows itself instead to be roughened by a grainy coffee, resulting in an aromatic wood scent that is part soap, part coffee bitterness, and part musky. The complexity of the quasi-foug脙篓re structure makes Santal Volcanique a thrillingly rich, 360脗潞 experience, elevating it above and beyond what we芒聙聶ve come to expect santal anything to be. Zero cream, zero sugar 芒聙聯 this is for those who take their sandalwood like they take their coffee.

name: Rose Saltifolia
notes: Blood Orange, Pink Pepper, Rose Centifolia, Seaweed, Cashmeran
style: Floral, Fresh - Aquatic, Green / Herbaceous, Salty / Oceanic, Woody - Fresh
description: Rose SaltifOlia 芒聙聯 a portmanteau of salt and rose centifolia 芒聙聯 is the perfect name for this scent. At its center glows a pink rose of the old-fashioned cabbage variety, hundreds of petals deep and separated only by the sparkle of dew drops. But this rose is tougher than she seems. An English cottage rose, yes, but one that has shot up out of a tangle of seagrass on the salt flats of a Brittany beach. The salinity of the breezes stiffens the rose petals, giving the scent a prismatic 芒聙聵fleur de sel芒聙聶 dimension, whereby one moment you smell only the virginal softness of the rose, and the next, a floral salt dotted with dried rose petals, seagrass, and other small, hardy marine flowers.This sleight of hand does wonders for the traditionally romantic sweep of the cabbage rose, sending gusts of sea air rattling through its tightly-woven petals and lifting it up to the light. Cashmeran is the perfect foil, cradling the rose and the salt in a soft, expansive woody musk that captures the diffuse texture of the scent without diluting any of its almost aquatic brightness. Rose SaltifOlia is an evocative and stirring scent that sets a pink rose behind a cloudy piece of beach glass, ironically bringing the rose into even sharper view. Fans of Salted Green Mango (Strangers Parfumerie) and Wood Sage & Sea Salt (Jo Malone) will find much to love here.

name: Absinthe Boreale
notes: Juniper, Eucalyptus, Mint, Lemon, Lavender, Artemisia, Musks
style: Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft
description: The icy brush of herbs in the opening of Absinthe Bor脙漏ale sends a pleasurable shiver down one芒聙聶s spine, painting a watercolor of a pale Northern European sun illuminating the lacy stalks of lavender, rosemary, and artemisia that have been caught in the first frost of the season. Silvery mint, oakmoss, and eucalyptus thrum from the background, keeping the real star of this scent 芒聙聯 lavender 芒聙聯 on ice. Indeed, Absinthe Bor脙漏ale smells like you imagine it might taste. Part cocktail, part Medieval elixir, full of strange herbs and aromatics that are familiar individually but exotic when combined.But this icy foug脙篓re has a warmth and depth in the base that takes us into more familiar territory. It芒聙聶s worth noting, however, that Absinthe Bor脙漏ale never strays into the tonka sweetness of most modern foug脙篓res. Though not listed, we smell some polished woods and balsams drifting up from the base - warm materials capable of counter-weighting the more volatile notes of the herbs and aromatics up top, but not sweet enough to drown the essential herbs-on-ice feel of this wonderful foug脙篓re. If you love Boy (Chanel) but want something more ethereal, transparent, and authentically herbaceous, then we can芒聙聶t recommend Absinthe Bor脙漏ale enough.

name: Papyrus Moleculaire
notes: Coriander, Papyrus, Sandalwood, Black Pepper, Tonka, Tobacco, Leather
style: Earthy, Powdery / Soft, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Papyrus Mol脙漏culaire is addictive stuff. Transparent layers of clean, spicy wood and peppery papyrus are laid down one on top of the other until a soft green leather takes shape, an alchemy that makes you stop and marvel. The luminescence of the woods and leather is aptly captured in the word Mol脙漏culaire, as even the scent芒聙聶s heavier, more resinous materials, like frankincense, elemi, and tonka bean, appear suspended in molecules with plenty of air and space between, like the best fairy lights ever.But the Mol脙漏culaire also surely refers to the forcefield of attractiveness that settles around the wearer of this scent. Carrot seed add a mysterious muskiness to the brisk, almost watery aromas of clean leather, wood, and spice, acting as an invisible thread that will pull people closer. Tonka bean dusts the scent in powdered hay but skips the sugar entirely. Papyrus Mol脙漏culaire is not dirty, nor ambery, nor miles deep in flavor. Instead, the fragrance attracts with its ethereal cleanliness. Lumber, papyrus, and leather bleached by the sun and crushed into a dry powder that wears like a second skin. Lovers of Le Labo Santal 33 wishing for a deeper, spicier take will find their bliss in Papyrus Mol脙漏culaire.

name: Iris Malikhan
notes: Cypress, Lentisque, Galbanum, Orris Butter, Mimosa, Vanilla, Leather, Amber, Musks
style: Creamy, Floral, Gourmand, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft
description: This is an iris fragrance that takes what you think about the noble rhizome and turns it on its head. Powdery or rooty? That芒聙聶s the question asked of all iris fragrances. Iris Malikh脙垄n not only gives you both but feeds them to you in surprising ways. Galbanum resin and lentisque give the earthy orris a thrillingly green, bitter facet that elevates it from soil-encrusted root to sunburnt garrigue. A touch of blackcurrant leaf adds to the resiny, woody dryness, joining with cypress and a supple leather note to form an impression of the interior of a Florentine leather craftsman芒聙聶s atelier that has just taken possession of a pile of lambskins. This is sturdy enough to remind you that leather is the hide of an animal, after all, but not so rough that it stains the glowing purity of the orris.But if Iris Malikh脙垄n presents a complex, ever-shifting landscape morphing from root to herb to resin to leather for most of its life, the drydown sets it down firmly in a soft cloud of powder. Think woody orris roots stacked five high and across in a shed, dusted with layers of darkest cocoa powder and a powder made of crushed dried mimosa petals and leathery vanilla pods. Sweetly powdery, oh yes, but not at all like the feminine rosiness of a Guerlain lipstick or a Caron face powder. Rather, this is a pale, honeyed wood powder with a piquant pink pepper note running through it like electricity. An iris that runs from cool/green to warm/vanillic in one elegant swoop, Iris Malikh脙垄n is the rare iris fragrance that can be carried off with equal aplomb by both men and women.

name: Lys Solaberg
notes: Lily, Calamus, Gaiac, Ambroxan, Oakmoss, Cedar, Oak Chips, Tobacco, Cistus Labdanum
style: Earthy, Floral - White, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Dark
description: Lys S脙赂laberg is a lily that surprises. Instead of emphasizing the flower芒聙聶s greenness or its savory, almost meaty character, the perfumer has chosen instead to highlight the flower芒聙聶s sultry, heady facet. This then is lily on her way home from a night out with friends. Swaying a little, all the good Cognac and dark fruitcake and double cream she has ingested threatens to spill over onto her pearlescent flowers. This is an unfamiliar picture of the normally pristine lily, and we absolutely love it.The exotic hothouse feel of Lys S脙赂laberg is punctured here and there by touches of a crunchy green calamus leaf and the vegetal muskiness of carrot seed, but honestly, there芒聙聶s no real way of keeping the florid sensuality of this lily in check. That is, of course, until the woody, diffuse muskiness of Ambroxan, cedar, and oak rises like a Phoenix from the belly of the scent. There芒聙聶s more than enough power in this woody-musky finish to make lily behave herself. The transition from Christmas cake lily to the blown-out radiance of salt and air is unusual, expertly handled, and well, rather beautiful.

name: Hibiscus Mahajad
notes: Rose Damascena, Vanilla, Leather, Spearmint, Ambrette, Cassis, Cinnamon
style: Creamy, Floral, Floral - Spicy, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy
description: Hibiscus Mahaj脙隆d captures an olfactory revelation experienced by Maison Crivelli founder Thibaud Crivelli while drinking a cup of hibiscus tea in the heart of a gemstone market. Known as bissap (in Senegal) or karkadeh (in the Maghreb and Levant), tea made from dried hibiscus petals is as popular for its raspberry pink color as for its fruity flavor, but we find it also has a very grown up resinous vanilla or floral aftertaste in the mouth. Quentin Bisch cleverly accentuates this rosy, vanillic facet by draping the finest rose and vanilla absolutes produced under Givaudan芒聙聶s prestigious ORPUR label over the bow of the bright, rhubarb-like stalkiness of the hibiscus tea.But Maison Crivelli never produces a scent whose story is this straightforward. The surprise in Hibiscus Mahaj脙隆d lies in the contrast between the berried brightness of hibiscus against softly spiced leather and the cooling freshness of spearmint leaf. These contrasts are worked into the fabric of the scent allow it to subtly fluctuate between tart and candied, resinous and herbal, and sweet and sour, before it finally settles into a silky muskiness derived from the seeds of the hibiscus itself. At 32% concentration, Hibiscus Mahaj脙隆d is an exquisite extrait de parfum that pins the glittering hibiscus against a soft, luxuriant backdrop, like a jeweler placing a precious ruby on a green velvet mount.

name: Experiences Olfactives - Maison Crivelli Discovery Set
description: Sensorial explorations and unexpected adventures await with the innovative discovery selections from Maison Crivelli.  Each creation has its own inspiration and a very different olfactory signature from the other scents, making this an original present in which each fragrance is a surprise in itself.Includes the following scents in 1.5ml spray atomizers:Absinthe BorealePapyrus MoleculaireIris MalikhanSantal VolcaniqueRose SaltifoliaNeroli NasimbaBois DatchaiLys Solaberg

name: Patchouli Magnetik
notes: Patchouli, Gardenia, Sandalwood, Orupur Benzoin, Amber
style: Woody - Spicy
description: Maison Crivelli invites you to smell patchouli in a way that you never have before.Thibaud Crivelli was inspired by his motorcycle expedition through patchouli plantations, during which he encountered a tropical storm.  He was struck by the cacophony of scent that arose during the downpour, and sought Master Perfumer Quentin Bisch to bottle the experience.Created in a 33% Extrait concentration, Patchouli Magnetik is lead by a soft, humid patchouli essence, resting on a bed of milky sandalwood.  Lingering above is a lush gardenia accord--green and solar, blooming with the sun shining through the rain clouds.We have been profoundly struck by Patchouli Magnetik, all at once calming and electrifying.  A milky, woody, floral-tinged beauty, newcomers and veterans of patchouli alike are sure to be swept away by it's tropical storm.

name: Ambre Chromatique
notes: Incense Essential Oil, Pink Peppercorn, Davana Essential Oil, Osmanthus Absolute, Benzoin Absolute, Bourbon Vanilla Absolute, Akigala Wood.
style: Woody Ambery Floral
description: A perfume extract that was inspired by a trek through multicolored jungles in search of benzoin resin. It sees the lively and spicy facets of incense and pink peppercorn contrast with the sensual warmth of an amber accord, offering an endlessly elegant trail.

name: Oud Maracuja
notes: Passionfruit, Rose, Oud, Patchouli, Benzoin, Vanilla, Leather, Akigalawood
description: Oud Maracuj脙隆 takes you to the heart of an oud wood forest and presents you with an exotic contrast between the thirst-quenching freshness of passion fruit and the tropical heat of oud wood. This unique accord is enhanced by the lushness of saffron, Indonesian patchouli and leather, then softened by benzoin from Laos and a duo of Turkish rose and vanilla absolutes.

name: Jazz Club
notes: Pink Pepper, Neroli, Lemon, Rum, Java Vetiver Oil, Clary Sage, Tobacco Leaf, Vanilla Bean, Styrax
style: Boozy, Masculine, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: With a smooth groove of pink pepper, rum, vetiver and tobacco leaf, Jazz Club is a parfum of chic and heady cocktails, honey and woody notes of cigar boxes. It captures the image of cracked leather bar stools, well-worn armchairs and the piano where unfinished drinks are left to waft their liquory notes.The silhouette of each Replica bottle is inspired by classic apothecary jars, allowing the collection to be instantly identifiable.

name: By The Fireplace
notes: Cloves, Pink Pepper, Orange Blossom, Chestnut, Guaiac Wood, Juniper, Vanilla, Peru Balsam, Cashmeran
style: Boozy, Smoky, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: The warm, woody scent of a fireplace burning brightly, crackling against a backdrop of a snowy day comes to life in this scent. Spicy notes of pink pepper and clove oil blend with chestnut and cashmeran, evoking the warmth of a winter morning. Subtle orange flower and vanilla notes are layered atop the woody base, adding a subtle sweetness to the scent.The silhouette of each Replica bottle is inspired by classic apothecary jars, allowing the collection to be instantly identifiable.

name: Beach Walk
notes: Lemon, Bergamot, Pink Pepper, Coconut Milk, Ylang-Ylang, Heliotrope, Musk, Benzoin, Cedar
style: Fresh - Aquatic, Skin Scent / Minimal, Tropical / Beachy
description: A stroll along the ocean. Feet sink into the sand. Waves brush the skin. The sun at its zenith radiates the beach. Beach Walk captures the memory of a summer day with notes of bergamot, ylang-ylang, heliotrope and musk.The silhouette of each Replica bottle is inspired by classic apothecary jars, allowing the collection to be instantly identifiable.

name: Lazy Sunday Morning
notes: Aldehydes, Lily-of-the-Valley, Pear, Rose, Iris, Orange Blossom, White Musk, Ambrette, Indian Patchouli Leaf
style: Floral - Light, Fresh - Clean, Powdery / Soft, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: Lazy Sunday Morning captures the feeling of silky skin, crumbled linens and the reassuring scent of clean laundry. Notes of pear, lily of the valley, iris and musk mingle to evoke a sense of ease and time that stands still.The silhouette of each Replica bottle is inspired by classic apothecary jars, allowing the collection to be instantly identifiable.

name: Under the Lemon Trees
notes: Lime, Petitgrain, Cardamom, Green Tea, Mate, Coriander, White Musk, Cedar, Rock Rose
style: Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean
description: Take a nap under the lemon trees, lulled by shadows and the warm Mediterranean wind. Under the Lemon Trees is alive in fresh scents of cypresses and lemon trees.The silhouette of each Replica bottle is inspired by classic apothecary jars, allowing the collection to be instantly identifiable.

name: Sailing Day
notes: Sea Notes, Aldehydes, Red Pepper, Coriander, Juniper, Amyl Salicylate, Iris, Rose, Seaweed, Cedar, Ambergris, Amberwood
style: Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Clean, Salty / Oceanic
description: Savor the freshness of the ocean spray with notes of juniper essence and a unique aquatic accord. The invigorating rose super essence combines with the sharp adrenaline rush of iris and coriander, while grounding notes of red seaweed essence and salty ambergris complete the scent.The silhouette of each Replica bottle is inspired by classic apothecary jars, allowing the collection to be instantly identifiable.

name: Annabel's Birthday Cake
notes: Heliotrope, Lemon Sugar, Balloons, Candied Rose Petals, Tuberose Frosting, Cake-Fresh-Out-The-Oven, Honeycomb, Roasted Tonka, Cocoa Absolute
style: Skin Scent / Minimal, Sweet
description: Created by Marissa Zappas in collaboration with Astrologer Annabel Gat, born one day apart, this Aries duo set out to create an elevated and ethereal cake perfume. Whimsical and otherworldly, this scent is meant to be enjoyed in celebration of sweetness, years gone by and birthdays. Rich tuberose frosting combined with candied rose petals on a bed of fluffy white cake, it's at once decadent and ethereal. Don芒聙聶t be fooled, this is not an overly-sugary scent, but rather a nod to the smell of fresh cake, combined with tuberose and rose. Warm, bready, blossoming, pastel.

name: Flaming Creature
notes: Pink Peppercorn, Juniper, Orange Ring Pop, Night-Blooming Jasmine, Wormwood, Sandalwood, Cedarwood, Smoke, Patchouli, Rum
description: Created by Marissa Zappas in collaboration with poet M. Elizabeth Scott, Flaming Creature is a narcotic, hazy evocation of 芒聙聯 and ode to 芒聙聯 American filmmaker Jack Smith's (1932 - 1989) best-known work, the entrancingly disjointed Flaming Creatures. Feral first breaths of night-blooming jasmine and pink peppercorn give way to a subtle base of smoldering wormwood, patchouli and musk.

name: Violette Hay
notes: Carrot Seed, Coriander, Apricot, Violet, Saffron, Suede, Hay, Musk
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Powdery / Soft
description: Created in collaboration with the designer Violette Hay, this fragrance is a modernized ode to the violet flower. While it does contain hints of parma violet, it芒聙聶s main focus is a hay-like suede note, with apricot undertones. This is not a sweet fragrance and it芒聙聶s velvety texture stays fairly close to the skin. Soft, pixie-like, natural, golden.Each fragrance in The Garden Collection evokes an aspect of a secret garden: cold stone, flowers budding and dried, strewn about tea leaves and tarot cards, and a locked wooden gate.

name: Petrichor
notes: Damp Earth, Lemon, Immortelle, Orris, Vetiver, Ambergris, Sandalwood, Moss, Musk
description: Petrichor is an ode to orris, but not in the typical fashion. It芒聙聶s reminiscent of cold, wet dirt, while at the same time carrying a specific luminescence. There is a rooty and shimmering effect, undeniably like the scent of fresh rain on dirt and cold stone. Conceptual, cold, dry, powdery, dramatic and avant-garde.Each fragrance in The Garden Collection evokes an aspect of a secret garden: cold stone, flowers budding and dried, strewn about tea leaves and tarot cards, and a locked wooden gate.

name: The Sun Card
notes: Heliotrope, Sweet Orange, Hay, Frangipani, Sheer Amber
description: Pull back the silk curtains and the smell of frangipani flowers strewn about on the tarot reader芒聙聶s table invites you in. As she reveals cards, scent memories of fresh hay, amber and sweet orange come to the fore. Heliotrope and spices perfume the air as she pulls the final card, the Sun. She tells you it芒聙聶s an omen of vitality, confidence, and abundance: the sun芒聙聶s gift is a joyous celebration. Ceremonial, regal, fresh.Each fragrance in The Garden Collection evokes an aspect of a secret garden: cold stone, flowers budding and dried, strewn about tea leaves and tarot cards, and a locked wooden gate.

name: La Divina
notes: Rose, Cassis, Poplar Buds, Velvet Musk, Oakmoss, Sandalwood
description: Imperia La Divina was the first Roman courtesan to achieve celebrity status, but it was her intelligence, charm and confidence which gave her full rise to fame. She would only offer her services to those who could pay large sums of money and also provide "good spirit"  - her number one requirement. She was known to stand and pose in her window, charging onlookers to walk down the street and gaze upon her. Many legends surround her death, but her funeral party was the largest party Rome had ever seen, financed by one of her lovers, Agostino Chigi. La Divina is a marble bust of a rose, at once inviting and boundaried, nuanced yet clear, and elegant and powerful.

name: Queen Nzinga
notes: Geranium, Tamarind, Amber
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Spicy
description: This perfume is an olfactive portrait of Queen Nzinga (1583-1663) of the Ndongo and Matamba Kingdoms in present-day Angola. Queen Nzinga was a brilliant military strategist and true queen of the people, often fighting on the front lines in battle. Her troops defeated the Portuguese colonists on multiple occasions. The notes reflect her complexity, regality and warmth. Queen Nzinga is a uniquely seductive bright, spicy amber fragrance with a slightly powdery and warm dry down. The notes reflect her tenacity and regality.

name: Ching Shih
notes: Spices, Osmanthus, Orris, Incense, Gunpowder, Myrrh
style: Floral - Spicy, Smoky, Woody - Light
description: This perfume is an olfactive portrait of Ching Shih (1775-1844) who is widely considered to be one of the most powerful pirates of all time. She ran a fleet known as the "Red Flag Fleet" of 70-80k pirates, evading the Chinese government for decades. She finally surrendered herself in her older age for a lump sum of money and negotiated so that she and her troops could keep the treasure they had earned and walk away unscathed. She used her reward money to open a gambling casino, which ran until her passing. Ching Shih is an orris and incense focused scent, with a touch of osmanthus; from a certain angle Ching Shih is watery and translucent and from another, she is a master of her fate.

name: Maggie the Cat is Alive! I芒聙聶m Alive!
notes: Champagne Note, Ambrette Musk, Peach, Oakmoss, Violet, Orris, Sheer Amber, Castoreum, Sunlight And Sandalwood.
description: 芒聙聹Maggie the Cat is Alive! I芒聙聶m Alive! Why are you afraid of the truth?!芒聙聺 - Elizabeth Taylor in Tennessee Williams芒聙聶 芒聙聹Cat on a Hot Tin Roof芒聙聺 dir. Richard Brook, 1958.Born from a piercing shriek emerges Maggie the Cat is Alive, I芒聙聶m Alive, the newest edition to Marissa Zappas Perfume. Evoking Elizabether Taylor in her electric performance, she languishes with dried champagne on her decolletage, moving through heartbreak during the bleak stillness of humid summertime. On fire inside and out, this fragrance belongs to her sun drenched beauty, longing, humidity and anger! And dares you to shriek your most primal truth.

name: Majnoon
notes: Pomegranate, Saffron, Clove, Nutmeg, Cinnamon, Coffee Absolute, Champaca, Rose, Leather, Tobacco, Tonka Bean, Nagarmotha, Oud (Thailand), Oud (India), Patchouli, Amber, Incense, Vanilla
style: Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: The story begins with the question: Why does coffee make us so inspired, especially when coupled to a lip-smacking blend of cinnamon, nutmeg, saffron and a good measure of pomegranate? Is it the arousal of a gourmandy longing?As moments drift by, the story unfolds to more gradations of inviting tones, such as leather, tobacco and rose. The heart of the scent is crazy, and the madness in its genes is not a question of daring notes but rather a matter of magnetic appeal. Be warned, people around you will ask you what you芒聙聶re wearing.The base is built around two types of oud, from Thailand and India, cradled in a swirl of patchouli and incense, and wrapped in amber and vanilla.Like the names suggests, the scent is a tribute to uninhibited passion and crazy inspiration.

name: I Am Darkness
notes: Fir, Bergamot, Black Pepper, Grapefruit, Incense, Cambodian Oud, Cananga, Jasmine, Coffee, Frangipani, White Champaca, Amyris, Frankincense, Labdanum, Oakmoss
style: Smoky, Woody - Dark
description: I Am Darkness is a soulful incense that is both gothic and spiritual, one that pushes the boundaries of incense scents. You will absolutely revel in this new creation by Azman. It芒聙聶s a complex, moving and wonderfully heartening scent. In fact, imagine all things you love about incense perfumes, and they are all here in this amazing new release. The powerful impact of rich, deep frankincense is strengthened by the presence of floral panache and a base of oakmoss and amyris.I Am Darkness opens with an invigorating whiff of bergamot and grapefruit but be prepared, this is not a citrusy heaven in as much as it芒聙聶s a dark ride.The fiery piquancy of pepper and the bittersweet oud undertone, which waft in the beginning, are the characteristics that make this incense extremely unique. The fragrance is neither too heavy nor too forceful. Though haunting in its dark aura, it has an unexpectedly airy, uplifting quality and the warm softness that makes it such a perfect comfort scent. The secret of this equilibrium is the sacred floral presence of frangipani. I Am Darkness is a definitive incense perfume that is envisioned and created for the hardcore lovers of the incense genre.

name: Killer Vavoom
notes: Bergamot, Plum, Chocolate, Osmanthus, Iris, Rose, Jasmine, Ambrette, Amber, Oakmoss, Patchouli, Musk, Leather, Vanilla
style: Floral - Spicy
description: A fusion of East and West, a tune in unison of osmanthus and chocolate. Decadent to the core, Killer Vavoom is an ode to harmonizing between extremes in a subtle and eternally fashionable style.A delectable whiff of coco is what engulfs you upon the first spritz. Audacious. Wait a second, or two, and you will experience the mystifying spell of the eastern flower osmanthus.The journey is vivified with more precious flowers in the opulent heart such as iris, jasmine and rose augmenting the core of the scent, before the whole aromatic blend segues into a rapturous finale with oakmoss, and musky leather. This is a scent of desire without limits.

name: Two Minutes After The Kiss
notes: Turkish Rose, Pepper, Frankincense, Cardamom, Oud, Patchouli, Myrrh, Beeswax, Selectone, Sandalwood, Vetiver, Leather Accord, Labdanum
style: Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Mysteries are typically dark. Our mystery of 2 Minutes After the Kiss is one that芒聙聶s full of light, yet its unusual take on sunny florals as it heads to a woody heart defies the obvious.The journey starts off with a rose-centric intro surrounded by hints of white florals and a good measure of silver frankincense. The peppery motifs of Jamaican pepper add an invigorating touch before the scents segues into a lush, sensual heart.Passion swells the heart, making it more natural and richer with the patchouly that introduces a generous measure of the lush Laos Oud. The translucent rose blushes under the balsamic smoke of the luxurious Oud. Caressed by creamy sandalwood, the base becomes softer and even more mysterious.Far from the echo of solemn incantations, this flamboyant m脙漏lange welcomes now a joyful touch of vetiver that is reminiscent of a forgotten paradise. Then a mysterious and deep note of incense is wrapped in a more profound sandalwood and leather base. A hint of musk perfectly juxtaposes the delicate, subtle flower notes by now. 2 Minutes After the Kiss is a spectacle of a fragrance whose magnificent Oud is the ultimate player. It marks the debut creation from the house and sets forth its path ahead.

name: Lait de Biscuit
notes: Gourmand Notes, Caramel, Vanilla
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: 芒聙聹Lait de Biscuit芒聙聹 takes us on a flash back to our childhood. This is a delicious fragrance, reminiscent of cherished treats. A fateful blend of sweetness and mouth watering delicacies. A wonderful eau de toilette that offers a journey through time and maximum enjoyment all at once.The fragrance composition of "Lait de Biscuit" consists of a triumvirate of the finest sweets. The beginning is made by pastry notes. Should we think of butter biscuits, cake or ladyfingers? Perhaps the caramel notes, reminiscent of toffee and roasted almonds, are already leading us by the nose? Finally, there is also the subtle vanilla, and who wants to decide amongst all these treats whether it's a vanilla ice cream cone or a vanilla pudding?

name: Lait Concentre
notes: Milk, Coconut, Caramel
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: 芒聙聹Lait Concentr脙漏芒聙聹 evokes a childhood memory that is connected to the popular and delicious condensed milk. It is fairylike, suggesting a transparent veil, merging smoothly with skin, like a fleeting memory that you can just hold on to with your fingertips - a delicious and ethereal eau de toilette.At the beginning of the fragrance we encounter bright milk notes, that remind us of the delicious concentrated milk that the French confectioner Nicolas Appert invented in the 19th Century. The light and seemingly transparent fragrance continues with a slightly tart, unsweetened coconut and closes with restrained caramel notes.

name: Lait de Vanille
notes: Milk, Benzoin, Vanilla, Caramel
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: This is a gift full of sweetness, comfort and recovered innocence which reminds us of an inner peace and a sense of well-being that a cup of hot milk, a butter cookie or the taste of vanilla once gave us. An eau de toilette - delicious enough to eat - with the lightness of memories and a self confidence."Vanilla Milk" starts with notes of confiture de lait, a French spread for bread made from milk, sugar and vanilla, which is especially popular in South America under the name dulce de leche, where it is used as an ingredient for all kinds of culinary temptations. The heart consists of chocolate-balsamic notes of benzoin that, with a base of vanilla and caramel, perfectly closes the circle.

name: Lait et Chocolat
notes: Jasmine, Chocolate, Cedar, Teak Wood, Vanilla, Musk, Milk
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: A delicious fragrance that evokes emotions made of love and sensuality.Unfolding with tender notes of jasmine and chocolate at its core, woody notes of cedar and teak wood strengthen this fragrance. Finishing with base notes that honour soft vanilla, musk and gourmand notes of milk and chocolate, this sensual scent is charming from start to finish.

name: Chabaud Gourmand Discovery Box
description: A great gift, or a way to discover the best gourmand fragrances from Chabaud Maison de Parfum. Complete with 4 x 7.5ml travel spray atomizers.Discovery Box includes:Lait et ChocolatLait Concentr脙漏Lait de BiscuitLait de Vanille

name: Cubralibre
notes: Cubalibre, Oceanic Salt, Kisses
description: 28% concentration perfume. This limited batch has been made with 1kg of ambergris tincture from Larvik, Norway.

name: Wam
description: WAM is a very hard and smoky leather, with a large amount of Birch oil, Labdanum, Rose Otto, Tuberose, Castoreum and Vanilla. Concentration about 42%,  Only 100 bottles.

name: Eau Coeur
notes: Saffron, Osmanthus, Magnolia Oil, Rose Maroc, Pink Pepper, Tonka Bean, Oakwood, Musk, Ambroxan
style: Creamy
description: Eau Coeur is an intense encounter with blooming splendour. The magnificent, alluring and graceful moment, simultaneously tender yet evocative in its delicateness. In its wake a blend of lingering sensual tenderness and infinite, passionate seduction. Eau Coeur is a radiant fragrance, straight from the heart, desiring love.Eau Coeur opens with an intriguing alliance of mysterious magnolia oil, the woody peach scent of osmanthus absolue with its feral and leather notes and an inflection of invigorating pink pepper. The heart note exudes a hint of rose absolue Morocco emboldened with Virginia cedarwood as well as smoky oakwood, the tart vanilla undertones of which also linger in the base note where their sensual impact is all the more powerful in the company of Tonka bean absolue. Tender musk invokes passion. All topped off with an overindulgence of ambrox, which lends the perfume its harmonious union and longevity.

name: Grand Beau
notes: Pine Absolue, Juniper Berry, Angelica Root, Tuberose Absolue, Olibanum, Vetiver, Ambrette, Seaweed Absolue, Ambrocenide
description: Grand Beau is a French phrase that describes both a weekend under a blue sky, and that beautiful person we would like to be; mature in spirit and elegant in appearance.The inspiration is nothing short of romantic芒聙聰脗聽 a day by the sea, a few steps beyond the nearest dunes, eyes closed, in the shade beneath the pine trees. In the distance the roar of the breaking waves. Caressing the skin a salty breeze with a hint of dry driftwood and the tang of damp seaweed. Radiant fresh and shining bright , this is how Grand Beau can be described best.Grand Beau offers a complex blend of high-quality, natural and refreshing absolues. Enhanced by the potent presence of the earthy, woody molecules circling round the tuberose at its heart. It all begins with the spicy Mediterranean warmth of pine absolue and the gin-evoking freshness and spiciness of the juniper berry. Tart and green, infused with angelica root. The charming the presence of the bloom in the tuberose absolue; the calming its interaction with vetiver and olibanum. Dry, subtly salty seaweed combines with musk and amber notes to lend the perfume infinite grace and beauty. Grand Beau is ingeniously structured yet interwoven with a distinct air of mystery.

name: Vinoud
description: Vinoud was released in December 2021 and it is the first edition in a limited quantity of 500 bottles only. Vinoud features 4 sources of natural oud, grape wine, apple, as well as musk and ambergris.

name: Treng Waves
notes: Citron Bergamot, Mandarin From Capri, Aldehyde, Black Tea, Mate, Earthy Peach, Haitian Vetiver, Musk, Ambergris
description: In Saudi Arabia, the abundance of local citrus is referred to as Treng. Here, the perfume takes inspiration and builds a complex fragrance with rare ingredients.

name: Bo
notes: Elemi, Tobacco Leaves, Redwood Pine, Incense, Guaiac Wood, Cedar, Vanilla Beans
style: Creamy, Woody - Light, Woody - Spicy
description: Pt. Reyes National Seashore, in Northern California 芒聙聰 hundreds of acres of lush forest, grassland, and rugged beach with a marine layer. There is a village along the coast turned artist enclave where residents used to remove road signs in order to remain in seclusion. Our hidden bohemia.

name: Floating
notes: Bergamot, Peach, Wild Orchid, Crisp Linen, Sequoia Wood
style: Fresh - Citrus, Fruity
description: The weightlessness of a day without any plan or obligation. Drifting through the morning with damp hair, freshly bathed, a walk to the shops. The promise of warm weather.

name: Studied
notes: Pear, Ambrette, Carrot Seed, Orris, Ambroxan, Cashmere
style: Fresh - Clean, Fruity
description: A quiet moment reading and daydreaming in a pool of sunlight. Created as a scent worn for the wearer, the name is inspired by taking space for yourself to be thoughtful or create. Like Virginia Woolf芒聙聶s A Room of One芒聙聶s Own.

name: Rose Struck
notes: Cassis, Tangerine, Matcha Tea, Damask Rose, Rose Centifolia
style: Floral - Fruity
description: Flowers frozen in ice and exuberant winter skies transforming into spring 芒聙聰 a fleeting moment captured in scent. A study in contrasts and impermanence, a modern, reimagined rose.

name: Lucienne
notes: Pomelo, Lemon Zest, Magnolia, Dragonfruit, Waterlily, Crisp Amber, Marine Accord
style: Citrus, Fresh, Fresh - Clean
description: Inspired by new ways of seeing 芒聙聰 an exuberant moment of clarity and creativity. Pomelo and lemon zest illuminate fresh dragonfruit, magnolia, and aquatic waterlily. Crisp amber and a marine accord forge an enduring spark of positivity. Uplifting, clean, bright.

name: Ethereal Wave
notes: Bergamot, Cardamom, White Tea, Black Tea Absolute, Blonde Woods, Velvet Musk
style: Fresh, Fresh - Clean
description: A fresh yet hypnotic perfume with celestial allure, Ethereal Wave is an evocative tribute to the otherworldly sound and emotional depth of musical pioneers The Cocteau Twins.Bergamot and cardamom entwine in harmony with white and black tea. The whisper of blonde woods unfurls, cascading into a luscious tapestry of opulent, velvety musk.

name: Serenade Aux Fraises
notes: Strawberry, Passionfruit, Plum, Moroccan Rose, Cream, Tahitian Vanilla, Organic Sandalwood, Violet Leaf, Musk, Black Agar
style: Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Daydreams of delightfully mouthwatering strawberry shortcakes dance in our head when we smell Serenade Aux Fraises, the epitome of childhood delight.  Fluffy vanilla cream marries with passionfruit, juicy plum, and, of course, the ripest strawberries imaginable.  The result is a fun, playfully fruity gourmand that is certain to put a smile on your face.

name: Praline au Caramel
notes: Pistachio Praline, Salted Caramel, Cupuacu, Coconut CO2
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: Tantalizingly sweet and nutty, Praline au Caramel reminds us of cozy treats enjoyed by the fire on a chilly fall day. Swirls of salted caramel and tropical coconut cover candied pistachio praline morsels, making this scent optimal for those who love indulging all year round.

name: Zucchero Filato
notes: Cotton Candy, Red Berries, Spun Sugar
style: Gourmand, Sweet

That's Frangipane al Pistacchio, a mouthwatering, nostalgia-inducing work of beauty from Kyse- a perfectly captured memory of the perfect cream pastry. Fragrant almonds and pistachios are laced with pure crystalline sugar sweetness and an indulgent dollop of rich, full vanilla cream, creating a tantalizing treat that lingers on the skin, given a full-bodied, deeply sexy maturity with notes of almond-like heliotrope and creamy sandalwood. In other words, don't feel bad about treating yourself- this unforgettable gourmand is far from empty calories.

The deliciously sophisticated vanilla fragrance breaks down along a continuum of sensory enrapture, ranging from vanilla and orchid flowers to scattered vanilla seeds, caramelized in softness.

description: Luxury perfume is redefined 芒聙聵Born in nature and Crafted in France芒聙聶 in accordance with the principles of haute perfumery. True vision takes time over many years and with Insomnia, perfumers Sezer Sabah and Svetoslav Rusev have created a most enchanting and emotive scent - and in doing so Insomnia has become a worldwide phenomenon due in part to its composition.For his debut fragrance, Faviol Seferi has worked diligently to source unique ingredients-- raw materials such as 50 year-old sandalwood from India and Tahitian vanilla, to name a few. At its core, Insomnia is a fascinating take on tobacco; at once smoky, spiced and ethereal, then at times-- it becomes jammy and boozy. Easy to approach yet keeps its dark sophistication-- you'll be addicted to keep smelling.

VACATION by Vacation脗庐  for all genders, immerses the wearer in the inimitable "Sunscreen Experience" wherever they may be. Mixing classic sunscreen notes - coconut, banana, pineapple, orange blossom, with classic poolside notes - pool water, pool toy, swimsuit lycra.  芒聙聹VACATION芒聙聺 is your best poolside memories, sprayable on demand.Cruelty-free and vegan, Paraben-free; sulfate-free; phthalate-free; silicone-free; oil-free. Winner of 3x beauty awards!

name: Neo-Animism
description: Neo-Animism is a fragrance that is alive. Alive with meaning and African oceans. Our fine fragrance has been created with two dominant notes.: African ocean minerals. These capture our relationship and experience in the water. The minerals in the ocean are understood by our bodies and minds in almost imperceptible ways. Our nose can identify them.The scent of 芒聙聵green bar soap芒聙聶 captures the daily lived experience of African surfers growing up in Southern Africa. Green bar soap is a common household soap found throughout the region, that has the power to conjure memories for many people, summoning up the idea of home, or mother, fresh linen, or the beginning of a new day.The signature fragrance was developed in partnership with South African-born Etienne de Swardt, founder of niche fragrance house Etat Libre D芒聙聶Orange.

A most gourmand fragrance that is reminiscent of the cr脙篓me brul脙漏e of our childhood. Appetizing, seductive and enveloping for an infinitely intoxicating hold.

style: Tropical / Beachy
description: Your skin smells like heat and sunscreen, you're packing away the leftover treats from the day (how did sand get in here? oh, I hate to toss this away. should fruit be sweating like that?). You start to feel the sun tinting you while your skin sticks to the beat-up leather interior of the car (god I wish this AC worked), you count new freckles on your knees at traffic lights.At times, you forget that it's almost winter. At times, you forget that it's almost autumn. Go for little walks, collect the seashells, and watch the sunset fill the sky with its pale blues and golds. At some point, remember the way the breeze felt in your hair, and brush your teeth with your tongue.

I want you to put your hand on my cheek, tip my chin back, and scrape the steel across my skin. the white foam falls into the sink, still white. Therefore, you will experience the notes as a whole and don't be surprised if lighter notes still smell at the drydown and vice versa..." 芒聙聯 Angelos

Layering with Night Boost will increase longevity as well.
