A booster full of impact like you have seen none other芒聙娄The animal in you will be noticeable, wait and see. With all this attention, what you do with it, is for you to decide芒聙娄

name: French Flower
notes: Pear, Nigerian Ginger, Tuberose, Orange Blossom, Chinese Tea, Ambroxan
style: Floral - White
description: French Flower takes you to the headspace that is thousands of French tuberose flowers in a field at night, the lingering warmth of the sun coaxing the flowers to relax and release their heady, intoxicating scent in one long sigh. Featuring both tuberose absolutes and an enfleurage of tuberose from flowers grown organically by Mati脙篓re Premiere itself, French Flower puts its money when its mouth is. This is full-figured, lush tuberose perfume that doesn芒聙聶t stint on the quality or quantity of tuberose.It is also, refreshingly, a tuberose perfume that is unafraid to be anything other than what it is 芒聙聯 a full-on, fleshy explosion of quivering white floral sensuality. A touch of Nigerian ginger adds a powdery, pallid spiciness to the candied sweetness of the tuberose but doesn芒聙聶t even attempt to hem it in. There are hints also of Chinese tea leaf and pear to send a thread of bitterness or greenery running through all that buttery voluptuousness. A woody, almost aquatic musk adds a cooling tinge of freshness and expansion around the edges. But mostly it is all about Queen Tuberose. If you love the classic, unapologetic femininity of Fracas (Piguet) but want a modern, streamlined take that smells just right for right now, then put French Flower on your hit list ASAP.

name: Falcon Leather
notes: Saffron, Leather, Birch Tar, Ciste Labdanum, Benzoin Absolute
style: Masculine
description: If the Mati脙篓re Premiere collection was a menagerie, Falcon Leather would be the American bald-headed eagle, bristling with the raw masculine energy of a practiced predator. Opening with a gut punch of smoky saffron, which twists everything into the shape of a leather harness, Falcon Leather feels immediately powerful, like sinew shifting over bone.The coiled energy of the scent is further emphasized in the heart when a smoky, austere birch tar and a grungy but sleek oud join the party, darkening the background from saffron gold to a deep, oily black. The pungency of this saffron-birch tar accord is softened somewhat by the caramelized, incense-y sweetness of labdanum resin, which, given its starring role in fantasy amber accords, is the perfect way to talk the eagle down a bit from attack mode. Incredibly rich, pungent, and dark, Falcon Leather is tailor made for those for whom Tuscan Leather (Tom Ford) and Patchouli 24 (Le Labo) feel distinctly underpowered.

name: Parisian Musc
notes: Virginian Cedar, Ambrette (musk Mallow), Fig Leaf, Musk, Ambrettolide, Ambroxan
description: Parisian Musc espouses the philosophy of Aurelien Guichard芒聙聶s Mati脙篓re Premiere to perfection by carving away all the extraneous noise so that the simple beauty of its main raw material 芒聙聯 here ambrette seed 芒聙聯 can shine. And shine it does. Ambrette seed is one of nature芒聙聶s marvels. Wholly vegetal in origin, it replicates the soft, fuzzy comfort of a cashmere sweater on clean, perfumed skin. In Parisian Musc, all of the uniquely fruity, anisic qualities of ambrette seed come through in a milky cloud of scent that blooms immediately upon contact with skin. It smells alive and intimate, yet translucent and delicately green.In the heart, a subtle touch of fig leaf accentuates the milky-fruity warmth of the ambrette seed, while Virginian cedar and Ambroxan in the basenotes are there to support the gentle muskiness of the ambrette, giving it a salty, woody radiance that both adds depth and elongates its sound.  There are many creamy-figgy 芒聙聵my skin but better芒聙聶 musks out there, but Parisian Musc does it with such Parisian panache that we predict it will be an instant classic.

name: Neroli Oranger
notes: Neroli, Bergamot, Tunisian Orange Blossom, Musk, Ylang-ylang
description: Quite simply the freshest, loveliest combination of sweet, honeyed-citrusy orange blossom and bitter green neroli on the market. No need to complicate proceedings or reinvent the wheel when you have two organic raw materials as exquisite as the Tunisian orange blossom and French neroli used here. A touch of buttery ylang to emphasize the fruity and floral nuances of the orange blossom, a light application of woody white musks to sustain the soapy sharpness of the neroli, and a hit of limey-green bergamot for zest and freshness 芒聙聯 that is all.And it is the simplicity of this approach that allows you to smell the whole orange tree at once, from the bright, zesty juice of the orange and the bitterness of the pith to the clean woodiness of the bark, the waxy honey of the orange blossoms, and the snappy green bite of the orange leaf. You can almost feel the late summer sun on your face when you wear Neroli Oranger 芒聙聯 you are walking through an orange grove. Then later, the muskiness of clean, warm skin under a white linen shirt as you rest in the shade, in which echoes of the orangey brightness still lurk, long after the heat of the sun has faded. If you love neroli and orange blossom, then Neroli Oranger is fabulous. It is photorealistic enough to transport you to that orange grove but crisp enough to keep you focused all the way through a hot, sweaty day at the office.

name: Radical Rose
notes: Rose, Pepper, Saffron, Patchouli, Labdanum
style: Floral - Fruity
description: The only rose fragrance in the world to use Rosa Centifolia oil from the perfumer芒聙聶s own organic farm (in France), this is the rose fragrance that you will smell that makes you realize that there is a Radical Rose-shaped hole in your fragrance collection. This is a rose that transverses the entire rose spectrum from peppery and bright (in the beginning) to spicy and earthy (in the heart) to mossy and ambery (in the basenotes), circling briefly through rose lokhoum, rosewater, soap, and wood stations along the way. It is, quite frankly, a rose tour de force.It all hinges, of course, on the complexity of Guichard芒聙聶s home-grown Centifolia rose oil. Inhale the fresh, spiced rose plucked from the garden before it develops that velvety, truffled (almost candied) edge that makes you wonder if you should be burying your nose in it or nibbling on it. Soon, the patchouli makes it presence known. This smells like clean, dry earth particles whipped up into an airy musk rather than heavy soil or chocolate or booze. We like this aspect very much because it makes the rose feel grounded without being weighed down or subsumed by a darker, grungier material. Saffron adds a mildly bitter, almost oudy bite. Together with the warm, soapy-leathery labdanum in the basenotes, it is fair to say that Radical Rose displays a slightly chypric character. Either way, Radical Rose is a sophisticated and original rose scent that will pluck at the heart strings of the even the most rose-wary.

name: Santal Austral
notes: Iris, Sandalwood, Tonka Bean, Benzoin
style: Earthy, Floral, Fresh, Woody - Fresh
description: Australian sandalwood 芒聙聯 santalum spiccatum 芒聙聯 possesses a tart, woody freshness that is as mentally uplifting as walking through a forest of freshly-felled timber. In Santal Austral, this facet is cleverly emphasized by an iris topnote that is as silvery as the sandalwood. Together, these notes produce an effect that is both dusty and sparkling, for a sandalwood champagne of sorts.It is worth noting that all this effervescence is but a prelude to the main act, which is a creamy amber that sucks the iris and sandalwood deep into its velvet embrace. The subtle almond milk nuances of tonka bean and the dusty, vanillic sparkle of benzoin wrap sensuously around the tender iris and the bright sandalwood, sweetening and thickening the scent until it smells like sandalwood if sandalwood was a substance made out of condensed milk, soap, and papiers d芒聙聶Arm脙漏nie. Sweeter and warmer than most Australian sandalwood-themed fragrances tend to be, we recommend Santal Austral to anyone 芒聙聯 male or female 芒聙聯 looking for a softer take on this most coniferous of sandalwood species.

name: Encens Suave
notes: Coffee, Incense, Madagascar Vanilla, Benzoin, Labdanum
description: Wow! Why did it take so long for someone to cross the genres of church incense and gourmand? Whatever the answer, we sure are grateful that Aurelien Guichard took that leap of faith with Encens Suave in 2019. In the opening, the divine aroma of frankincense bubbling on a censer mingles with the fragrant scent of roasting coffee bean to produce an effect that is both smoky and bite-your-arm-off edible. The warm ginger- or cardamom-like tones of the coffee accentuate the spicy Coca Cola notes of the Somalian frankincense used here. It is a match made in incense heaven.When the lush, boozy Madagascan vanilla and the dusty, sparkling benzoin join the party, you would be forgiven for wondering if Encens Suave is a vanillic incense or an incensey vanilla. Persistent and delicious wafts of burnt sugar, campfire smoke, and incense papers make you throw caution to the wind and declare it both. If you love Casbah (Piguet) and Silver Factory (Bond No. 9), also by Guichard, then you芒聙聶ll also love Encens Suave for the perfumer芒聙聶s consistency in sheathing the sharp, metallic topnotes of church incense in soft, ambery warmth that speaks more to the milk of human kindness than it does the hair shirt of High Mass.

name: Crystal Saffron
notes: Musk Habanolide, Saffron, Ambroxan, Incense
style: Sweet, Woody - Amber
description: Built around one of the highest quality saffron oils in the world 芒聙聯 from the Kozani region of Greece 芒聙聯 Crystal Saffron is a 360 degree screen capture of this most expensive and complex of spices, from its piercing iodine flare to its dusky, sunburnt leather finish. Habanolide musk accentuates the delicate glow of the saffron until it shines as brightly as freshly-polished gold, while Somalian incense creates a woody-smoky resinousness that acts as a dark backdrop against which the bright, almost foiled properties of that amazing saffron can shine.Ambroxan infuses the whole affair with a spicy, peppery radiance that feels like leather or wood made air. The saffron remains the undisputed star, but it is this vegetal muskiness in the drydown that will haunt you. An extremely attractive scent, Crystal Saffron will appeal to anyone (man or woman) hunting that rare thing - a scent that manages to blend exoticism of fiery spice with the comfort of supple, well-worn leather.

I took countless dips in the shimmering, warm, turquoise waters, and the sunset encounters were nothing short of breathtaking.芒聙聺

name: Malibu - Party in the Bay
notes: Lime, Green Accord, Coconut Nectar, Sugar, Rum And Sandalwood
style: Boozy, Fruity, Gourmand
description: Hymn to summer and its colors. A party at the sunset in the Malibu bay sipping a long drink for letting yourself overwhelm to music.The fragrance recreate the smell of a wisely blended coconut Daiquiri; the frozen opening of lime is an awakening of the senses that meet the sweetness of a refined coconut rum.

name: Born from Fire
notes: Oud (Aoud), Saffron, Black Pepper, Vanilla Absolute, Burned Sugar, Rose, Amber Powder, Vetiver, Cashmere Wood And Amyris Sandalwood (Torchwood)
style: Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Born from fire and nestled in the heart of Pacific Ocean, the Hawaiian islands are sculptures of beauty shaped by the restless and wild spirit which flows underground.An intense and ardent sweetness, an exotic and seductive magma which unleashes the volcanic soul of a lush archipelago born from fire and from eruptions. The tropical hot vanilla bursts on spices and luxurious woods enveloped by sweet shades to recreate the smell of the legendary black sand beach of Honolokani in Maui.

name: Sunplosion - Aloha State of Mind
notes: Lime, Mango Pulp, Guava, Coconut Water, Hibiscus And White Sandalwood
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Tropical / Beachy
description: An explosion of vitality and energy which embodies the Sun of Hawaii. Surfers, massive waves, bronzed skin and the freedom feeling that you breath on the magnificent beaches of Oahu. A taste of Hawaii which celebrates the local symbol fruit by realising a unique and special fragrance, the delicious Excel Mango from Makaha. The opening of fresh lime lifts up the vibrant and ripe mango pulp enriched by hints of guava and transparent scents of coconut water. Aloha!

name: Leisure in Paradise
notes: Papaya, Pineapple, Coconut, Vanilla And Caribbean Woods
style: Fruity, Gourmand
description: Caribbean beaches, white sand, creamy coconut and tender vanilla. Nothing better to enjoy the perfect holiday.Leisure in paradise is the warm Caribbean breeze which blows on the Cuba芒聙聶s shores; saturated with the delicious sun cream scents and juicy fruit.

name: Don't Ask Me Permission
notes: Lime, Sugar, Sweet Orange, Peach, Passionfruit, Ylang-Ylang, Heliotrope, White Musk, Sandalwood, Amber (Ambergris) And Cachaca (Liquor)
style: Boozy
description: An infusion of impudent beauty and cheeky femininity which flood in the pleasure of the wildest nights of Rio de Janeiro. An invitation to drink a Maracuja Caipirinha for inexorably abandoning to the carioca groove and to the most libertine passions.The fragrance opening surrounds the ambience with lime and sugar aromas while the heart embodies the exotic and transgressive soul of Brazil through the passion fruit, the ylang-ylang and the heliotrope. The expression of desire and of the most explicit sensual energy is being harnessed from amber, sandalwood and cacha脙搂a.

name: Pacific Park
notes: Mandarin Orange, Pear, Black Currant, Caramel, Candied Fruit, Cotton Candy, Lily Of The Valley, White Musk And Vanilla
description: The smell of candied fruit, of caramel and crepes comes over Ocean Avenue attracting us towards the pier carousels.You smile like the child you were fifteen years ago and you look me like that afternoon at Luna Park. Return to childhood, regression to innocence in this sunny July at Santa Monica where we feel like children another day and have fun without thinking of tomorrow. We drink a fruit sorbet and we keep our eyes on the other happiness.

name: Vicebomb
notes: Dark Cherry, Red Fruits, Salty Caramel, Vanilla Cream, Pink Sugar, Ylang-Ylang, Precious Woods, Tonka Beans, Amber
description: An insatiable vice embraces sins of gluttony and lust with an intoxicating black cherry that plunges headlong into a creamy vanilla ice cream. Accents of salted caramel crystallize tantalizing the palate and drag the mind into temptation. A libertine sweetness from tonka bean, ylang-ylang and soft amber sculpts sinuous shapes like sensual bodies that intertwine. Vicebomb is the essence of twilight vice; understood and overwhelming.

name: Scorpion Intense
notes: Oud, Berries, Rose, Amber Wood, Battola Wood, Incense, Saffron
description: A perfume that touches the sensual universality of this icon, that would intoxicate a man as much as a woman. Here is, in a few words, what Scorpion Intense is: An open fire. The soft drift of smoke. Where sensuality rises after the light has gone.

name: Narcotica Signature
notes: Sugar, Black Pepper, Province Blue Cypress, Cannabis, Patchouli, Cypriol, Blond Vetiver, Pimento Berries, Rare Oud, Cashmere Wood, Amber, Creamy Sandalwood, Musk
style: Smoky, Woody - Dark
description: Narcotica Signature is a woody-spicy with a gourmand trail playing with the concept of contrasts. Sugar, cypress and spicy black pepper in the opening provide a unique balance with cannabis, dry patchouli, earthy nagarmotha oil, Tahitian vetiver and pimento seeds (allspice). Agarwood, amber, sandalwood, musk and cashmere wood provide an intense but enveloping base. Rich and beguiling.

name: Dulce Diablo
notes: Dark Cognac, Rum Absolute, Chocolate, Fresh Apricot, Floral Freesia, Davana, Cacao Extract, Gold Honey, Dry Apricot, Oakmoss Infusion, Cane Sugar, Black Vanilla Madagascar, Sandalwood, Musk, Patchouli, Tonka Absolute
description: Dulce Diablo is the first gourmand release by Narcotica and whoa what a gourmand it is! Dulce Diablo is a wonderful chocolate with fresh and dry apricot, gold honey, fruity davana... all soaked in dark cognac and rum absolute with a gorgeous dry down of black vanilla Madagascar and a gourmand tonka absolute.Boozy and addictive would be an understatement!

name: Doza
notes: Blackcurrant, Sichuan Pepper, Incense, Province Cypress, Blonde Tobacco, Sea Moss, Labdanum, Smoke And Amber, Vanilla Beans, Guaiac Wood, Texas Cedar Wood, Sweet Amber Myrrh And Musk
description: When you call someone a Doza, that means they are nearly perfect芒聙娄 or just another Dose by Narcotica perfume. Mystical and multidimensional, a gourmand aroma is promoted and powered by precious amber. Surrounded by a smoky texture, a blast of soft, woody, and exotic fruity notes are elevated with lightly spiced charisma.

name: Narco Oasis
notes: Passionfruit, Black Currant, Blood Orange, Peach, Juicy Pear, Jasmine, Iris, Vanilla Infusion, Brown Sugar, Tonka, Blonde Woods, Vanilla Bean, Musk, Creamy Sandalwood, Sea Amber
style: Floral - Fruity, Sweet
description: Secluded in the wilderness, shallow oasis is trapped by white flowers, Halo is seen. Angels spreading love, colorful birds singing, paradise is found where nothing but joy has been. Gentle breeze, green waters and tropical aroma. Heaven is found, we芒聙聶re sharing with you the first, brightest Narcotica.

name: Chantilly
notes: Melon, Strawberry, Bergamot, Apple, Coconut, Blackcurrant Flower, Vanilla, Powder, Musk
style: Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: Euphoria and delight to seduce the senses. Fruits that hint at the summer. Petals, light, flowers, and impalpable lace. A sweet, powdery caress. Style. Suffused and sensual.Chantilly is a light fruity dessert crowned with a cloud of delicious, sweet whipped cream, made to taste and savor. Starting juicy accord marks the notes of melon and strawberry, emphasized by the spicy bergamot nuance, and strikes into a soft vanilla coconut blend to enhance the sillage芒聙聶s powdery aspect.The White collection features caps that are 100% handmade. Each pattern is composed of the finest golden powder fused into the creamy white resin. In this collection, Luca Gritti turns to fruity, floral, and powdery notes, experimenting with them and creating new, unexpected combinations.

name: Tutu Blanc
notes: Pink Grapefruit, Blackcurrant, Coconut, Apple, Jasmine, Rose, Heliotrope, Raspberry, Vanilla, Amber, Musk
style: Fruity, Gourmand
description: A dance. A woman. Tenderness and power. Perfection. The most provocative experience. Utmost dedication. The magic of a moment.Tut脙鹿 Blanc is an ode to the ballet dancers, their dedication, and incredible balance of strength and artistic fragility. Luca Gritti芒聙聶s delicate gourmand composition plays with notes of raspberry mousse, rose petals, and marshmallows, creating the harmony between heart芒聙聶s creamy sweetness and top fresh fruity nuances.The White collection features caps that are 100% handmade. Each pattern is composed of the finest golden powder fused into the creamy white resin. In this collection, Luca Gritti turns to fruity, floral, and powdery notes, experimenting with them and creating new, unexpected combinations.

name: Duchessa
notes: Black Cherry, Bitter Orange, Saffron Flower, Jasmine, Cloves, Cocoa, Iris, Almond, Brown Sugar
description: A shadow: something is there. She determines fate as she walks along the spice road. As she passes, there芒聙聶s magic in the air, as warm as the hues of fruits that announce her coming. Her cloak weaves gold and velvets, and she has a delicate yet steadfast stride. Amused, she turns to look at the effect it has. Aristocratic weakness.Ripe black cherries enveloped by fresh marzipan and fine bitterness of red orange芒聙聶s zest. The heart is a delight: a creamy mix of white flowers and powdery cocoa notes; Duchessa芒聙聶s sillage is warm, balsamic, intoxicating. Sweet as liquor. A narcotic one: cherries and sugar, the real obsession. The smell of a Gritti Woman, bold and decisive.For each Gritti Priv脙漏 extrait, the perfumer created unique twists of two distinctive accords to fuse them together, adding singular nuances and notes necessary for a perfect balance. The collection芒聙聶s opulent packaging is an homage to the Gritti family芒聙聶s jewelry cases: from the luxury velvet boxes to hard protective covers designed by Luca Gritti personally.

name: Tutu
notes: Grapefruit, Black Currant, Coconut, Pink Champagne, Jasmine, Rose, Heliotrope, Powder, Raspberry, Vanilla, Amber, Musk
style: Sweet
description: Tutu Extrait, the first White Collection芒聙聶s extrait de parfum, is an ode to the ballet dancers, their dedication, and incredible balance of strength and artistic fragility. Luca Gritti counterposes the delicate powdery feel of rose and jasmine petals with a pure density of musk and amber. Champagne bubbles fulfill the perfume芒聙聶s body, giving it a light and cheerful mood.

name: Because I'm Free
notes: Candied Fruits, Petitgrain, Almond Blossom, Jasmine, Tuberose, Banana Blossom, Amber, Caramel, Vanilla
style: Fruity, Gourmand
description: Dance, dance, dance! Flash. Until the night is young, until the shiver goes down the spine. Music, beats, head over heels all around. Vertigo, can you feel it? The fragrant juice of the nights out: bold, seducing, mind-blowing. Fresh and zesty petitgrain tartness pricks the dense sweetness of candied fruits accord and leads to the heart of composition: thrilling, throbbing, white floral. Warm, seducing tuberose over steamy jasmine petals; the finest creamy banana shade on a dessert and caramel vanilla good night kiss. For your longest night. Because you are free.

name: Gossip Night
notes: Mango Blossom, Litchi, Heliotrope, White Peach, Cream, Caramel, Madagascar Vanilla, White Musk, Cashmeran
description: Cin cin. One selfie, a glance, a sip, a glass of Bellini. Get the party started. Scroll & swipe. No, you can芒聙聶t sit with us. Details, details, details! Who, when, where, why? Crick-crack, one call missed. Shots, laugh, Mr. Big. What else? Fizzy and cheerful fruity cocktail for careless days, boozy nights and sunrise talks. White peach pulp and soft caramel meet the freshness of mango blossom and sheer litchi accord. White musk embraces the skin and gives it a smooth, radiant aura with notes of cashmeran and woody vanilla undertones.

name: Siracusa
notes: Almond, Palm Leaf, Lemon Blossom, Tiare, Creamy Notes, Vanilla, Solar Notes, Sandalwood, White Musk
description: Summer on your mind. Endless, mellow afternoons between Noto芒聙聶s almond gardens and Marzamemi芒聙聶s sea breeze. The dance of shades over bronze skin, shimmering and silky. A bliss. Fresh almond and creamy lemon blossom notes are leading to the luscious, tropical heart: a rich vanilla accord adorned with fragrant tiar脙漏 flowers and marzipan nuance. Like a Sicilian sunset, the perfume lasts on the skin wrapping it with warm, musky and vanilla sun kisses.

name: Naked Dance
notes: Orange Blossom, Bergamot, Green Tea, Rice, Clay, Lily, Iris, A Drop Of Turkish Rose, White Musk, Incense, Sandalwood, Vetiver, Tonka, Guaiac Wood
description: Naked Dance is an olfactory impression of our lives at home, where we jazz through space filled with our attachments, memories and comforts in bliss of intimate liberty to be ourselves.Impressions: Oil paintings, temple dust, drying lily and wood. Musky, milky, powdery, a little soapy and bitter.The Naked Dance cap is handmade to order individually from wood scraps and epoxy resin. Its irregular shape is unique, its a celebration of imperfect beauty of raw materials and the craftsmanship that folds them into an artful piece.

name: Dead Air
notes: Violet Leaf Abs, Davana, Freesia, Narcisse Abs, Lovage, Cist Abs, Salt Accord, Dates, Oakwood, Opoponax Resin, Vetiver, Patchouli, Cedar Atlas
description: Macabre fantasy of decadent shadows and drama, unfolding from a fresh salty breeze to the deep dark underwater with blurry black tones, exuberant flora and a binding touch of wood.Impressions: A slaty breeze by the sea at night, a faded memory. Dusty stage drapes in a theatre, a reflection in a hazy mirror.Bottle caps for Dead Air are made by hand from imperfectly beautiful charcoal encapsulated in epoxy resin resulting in unique shapes and shades, each is one of a kind 芒聙聰 a true masterpiece.

name: Resonant
notes: Yuzu, Mandarin, Bergamot, Ginger, Petit Grain, Cold Metal Note, Musk, Guaiacwood, Ambergris
description: Alive in an ethereal dream of resonating clarity. It pulses with addictive hot iron and ozonic citrus in clean and sharp rhythm inviting your inner perfectionist to owe.Impressions: Cold explosion, loud spark, vibrating metal, perfect rhythm. Hot iron, dry wood, thin line, sharp curveBottle caps for Resonant are made by hand from imperfectly beautiful bismuth encapsulated in epoxy resin resulting in unique shapes and shades, each is one of a kind 芒聙聰 a true masterpiece.

name: Oddity Discover Set
description: Oddity from Hong Kong... try all four fragrances in this neatly packaged discovery set.Includes 2ml spray vials of:DeluluNaked DanceDead AirResonant

name: Tobacco flirting with Vanilla
notes: Bergamot, Cherry, Lilac, Cinnamon, Vanilla, Tobacco, Vetiver
style: Earthy, Woody - Amber
description: 芒聙聹Talk smoky to me!芒聙聺 she said,his tobacco lipsand her vanilla soulblending into each other芒聙娄Reflecting the world of those who do not compromise on quality with their expensive tastes, this deeply seductive fragrance shows the unique harmony of tobacco and vanilla with the difference of Mes Bisous. This very special perfume also refers to personalities who are confident, concise and expressive, and pay attention to details.

name: Amberique
notes: Grapefruit, Rose, Pink Pepper, Amber
style: Creamy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: 芒聙娄and she knew she was a thinglike he knew he was a king.a tiger today,filling the room with her roar芒聙娄a pleaser yesterday,moaning芒聙聹you're gonna fall in love soon.芒聙聺芒聙娄Reminiscent of a sweet bouquet, which is a candidate to be indispensable for those looking for the magnificent effect of the amber scent, this scent reflects the world of those who love to pamper themselves, and signals that they can fall in love with themselves at any moment.

name: Oud Hypnotique
style: Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: 芒聙聹Touch me with your power,Caress me with your mind.Surrendered to an old spell,I seek no escape.芒聙聺Representing strength, courage and passion, this fragrance draws attention with its permanence and spread. It hypnotizes with the strength of character it represents, and there is no escape from it. Once you're caught, you can never let go.

name: Disco
notes: Bergamot, Lavender, Jasmine, Grapefruit, Saffron, Cardamon, Tea, Tobacco, Amber, Cedar, Myrrh, Patchouli And Vanilla Bean
description: Zernell Gillie Fragrances is a fragrance brand influenced by genres of music that offers a unique olfactory experience. DISCO shines from the floral & citrus notes, then the mid & base kick in and warms it up with cardamon, tobacco, amber and a touch of vanilla. DISCO is a unisex fragrance that develops slowly, which lends to its sophistication & complexity.

name: Techno
notes: Bergamot, Pink Pepper, Red Fruits, Sage, Saffron, Spanish Rockrose, Suede, Patchouli, Lavender, Jasmine, Tonka Bean, Leather, Amber, Sandalwood, Incense
description: Techno is inspired by the Detriot pioneers of the genre. This intensity and free-spirited vibe is captured by combining futuristic sweet red fruits with pulsating earthy-woody tones.

name: Hip Hop
notes: Black Currant, Bergamot, Saffron, Cognac, Hedione, Labdanum, Green Notes, White Musc, Ambroxan, Cacao, Dark Chocolate
description: A signature scent worthy unisex fragrance inspired by the classic Hip-Hop music produced in the 90's, from the gritty drums and chopped-up soul samples of East Coast pioneers like A Tribe Called Quest and the Wu-Tang Clan to the hypnotically melodic synthesizers and thrumming bass that Dr. Dre used to put the West Coast on the map. Sweetly aromatic and spiced fruit is infused with boozy cognac and luscious chocolate, while green and airy musks provide the perfect balance of casual freshness. As vibrant, evocative, and influential as the music itself, Hip Hop is simply, in a word, dope.

name: Buontalenti
notes: Apricot, Banana, Red Fruits, Raspberry, Coconut, Vanilla Cream, Caramel, Cookie, Toffee, Mosses
description: A fragrance inspired by the multifaceted richness of Vanilla where the fruity notes of Peach and Apricot underline its genuineness. A light and sinuous chord weave, a continuous inspiration of vivacity and softness.

name: Matelda
notes: Peach Blossom And White Grapefruit, Peru Balsam, Chamomile, Benzoin And Violet, Vanilla, Sandalwood, Tonka Bean And Musk.
style: Exotic, Floral - Ambery Spice, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy
description: A key fragrance, reminiscent of the enveloping and light smell of Peach Blossom. The heart notes, with the relaxing blend of Chamomile, give a soft and harmonious touch. Matelda is the perfume that transmits lightness.

name: Fior di Pane
notes: Bergamot, Violet Leaves, Notes Of Bread, Orange Blossom, Cypriol, Iris, Vanilla, Tonka Bean, Vetiver, Cedarwood, Moss
style: Gourmand
description: Through the delicacy of Violet, Tulip, Iris and Vanilla, Fior di Pane evokes the smell of freshly baked bread, creating a pleasant sensation of comfort and serenity. It is a unique composition that goes back in time, awakening childhood memories and the simplicity of small gestures.

name: Plum in Cognac
description: Brimming with notes of caramel and tobacco, this fragrance is perfect for those that want to leap out of their comfort zone. Cinnamon and Nutmeg further intensify the smokey intensity of the gourmand pairing, creating an addictive aroma that envelopes the senses and whisks you away on a seductive adventure for the soul.For this extraordinary scent - a scent so good that it received the 2021 Perfume Extraordinaire of the Year Award - we aged our organic, sugar cane alcohol in a vintage cognac barrel, giving the scent a captivating edge that beckons for decadence.Finally, indulgent hints of Vanilla and Vetiver add a last touch of grounded warmth that perfectly rounds up the carnal woodiness of this voluptuous masterpiece.

name: Cedar in Acacia
notes: Cedarwood, Amber, Ginger, Olibanum, Cinnamon, Cypriol, Orris
description: Feel the heat with a sultry sunset of the senses with Cedramber. A natural balm for the challenges of the day, this fragrance leaves a sun-kissed imprint on your skin that calls to memories of summer.An untamable scent of spice and Ginger that dances on the palette and exudes a velvety spark that speaks to the heart. Notes of Ginger Oil, Cinnamon Bark, and Cypriol Heart add further electricity to an already thunderous bouquet, throwing back to a time of nostalgia-tinged adventure and freedom.Olibanum Resin rounds this profoundly woody and fiery fragrance, adding a touch of provocative sensuality that smoothes the fragrance and makes an aroma an addiction.

name: Oak in Oak
notes: Cedar, Amber, Tonka
description: With a unique texture of Cedarwood Virginia enveloped by the swirling spice of Incense, this fragrance starts with an explosive arrangement of addictive delights.A warm woody body of Oakwood envelopes the spice and Incense, throwing back to the cognac and wine barrels of its foundations to bring comfort and familiarity to the sensory adventure. Notes of Saffron and Leather create an intimate portrait of sensation that promises comfort and nobility in equal measure.With a warmth and sophistication that layers itself gently both over and under the fragrance, you can feel the embrace of a woody aroma that leaves you feeling uniquely cozy.

name: Praline in Maple
notes: Black Pepper, Pink Pepper, Clove, Roasted Praline Chestnut Accord, Peru Balsam, Olibanum, Cedarwood, Guaiac, Patchouli
description: A delicious & nostalgic combination inspired by a Springtime tradition in Canada. Perfumer Natasha Cote-Mouzannar was inspired by her tender memories of spending early Spring days in Canada and tapping maple trees, collecting sap, and making maple syrup as a tradition. The perfect representation of a sugar house, nestled deep in an oak forest.

name: Sandalwood in Oak
notes: Burnt Sugar, Smoked Sage, Pink Pepper, Guaiac, Olibanum, Iris Root, Sandalwood, Vanilla, Musk
description: The purity of Sandalwood rises through this gorgeous scent and emerges from the background to transcend and empower the olfactory experience. Invigorating and addictive, Guaiacwood lends a modern woody facet to the accord and leaves an imprint of smokey sophistication on the skin.Notes of Burnt Sugar, Smoked Sage, and Pink Pepper dot the highpoints of this aromatic experience. They create an aura of near-mystical power, like an homage to a time long gone, when perfumes were the privilege of the Gods. Additional flavors of Iris and Vanilla Beans complete this stunning bouquet and provide a smoothness that further enhances the creamy delight of its Sandalwood foundation.

name: Vetiver in Bloom
notes: Bergamot, Pink Pepper, Juniper Berry, Syringa Blossoms, Magnolia Flower, Jasmine, Vetiver, Patchouli, Musk
description: A surprising combination, delicate flowers with the fresh woody verticality of iconic Vetiver leaves an everlasting impact of utter brightness on the skin.Balancing the soft yet narcotic Syringa with the grounding Vetiver in unique proportions unveiled a delightful scent of a blooming spring garden, evoking us to a magical landscape with the tenderness of new flowers and the earthy depth of Vetiver.

name: Bread In Chestnut
notes: Cardamom, Chestnut, Rosemary, Bran, Benzoin, Smoked Olibanum, Tonka Bean, Sandalwood, Patchouli
style: Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky
description: Wholesome. Intimate. Delicious. An explosion of refined balsams brings a golden opulence to the gourmand category. Perfumer Meabh McCurtin imagined a decadent and comforting balsamic bread signature by combining the buttery creamy facets of sandalwood, with the toasted warmth of bran absolute and the almond tonalities of tonka bean. Fresh camphorous rosemary and smoky olibanum cut through the gourmand sweetness, adding depth and sophistication. The result is a refined yet edible fragrance, both inviting and deeply addictive.

name: Vanilla in Bourbon
notes: Lemon Zest, Cardamom, Cinnamon, Myrrh, Gurjun Balsam, Labdanum, Vanilla, Guaiac, Olibanum
style: Boozy, Creamy, Gourmand, Spicy
description: Provocative yet precious, this addicting vanilla fragrance is both exotic and nostalgic all at once. It features a precious and lovely vanilla extract, creamy and rich with gentle floral and spice tones and an intoxicating booziness that emerges in the drydown. Sweet, balsamic myrrh further enhances the provocative side of the composition, combining with the refined smokiness of guaiac and olibanum in the hypnotically long-lasting base to unleash a potent, yet refined sensuality that take this unforgettable fragrance far from a typical vanilla scent.

name: Dirty Rice
notes: Bergamot, Almond, Basmati Rice, Peony, Milk, Sandalwood, Vetiver, Cedarwood, Musk, Cetalox
style: Skin Scent / Minimal
description: 芒聙聹Dirty and sticky skin scent. My back arched like a bow, and he made a heavy breather right behind my sweaty back.芒聙聺

name: Drunk Saffron
notes: Plum, Cognac, Saffron, Leather, Coffee, Indonesian Patchouli, Vanilla, Musk
description: 芒聙聹A glass of indulgent Cognac and lipstick stains.芒聙聺

name: Smokin' Gun
notes: Campari, Rum, Bigarade Orange, Juniper, Whisky, Pine, Incense, Leather, Cinnamon, Oak, Virginia Cedar, Balkan Tobacco, Vanilla Surabsolute, Sandalwood
description: 芒聙聹Love around the campfire. Heavily peated, spiced scotch in the wet woods芒聙聺

name: Fig Porn
notes: Fig, Pear, Bergamot, Cedarwood, Peony, Turkish Rose, Amber, Vanilla, Musk, Sandalwood
description: 芒聙聹Raw Love.芒聙聺

name: Indecent Cherry
notes: Sweet Cherry, Almond, Saffron, Bulgarian Rose, Sour Cherry, Strawberry, Mimosa, Vanilla, Amber, Indonesian Patchouil, Musk, Benzoin
style: Fruity, Sweet
description: 芒聙聹Drunken Cherries. Wild side to an innocent one.芒聙聺

name: Drunk Lovers
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Juniperus Mexicana, Grapefruit, Red Berries, Cognac, Pepper, Ginger, Clary Sage, Cypress, Amber, Virginian Cedarwood, West Indian Sandalwood, Vanilla Planifolia, Sumatra Benzoin Gum Resin, Patchouli, Vetiver, Cardamom, Cinnamon Bark, Musk
style: Boozy, Spicy, Sweet
description: Night of lust and love. Spilled brandy on the wood table.

name: Dark & Drunk Discovery Set
description: An updated discovery kit consisting of the signature fragrances of BTSO. Each set comes with reusable, refillable 2ml atomizers and a set of scent papers.This set includes samples of:DGAFDrunk LoversDrunk SaffronFilthy MuskL'AnimalMad HoneyMary JaneNanatopia

name: Dirty & Sticky Discovery set
description: A discovery kit consisting of the signature fragrances of BTSO. Each set comes with reusable, refillable 2ml atomizers and a set of scent papers.This set includes samples of:Angels' PowderDirty HeavenDirty RiceFig PornNaked LaundryIndecent CherryFugazziSugar Addict

name: Otello
notes: Mandarin, Cardamom, Chilli, Cocoa, Drift Wood, Toasted Hazelnut, Vanilla, Honey, Patchouli
description: The concept between sweet and salty, between good and evil, between black and white ... are the soul of this fragrance, super persistent.The chili pepper helps the sweet part of the fragrance, to be pungent, to be respected ... to bring out its energetic, lively, dynamic side .... The toasted hazelnut, on the other hand, rounds the angularity of the spices and helps pure cocoa to express itself in all its smokiness. Vanilla, honey and patchouli fix the determination of the perfume's character, with the elegance and charm that distinguish them.

name: Almanera
notes: Cardamom, Coffee, Dried Fruit, Star Anise, Davana, Jasmine, Caramelized Sugar, Milk, Lily Of The Valley, Rose, Tolu Balm, Amber, Myrrh, Fir, Musk
description: There are a lot of elements and reflections that gave life to the almanera perfume... a game of chess in which the freshness of star anise, the sweetness of dried fruit and caramelized sugar, the warmth of rose and milk won. Gut above all the promise of the smell of coffee has won... that small quantity of black liquid, which for many represents the beginning and the end but anyway it always represents a certainty.

name: Vani Charnel
notes: Lemon, Fruity Notes, Candied Fruit, Peach Blossoms, White Flowers, Vanilla, Caramel Accord, Benzoin, Musk
style: Sweet
description: Vani charnel is a delicious multi-faceted gourmand, inspired by a poem written by the founder of Epico. A sensual and delicate fragrance, with buttery caramel undertones, with a sweet, pillowy soft vanilla drydown.

name: Will Be Love
notes: Bergamot, Mandarin, Milk Cream, Coconut, Peaches In Syrup, Caramel, Vanilla, Elemi, Ambergris, Musk, Patchouli, Tonka Bean
style: Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Milky, Sweet
description: Because you realize it's her from the little things.. You realize it's her, that while looking for space in her messed up life, she caresses you with love to give you courage and not make you feel alone. WILL BE LOVE is a modern love satire, born between the elements and people, it is a story of summer emotions that transform into a strong relationship that looks to the future. It opens memory drawers, feeds happy memories, butterflies in the stomach of first loves, still immature but which have turned into solid and adult relationships. It speaks of deep emotions and nuances as complex as the notes that dance in this liquid emotion The coconut notes are the masters, not a sunscreen effect coconut, but a brand new and brand new coconut in syrup, sweet, caramelized.

name: Harlem Nights
notes: Rum, Clove, Nutmeg, Jasmine, Orris, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Amber, Musk
style: Earthy, Powdery / Soft, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: SMOOTH, DARING, EXUBERANTA whiff of this fragrance transports you to a Harlem speakeasy, with its wood accents, ornate wallpaper, and intricate chandeliers. A blend of orris and animalic musk replicate the feeling of smoking a fine cigar, while a rum accord smells like it was poured from the top shelf. Together, these notes create the anything-goes atmosphere of 1920s nightlife, where any night could become the stuff of legends.

name: Danse Sauvage
notes: Cognac, Plum, Saffron, Pepper, Chili, Rose, Cedarwood, Vanilla, Oud
style: Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Spicy
description: This fragrance is inspired by the wild, erotic performances of the Black Venus, in 1920s Paris. The booze and spiciness of this scent has the power to bewitch. A blend of plum, cognac, and chili notes will envelop you in mystery and charm, leaving others feeling drunk off your presence.

name: African Rooibos
notes: Bergamot, Cardamom, Black Pepper, Rooibos Tea Accord, Orris Butter, Cedarwood, Tonka Bean, Immortelle Flower Absolute
style: Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Smoky, Sweet, Woody - Spicy
description: A warm wind carries the scent of rooibos leaves and cedar off the South African mountains. Spicy black pepper and warm cardamom speak to a multidimensional personality, while bright bergamot brings life to the blend. It芒聙聶s a scent with effortless charisma that feels like being comfortable in your skin.

name: Vide Cor Meum
notes: Bergamot, Thyme, Rose Absolute, Incense, Cedar, Benzoin Siam, Vanilla, Woody Amber
style: Fresh - Clean, Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: Vide Cor Meum (See My Heart), was inspired by an aria composed opera and takes the classic beauty of an Armenian style rose and modernizes it with herbaceous thyme. Sweet vanilla creates an atmosphere of seduction, and resinous incense adds a layer of mystery. Wear this scent as the finishing touch on a tailored date-night outfit. It芒聙聶s an invitation to get closer.

name: Oud Galor脙漏
notes: Cloves Oil Of Madagascar, Cinnamon, Geranium Oil Of Egypt, Rose, Orris, Oud, Cypriol, Copahu Balm, Incense, Sandalwood
style: Floral, Fresh - Clean, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: INVITING, AUTHENTIC, INTENSEThe word 芒聙聹galore芒聙聺 implies near-infinite abundance. Wear this resinous, otherworldly fragrance to see the things you desire multiply around you. Oud, also known as agarwood, is overwhelmingly popular in the Middle East and Asia芒聙聰it芒聙聶s indescribably sexy and entrancing. This powerful fragrance will draw people closer.

name: Sweet Taboo
notes: Clary Sage, Cardamom, Cinnamon, Geranium, Cacao, Coffee, Benzoin Siam, Tonka Bean, Vanilla, Musk
style: Smoky, Spicy, Sweet
description: Warm and inviting with a wink, this scent will become an obsession. This fragrance inspires you to break taboos in search of pleasure. Gourmand notes like coffee, cardamom, and vanilla create a seductive atmosphere few can resist.

name: Long Kiss Goodnight
notes: Pink Saffron, Passion Fruit, Coffee Beans, Frankincense, Centifolia Rose, Pink Peony, Agarwood (Oud), Crisp Amber, Vanilla Bean
style: Floral - Fruity, Fresh - Clean, Fruity, Metallic, Tropical / Beachy
description: WARM, DREAMY, ROMANTICLong Kiss Goodnight blurs the boundary between mysterious and approachable, with a burst of bright, tropical passion fruit intermingling with bittersweet coffee bean. Lifelike rose and amber create a plush atmosphere, while resinous oud lingers in your memory like a romantic embrace.

name: Citrus Grandis
notes: Pomelo, Yuzu, Cedrat, Blackcurrant, Verbena, Cedarwood, Vetiver, Sandalwood, Elemi, Incense, Musk
style: Citrus, Fresh, Fresh - Citrus, Spicy
description: SPARKLING, SUNNY, PERCEPTIVEBright and radiant, pomelo and citrus notes accentuate the wearer芒聙聶s natural charisma. Sharp, herbaceous verbena and earthy woods ground the scent and project confidence and maturity. This fragrance is as serious and as playful as you are.

name: Lost In Paradise
notes: Coconut Water, Peach Skin, Salted Musk
style: Fresh - Aquatic, Fruity, Tropical / Beachy
description: Like salt spray off the Caribbean Sea, Lost in Paradise transports you with coconut water and marine notes. Warm, languorous ylang-ylang contrasts with the wanderlust-provoking scent of salted musk. Wear this fragrance to summon a feeling of peacefulness and possibility.

name: Rain Tea
notes: Chrysanthemum, Wattle, Chamomile, White Tea And Rain, Barley, Honey And Longan, Herbal, Tea, Aromatic, Floral
description: A calming fragrance to soothe our heart's desire for tea when it rains... Soft raindrops upon the foliage of the freshly bloomed wattle trees, adrift with the gentle breeze - melding with the scent of our herbal tea.

name: Weeping Rose
notes: Rose Bud Tea, Red Apple And Juniper Berries, Fig Leaf And Orris Root, Maple, Amber And Vanilla Bean
style: Floral - Fruity, Fresh, Fruity, Spicy, Sweet
description: Weeping Rose is a fragrance in whose heart needs a gentle uplift with a cloud of sweet rose harmony and a poetic sunset. Originally created to comfort a friend experiencing heartbreak. A multidimensional unique, tender mood setter. Perfect for a pick me up - and put a smile on someone.

name: Tea Service
notes: Jasmine And Oolong Tea, Osmanthus Absolute, Goji Berry And White Peach, Delicate Musks
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Spicy, White
description: A fragrance based on an interplay of beloved tea and fruits to forget about stresses in life - capturing the lively atmosphere of weekend gatherings where people connect, share sweets and pour jasmine tea that fills the air at yum cha.

name: Slow World
notes: Pu'er Tea, Saffron, Dragon's Blood Resin And Malt, Sandalwood, Vanilla Bean And Incense
style: Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy, Warm, Woody - Spicy
description: Slow World is a fragrance inspired by tea ceremonies during quiet mornings, where suddenly the world seems slow... A calming soft embrace wherever you are, carrying the whiffs of dreamy incense whispering earthy, woody and sweet secrets.

name: Bianco Oro
notes: Bergamot, Pink Pepper, Rose Absolute, Black Pepper, Javanol, Patchouli, Cetalox
description: Timelessly elegant, with striking veins of gold that arc across a pristine white backdrop, Bianco Oro marble is a treasured material to those with discerning taste. As such, the fragrance inspired by this unique stone is itself a thing of singular beauty, a rich amber scent of deep sensuality. Featuring a powerful accord of smooth, seductive musks, fiery black pepper, and warm, aphrodisiac patchouli, Bianco Oro stirs emotions that run as deep as the most precious of marbles.

name: Blu Indaco
notes: Bergamot, Pink Pepper, Frangipane, Vanilla, Almond, Ambroxan, Muscenone, Habanolide
description: A perfume of rare and challenging beauty, Blu Indaco is a study in contrasts- or more appropriately, a lesson in how disparate fragrances can create an alluringly cohesive olfactory landscape. Vibrantly bright Calabrian bergamot weaves improbably easily with bitter almond, submerged in a warm bath of mouthwateringly sugared vanilla. An elegant frangipane heart seems to encompass facets of a wide range of florals- a lushly rosy touch, the sweetness of honeysuckle, the indolic sensuality of jasmine. The base is a complex and sophisticated musk, clean but gently animalic, for a restrained but seductive hum that synthesizes the entire fragrance into a one-of-a-kind but gorgeously cohesive whole. Blu Indaco may not be the kind of fragrance that can be easily captured in a single sentence, but for those it's meant for, that's the whole point.

name: Celeste
notes: Fresh Lavender, Citrus Accord, Sea Notes, Raspberry Violet, Vanilla, Ambroxan
style: Floral, Gourmand, Salty / Oceanic, Sweet
description: The scent of a bright, clear dawn after a ferocious nighttime storm. The air suddenly turns soft and fresh, the sky seems to expand into the heavens, and the scents of life float on the gentle breeze- the citrus-kissed brightness of the sun, the salty moisture of the ocean, the green and lush essence of flowers in fresh bloom. This is the promise of Celeste, a fragrance to perfectly capture one of nature's most ephemerally beautiful moments.

name: Colonia Nobile
notes: Bergamot, Petit Grain, Neroli, Karismal, Jasmine, Benzoin, Ambrettolide, Ambroxan, Oak Moss
description: While Colonia Nobile does indeed evoke the timeless elegance of a gentleman's eau de cologne, it is, in fact, a fully unisex eau de parfum- charmingly vintage to be certain, yet uniquely sophisticated. A classic composition based on vibrant bergamot, lemon, and petitgrain is balanced against warm, resinous amber. The typical freshness of a cologne is further enhanced by a floral bouquet, enhanced with the velvety muskiness of natural ambrette seed and rich oakmoss- both a perfect EDC but also something else entirely. For those who appreciate a romantic twist on an all-time favorite, Colonia Nobile is a perfect selection.

name: BoraBora
notes: Tiare, Ylang Ylang, Jasmine, Apricot, Coconut Milk, White Musk, Jasmolactone, Vanilla, Amber, White Musks, Caramel
description: A real olfactory metaverse. Borabora whisks you through a romantic explosion of flowers: tropical tiare, sweet ylang-ylang, luscious rose, and sultry jasmine. From there, the fragrance drags you into a joyful dance of mouthwatering coconut and vanilla, creamy and indulgent, buffeted by a warm base of elegant musks and seductive amber. Borabora is a celebration, a journey, an invitation to dance- will you answer?
